Lelihlandla lesibili lekutseleleka nge-COVID-19 lingalandzelwa ngemahlandla lachubekako, latawu-beka timphilo tebantfu engotini kanye nekuvuseteleka kabusha kwemnotfo.Njengaloku lomnyaka vele utawubamatima, nginesicini-seko noko kutsi sitaluncoba lolubhubhane bese sibeka live letfu endleleni ngaloku-cinile endleleni leya ekuli-vuseteleleni kabusha. Kutetsemba kwami kuvela kubantfu baseNingizimu Afrika. Nangibuka kutsi bantfu baseNingizimu Afrika baphendvule njani kulenkinga kusukela nje leligciwane lafika lapha eveni letfu, angingabati kutsi sinako loko kumelana, kutekhuta kanye nemandla ekuncoba lesifo.Kuliciniso kubekhona lapho kungahambanga kahle khona, kodvwa linyenti lebantfu baseNingizimu Afrika basivisisa sidzingo sekuti-vimbela ekuhambeni kwabo kanye nasemisebentini, bahambisana nalemitsetfo-simiso lesiyishayile. Ngisho nangetulu kwekuhambisana nemitsetfosimiso, linyenti lebantfu baseNingizimu Afrika batitsatsele sibopho kanye nekutibophelela futsi nakulabanye, balandzela teluleka letifanana neku-chelelana ngekwetenhlalo, kufaka sifonyo kanye neku-geza tandla.Lapho singentanga kuhle khona, ngekudzabuka siyibonile imiphumela yako. Nyalo sesiyati mayelana ngebungoti betindzawo leti-valiwe kanye nemihlangano lenesicuku sebantfu, we-kungafaki sifonyo kanye nekungachelelani nalabanye.Loku kubika lokuhle ngalomnyaka losembi kwetfu. Nyalo sesati ka-banti mayelana ngalesifo nekutsi singasivikela njani kutsi singabhebhetseki. Na-nome sekunaloko umuntfu langakubita ngekutsi 'kukhatsala kwelubhubhane', loko akusho kutsi asikatimi-seli njengebantfu baseNingizimu Afrika kwenta loko lokudzingeka kutsi sikwente.Njengaloku sitigcina nge-mandla lamakhulu tinyatselo letimcoka tekuvikela, si-tawube futsi sicala ngemkhankhaso lomkhulu wekugo-ma. Njengaloku linyenti lebantfu ligonywa, sitawube senta kokubili sisindzisa timphilo siphindze futsi ngekuchubeka njalo sinci-phise bungoti bekwesuleleka ngaleligciwane ebantfwini. Kutfola tigomo ngeku-shesha nakwenteka – kanye nekwenta siciniseko sekutsi letigomo tifinyelela kulabo bantfu labatidzingako – kutawuba nguleminye yemisebenti lemikhulukati kulonyaka. Loku kutawuba yinsayeya nakuwo onkhe emave emhlabeni wonkhana njengaloku kuphangelanwa ngekutfola luphakelo lolu-nemkhawulo lwetigomo. Kodvwa sisebenta kama-tima nebalingani betfu kutemabhizinisi, betemisebenti, kanye nebetinhlangano temmango kute kutsi loku kube yimphumelelo. Sisebenta ngetindlela letahlukahlukene kutsi sitfole tigomo, lokufaka ekhatsi kusebentisa sisetjentiswa semhlaba wonkhe i-COVAX, umtamo weLu-bubhano lwe-Afrika kanye nekuchumana kwetfu nalabo labenta lesigomo. Njengaloku senta loku nge-kuhlanganyela kute sincobe lolubhubhane, kutawudzingeka kutsi sisebente ngekuhlanganyela ekwakheni futsi kanye nekuntjintja umnotfo wetfu. Sinawo emandla kanye nenshisekelo kokubili kutsi sikhutsate imisebenti yetemnotfo, sikhulise umnotfo wetfu futsi sidale imise-benti. Futsi sikwente loko nanome lolubhubhane lunje. Timali tahulumende tingaphasi kwekucindzeteleka lokukhulu, ikakhulu nyalo nangenca yekuphendvula ngekwetemphilo kule-CO-VID-19 kanye nangetinyatselo tekuhhamula tetemnotfo netenhlalo lesitibekile kute sisite betemabhizinisi kanye nemakhaya laphuyile. Kuncipha kwemnotfo kusho kutsi imalingena yemtselo yehlile kakhulu. Kunetincenye letitsite temnotfo leti-tawutsatsa sikhatsi lesidze kutsi tivuseteleleke ngenca yekufunwa kwato lokuncane ngumhlaba wonkhe jikelele kanye nekuvinjelwa kuhambela emave emhlaba. Kungaleso sizatfu-ke kutsi sidzinga kutsi sicabange tintfo  letinsha futsi sigcile emaswini etfu ekwakheni futsi lomnotfo. Ngalokumcoka, leLisu Lekwakha Kabusha Umnotfo Nekuwuvusetela lesalimemetela ngenyanga yeMphala kulomnyaka lophelile limayelana neku-vumelana emkhatsini wabo bonkhe mayelana naloko le-kumele kutsi kwentiwe kute kwakhiwe kabusha lomnotfo. Loku kubeka sisekelo lesicinile sekusebentisana ngekuhlanganyela kusetjentiswe imitfombolusito, emakhono kanye nemandla abo bonkhe balingani be-tenhlalo.Kungaleso sizatfu-ke sidzinga kutsi sibe nemcondvo lo-musha futsi sigcile emaswini etfu ekwakha kabusha umnotfo wetfu. Sibonelo, sisebentisane ngekuhlanganyela nebasiti ngetimali labatimele kanye netikhungo tentfutfuko letinengi kute silungi-selele imiklamo yesakhiwonchanti emikhakheni lefana-na netekutfutsa, tekuhlaliswa kwebantfu, temanti nete-kuchumana. Ngekusebentisa Sikhwama Sesakhiwonchanti njengalokunye lesingakuse-bentisa, sisungula tindlela tekusita ngetimali lemiklamo lesebentisa imitfombolu-sito leminengi kuyo yomibili imikhakha, yahulumende naletimele. Loku kubaluleke kakhulu ngalesikhatsi lapho timali tahulumende tinganeli.  Luhlelo lweSikhutsati saMengameli Semisebenti ngulesinye sibonelo  sekwenteka kwekusebenta ngekuhlanganyela. Kuvi-sisa noko kutsi kutawutsatsa sikhatsi kutsi kukhula kutemnotfo kuholele ekubeni nemsebenti kumkhakha lo-timele, setfule lesikhutsati se-misebenti kutsi sicale kudala ematfuba emsebenti nyalo. Loluhlelo luchunyaniswa eHhovisi laMengameli, kodvwa lifezekiswa ngema-tiko lamanengi ahulumende kanye nasemikhakheni lehlukene. Ngaloluhlelo, tinkhulungwane letingemashumi ebantfu labangasebenti bakhona kutfola kokubili, kufundza nekuhola njenga-loku banika tinsita tetenhlalo letimcoka. Ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi, loluhlelo lutawufaka ekhatsi incenye 'yemse-benti yetenhlalo', lapho sitawuhlanganyela khona naleminye imikhakha  yetenhlalo kute kucashwe bantfu emisebentini leyahlukahlukene – kusukela ekwenteni ncono kutsi kube nekudla, kubukana nebudlova lobucondziswe ebulilini lobutsite kute kutfutfukiswe tekuhlaliswa kwebantfu lokungakahleleki – konkhe kube neligalelo ekwenteni lokuhle. Yonkhe lemisebenti icinisekiswa ngekutsi kugcilwe kakhulu kuleto tingucuko tetemnotfo letitawuba nekugcila lokukhulu ekukhuleni. Loku kufaka ekhatsi kwandziswa kwemandla ekuphehla gezi, kwenta tintfunja tetfu tekungena nekuphuma kulelive tisebente ngemphumelelo nangekuchudzelana, kwenta ncono kufinyelela kutfola kuchumana nge-inthanethi lokusheshisako lokungabiti, kanye nekwenta ncono tikhatsi tekubuyisa timvume tetemanti, tetimayini kanye naletinye timvume. Lemi-tamo ichunyaniswa futsi yeluswa ngekuhlanganyela Lihhovisi lami neSikhwama Savelonkhe.Kunyenti lekusamele kutsi kwentiwe kulomnyaka lesi-kuwo. Futsi singakunga-bati lokutsi sisatawubukana netinsayeya letetfusako. Kodvwa sikhombisile kutsi njengesive, siyakhona kuphumelela nangabe sise-bentisana ngekuhlanganyela ekwenteni inhloso yinye.Nangabe sikhumbula loko, futsi nangabe bunye betfu sibusebentisa, sitawucinisekisa kutsi umnyaka wa-2021  uletsela bantfu bakitsi bonkhe temphilo letincono netimphilo letincono.Nginifisela konkhe lokuhle kulomnyaka lomusha.

Kusenjalo, nanome kunjalo, ku tawudzingeka kutsi sisebentise imali kakhulu kute sisekele kwakhiwa kabusha kwema-SOE njenge-Eskom ne-SAA. Ngenca yaloko, silindzele kwehla  nge samba lesitigidzigidzi leti-R156 kulusebentisomali lete intalo kulethemu lesemkhatsini.  Loku kutawusita ekutseni ku nciphise kuswelakala kwemali bese kunciphisa tidzingo tetfu tekuboleka.  Incenye lenkhulu yekonga itawuvela ekunciphiseni sili nganiso  sekwenyuka kwemali yekukhokhela tisebenti. Loku kutawudzinga kutsi kube neku cocisana lokugcilile emkhatsini webalingani betenhlalo, kodvwa kakhulu netinyonyane temkha kha wetisebenti tahulumende.
Lokucocisana kudzinga kutsi kwentiwe ngemoya wekufuna tisombululo. Ngiyakhutsateka kubona kukhombisa umoya wekuvuma kwemacembu onkhe kutsi kubanjwe tinkhu lumiswano letibalulekile loku hloswe ngato kutsi kutfolwe sisombululo.  Indlela yetfu lesiyilandzelako kutsi singasuki nje sincamule bungako betisebenti tahulu mende, kodvwa kuhlolwe lizinga lekwenyuka kwemiholo.
Imiholo yetisebenti tahulu mende ngekwe-avareji yenyuke ngelizinga lelisetulu kakhulu kwengca emandla emali emi nyakeni leminyenti leyengcile, futsi sidzinga kutsi sikulungise loku nangabe sifuna timali tahulumende kutsi tilawuleke.
Loku kuphindze futsi kufake ekhatsi lulawulo lwetimali ta lowo nalowo muntfu, nangabe  kukhona lapho lusebentisomali lwentfo lwenyuka ngelizinga le lengca emandla emali – kunga ba ngematharifu agezi, ematha rifu amakhalekhikhini nome ekudla – kutawubeka sabelo mali sanome ngabe ngumuphi umuntfu kanye netetimali takhe ngaphasi kwekucindzeteleka kanye nekungasimami.  Imali yekukhokhela tisebenti siyincenye lenkhulukati yeluse bentisomali ngekuya kwetem notfo. Kukhula kwesikweleti sekukhokhela tisebenti sekucale kwenta kutsi imali ingasaset jentiselwa imiklamo lemikhulu yekukhula kwesikhatsi lesitako kanye nasetintfweni letimcoka tekwetfulwa kwetinsita.  Imali yekukhokhela tisebenti tahulumende akusiyo kuphela indzawo lapho sehlisa khona ti ndleko. Ngincume kutsi tisebe nti letisetulu tahulumende tinge nyuselwa umholo kulomnya ka. Loku kulandzela kuncishi swa kwetinzuzo lokusukela etingucukweni letiseBhukwini leTindvuna. Sitawushicilela umtsetfo lomusha lonyaka setfu le luhlakamsebenti lwemiholo yetikhungo tahulumende kanye netinkampani tahulumende kute kuvinjelwe kukhokhelwa ngalokwecile kwemalunga ebhodi kanye newetigungu letiphetse.  Balingani betfu  betinyo nyana tetisebenti tikubeka kahle kakhulu natitsi kufanele kutsi ngendlela lekhombisako sikuvikele kuvuta kwetimali tahulumende ngekutsi sicedze inkhohlakalo, kucedvwe kusetjentiswa kwetimali ngalokungekho emtsetfweni, kucedvwe ludebentisomali lo lute inzuzo kanye nekusaphata timali. Sitawukwenta loko kanye nalokunye lokunyenti.
Nanome kulawula timali tekukhokhela imiholo yetise -benti tahulumende kuyintfo lemcoka ekusimamiseni timali tahulumende, kwenta ncono kusebenta kwemkhakha wahu lumende kubalulekile nangabe sifuna kwakha umbuso lokho nako nalonelikhono. Sidzinga kakhulu bantfu labafanele kutsi babe setikhundleni letifanele.  Njengaloku silawula kusebe ntisa imali yembuso, sihlose ku tsi kube nekukhula. Kungaleso sizatfu-ke kutsi, nanome kune ligebe kutetimali tahulumende, kute kwenyuka lokukhulu  emtselweni. Esikhundleni  saloko, kukhona kuhhamule ka lokutsite kulabo nalabo  labakhokha umtselo kanye neti nyatselo letinengi tekwandzisa sitinto semtselo wemabhizi nisi. Sichubukele embili futsi nangetingucuko letinemtselela lobanti etindzaweni letifanana nekuphakelwa kwagezi, ku minyele yaselwandle yekunge na nekuphuma kulelive kanye netetitimela netekuchumana kute kuncishiswe tindleko tekuchuba ibhizinisi. Ngeku sebentisa Sikhwama seTakhi wonchanti sihlose kuhlanganisa ndzawonye lusito lwetetimali loluvela kumitfombolusito lemi nengi kute kutjalwe timali ku luhlelo lolukhulu lwekwakha.
Ngekusebentisa lisubuciko letetimboni kanye nesikhutsati selutjalomali sivula tindzawo letimcoka tekukhula.  Silungisa tetimali tetfu ta hulumende kute kutsi sente kutsi kube nekukhula lokungu khukhulelangoco kanye neku dala imisebenti kwenteke.
Tikhatsi letinjengaleti tisibita kutsi sente tintfo ngeliciniso, singabi bantfu labangafuni kuphikiswa. Tikhatsi letifuna kutsi sebente ngekuhlanga nyela, hhayi kungcubutana.
Kutawudzinga kutsi kube nekuyekelwa loko umuntfu labekubambile kuphindze futsi kube nekuvumela.Sisonkhe kuloku, futsi sinekutibopha lo kufanako sonkhe kutsi kwekutsi sitsatse tigwedli tetfu, sigwedle kanyekanye, sicondzise lelive letfu kutsi liphumele ngale kwaletivunguvungu lelibukene nato.

Liciniso litsi sikudzinga kokubili loku. Sidzinga sive lesikhona kutfutfuka kanye nemkhakha lotimele losebenta kahle nalosheshisako.
Kudzingeka kutsi yomibili imikhakha isebentisane futsi ihambisane. Lomcondvo lona awusimusha. Eminyakeni lemashumi lamatsatfu leyengca, ngemnyaka we-1992, iAfrican National Congress yavumelana ngaledokhumenti lenesihloko lesitsi ‘Ready to Govern’. Ledokhumenti iniketa tinkhombandlela  teNingizimu Afrika yentsandvoyelinyenti futsi, kuleminyaka lemashumi lamatsatfu, ibe nemtselela ekukhombeni kutsi kufuneka kuphatfwe ngekulandzela intsandvoyelinyenti nangekunikana ematfuba.
Ledokhumenti letsi ‘Ready to Govern’ beyihlose kutsi kube nahulumende wentsandvoyelinyenti lotawusebenta kuchumanisa,  kuhlela kanye nekukhomba indlela yekutfutfukisa umnotfo lotawuba nephethini yekukhula kwemnotfo lotawuletsa kusimama nekubambisana nembutfo wetinyonyane tebasebenti, emabhizinisi kanye naletinye tinhlaka temmango.
Ledokhumenti beyikhuluma ngesidzingo sekutsi kube nenchubomgomo yetemnotfo letawuletsa intsandvoyelinyenti kutemnotfo bese yakha ematfuba emisebenti letawunika bantfu baseNingizimu Afrika imiholo lesezingeni lekutiphilisa.
Ledokhumenti futsi beyihlose kutsi kube ‘nemkhakha lotimele loshukumako, lotawusebentisa emakhono nekuhlakanipha kwawo wonkhe umuntfu waseNingizimu Afrika …nekutsi emabhizinisi asebente ngendlela lefaka ligalelo lelikhulu ekwakheni ematfuba emisebenti, lokutawuhlala kukhutsatwa njalo.’  Kulenkhulumo YaMenga meli Lemayelana Nebunjalo Belive yakamuva, ngichazile kutsi kufuneka hulumende, emabhizinisi nebasebenti basebentisane njani, kube nguloyo naloyo asebentise likhono lakhe lelingakavami, kwakha ematfuba emsebenti.  Lenye yetintfo letihamba embili ekukhuliseni umnotfo nekucashwa kwebantfu ngilamabhizinisi ahulumende (ema-SOE). Akhicita gezi, alawula emacweba, akha imigwaco futsi aphakela emanti ladzingwa ngumnotfo kute ukhone kusebenta.
Kusukela kwafika intsa ndvoyelinyenti, lama-SOE akhulise kukhulu kufinyelela kutinsita letisisekelo kulabo labaphuyile. Kungako incenye lebucayi yeluhlelo lwetfu kukukhulisa emabhizinisi ahulumende, kuwabuyisele esimeni semnotfo lesikahle, kutfutfukisa kusebenta kwawo nekutsi siwente kutsi adlale indzima lemcoka kakhulu naletawuletsa inzuzo kutemnotfo.  Kuliciniso loko lokuhloswe ‘yiReady to Govern’, hulumende uhola kokubili kukhula kwemnotfo netingucuko ngekusebentisa tintfo letifana netinchubomgomo tekucudzelana, tibonelelo tekufukulwa lokubanti kwebantfu labamnyama kutemnotfo kanye nemitsetfo yetekulingana emsebentini, nangekuchumanisa kuniketwa kwemalayisensi lahlukahlukene kute asebente yonkhe indzawo kanye netibopho tekunikwa emandla.
Hulumende futsi uyatsintseka ngco ekukhiciteni ematfuba ekucashwa ngetulu kwalawo alabo labasebenta kuHulumende.
Loluhlelo Lwemisebenti Yahulumende Lolululiwe, lolwacala kusebenta kusukela ngemnyaka we-2003, selukhicite ematfuba emise-benti ebantfwini labatigidzi.  Esikhatsini lesisandza kwendlula, aphendvula kulomtselela lomubi walobhubhane weCOVID-19, lohulumende lona ungamele kukhula lokumcoka kakhulu kwekucashwa nguhulumende emlandvweni walelive.
Luhlelo LwaMengameli Lwekugcugcutela Kucashwa lisekele ematfuba emisebenti langetulu kwe-85 000 etinyangeni leti-16 kuphela.
Kungeta kulokukhula kwekucashwa nguhulumende, sisite bantfu labasha labangasebenti kute sibalungiselele kusebenta, sibente bacasheke kanye nekubachumanisa nematfuba.
Kunaletinye tindlela letinengi hulumende langafaka ngato ligalelo ngco ekuvuleni ematfuba emsebenti, lokufaka ekhatsi kusisa kakhulu kusakhiwonchanti, kusungula tindzawo letikhetsekile tetemnotfo nangekusekela timboni leticasha bantfu ngebunengi.
Kulomnyaka sigcile kakhulu kumabhizinisi lamancane, lasafufusa, kutinhlangano temabhizinisi nakumkhakha longakahleleki.  Ngalokuhlela kabusha sicinisekiso semalimboleko  lesatfulwa ngasekucaleni kwetinyanga tekubhedvuka kwabhubhane weCOVID-19, senta kutsi imali ‘longaphindza uyibolekwe’ itfolakale kalula kumabhizinisi lamancane.
Sikhulisa lesikhutsati sekuncishicelwa intsela futsi sibuka letinye tingucuko tekulawula letehlukahlukene kute sente kuba malula kutsi emabhizinisi lamancane akhone kucasha bantfu labanengi.
Njengoba ngishilo kuNkhulumo YaMengameli Yebunjalo Belive, leti ngule tinye tetindlela lesititsatsako njengahulumende “kwenta simo lesitawenta umkhakha lotimele usebente – yomibili umkhakha lomkhulu nalomncane – kugcama, kukhula, kufinyelela etimakethe, kwakha imikhicito lemisha nekungeta kucashwa kwebasebenti. “ Umkhakha lotimele ucasha emakota lamatsatfu ebasebenti baseNingizimu Afrika futsi ubukene nekusisa lokungetulu kwesigamu lesingulokubili kulokutsatsu kanye netindleko teluphenyo netekutfutfukisa.
Edvute nesive lesinelikhono nalesisatfutfuka, live letfu lidzinga umkhakha lotimele lokhulako losisa kumakhono ekukhicita.
Njengoba umkhakha wangasese ukhula, tindlela tebantfu labanengi tekuphila tiyasekelwa futsi tiyasimama. Imphahla netinsita tiyaphakelwa ngebunyenti futsi nahulumende wentsandvoyelinyenti uyakhona kugcogca ngalokungetiwe intsela kute kutfutfukiswe tenhlalo.
Ledokhumenti ‘iReady to Govern’ itsi umsebenti wahulumende “kufuneka kube kucondzanisa tidzingo temnotfo wavelonkhe ngendlela levumelana netimo”, nanoma ngabe loko kukhulisa umkhakha wahulumende etindzaweni letibucayi noma kuwunciphisa kuletinye tindzawo. 
Angeke sikhone kutfola umnotfo lonjena ngaphandle kwekuba nako kokubili sive lesinemandla nalesisatfutfuka kanye nemkhakha lotimele lofaka konkhe, lokhula masinyane. Akufuneki sicelwe kutsi sikhetse kunye noma lolokunye. Sikudzinga kokubili.

Emva kwekutsengisa iTupperware  aneminyaka le-19, lentfombi leneminyaka lenge-28 budzala itsi beyivele inelutsa ndvo lolukhulu lwekuticalela ibhizinisi yayo ngako-ke seyi jabulile nyalo kutsi seyilicalile leli bhizinisi.
“Ngicale ngekutsi ngise bentele lomunye kulemboni kulapho-ke ngatfola khona sipiliyoni,” kwasho yena njalo, angeta ngekutsi wenta tifu ndvo tekutimonyonga, icosmetology  eKolishi laseMothe le-TVET leliseBloemfontein.
Ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi wakulungela kutsi akhone aphume atimele futsi akazange asabuka emuva kusukela leso sikhatsi. Ibhizinisi yakhe ina makhasmende lamanyenti eBotshabelo futsi linani lama khasimende akhe liyakhula. Emakhasimende akhe uwalu ngisa tinzipho temino neteti ntwane, kufocofocotwa, kususa boya nekulungiswa buso.
Titfombe tespa sakhe le sisemkhukhwini latitfumele etinkhundleni tekuchumana tibe nelisasasa lelikhulu, lapho ba ntfu bebadvumisa khona umco ndvo lomusha waMasakane basho nekusho futsi kutsi uya wakhutsata emantfombatana aselokishini.
Spa lesisemkhukhwini we masenke lamanyako lobukeka njengalotayelekile lapha nge phandle, lespa sinelingekhatsi lelinetsetekile lelilungele kahle kakhulu kutimonyonga.
“Kuta kwebantfu labangaka kwabangetulu kwaloko bengi kucabanga. Ngisasemangele nanyalo futsi ngetfukile. Ku ngenta ngititfobe kakhulu na ngibona bantfu basemma ngweni wami bangesekela ngalendlela ngisho nebantfu labavela ngaphandle kweFreyi stata.”Masakane yintsandzane futsi wakhuliswa ngu-anti wakhe lonebhizinisi yetinkhukhu, nalophindze futsi atsengise emaswidi, emakokisi nema ntongomane: lokuyinkhomba lengangabatisi kutsi temabhi zinisi vele tisengatini kulo mndeni.
 “Liphupho lami lelikhulu kutsi ngibone ibhizinisi yami ikhula idlondlobale ngendlela yekutsi idale ematfuba emise benti kulabo labangasebenti kanye nekunika bantfu labase basha litsemba lekutsi umu ntfu uyaphumelela emphilwe ni kuphela nje nakatawubeka ingcondvo yakhe kuloko la kwentako,” kusho yena njalo Masakane.
Utsite kwanyalo usafuna kugcila ekukhuliseni ibhizinisi yakhe ngekutsi atfole kakhulu kuceceshwa kute kutsi andzise lusito langalunika emakhasi mende akhe.

Ngekwesekelwa ngetima li Litiko Letemvelo, loluhlelo luwela ngaphasi kweLuhlelo lweTemisebenti yaHulumende leyeNgetiwe (i-EPWP).Luniketa litsemba kulusha lolunyenti lolungatfoli imisebenti futsi selube nemphumelelo lencomeka kakhulu ekuvikeleni nasekulawuleni imililo yesiganga, lunciphisa lifutse lwayo.
Loluhlelo lucasha bantfu la bangetulu kwalaba-5 000 la bavela emimangweni lephuyile luphindze futsi lubaceceshe kutekwati ngemlilo, temfundvo kanye nekuwucindzetela nala manye emakhono, njengelusito lwekucala, kubata, kupheka, temphilo netekuphepha kanye netekuchumana.
Sikhulu setekuchuma se-WOF Lebogang Maseko uchaze watsi loluhlelo luhlose bantfu labasha luphindze futsi lucasha bantfu labakhubatekile kutsi base bente etikhungweni talo letisetifundzeni.
“Sigcizelelaka kakhulu kutfutfukisa emakhono nekuni ka lusha imisebenti, lusha lolu -sha loluvela etikolweni temabanga laphakeme noma lolusandza kuphotfula etikhungweni temfundvo lephakeme. Kubaceceshwa balohlulelo, labange ma-94% ngebantfu labasha, la bange-31% bomake bese kutsi labayi-3% ngebantfu labakhu batekile,” washo acinisekisa.
Lorraine Mokoena (lone minyaka yebudzala le-31) wase Mpumalanga ungulomunye webaceceshwa lowazuza kulo luhlelo. Bekaloku asebenta lapha ka-WOF yonkhe leminyaka le-11 leyendlulile.
Ngemuva kwekuphotfula ma tikuletjeni washikashikeka imi nyaka lemibili angatfoli umse benti. Sisi wakhe wabese umtjela ngaloluhlelo lwe-WOF.
“Inchubo yekufaka sicelo beyimatima. Kuphila nekucina kwemtimba nguyona ndlela lebaluleke kakhulu yekukhetsa labatawungena kulomsebenti futsi baceceshwa bafakwa eti gabeni tabo. Ungaphumelela kusivivinyo ubese udzingeka kutsi uphumelele nakuluhlolo lwetemphilo kubese-ke kuba ngukhona kucala lucecesho lwekucisha umlilo," kwasho yena.
Mokoena wacala alijuniya lesicimamlilo futsi sewusebente ngekutikhandla wakhuphu ka waba ngumholi lomkhulu welicembu lebacimimlilo, uhola licembu lebacimimlilo laba-18.
“Lomsebenti uyintjintjile imphilo yami. Ngimi kuphela lo nesibopho salokuya etfunjini se bantfwana bakitsi nebantfwana bami lababili. Manje ngiyakhona kondla umndeni wami ngiyise nebantfwana bami esikolweni,” kwasho Mokoena.”Ukuvumile kutsi lomsebenti wekucima umlilo ngalokwetayelekile ungumsebenti wemadvodza futsi sewufundze kutsi acine abe nemandla ku lomkhakha.
Mokoena uphokophele ekube ni ngumphatsi wemisebenti yemacembu kuleminyaka lemibili letako. Loku kutawume-nta kutsi abe nesibopho sawo onkhe emacembu e-WOF lase Mphumalanga.
Njengoba naku sesifikelwe sikhatsi semililo, Mokoena unikete lamasu ekuvikela imililo yesiganga lalandzelako: 
• Ungalumeki imililo  endzaweni levulekile uma ngabe angeke ukhone kuwu lawula.
• Yenta siciniseko sekutsi une lusito netisetjentiswa letenele tekubukana nato tonkhe timo.
• Ungawushiyi umlilo unga kagadvwa.
• Caphela simo selitulu. Imililo ayikafaneli kutsi ilunyekwe etindzaweni letivulekile ema langeni lashisa kakhulu noma lahhusha kakhulu.

Uma ngabe mdlavuta usheshe watfolakala wabese uyelashwa, ematfuba ekwelulama ngalokuphelele abasetulu.
UMchumanisi Wenhlangano YaseNingi zimu Afrika Yamdlavuta Wasebuntfwaneni (i-CHOC) Taryn Seegers utsi ngekwati timphawu tamdlavuta kubantfu labancane, unga sita usindzise imphilo.
“Timphawu netinkhomba kungaba matima kutibona emkhatsini wemaguludla, imitfubulela, timila kanye nekuntjintjantjintja kwemiva. Nanoma kunjalo, kutfolakala kwato kubalule kile kakhulu,” kusho yena.
Ngekuya kweNhlangano YaseNingizimu Afrika Yetamdlavuta (i-CANSA), njalo ngemnyaka bantfwana baseNingizimu Afrika labatfolakala banamdla vuta basemkhatsini walabange-800 kuya kulaba 1 000.
Nanoma kunjalo, lenhlangano ilinganisela ekutsini ihhafu yalaba ntfwana eNingizimu Afrika abatfolwa.
Kwenta siciniseko sekutsi mdlavuta ubonwa masinyane, i-CHOC yenta tinhlelo tekucaphelisa emimangweni, itjela batali nebantfwana ngetimphawu letisheshe tibekhona teku caphelisa labafanele kutsi baticaphele.
Lenhlangano yesekela bantfwana nebantfu labasha labanamdlavuta noma tifo tengati letisongela imphilo kanye nemindeni yabo.
“Sihlose kusheshe sisi bone lesifo bese siselapha ngemphumelelo. Nanoma ngunini, i-CHOC ingana kekela bantfwana nebantfu labasha labangetulu kwalaba-1 500, ibe futsi yesekela ngekwetengcondvo nangekwetenhlalo imindeni lengetulu kwale-1 500,” kusho Seegers.
Kulomnyakatimali lophe lile, Seegers utsi i-CHOC yakhona kutfula tinsita kubantfwana laba-1 724, bantfu labasha laba-553 kanye nebantfu labadzala laba-2 232 ngetinhlelo tayo letingumgogodla.
 “Tinsita tetfu tifaka ekhatsi kwesekelwa ngekwemiva ngesikhatsi basesebukene namdlavuta, kudvudvutwa, kunakekelwa kwaseku -pheleni kwemphilo kanye nekwesekelwa uma sewu shonelwe,” kusho Seegers.
Timphawu taSt Siluan  tamdlavuta wasebuntfwaneni• S – Funa lusito lwetekwe lashwa kusenesikhatsi lwetinkhomba letichube kako.
• I – Licashata lelimhlo phe esweni, kufica liso lokusha, kungaboni emehlweni lokuvele-nje kwenteke ngekushesha noma kukhukhumuka kwendvumbu yeliso.
• L – Sigadla esiswini, engculwini, enhloko, emkhonweni, emile nteni, emasendzeni noma emandlaleni.
• U – Imfimva lengatiwa kutsi ibangwa yini lebambana ngetulu kwemaviki lamabili, kwehla kwesisindvo semtimba, kudzinwa, kubukeka uphaphatse kile, kutfola imitfubulela kalula kanye nekopha.
• A – Kubabuhlungu kwematsambo, kwe malunga, kwemgogodla kanye nekwephuka kalula.
• N – Timphawu teku ngalungi kwemgogodla nalokuphatselene nawo, kugucuka kwendle la lohamba ngayo, kwekusimama noma kwenkhulumo, inhloko lengapheli lehambisana nekuhlanta noma lenga hambisani nekuhlanta kanye nekukhula kwenhloko.
“Bantfu labasha, labadla la imidlalo, abakavami kubona timphawu tekucala tamdlavuta wabo,” kusho Seegers.

“Sikwenta ngenhloso kutsi silungise kuswelakala kwemisebenti nebuphuya, siphindze futsi sibe nesibopho sekutsi sikhulise umnotfo,” kwasho yona njalo Indvuna Ndabeni-Abrahams.Ngesikhatsi akhuluma eMhlanganweni Welusha we-SheTradesZA lesandza kubanjelwa lapha ePitoli, Indvuna itsite samba lesikhulu semalimboleko se-TREP sibe esigidzini semarandi lesinye, incenye yinye iba sibonelomali bese kutsi lenye incenye ibe imalimboleko. Bosomabhizinisi labasetindzaweni tasemakhaya nome emalokishini bangafaka sicelo sekwesekelwa, lokufaka ekhatsi kusekelwa ngetimali, ngekusebentisa lifomu leleteyalekile lelibuya ku-Ejensi Yekutfutfukisa Emabhizinisi Lamancane (i-SEDA), i-Ejensi Yetetimali Yemabhizinisi Lamancane  (i-SEFA), i-Ejensi yeSikhwa ma Savelonkhe Sekutfutfu kisa (i-NEF) kanye ne-Ejensi Yavelonkhe Yekutfutfukisa Lusha (i-NYDA).Banikati bemabhizinisi kufanele kutsi babe takhamuti taseNingizimu  Afrika.Letikimi letilandzelako tiyatfolakala kulabo bosomabhizinisi labafanelekako:
• Luhlelo lwekwesekela babhaki betinkhwa nemakhekhe• Luhlelo lwekusekela kulungiswa kwetimoto kanye netitolo letitsengisa tincenye tetimoto neku khinika timoto (kanye netitolo letincane tetincenye tetimoto naletitimele kanye nabosomabhizinisi betimoto labatimele).• Luhlelo lwekwesekela emasilaha• Luhlelo lwekwesekela labatfunga timphahla tekugcoka, labasebenta ngesikhumba nangendvwangu• Luhlelo lwekwesekela kuticwala• Luhlelo lwekwesekela titolo tetisipaza• Luhlelo lwekwesekela ishisanyama nekudla lokuphekiweKubhalisa kungentiwa ku: smmesa.gov.za bese uce dzela lwatiso loludzinge kako.Kucinisekisa kutsi tinchubo tekutfola timali temabhizinisi lamancane kwenteka ngaphandle kwetihibe futsi kwenteka lula, hulumende umatasatasa ngekuhlanganisa ndzawonye tikhungo temabhizinisi lamancane kutsi akhe i-ejensi yinye.“Kwanyalo simatasatasa ngenchubo yekuhlanganisa i-SEFA ne-SEDA kanye ne-Ejensi Yekutfutfukisa Emabhange Lasebentisanako.”Luhlelo LweSheTrades Ndabeni-Abrahams utsite ngekusebentisa imitamo leyehlukahlukene, hulumende usite umkhakha wetemabhizinisi lamancane kutsi ukhule futsi udale kucasheka lokudzingeka kakhulu.“Litiko Letekutfutfukisa Emabhizinisi Lamancane ne-SEDA bakhe budle lwane neSikhungo Semave Emhlaba Sekuhweba (i-ITC), kute kutsi kuletfwe loluhlelo lwe-SheTrades lapha eNingizimu Afrika kanye nekudala kutsi kube nenkhaba ye-SheTradesZA. “Loluhlelo luhlose ku tfutfukisa emabhizinisi banikati bawo lababomake kutsi ahwebe lapha eveni, ngekwesigodzi kanye nasemaveni emhlaba. Lenkhaba isekela ekuciniseni emakho no etemabhizinisi kanye nekuchudzelana emkha tsini wabosomabhizinisi lababomake baseNingizimu Afrika lokungenani laba 10 000 esikhatsini lesimi nyaka lemine,” kwasho yona njalo Indvuna.Cishe bosomabhizinisi lababomake baseNingizimu Afrika la-3 000 sebevele babhalisile ku-SheTradesZA futsi batfola kufundza nge-inthanethi kwamahhala kanye nekuceceshelwa emakhono ekwenta umsebenti.Le-SheTradesZA itawuphindza futsi yente ncono kutsi kube nekufinyelela lokuncono kulutjalomali kwemabhizinisi laphetfwe bomake kanye nekugcu gcutela ematfuba etemabhi zinisi.“Kutimbandzakanya kwelitiko ne-SEDA ku SheTradesZA kukhombi sa kutinikela kwetfu ekutfutfukiseni kanye nasekucinisekiseni kutfutfukisa ngekwetemnotfo bomake baseNingizimu Afrika,” kwasho Indvuna Ndabeni-Abrahams.

Motsoaledi bekakhuluma emhlanganweni webetindza ba losandza kubanjwa lapho beketfula khona Umtsetfo sivivinyo wekuChitjelwa kwetindzaba te-NHI kanye neMtsetfosivivinyo wekuChi bela tindzaba teTikimu teTe kwelashwa.LeMitsetfosivivinyo ivula indlela yekutsi babe banengi bantfu labatfola tinsita tete mphilo ngekusebentisa i-NHI.
Umtsetfosivivinyo luhlaka lwemtsetfo. Imitsetfosivivi nyo leminyeti yentiwa litiko lahulumende ngekucondzi swa yindvuna lefanele. LoMtse tfosivivinyo ufanele kutsi ubese uvunywa yiKhabhine thi ngembi kwekutsi wetfulwe ePhalamende.
Lokwetfulwa kwaleMitse tfosivivinyo lemibili kusho kutsi iNigizimu Afrika seyi dvute ngesinyatselo sinye ekutsini itfole tekunakekelwa kwebantfu ngelizinga lelihle letemphilo ngalokufananako lokusho kutsi-ke masinyane nje i-NHI itawuba ngumtse tfo.
I-NHI iyinchubo yekusita ngetimali letawenta sicinise ko sekutsi tonkhe takhamuti taseNingizimu Afrika titfola tinsita tetemphilo letibalule kile, ngekungakhatsali ngeti mo tabo temsebenti kanye ne kutsi bayakhona yini kufaka imali ngco kulesikhwama.
Motsoaledi utsite hulu mende uyati kutsi kukhona bantfu labakholelwa eku tsini kungakacalwa nje kutsi kukhulunywe nge-NHI, ku nesidzingo sekutsi kucalwe ngekulungisa simo setinsita tetemphilo letintengantenga ko saseNigizimu Afrika.
Utsite hulumende uyatati letinkinga telizinga lelibi ne kweswelakala kwemakhono kutekunakekelwa ngetemphi lo tahulumende.
Mtsoaledi utsite Luhlelo  Lwekutfutfukisa Lwavelonkhe  (i-NDP) yakucaphela loku  nekutsi futsi ekufezekiswe ni kwale-NHI, kudzingeka kutsi kulungiswe lelizinga le libi letinsita tetemphilo kanye netindleko tetinsita tete mphilo letibitwa tikhungo tete mphilo letitimele.
Ngesikhatsi kusasebanjwe tinkhulumomphikiswano  mayelana netichibelo tale Mitsetfosivivinyo, lelitiko lita wufezekisa lokungenani imi klamo lemine ye-NHI, lefa ka ekhatsi tinsita tetemphilo etikolweni, tinsita tetemphi lo talabagula ngengcondvo, tinsita tetemphilo tabomake labakhulelwe labanebumati ma nekukhulelwa kwabo eti bhedlela letinge-22 letitsintse ke kakhulu kanye newesi fo semdlavuta (i-oncology), ngekusita kakhulu iGau teng neKwaZulu-Natal, ko dvwa-ke kube kungabekwa eceleni letinye tifundza.
Motsoaledi uphindze watsi tindleko letibitwa tikhungo temphilo letitimele atifinyele lwa takhamuti taseNingizimu Afrika letinyenti. Sekubekwe loyo bekakadze aLijaji leLikhu lu Sandile Ngcobo yiKho mishini yeTekuncintisana ku tsi ente lucwaningo ngetindle ko tetinsita tetemphilo leti bitwa tikhungo tetemphilo letitimele.
“Letichibelo lesitetfula ko tentelwe kuletsa lusito lolu dzingeka kakhulu kutigu lane letititfola tikuletinkhulu tinkinga tekubabete imali,” kwasho yena.
Motsoaledi utsite sichibe lo sekucala saloMtsetfosivi vinyo sitawucedza kukhokha ngekuhlanganyela noma-ke kutsi kube khona imali nawe loyikhiphako ekhikhini lakho.
Kukhokha ngekubambisana kusho kutsi sikimu sikhokha incenye yenkhokhelo yema li sibhedlela noma dokotela lotimele layikhokhisa sigu lane. Lena lesele-ke imali ibese ifanela kutsi ikhokhwe ngulesigulane ngeyaso imali lephuma ikhikhini laso.

Lesinayo emkhatsini wetakhamuti letihlanganyela kute-politiki ngemandla emhlabeni.  Lucwaningo lwanga-2018 lolwentiwa i-Pew Research Center lukhombisa kutsi bantfu baseNingizimu Afrika bayava-ma kakhulu kutsatsa sinyatselo setepolitiki mayelana netintfo labeva banemiva kakhulu ngato, njengekunakekelwa ngetemphilo, temfundvo, kukhuluma ngekukhululeka nenkhohlakalo.  Lolucwaningo lucinisekisa kakhulu kutsi siyatati kutsi sibobani. Kute lesikujabulela kakhulu kwendlula kukhulu-misana nahulumende wetfu nekukhulumisana sodvwana ngalokunemandla mayelana netindzaba letibalulekile te-lusuku naletiphutfumako. Sinenhlangano yemmango lenemandla lehlala njalo ilungele kugadza tinkhululeko nemalungelo etfu labalulekile.Lokunye kuncoba kwentsandvo yelinyenti yetfu kutsi bonkhe bantfu baseNingizimu Afrika bakholelwa ekutseni Umtsetfosisekelo uyabavi-kela nekutsi tinkatolo tinebulungiswa futsi tingumlamuli longakhetsi cala etintfweni labatifunako.Ngicabange ngato letintfo ngiseluhambeni lwami lengisandza kulutsatsa lwekuya eMphumalanga Kapa kuyohlola simo salesifundza sekulungela kubukana neligciwane i-corona.Ngibutwe yintsatseli kutsi ngiyakhatsateka yini mayelana nalelicala lembango lelisengakaphetfwa leliphikisana naleminye yemitsetfomgomo yeMtsetfo weKulawula Tinhle-kelele. Lomtsetfo usisekelo sayo yonkhe imitsetfomgomo leshaywe ngaphansi kwesimo lesiyinhlekelele savelonkhe lesasimemetelela kulwa neligciwane i-corona.Kusukela kwacala lenhle-kelele, banyenti bantfu labase-bentise lilungelo labo lekuya etinkantolo. Lemitsetfomgomo yekumiswa-nsi kwemisebenti neminyakato nekuhlala ekhaya kwavelonkhe kwaphikiswana nayo kusukela ngeliviki lekuca-la lekumiswa-nsi kwemisebenti neminyakato nekuhlala ekhaya kwavelonkhe sakhamuti sangasese lesivela eMpumalanga lebesifuna kukhululwa ekungavunyelweni kuhambela umngcwabo.Emavikini lasikhombisa (7) lalandzela, kuvele tinsayeya tetemtsetfo kubantfu labanyenti labangamunye, imitimba yetenkholo, emacembu etepo-litiki, ema-NGO kanye nakutinhlangano tetemabhizinisi tilwa nesinyatselo sinye noma imitsetfomgomo lembalwa yekumiswa-nsi kwemisebenti neminyakato nekuhlala ekhaya kwavelonkhe labebangajabuli ngayo. Labanye baphumelele kuloko kulwa kwabo ngekwemtsetfo kantsi-ke futsi labanye abakaphumeleli. Labanye baye etinkantolo ngelekutsi tinkinga tabo tiyaphutfuma futsi tibalu-lekile kepha kuphutfuma neku-baluleka kwabo kwacitfwa futsi labanye-ke batfole letinye tindlela tekutfola lokuhhamu-leka bebakufuna. Labanye njalo bagcine sebatihocisa ticelo tabo ngemuva kwekubonisana na-hulumende. Nanoma-nje singasigwema sidzingo sesinyatselo semtsetfo lesimelene nahulumende, sifanele sikwemukele kutsi takhamiti letingajabuli na-noma ngutiphi tinyatselo letincunywa nguhulumende mayelana nekufezekisa tine-lilungelo lekuya etinkantolo tiyotfola nanoma ngukuphi kuhhamuleka letikufunako. Loku kuyinchubomgomo leyetayelekile yentsandvo yelinyenti yemtsetfosisekelo kanye nesento lesemukeleka kahle kakhulu eveni lelakhelwe etu kwemtsetfosimiso wemtsetfo.Sinemigomo lebalulekile leme ngemumo yekucinisekisa kutsi tonkhe tinhlangotsi tekubusa tiyakhona kumela nekuhloli-siswa ngekwemtsetfosisekelo. Uma ngabe kukhona lapho sitfolakala sinesikhebesi khona, tinkantolo tetfu titawusenta sitiphendvulele futsi, nge-tulu kwako konkhe, takhamuti tetfu. Ngaphandle kwetinkantolo tetfu, Lihhovisi LeMvi-keli Wemmango neKhomishini Yemalungelo eLuntfu eNingi-zimu Afrika tikhona kute kutsi tichubele embili emalungelo etakhamuti takitsi, njengobe kwenta leyo mitimba lenikwe lowo msebenti wekwengamela ema-ejensi lacinisekisa kulandzelwa kwemitsetfo.  Njengobe nititjelile-ke letintsatseli, wonkhe muntfu waseNingizimu Afrika unelilungelo lekuya enkantolo futsi ngisho nami, nginguMengameli, angeke ngime endleleni yanoma ngubani losebentisa lilungelo lakhe. Bekuloku, futsi kutawuchu-beka, nekutsi kube nekuhlatjwa lokunemandla nalokucinile kwetintfo letinyentana teku-bukana kwetfu neligciwane i-corona kwavelonkhe, kusuka ekusebentiseni imininingwane levela kuleminye imininingwane nemicombelelo, kuya kumiphumela yalokumiswa-nsi kwemisebenti neminyakato nekuhlala ekhaya kwavelonkhe, kuya kumitsetfomgomo. Singuhulumende asikasho kutsi loko kuhlatjwa akupha-tanyiswe noma-ke kuthuliswe. Lokuguculelekile kwaloko, kugcekwa, lapho kwakha kho-na, kuyasisita kutsi semukele futsi sihambe kalula masinyane sigucule timo nemibandzela. Kunika emandla kukhulumi-sana kwesive kuphindze futsi kusinike sonkhe kuvisisa loku-banti tinkinga letikhona. Sichubeke-njalo nekusho kutsi setsembele kumininingwane yetesayensi, temnotfo neyebufakazi nakukhulunywa ngeludzaba lwekutsatsa tincumo nekwenta imitsetfomgomo mayelana nekubukana kwetfu neligciwane i-corona. Ebubantini lobudze lobungaba khona ngaphansi kwaletimo, sihlosa kubonisana nekukhu-lumisana. Sifuna kutsi bonkhe bantfu baseNingizimu Afrika babe yincenye yalomtamo wa-velonkhe. Emavi etakhamuti letetayelekile kufanele kutsi kuchutjekwe nekutsi alalelwe esikhatsini lesimatima lesinjengalesi. Lolubhubhane lwe-corona kanye netinyatselo lesititsetse tekulwa nalo sekube nemiphumela lematima kakhulu kubantfu bakitsi. Sekubanga kuphatamiseka nebumatima lobukhulu kakhulu. Nanoma-nje kukhona inchubekelembili lesiyentile ekubambeleleni kutselelana leligciwane, iseseyindze kakhulu indlela lesafanele kutsi ihanjwe. Lamaviki netinyanga letitako titawuba ngu-letimatima futsi kutawufuna lokunyenti kakhulu kubantfu bakitsi. Lolubhubhane-ke lusa-tawuchubeka nekugaca ummango netikhungo tetfu lijoko lelesindza kakhulu. Nalapho sivula umnotfo kancanekancane, lifutse etintfweni tebantfu litawuba likhulu kakhulu. Sonkhe sikhatsini lapho loku kuchubeka neku-ba njalo, tehlakalo tekungcubutana, kungevani kanye ne-kungenetiseki kutawuchubeka. Lapho sincenga setama kwendlula kulesikhatsi sebuyaluyalu lobumatima, Umtsetfosisekelo wetfu uyinkhombandlela lebaluleke kakhulu futsi usivikelo setfu lesibaluleke kakhulu. Intsandvo yelinyenti yetfu isinika emandla nekucina lesikudzingako kute kutsi siyincobe lenhlekelele lejulile. Nanoma hulumende akutfokotela kutsi ticelo letinyenti letingeniswa enkantolo tichutjwa ngemoya lomuhle lowetayelekile, natsi-ke sifa-nele kutsi sibone kutsi tincumo letitsatfwa nguhulumende titsatfwa ngenhloso lenhle futsi tentelwe kuchubela embili, hhayi kulimata, timfuno te-bantfu baseNingizimu Afrika. Inhloso yetfu lehamba embili namanje isachubeka nekuba kusindzisa timphilo. Lesincumo setfu sisekelwa sidzingo sekuchubela embili emalungelo ekuphila nesitfunti njengobe kubekiwe kuMtsetfosisekelo. Sitawuchubeka nekwemukela imibono leyehlukene – ngisho nalephikisako – lemayelana nendlela lesibukana ngayo neligciwane i-corona. Yonkhe imibono iyasihlomisa futsi isisita kutsi sisebente kancono nangalokuhlakaniphile.Kusebentisa tinkhululeko letibalulekile tekutetfula, kuba netinhlangano nekukhuluma kulithulusi letemphilo lenhle yentsandvo yelinyenti yetfu. Kepha lokungetulu kakhulu kunaloko, lamalungelo abalu-leke kakhulu ekuphumele-leni kwemzabalazo wetfu wavelonkhe newawonkhe-wonkhe wekuncoba leligciwane  i-corona.

Izitshudeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyisihlanu zizobhekana nezinselelo ezinkulu njengoba imfundo ephakeme isondela ezikhungweni zokuphela kohlelo lwango-2025. Ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme ezihlukene ezweni lonke, kubikwa ukuthi izindleko zokuhlala nezokudla zinyukile ngokwesabekayo, okushiya izitshudenti eziningi zingakwazi ukuqhubeka nezifundo zazo. Uthisha omkhulu waseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natali ubeke igxathu ngemuva kokuhlangana nabafundi, echaza ukuthi inkinga yezimali inempact enkulu empilweni yabo yansuku zonke kanye nezindlela zokufunda. UMnyango weMfundo Ephakeme uzibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi izinhlelo zosizo lwemali — ikakhulukazi i-NSFAS — ziyafinyelela labo abadingeka kakhulu. Izikhungo zemfundo kufanele zihlanganyele kahle noHulumeni ukuze izitshudenti zizuze imfundo enesisindo nangaphandle kwezithiyo zezimali. Leli wukuphila okuqinisekisiwe ngokombuso wentando yeningi eqinile.

Izitsha zemfundo ezintsha kanye nezinsiza zokufunda zisabalale ezikoleni ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amabili kuzifundazwe eziyisishiyagalombili kuleli nyaka wemfundo. Lezi zinsiza, ezihlanganisa izincwadi zohlelo olusha kanye namathebhulethi okufunda, ziyinxenye yohlelo lukahulumeni lokujuba ukufunda kwabafundi abasemabangeni aphansi. Izingane ezihlala ezindaweni zasemakhaya zizuze kakhulu kule nkambiso, njengoba ezinye izikole zazingasitholi ngisho isinsiza esisodwa esibalulekile isikhathi eside. Ngokusho kwabaphathi bezikole ezinjengalezi, izinga lokwanela kwabantwana emagcwini okufunda linyuke ngesilinganiso sika-34% esikhathini samuva. Umsebenzi wothisha naye ushintshe kakhulu ngenxa yezinhlelo zokuqeqesha eziqhubekayo. Abazali abebekhuluma nabasunguleli balo mshikashika bathi bababona abantwana babo beshintsha, bekhombisa uthando olujulile lokufunda. Kuyinhloso enkulu kahulumeni ukuqinisekisa ukuthi zonke izingane, noma zihlala kuphi, zithole amathuba alinganayo emfundw

Izinkulungwane zabantwana abaningi zasezindaweni zasemakhaya zisabhekana nezingqinamba ezikhulu ekufikeleleni imfundo eyikhwalithi, ikakhulukazi kulezi zifunda lapho izikole zisahlushwa wukushortela kogesi namanzi acocekile. Ucwaningo oluqhamuke kulo nyaka lubonise ukuthi amaphesenti angamashumi amathathu nesishiyagalombili wezikole zasezifundazweni ezintathu azinalo ugesi olungasebenzayo, okuchaphazela kakhulu ukufundiswa kwezifundo zesayensi nezobuchwepheshe. UNgqongqoshe weMfundo uzibophezele ekusheshiseni ukuxazululwa kwalezi zikhalo, ethembisa ukuthi izinhlelo zokwakhiwa kabusha kwezikole zizoqalwa ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali. Abazali nezakhamuzi ezahlukene basekhala kabukhali, bethi izingane zabo zibhekana nobunzima obukhulu ezikoleni. Umnyango ususabele ngokumemezela ukuthi izinhlelo zokwelekelela izikole eziswele kudingekile ukuqhutshekiswa ngokushesha, ukuze izinhlelo zikaHulumeni zokuthuthukisa izinga lemfundo lifinyelele izinhloso zazo.

Izinkulumo ezenziwe kulo nyaka zikhombisa ukuthi abantwana abaningi basemazingeni aphansi emfundweni, ikakhulukazi lezo ezivela emizini engenayo. Ngokwezibalo ezikhishwe yiSouth African Council for Educators, izikole ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili zisathola izinsiza ezingaphelele, okubangela ukuthi izifundo zihambele kabi. Othisha abaningi bazithola besebenza ngaphandle kwezincwadi nezinsiza zokufundisa, okwehlisa izinga lemfundo kuwonkewonke. Uhulumeni weKwaZulu-Natal usethembise ukulekelela lezi zikole ngemali eyanele nokwakha amakhaya angcono okuhlala kwabafundi. Nokho, iziphathimandla zakomphakathi zikhala ngokuthi izethembiso ezenziwe ngonyaka odlule azikangeni ngokugcwele. Impumelelo yomfundo ayincikile kuphela ezikoleni, kodwa futhi nasemiphakathini esekela izingane njengoba zifunda. Kuyafaneleka ukuthi bonke abathintekayo — abazali, othisha, kanye nohulumeni — basebenzisane ngamandla ukuze ikusasa labantwana libe ngcono futhi lemfundo ifinyelele kubo bonke, kungakhethwa muntu.

Izitshudeni ezifinyelela ezikoleni zasemakhaya zibhekene nezinselele ezinzima, njengokuntuleka kwezincwadi zokufunda kanye nezakhiwo ezingakalungiswa kahle. Ngokuvela kwenhlolovo yakamuva eyenziwa yiSouth African Human Rights Commission, izikole ezingaphezu kwamashumi amane eMpumalanga zisafundisa izifundo zesayensi ngaphandle kwezifuzo ezilinganiselwe. Lesi simo sikhathaza abazali nabafundi abaningi abaphakamise izwi emihlanganweni yezinduna zasemakhaya. UMnyango Wezemfundo Ebasic uphendule ngethembisa ukuthi izinhlelo zokunikeza izikole izinsiza ezibalulekile ziyaqhubeka futhi zizothuthukiswa ngonyaka wezimali ozayo. Kodwa abanye othisha bathi impendulo kahulumeni iyachazwa ngesijabane njengoba izidingo zisanda nsuku zonke. Ukuqeqshwa kwothisha abasebenzisa izindlela zokufundisa ezintsha kuyindaba ebalulekile nokho kufanele kuhambisane nokuhlinzekwa kwezinsiza ezibonakalayo. Izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme nazo zibambe iqhaza ekuqeqsheni ithimba labafundisi abazothatha indawo

Izitudenti ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi nazo zihlangene eNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal kuleli sonto, zikhombisa ukukhathazeka okukhulu mayelana nezimali zezemfundo ezikhulayo nezinkinga zokuthola izindawo zokuhlala ekhempasini. Izikhalo zalezi zitudenti zize ngemuva kokuthi iNational Student Financial Aid Scheme ibike ukulibala kwamasibulo izixhaso zezimali ngesikhathi esimqoka sonyaka wezifundo. Osomabhizinisi baseNingizumu Afrika nalabo abafundisa ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme basixhasile isibizo sotho lwezitshudeni, bekhuthaza uhulumeni ukuthi akhuphule imali ebekiwe yosizo lwezifundo. Ucwaningo olushicilelwe nguNgqongqoshe Wezifundo Ephakeme lukhombisa ukuthi amaphesenti angamashumi amathathu nesikhombisa wezitshudeni azishiyi izikhungo zemfundo ngaphambi ukukhetha ngokuzithandela ngenxa yezinkinga zezimali. Uhulumeni usebenza ngokushesha ukuletha izixazululo ezihlumelelayo, kubandakanya nokubuyekeza inqubomgomo yeNSFAS, ukuze wonke umuntu othanda ukufunda abe nethuba elilinganayo.

Izikole ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu KwaZulu-Natali zibhekene nezinkinga ezinzima zokuntuleka kwezinsiza zokufundisa, okuhlanganisa izincwadi, amathebhulethi, kanye nezimpahla zekhompyutha. Lesi simo sikhathaza othisha nabazali abaningi, ikakhulukazi kulezi zindawo zasemakhaya lapho ingqalasizinda yezikole ingakaphuthumi khona. Izingane zinqatshelwa ithuba elilinganayo lemfundo ngenxa yezinkinga ezifana nokuntuleka kwamagumbi okufundela kanye namanzi ahlanzekile ezikoleni. UMnyango Wezemfundo Nezokuthuthukiswa Kwezakhono uqinisekisa ukuthi izinhlelo zokwakha nokuhlomisa izikole ziyaqhubeka, futhi imali eyanele imiselwe ukubhekana nalezi zidingo. Nokho, izinhlangano ezimele omphakathi zinxusa ukuba kuqiniswe ukuqapha ukusetshenziswa kwemali kahulumeni ukuze izwe lemfundo libe ngcono kakhulu. Ikusasa labantwana baseNingizimu Afrika lixhomeke ekutheni izikole zihlomuliswe ngokufanele, ngaphandle kokulibaziseka.

Izitshudeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa zibhekene nezingqinamba ezinzima ezikoleni zasezindaweni zasemakhaya, lapho ukushoda kwezincwadi zokufunda kanye nezindlu zokufundela eziwa phansi kugcina ukufunda kuba nzima. Ingxelo eyakhishwa muva nje ikhombisa ukuthi izikole eziningi zisasebenzisa izindlu ezinofa, izingane zifunda ngaphansi kwezitende noma emigwaqweni ngenxa yokushoda kwendawo. UMnyango WezeMfundo ukhiphe isitatimende esiqinisekisa ukuthi izinhlelo zokwakha izindlu ezintsha zizoshesha ukuqalwa ngonyaka ozayo. Nokho, abazali abaningi bakhuluma ngokukhathazeka kwabo, bethi izithembiso ezinjalo sezake zanikwa ngaphambili kodwa azizange zifezeke. Izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme nayo ibhekene nezingqinamba, ikakhulukazi mayelana namaholide wezifundo nokusweleka kwezindawo zokuhlala kwabafundi abavela izindaweni ezikude. Umphakathi uyacela ukuba uhulumeni ashintshe amazwi abe ngezenzo ezibonakala ngempela, ukuze ikusasa labantwana libe ngcono futhi im

Izitshudeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa zibhekene nezinselelo ezinzima zikamuva ngemuva kokuba izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme zivale iminyango yazo phakathi nesifundo ngenxa yezinkinga zezimali. Imibandela yokuhlala neyokudla emakhampasini ayenele, futhi izindawo zokufundela nazo zibonakala ukuthi zidinga ukusheshiswa komsebenzi wokuhlaziywa. Ngokusho kwabafundi abaningi baseNingizimu Afrika, imali yezibonelelo yezikweletu ifikelela kancane, okwenza abaningi babo bangakwazi ukuthenga izincwadi nezinto ezidingekayo ngesikhathi esifanele. Ikomiti lePhalamende elibhekelele imfundo ephakeme lize laxoxa nalo udaba ngenyanga edlule, liphoqa izikhungo ukuba zethule izinhlelo eziphathekayo zokusiza izitshudeni ezicindezelekile. Kuyacaca ukuthi ukwehluleka ukuxazulula lezi zinkinga ngendlela esheshayo kuzokwenza inani labafundi abashiya izikhungo ngaphambi kokugcwalisa izifundo lande. Uhulumeni ubizwe ngabaholi bemiphakathi ukuba awusheshise umsebenzi wokuhlela kabusha

Izinhlelo zokufunda ezikoleni zasemakhaya zibhekene nezinselelo eziningi nezinzima, njengoba imibiko yamuva iveza ukuthi izitshudeni eziningi azikwazi ukufinyelela izinto ezibalulekiwe njengemitapo yolwazi kanye nezinto zokufunda. Emifundazweni yasKwaZulu-Natal, abazali basemiphakathini ehlukene babike ukukhathazeka kwabo ngezindlu zesikoleni ezidala nezibhidlika, okwenza kube nzima ukufundisa kahle. Ogqugquzeli bezemfundo bahlangene nezisekelo zikaHulumeni ukuhlola isimo, bengafisi ukubona izingane zikhula ngaphandle kwemfundo efanele. Uhlelo lwezibonelelo lwesikoleni — olwaziwa ngokuthi i-Norms and Standards for School Funding — luqondiswe ukusiza izikole ezisohangeni, kodwa ukufakwa kwalo kusabalele ngendlela engalingani. Ingqungquthela yakamuva yabameli bezemfundo yagcizelela ukuthi ukuze izingane zaseNingizimu Afrika zifinyelele izimpokophelo zazo, kufanele uHulumeni uqinisekise ukuthi izikole zonke zinazo izinsiza ezilingene, ikakhulukazi lezi ezisezindaweni zasemakhaya.

Izinhlelo zokufunda ezikoleni zezifunda ezisezindaweni zasemakhaya zibhekene nezingqinamba ezinkulu njengoba imibiko yakamuva iveza ukuthi abantwana abaningi basala emuva ngenxa yokuntuleka kwezincwadi nezinsiza zokufunda. Ngaphandle kwalokho, ezindaweni ezifana nezifunda zaseMpumalanga naseNyakatho neKwaZulu, izikole eziningi zisafundisa ngaphansi kwamathende noma ezindlini eziwile, okuyisimo esikhathaza abazali neziphathimandla zemfundo. Uthi uNkz. Nomvula Dlamini, oyisikhulumi somphakathi eNkandla, izingane zakubo zihamba amawonkilima amaningi nsuku zonke ukuze zifinyelele esikoleni esiseduzane, okwenza izinga lokuhlubuka likhule. Ngenxa yalezi zingqinamba, iNgqungquthela Yezifundazwe yeMfundo ihlangene kuleli sonto ukuze iphinde ihlole inqubomgomo yokuphana ngezikhungo zokufunda nezinsiza. Kuyethembisa ukuthi uhulumeni ubeke eceleni imali eyizigidigidi ezinhlelweni ezintsha zokwakha nokuhlomisa izikole, kepha izinhlangano zabasebenzi zikholwa ukut

Izikole ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili ezisezindaweni zasemakhaya zibhekene nezinkinga ezinzima zokuntuleka kwezinto eziyisisekelo, njengamagumbi okufundela asebenzayo kanye namanzi agelezayo. Abafundi abaningi bayabuya esikoleni bengatholi imfundo efanele ngenxa yalezi zingqinamba. UMnyango WezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal uqinisekise ukuthi izinhlelo zokwakha kabusha izikole ezindala zizoshesha ziqalwe ngonyaka wezimali ozayo. Iziphathimandla zesifundazwe ziveze ukuthi imali eyizigidigidi ezintathu yamarandi ibekiwe ukuze kuqedwe lezi zinkinga. Okusemqoka kakhulu ukuthi umphakathi ube yingxenye yezinqumo ezithathwayo ngesikhathi sokwakha lezi zakhiwo ukuze imisebenzi yenziwe kahle. Ithimba lazogcagca izikole ezilishumi nambili ekuqaleni, likhethe izindawo ezibonakala zidinga usizo ngokuphuthumayo. Izazi zomthetho zemfundo ziyaxwayisa ukuthi uma izinhlelo zingalandelwa ngokucacile, imali ingachithwa ngaphandle kwemiphumela ebalulekile.

Izitshudeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa ziyabika ukuthi zibhekana nezinselelo ezinkulu ekufundeni ngenxa yokuntuleka kwezincwadi zesikole nezinto zokufunda ezikoleni zasemakhaya. Kulo nyaka wezifundo, amatichi amaningi ahlangabezane nezinkinga zokushortage lwezinsiza, okubangele ukuthi izifundo ziningi zithiwe ukuphumelela. UMnyango wezeMfundo, Ezikoleni Nakwi-ECD nezeMfundo Ephakeme ubhekene nenqubo yokubuyekeza izinhlelo zokuhlomisa izikole ngezinsizakufunda ezibalulekile. Kukholakala ukuthi ukuphila kwabafundi emakhaya kuba nomthelela omkhulu ekufundeni, ikakhulukazi lapho izindlu zingenamandla kagesi. Uhulumeni wabesifazane nofakazi bezimfundo bahlangene emhlanganweni wamuhla lapho bamemezela khona uhlelo olusha lokunika izitshudeni ezidingayo usizo lwezinsiza. Izikole zomphakathi nazo zikhuthazwa ukuthi zibambe iqhaza ekwakhiweni kwezikhungo ezizimele ezizosiza abafundi abantulayo ukuba baqhubeke nemfundo yabo ngaphandle kwezihibe.

Izikole ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu zitholakale zisezimweni ezingamukelekile emiphakathini yasemakhaya eNingizimu Afrika, njengoba ucwaningo olusha lwamukela imiphumela yazo. Lolu cwaningo, olwenziwa yiNhlangano Kazwelonke Yokuthuthukiswa Kwezemfundo, luveze ukuthi izingane eziningi zifunda emabangeni angenalwazi olufanele noma izinsiza zokufundisa. Ezikoleni ezahlukahlukene, othisha bakhala ngokushorteja kwezincwadi nezinto zokufundisa, okuphazamisa inqubekela phambili yabafundi. Ukuxazululwa kwalolu daba sekucatshangwa ngobuhlakani yizikhulu zomnyango wezemfundo, okuthiwa zizohlanganisa nomasipala ukuqinisa ukusebenza kwezikole. Abazali namalungu omphakathi bakhuthazwa ukuba babambe iqhaza ngokugcwele ekuqashteni izikole emalokishini nasemalokishini ukuze izingane zihlomule ngempela. Isibalo sabafundi abaphumelela eMatikuleshini sikhombise ukwehla okuncane kulo nyaka odlule, okukhombisa isidingo sokusheshisa izinyathelo zohulumeni. Ukuqinisekisa

Izitshudeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi zibhekene nobunzima bokungabi nezinsiza ezanele ezikoleni zasemakhaya, ikakhulukazi ezifundazweni zasKwaZulu-Natal naseNdleleni. Izakhiwo eziningi zisaphuke, izincwadi azikho ngokwanele, futhi othisha abaningi basebenza ngaphansi kwezimo ezikhathazayo. UMnyango Wezemfundo uzibophezele ekutheni lezi zikhungo zithole usizo olufanele ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali. Kuyavunywa yizikhulu zombuso ukuthi uhlelo lwezingqalasizinda lwezikole lusaqhubeka phezu kwezingqinamba ezahlukahlukene, ikakhulukazi ngezikhathi zomnotho onzima. Nokho, imiphakathi ikhala ukuthi izethembiso zidlula iminyaka ngaphandle kokuqedwa kwezinto ezithenjisiwe. Abazali nemiphakathi bakhuthazwa ukubamba iqhaza ekuqashweni kwezikole kanye nasekuhloleni ukusetshenziswa kwezimali zemfundo. Ukulingana kwemfundo kuseyiphupho kumadolobhakazi amaningi, kepha ushintsho alulula yize luyafuneka ngokuphuthuma.

Izinkulumo eziphuma emahhovisi kahulumeni zibonisa ukuthi izinga lokufunda nokubhala ezindaweni zasemakhaya lisalokhu lingxamile, nalapho izingane eziningi zisaphuma ezikoleni zingaqedile izifundo zazo. Ngonyaka odlule, ucwaningo olwenziwa yiNingizimu Afrika lwembula ukuthi abafundi abangaphezu kwamashumi amane ePrimary School abakwazi ukufunda ngokuqonda ngolimi lwabo lwasekhaya. Izikole ezahlukene zibhekene nezinselelo ezinzima, ikakhulukazi ukusweleka kwezincwadi, amakhompiutha, kanye neziteshi zamanzi ezihlanzekile. Izitshengisi nazo zikhalaza ngokungahlangabezwana nenani labafundi, okwenza kube nzima ukufundisa ngempumelelo. UMnyango Wezemfundo uthembise ukwanda kwezimali eziyosetshenziswa ukwakha amakhaya okuhlala uthisha kanye nokwandisa uhlelo lokuqeqesha othisha abasha. Abazali nomphakathi bakhuthazwa ukuba babambe iqhaza ekusekeni izingane ezikoleni ukuze ikusasa lemfundo libe njengelikhanya elizibekele phambili.

Izitshudeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili zibhekene nezinselelo ezinzima ezikoleni zasemakhaya, lapho ukushoda kwezincwadi zokufunda nokungabi nezindawo ezanele zokufundela kugcina imfundo isezingeni eliphansi. Izikhungo zemfundo zaseNyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal zibikele iziphathimandla ngokungeneliseka okukhulu ngokwehluleka kwazo ukuthola izinsiza ezidingekayo ngaphambi kokuqala konyaka wezifundo. Kuye kwabikwa ukuthi amajaji ezikole amaningi awanaso ugesi, okuphazamisa ukufundiswa kwezifundo ezidinga ubuchwepheshe besimanje. UMnyango Wezemfundo Wesifundazwe uzibophezele ekuxazululeni lezi zinkinga, ugcizelela ukubaluleka kokuxhumana phakathi kwezikole neziphathimandla zomphakathi. Inhlelo entsha yokusabalalisa izinsiza ezikoleni ezidinga usizo izophethwa ngabaphathi bezifunda, ukuze imali ifinyelele lapho idingeka khona. Umphakathi ubizwa ukuba ubambe iqhaza ngokuqapha ukusetshenziswa kwezimali nokunikeza imibiko yezinkinga ezibonakayo ezindaweni zabo, njengoba ukubamb

Izinhlelo zokufunda eziphezulu zibhekene nezinselelo ezinzima njengoba imali engekho yanele iqhubeka nokuba isithiyo esikhulu kubantu abaningi abasha baseNingizimu Afrika. Ngokwemibiko yomnyaka odlule, izingane ezingaphezu kwezigidi ezimbili azikwazanga ukuqhubeka nezifundo zabo ngenxa yokuntuleka kwazikhweleti zokusiza. Amanyuvesi nezikole zemfundo ephakeme asebizele ngokuphelele, kanti izindlu zokulala zwaziwa ngezimo ezibi nezingaphilisi. Kuphendule lezi zikhalo, uHulumeni ubeke eceleni imali elinganiselwa ezikhungweni zamabhiliyoni amahlanu ukuze kuqiniswe ingqalasizinda yemfundo nezinhlelo zosizo lwezikhweleti. Abanye othisha bathi lezi zinyathelo ziyadingeka, kodwa kufanele ziqhutshwe ngendlela eqinile neneqiniso ukuze zisizakale izingane ezivela emndenini ompofu. Iqhaza lomphakathi ekusekeleni izingane ngezincwadi nezezinsiza zokunye nawo libalulekile ekwakheni ikusasa elingcono lemfundo ezweni jikelele.

Izitshudeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili zivele zabhalisa ezikoleni zamabanga aphakeme ezifundazweni zaseNyakatho neNtshonalanga yeKwaZulu-Natal, ngemva kokuba uHulumeni ethule uhlelo olusha lokusekela abafundi abavela emakhaya aswelekayo. Lolu hlelo, olwabiwa ngezimali ngeMnyango wezeMfundo, luhlose ukuqeda izithiyo ezikhungethe abafundi abaningi, ikakhulukazi lapho izikole zisekude nezindawo zokuhlala. Ababili kubabazi abazakhele igama emkhakheni wezifundo zesayensi baqale izikhungo ezisetshenziswa abafundi ezikoleni ezisesigodini seHlabisa, betshela umphakathi ngokubaluleka kokufunda nasekukhuthazeni izingane ukuthi ziqhubeke nezifundo zazo. Imiphumela yokufunda ibonisa ukuthi izingane ezinikwa izinsiza ezifanele zifeza kahle izifundo zazo kunalezi eziswele usizo. Uhulumeni wasesifundazweni uqinisekise ukuthi izikhungo zemfundo ezihlukile zizohlolwa njalo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi izimpahla nezinsizakalo zikhona ngesikhathi esifanele.

Izitshudeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi zibhekene nezingqinamba ezinzima emanyuvesi amaningana eNingizimu Afrika ngenxa yokusweleka kwezinsiza zokufunda kanye nezindawo zokulala ezanele. Izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme ziveze ukukhathazeka okukhulu ngokwanda kwezicelo zosizo lwezimali, ikakhulukazi kulabo abavela emindenini engenaso isinondo. Ngokusho kwabacwaningi bezomfundo, uguquko lwezikhungo zemfundo lubonakala luya kancane uma kuqhathaniswa nezidingo zangempela zabantu abasha. UMnyango Wezemfundo Ephakeme Nezikhungo Zokuqeqeshwa ukhiphe isitatimende ekhuthaza izifundazwe ukuba ziqinise ukusekela izitshudeni ngezinhlelo zokulalela izifundo ngobuchwepheshe bwanamuhla. Amanyuvesi asuke asabela kulesi sinxephezelo ngokuqala izinhlelo ezintsha zokusiza izitshudeni ngekhompyutha namalaptop akoloda. Abazali nabafundi balindele ukuthi uhulumeni aqhubeke nokusabalalisa izinsiza ngokulinganayo kuzo zonke izifundazwe zezwe, ukuze ikusasa lemfundo lenziwe libe ng

Izinkulumo ezikhuluma ngokungalingani kwemfundo phakathi kwabantwana basemalokishini nasezindaweni zasemakhaya ziphinde zabuya phambili muva nje, njengoba ucwaningo olutsha luveza ukuthi izikole eziningi zasemakhaya zisaswela izinsiza ezibalulekile zokufunda nokufundisa. Abazali baseNdwedwe naseNquthu baxoxa ngesimo esibi sezakhiwo zezikole, lapho izingane zifunda ngaphansi kwezindawo ezingaphephile, kukhokhwa nezimali ezinkulu ngokufunda. UMnyango Wezemfundo uzibophezele ekuxazululeni le nkinga, kodwa ababambiqhaza abaningi bathi izithembiso aziguqulwa zibe yisenzo sangempela ngokwanele. Izingane ezingenayo imibhalo yezifundo kanye nothisha abaqeqeshiwe zihlushwa kakhulu, ikakhulukazi emabangeni asezansi apho ukufunda kwezibalo nolwimi kusebalulekile. Izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme nazo zibhekene nezinselele, njengoba izitshudeni ezivela emndenini ongenawo amandla zingakwazi ukufunda ngenxa yezindleko eziphezulu. Izwi lomphakathi liyacaca — isikhathi sokuqiniseka

Izitshudeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi nambili zizobhekana nezinselele ezinkulu kulo nyaka wokufunda ngemuva kokuthi imibiko eminingi yaveza ukuthi izikole ezihlukahlukene ezifundazweni zasemakhaya azinezinsiza ezenele zokufundisa. Kuze kube manje, amagumbi okufundela amaningi asasebenzisa izincwadi ezimdala futhi engagcinwanga kahle, okuyinto ethinta kakhulu izinga lokufunda kwabafundi abancane. Umkhandlu Wezifundo Wesifundazwe ukhiphe isitatimende lapho ushaya indiva izinhlelo ezintsha, uqinisekisa ukuthi imali ehlelelwe ukuthenga izinsiza zezikole izobe ikhishiwe ngaphambi kwesigamu sonyaka. Izisebenzi zikahulumeni zivele ziqalile ukuvakashela izikole ezahlukene ukuze zihlole isimo sezakhiwo nezidingo zazo. Ngokusho kwabazali abaningi abakhuluma nosomasheli bendawo, izingane zabo zifika ekhaya ngokungaqondile okwafundisiwa kuko ngoba zifundela ngaphansi kwezimo ezingesizo. UNgqongqoshe Wezemfundo uzimisele ukuthi uhlelo lokuqala lokunikezwa kwez

Izitshudeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu ezikoleni zasemakhaya zibhekene nezinselelo ezinzima njengoba izakhiwo ezinomonakalo nezokungabi khona kwezincwadi zokufunda ziqhubeka nokuvimbela inqubekelaphambili yemfundo eNingizimu Afrika. Izikhulu zomnyango wezemfundo ziveze ukuthi kuyasicindezelisa isimo lapho izingane zihlezi phansi phezu kwezinsimbi ngenxa yokungabikho kwezitulo ezikoleni eziningi zasezindaweni zasemaphandleni. Uhulumeni wephrovinsi uqinisekise ukuthi izinhlelo zokwakha nezokuvuselela izakhiwo zazo lezi aziyo emaqhulwini ezinhlelo zakhe zalonyaka. Ithimba elikhethiwe labaphathi bemiSebenzi yeZifundazwe lihlangene ngesonto eledlule ukuhlola indlela okungasetshenzwa ngayo ngempumelelo izimali ezibekiwe. Abazali balapha bakhala ngokungelawuleki kwezimo, befuna izimpendulo ezikhomba ukuguquka kwangempela. Umnyango wezeMfundo uqinisekise umphakathi ukuthi izibopho nezethembiso zikahulumeni ngeke ziphunyulwe, futhi abantu bazobona izingu

Izindlu zokufunda ezingaphezu kwezingama-200 zisalokhu zingenazo izidleke ezifanele emifundazweni yasemakhaya, okuchaphazela kakhulu izingane ezifunda ngaphansi kwezimo ezinzima. Ubuciko bokufunda obujulile buyancipha ngoba abaningi babafundi abakwazi ukugxila ngesikhathi salezi zimo ezinzima. Uhlelo lukahulumeni lokusakaza izinsizakusebenza ezifana namalaphu, izincwadi, kanye nezinto zokufunda lusahambe kancane kakhulu, luthi lungagculisi izidingo zezikole. Ezikoleni ezisemadolobheni, nayo ikhona inkinga: izita zamakheli kanye nokuswela othisha abanekhono kuyengeza isikhathi esidlulile engqondweni. Abazali nabameli bemiphakathi babize uhulumeni wezifundazwe ukuba uqinise ukulandela nokwenziwa kwalezi zinqubo. UMnyango weMfundo uvumile ukuthi izingqinamba zikhona, waqiniseka nokho ukuthi imali esekelwe ngurhulumeni kazwelonke iyahanjiswa ukuze kuqiniswe izingqalasizinda kulezi zindawo eziswele kakhulu. Imfundo iyisisekelo sokulethwa kweqiniso lentuthuko kuzo zonke izingane

Izitshudeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa zibhekene nenselelo enkulu njengoba imisebenzi yezingqalasizinda ezikoleni zisaqhubeka ukubhekana nezinkinga ezimbi ezifana nokushoda kwamagumbi okufundela kanye nokusweleka kwezinsiza zokufunda ezihlangothini ezahlukene zezwe. Lezi zinkinga ziphazamisa kakhulu inqubo yokufunda nokufundisa, ikakhulukazi emakoleni asezindaweni zasemakhaya lapho abantu bengenazo izimali. UMnyango Wezemfundo Nasezimfundweni Ephakeme usemukele lesi simo ngokukhulu ukuphuthuma, wethembisa ukuthi uzoqinisekisa ukuthi izinhlelo zokulungisa izisekelo zomsebenzi zizoqalwa ngokuphuthuma. Iziphathimandla zomphakathi, njengamakhansela nabahlali basekhaya, nabo bathe bayafisa ukubamba iqhaza ekukhuthazeni izingane ukuthi zihlale zifunda noma ngabe izimo zimi kanjani. Ucwaningo olusha luveze ukuthi izingane ezifunda endaweni enamakhaya anikeza usizo lwemfundo zinawo amathuba amakhulu okuphumelela uma ziqhathaniswa nezinye. Umbuso ukhuthaza bonke ababeseki bemf

Abahlali baseNdwedwe sebeyibeke ngokusobala ukuthi bakhathele ukusilinda izethembiso zomasipala mayelana nokuhlinzekwa kwamanzi ahlanzekiwe. Izindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili zisalinde ukuxhunywa kunethiwekhi yamanzi esemthethweni, yize iziphakamiso zakhiwa eminyakeni emithathu edlule. Ngeledlule, ikomiti labahlali lahlangana neziphathimandla zomasipala iWater and Sanitation Department ukuze lifune izimpendulo ezicacile. Kwaleso sithangami, isikhulu esiphezulu samazinga ezindawo savuma ukuthi izinhlelo zokwakha zibambezeleke ngenxa yokushortshwa kwezimali nokusweleka kwezinto zokusebenza. Kwabiwa imali engu-R4.7 million, kodwa ingxenye enkulu ayikasetshenziselwa izinhlelo ezihlosiwe. UMasipala woSuthu Wezindawo ube sewushaya isaziso sokuthi umsebenzi wokuhlanganisa amapayipi uzophela ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali, futhi abahlali bazokwaziswa ngokushesha ngomkhankaso wokuzethula kwezinsiza ezintsha kuyo yonke imiphakathi ethintekayo.

Abahlali baseMsinga sebekhala iminyaka eminingi bengatholi amanzi ahlanzekile emakhaya abo, kodwa manje kukhona ithemba elisha ngemuva kokuqedwa kokwakhiwa kwengqalasizinda yamanzi entsha esifundazweni. UMkhandlu weziFunda uMsinga, ngokubambisana noMnyango Wezokuthuthukiswa Kwamakhaya Nezindaba Zomphakathi, umemezele ukuthi izindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili zizokwamukela ukuxhunywa komthombo wamanzi ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali wezi-2025/2026. Lo mkhankaso uyingxenye yohlelo lukahulumeni lokubhekana nokusweleka kwamanzi ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Uhlelo lwezikhali ezintsha zokugcina amanzi nalo seluhlelwe ukuze lube khona, lusiza imiphakathi ebhekene nesomiso. Izakhamuzi zikhuthazwa ukuthi ziqhubeke zixhumana namakomiti asemakhaya ukuze ziqinisekise ukuthi amagama azo afakwa ohlwini olulandelwayo lokunikwa izinsizakalo.

Abahlali baseThekwini selokhu bekhala ngokungathembeki kwenkonzo yamanzi acocekile emiphakathini eminingi, ikakhulukazi labo abahlala ezindaweni zasemaphandleni. Isikhulu esiphezulu soMkhandlu waKwaZulu-Natal, uNkz. Thandi Mthembu, sikhiphe isimemezelo ebalulekile ngesonto eledlule, sichaza uhlelo olusha lokuletha izingqalasizinda zamanzi ezindaweni ezingaphezu kwamashumi amane. Ngokwezinhlelo zikaMasipala, izicelo zokwakhiwa kwamapayipi amanzi azothunyelwa kuHulumeni wezifundazwe ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga kaZibandlela. Lolu hlelo luzosiza imindeni engaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyisithupha ukuthi ithole amanzi ahlanzekile ngokuqondile emizini yayo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kwethulwa futhi uhlelo lokufundisa umphakathi ngokusetshenziswa kwamanzi ngendlela ehlakaniphile ukuze kuvikelwe imithombo yamanzi engcono. Abahlali baseThekwini abalinde isikhathi eside manje sebethola izindaba ezijabulisayo mayelana nokunikezwa kwamanzi ahlanzekiwe ezindaweni zasemaphandleni. UMkhandlu weTheku umemezele ukuthi izinhlelo zokwakhiwa kwamapayipi amanzi entsha zizophelela ekupheleni konyaka wezimali wezi-2025, okuzokusiza imindeni engaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyisithupha. Lesi sinqumo sithathwe ngemva kwemibiko evela emiphakathini eyabikezela ukuthi izingane nezalukazi zihlupheka kakhulu ngenxa yokweshiwa kwamanzi. Ukwakhiwa kuzoqala ngokushesha ezikhundleni ezine zedolobha, futhi kwabelwe imali elinganiselwa ezigidini ezingamashumi amabili ezakhiwa esabelweni sonyaka wezimali. Umphakathi uceliwe ukuba ubike noma yikuphi ukungahambisani kahle kwale misebenzi emahhovisi kamasipala aseduze nawo. UNgqongqoshe wezokuLinganiswa kwaManzi uqinisekise ukuthi ukuphathwa kwalo msebenzi kuzobhekwa ngqo yikomidi elikhethiwe ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukusetshenziswa kahle

Izikhulu zomphakathi eNdwedwe zixoxe ngezinkinga ezimbi zamanzi nokwehluleka kwezisebenzi zikamasipala ukufika esikhathini esifanele. Kule ndawo engaphandle kwedolobha, abantu abaningi baye besebenzisa imithombo yasendle neyingozi impilo, njengoba izinqwaba zamanzi zingazange zifike izinyanga eziningana. UMkhandlu waseMsunduzi uchazelwe ngesimo lesi emhlanganweni ophumelelayo wangenyanga edlule, lapho amadelelwa ajulile abekwa khona phambi kwezishayamthetho. Iziphathimandla ziqinisekisile ukuthi isivumelwano esisha nomnikazimali wesizinda samanzi siyashaywa, futhi ukuhlomulisa umphakathi kulindeleke kuqale ngomhla weshumi nesikhombisa kuNhlolanja walo nyaka. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abasebenzi abangu-forty bebekhona bazoqeqeshwa ukuze baqinisekise ukuthi amanzi ahlanzekile afinyelela izindlu ezingaphezulu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu. Umphakathi ubongozwe ukuba ubike noma yikuphi ukwephuka kwezingibe noma ukuphazamiseka kwenguquko leyo, ngokuphuthuma, ucingo lomasenende lw

Abahlali baseNkandla sebekhala isikhathi eside ngenkinga yamanzi ahlanzekile emiphakathini yasemakhaya, lapho izintombi nezingane zigcwele imigwaqo yonke ilanga zifuna amanzi. Emhlanganweni owabanjwa ngesonto elidlule, uMkhandlu waseNkandla wamemezela uhlelo olusha lokwakha amathanga amanzi amasha nezinqalasizinda zokusabalalisa amanzi kuwo wonke amagodi. Ngokwemibiko eyethulwa emhlanganweni, izindlu ezingaphezu kuka-4 500 azitholi amanzi ageleza ngamapayipu endlini, isimo esingamukeleki emphakathini wentando yeningi. Ucwaningo olwenziwa umkhandlu lwaveza ukuthi inqwaba yamahhanga emikhakheni yamanzi yagugeka ngokuphelele, okudala ukuphela kwamanzi ngokuvamile. UMeya uMnuz. Sipho Mthethwa wathi izimali ezifinyelela kumakhelwane wezigidi ezinhlanu zezimali seziqinisekisiwe ngomnyango kazwelonke ukuze kuqalwe umsebenzi ngasekupheleni kwekota yokuqala. Umsebenzi kulindeleke ukuthi uqale ngenyanga ezayo, futhi ukukhuthazwa komphakathi

Abahlali baseNkandla sebeyikhulumile indaba yokungafinyeleli amanzi ahlanzekile emakhaya abo, bethembise ukuba bazophinde bakhulume neziphathimandla uma isimo singathuthuki. Emhlanganweni wezindaba owawubanjelwe eHhovisi leMasipala ngesonto eledlule, iMeya uNkosazana Thobile Dlamini yazwakalisa ukuthi uHulumeni uzinikele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi wonke umuntu, ikakhulukazi abahlali basemalokishini nasemakhaya, uthola amanzi ahlanzekile. Izicelo ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili sezingenisiwe, futhi inkampani ebhekene nalo msebenzi izobe iqala ukusebenza ekuqaleni kukaMashi wezi-2025. Ukwakhiwa kwezingqalasizinda ezintsha kuzosiza kakhulu izindawo ezishaywa kanzima yinkinga yokuntuleka kwamanzi, kuhlanganise nezindawo zaseMachunwini naseNgome. UNgqongqoshe wezeMisebenzi Yomphakathi uthe izinhlelo zokusebenza zazo zonke izindawo ziyahlolwa njalo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi imali kahulumeni isetshenziswa ngendlela efanele futhi izinhlelo ziphelela ngesikhathi

Abahlali baseThekwini bayelinde isikhathieside izixazululo eziphathelene nezinkinga zamanzi amdaka nezitaladi ezinofa olukhulu. Ngesonto elidlule, iMkhandlu weTheku wamemezela uhlelo olusha lokuhlaziywa kwengqalasizinda emiphakathini ephatheke kakhulu, ikakhulukazi leyo esemaphandleni. Imali eyabelwe lo msebenzi inqwabelana phezulu kwezigidi ezingamashumi amathathu amarandi, okuyimali enkulu kunaleyo eyanikezwa ngonyaka odlule. Kuzosebenza izinhlangano ezimbili zezokwakha, ziqashelwe ukuqinisekisa ukuthi imisebenzi iqedwa ngokushesha. Izakhamuzi zikhuthazwa ukuba zibike noma yiziphi izinkinga ezinqamula ukubuyela kwayo msebenzi kwale miklamo. UMeya weTheku wagcizelela ukuthi inhlanganisela kahulumeni nezimphakathi ibalulekile ukuze kuzuzwe imiphumela ehloniphekile. Lezi zinyathelo zethulwa phakathi nesikhathi lapho izinsolo zokungaphathwa kahle kwezimali zikade zikhathaza iphiko lezingqalasizinda zomasipala.

Inhlangano kazwelonke ebhekelele izingqalasizinda yemukelisé uhulumeni weNingizimu Afrika isicelo sokuqala umshini omusha wokuhlanza amanzi okhethekile, ongasetshenziswa ngisho lapho kunokushortela ugesi khona. UMnyango Wezokusebenza Kwezidolobha ukhiphe isitatimende esiqinisekisa ukuthi imali eyizigidi eziyisi-47 izosetshenziswa ngqo ekufakweni kwezingqalasizinda ezintsha phakathi kweNyuvesi neFlats. Ngokuya kwetimetable ekhishwe ngumasipala, umsebenzi uzuqala ngenyanga kaMandulo, ugcine ngo-2026. Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi basho ukuthi sebekhathele ukulinda ukuthi uMasipala weTheku ubhekane nenkinga yamanzi angcolile ekhukhumala emigwaqweni yabo njalo uma izulu lina. Lesi simo asikho nje enganekwaneni — selenze ukuthi izingane ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amabili zigule ngezimali ezedlule. Wahambela indawo le uNgqongqoshe wezeMpilo, uNkz. Thembi Mthembu, izinsuku ezimbalwa ezedlule, ethembisa ukuthi kuzothathwa izinyathelo ezikhawulezile ukulungisa izingcingo zamanzi ezidala nezomswani. Kuyalindeleka ukuthi iphrojekthi yokuhlanza umsele omkhulu iqale ekupheleni kwaleli nyanga, ngokusho komholi weSigungu Sabahlali. Abezindaba babe bekhona ngesikhathi abahlali bexoxa ngobukhuni bempilo yabo, befuna impendulo ecacile. UMasipala ukhuthaze abahlali ukuba baqhubeke bebika izinkinga ezikhona ngocingo lwabakhonzi bomphakathi ukuze zidingidwe ngokushesha.

Abahlali baseNkandla babhekene nobunzima obukhulu ngenxa yokuntuleka kwamanzi ahlanzekile ezindaweni zabo zemizi. Ngokwemibiko evela kuMkhandlu waseNkandla, ngaphezulu kwamazinga amashumi amathathu emizi ayisebenzisi amanzi egcwele izinzwa, kanti isimo siyaqhubeka ukuba sibi njalo ngezikhathi zokoma. UMasipala ukhiphe isitatimende esithi izinhlelo zokuqiniseka ukufinyelela kwamanzi ezikhundleni ezixakekile sezizoqaliswa ngasekupheleni konyaka wezimali wezi-2025. Phakathi nezingxoxo ezabanjwa emahhovisi kaMasipala, abezikhundla bakhombisa ukuzinikela okuqinile ekuxazululeni lo mkhuba ombi. Ukwakhiwa kwezingxenye ezintsha zomgwaqo wamanzi kuzosiza izindawo ezingu-47 zomphakathi ukuze zithole inzuzo ngokuqondile. UNgqongqoshe wezokuHlaliswa kwabantu noPhuhliso lweMiphakathi uphinde waxwayisa abantu ukuthi babike izikhalazo zabo ngokohlelo lwangokoqobo kumasipala abafanele.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebemile kade belindele ukuthi umkhandlu wezifunda uqede ukuqasha izisebenzi zokusabalalisa amanzi ahlanzekile ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Emhlanganweni owabanjwa ngesonto eledlule, iNkosi yendawo inxuse izikhulu zombuso ukuba zisukume zisebenze ngokushesha, njengoba izingane eziningi zigula ngenxa yokusela amanzi angcolile. Imibiko evela emahhovisi kamasipala ikhombisa ukuthi ngaphezu kwamakhaya ayizinkulungwane ezimbili akuleso sifunda asawatholi amanzi ahlanzekile, nakuba isikhathi esinqunyiwe sokwethulwa kwenqubo entsha kudlule izinyanga eziyisithupha. INhloko yoMnyango Wezamanzi ikhiphe isitatimende ngoLwesibini ethi imali eyabelwe lo msebenzi seyikhishiwe, futhi imisebenzi yokufaka izimbodlela izoqala ngokuphela kwaleli nyanga. Nokho, abahlali bathi izithembiso ezinjalo sebezizwile izikhathi eziningi ngaphandle kwemiphumela ebonakala emhlabeni.
