Abahlali baseMsinga sebeyisigodi esisebenzayo ngemva kokunikezwa kwamandla kamasipala waseNkandla ngonyaka odlule. Izingqalasizinda ezifana nezindlela nezindlu zokuhlanza amanzi seziqalile ukwakhiwa ngokushesha okukhombisa ukuzibophezela kukahulumeni wendawo. Ngokwezibalo ezikhishwe nguMkhandlu waseMsinga, izindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili sezifumene amanzi ahlanzekile ngesevisi entsha yasendaweni. Lapha emuva, abantu babevame ukuhamba ibanga elide befuna amanzi, into eyayibahlupha kakhulu abesifazane nezingane. UNkosazane Thandeka Mthembu, oyesinye sabahlali bendawo, uthe ukuthi izinguquko lezi ziyasithokozisa isizwe. UMkhandlu wesifundazwe uqinisekise ukuthi izinhlelo zokuthuthukiswa kwezindlela zokulima nazo ziyaqhubeka ngokwanele. Uhulumeni wazisa umphakathi ukuthi imihlangano yezidingo zomphakathi iyoqhubeka inyanga nenyanga ukuze kuzwiwe izinkinga zabantu.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebekhala isikhathi eside ngokuntuleka kwamanzi ahlanzekile emiphakathini yabo, kodwa manje kubonakala sengathi izimo ziyashintsha. Umkhandlu waseNkandla uzazise ukuthi umsebenzi wokwakha izingodo zamanzi ezintsha uzophela ngenyanga ezayo, okunqanda ukuncelwa kwamanzi akude nemizi. Kulinganiselwa ukuthi imizi engaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili izuzisa kulesi sinyathelo esibalulekile. Izinhlelo zokuxhumana kwamanzi zizofaka izindawo ezifana naKwaNxamalala, eMahlabathini, nasezindaweni ezisemaphandleni ezibikelwe kaningi njengezidingeka usizo oluphuthumayo. Isikhulumi soMkhandlu, uMnuz. Sipho Mthembu, wachaza ukuthi izimali zathola ukuvunywa ngoNhlolanja walo nyaka, ngakho-ke ukwakhiwa kuzothatha izinyanga eziyisithupha. Wabuye wabeka ukuthi abasebenzi bendawo bayoqashwa ukuze umnotho wendawo ukhule kanye nalokhu. Umphakathi wanxusiwa ukuhlonipha izingqalasizinda ezakhiwa, futhi uMkhandlu uxwayisa ukuthi

Abahlali baseThekwini abalinde isikhathi eside manje banethemba entsha ngemuva kokukhishwa kwezinhlelo ezintsha zokwenziwa kabusha kwezindawo zokulala ezingabanzi. Ngaphezu kwemizi eyizinkulungwane eziyishumi nambili ezihlala ezindaweni ezishaywe yinkinga yezakhiwo ezidindilizayo, uMasipala weTheku uzibophezele ekupheleliseni izakhiwo ezibi ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali wezi-2025/2026. Izinhlelo lezi zethulwe esithangamini somphakathi esibanjelwe eNtuthuko Hall ngesonto eledlule, lapho izikhulu zikahulumeni nezinhlangano zomphakathi zahlangana khona ukuxoxa ngezinto eziphuthumayo. Kubikwa ukuthi imali elinganiselwa ezigidini ezingamashumi amane yahlonzwa ngenhloso yokuxhasa lo msebenzi omkhulu. Abaholi bomphakathi baphinde bananela ukubaluleka kokuqinisekiswa kokuthi izimali zifika ngqo ezindaweni eziswele kakhulu, futhi akusetshenziswa kabi. Umphakathi wemenywa ukuba ubambe iqhaza ngokuveza izinkinga ngamagalelo asemthethweni kuMkhandlu Wase

Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi babelinde isikhathi eside ukuthi uMkhandlu weTheku uphendule izikhalazo zabo mayelana nokungasebenzi kahle kwezinsiza zamanzi nezimbobo emigwaqweni. Ngesonto elidlule, umshangazi wobandlululo lwezindawo uMnuz. Sibusiso Dlamini wamemezela ukuthi izinhlelo zokulungiswa kwalezi zingqalasizinda seziqalile ngokusemthethweni. Izigidi ezingama-R47 zibekwe eceleni ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi umsebenzi uqedwa ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali. Kufanele kuhlinzekwe izindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu ngamanzi agelezayo phakathi nezinyanga eziyisithupha ezizayo. Ukuphela kwezimali zomphakathi kule minyaka edlule kwagcina sekubangela ukucosha nokuxabana phakathi kwezakhamuzi neziphathimandla. Nokho, iKomidi lezeMpilo nezaManzi likhuthaza ukuthi abahlali bazibike izingqinamba ngqo ehovisi lasendaweni ukuze ukulungiswa kwenziwe ngokushesha. Lezi zinyathelo zimelela ithonya lokuzinikela kwezikhulu zikahul

Abahlali baseNkandla sebelalele isikhathi eside befuna izimpendulo mayelana nezingqalasizinda ezidala ezifana nezindlela ezimoshakele nezinxanxathela zamanzi eziphuke. Kulandela umhlangano wesigungu somasipala owabanjwa ngesonto eledlule, uMkhandlu uMasipala waseNkandla usememezele uhlelo olusha lokuhlaziya izingqalasizinda zalezi zindawo. Izimali ezilinganiswa ku-R47 million sezibekiwe kulolu hlelo, lapho abasebenzi bazobe beqala umsebenzi ekuqaleni kwenkanga ezayo. Kuchaziwe ukuthi izigodi eziyishumi nanhlanu zizothola inzuzo ngokuqondile kulolu hlelo, kubandakanya nezindawo ezikude emaphandleni. Uhlelo lokwakhiwa kabusha kwezindlela luzohlanganiswa nomsebenzi wokufakwa kwamapayipi amanzi amatsha, ukuze kugwemeke ukonakaliswa kwengqalasizinda esanda kwakhiwa. Abahlali bacelwe ukuba babike noma yiziphi izinkinga ezikhona ezindaweni zabo phakathi kohlelo lokuhlolwa okuzokwenziwa ngaphambi kokuba umsebenzi uqale.

Abahlali baseMsinga sebeyalelwa ukuthi banikeze imininingwane yabo emikhakheni yezempilo yamasipala ngenhloso yokuthola izincwadi zokufakwa kwamanzi ahlanzekile emakhaya. Lezi zindaba zilethe ithemba elikhulu emphakathini owake wahlushwa ukungabi nazo izidingo eziyisisekelo iminyaka eminingi. Umkhandlu wezifunda ukhiphe isaziso esisemthethweni esichaza ukuthi kubalelwa emashumini amabili nezinhlanu amakhefu okufaka izingosi zokuxhumana kwamanzi amatsha, okuqala ngenyanga ezayo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uMnyango Wezengqalasizinda uqinisekise ukuthi izinsiza zokusebenza zikhona nezisebenzi eziqeqeshiwe zizobeka isandla ekuqedeleni lomsebenzi ngaphakathi kwesikhathi esibekiwe. Balinganiselwa izinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa nezingamakhulu amahlanu izakhamuzi ezizuza kulolu hlelo, okungukuthi kuzoba ushintsho olubonakalayo empilweni yabantu basemaphandleni. Iziphathimandla zicela ukuthi umphakathi ubambisane ngokugcwele bese ubika noma yiziphi izingqinamba esigcemeni samas

Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi babekhala iminyaka eminingi ngenhlupho yokweswelakala kwamanzi ahlanzekile ezindlini zabo. Ngemuva kohlelo lokuphenywa kwezingqinamba ezenziwa yiMkhandlu weTheku, kwatholakala ukuthi amaphayipi amadala abalelwa emakhilomitheni angaphezu kwamashumi amane adalwa ukubola kwamanzi. Izinqumo ezibalulekile zathathwa ngesikhathi somhlangano wamakhansela ngoNdasa walo nyaka, ngokomthetho omusha wokubhekana nezingqinamba zokulethwa kwamanzi emiphakathini esixakekile. Ngokwesitatimende esakhishwa nguMkhandlu, imisebenzi yokulungiswa kwamaphayipi izoqala ngenyanga ezayo, kanti abekhele izigodi eziyisishiyagalombili bazozuza kulolu hlelo. Inhlangano yomphakathi iPhakathi Komunye nabanye ikhiphe amazwi okubonga ngalesi sinqumo, ikubona njengenshintsho enkulu ekuphileni kwabantu. Ukufakwa kwamanthanki amanzi nawo kuhlelelwe lezi zindawo njengesikhashana sesinxephezelo ngesikhathi sokwakhiwa.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebeyizwile indaba yokuthi imigwaqo ebizwa ngokuthi iyadilikela izobuyiselwa kabusha ngaphakathi kwezinyanga ezintathu ezizayo. UMkhandlu weNkandla ukhiphe isimemezelo esisemthethweni ngeviki eledlule, uqinisekisa ukuthi imali eyabelwe lo msebenzi isivele ibekiwe futhi abaqaphi bezokwakha sebeqashiwe. Kule ndawo, abantu abaningi baye bathola izingqinamba zokuhamba ngoba imigwaqo ibifile, ikakhulukazi ngesikhathi semvula. Kuyethusayo ukuthi ezinye izindawo azizange zithole ukulungiswa komgwaqo iminyaka engaphezu kweyishumi. UMeya uNomvula Dube, ekhuluma emhlanganweni nabahlali ngoLwesibili, uqinisekise ukuthi lo msebenzi uzophela ngaphakathi kwesikhathi esibekiwe, futhi izimali zizobe zihlolwa yikomidi elizimele. Umphakathi ukhuthazwe ukuveza ukukhathazeka ngokuqondile kwihovisi lomasipala ukuze zonke izinkinga ziqoshwe ngaphambi kokuba umsebenzi uqale.

Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi sebekhulume ngokuphansi ngezinkinga zamanzi ahlanzekile ezishiye izindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu zingenalo amanzi okuphuza aphephile izinyanga ezedlule. Umkhandlu weTheku uvumile ukuthi izingqalasizinda endaweni leyo ikhulile ngokwedlula amandla kwengxenye yezimpompi ezikhona. Ngesikhathi sohlelo lokuhlola olwenziwa ngoNovemba, kwatholakala ukuthi amaphayipu amaningi eselimele kakhulu, futhi amanye asakhelwe ngesikhathi soBandlululo. Ukusetshenziswa kohlelo olusha lokukhonza izakhamuzi luzobandakanya ukusetshenziselana komkhandlu nezinkampani ezizimele, okwazokwenza ukuqhutshwa kwemisebenzi kubekhawuleza. Kulindeleke ukuthi imali ecela ku-R42 million ibekwe eceleni ukuze kuqalwe izinto kwagcina ngenyanga kaJanuwari wonyaka ozayo. Izakhamuzi zikhuthazwa ukuba zikhulume namalunga omkhandlu endaweni yazo uma izinkinga zisamile, njengoba umkhandlu uhlose ukuthi akukho muntu ozoshiywa ngemuva kulolu hlelo olusha.

Izindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu zasemakhaya zizuza amanzi ahlanzekile ngemuva kokuba uMasipala waseThekwini uqede ngempumelelo isigaba sokuqala sohlelo lokusakaza izingcingo zamanzi ezindaweni zasemaphandleni. Lolu hlelo, olwethulwa ngonyaka odlule, luhlose ukwelapha ukulingana kwezidingo zomphakathi wolonke, ikakhulukazi kulezo zindawo eziye zahlupheka kanzima ngenxa yokungabibikho kwamanzi acocekile. Umphakathi waseMpangeni ubabaze kakhulu lesi sinqumo, njengoba abaningi babe beholela amanzi emilambo ayelingabazi impilo yabo. Uhlelo luzokwandiswa olwandle lwesibili ngonyaka wezi-2025, lapho kuhloswe khona ukuthinta izindlu ezingama-7,000 ezinazo. Ikomiti lezokunikezwa kwezidingo elidingidana nezindaba zomphakathi liyaphinde lithi imali eyasho izigidi ezingama-45 inikwe lobu bukhuni ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi akukho muntu osalile emuva ekufikeleni kwezidingo zensita zezenhlalo.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebekhala isikhathi eside ngenkinga yamanzi ageleza nzima emiphakathini yasemakhaya, imigodi yezimbiwa nezikhungo zezempilo zihlupheka ngokusweleka kwamanzi ahlanzekile. Umasipala waseMandeni uphendule ngokumemezela uhlelo olusha lokukhela amanzi oluzofakwa ekuqaleni konyaka wezimali ozayo, uhlelo oluzobandakanya ukwakhiwa kwezinqongo zamanzi ezintathu nezintokozo zokuxhumanisa izindlu ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu. INhloko yoMnyango wezingqalasizinda, uNkw. Buhle Mthethwa, ikuqinisekisile ukuthi izimali zibekiwe futhi abaniki-ngxiwankulu sebekhethiwe ngemuva kokuba inqubo yokuthenga kuzulazulwe ngokuphelele. Abameli bemiphakathi baxwayise, nokho, ukuthi bakhetha ukubona imisebenzi iqala ngempela hhayi izithembiso kuphela, njengoba izifungo ezifanayo zenziwa ngonyaka ongaphambili zingagcwaliseki. UMkhandlu uzibophezele ukuthi wonke umsebenzi uzophela ngaphambi kwezikhathi zokunqunywa kwamanzi ehlobo, uqinis

Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi sebexwayise izikhulu zikahulumeni ukuthi izidingo zabo zokunakekelwa kwezimbobo zemigwaqo namanzi agelezayo azisafanele ukubekezelelwa. Isigodi esizungeza indawo yase-Unit H sibhekene nezinselelo ezinzima njengoba abanye abantu beqhuba izinyanga eziyishumi nambili bengenamanzi agelezayo emizini yabo. UMkhandlu weTheku awukhiphi isitatimende esicacile mayelana nezinhlelo zokukhulisa ingqalasizinda, nakuba izimali zihlonzwe esabelweni semali sonyaka owedlule. Ngokombiko okhishwe nguMasipala waseTheku, izinhlelo zokubuyisela amanzi kumakhaya angama-4 200 kule ndawo ziqalwe ngoMarch, kodwa ukunqamuka okuphindaphindene kwezinsiza kukhombisa ukuthi izinto azihambisani nohlelo. Amalunga omphakathi afune ukuthi iNhloko yeKomidi lezeMvelo nezoLimo ikhiphe impendulo ngqo, bese kuvulwa izingxoxo ezihambelana nezidingo zokulungiswa kwemigwaqo nangaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali.

Abahlali baseThekwini abaningi babhekene nenkinga yokusweleka kwamanzi acocekile emakhaya abo, ikakhulukazi kulezi zinsuku zokushisa. Ingqungquthela yomkhandlu ibihlangene ngesonto eledlule ukuxoxa ngale nkinga ebuhlungu. Kwaphakanyiswa izinhlelo ezintsha zokwakha imingcelele yamanzi emalokishini angaphandle kwedolobha, lapho izingwadla zamapayipi zimoshwe yisikhathi nokuguquka kwezimo zomhlaba. UMphathi Wezingqalasizinda uthe izimali zikhishiwe, futhi umsebenzi uzoqala ngaphakathi kwezinyanga ezimbili ezizayo. Abasebenzi beHhovisi Likahulumeni Wendawo bazophinde bahlole zonke izindawo ezithintekile ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi abantu abatholakali amanzi bayasizwa ngokushesha. Babuye babeka iziqiniseko zokuthi iziphakamiso zabahlali ezihlonishiwe ziyoqondwa kalula, futhi kuzosungulwa uhlelo lokuxhumana phakathi kukahulumeni nabahlali ukuze lezi zikhalazo zingaphinde zifikele ezingeni elingaka.

Abahlali baseNdwedwe sebenesikhathi eside belinde ukuxhunywa kwezindlu zamanzi ahlanzekile, njengoba ingqalasizinda yomphakathi iqhubeka nokubola kancane kancane. Kulinganiselwa ukuthi amakhaya angaphezu kuka-2 400 kulesi sigodi asalokhu engenalo amanzi agelezayo, abantu besebenzisa imithombo yemvelo eyingozi empilweni. UMnu Sibusiso Dlamini, oyilungu lomphakathi elikhulumela abahlali, uthe inkinga le isiphendule isikhungo sezempilo nezikole zibe namashwa enkulu, njengoba izingane zihamba ibanga elide ukuyolanda amanzi ngaphambi kwasikole. UMasipala weTheku uthumele ithimba labacwaningi ngoLwesithathu odlule ukuzohlola isimo, futhi bahlinzeka ngesikhakela sokuthi umsebenzi wokumba amapaiphi uzosuka ekuqaleni kwekota elandelayo. Umphakathi ucela izikhulu zikahulumeni ukuba zingasheshi nje ukuvakasha, kodwa ziphinde ziqinisekise ukuthi izimali ziqhutshekwa ngendlela ebonakala ngamehlo wonke umuntu.

Abahlali baseMpumalanga bebegubha umcimbi omkhulu ngesonto eledlule, lapho kubuyiselwa khona amalungelo omhlaba emigodini yaseSoweto yamathafa. Izakhamizi ezingaphezu kwezi-2 500 zibenikhona kulo mcimbi, okwabonisa ukuthi udaba lwamalungelo omhlaba lusabalulekile emphakathini. UMkhandlu waseNkandla, owawukhona ngamakomiti awo, wazibophezela ekuxazululeni izingxabano eziphathelene nemingcele yamasimu. Isikhalo esikhulu sabanikazi bomhlaba besingokusweleka kwamadokhumenti asemthethweni, into ebavimbela ekutheni bavikele izitho zabo ngaphandle. Phakathi kohlelo olusha olushesiwe, kuzoqalwa uhlu olusha lokuqapha ukusetshenziswa kwemhlaba ukuze kuncishiswe izingxabano. UNkosazane Thandeka Dlamini, ongumholi womphakathi, wathi leli thuba likhulu futhi abantu kufanele basebenzisane nohulumeni wasekhaya. Izikhungo zomphakathi nazo zizosiza ekufundiseni abahlali ngamalungelo abo ngaphansi koMthetho Omkhulu weziMbambano zoMhlaba.

Abahlali basemakhaya baseNdwedwe, KwaZulu-Natali, sebekhuluma ngokushesha mayelana nezinkinga zokulahla udoti ezifundeni zabo, ngemuva kokuba imigwaqo yendawo igcwele udoti obungahlanzwanga izinyanga ezintathu. Kuvela ukuthi inkontileka ebhekele ukuqoqwa kukadoti ayizange ifinyelele kulezi zindawo ngesikhathi esifanele, okwenze isimo saba sibi kakhulu. UMkhandlu waseNdwedwe uthe izinhlelo zokusilungisa lesi simo saqalwa ngale viki, futhi ziyaqhubeka ngokushesha. Ngokuya ngabathintekayo, izifo ezishayela izingane nezimame ezikhulelwe zinezinkinga ezandayo ngenxa yamanzi angcolile ahambelana nalesi simo sokungahlanzeki. Iziphathimandla zomphakathi zikhuthaza abahlali ukuba babike zonke izinkinga ngqo emahhovisi oMkhandlu ukuze ukusizakala kube ngokushesha. Uhlelo lokuhlanza olubanzi luzoba khona ngoMgqibelo walo nyaka ozayo, lapho abasebenzi bezohamba imigwaqo yonke yendawo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi imvelo yabahlali ivikelekile futhi ihlanzekile.

Abahlali bendawo yaseMsinga, esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal, babheke isikhathi eside besilindela ukuthi imigwaqo yabo ixoxwe futhi ilungiswe ngokuphelele. Ngokwemibiko eyamukelwe ngale nyanga, izindlela ezingu-fourteen ezingena emijondolo nasemaphandleni zisesimeni esibi kakhulu, ikakhulukazi ngezikhathi zemvula. Abantu abaningi balimale imoto yabo noma bagcine bexhashazekile ekuhambeni izingane esikoleni. UMnumzane Sibusiso Mthembu, ongomunye wabahlali abadala kuleli dolobhana, uthe inkinga yemigwaqo iyavimbela nokuthuthukiswa kwezomnotho endaweni, njengoba abalimi bengakwazi ukuthwala izitshalo zabo ngokuphepha. IMkhandlu wezifunda isinqume ukubeka le ndaba phambili njengomsebenzi wokuqala wonyaka wezimali ozayo, futhi imali elinganiselwa kumashumi amahlanu ezigidi zamarandi ibekelwe wona lo msebenzi. Kulindelwe ukuthi umsebenzi wokwakha uqale ngaphakathi kwezinyanga ezintathu ezizayo.

Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi, eThekwini, babenethemba elikhulu ngemva kokusayinwa kwesivumelwano sokulungiswa kwemigwaqo eyonakele endaweni yabo. Imigwaqo eminingi kulesi sigodi isikhathi eside ingasebenzi kahle, okwenze ukuba abantu bahlangabezane nobunzima obukhulu ekuhambeni nasekufikeni ezikhungweni zempilo. UMnuz. Sibonelo Dlamini, omunye wabaholi bomphakathi, uthe abantu basemgwaqeni wakwaHlengwa babelinde usizo olunje iminyaka eyedlulele njengemihlanu. Umkhandlu womasipala uqinisekise ukuthi umsebenzi wokwakhiwa nokulungiswa kwalesi sigodi uzophela ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali wezi-2025. Ngaphezu kwalokho, amanzi ahlanzekile azofakwa ezindlini ezingama-450 ezikhona lapho, njengoba abaningi babegcina belanda amanzi kude nekhaya labo. Abazali bayathokoza kakhulu ngalezi zindaba, njengoba izingane beziphatheka kabi ngezimo zomgwaqo ezibi ekuhambeni esikoleni nsuku zonke.

Izakhamizi zaseMlazi zibonisa ukujabula ngemva kokwethulwa kohlelo olutsha lokuthuthukiswa kwezindlu ezikhona endaweni leyo. Izindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili zizothola izinguquko ezibalulekile, okuhlanganisa ukufakwa kwezibuko nezindonga ezicinile. UMengameli woMkhandlu waseThekwini, uNkk. Thembi Dlamini, uthe uhlelo luzosiza imindeni eningi eyahlushwa izinkinga zezindlu iminyaka emide. Imali eqoqiwe kulolu hlelo yethulwa nguHulumeni wezifundazwe kanye nozakwethu abavela emnothweni wabucala. Abasebenzi bazoqala umsebenzi ngoLwezi walo nyaka, ngokusho kwezithangami ezenziwe nomphakathi. Okukhuthazayo ukuthi umphakathi usebenze ngokubambisana nezinhlaka zikahulumeni ukuze imiphumela ibe ngeyenama. Kuyethembisa ukuthi izingane nabantu abadala bazohlala ezindlini eziphephile nokunotha njengoba iTheku liqhubeka nentuthuko yalo.

Abahlali baseNdwedwe sebekhale iminyaka besilindele izixazululo zokushintshwa kwezingcingo zamanzi ezindaweni zasemakhaya, kepha isikhathi sesifikile. Iziphathimandla zoMkhandlu waseMvoti zikhiphe isimemezelo zisho ukuthi umsebenzi wokusungulwa kwemipayipi yamanzi omusha uzokuqala ngenyanga ezayo. Kuzukunethezekiswa izindawo ezingaphezu kwamashumi amane emizi ezihlala ngaphansi kwezimo ezinzima, lapho abantu beye bahambe amakhilomitha ukuyothatha amanzi emifuleni nasemagunjini. Ngokuya ngoba isimo sezulu sibaluleke kakhulu kulesi sifunda, abafundi kanye nabantu abadala baye bashayeka kanzima ngezimvula ezithinta izibuko nemigwaqo. Iphrojekthi le, eqalwa ngomfuso weSifundazwe saKwaZulu-Natal ngokubambisana neNgqalasizinda Yamanzi kazwelonke, izothwalisa umphakathi ithemba elisha. Ababambiqhaza kumele babhalise emahhovisi oMkhandlu ukuze bathole ulwazi oluthe vetshe ngezigaba zomsebenzi ozayo.

Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi babhekene nezinselelo ezinzima ngenxa yezikhukhula ezibhubhisile izindlu nengqalasizinda endaweni yabo ngenyanga edlule. Amakhaya angaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu ashiywe engenazo izindlu ezivikelekile ngemva kwezimvula ezimandla ezahlasela izifunda ezihlukene KwaZulu-Natal. UMkhandlu weTheku usuqalile izinhlelo zokusiza abantu abahluphekayo, kuhlanganiswe nokubaphakela ukudla kanye nezimpahla zokugqoka. Izindawo zokuhlalisa abantu zisungulwe esikoleni iMlazi High School lapho izinhlangano zezasekhaya nazo zizibandakanye ngokusiza. Ingqalasizinda efana nezintambo zikagesi nezimbobo zamanzi nazo zinqanyulwa izikhukhula, ngakho-ke izikhulu ziyacela ukuba umphakathi ubike zonke izinkinga ngokuphuthuma. Iziphathimandla zifuna ukuthi labo abahluphekayo baqinisekise ukuqopha amagama abo emahhovisi kaHulumeni ukuze bathole usizo lwezezimali nolwezindlu ngezinyanga ezizayo.

Abahlali baseNdwedwe sebekhala izinyembezi ngenxa yenkinga yamanzi ahlanzekile eselokhu ikhona iminyaka eminingi. Izindawo ezifana neKwaNxamalala naseNtunjambili zisengozini enkulu njengoba abantu basebenzisa amanzi omifula engenacebo, okuholela ezikhwelweni zamathumbu nasezikhwelweni ezibucayi zabantwana abancane. Imikhandlu yezindawo yasho ukuthi izinhlelo zokwakha amapayipi amanzi azofinyelela emalokishini asemakhaya ziqalile, kepha umphakathi ubuza ukuthi zizophela nini. Izikhulu zikahulumeni bezifike nangenyanga edlule ukuzobona isimo, futhi zathembisa ukuthi imali eningi izonikezwa lolu hlelo. Kwabe kubikwa ukuthi izinkampani ezinhlanu zifake izicelo zokunqotshwa kwalomsebenzi, nokuthi isinqumo sizothathwa ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga. Abazali babantwana bayacela ukuba iziphathimandla zisheshe, njengoba iziguli ziya zandayo emitholampilo yasekhaya ngenxa yokuphuzwa kwamanzi angcolile.

Abahlali baseNkandla babekhala isikhathi eside ngenkinga yamanzi amdaka nangomgwaqo owonakalele oshiya izakhamuzi zingakwazi ukufinyelela izindawo zempilo nezimfundo ngempumelelo. Ngesonto eledlule, iNhloko yoMkhandlu waseNkandla, uNkk. Thandi Mchunu, ibambe ihlangano nababamba iqhaza emphakathini, lapho kwaphakanyiswa khona izinhlelo zokubuyisela isidigniti kulezi zindawo ezisemakhaya. Izicelo zokwakhiwa kabusha komgwaqo omude izikayilomitha ezingama-47 sezifakiwe eMnyangweni Wezingzwele WesiFundazwe. Ukwengeza, i-eNdlovini Community Water Project, ethola usizo ngemali efikelela ku-R8.2 million, izoqala ngokusemthethweni mhlaka-15 Novemba walo nyaka. Izakhamuzi zibingelele lezi zindaba ngenjabulo enkulu, zithi izimpilo zazo zizoshintsha ngempela. Umkhandlu uwumemezele futhi ukuthi izingane ezifunda ezikoleni eziyishumi nambili esifundeni sizothola izinto zokufunda zolwaka lonyaka ngoDisemba, njengengxenye yohlelo

Abahlali baseNdwedwe basezindaweni zasemakhaya babe nenjabulo enkulu ngemuva kokwethulwa kohlelo lokunikezwa kwamanzi ahlanzekile olwetshulwa nguMkhandlu weTheku ngenyanga edlule. Kulo mhlaba onemizi engaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili, abantu babeqhubeka nokuhamba amabanga amade beyofuna amanzi emifuleni nasezihosha, okwakuphatha ingozi impilo yabantu nabantwana ikakhulukazi. Ngokusho kukaSihlalo woMkhandlu, uNkz. Thandi Mthembu, isimo lesi siyindaba eyaphuthelwa amaqembu ezombusazwe aminyaka eminingi. Kuzobeka izinqwaba zamapayipi amanzi emizini engama-2 400 kwileli dolobha phakathi kwezinyanga eziyisithupha. Umnyango Wamanzi Nezimali uzobe usebenza ngokusondelana nabaholi bendawo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi umsebenzi uqhubeka ngendlela efanele futhi ngesikhathi esinqunyiwe. Lelo thuba liyisiqalo esihle kubahlali abaningi abake balingana nobunzima bokuntuleka kwamanzi emakhaya.

Abahlali baseNdwedwe, enyakatho yeTheku, sebekhuluma ngokufuna izindlela zokuthola amanzi ahlanzekile emizini yabo, ngemuva kweminyaka eminingi bezithembe kuphela imithombo yasendle. Izinto sezidla amanzi kakhulu, ikakhulwa ngesikhathi sehlobo, lapho izingane ziphila engozini yokufa ngenxa yesifo samanzi angcolile. Kulinganiselwa ukuthi izindlu ezingaphezulu kuka-2 500 kulesi sigodi azikabi nomunye umthombo wamanzi ohlanzekiwe oqinisile. INkosi yendawo, uNkosi Bhekani Mbatha, ithe kuyihlazo ukuthi izakhamizi zisathwala amanzi ngezikhanda ngo-2025. Umkhandlu waseNdwedwe uqinisekisile ukuthi izicelo zosizo sezithunyelwe eNgqungqutheleni yaManzi, kodwa impendulo isalindwa. Izakhamizi zikhuthazwe ukuba ziqhubeke zibikela izikhulu ngezinkinga zazo ngendlela eyiyo neyiyo, ukuze izindaba zazo zingaziwa kahle yiziphathimandla ezinikeza izimali. Umhlangano wokuxoxisana phakathi kwemiphakathi nemkhandlu ulindeleke ukuba ubanjwe ngo

Abahlali baseNdwedwe sebemémezela ukuthi izingqalasizinda zomphakathi zithe ukwonja ukona, kuhlanganisa nemigwaqo engasebенzi kahle kanye nezakhiwo zesikole ezidinga ukulungiswa ngokushesha. Ngesonto eladlule, umhlangano woMkhandlu wezindaba zomphakathi wabona abantu abaningi bethula izinkinga zabo phambi kwabaholi bendawo, bekhala ngokungabi khona kwamanzi ahlanzekile emizini yabo. Kucacile ukuthi izimfanelo zempilo eziyisisekelo azikafiki kuyo yonke imindeni. UMasipala wasenhla weTheku wethembisa ukuthi izikhungo zikahulumeni zizobheka le ndaba ngokuphuthuma, futhi izinhlelo zokulungisa izingqalasizinda ezishayekile seziqaliwe ngesenzo esijwayelekile. Umphakathi ubongoza uhulumeni wezindaba zasendaweni ukuba ugcine izithembiso zawo zokufaka amanzi nezimbobo zezibi ezintsha, ngaphambi kokuqala kwesizini yezimvula. Baningi oMama abakhalela izingane zabo ezidinga ukuphuza amanzi ahlanzekile, bephila ngobunzima obukhulu.

Abahlali baseNdwedwe sebekhuluma ngokuzithola bengaphephile ngenxa yezikhukhula ezidlule, njengoba izindlu ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu zabhidlika noma zonakala kakhulu. Isimo sezulu esibi esahlasela izifunda zaseThekwini nazo ezinye izindlu ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu zabhidlika noma zonakala kakhulu. Isimo sezulu esibi esahlasela izifunda zaseThekwini nazo ezinye izindlu ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu zabhidlika noma zonakala kakhulu. Isimo esahlasela KwaZulu-Natal ngenyanga edlule sidale umonakalo omkhulu, njengoba imigwaqo eminingi yamukelekile njengentela yenhlalakahle yomphakathi. Kuvele ukuthi izingane ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amabili azikwazanga ukuya ezikolweni ngoba izikole ezintathu zavalwa ngokwesikhashana ngenxa yengozi. UMkhandlu waseNdwedwe uqinisekise ukuthi usebenza noMnyango Wezokuhlaliswa Kwabantu ukuze lezo zindlu ezonakele zilungiswe ngokushesha, kanti izindleko zalomsebenzi iqashelwa uHulumeni wePhrovin

Abahlali baseNkandla babhekene nezingqinamba ezibucayi njengoba izikole eziyisithupha kule ndawo zibike ukuntuleka kwezincwadi zokufundisa nezikhali zokubhala ezibalulekile. Izingane ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili zilindele usizo, kuyilapho othisha beveza ukukhathazeka okukhulu ngezinhlelo zokuhlolwa esezisondelayo. INhlangano Yomphakathi ihlangane namalungu amkhandlu ngesonto eladlule ukuxoxa ngale nkinga, lapho kwavunyelwana khona ukuthi izimfanelo zizokhishwa ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga. Izisebenzi zezikole nazo zikhale ngendaba yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile nasezakhiweni ezinezinto ezimoshekile. Umkhandlu waseNkandla uziqinisekisile ukuthi izimali zabelwe lezi zinkinga, kodwa abahlali basazindla ngezithembiso ezingefezwanga ngaphambilini. Uhlelo lokubuyekezwa kwezingqalasizinda yezikhungo zemfundo kulesi sifunda luhlongozwe ukuqala phakathi onyakamali omusha, ngokwemibiko esivela kuMnyango weZemfundo.

Izakhamizi zaseMlazi, eThekwini, ziqhubeka nezibongo ngemva kokwethulwa kohlelo olusha lokuhlinzekwa ngamanzi ahlanzekiwe ezindlini ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili. Uhlelo lwamukelwa kahle kakhulu emiphakathini eyayihlushwa ukushoda kwamanzi iminyaka eminingi. Umkhandlu weThekwini waqinisekisa ukuthi imigodi yamanzi entsha izosebenza ngokugcwele phakathi nezinyanga ezintathu ezizayo. Abaholi bomphakathi babonge uHulumeni weZifundazwe neNkosi yasendaweni ngokusebenzisana okulethe umphumela omuhle kangaka. Ngaphezu kwalokho, izingane ezikhonza ezikoleni zasendaweni manje sezinokufinyelela amanzi ahlanzekiwe ngesikhathi sawo wonke, okuzosiza ukwehlisa iziguli ezibangelwa yilokhu kushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekiwe. Iziphathimandla zinxuse amalungu omphakathi ukuba aphathe ngononina ingqalasizinda entsha ukuze ihlale ilungile isikhathi eside. Umsebenzi wokufakwa kwezingodo zamanzi ongaselwa uvele njengozwela laleli phrojekthi elingundabamlonyeni ezindaweni zasemakh

Abahlali baseThekwini abasezindaweni zaseMlazi babhekane nenkinga enkulu yokusweleka kwamanzi acocekile emiphakathini eminingi. Izindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu zihlala izinsuku eziyisikhombisa ngaphandle kwamanzi, okubangela ubunzima obukhulu kubomama nabantwana abancane. UMkhandlu weTheku uveze ukuthi lolu daba luphenywa ngobuchwepheshe, futhi izinhlelo zokwenza isixazululo ziqalile ukusebenza. Abasebenzi bezingqalasizinda baqinisekisile ukuthi izigodi ezithintekile zizothola usizo oluphuthumayo ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga. Nokho, abahlali abaningi basola ukuthi izithembiso zifana nezinqubo ezidadekayo, njengoba kuke kwenzeka esikhathini esedlule. UNkosazane Thandeka Dube, isikhulu somphakathi waseMlazi, uthe impendulo ehamba ngokushesha iyadingeka ukuze inkinga engaka ingabi yinkinga yezempilo emphakathini. Kumelwe ukuthi zonke izinhlaka zihlangane ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi abantu bakwazi ukuphila impilo enesithunzi.

Abahlali baseNkandla babekhuluma ngokukhathazeka okukhulu ngemingcele yamasimi abo emhlanganweni webhodi lasekuhlaleni owawubanjelwe eHhovisi Lezindaba ZikaHulumeni ngesonto eledlule. Izinkinga zomhlaba sezibe yinkinga enkulu kule ndawo iminyaka emibili edlule, lapho abalimi abaningi bephikisana ngobunikazi bezingosi zabo. UMnumzane Sibonelo Dlamini, ongomunye wabalimi abathintekile, wanxusa uhulumeni wezifundazwe ukuba uthumele izinduna zezomhlaba ukuzohlela kabusha imingcele. Iziphathimandla zoMnyango Wezolimo zaqinisekisa ukuthi ucwaningo luzaqala ngekota yokuqala ka-2026. Phakathi nalo mhlangano, kwabuye kwaxoxwa ngezinhlelo zokufukula umnotho wabalimi abancane ngokubabonelela ngemfundo nangezinsiza ezingokobuchwepheshe. Izakhamizi zale ndawo zicela ukuba inqubo yokuhlela kabusha imingcele iqhutshekwe ngokushesha nangobuqotho, ukuze ukuthula kanye nokuxhumana kahle phakathi kwabahlali kuqinisekiswe.

Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi eThekwini sebeveze ukukhathazeka okukhulu mayelana nezinkinga zamanzi ahlanza okubaxake iminyaka eminingi. Ngokusho kwamalungu omphakathi, izindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili ziyaphila ngaphandle kokuthola amanzi ahlanzekile ageleza emaquleni. UMkhandlu weTheku uxhumane nabahlali ngesonto eledlule, ugcizelela ukuthi izinhlelo zokuqeda le nkinga seziqalisile ngokusemthethweni. Izisebenzi zomthetho ziqashwe ukuze ziqale ukubeka amapayipi amasha endaweni yase-Unit 9 neyase-Unit 15. Okhulumela umkhandlu, uNkz. Thandeka Dlamini, uthe imali elinganiselwa ezigidini ezingamashumi amabili yerandi isabelelwe kulolu hlelo. Abahlali, nokho, basacela ukuqinisekiswa okusobala ngamalanga okuwuphela komsebenzi. Umphakathi ucelwa ukuba uhlale ubheke izaziso ezizophuma kumkhandlu ngamazwi okuhamba kwezinhlelo ezibalulekile zokuxhasa impilo yabantu bonke.

Abahlali baseNdwedwe sebegcwele amandla nokulangazelela muva nje, ngemuva kokuba umkhandlu waseLocal Municipality usuvule ngokusemthethweni isiko lokunikezela ngezindlu ezintsha emiphakathini eyayilinde isikhathi eside. Ngaphezu kwemindeni engama-450 ebehlala emigodini nasezikoleni ngenxa yokuntuleka kwezindlu, ezinye zazo seziqale ukuthola izikhiye zazo ngaleli sonto elidlule. Kusukela ngo-2019, inhlangano yezakhiwo zikahulumeni ibisebenzela ukufinyelela izinga eliphezulu lokwakhiwa kwezakhiwo ezimumethe imfudumalo nokuphephela. Ngokwesethulo esanikezwa emhlanganweni wasemphakathini, izindlu lezi zakhiwe ngezinto eziqinile futhi zinamanzi kagesi nezamapayipi. UNkz. Thandi Dlamini, omunye wabahlali abamukelayo, wathi le nsuku kumuntu wesifazane onjengaye injengokunqoba impi enkulu yempilo. Umkhandlu uqinisekise ukuthi izindawo zabantwana nazo zokulimala kazifane nezakuqala, futhi izindlela zokungena emizini zizokwakhiwa ngezinyanga ezizayo ukuze kufinyeleleke

Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi, eThekwini, sebeyimemezele ngokuphansi inkinga enkulu yokunqotshwa kwezindlela zangasese emiphakathini eminingi. Izindlu zangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili azinaso isiphephelo esifanele sokulahla imfucuza, okwenza izingane nabantu abadala babhekane nezimo ezingcolile nezinobungozi empilweni. UMnumzane Sibusiso Dlamini, ongomunye wabahlali ababamba iqhaza emhlanganweni we-ward endlini yomphakathi ngesonto eledlule, uthe imindeni eminingi incika emifoceni eyabhekiswa yizihlobo noma ayikho nhlobo. UMkhandlu weTheku uzibophezelile ekuxazululeni le nkinga ngokuqinisekisa ukuthi ukwakha izingonqoshe ezintsha kuzoquka konke ukuhlonishwa kwezinhlelo zempilo nomphakathi. Lolu hlelo lokuqala lokuhlola izidingo ze-sanitation luzobandakanya nezigodi ezisemakhaya eziyi-awu ngaphambi kokuthi imali yesabelomali yonyaka ozayo inikezwe ezimweni ezibalulekile.

Abahlali baseNdwedwe sebezwakalise ukukhathazeka okukhulu mayelana nokusweleka kwamanzi ahlanzekile emiphakathini yasemakhaya, lapho izingane namadoda amadala bebeka umthwalo wokulanda amanzi emifuleni eqhubeka nokungcola. Ngaphezu kwemindeni engamakhulu amathathu ithintekile kulesi simo, besezikhalazo zabo zethulwa eMkhandlwini weNkosi yendawo ngaphambi kuka-Ephreli walo nyaka. Kulesi sikhathi, izikhungo zezempilo zasendaweni nazo zigcizelele ubungozi bezinye izifo ezidluliselwa ngamanzi angcolile, ikakhulukazi kubancane. Umphathi womkhandlu uthe izinhlelo zokwakha ingqalasizinda yamanzi seziqalile ukuhlolwa, futhi imali eyabiwe yizifunda izohlinzekwa ngokushesha. Nokho, abantu bendawo baqhubeka nokubanga ukuthi izethembiso ezifanayo zake zenziwa nangonyaka odlule, kodwa zingakaqedwa. UMasipala waseNdwedwe ucelwe ukuba unikeze umbiko ophelele ngokuqhubekela phambili kwalo msebenzi phambi kokuphela kwekota yezimali yokuqala.

Abahlali baseNkandla baxwayisile ngokuphuthuma kwenkinga yamanzi eningizimu yedolobha, lapho amakhaya angaphezu kwayizi-2 400 eshiywe engenamanzi ahlanzekile izinyanga ezintathu manje. Izingqalabutho zokulethwa kwamanzi zaphukile ngemuva kwezikhukhula zamuva nje, kepha imizamo yokulungiswa isaqhubeka kancane kakhulu ngokusho kwabaholi bomphakathi. UMnumzane Sipho Dlamini, oyilungu lekomidi lomphakathi, uthe abantu besifazane nezingane bathwala kanzima kakhulu ngoba bagcwala amanzi emifuleni engehlanzekile. UMkhandlu weZifunda usethembise ukuthumela izimoto zamanzi ezintathu nsuku zonke, kodwa abakheli babuza ukuthi lesi sinyathelo sizohlala isikhathi esingakanani. Izinhlangano zezempilo zixwayisa ngomkhankaso oqhubekayo wokukhangisa ngezingozi zokuphuzwa kwamanzi angcolile, ikakhulukazi ezinganeni ezingaphansi kweminyaka emihlanu. Abahlali bancenga uhulumeni wephrovinsi ukuba uqhubeke nokuhlola isimo ngokushesha futhi uchithe imali eyanele yokulungisa ingqalas

Abahlali baseNkandla baxwayise ukuthi izindlela ezidabula imijondolo yasemakhaya zisesimweni esibi kakhulu, ikakhulukazi emva kwezimvula ezinamasondo ezehla enyangeni edlule. Izingebhezi ezinzima zishiye izindlela nezibuko eziphukile, okwenze abantu abaningi bengakwazi ukufinyelela izibhedlela namahholo emfundo. UNkk. Thembeka Dlamini, ohlanganisa izimuli ezingamashumi amane esikhundleni sakhe somkhandlu wekomidi, uthe inhlupho ayinqamuki selokhu kwashona isabelomali sokuhlaziywa kwezindlela ngo-2022. Umkhandlu wesifundazwe uwamemezele amhlangano owawuhlelelwe ngoLwesihlanu, kodwa abahlali abaningi abakuqapheli ukushintsha okwenzekayo emhlabathini. Ngokwemibiko evela KwaZulu-Natal Department of Transport, kukhona izicelo ezingama-seventeen ezalindile zokusungulwa kwamaphrojekthi amatsha, kepha izimali zisabanjwe enqwabeni yezikhalo zezikhangiso eziphikisanayo. Umphakathi uyacela ukuthi izikhulu zikhulume ngokusobala futhi ziveze izinhlelo ezibonakalayo ng

Abahlali baseNdwedwe sebekhala iminyaka eminingi ngenxa yokuntuleka kwamanzi ahlanzekile ezindaweni zasemakhaya, nalapho abantu bekhona bephoqwa ukuthatha amanzi emifuleni nemizobho. Kuleli sonto, izikhulu zomkhandlu zihlangane nabantu bendawo ukuze kuphenywe ngale nkinga ekhulayo. Kubikwa ukuthi imindeni engaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili isaphila ngaphandle kwengqalasizinda yamanzi efanelekile, okuyinto echaphazela impilo yabantwana kanye nabantu abadala. Kuvele nokuthi izicelo ezabiswayo zokwakha amapayipi amanzi ezindaweni ezithile zisagogobele emahhovisi, inhlangano yabahlali ithe ingumthwalo omkhulu lowo. Ukhomishana wezokwabiwa kwamanzi uphendule wathi umsebenzi wolwakhiwo uzophela ngonyaka wezimali ozayo, futhi izindawo eziphuthelwe kakhulu zizonikezwa ingqalasizinda kuqala. Abahlali bakhuthazwe ukuba babike izinkinga zabo emahhovisi aseduzane ukuze kuqoqwe ulwazi olulungile lokuhlelwa kohlelo lokunikezwa kwamanzi.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebelalele isikhathi eside belinde ukuthi imiphakathi yabo ithole amanzi ahlanzekile ngaphansi kohlelo lukahulumeni lokunikezela ngezidingo zomphakathi. UMkhandlu wasendaweni umemezele ukuthi izicelo zamanzi ezintsha zizovulwa ngomhla weshumi nanhlanu kuNovemba, futhi bonke abantu abashadile noma abahlala njengomndeni bangagcwalisa amabhizinisi abo ezikhungweni zikahulumeni eziseduzane. Kufanele izicelo zihambisane nezitifiketi zokuzalwa, ubufakazi bokuhlala, kanye nezitifiketi zomshadо. Iziphathimandla zikhuthaze abahlali ukuthi bangazibekezeli bangabikeli izisebenzi zawo uma behlangana nezinkinga noma ubugwegwe kulezi zinhlelo. UMnyango Wezamanzi uqinisekisile ukuthi izikhungo zokusebenzela umphakathi zizosebenza ngezinsuku zesonto ukuze kulungiswe zonke izicelo ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga. Lolu lwazi lukhiqizwe ngenjongo yokwazisa umphakathi waKwaZulu-Natal ngokubanzi, futhi lungatholakala nasezindaweni zomphakathi nasezikhungweni zikahulumeni ezis

Abahlali baseThekwini abalinde isikhathi eside baxoxa ngentukuthelo ngodaba lwezikhalo zemali yezindlu zamaRDP ezingakaphothulwa. Ngokusho kwabaholi bomphakathi, izinkinga ziqala uma imizi ingenele kahle kumarejista kahulumeni, okuvimbela ukutholakala kwezimvume nezincwadi zobunikazi. UMnyango Wezokuhlaliswa Kwabantu ukhiphe isaziso esithi uhlela ukuthumela izisebenzi ezezindawo ukuze zisize ekuqoqeni ulwazi olusha nokuhlaziya amarekhodi asemandulo. Kuyacaca, nokho, ukuthi inqwaba yabantu isalinde izimpendulo ezineminyaka emibili noma ngaphezulu. Izisebenzi zikahulumeni ezikhethiwe ziyalelwa ukuthi ziphathe izindaba njengeziphuthumayo futhi zinike impendulo engaphezulu kwamalanga ayishumi nane. Lesi simemezelo silandela imihlangano ebikhona phakathi kwabameli bomphakathi neziphathimandla ezikhethiwe, lapho kubikwa khona izimo ezikhathazayo ngokuqhuba kwalenqubo.

Abahlali baseThekwini abaningi balinde iminyaka emide befuna izincwadi zobudlelwano nomhlaba, okuyizinto ezibalulekile ekutholeni izinsizakalo kahulumeni. Ngemuva kokuhlangana komkhandlu wesifunda ngoNovember wango-2024, iMasipala yaKwaZulu-Natali yamemezela uhlelo olusha lokushesha ukuphothula izicelo ezibhekene nezindaba zezempilo yomphakathi kanye nezindlu zikahulumeni. Kuhloswe ukuthi abahlali abaningi bathole impendulo ngezinsuku ezingama-30 ngemuva kokufaka isicelo, esikhundleni sezinyanga eziyisithupha njengakuqala. UMnyango Wezindaba Zomphakathi ubeke abasebenzi abathile abazoqapha inqubo yonke, beqinisekisa ukuthi amaphepha afika ezindaweni ezifanele ngesikhathi esifanele. Lezi zinguquko zethulwe ngemuva kwezibalo ezikhombisa ukuthi ngaphezu kuka-60% wezicelo zazibanjwa ngenxa yokusweleka kwamadokhumenti afanele. Izakhamizi zikhuthazwa ukuvakashela amahhovisi akhona emiphakathini yazo ukuze zithole usizo.

Abahlali basemalokishini aseBhekithemba, eThekwini, sebekhala iminyaka eminingana ngokungatholi izincwadi zobunikazi bendlela nokuthola izinsizakalo zikahulumeni ngokusemthethweni. Ngemuva kwehlelo elisha lokukhishwa kwezincwadi zekheli elisemthethweni elethulwe yiMkhandlu weTheku ngoNhlolanja walo nyaka, izicelo ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu zifakiwe emahhovisi aseduze nazo. Iqhaza elibalulekile libanjwe wuMnyango Wezasekhaya, owuthume abasebenzi abaqeqeshiwe emiphakathini ukuze basize abantu abadinga usizo. Ukufakwa kwezicelo kuyenzeka njalo ngoMsombuluko kuya kuLwesihlanu, phakathi kwenthombela neshumi nanye ekuseni naphakathi kwenthombela nane ntambama. Kuyacatshangwa ukuthi leli hlelo lizosiza abantu abaningi ukuthola izimvume zokufinyelela izinzuzo zikahulumeni, kuhlanganise nezibonelelo zezindlu namanzi ahlanzekile. Izakhamuzi ziyacelwa ukuba zilethele amahhovisi amadodakazi wokuzalwa, izithombe ezilandela imigomo, kanye nobuf

Abahlali baseNkandla babekhala isikhathieside ngokungatholi izincwadi zokuzalwa, okwenqabela abantwana ukungena esikoleni kanye nabantu abadala ukuthola izinsizakalo zikaHulumeni. Emhlanganweni owawubanjelwe eSigodlweni iNkatha nyakenye, iSekela likaMeya lathembisa ukuthi kuzothunyelwa izindlela zokusiza emphakathini ngesivinini. UMnyango Wezangaphakathi ululame kamuva, wathuma ithimba labasebenzi abaqeqeshiwe ukuze balekelele izakhamuzi ezingakwazi ukufika emikhakheni kahulumeni. Ngenxa yalesi sinyathelo, abantu abangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili bathole izincwadi zabo phakathi nezinyanga ezintathu. Kumanje, uMkhandlu waseNkandla usebenzisana noMnyango wezeMpilo kanye noMnyango wezeMfundo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izingane ezingenaso isitifiketi sokuzalwa azingawo ngaphandle kwezinsizakalo ezibalulekile. Izikhulumi zikamkhandlu zikhombise ukuthi lolu hlelo luzophinda luqhutshwe nonyaka kamuva ukulekelela izakhamuzi ezisele ngemuva.

Abahlali baseNdwedwe sebegcina isikhathi eside belinda izincwadi zokuzalwa nemvume yokushada, okuyizinto ezibalulekile ekutholeleni izinsizakalo zikahulumeni. Izimbangi zale nkinga zibonwa ekungabini nzimbi kohlelo lwamarekhodi phakathi kweHhovisi Lezindaba Zomphakathi neNkantolo Yezivakashi Zomphakathi. UMnyango Wezokukhiya Izitatimende Zobudlelwane Bomphakathi, osebenza ngaphansi kukaNgqongqoshe Wakhe, usethule uhlelo olusha oluzovumela abahlali ukuthi bafake izicelo zabo ngokusebenzisa amakheli omkhanyeli ngaphandle kokuhamba ibanga elide. Ngokwesimemezelo esikhishwe namuhla, ihovisi elizosebenzela isifunda saseNdwedwe lizovulwa ngomhla weshumi nakweyahlanu kwenyanga ezayo. Lezi zinyathelo zithathwa ngemva kwezincwadi ezingamashumi amabili nane zokhalazo ezafika e-ofisini likaNgqongqoshe phakathi kwamasonto amabili. Umhleli weqembu labahlali, uNkosazane Nokukhanya Dube, uthe abantu bayajabula kodwa basafuna ukuqinis

Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi bakhala ngokungatholi izincwadi zokuzalwa ezilungisiwe emva kwezinyanga eziningi besilinde. Imindeni eminingi isho ukuthi ifilingi izicelo zabo eMnyangweni Wezekhaya, kodwa izimpendulo aziveli. Inhloso enkulu yalezincwadi ukuvula amathuba emfundweni nasemikhakheni yezempilo namanye amasevisi kahulumeni. Ngokusho kwenhloko yoMkhandlu waseThekwini, omunye owethula umbiko kuleli sonto, izinkinga ziqhamuka ekubeni nezinqubo eziphelele ngokuphelela zokufaka izicelo ngendlela efanele. Kulokhu, iSifunda uMgungundlovu sazise ukuthi iziteshi zoMnyango ziyandiswa ukuze kufinyelele abantu abadudu emakhaya. Izisebenzi eziqeqeshiwe zizothunyelwa ezindaweni zasemakhaya njengomzamo wokuqeda ukucwasa kwezidingo zempilo yabantu. Yingakho ikomiti lobuholi lendawo likhuthaza abahlali ukuba bazifake izicelo ngokushesha ukuze izindaba zabo zithathwe njengeziphuthumayo.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebelinde isikhathi eside imibhalo yabo yokufaka izicelo zezindlu zaKwaZulu-Natali Housing Board, kodwa izimpendulo azifiki. Lolu daba luvele ngokucacile emhlanganweni wekomiti lomphakathi owawubanjwe ngesonto elidlule, lapho abantu abaningi bakhala ngokungasebenzi kahle kwezinhlelo zokuxhumana nazo iziphathimandla. Ngokwemibiko enikelwe nguMkhandlu WaseNkandla, izicelo ezedlula ezinkulungwane ezimbili zisalinde ukuhlolwa nguNyuvesi Yezokuhlaliswa Kwabantu. Iziphathimandla zeSifundazwe zizibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi yonke imikhakha kahulumeni isebenzisana ngendlela ethuthukisayo. Wakhuluma umphathi wesifunda, uMnu Sibusiso Mthethwa, ethi izinqubo ezintsha zokukhipha izimvume zizoshesha ngonyaka ozayo. Umphakathi uyacelwa ukuthi uwalethe amakhadi awo ezimvumweni nasezihhovisini zamasipala ukuze kugwenywe ukulibala okudalwa yimibhalo engaphelelanga. Izinhlelo zokuthuthukisa ukuhlaliswa kwabantu zibalulekile

Abahlali baseNkandla babekhala isikhathi eside ngenhlupho yokungatholi izincwadi zobudlelwano bezwe, okuyizinto ezibalulekile ekutholeleni izidingo zikahulumeni. Kulandela imihlangano eyethulwa nguMkhandlu weNkandla nonyaka odlule, uMnyango Wezasekhaya manje usungulile izikhungo zokusiza emphakathini eziqhutshwa njalo ngeSonto esokugcina lenyanga. Okhulumela umkhandlu, uNkk. Nomvula Dlamini, uthe ngaphezu kwabantu abayizinkulungwane ezintathu basale bephila ngaphandle kwezincwadi zobuzozo, ngenxa yezinselelo zobufakazi bokuzalwa noma izinto ezilahlekile. Ukuze kuqedwe inkinga le, kuqashwe izisebenzi ezingeziwe ezizoqeqeshwa ngokufanele ukuze zisize abantu ngendlela efanele. Kucatshangwa ukuthi lo hlelo luzothola imali yesibonelelo evela kukahulumeni wezifundazwe ukuqhuba izinyathelo zokulungisa izinto. Abantu bakhuthazwa ukuba beze nezincwadi zabo ezikhona noma yiziphi, ukuze inqubo iqhubeke ngesivinini esikhulu.

Izakhamuzi zaseMsinga, eMpumalanga KwaZulu-Natali, zikhala ngokuthi izinsiza zikagesi nezamanzi azifiki ngokwanele emiphakathini eyakhiwe kude nezindawo zasedolobheni. Ukuphendula lesi simo, iMkhandlu waseMsinga uhlanganisene noMnyango Wezekhaya kanye noMnyango Wezamanzi Nezahlalo ukuze kucutshungulwe uhlelo olusha lokunikezela ngezinsiza. Kuveze umbiko okhishwe izinyanga ezimbili ezedlule ukuthi amakhaya angaphezu kwayishumi nambili ayizinkulungwane asewele kuluhlu lokusinda ngosizo. Uhlelo lokuqaliswa kwawo luzothatha izinyanga eziyisithupha, kanti imali ebekiwe iyizigidi ezingamashumi amane aberandi. Iziphathimandla zicele ukuthi izakhamuzi ezifuna ukuba kuluhlu lwabahlomulayo zeze ezikhungweni zikahulumeni zezindawo ukuze zigcwalise izifishi ezidingekayo. Omama kanye nabadala ababengaqhathaniseki nalezo zifishi sebenikwa usizo lokuqondiswa ngabasebenzi bekomidi langasendaweni.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebekhala ngokwephulwa kwezithembiso zikahulumeni maqondana nokubuyiselwa kwezincwadi zamazwe ngamazwe ezavalwa ngokomthetho. Ngokusho kwabameli bendawo, abantu abaningi babhekene nobunzima bokukhokha izindleko zesibhedlela ngenxa yokungabi nezincwadi ezibalulekiwe. UMnyango Wezasekhaya uqinisekisile ukuthi izhovisi ezintsha zezinsizakalo zomdabu zizovulwa ngaphakathi kwezinyanga eziyisithupha ezizayo, okuyinto izakhamizi ezithembekile. Umgomo omsha kahulumeni ubeka eqhulwini ukuthi izicelo zeziqu zomdabu nezincwadi zokuzalwa kufanele zisetshenziswe ngesikhathi esifanele, ngaphandle kokwephulwa komthetho. Nangakho, izinkinga zokwenqabela abantu ukukhokha izimali zezicelo zisabangelwa ukungabi nezingxenye ezigcwalisiwe zezifiso. Iziphathimandla zikahulumeni ziyacelwa ukuba zinike abahlali ulwazi olusobala mayelana nezinyathelo ezilandelelwayo uma becela izinsizakalo zikahulumeni, ikakhulukazi emagcekeni asemakh

Abahlali baseNkandla sebeyizwile intokozo emva kwezinyanga eziningi belinde ukutholakala kwamadokhumenti abalulekile eHhovisi Lezindaba Zabantu. Kulandela izimangalo ezafinyelela ezikhulwini zengingqi mayelana nezinkinga zokuphuza kwezicelo, iMeya yakhipha isaziso sokuthi amaSeva Amakhulu azosebenzela emphakathini ngokuthe ngqo, ama-akhawunti amasha omphakathi esethulwa lapho. Izicelo ze-ID, amasetifiketi okuzalwa, kanye namaphepha okushada manje ziyenziwa ngesikhathi esifushane, njengoba kufuneka izinsuku ezingaphezu kweziyishumi nanhlanu kuphela. Ngokwezibalo ezakhishwa nguMasipala, abadlula ezinkulungwaneni ezimbili zabahlali basebenzile kwizinhlelo ezintsha phakathi kwezinyanga ezintathu. Ukuthuthukiswa kwale nkonzo kuholele ekwehlisweni kwezikhalo nezingxabano ngaphansi ngomazisi wezempilo neminye imikhakha kahulumeni. Abaphathi bomnyango baphinde baqinisekisa ukuthi izikhungo zonke ziyohlomulisa abantu ababengakwazi ukuthola usizo olufanele ngaphambilini,

Abahlali baseMzimkhulu sebegcwele amandla okulinda izinsizakalo zikahulumeni ezithe ukufika kodwa njalo zihlala zingafiki. Kulandela umhlangano wamakhansela owawubanjwe ngoNovemba, iMasipala yase-uThukela ike yathembisa ukuthi izinkinga zemijondolo nezingcingo zomsindo ezephukile zizoxazululwa ngaphakathi kwezinyanga ezintathu. Lezi zithembiso, nokho, zisabhekwe ngamehlo anokukhathazeka yizakhamuzi eziningi. Ngokusho kwamaphoyisa okuhlola izinsizakalo, cishe amakhaya angaphezu kwayizinkulungwane ezimbili asanda kungenisiwa ohlwini lwabafanelekayo ukuthola usizo lwezindlu. Umnyango Wezindlu noPhuhliso Lomphakathi uthe lezi zicelo ziyachungechungwa ngendlela efanele, ngokuhambisana nomthetho weSiyinqaba Sezikhalazo Zomphakathi wango-2000. Kuyacaca ukuthi ukukhuluma phakathi kukahulumeni nabantu kumele kugcinwe kuqinile, ukuze imiphumela yokheto lwangonyaka odlule ilandwe ngempela.

Abahlali basemijondolo yaseMlazi babhekene nezinselelo ezinkulu ekutholeni izincwadi zokuzalwa, okuyimfuneko esemqoka ekutholeni izinsizakalo zikahulumeni. Ngokusho kweziphathimandla zikaMasipala weTheku, kuqashelwe ukuthi izidingo zenhlalo yabantu azikwazi ukufezwa ngokuphelele ngaphandle kokuba abantu babe nezinto ezibalulekile zokuzikhombisa. Ihotela lezincwadi zikahulumeni ezikhishwa uMnyango Wezasekhaya lisebenza izinsuku eziyisihlanu ngeviki, kodwa abantu abaningi basola ukuthi izikhathi zokusebenza azinaki izidingo zabasebenzi abahamba amabanga amade. Kuphinde kwabikwa ukuthi imishini yokuthwebula izithombe inqunu izidingo zokuhlolwa kwezimvume zokushayela, okubangela izintambo ezinde nokuphela kwesikhathi. UNgqongqoshe Wezasekhaya ubhekelele lezi zikhalo futhi wethembisa ukuthi abantu bazothola usizo ngendlela efanele ngaphakathi kwamasonto amabili. Ikomidi lokuhlola izinsizakalo lomphakathi lihlele ukuhlangana nomphakathi ngoLwesihlanu ozayo ukuxoxa ngezindaba ezibalulek

Abahlali baseNkandla bexwayiswe isikhathi eside ngokungatholi izincwadi zokuzalwa nezezwe, manje sebekhuluma ngokuqala kwazo izikhalo ezisobala. Kade kulindwa ukuthi iSifunda saseNkandla sivule izahlukaniso zazo ezintsha ezizosiza abantu basemalokishini nabemagqumeni, kepha izinhlelo lezi manje sezikhombisa izithelo zazo. UMnyango Wezasekhaya usefake izisebenzi ezintsha eziyi-fourteen eziqeqeshelwe ukubhekana nezicelo zezincwadi, kuhlanganise nezincwadi zobunikazi bomhlaba nokushintshwa kwamakheli. Kuvele ukuthi ngaphezulu kwamahhashi amashumi amane abantu babelinde iminyaka emibili noma ngaphezulu ukuze baphothule lezi zinqubo. Uhlelo lwe-mobile registration luyaqhubeka luzungeza imizi yasemakhaya, lufika kubantu abangakwazi ukuhamba beya ezikhungweni. Izikhulu zisizile ukuthi onke amaphepha adingekayo azoqedwa ngenyanga ezintathu ezizayo, ngokuhambisana nezinqubomgomo ezintsha zikahulumeni.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebeke bakhala ngokuphela kwezinsuku eziningi belinde izincwadi zobunikazi bomhlaba, into esuselwe ekuphelelweni yizincwadi ezidingekayo. Inhlangano yomphakathi ibike le nkinga kuMasipala waseNkandla, lapho izisebenzi ziphendule ngokuthi kunesidingo sokufaka izicelo ngendlela efanele ngaphambi kokuba amaphepha asetshenziswe. Kuningizimu yedolobha, abaningi bashiye izimfuno zabo ezingapheliswanga ngenxa yokungaqondi izinqubo ezilandelwayo yiHhovisi Lezabelo Lomhlaba. Umnyango WezokuHlelwa KwaMakhaya manje usukumele, uxwayisa abahlali ukuthi kufanele bafike nawo wonke amaphepha afunekayo, kuhlanganise izincwadi zokuzalwa, ubufakazi bokuhlala, kanye nezimali ezikhokhelwe, ngaphambi kokuvula amacala. Izisebenzi zikakhomishana zivakashela izindawo ezikude njalo ngenyanga yokuqinisekisa ukuthi imisebenzi iqhubeka ngendlela efanele futhi njengoba isimomonakalo sakamuva siveze izizathu zokuthi izincwadi eziningi zalahleka noma zonakala.

Abahlali basemalokishini aseMpangeni bashaye ikhwelo lokuba iMkhandlu yaseNkosi baphendule ngesisindiso ngezinkinga zokulethwa kwezinsizakalo, ikakhulukazi ukushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile nezindlela ezingenakuhanjwa ngesikhathi sezimvula. Laba bahlali bathi izicelo abazikhiphile emahhovisi kahulumeni ziye zahlala zingaphendulwa izinyanga eziningana, okwenza abantu bahlale bengazi ukuthi izinkinga zabo ziyaxazululwa yini. UMkhandlu osebenzisa imali yezintela zabantu uhlinzekwe ngezibopho ezisobala zokulungisa ingqalasizinda yemiphakathi. Ngokwemininingwane eyashicilelwa nguMnyango Wezokuhlaliswa Kwabantu, abaphezulu babekelwe isikhathi sokunquma amacebo azobhekana nalezi zingqinamba ngaphambi kokuphela kwenye yonyaka wezimali. Umphakathi ucele ukuba izingxoxo zenziwe ezidalela amathuba awo ukuba uzibandakanye ngeqiniso nokuthi izimvo zawo zilingwe ngaphambi kokuba izinqumo zithathelwe izindawo zabo.

Abahlali bendawo yaseMsinga, esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal, sebekhala isikhathi eside ngokungatholi izincwadi zokuzalwa nezazisi zamazwe, okubavimba ekufinyeleleni izinsiza zikahulumeni. Kulandela imihlangano eningana phakathi kweziphathimandla zasendaweni nezakwa-Home Affairs, kwabikwa ukuthi iziteshi zokusebenzela umphakathi zizosungulwa eMsinga kanye nasezindaweni ezingaphansi kwethi ezikhungathekile. Ngokwenhloko yesifunda, ukukhishwa kwamadokhumenti abalulekile kuzophela izinsuku ezingaphezu kwamashumi amabili nanhlanu. Ikomidi lezasekhaya selibheke ngekhanda lonya lale nkinga, liqinisekisa ukuthi abantu abadala nabakhubazekile nabo bazothola usizo ngaphandle kokudingeka bathuthe kude. Kulo nyaka wezimali, umnyango uhlose ukufika emakhaya angama-4 500 nawo asindwe yinkinga yokuntuleka kwamadokhumenti. Lezi zinyathelo, uma zenziwa ngendlela efanele, zizophula izithiyo ezikhungethe abahluphekayo isikhathi eside ezindaweni zasemakhaya.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebelalele isikhathi eside behlela ukutholakala kwezincwadi zokuzalwa nezamakhaya, okuyimibhalo ebalulekile ngokusemthethweni. Inhlangano yomphakathi ibikhulumela izakhamuzi ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili ezihlala zihlupheka ngenxa yokungabi khona kwezinsiza ezanele emahhovisi kahulumeni. UMnyango Wezasekhaya, ngokusabela kulezi zikhalo, usemise ihlelo elisha lokuthunyelwa kwabasebenzi bezwe bebheke izindawo zasemakhaya ukuze basize ngokukhishwa kwemibhalo. Lezi zinsizakusebenza zizohamba zisondele emphakathini, kuxegiswe isidingo sokuba abantu bahambe ibanga elide bayobheka emadolobheni amakhulu. Kuvunyelwene futhi ukuthi amahhovisi asondele emiphakathini azovulwa izinsuku ezintathu ngeviki ukuze kwehliswe umthwalo wabahlali. Izakhamuzi zicelwa ukuba zilethe izincwadi zakhona, okunjengemibhalo yokuzalwa kanye nezithombe zazo, ukuze inqubo iqhubeke ngaphandle kokubambezeleka.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebelalele isikhathi eside belindele izinsizakalo zikahulumeni, ikakhulukazi amanzi ahlanzekile nezibhedlela ezisebenzayo. Ngemuva kwehlangano yomphakathi eyabanjwa ngesonto elidlule, iMeya yoMkhandlu waseNkandla yazibophezela ekutheni izingqalasizinda ezidingekayo zizokwakhiwa ngaphambi kwekuphelela konyaka wezimali wangalesi sikhathi. Kuvele ukuthi amakhaya angaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili asasebenzisa amanzi omfula ngenxa yokwehluleka kwazo izinhlelo zokusabalalisa amanzi. UMnyango Wezokuhlaliswa Kwabantu Nezindaba Zomphakathi usemisele iqembu lezokuphenya ukuze kucwaningwe ukuthi izimali zehliselwa kuphi. Okunakekisa kakhulu omphakathi ukuthi imibiko eyethulwa emkhandlwini iveza ukuphazamiseka okubhekene nezinkontileka ezazibekwe zisebenze. Lababantu bathemba ukuthi izikhumbuzo zetholakele zizolandela izinyathelo ezibonakalayo, hhayi izithembiso ezingasebenzi kahle.

Abahlali basemalokishini aseMpumalanga babhekene nezinselelo ezinkulu maqondana nokutholakala kwamadokhumenti abalulekile kahulumeni, ikakhulukazi izitifiketi zokuzalwa kanye namakhadi kamazisi. Izakhamuzi eziningi zibika ukuthi zihamba ibanga elide ukuze zifinyelele ezikhungweni zikahulumeni, kodwa zifike zingalengelesi ngoba amahhovisi avulwa ngasikhathi esingenamiso. UMnyango Wezasekhaya usuphendule lezi zikhalazo ngokusho ukuthi uzothuma amathimba aya emiphakathini ukuze ulethe izinsiza ebantwini ngqo ezindlini zabo. Lolu hlelo luzosebenza kusukela ekupheleni kwaleli nyanga, lwehla kuyo yonke imikhakha kaMasipala. Umphakathi ukhuthazwa ukuthi uthole ulwazi oluthe thuthu ngokuxhumana namaKhansela ngokuqondile noma ngokusebenzisa izinombolo zocingo ezinikezwe yiMunicipal Communications Office. Lesi sinqumo silandela umbiko owakhishwa nguNgqongqoshe ngoLwesibili edlule, lapho abikelwa khona ukuthi ingxenye enkulu yabantu basemazweni asemakhaya ayakakabi namakhadi kamazisi asebenza.

Abahlali basemalokishini aseMsinga, esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal, babhekene nezinkinga ezinzima zokungatholi izincwadi zokuzalwa, okugcina abantwana bengakwazi ukubhalisa ezikoleni. Umkhandlu wasendaweni uxwayise ukuthi lesi simo sibangelwa ukungabikhona kwezisebenzi ezikhethekile emahhovisi eHomeAffairs, ngenxa yokusweleka kwezimali zokuqasha. Izisebenzi zikazwelonke sezingenelele, futhi kuklanywe uhlelo lwezikhungo ezihamba-hambayo ukuze zifinyelele imiphakathi ekude. Ngokusho kukaMnyango Wezakhamuzi, amahhovisi anjalo azovula izinsuku eziyishumi nambili ngenyanga, kuqalwa ngoJanuwari wonyaka ozayo. Abahlali banxuswa ukuba balethe izitifiketi zezibhedlela, imibhalo yomphakathi, kanye nezincwadi zobunikazi komhlaba ukuze inqubo iqhubeke ngesivinini. Umphakathi ukhuthazwa ukuhlela izigcawu zokwazisa ukuze wonke umuntu aqonde amalungelo akhe ngokugcwele.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebekhala isikhathi eside ngokungatholi izincwadi zobudlelwano bezomhlaba, okuyinto ebalulekile ekutholeni izinsiza zikaHulumeni. Lolu daba luvele ngesikhathi umkhandlu wendawo ubambe imihlangano emibili yokuhlangabezana nezidingo zomphakathi ngaphambili kwalonyaka. Kuxelwe ukuthi abantu abangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu abakakwazi ukufinyelela izinsiza zezempilo kanye nezinhlelo zokulima ngenxa yokuntuleka kwamaphepha adingekayo. INduna yaseNkandla, uMnumzane Sibonelo Dlamini, ithe isimo siphuthumile futhi kudingeka ukuthi iSifunda SaseZululand sisukume ngokushesha. UMnyango Wezokuhlaliswa Kwabantu useqalile ukubheka ukuthi uluphethe kanjani lolu daba, kanti abasebenzi bezobulungiswa nomthetho bayathunywa ukuya emizini yabantu ngokulandela izimfuno zohlelo lweNational Land Tenure Programme. Umphakathi ucelwa ukuthi uziphathele amaphepha amdala emizila yemindeni ukuze inqubo iqhubeke ngokushesha.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebekhala isikhathi eside bekhononda ngokungasheshi kwenkonzo yokukhishwa kwamadokumenti asemthethweni, ikakhulukazi izincwadi zokuzalwa kanye nezincwadi zezikhungo zemfundo. Ihhovisi likamasipala livalwe kaningi ngezizathu ezingachazwanga kahle, lokhu okushiye izakhamuzi eziningi zigqunywe ubumnyama. Ngokomgomo kahulumeni, wonke umuntu unelungelo lokuthola lezi zinsizakalo ngaphakathi kwesikhathi esimisiwe sezinsuku ezingamashumi amathathu. Kuchazwe yiNhloko yoMnyango WezaseKhaya eSifundazweni, ukuthi izinhlelo ezintsha zokufakela amahhovisi izimbuzi zedijithali zizoqala ukusebenza ngenyanga ezayo, nokho abahlali bafuna izipho ezibonwa ngamehlo hhayi izethembiso nje kuphela. Izinhlangano ezimele umphakathi sezibhalele iSigungu SeziNdaba ZoMphakathi zicela ukuthi kuqinisekiswe ukuqapha okuthe chatha kwazo zonke izinsizakalo zikahulumeni okuqondene nazo lezi zindawo zasemakhaya.

Abahlali baseNkandla sebekhuluma nzima ngokubhekene nokukhuphuka kwezidingo zempilo endaweni yabo, ikakhulukazi ngokuphathelene nezinsizakalo zikahulumeni ezingafiki ngendlela efanele. Izibhedlela ezisondele kakhulu zisabonakala zinezinkinga ezinkulu, kubalwa ukushoda kwemithi kanye nabasebenzi bezempilo abanele. UMnyango WezeMpilo weKwaZulu-Natal ubhekene nomthwalo wokuhlinzeka abantu ngezinsizakalo ezifanele ngaphansi kwesabelomali esikhawuliwe. Iziphathimandla zesilokishi zikhulumile ehlangene lababuthene endaweni yaseSiyabuswa, zikhuthaza izakhamuzi ukuba zifake izicelo ngemfanelo ngamasu okunikezwa kwezinsizakalo. Amaphepha adingekayo agoqa izincwadi zokuzalwa, izincwadi zobunikazi bezakhiwo, kanye nezitifiketi zokwamukeleka kwemfundo. Ukuthola ulwazi oluthe vetshe, abantu bayacelwa ukuba baxhumane neHhovisi Lendawo kaHulumeni waseMbizo ngamasonto wonke phakathi nokusebenza kwehhovisi.

Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi babelinde isikhathi eside ukuthola usizo lwezempilo olufanele, kepha izinto seziqale ukushintsha ngokushesha. Ngesonto elidlule, uMkhandlu waseThekwini, ngokubambisana noMnyango wezeMpilo wesifundazwe saKwaZulu-Natal, wethula uhlelo olusha lokugoma nokuhlinzeka ngezidingo zezempilo emphakathini. Kulo hlelo, abasebenzi bezempilo bahamba emizini ngamunye ukuze bahlole izingane ezincane, abantu abadala, kanye nabantu abaphila nezimo ezithile zempilo. Banikeza nemithi yamahhala kulabo abangenayo imali yokuyithola ezitolo zezokwelapha. Ingxenye ebalulekile yalolu hlelo ukufundisa abantu ngendlela yokugwema izifo ezinjengesifo sofuba nezifo ezandukufa. Umphakathi usukhombise ukujabula okukhulu ngalemizamo, nabaningi bexoxa ngokubaluleka kokuphila impilo enempilo. UMnyango wezeMpilo uqinisekise ukuthi lolu hlelo luzoqhubeka izinyanga eziyisithupha, lufinyelele yonke imiphakathi esengozini enkulu.

Izakhamuzi zaseMlazi zibeke phambili izinkinga ezihlobene nempilo, ikakhulukazi ukungatholi ngokushesha usizo lwezokwelapha ezikhungweni zikahulumeni. Emasontweni ambalwa adlule, abasebenzi bezempilo bohulumeni benyathela izigodi ezihlukene, beqhuba umkhankaso wokugoma kanye nokusabalalisa ulwazi ngezisifo ezithakaselana nengculaza kanye nezifo zomphimbo. Ngokwemibiko echazwe yiNhloko yeSifunda Sezempilo, abantu abangaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyisithupha bazuze kulolu hlelo nje kuphela ngezinsuku eziyisikhombisa. Umphakathi wamukelile lo mkhankaso ngezandla ezimhlophe, njengoba abanye babe bekhala ngokushoda kwamasilikali ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Kucacile ukuthi ukusondeza izinsizakalo zezempilo emiphakathini ukwenza umehluko omkhulu ekuphileni kwabantu. UMnyango Wezempilo uqhubeka uhlose ukukhulisa inani lamaklininiki ahambayo ezifundazweni ezisemakhaya, ngenjongo yokwenza izinsizakalo zibe nokuthembeka nokufinyeleka kubo bonke abantu, noma baphi lapho behlala khona.

Izikhungo zezempilo zomphakathi ezisakazekile ezifundeni zasemakhaya zibike ukwanda kokusetshenziswa kwezinsiza zezempilo ngemuva kwezinhlelo zokuqwashisa ezaqhutshwa ngenyanga edlule. Abahlengikazi nabosizo lwezempilo bahambe izindawo ezikude, bekhuthaza abantu ukuba beze emitholampilo ngaphambi kokugula kakhulu, hhayi ngemuva nje. Umphakathi waseMsinga, okwakuphila ngezinkinga zokwelulekwa ngezempilo iminyaka eminingana, manje uyabika umehluko omkhulu empilweni yawo. Ngaphezu kwamakhaya ayizinkulungwane ezintathu athola amakhadinali ezempilo emasontweni amabili edlule nje kuphela, kuvela emibikweni kahulumeni. Izinhlelo ezifana nezinkulumo zokucwaninga umfutho wegazi nezinye izifo ezingenalapheko ziwusizo omkhulu emphakathini. UMnyango Wezempilo uqhubeka nokuhlinzeka ngemishanguzo yamahhala ezikhungweni ezingaphansi koMkhandlu, uhlose ukufika kuwo wonke umuntu, nangane nabahlala emaphandleni. Ukuxhumana phakathi kukahulumeni kanye nomphakathi kubalulekile

Izakhamuzi zaseMpangeni zibike ukuthokoza okukhulu ngemuva kokufika kwezinsizakusebenza zezempilo entsha emiphakathini eyayihlushwa ukushoda kwezinsiza ezinqala. Ucwaningo olukhiqizwa yiNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal luveze ukuthi ngaphezu kwamakhaya ayizinkulungwane ezintathu kulesi sifunda asewuthola usizo lwezempilo ngendlela eqondile, ngaphandle kwesidingo sokuhamba izintanga ezinde. Inkinga yokuntuleka kwabantu besifazane abakhulekile ukusebenza ezindaweni zasemakhaya ibikhungethe lolu hlelo iminyaka eminingi, kodwa izinhlelo zentuthuko yezempilo zamandla omphakathi zisiza ukushughulikana nalezi zingqinamba. Umkhandlu wezifunda ube useqhamuka nezinhlelo zokuqeqesha abasebenzi bezempilo basekhaya, okwenza ukuthi inani labantu abanakwa likhule ngesivinini esibonakalayo. UNgqongqoshe Wezempilo waZulu-Natal ugcizelele ukuthi ukufakela izakhamuzi amandla zokuzilwela kwezempilo kusemqoka kuzo zonke izinhlelo zikahulumeni. Lolu phelo lokuqapha nokunikeza imishanguzo yokuqedela i

Abahlali baseNkandla sebekhala isikhathi eside ngokungabi khona kwezidingo zezempilo eziyisisekelo emiphakathini yasemakhaya. Ekupheleni kwenyanga edlule, uMnyango wezeMpilo weKwaZulu-Natal wethule uhlelo olusha lokuthuthukisa izinsizakusebenza ezibhedlela amabili asendawo, kanye nokwandisa inani labasebenzi bezempilo abaqeqeshiwe. Ngokwezibalo ezinikezwe yikomiti lezempilo lesifundazwe, abantu abangaphezu kuka-12 000 bangena emihlangweni yezempilo yomphakathi okwedlule izinyanga eziyisithupha. Izinhlelo zokugomela izingane kanye nokuhlolwa kwesifo sofuba nezingculazi zisabalale kulo lonke ulimi lweNkandla, nalapho abantu bekhuthazwa ukuthi beze bahlolwe mahhala. Onompilo bomphakathi badlala indima enkulu ekuxhumaneni nabantu emigwaqeni nasemizini, njengoba bengasalindeli ukuthi abantu bafike izindawo zezempilo. UNgqongqoshe wezeMpilo weKwaZulu-Natal ugcizelele ukuthi ukufinyelela kwezempilo ngokufanele kuyilungelo labantu bonke, hhayi inzuzo eyenzelwa

Izakhamuzi zaseMsinga, eMpumalanga Ningizimu yeKwaZulu-Natal, ziye zaxoxa ngezinselelo ezikhulu eziphathelene nokuthola usizo lwezempilo oluphuthumayo. Abantu abaningi baphila kude nezibhedlela nezinhlelo zemfundo yezempilo, okwenza kube nzima ukuqwashisa umphakathi ngezingozi zezigulo ezinjenge-tuberculosis noGcikwane. Izinhlangano zezempilo ezisebenzisana noHulumeni weZifundazwe ziqalile ukwenza izinhlelo zokuvakashela imiphakathi ukuze kunikezwe ulwazi ngokugcinwa kwempilo enhle, ukuhlolwa kwegazi, kanye nezibonelelo zokugoma izingane. Ucwaningo olwenziwe ngo-2023 luveza ukuthi amaphesenti angamashumi amathathu namathathu abantu baseMsinga awakaze bahlolelwe isifo sengculazi noma ingculazi. Iziphathimandla zezempilo zeqembu lengqondo yomphakathi zikhuthaza amalungu omphakathi ukuba azibike ezikhungweni zezempilo ngaphandle kokufihlela, ziqinisekisa ukuthi yonke imininingwane yabantu izogcinwa ngokwemfihlo ngokuphelele. Ukuhlanganyela komphak

Abahlali basemalokishini aseMlazi sebexoxe iminyaka eminingi ngokuntuleka kwezidingongqangi zezempilo eziseduze nabo. Ngesonto elidlule, uMnyango Wezempilo waseKwaZulu-Natal wamemezela ukuthi izinhlelo zokuvakasha kwezindawo zokuhlala zizoqala ngokushesha, zifinyelele izindawo ezikude nazo zonke izinhlobo zemithi yamahhala kanye nolwazi lwezifo ezithakaselayo. Kuhloswe ukuthi amakhaya angaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu azuze kulolu hlelo phakathi kwezinyanga ezintathu ezizayo. Ukuqashelwa kwesifo sohudo, ingculazi, kanye nesifo sofuba kuyingxenye enkulu yalolu hlelo lokuphila. Abasebenzi bezempilo basekhaya — abaziwa ngokuthi amaCHW — bazobe bengamasosha angaphambili kulomsebenzi wokufinyelela imiphakathi. Kulindeleke ukuthi izinhlelo zokugoma izingane zizonyatheliswa phambili ngesikhathi esifanayo. UDokotela Nomvula Hadebe, oyisikhulumi salolu hlelo, wathi ukuhlanganiswa komphakathi kubalulekile ukuze lezi zinhlelo ziphumelele ngempela.

Abahlali basemalokishini aseduze nedolobha laseNewcastle babeke ngqo inkinga yokusweleka kwezinsiza zezempilo eziseduze nabo, njengoba amakilinike amaningi evaliwe noma esebenza ngezinsuku ezimbalwa kuphela ngeviki. Emhlanganweni wemphakath owawubanjelwe kuhhovisi leSilo seNduna uNyanga odlule, izakhamuzi ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu zibike ukuthi zihanjelwa ukuya ezibhedlela ezikude ukuze zithole usizo lokuqala lezempilo. UMnyango Wezempilo WeKwaZulu-Natal uvumile ukuthi isimo singenzima, futhi washaya isiqiniselo sokuthi izinhlelo zokuxhasa amakilinike lawo zizoqala ekupheleni kwekota yokuqala yonyaka wezimali. Izisebenzi zezempilo zasendaweni ziqhubeka nokuhambela imizi ukuze zahlukane nemigomo yokugoma, ukwelulekwa ngezindlela zokuhlanzeka, kanye nokuhlola isifo sikanotshezi. Nakuba izinhlelo zePrimary Health Care zikhona emthethweni, ukuphilisana kwazo emphakathini kuncike kakhulu ekusekelweni okwanele kukahulumeni weNdawo kanye nakwimali eyanele evela ezing

Emizini yasemakhaya yasesifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal, abahlali abaningi besabeka ukungatholi izinsiza zezempilo ezanele, ikakhulukazi labo abahlala kude nezindawo zamaHospitali. Ngenxa yalesi simo, uMnyango Wezempilo wesifundazwe usethulile uhlelo olutsha lokuhambisa izinsiza zezempilo ngqo emiphakathini eyahlukene. Izimoto zezempilo eziphathwe abasebenzi abeqeqeshiwe zizohambela izindlu ngezindlu, zinikeza ukuhlolwa kwengcindezi yegazi, izivivinyo zokuthola isifo soshukela, kanye nemithi yamahhala kulabo abayidingayo. Uhlelo luzohlanganisa futhi nemininingwane mayelana nokuqwashisa ngesifo sofuba kanye neHIV/AIDS. Izinhlangano zomphakathi zikhuthazwe ukuba zisebenzisane noMnyango ukuze uhlelo lufinyelele abantu abaningi. Kulinganiswa ukuthi abantu abangaphezulu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu bazofayela kulolu hlelo esikhathini sezinyanga eziyisithupha ezizayo, nokuyinto ekhuthazayo kakhulu kulabo abasebenzela impilo yomphakathi.

Izakhamuzi zaseNkandla zibe nenhlanhla enkulu ngemuva kokuba iHhovisi leSifunda lisingathe umkhankaso wezempilo owawuhlose ukufundisa umphakathi ngezindlela zokuqeda ukubhebhetheka kwezifo ezifana nesifo sengculaza nesifo sofuba. Lo mkhankaso, owaqhutshwa izinyanga ezimbili ezedlule, wafinyelela ezindlini ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili, lapho abasebenzi bezempilo baxoxisana nabantu ngokubaluleka kokuhlolwa nokusetshenziswa kwemithi ngendlela efanele. Kwahanjwa nezigwegwe nasemakhaya asemaphandleni ukuze kugcinwe ukuthi akekho ohlala ngaphandle kwolwazi olubalulekile. Kwaphinde kwakhulunywa ngokubaluleka kokugeza izandla, ukudla ukudla okwempilo, kanye nokuvakashela iziteshi zasezempilo ngokuqondile noma ngaphandle kwesifo esobonakala. ISikhungo Sezempilo Esisezweni seseqhuba izinhlelo ezifanayo kuzifunda ezinye, ngethemba lokwehlisa inani labantu abagulayo kanye nokuthuthukisa impilo yomphakathi wonke ngobubanzi.

Izakhamizi zezindawo zasemakhaya eNkandla zibe ngezokuqala ukwamukela inhlelo entsha yokugcinwa kwempilo yabantu, okuhlanganisa izinyanga zezilimo ezimbili zokuhlolwa kwesifo sikashukela kanye nengcindezi yegazi. Lolu hlelo lwahlongozwa yiNhlangano Yezempilo YaseNingizimu Afrika ngemva kocwaningo olwembula ukuthi amaphesenti angamashumi amane nesikhombisa (47%) yabahlali abadala kulezi zindawo awakaze ahlolwe isifo sikashukela ngaphambilini. Ekhuluma emitathanweni yomphakathi edlule, uNgqongqoshe Wezempilo Wephrovinsi ushaye indiva ukuthi inhlalakahle yabantu isho ukwenza isinyathelo ngaphambi kokuba isifo siphumelele. Osomba abangaphezulu kwababili ayisishiyagalombili bavakashela amakhaya ngalinye, benikeza imiyalelo mayelana nokudla okwempilo kanye nohlelo lokuzilolonga. Abahlali baseNkandla baveze injabulo enkulu ngale nkonzo, bebonga nezinhlaka zikahulumeni ngokuqinisekisa ukuthi izidingongqangi zezempilo ziyafika nakwezindawo ezikude nazo zonke izinsiza.

Izakhamuzi zaseMsinga, eNyakatho neKwaZulu-Natali, zibonise ukufisa okukhulu ukutholakala kwezinsiza zezempilo eziseduze nasekhaya. Izibhedlela nezikole zezempilo eziningi zisadonswa nzima, zihlinzeka izigodi ezikhona ngaphandle kwezidingo eziyisisekelo. Ngesizathu salokhu, uMnyango wezeMpilo weSifundazwe uqhamuke nohlelo olusha lokuqinisa izinsiza zezempilo emakhaya, okuhlanganisa ukuthumela izinhlelo zezokwelashwa ngezimoto ezihambe izigodi ngezigodi. Lolu hlelo luzosiza izalukazi, izingane, nabantu abakhubazekile abangakwazi ukuhamba ibanga elide ukuya ezibhedlela. Isikhulumi soMnyango uNkk Nokukhanya Dlamini sincome ukuthi: abantu abaningi bazobona umehluko omkhulu impilo yabo ngalolu hlelo. Iziphathimandla zasendaweni zibizwe ukuba zihlanganyele ekusebenzisaneni, zinikeze ulwazi ngezinsiza ezikhona endaweni ngayinye. UMnyango ufisa ukuthi ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali, izigodi ezingamashumi amathathu nane zithinteke kulolu

Ngaphezulu kwabantu abayi-5 000 abahlala ezindaweni zasemakhaya zesifundazwe saKwaZulu-Natal sebevakashelwe yizinhlelo zempilo zawo wonke umuntu ngesikhathi onyakeni wezi-2024. Lezi zinhlelo, eziqhutshwa ngokubambisana phakathi kukahulumeni wezifundazwe nezinhlangano zomphakathi, zihlose ukuqeda izigqinamba ezifana nokulwa negciwane lengculazi, isifo sofuba, kanye nokuqinisekisa ukuthi abantwana bayagonywa. Izakhamuzi eziningi ezazihlala kude nezibhedlela manje sezithola usizo lwezempilo oluziswe emasangweni azo. Uhlelo lwe-Ithimba Lezempilo Lomphakathi, olwethulwa nguMnyango Wezempilo, lusebenza nsuku zonke ezifundeni ezinezidingo eziphuthumayo. Ogogo nezkhokho babike ukujabula okukhulu ngoba izingane zamakhaya azo manje sezifumana imishini yokuhlola igazi kanye nemithi yamahhala. Othisha bezikoleni nabanye abasebenzi bomphakathi nabo bafundiswe indlela yokubona izimpawu zezifo zokuhlasela nokusiza abantu ngokushesha. UMnyango Wezempilo uwukhum

Abahlali bendawo yaseMlazi base bekhala isikhathi eside ngokungatholi usizo lwezempilo olwanele eduze kwabo, kepha manje isimo siyashintsha. Izinsuku ezimbalwa ezidlule, uMkhandlu wezeMpilo waseThekwini wamemezela ukuqalwa kohlelo olusha lwamakilininikhi ahamba emizini, oluzofinyelela imindeni engenakuya ezibhedlela ngenxa yobukhashana noma ubuphofu. Ngokwemibiko yale nhlangano, abantu abangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezine kule ndawo abanalo uxhaso olwanele lwezempilo, ikakhulukazi abantu abadala nabantwana abancane. Izisebenzi zezempilo zizoqeqeshwa ukuhlola izifo ezinjengethubhekhulose, isifo sikashukela, kanye nengcindezi yegazi. Unobhala weNhlangano Yomphakathi waseMLazi, uNkz. Nokuthula Dlamini, uthe lolu hlelo luyisinyathelo esibalulekile ekusizeni umphakathi. Uhulumeni wesifundazwe uqinisekise ukuthi imali eyahlukaniselwe lolu hlelo izosiza ukuba izinsizakalo zifike kuwo wonke umuntu, kungakhathalekile ukuthi uhlala kuphi noma

Abahlali bendawo yaseMsinga, esifundeni saKwaZulu-Natal, sebeyibonile ngokwabo inzuzo yohlelo lwezikhungo zezempilo ezihamba phakathi kwemizi. Ngonyaka odlule, abantu abangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili bathola ukuhlolwa kwesifo sofuba kanye nezinye izifo ezithakaselana ne-HIV, konke lokhu kungenzi imali. Uhlelo lwabantu abakholelwa ekwelashweni kwendabuko nabo seluqukethe izinhlangano zezempilo zikahulumeni, okwenza ukuthi umyalezo wezempilo ufinyelele nasemakhaya angakwazi ukufika ezibhedlela. INhlangano Yezempilo YaseNingizimu Afrika ibike ukuthi ukwanda kwalolu hlelo kuholele ekuncipheni kweziguli eziphuthelwa ukwelashwa ngesikhathi esifanele. Izindleko zezimpahla zemishini yokuhlola sezehliselwe phansi ngosizo lwamazwe aphesheya, okunikeza ithuba abasebenzi bezempilo basebenze ngokushesha nakwezinye izigodi. Umkhandlu wendawo uqinisekisile ukuthi izinhlelo ezifana nalezi zizoqhubeka nonyaka ozayo, enenhloso yokufika emakhaya angagcini ngaphandle kwezinsizak

Izakhamuzi zaseMlazi zibonge kakhulu uhlelo lwezikhungo zempilo lokuhlola izinga lezakhi zegazi kanye nokugoma abantwana abaneminyaka engaphansi kwesihlanu. Lolu hlelo, olwaqalwa ngosuku lokuqala kukaNhlolanja walonyaka, luzuzise imindeni engaphezu kuka-4 500 eseduze nalapho ihlala khona. Ukungena kwabantu kwakulula, njengoba izinhlelo zempilo zazisondezwa emakhaya nakwizinkantolo zemiphakathi. Unkosikazi uNomsa Dlamini, ongomunye wabazali abahlanganyele kulolu hlelo, ushilo ukuthi ingane yakhe emdala ibonakalise izimpawu zokwelulama ngemva kokuxilongwa ngesikhathi esifanele. UMnyango Wezempilo KwaZulu-Natal uxwayise umphakathi ukuba unqande ukusabalalisa izifo ngokuhlanza izandla ngamanzi nasentepe kanye nokugoma ngokwesibopho. Izikhungo zempilo zihlela ukwandisa uhlelo lwamaviki amathathu ukuze lufinyelele futhi emiphakathini asebekhathazeka ngayo.

Abahlali basemalokishini aseMlaza, eThekwini, sebengabambeki ngenxa yokungafikeleleki kwezinsizakalo ezisezingeni lezempilo. Inhlangano yezempilo yendawo ibike ukuthi abantu abaningi baphuthelwa ukuxhashazwa kwezinsizakalo zamahhala zokuvikela isifo sengculazi nesifo sofuba ngenxa yobukhule bezindawo kanye nokuntuleka kwezithuthi. Ngesizathu salokhu, uMnyango Wezempilo waKwaZulu-Natal usungule umkhankaso omkhulu wokunakekela impilo emphakathini, ohlanganisa izitolo ezishukumayo eziholela izisebenzi zezempilo endlini ngendlu. Lo mkhankaso, oqale ngenyanga edlule, useke wafika ezikhungweni ezingaphezu kwamashumi amane nesikhombisa, ulethe izindaba ezikhuthazayo. Ngokusho kukaMnu. Sibusiso Mthembu, oyikhansela lalapho, abahlali babelindele isikhathi eside izinsizakalo ezinjengalezi, futhi ukuphendula kukahulumeni kubukeka kukhuthaza abantu ukuba babambe iqhaza ngokuphelele empilweni yabo nasemiphakathini yabo.

Emalokishini aseMpumalanga, izakhamuzi ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu zifumene ukwelashwa kwamahhala ngesikhathi umkankaso wezempilo womphakathi ubanjwa ngesonto eledlule. Lo mkankaso, ohlelwe ngokubambisana phakathi kukahulumeni wendawo nezinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni, ubheke ikakhulukazi iziguli ezinhlupheka ngesifo sikashukela nengcindezi yegazi eliphezulu. Izisebenzi zezempilo zazivakashela izindlu ngezindlu, zinikeza abantu amathuba okwenziwa izivivinyo nezinhlelo zokugcinwa kwezempilo. UNkz. Thandi Dlamini, omunye wabayalelwa ukuthi abone udokotela ngokushesha, uthe lo mkankaso ulethe ithemba emuva kweminyaka yokungabi nakhono lokuthola usizo olufanele. Ngokuya ngemibiko yemvelo yezempilo, izigodi eziningi zasemakhaya zisajwayele ukushoda kwezidingo eziyisisekelo, kuhlanganise nemithi nozakwethu bezempilo abanele. UMnyango Wezempilo uqinisekisile ukuthi lo mkhankaso uzowenziwa njalo njalo ezifundazweni ezinhlanu ngesikhathi esizayo.

Abahlali basemalokishini aseMpumalanga beshaye ihlombe ngokwethulwa kohlelo olusha lwezempilo oluzokwenza izidingo zezempilo zitholakale lula kubantu abakumazinga aphansi kwempilo. Kuleli hlelo, abasebenzi bezempilo bazohambela izindlu ngezindlu ukuze bahlole impilo yabantu, babe bengabanika nemikhusho yamahhala kanye nolwazi olubalulekile mayelana nezinkinga ezifana nesandulela-ngculazi, isifo sofuba, kanye nezibalo zomfutho wegazi. Yize amakilininiki amaningi esavalwe ngamanzi nangezidingo eziyisisekelo, uMnyango Wezempilo uqinisekise ukuthi izimoto zokuhambisa izidingo zezempilo zizokwandiswa kulo lonke leli zwe. Ogogo nezalukazi basebekhulume ngenjabulo yabaseNdwedwe, besho ukuthi isimo esasikhathaza imiphakathi eminyakeni emide manje siyashintsha. Nakuba kusekhona izinselelo ezibalulekiwe, kuhlanganiswe nezinto ezifana nokuntuleka kwabasebenzi bezempilo basekhaya kanye nokukhalipha komgwaqo, kodwa umsebenzi uqhubeka ngamandla.
