Abahlali bendawo yaseMpangeni babelindile izinyanga eziningi ukuthi izinsizakusebenza zezempilo zithuthukiswe endaweni yabo. Ekupheleni kukaNhlolanja walo nyaka, uMkhandlu waseNkandla, ngokubambisana noMnyango Wezempilo wesifundazwe, wethula uhlelo olusha lokugoma abantwana abancane nabesifazane abakhulelwe. Lolu hlelo luqondiswe ikakhulukazi emagcekeni lapho ukufinyelela izibhedlela kuyinkinga enkulu ngenxa yemigwaqo emimbi. Abezempilo besifundazwe babevakashele izindlu ngezindlu, benika amakhambi egciwane kanye neziqondiso zempilo enhle. Isikhulumi soMnyango, uNkk. Thandi Mthembu, sabalula ukuthi abantu abangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezimbili basizwa ngaphakathi kwezinsuku eziyishumi kuphela. Iziphathimandla zikugcizelela ukuthi uhlelo luzothuthukiswa lufike nasezindaweni ezisemakhaya ukuze akekho umuntu ashiywe muva empini yokulwa nezifo.

Izakhamuzi zaseSisonke zibike ukuthi imizamo kahulumeni yokulwa nezifo ezithathelanayo isiqala ukubonakala imiphumela emihle emiphakathini yasemakhaya. Izinhlelo zokugoma, ikakhulukazi ezihlosiwe zokuvikela izingane nezalukazi, sezifinyelele izindawo ezikude nezona ezazisolwa ngokungafinyeleli izinsizakusebenza zezempilo. Kulo nyaka kuphela, izibhedlela zasezifundazweni zikhulume ngokukhuliswa kwamaKhiliniki Andulela Ukugula, lapho abantu bezofundiswa khona ngendlela yokulondoloza impilo yabo ngaphandle kokungenela izibhedlela. Njengoba amanani abantu abahlaselwa yisifo sofuba nesifo somswane esehle kancane kancane, izogogo nezomphakathi sezihlanganyela kalula nezisebenzi zezempilo emicimbini yokufundisa. Ucwaningo lweNhlangano Yezempilo kaNdunankulu luveza ukuthi ukufinyelela kwezinsizakusebenza kwenyuke ngamaphesenti angamashumi amane nesikhombisa ezindaweni ezisenhla nesenyakatho. Lokhu kukhombisa ukuthi ukubambisana kukahulumeni nomphakathi kusebenza kahle uma kuqondiswa ngoba nang

Izakhamizi zaseMpangeni zibeke phambili ukukhathazeka okukhulu mayelana nezinsiza zezempilo ezifunyenwa emiphakathini yabo, ikakhulukazi phakathi kweziguli ezindala nezingane ezincane. Kuleli sonto, iSikhungo Sezempilo SaseMpangeni sibike ukuthi izinhlelo zokulwa nesifo sofuba kanye nokugoma izingane ziyasebenza ngempumelelo, nalapho amaphesenti angamashumi ayisishiyagalombili nezingane ezineminyaka emibili nezansi sezigonyiwe. Abasebenzi bezempilo basebenzile ngokuzikhandla ukufika ezindlini zasemakhaya, bexwayisa abantu ngezindlela zokunqanda ukusabalala kwezimabi. Umkhandlu weDolobha wazibophezela ekusimamiseni imali egcinwe ngokukhethekile ukuze kuxhashazwe izinsiza ezidinwayo ezikhathini ezilandelayo. Imilapo yomphakathi iqhuba umsebenzi obalulekile ngokukhuthaza ukuhlolwa kwezempilo njalo ngezinyanga ezintathu. Kuyethembisa ukuthi abantu abaningi bayaqonda manje ukubaluleka kokuhlelwa kwemindeni kanye nokugcina impilo yomphakathi wonke isezingeni eliphezulu.

Izakhamuzi zaseMlazi zithe zaba nenjabulo enkulu ngemva kokwethulwa kohlelo olutsha lwezempilo emphakathini, oluhlose ukwenza izidingo zezempilo zifikeleke kalula ebantwini abahlala kude nezibhedlela. Uhlelo lwamukelwe ngezandla ezimbalwa nguMkhandlu woMasipala waKwaZulu-Natali, njengoba luzokwethula amakliniki ahambayo ayovakashela izindawo ezahlukene njalo ngesonto. Izakhamuzi ezikhulile kanye nezingane ezineminyaka engu-5 nangezansi ziyobe zingabakho abazohlomula kakhulu kulo hlelo. Ngokusho kwezazi zezempilo, ukufikeleleka kwezifo ezisabalele njengengculaza negciwane lenhlangothi kwabantu abahlala ezindaweni zasemakhaya kuseyinkinga enkulu. Kulo mbuthano wabantu owawuseNtuzuma ngesonto eledlule, ugcinapilo uDkt. Nomvula Dlamini waveza ukuthi amakliniki la azovulela futhi amathuba wokufundiswa ngesimilo esipholile. Izindaba ezinhle yilokhu ukuthi izinsizakusebenza zonke zizobhekwa nguHulumeni weZifunda, ngakho-ke akukho malini ezohanjiswa yizak

Abahlali basemalokishini aseMpumalanga bamamukele ngezandla ezimhlophe umkhankaso wezempilo owethulwe yiNhlangano Yezempilo YeSifunda ngenyanga edlule. Lo mkhankaso ubheke ikakhulukazi ukugomela izingane ezincane kanye nabantu abadala abaphila nezimo ezifana nesifuba noshukela. Izinhlelo zokuhlolelwa kwezempilo zasenziwa mahhala emiphakathini eyisithupha, lapho izinkulungwane zabantu zifike ukuzithola zilungile noma zithole usizo olunesisindo. "Besifuna ukuthi wonke umuntu azizwe emukelekile ezindaweni zezempilo — kungabi yikwesaba kuphela okumvimba umuntu ukuya esibhedlela," kusho uMphathisikhungo Wezempilo Wesifunda, uDkt. Nomsa Dlamini. Kuyethusayo ukuthi abanye abantu basemakhaya basanda kuhamba ibanga elingaphezu kwamakhilomitha angama-20 befuna ukunakekelwa ngokugcwele kwezempilo. Uhulumeni ube esethembisa ukwandisa iziteshi zezempilo kanye nokuthuthukisa izinsiza zezimoto zezokusiza ekupheleni konyaka wezimali wezi-2025.

Izakhamuzi zaseMlaza ziqale ukujabula ngemva kokwethulwa kohlelo olusha lwezempilo emphakathini wazo ekuqaleni kwenyanga eyedlule. Lolu hlelo, olwethulwe ngabezempilo bendawo, luhlose ukulekelela abantu abaningi abangafinyeleli kalula ezikhungweni zezempilo ngenxa yobukhude bendawo. Kuyavuyisa ukubona ukuthi izinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni nazo zihlanganyele kulolu lelo ngokusebenzisana nababopha imiphakathi nje kanye nabasizi bezempilo. Phakathi kwezinsiza ezinikezwayo kukhona ukuhlolwa kwengcindezi yegazi, ukuqwashiswa ngesifo sikashukela, kanye nokuboniswa ngendlela yokugcina impilo emzimbeni. Ukwethulwa kwezindawo zokuhlolwa ezizihambela ezindlini zabantu kube nomthelela omkhulu, njengoba abaningi abadala nezingane bethole usizo ngaphandle kokuhamba ibanga elide. Isikhulu esibhekele ezempilo ensimini yaseNkandla siphawule ukuthi imiphumela yokuqala imangalisa kakhulu, futhi ziyaqhubeka izingxoxo ukuze lolu hlelo luwele ezindaweni ezinye zesifundazwe

Ngaphezu kwezigidi ezimbini zabantwana baseNtshona Koloni abaye babhaliswa kwizikolo zikawonke-wonke ngonyaka wezifundo ka-2025, amanani abonakala enyuka ngokuqhubekayo kule mmandla. Oku kubonakalisa iminqweno eyandayo yabaseki beentsapho ekuboneni abantwana babo befumana imfundo esezingeni eliphezulu. Umbutho wezifundo wesithili uqinisekise ukuba izikolo ezininzi zifumene izixhobo ezitsha zokufundisa, kubandakanya iincwadi nemitshini yokukhangela ulwazi. Nangona kunjalo, isizathu sentlupheko saqhubeka sihlisa amazinga okufunda kwabantwana abahlala kwiindawo zasemaphandleni. Iikhomishini zezifundo ziphanda iindlela zokuqinisekisa ukuba abantwana bafika esikolweni ngeendlela ezikhonzayo nangeempahla ezifanelekileyo. UMphathiswa weMfundo ephondweni uvakalise ukuba uninzi lwezikolo ezidinga ukuvuselelwa luya kufumana inkxaso-mali phakathi kowe-2025 nawo-2026. Injongo enkulu kukuqinisekisa ukuba akukho mntwana ushiywa emva ngenxa yeemeko angazizanga ngazo.

Ngaphezulu kwamashumi amabini anesihlanu lamawaka abantwana abambalwa baseNtshona Koloni abajonga kumakhaya ahlwempuzekileyo abafikeleleki ngendlela efanelekileyo kwizikolo ezinobutsha nezinezixhobo zokufundisa. Ingxelo eyaveliswa nguMasipala wephondo iquka amaxhala amandla malunga nokusilela kweeprojekthi zokwakhiwa kweeklasi ezintsha, ikakhulukazi kwiidolophu zasemaphandleni. Izikolo ezininzi zisafundisa abantwana abaninzi kakhulu kwiklasi enye, into eyonakalisa ithuba labo lokufumana imfundo ebalulekileyo. Ngokwengxelo yoCeba uNomvula Dlamini, olutsha alufumani ithuba elinganalo ukuze luvavanywe ngendlela efanelekileyo ngenxa yokusweleka kwabafundisi abanobuchwephesha. URhulumente wephondo uthe uzondelele ukusingatha le ngxaki ngokwandisa isibalo sabafundisi abaqeqeshiweyo kuzo zonke izikolo ezichaphazelekayo phambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali. Ubunyani bale meko bukhankanywa nguMphathiswa weMfundo, othe abantwana beli phondo banelungelo lokufumana imfundo

Ngaphezulu kwezigidi ezimbini zabantwana baseNtshona Koloni abafumana imfundo kwizikolo zikarhulumente, apho abaninzi babo bejongana nemiceli mngeni yokusweleka kwezixhobo zokufunda njengamagqabantshintshi namaziko anemiqobo. Ingxelo ekhutshwe nguMasipala wePhondo iveze ukuba izikolo ezingamashumi amathandathu anesihlanu zifuna utshintsho olukhawulezileyo lwezakhiwo ukuze ziphumelele izithuthi zeMfundo. Abantwana abafunda kwezi zikolo badla ngokuhamba ibanga elide ukuze bafike apho befunda khona, nalapho, bazibona bekumeko engaxhasekanga kakuhle. INkulumbuso yephondo ibongoze urhulumente wasekhaya ukuba usebenzisane nezikolo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba izithuthi zophuhliso lwemfundo zifika kubo bonke. Umphathiswa weMfundo uqinisekise ukuba isicwangciso esitsha sokulungisa imeko yezikolo esibalulekileyo siyaqhutywa, size iziphumo zaso zibonakalise uzinzo loqeqesho lwabafundi ngokuthe ngcembe kweminyaka emithathu ezayo.

Ukuqala kwenkqubo entsha yonyaka wesikolo, izikolo ezingaphezu kwamashumi amahlanu zivule iingcango zazo kumafundi amasha kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, nto leyo enika amathemba entuthuko kwimimandla eyayidla ngokuphila engena zikolo ezaneleyo. Amawaka amabini abantwana abebengene kwizikolo ngaphandle kweencwadi nezixhobo zokufunda sele efumana inkxaso evela kurhulumente wephondo emva kokuba iingxaki ezazibakhona ziqwalaselwe ngamaxesha afanelekileyo. Inkqubo yeNkamnkam yeMfundo, eyaziwa ngokuba yi-CAPS, iqhubeka nokulawula indlela efundiswa ngayo kwizikolo zikarhulumente, nangona abazali befaka izikhalazo malunga nokusweleka kwabafundisi abanolwazi kwimisebenzi yezibalo nezesayensi. Abafundi abafika kumgangatho weshumi elinesibini bathethelelwa ukulungiselela iimviwo zikaNovemba ngokwenza iimviwo zoqeqesho, ukuze babe nesiqinisekiso sokuba bazakuphumelela ngempumelelo. Izikolo zasemaphandleni, ngakumbi ezo zikude nezixeko, zisaxhalabile ngokulungiswa kwezakhiwo eziwa

Ngaphezu kwezigidi ezimbini zabantwana abafunda ezikolweni zikarhulumente kulo mmandla weMpuma Koloni, imeko yezakhiwo zezikolo isekhona iyingxaki enkulu efuna ukunyangwa ngokukhawuleza. Izikhalo zabahlali ziyanda mihla le, njengoko izazisi zokufundisa zisalatha ukuba amagumbi okufundela amaninzi awanawo amafestile aselulo okanye iimpahla eziyaneleyo zokufunda. Imizamo yeNdebe yoLuntu ibonakalisa ukuba abantwana abangezantsi kweminyaka elishumi elinesithandathu bahamba amawaka amaninzi amanyathelo ngosuku ukufika ezikolweni, nto leyo eyachaphazela ukuphuma kwabo esikolweni. UMphathiswa weMfundo eNtla ePhondweni uthe, ngokwengxelo eyachazwa kwintlanganiso yephalamente, urhulumente uzimisele ukwakha izikolo ezintsha kwanokuhlaziya ezo zikhona phambi kokugqiba kuka-2026. Inkqubo yezibonelelo zokufunda nayo ifakwe kwingxoxo zikarhulumente ukuze abafundi abavela kwizindlu ezihlwempuzekileyo bangashiywa ngasemva ngenxa yeemeko zemali. Ukuzaliseka kwezi zithembiso ku

Ngaphezulu kwezigidi ezimbini zeentsapho zifumene izindululo zokuphucuka kwezikolo zikarhulumente kulo nyaka wezifundo ka-2024. Umphathiswa weZemfundo uthe izikolo ezingaphantsi kwesiganeko sezakhiwo ezigungxulweyo ziza kufumana inkxaso-mali engxamisekileyo ukuze abantwana bafunde kwimeko efanelekileyo. Kumaphondo amaninzi, izikolo zisafundisa abantwana emawakeni angaphelelanga, nto leyo ebangela ubunzima kwimfundo yabantwana. Urhulumente webango leLizwe ucebisile ukuba kufakwe izixhobo zesayensi nakwezobuchwepheshe ukuze abafundi bePrimary nezeSekondari bakhule ngokufanelekileyo. Iiyunivesithi nazo zibandakanyeke kule ngxoxo, zishishinyela ukuba abafundi abavela kwiindawo zasemaphandleni bafumane inkxaso-mali eyaneleyo ukuze bangayeki izifundo ngezizathu zemali. Oogxa bezopolitiko nabahlohli baqhubeka besisithethi sisinye ngomba wokuqinisekisa ukuba imfundo yabantu bonke iyafinyeleleka, nokuba baqhele phi na.

Ngaphezulu kwezigidi ezimbini zabantwana abangena esikolweni ngonyaka ngamnye eMzantsi Afrika abangenamaxabiso afanelekileyo okufunda, okubandakanya iincwadi, izixhobo zokubhala, kunye nezambatho zesikolo. Isimo esi sibonisa ukuba inkqubo yemfundo isabhasiyele izithuba ezikhulu ekufikeleni kwayo ebantwaneni basekhaya. Iingxelo ezikhutshwe nguMnyango wezeNtlalo nezeNkolo zibonisa ukuba izikolo ezikwimimandla yezolimo zibuhlungu kakhulu kwaye zisanqongophele izixhobo ezibalulekileyo. Ootitshala abaninzi baxela ukuba bafundisa amabakala ambalwa ngaxeshanye kuba kushortishwa abasebenzi abafanelekileyo. Amaqela amaninzi aphikisana nombuso ngoku afuna urhulumende azimisele ngakumbi ekuqinisekiseni ukuba yonke imali ebekiweyo yemfundo ifikelela ngqo kubantwana abasweleyo. Ithemba likho, noko, kuba amanye amaphondo ajike abe neziphumo ezihle emva kokufumana inkxaso eyonakalisiweyo. Ukufezekiswa kwemfundo esemgangathweni kubeka isiseko esiluqilima sos

Ngaphezulu kwezigidi ezimbini zeentsapho kwiMpuma Koloni zixhamla kuluncedo lokufumana imfundo yasimahla kumabanga aphantsi. Isebe leMfundo liphile ngethemba lokuba oku kuya kwandisa inani labantwana abangena esikolweni yonke nyaka. Imigaqo yezibonelelo ezitsha ibonakala isebenza ngempumelelo, nangona iindawo ezikude emaphandleni zisajamelene nemingeni ethe kratya yosondelo kumakhaya. Kubafundi abakwibanga leshumi elinesibini, uxinzelelo lomviwo weMatric luye lwanda kakhulu, ngakumbi kulabo abaswele iincwadi zemfundo nezixhobo zokufunda. Ootitshala abaninzi baxelele iintatheli ukuba izikolo zabo azinazibonelelo ezaneleyo ukwenza umsebenzi ngempumelelo. Uluntu luyabongoza urhulumente ukuba awujonge lo mba ngokukhawuleza nangentliziyo. Ngokwengxelo kaMasipala waKomani, amasebe angakumbi ayalungiselela ukwakha izikolo ezintsha kwaye ayisize imfundo yezithili ezisemaphandleni ngokwaneleyo, esebenzisana norhulumente wePhondo ukugcina inani eliphezulu labafundi ngaphakathi kwezakhiwo

Abafundi abangaphezu kwamawaka amabini babhalisele izifundo kwizikolo ezintsha ezakhiwe kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni ngonyaka wama-2024, into ebonisa inkqubela phambili kwicandelo lemfundo kulo mmandla. Ezi zikolo zakhiwe ngenxenye ngenxa yomzamo othe wawuqhutywa ngurhulumente wephondo ekuqinisekiseni ukuba abantwana bahlala ngakufuphi neendawo zokufunda. Ootitshala abaninzi bathi izakhiwo ezintsha zibanceda ekufundiseni kakuhle, kuba amagumbi okufunda ngoku anazo zonke izixhobo ezibalulekileyo. Umba wokungabi namagumbi okufunda aneleyo yayise ingxaki enkulu kwizikolo zasemaphandleni iminyaka emininzi. Ngokwengxelo yoMnyango wezeNcwadi neMfundo, iKomiti yeLizwe iParlamente izakuvakala ngalo nyaka ukuze ijonge intlalo yazo zonke izikolo ezisakhelwa kula mmandla. Abazali basendle bexhonywe luvuyo ngoku, bexelela abaphendli beendaba ukuba ithemba labo lokuba abantwana babo bafumane imfundo elungileyo ngoku liyafezekiswa ngokwenene.

Abafundi abangaphezu kwamashumi amathathu amawaka bafumene iziphumo zabo zemviwo yomatriku kule nyanga idlulileyo, nto leyo eyavuyisa iintsapho ezininzi kulo lonke iphondo leMpuma Koloni. Iziphumo zibonise ukuba amabanga aphezulu kwezesayensi nezibalo asenyuka ngendlela eyothusayo xa kuthelekiswa neminyaka edlulileyo. Oku kuthetha ukuba umsebenzi woqeqesho lwabatitshala owenziwa ngurhulumente ngokubambisana neenhlangano zoluntu uyazala iziqhamo. Ezikolweni zasemaphandleni, apho ingxaki yokuswela izixhobo zokufundisa yayinzima, kuye kwafakwa iilabhoritri nezincwadi ezintsha ukuze kuncedwe abalandeli bemfundo. UMphathiswa weMfundo wephondo ethe xa ethetha ePaarlament ekuqaleni kule veki, uqinisekisile ukuba urhulumente uzinikele ekuphuculeni izakhiwo zezikhola nakwimeko yokufunda yonke. Namaziko emfundo ephakamileyo afumene inkxaso-mali eyongezelelekileyo ukuze aqeshe abahlohli abanezakhono neziphiwo kwezesayensi. Injongo enkulu kukuqinisekisa ukuba

Ngexesha lokuvulwa kwesikolo kweli nyaka, izikolo ezingaphezu kwama-200 kummandla waseMpuma Koloni zisenokungabinazixhobo eziyanelekileyo, kubandakanya iincwadi, izihlalo, kunye nezakhiwo ezikhuseleyo. Le meko ikhathaza abazali nabantwana abaningi abahamba imigama emide ukuze bafike esikolweni, bade bafike babone amaklasi anezindlu eziwa phantsi. Iingxelo eziphuma kwiSebe lezeMfundo zibonisa ukuba imali ebekelwe ukulungiswa kwezakhiwo ayikafiki kwizikolo ezixhomekeke kuyo kakhulu. Ngelishwa, abantwana basemazweni amaphandle ngabahlawulela kakhulu le meko. UMphathiswa wezeMfundo uphendule ngokuthi urhulumente uzimisele ukulungisa imeko yezakhiwo ngaphambi kokugqibela kwekota yokuqala. Umphakathi ubongoza ukuba izithembiso zona zenziwe ngempumelelo, kungabi zithetha ezimiyo. Inkqubela phambili kwimfundo yezisizwe ixhomekeke ekuqinisekiseni ukuba wonke umntwana unelungelo lokufunda kwizakhiwo ezihloniphekileyo nasekhephini.

Amashumi amathathu anesihlanu eepesenti zabantwana abafunda ezikolweni zasemaphandleni eMpuma Koloni abafumani izinto ezaneleyo zokufunda, kuquka iincwadi nezixhobo zesayensi. Le nkqubo ibonakala njengenqanaba elikhulu lokungaphumeleli kweenjongo zorhulumente zokuphakamisa izinga lemfundo elizweni. Ingxelo yeNdebe kaMisela kaZwelonke yonyaka ophelileyo ibonisa ukuba abantwana abaninzi bayashiya isikolo ngaphambi kokugqiba ibanga leshumi, ikakhulu ngezizathu zezoqoqosho. UMphathiswa weMfundo eMpuma Koloni uthe amashishini axhasayo kumaziko emfundo ayakunceda ukusombulula le ngxaki. Iiyunivesithi nazo zithe zifuna ukuqeqesha ootitshala abangakumbi abanazo izakhono zokufundisa iimathematika nesayensi kwizikolo zasemaphandleni. Uluntu lwaseMthatha lufune ngemvula ukuba ulwalathiso olusemthethweni lusebenze ngamandla, luqinisekise ukuba bonke abantwana, nokuba baphila kuphi na, bafumana umgangatho wemfundo ofanelekileyo nowokubanika ithemba lekamva elingcono.

Amashumi amathathu anesihlanu lamawaka abafundi baseNtshona Koloni abuyile esikolweni emva kwehlobo, befika kumqondo omtsha wokufunda oziswe ngurhulumente wephondo. Olu guquko lubandakanya indlela entsha yokufundiswa kwemathematika kunye nesayensi kumazinga esixhenxe ukuya kwelishumi. Kwiindawo zasemaphandleni, apho inkxalabo yonani lootitshala abangalinganiyo ibinde ixesha elide, la mazwi athwalwa ngobukhulu becala ngabazali nemiphakathi. Ingxelo yosapho lwafumanisa ukuba ngaphezulu kwekhulu lamashule alishumi alithathileyo ithuba lokuqhuba uvavanyo lwezakhono zootitshala abaziintsha. Iziphumo zovavanyo ziya kusetyenziswa ekumiseleni apho ootitshala abaziintsha baya kuthunywa khona ukuqinisekisa ukuba akukho sikolo esishiyekileyo ngasemva. UMphathiswa weMfundo wasixelela ukuba ulindele ukufakwa kwenkqubo entsha ngokuthe kratya, ngokukodwa kwiindawo ezikude nezidolophu. Ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amahlanu eengcali zemfundo ziye zahlangana kwidolophu yaseMonti ukuthetha ngomba wokunyuka kwamanqanaba emfundo kwizikolo zasemaphandleni. Kubonakele ukuba abantwana abaninzi basemaphandleni abafumani uncedo lwaneleyo lwezifundo, ingakumbi kwizifundo zeMathematika nezeSayensi. Oogqirha bemfundo baye bachaza ukuba ukungabi nazo izixhobo zokufundisa, njengamagqabi ezincwadi nezixhobo zesayensi, kuye kuba nefuthe elikhulu kwimigangatho yabafundi. Ngamanye amaxesha, abafundisi basebenza kumabanga amabini okanye amathathu ngaxeshanye ngenxa yokungabi namanani aneleyo abasebenzi ezikolweni. UMphathiswa weMfundo weli phondo ucele urhulumente wasekhaya ukuba abe negalelo ekuxhaseni izikolo ezikwimeko enzima. Kulandelwa olu hlobo lwengxelo, amalungu oluntu alindeleke ukuba aphakamise izikhalazo zawo kwikomiti yesebe lemfundo ukuze izinto ziguquke ngokushesha.

Ngaphezulu kwamashumi amabini eewaka labafundi baseNtshona Koloni abajike emva kwanga befunde kwiiyunivesithi ngenxa yokunqongophala kwemali yemfundo ngonyaka ophelileyo. Imeko yabo ibonisa ingxaki enkulu ebuhlanti borhulumente wephondo ekuqinisekiseni ukuba wonke umntu ufumana amathuba afanelekileyo emfundweni ephakamileyo. Izibhengezo ezikhutshwe buSebe lweZemfundo ziphakamisa ukuba amacebo amatsha azakwenziwa ukwandisa inkxaso-mali yabafundi abavela kwiindawo zasemaphandleni. Kodwa ke, iinkokheli zamaziko emfundo zifake izichaso, zisithi le nkxaso-mali ayeneli ukubhekana neendleko ezikhulayo zezifundo. Oonolwazi bemibutho elwela amalungelo abafundi bacebisa ukuba urhulumente makasebenzisane namaziko emfundo ukuyila izicwangciso ezizinzileyo. Inkxaso yoluntu iyimfuneko kweli nyathelo ukuqinisekisa ukuba izizukulwane ezizayo zifumana imfundo efanelekileyo enokubahlohla ukujongana neemfuno zelizwe.

Ngexesha lonyaka wezifundo ka-2024, iingxelo ezivela kwiSebe lezeMfundo iBonakalise ukuba uninzi lwezikolo zasemaphandleni lусе lusokola ngokungabi nazo izixhobo eziyanelekileyo zokufundisa. Abafundi abangaphezu kwezigidi ezimbini bafunda kumagumbi okufunda awonakalisiweyo, nalapho iincwadi zifutshane kwaye ootitshala abananelanga. Iinjongo zikarhulumente zokuqinisekisa imfundo esezingeni eliphezulu azifezekanga ngokupheleleyo kule mimandla. Ootitshala abaphuma kooMantyi bambalwa babika ukuba imeko isaxhalabisa, nangona inkxaso yezimali iyenyuswa qho ngonyaka. IYunivesithi yaseFort Hare, ezingeyiyo kuphela iqakamba lemfundo ephakamileyo, iqhubeka nokubeka ithemba kwintsha ngokunikezela ngamathuba emfundo. Kuyimfuneko yokuba urhulumente nemibutho yoluntu basebenzisane ngakumbi ukuqinisekisa ukuba abantwana beli lonke bafumana imfundo ekumgangatho ofanelekileyo. Iingxoxo zohlahlo-lwabiwo-mali luka-2025 lulindele ukubonisa ukuba na imfundo iza

Ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amathathu amashumi amahlanu abantwana abafundi basezilalini zaseMpuma Koloni abafumana iincwadi zezifundo ngokohlelo olutsha lukarhulumente lonyaka wezimali ka-2024/2025. Olu hlelo luzisa ithemba kumaziko emfundo amaninzi awayesoloko engenayo imithombo eyiyo yokufundisa. Izikolo eziselurhoqo lwezixeko ezincinane nazo ziqala ukubona utshintsho, njengoko amagumbi okufundela atsha ekwakhiwa ekwaphela kweliya cala leli phondo. UNobhala weSebe leMfundo uthethe wathi izicwangciso zokwandisa amabanga ezifundo phakathi zisezindleleni, ebekisa kakhulu iimfundo zesayensi nobugcisa. Abantwana abangamantombazana ngeenxa ezithile bathande kwaye bakhuthazwa ukuba bazikhethele izifundo zekhompyutha nezobunjineli. Iingxelo eziphuma koomasipala abohlukeneyo zibonakalisa ukuba ubuninzi bokunyuka kwabafundi ngowe-2023 bukhuphe amangqina alukhuni, waza urhulumente wanika isigqibo sokuba mali enganeno ayichithwe ngokufanelekileyo kule mfundo.

Ngexesha lokuvulwa kwesikolo kweli nyaka, abazali abaninzi basezilalini zaseMpuma Koloni baveze inkxalabo enkulu malunga nokungabikho kwezixhobo zokufundisa ezikolweni zabo. Iikhilasi eziqhutywa phantsi kwezintente okanye kwizakhiwo ezifayo zisahlala ziyingxaki eqhelekileyo kwiindawo ezikude nezixeko. Ngokwengxelo eyaboniswa nguMasipala weSithili sasKowa, malunga nezikolo ezingama-47 azinamagumbi okufundela ayaneleyo ukuze iingxelo zezifundo zenziwe ngendlela efanelekileyo. Oku kudale umonakalo omkhulu kwiziphumo zemfundo yabantwana basezilalini. Urhulumente wesifundazwe uqinisekisile ukuba uneqhinga lokuphumeza izilungiso kwezi zikhungo, kodwa izicwangciso azikabonakali ngokucacileyo eluntwini. Abafundi abaninzi bathwala amabhegi abo behambe ikhilomitha ezine okanye ezintlanu ukuze bafike ezikolweni, bengafumani lutho ukuphambuka kwesigidi sokuqala semfundo. Ilizwi labantwana lufanele liphulaphulwe ngabantu abaphetheyo ukuze inqw

Ngaphezulu kwezigidi ezimbini zabantwana baseNtshona Koloni abaqale unyaka wesikolo ngo-2025, nezazi zezemfundo zibike ikhondo elithembisayo ekufundisweni kwezibalo nasentetho yesiNgesi. Ezi zibalo zivele emva kwemizamo yeengxowa-mali ezifakwe ngurhulumente ukuqeqesha ootitshala abatsha kwizifundo ezinzima. Kwiidolophu zasemaphandleni, imeko yamasikolo amaninzi isaxhomekeke ekuxhaseni koorhulumente basekuhlaleni, apho amagumbi okufundela athe achana aze abe nentswela-mpahla yeencwadi. Umzali omnye waseLibode, uNomvula Dlamini, ubonise inkathalo malunga nabantwana bakhe, esithi kufuneka bahamba ibanga elide ukuze bafike esikolweni esisondeleleneyo. Ikomiti yezeMfundo yePhondo iye yazibophelela ekuphumezeni izicwangciso ezintsha zokudibanisa ubuchwepheshe kwimfundo yamabanga aphakamileyo ukuze abafundi bafumane amathuba alinganayo, nokuba behlala phi na kweli phondo. Abaseki beekholeji nombutho wabafundi bakwaxelele iziphathimandla ukuba umahluko weemfuno phak

Ukususela ekuqaleni kwalo nyaka wezifundo, izikolo ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu kummandla weMpuma Koloni ziye zafumana izixhobo ezintsha zokufundisa, kubandakanya iilaptops nezincwadi zesikolo. Abazali baxa bebona utshintsho olu, bevakalisa uvuyo nolindelo olukhulu ngekamva labantwana babo. Umphathiswa weMfundo ePhondweni ucacise ukuba le nkqubo iyinxenye yesicwangciso esikhulu sikarhulumente esijoliswe ekuqinisekiseni ukuba akukho mntwana ushiywa emva. Kubalulekile ukuba izifundo zenziwe ngokulungelelaniswa kweemfuno zabantwana ngabanye, ingakumbi abo babekhula kwiimeko ezinzima. Ngaphezu koko, iziko leMfundo iPhakamileyo laseMonti nalo libhengeze inkqubo entsha yokuncedisa abafundi abaneemali ezinqongopheleyo, ukuze bafumane ithuba elilinganayo lokugqiba imfundo yabo. Iingcali zemfundo zixhasa ezi nyathelo, zisithi impumelelo yoqoqosho lwelizwe incama iqalela kwimfundo esiseko esomeleleyo.

Ngaphezulu kwamashumi amathathu amawaka abafundi basezikolweni zephondo leMpuma Koloni babhekene nobunzima bokungafumani izixhobo zokufunda ezaneleyo, kubandakanya iincwadi zesikolo kunye nezixhobo zobuchwepheshe. Iingxelo ezikhutshwa nguMnyango weZemfundo zibonakalisa ukuba izikolo ezikwimimandla yasemaphandleni zisazithwele nzima izishiyangalolunye zazo, zingabi namagumbi okufundela anele. Oku kubangela ukuba abafundi bafunde kwiimeko ezinzima, nto leyo ephazamisa inkqubela phambili yabo ekufundeni. Othethela ipalamente ephondweni, uNksz. Nomvula Dlamini, uthe urhulumente uyaqonda ubuhlungu babazali nabafundi, kwaye izicwangciso zokwakha izikolo ezintsha seziqalile ukuphunyezwa kwiidolophu eziliqela. Ukongeza, inkqubo entsha yokunikeza abafundi izipho zemali kwiiyunivesiti iphinde yenziwa banzi ukwenzela ukuba nabantwana basekhaya ezisweleyo bafumane ithuba lokufunda. Ithemba kukuba ezi nguqulelo zizisa utshintsho olwaneleyo phambi konyaka wezifundo olan

Ngaphezu kwamashumi amabini anesihlanu lamawaka abafundi ababhalisileyo kwiiyunivesiti zaseMzantsi Afrika ngalo nyaka wemfundo, ingxaki yonxibelelwano phakathi kwezikhungo zemfundo ephakamileyo nezilali ezikude isaqhubeka nokubeka umthwalo onzima kubantu. Kwiidolophu ezininzi zasemaphandleni, abazali baxhomekeke kwiinkqubo zemali yenkxaso-mali ukuze bafezekise amaphupha ezemfundo koobawo noomama abangasebenzanga. Ukugcina abantwana besesikolweni kufikelela enqabini ngenxa yezikhululo zezithuthi ezibalekayo, ukusweleka kwezixhobo zokufunda, nokungabikho kwamawc kwezakhiwo zesikolo. INkosazana uNomsa Dlamini, umzali waseCofimvaba, uthe umntwana wakhe uhamba ikhilomitha ezihlanu mihla le ukuya esikolweni ngaphandle kwezihlangu ezilinganayo. UMphathiswa weMfundo weSithili uqinisekise ukuba izicwangciso zokuhlaziya izakhiwo zesikolo ziyaqhuba, kwaye imali yohlahlo-lwabiwo-mali iya kujoliswa kuzo iindawo ezidinga uncedo olukhulu ng

Ngokutsho kwengxelo yenyanga ephelileyo, amanani abafundi abashiya isikolo ngaphambi kokugqiba ibanga leshumi aya esisiwa ngakumbi kwiindawo zasemaphandleni zeMpuma Koloni. Iingxaki ezifana nokuswela izinto zokufunda, ukude kwezikolo, kunye nentswelo-ngqesho yamalungu osapho zibonakalisa njengezizathu eziphambili zale meko ekhathazayo. Iingcali zezemfundo ziyasilumkisa ngoku ukuba, ukuba le meko ayijongwanga ngokukhawuleza, inani labafundi abagqibayo ibanga leshumi liza kuqhubeka lehla. Urhulumente wephondo, ngokusebenzisana neziko lezeMfundo yeNdibano, useke iinkqubo ezintsha zokukhuthaza abafundi ukuba bahlale esikolweni, kubandakanya nenkxaso-mali yamagumbi okulala kunye nezixhobo zokufunda. Ootitshala abathile baye banika ingxelo yokuba izikolo ezinye azinayo nencwadi yaneleyo, into ekhandela inkqubela phambili yabafundi. Kufuneka zonke iinkokheli zoluntu, abazali, nezicaka zikarhulumente basebenzisane ukuqinisekisa ukuba ikusasa labantwana bakowethu likhuselelekile nakuk

Abantwana abangaphezu kwezigidi ezimbini bafunda phantsi kweemeko ezinzima kwiindawo zasemaphandleni eNtshona Koloni, apho izikolo ezininzi ziswele izixhobo nemithombo efanelekileyo yokufundisa. Abazali babantwana aba bavakalise inkxalabo enkulu ngenxa yokungabikho kwamagumbi okufundela aneleyo, ukusilela kwekhompyutha neetabhulethi, kunye nokuswela amagqirha onyango ezikolweni. UMphathiswa weMfundo ePhondweni, ukusabela kwezi zikhalazo, ugqibe kwelokuba kubekho uphando olubanzi lwezimo zezikolo ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wemfundo. Oku kulandela ingxelo yombutho wezophuhliso othe wafumanisa ukuba uninzi lweesikolo zasemaphandleni zisasilela ukufikelelwa ngezithuthi, nto leyo eyenza abantwana bahambele imigama emide ukuze bafike esikolweni. IRhulumente yeli phondo ithembise ukuba iza kunikezela ngezigidi zeRandi ukuze kuxhobiswe izikolo ezisweleyo ngezinto ezifanelekileyo. Amalungu oluntu athetha ngoburharha balo mba, efuna ukuba urhulumente enze ngokukhaw

Ngaphezulu kwamashumi amabini amawaka abafundi base-Eastern Cape ababhalisele unyaka wezifundo ka-2025 kwiiyunivesithi namakoliji akweli phondo, bebonisa ukunyuka okubonakalayo kwimfundo ephakamileyo. Ukufikelela kwimfuno yemfundo ephakamileyo kuyanda, kodwa ingxaki yemali yenkxaso-mali isaqhubeka nokuba ngumthwalo omkhulu kubantu abaninzi. Iingxelo ezikhutshwe ngamagosa emfundo zibonisa ukuba inani labafundi abayekayo ngenxa yeemeko zemali liphakame ngama-phesenti ali-18 kuthelekiswa nonyaka ophelileyo. Amakhaya amaninzi asemaphandleni adinga inkxaso-mali engakumbi ukuze onke abantwana bawo bakwazi ukufumana imfundo ephakamileyo. Urhulumente wephondo uthumele isicelo kwiSebe leMfundo ukuze kwenziwe uphando olunzulu ngale meko, kwaye kucetyelwa ukuba kwandiswe inani leebhasari ezinikezelwayo. Ukuze inguqu ibe yinyani, kufuneka intsebenziswano phakathi kukarhulumente, iinstityu zemfundo, kunye nemiphakathi yasemakhaya.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti, eNtshona Koloni, balinde iminyaka emide inkqubo yolungiso lweendlela ezifana nentlabathi zasekhaya. Emva kweentlanganiso eziliqela nekomiti yolawulo lwasekuhlaleni, uMasipala waseBuffalo City uvumile ukuba uza kukhulisa imali eya kulungiswa ngeendlela kwisithili saseNgqushwa. Ngokwengxelo eyahlulwa ePalamente, ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amathathu eentsapho zixhamla kule nguqu, ikakhulukazi abo bahlala kwiindawo ezikude nezixhobisiweyo. Injongo yohlelo luka-2025 ukuqinisekisa ukuba iincwadi zemisebenzi yabasethiwa zikhutshwa ngexesha. Abasebenzi bezempilo nabo baxhamle kuloluvo, kuba iindlela ezilungileyo zithetha ukufikeleleka okukhawulezayo kwezibhedlele nakumakhaya abantu. UMphathiswa wesithili uvakalise ukuba amaqela ophando aza kuqala umsebenzi ngenyanga ezayo, ebeka esweni ukuphumezwa kwezibopho zikarhulumente.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti bemi ngolude belindele ukuba umasipala unike impendulo ngomba wokungabikhona kwamanzi acocekileyo kwizindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintlanu kwilokishi yaseNgqushwa. Iveki ephelileyo, ikomiti yolawulo yaqhuba intlanganiso ephuthumayo apho kwavela khona ukuba isixhobo esinqala sokusabalalisa amanzi saphuka kwinyanga ephelileyo, size singabuyiselwanga emsebenzi ngenxa yokusilela kweenkontraktha. UMphathiswa weNkonzo zoLuntu, uNksz Nolundi Damane, waxelela abahlali ukuba urhulumente wephondo uzibophelele ekuxhobiseni iinkampani ezikhethiweyo ukuze umsebenzi uqalwe kungadluli iveki. Ngokwengxelo yoMasipala weNkqubela, imali elingana nezigidi ezilishumi elinesihlanu zerandi yabelwe ukuze kulungiswe iziseko ezixhomekekwe ngabantu abaninzi kule ngingqi. Abahlali bacenga ukuba ingxelo esisigxina inikezelwe ngqo kubo malunga nenkqubela yemisebenzi, ukuze bangabi ngabantu abaphulaphula iindaba kuphela.

Ngaphezulu kwekhulu lemizi kwilokishi yaseKhayelitsha esixekweni saseKapa isalinda ukufikelelwa ngamanzi acocekileyo, nangona iSixeko saseKapa sithe thande ukuqinisekisa ukuba iphulo lentlawulo yamanzi liza kuphelela ngonyaka ka-2026. Abahlali baseMdantsane, ngakumbi abo bahlala kwiindawo ezikude neziko leli, bakhala ngemigca yewotela eqhekekileyo neyenza amanzi aye emhlabeni engafiki emizini. Ukuphathwa kwezi zikhalazo kuya kufuna intsebenziswano phakathi kweeNkosi zooMasipala, iMasipala yesithili kunye norhulumento wePhondo. Isigqeba sikamasipala simemelele intlanganiso yoluntu nge-15 kaJanuwari, apho iinjineli neengcali zonyango lwamanzi zaza kuthetha nabahlali ngokuthe ngqo. Umasipala ukwaziwa ngokuthi uza kukhupha ingxelo eyiyo neyiyo ngezinto ezenziweyo ngexesha leminyaka emibini edlulileyo, eneneni ukuze urhulumento wazise uluntu ngendlela efanelekileyo ngoqhagamshelwano phakathi kwabo.

Iindlela ezophukileyo kunye nokuphelelwa ngamanzi kwiidolophu ezincinci zaseMpuma Koloni ziye zaba yingxaki enkulu kangangeminyaka emininzi, ngokutsho kwabahlali abaninzi abaxhalabile. Ibhunga laseBuffalo City Metropolitan Municipality lithabathe amanyathelo amasha ekuqondeni ezi ngxaki, lisebenza ngokukhawuleza ukuphendula izikhalazo zabahlali. Ngokwengxelo esiyinikwe ngamagosa asesidlangalaleni, imali engaphezulu kwezigidi ezilishumi zerandi yabelwe ukuhlaziywa kweendlela ezibalulekileyo kwingingqi yaseMdantsane nasezilalini ezingqongileyo. Abahlali baya kukwaziswa ngomsebenzi oza kuba usenzeka ngokusebenzisa iindibano zoluntu ezilungiselelwe ukuqhuba kweliphepha elinesivela. Usihlalo weBhunga uSomandla Mkwanazi wacacise ukuba uhulumeni wesithili uzinikele ekuqinisekiseni ukuba iinkonzo ezisisiseko zifikeleleka kubo bonke abahlali, ingakumbi abo bahlala kude nezixeko. Leli phulo lokwakha kabusha lizakuqala ngasekupheleni kweyeSilimela kulo nyaka, likhuthaze amakhasi eengqesho kweli do

Iinkqubo zokunikezela ngamanzi acocekileyo ziye zahlutha kwilali zaseMpuma Koloni, apho abantu abaninzi besandula ukuxhomekeka kumlambo ukuze bafumane amanzi okusela. Kulandela isigqibo senkomfa yengingqi eyabanjwa ngenyanga ephelileyo, iKomiti yeSithili saseAmathole isiqinisekisile ukuba izicwangciso zokwakha iingcingo zamanzi ezintsha ziya kuqalisa kwisithuba seenyanga ezintathu. Ngokutsho koNobhala weNgingqi, uMnu Sipho Mthembu, imali efikelela kwisigidi esinye seerandi ibekwe bucala ukuxhasa umsebenzi lo. Amakhaya angaphezulu kwezintathu amawaka alindele ukuba azuze kula mathuba. Kubalulekile ukuba uluntu luzibandakanye nezicwangciso ngokuya kwiintlanganiso zikawonke-wonke eziza kubanjwa kwizikolo zasekuhlaleni. Isebe lezoBunjani bezaManzi liyakwamkela nalo inkxaso-mali evela kurhulumente wesizwe ukwenzela ukuba umsebenzi ungabambi phantsi ngenxa yeemali. Abantu bayacelwa ukuba babhalise amagama abo kwii-ofisi zekhansile zendawo ukuze bafakwe ku

Ngaphezulu kwekhulu lamakhaya kwilokishi yaseMdantsane, eMonti, asakhange afumane amanzi acocekileyo kwisithuba seeminyaka emibini. Izikhalazo zokungabikho kwamanzi ecocekileyo zifakwe ngumphakathi kwiMasipala yaseBhufalo Siti, kodwa izimpendulo zisasilele. Abahlali baxelela abezindaba ukuba baxhomekeke kumadama akude nezindlu zabo ukuze bafumane amanzi okusela. Ukulungiswa kwamapayipi akudala kuthethe ukuba akukho msebenzi mninzi owenziweyo kweli candelo. IMasipala, emva koqwalaselo lweNdibano yeZowuni ebibanjelwe kwiveki ephelileyo, ikhuphe isibhengezo esithi umsebenzi wokufaka amapayipi amatsha uya kuqala ngenyanga ezayo. Imali efikelela kwizigidi ezintlanu zeerandi ibekiwe ukuze lulungiswe olu dano. Abahlali bacenga urhulumente wephondo ukuba awaqaphele amatye ezi zethembiso, bexela ukuba ithemba labantu lide lonakala ngenxa yezithembiso ezingaphumeleli.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti bade belinde ukuphuculwa kweenkonzo zamanzi nangona izikhalazo zabo bezifakwa rhoqo kwikhausi yengingqi. Emva kweentlanganiso ezininzi ezenziwa ngumasipala, kuxelwe ukuba imali elingana nezigidi eziyi-47 yeerandi iye yamiselwa ukuze iphinde yakhe izintshi zamanzi kwizithuba ezingamashumi amane anesihlanu ezihlalweni zasekuhlaleni. Ngokwengxelo yoosomaqondo balo masipala, umsebenzi wokwakhiwa kothotho lweepayipi entsha uqalwa ngenyanga ezayo, kuqikelelwa ukuba uzogqitywa ngonyaka wama-2026. Oku kuza emva kokuba iingxelo zikhuphe inkcazelo yokuba abahlali abaninzi beseBhayi naseMdantsane babephumelela ngaphandle kwamanzi acocekileyo iimvula. Ilungu leCandelo lezeMpilo lithe le meko ibangela ubungozi bokufika kwezigulo ezifana nentloko-mhlaba. UMasipala weCitywide uthe uzibophelele ekuqinisekiseni ukuba amalungelo abantu athembekile, kwaye ukusilela kweenkonzo akuyi kubhekwelwa ngamehlo.

Abahlali baseMonti bexhobile ngokudedereka kwamanzi acocekileyo ezilalini ezikufuphi nedolophu, bekhala ngokuba iingcinga zabo azizivwa ziziphathimandla. Kulandela iintlanganiso eziliqela ezabanjwa ngenyanga ephelileyo, uMasipala waseBuffalo City uvakalise into ebalulekileyo: uzakuqalisa umsebenzi wokwakha imikhono yesixhobo samanzi kwizithili ezintathu ezinezidingo ezikhulu. Ngokwengxelo ephuma kwisebe lamajelo endlela nomlibo, utyando lwezigidi ezihlanu eerandi luvunyiwe ukuze luqhube udliwanondlebe nabahlali kwanomsebenzi wangempela. Abathathi-nxaxheba abaninzi bayonwabele le ndaba, nangona abanye bengaqinisekanga ngezithembiso esele bezivile ngaphambili. Ukuze abantu baqiniseke ngokufikelela koluntu, umasipala uyalele amagosa akhe ukuba angenele iindibano zasekuhlaleni rhoqo ngeveki. Loo nto iquka ukuphendula izikhalazo ngokuthe ngqo nokubika inkqubela phambili kubo bonke abahlali. Ukugcinwa kwendlela enzima yinzuzo esisigxina ekufuneka

Abahlali baseWard 14 bahleli bekhalaza ngeminyaka emibini malunga nokunqongophala kwamanzi acocekileyo ezindlini zabo. Emva kwentlanganiso yebhunga kamasipala eyayise ngoLwesihlanu ophelileyo, umphathiswa wezolawulo lwengingqi waqinisekisa ukuba isicwangciso esitsha sokubuyisela ugesi namanzi kulo mmandla siyaqhuba. Amakhulu amathathu eentsapho ziza kungenelela kwinkqubo entsha yokufakwa kwezithuthi zamanzi ngakumbi kwilali yaseNgqungqushe nakwezinye iindawo ezimelene namathafa. Iinzame zokulungisa ipayipi elikhulu elalaphuke ngo-Agasti ziqhubeka, kwaye abaqeshwa bamasipala basebenza imini nobusuku ukugqiba umsebenzi phambi koDisemba. UNkosikazi Nomalanga Dlamini, ongumhlali wale ndawo, wazixelela iintatheli ukuba abantwana babuye besuka esikolweni beqengqa amanzi ngezikhithi ngenxa yokunqaba kwesisixhobo esingundoqo. Ikomiti yolawulo yaxelela uluntu ukuba imali yenkxaso-mali kazwelonke sele ifunyenwe, kwaye umsebenzi wokwakha

Abahlali baseMasipala waseBuffalo City bade balindile ukufumana iinkonzo ezilungileyo zamanzi acocekileyo nezindlu ezihlala zakhiwa ngokusesikweni. Kulandela iintlanganiso ezinomdla ezenziwa nguMasipala phakathi kwabahlali namanye amaqela karhulumente, izibhengezo ziye zatyunjwa ngenyanga ephelileyo zokuba umsebenzi wezingxonde zamanzi uzakuqala ngentsimbi yoMsintsi kulo nyaka. Ixabiso lephulo eli lilinganiselwe kumashumi amabini anesixhenxe eezigidi zeerandi, lize ixeshana lokupheliswa komsebenzi limiselwe ukuphela kuka-Disemba. Ilungu losapho oluvela eMonti, uNkwenkwe Sipho Dlamini, uthe olu tshintsho luyimfuneko kakhulu kulolonke uluntu. Ukuqinisekisa ukuba amanzi acocekileyo ayafumaneka kuyo yonke imizi, uMasipala uzimisele ukusebenzisa inkqubo entsha yokugcina amanzi nokuwanika abantu ngokulinganayo. Abahlali bacelerwa ukuba babhalise kwi-ofisi yaseMasipala ukuze bafumane ulwazi oluthe vetshe malunga neenjongo zeli phulo.

Abahlali baseKomani bade balinda ukufakwa kwamanzi acocekileyo emakhayeni abo, emva kweminyaka engaphezulu kwemihlanu bengaxhamli nkonzo le yezinga eliphantsi. Umasipala waseMalahleni uzithethelele ngezinto ezininzi ezabangela ukulibaziseka—kubandakanya ukungapheli kwemali yoqoqosho kunye neziphazamiso ezazibakho ngexesha lepandemiki. Nangona kunjalo, iingxelo zakamuva ezivela kuSebe lwezeMiselo nezoHlaliswa kwabantu zikhombe ukuba uR47-million umiswa ukuze usekwe umkhakha wokuvelisa amanzi acocekileyo kweli mmandla. Umsebenzi wokumba imirhiba emikhulu uqikelelwa ukuba uqale ngenyanga kaJulayi, ngokwesibhengezo esikhutshwa ngumasipala ngomhla we-12 kweyoMdumba walo nyaka. Abahlali bayacelwa ukuba baqaphele izilumkiso zempilo ngamanzi abo bade baphumelele uphando lwemvelaphi yokuqala, kuba amagosa ezempilo abalumkisile ngemingcipheko yokusetyenziswa kwamanzi angapheli umchamo.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMthatha bayavuyisana ngesigqibo esithathwe nguMasipala waseOR Tambo sokwandisa inkonzo yokuphuma kwelindle kwiilokishi ezinqongophele zalo masipala. Ngexesha lengqungquthela eyayibandakanya amakomiti ezilokishi, iziphathimandla zemasipala zazichaza ukuba amakhaya angaphezu kwe-4 500 aya kufumana itoilets ezintsha zoluntu phambi kokugqiba kuka-Julayi kulo nyaka. Kulo msebenzi kuya kusebenza abasebenzi abangaphezu kwama-200 basekhaya, ukuqinisekisa inkxaso yoqoqosho kule ndawo. Okumangalisayo kukuba isigxina sikarhulumente wephondo leMpuma Koloni sixhase lo msebenzi ngemali engange-R23 million, okubonakalisa uzinikelo kwiinkolelo zentando yenene. Amakomiti ezilokishi acelelwe ukuba asebenzisane ngqo nezixhobo zemasipala ukuze ukusebenzisana kube nempumelelo, nanjengoko ingxaki yokuswela amanzi acocekileyo nelindle isaqhubeka ngokoyikisa impilo yoluntu. Isikhalazo sabahlali siva ngokuthe ngcembe, kwaye kucelwa ukuba wonke umntu azithobele

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti bajongene nomceli-mngeni omkhulu wokulahla inkunkuma ngendlela efanelekileyo, njengoko iinkonzo zokukha inkunkuma zingafiki ngokupheleleyo kwiindawo ezithile. Umasipala waseBuffalo City Metropolitan Municipality uzise ukuba uhlelo olutsha lokucwangciswa kwemisebenzi yokukhipha inkunkuma luza kuqalisa ngenyanga ezayo, luquka izinto zokufundisa uluntu malunga nokuhlukana kwenkunkuma. Kufumaniseke ukuba malunga nesiqingatha sabahlali abahlala kwizithili ezingaphandle kwedolophu abafumani inkonzo le rhoqo, ngenxa yokungabikho kwemathiriyeli nakwabasebenzi. ISebe leMicimbi yeNdawo lithi imali eninzi izakusetyenziswa ukuthenga izithuthi ezintsha ukuze ingxaki le ixazululwe ngaphambi kwisiphetho sonyaka-mali. Iingxelo zithi uluntu luyacelwa ukuba lungahoyi ukuphosa inkunkuma ngaphandle kwezona ndawo ezikhethiweyo, ngenxa yokuba lokho kunomonakalo omkhulu kimpilo. Amaqumrhu obulungisa asebenza kule ndawo aqhuba iintlanganiso noluntu ukuze amfundise ngokuphathelele

Iindlela eziwa ngamawa kunye nokungabikho kwamanzi acocekileyo kwizithili ezisemaphandleni zaseMpuma Koloni zibe yingxaki enkulu kangangeminyaka emininzi, kodwa uMasipala waseAmathole ubhengeze isicwangciso esitsha sokujongana nezi ngxaki ngokukhawuleza. Ngokwengxelo eyakhutshwa ngale veki, isigidi samarandi angamashumi amahlanu uya kusetyenziswa ukuhlaziya iindlela ezingaphezu kwamakhilomitha angamakhulu amabini kwingingqi yonke. Abahlali basezilalini baziva bekhuthazekile yile ndaba, njengoko abantu abaninzi bebefanele bahambe iimayile ezide ukuze bafike kwizibhedlele namaziko emfundo. Umkomishinala weenkonzo zoMasipala, uNksz. Nomvula Dlamini, wachaza ukuba iiprojekthi zokuqala ziya kuqala ngenyanga ezayo, zinika ingqalelo kuqala kwiidolophu ezichatshazelwa kakhulu. Ukongeza koku, amanzi acocekileyo aya kufikiswa kwizindlu ezingamakhulu amahlanu ngenkqubo entsha yeempompo zoluntu. Uluntu luceliwe ukuba lushirhe iingxelo ngemiba yengqalelo kumasipala ngok

Abahlali baseDolopu laseKing William's Town baxelele uMkhandlu weSixeko ukuba imigaqo yokuphatha amanzi aselwayo ayifanelekanga kwaye iyingozi empilweni yoluntu. Abahlali baseMpuma Koloni abamalunga namatshantliziyo amakhulu asebenza ngokuzimisela ukuqinisekisa ukuba abantwana abahlala kwiindawo ezikude nemizi yezikolo bafumana inkxaso eyifaneleyo. Iinkokheli zamakomiti ezikolo zivakalise imbeko enkulu kulo mgwebo, zibalula ukuba abazali abaninzi bebengakwazi ukuwuthwala umthwalo wokuya nokufika kwezikolo rhoqo. Abahlali basekomkhulu laseKhayelitsha bathe bazive bephulukene nethemba emva kweminyaka emithathu besilindele ukwakhiwa kwendlela enkulu eya kwizikolo zabo. Ibhunga lesixeko sikaKapa ngoku likhuphe isibhengezo esithi umsebenzi wokwakha lo mda uya kuqala ngenyanga ezayo, emva kwezingxoxo ezinde phakathi kwabaphathi nabamelweli babantu. Ngaphezulu kwabahlali abangama-4 500 abahlala kwilali yaseQoboqobo nakwiindawo ezingqongileyo baya kuxhamla kumsebenzi omtsha wokwakhiwa kwamanzi acocekileyo, obizwa ukuba uzokuphelisa iminyaka emide yokuswela amanzi acocekileyo kule ndawo. Umsebenzi lo uqalwe yiMasipala yaseLower Tyhume ngobambisano noMnyango wezeMveli, kulandela izigqibo zohlahlo-lwabiwo-mali zelizwe elimiselwe ukuphucula ingqalelo yezolimo namanzi eNtshona Koloni. Abahlali baseKhayelitsha baxelele ikomiti yolawulo lwedolophu ukuba imigaqo-nkqubo yokufakwa kwamanzi acocekileyo ayikabi nampembelelo incomekayo kwiindawo ezingaphandle. Ngaphezu kwekhulu lemizi emhlabeni ongengowemizi-mveliso usanemingxuma efumaneka ngezantsi komhlaba njengomthombo wamanzi, nto leyo ebangela ingozi yempilo. ISebe leMicimbi yaBasemakhaya lenziwa ixanduva lazo zonke izinzelelo ezijongene nokuhlaziywa kweziseko-zakhiwo ezibalulekileyo, kodwa imimangaliso aibonakali rhoqo. Kuhlalutyo lweentlanganiso zoluntu oluqhutyelwe ngeLe nkanga eli, kwavela ukuba abahlali abaninzi abanalo ukholo lwaneleyo kwiinkqubo zikarhulumente. Izikhokelo zekomiti zamkele ezi zikhalazo ngomthetho-siseko, zithembisa ukuba izicwangciso ezizizo ziya kupapashwa phambi kokuba iphele eli nyanga. Ukubambisana phakathi koluntu neziphathimandla kuya kuba yintsulungekile xa iziphumo ezibonakalayo zingabonakali kumaxesha afanelekileyo.

Iindlela eziqhekekileyo nezixhomekeke emsebenzini wempahla enkulu ziye zaba ngumthwalo omde kubahlali baseMonti, ngakumbi kwabahlali basezilalini ezingqongileyo edolophini. Aba bahlali babhalela iinkumanda zasekuhlaleni izicelo emva kwesikhathi eside, befuna ukulungiswa kweendlela ezibalulekileyo ezixhuma imizi nemizi yoluntu. ISebe lezeMisebenzi yoLuntu lePhondo leMpuma Koloni lithe lithe xilongo ngokusemthethweni ukuba imali inikezelwe ukuqala umsebenzi wokulungiswa kweendlela ezisixhenxe kulo mmandla ngeenyanga ezimbini ezizayo. Imali efikelela kumashumi amabini anesithandathu ezigidi zeerandi ibonelelwe lo msebenzi. Kumajelo esebe, amalungu athe awanelisekanga lulibaziseko oluphambili, esithi abantwana bayaphazamiseka ekufikeni kwabo ezikolweni. Abakhi abonyuliweyo baya kuqala amalungu emisebenzi ukuze ngaloo ndlela nabantu basekuhlaleni bafumane amathuba emisebenzi ngeli xesha loqhagamshelwano.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseKing William's Town baxelele ikomiti yolawulo lwasekuhlaleni ukuba imigaqo-nkqubo yokunikezelwa kwamanzi acocekileyo ayifezekisi iimfuno zoluntu. Ngaphezu kwazo zonke iingxaki, amakhaya angaphezulu kwezintathu ezigidi ahlala kwidolophu ephakamileyo athwala umthwalo obuhlungu wokungabi namanzi kwiveki yonke. Ingxelo yeyure yokugqibela echazwe ngumphathi wengingqi uMnumzana Sipho Mthembu ibonisa ukuba imithombo yoluntu emithathu ayisebenzi ngendlela efanelekileyo. Ukuze izinto ziguquke, amagosa akwaLocal Municipality afike esikolweni samabanga aphezulu eSotobe ukuze aphulaphule izikhalazo zabantu. Ngokwengxelo yenkonzo yoluntu, ukusilela kwamachiza okucoca amanzi nokuxakamleka kwezinto eziqhuqhayo kukhankanywa njengesizathu esiyintloko. Ikomiti yolawulo yethembisa ukuba iqela labakhandi baza kuvakala ngenyanga ezayo ukuze baqale ukusebenza kwimirhumo. Abahlali baxelelwe ukuba baqhubeke ukubika iimeko ezingalunganga kwinombolo

Ngaphezulu kwekhulu lemizi eKhayelitsha naaseLusikisiki babevakalisa ukukhathazeka okugqithisileyo ngokungabikho kwamanzi acocekileyo ezindlini zasekuhlaleni. Olu daba luye lwafika phambi kwekomiti yengingqi emva kokuba abemi bafake izikhalazo ezibhaliweyo kwiziko lwekhomishini yasekuhlaleni ngeveki ephelileyo. Kuye kwachaziwa ngamapolisa ombutho wezolimo namanzi ukuba amanzi lawo ayenqabile ngenxa yolonakaliso lwezikhephe ezithe phantsi komhlaba. Abasebenzi bezempilo baxelele uluntu ukuba ingozi yokugula ngenxa yamanzi angacocekanga iyanda ngamandla, ingakumbi phakathi kwabantwana abasezantsi kweminyaka emihlanu. Ikomiti yengingqi yethembisa ukuba isixhobo sokujonga onakaliso iya kufika kwilokishi ngokukhawuleza. Inkokeli yabahlali uNkosazana Nontobeko Dywili uthe: abantu bakhe bakulungele ukuxhasa nayiphi na inzame yolwakhiwo ukuze ingxaki leyo ipheliswe ngokushesha. Umbutho uqinisekisile ukuba iingxelo zonyengeleko ziya kunikezelwa kurhul

Ngaphezulu kwabasebenzi abangama-2 500 abasebenza kwicandelo lezolimo kummandla waseMathole baxhamle kwinkqubo entsha yoqeqesho olupheleleyo olujolise ekuphuhliseni izakhono zabo zezolimo. Le nkqubo, ekusingathwa ngabameli berhoqo lokuphuhliswa kwamaphandle, iqalise ngoMqungu walo nyaka kwaye ihamba kakuhle kakhulu ngokwengxelo yabaququzeleli. Abafundi bafundiswa ngendlela entsha yokulima eneziphumo ezikhulu, nokusetyenziswa kwemithi yezolimo ngendlela enobukrelekrele ekhusela imveliso nezinto zemveli. Elinye lamalungu omphakathi, uNobesuthu Mnguni waseNgcobo, uthethe ngomdla nathi engxoxweni esithi ufunde izinto ezibalulekileyo ngokulawula umhlaba namanzi ngendlela efanelekileyo. Eli phulo libonwa njengenyathelo elibalulekileyo ekuqinisekiseni ukuba abalimi abancinci naba basebenzi emntwini bangabi ngaphantsi kwabanye. Izikhululo zoqeqesho zivulwe kwizixeko zasemaphandleni ukuze wonke umntu afumane ithuba elilinganayo lokuphucula ubomi

Abahlali basekomkhulu lase-Eastern Cape bazichazile ngokucacileyo izinto abajamelene nazo ngemicimbi yempilo kwizigodi zasemaphandleni. Kwiindawo ezifana nase-Ngqeleni naseMbizana, abantu abaninzi bahamba imigama emide ukuze bafike kwizibhedlele nakwiikhliniki, ngakumbi abo bagulayo okanye abakhubazekileyo. Iziphumo zeengxoxo ezabanjwa ngenyanga ephelileyo zibonisa ukuba amakhaya angaphezulu kwezintathu ezigidi ahlala kude nezibhedlele ezingaphantsi kweekhilomitha ezilishumi elinesihlanu. Imali yonyango ayinakuzalisekiswa ngokufanelekileyo apho iimoto zoonyango zinqongophele khona. Amaqumrhu asebenza kule ndawo axelele abaphathi bamasipala ukuba izixhobo zonyango zidingeka ngokukhawuleza, kuquka iiveyini ezintsha nezabasebenzi abaqeqeshiweyo. Ababekwa uxanduva lokulungisa lo mba ameli akaMasipala basithembisile ukuba bazakubeka izicwangciso zangokukhawuleza phambi kwekomiti yezempilo ngomhla weshumi elinesixhenxe kuMarch kunyaka ozayo.

Ngaphezulu kwabahlali abangamawaka amathathu kwisixeko saseKhayelitsha baxhamle kwiinkqubo zentlekele yokuntswela amanzi emva kwengxelo eyenziwa ngumasipala iNgqushwa ngoLwesithathu weveki ephelileyo. Umphathiswa wemicimbi yendalo yamanzi uqinisekisile ukuba imisebenzi yokuhlaziya izintshi ezimdaka iqalile ngokusesikweni, kwaye iya kuphela phakathi kweyeSilimela. Abahlali abaninzi bebebhiyozela izindululo ze-ogani zikarhulumente ngomonde nangethemba, kuba izinto bezimanyumnyezi kakhulu ngexesha lasehlotyeni. Kubikwa ukuba iziko lempilo laseKhayelitsha nalo belisebenzela ngaphantsi koqoqosho lwamanzi, ibinzana elikhathazayo ngamalungu oluntu anezifo ezinobuhlungu. INkomfa yeNtlalo yabaHlali ebibanjelwe eHemingways Mall ePitoli ilele umcimbi ophelileyo, apho iingcali zamanzi zinike iingcebiso ngendlela yokugcina amanzi ekhaya. Umbutho wokuKhusela iNdalo waPhondo leMpuma Koloni uwongozele uluntu ukuba lucwangcise kakuhle ukusety

Ngaphezulu kwe-5 000 ikhaya kwisithili saseBuffalo City azifumani manzi acocekileyo ngokuthe ngqo, oku kukhokelele kwengxaki enkulu yempilo yabantu. Abahlali baseMonti, ingakumbi abo bahlala kwiindawo zasemaphandleni, babike ukuba imijelo yamanzi iyaphuka rhoqo, imeko leyo ebangela ukuba abantwana baselwe amanzi amabi. Uphando oveliswe yiNkampani yeMicimbi yeMveli yoMasipala lwaseMonti lubonisa ukuba ngaphezulu kwesigxina samakhulu amane esigidi seerandi sidingelwe ukulungisa ingqalelo yamanzi kulo mmandla. Abantu abadala balela ukuba amaxesha amaninzi bacosha amanzi emilanjeni entle, into eyingozi kakhulu. Isigqeba esikhokela iKomiti yoLuntu sixelele abezindaba ukuba kusungulwa iinkqubo ezintsha ukujongana nale meko, kodwa abahlali basasilindele isenzo esomeleleyo. Amaqumrhu azimeleyo asebenza kulo mhlaba acele urhulumente wephondo ukuba angene ngokukhawuleza, ekugxininisa ukuba impilo yabantu asimele ibethelelwe yinkolelo yokuba izinto ziza kulunga ngokuqha ngexesha.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti baxelele iingxaki ezinzima abajongene nazo ngenxa yokusweleka kwamanzi acocekileyo kwiindawo ezininzi zokuhlala. Ukusukela ekuqaleni kwalo nyaka, izakhiwo zokuhambisa amanzi ezidalwa ngexesha lenkampani yasekoloniyeni ziye zaphuka, zishiye amakhaya angaphezu kwewaka elinesibhozo engenawo amanzi afanelekileyo. UNkwenkwezi Dlamini, ongumhlali waseMdantsane osebenza njengomzali othabathe inxaxheba kule mbutho yabahlali, uthe amakhosikazi nezingane baziphatha nzima kakhulu ngokuzalela amanzi kude. ISebe lezaManzi nezaGesi liphendule lisithi liyaqonda ubunzima bale meko kwaye liza kuqala imisebenzi yokuhlaziya izakhiwo zokuhambisa amanzi kungekudala. Kwalaywa ikomiti yokukhangela isisombululo esisigxilileyo neza zisebenze ngokushesha ngaphambi kokuba ubusika buqale ngokupheleleyo.

Ngaphezulu kweentsapho ezingama-4 500 kwilokishi yaseMdantsane, eMonti, eziye zaphila iminyaka emide zingenayo amanzi acocekileyo kwizindlu zazo, ngoku ziyavuya emva kokuba umasipala waseBuffalo City ufake iimpayipi ezintsha kwizitalato ezingaphantsi kweshumi. Lo msebenzi, owaqalwa ngenyanga ephelileyo, ungxenye yohlelo lwamanzi olubanzi oluxhaswe nguRhulumente wePhondo laseMpuma Koloni ngemali engaphezulu kwezigidi ezilishumi elinanye zerandi. Ababalwa kuluntu abathintelekilayo baye baxela ukuba babefaka amanzi ngeenqwelo-mafutha, nto leyo ebabeka kwingxaki enkulu ngenxa yendleko. Iingxelo ziphuma kumaphondo njengoMzimvubu naseKomani zibonakalisa ukuba lo rhulamento wezibonelelo zengqesho nolwakhiwo wenzeka ngokukhawuleza, nangona abanye elindile. Iindibano zabahlali ezibanjwe kwezi ndawo zikhuthaza ukuba amaqela abucala namaziko ezemfundo achukumise izifungo ezinxulumene nokuphuhliswa kokusebenza. Umasipala uqinisekise ukuba umsebenzi uza kuphela ngenyanga

Ngaphezulu kwazo zonke iilali zaseMpuma Koloni, abahlali basekuhlaleni baxelele iingxaki ezigqithisileyo malunga nokulinda amaxesha amade ukufikelelwa kwiinkonzo zempilo. Isibhedlele saseMthatha sifumana amaxesha entshukumo ephazamisekileyo ngenxa yokungabikhona kwezithuthi zoluntu ezaneleyo, okubangela ukuba abaguli bahambe iindlela ezinde ngeenyawo okanye babhatale imali eninzi kwizithuthi zabucala. Umama omnye waseNgcobo, uNomsa Dlamini, wazisa ukuba uye wachitha ubusuku bonke ehleli ngaphandle kwesibhedlele phantsi komvula ngenxa yokungabi nandawo yokulala abafowunelwayo babexelela ukuba azikho. Umasipala waseMthatha uxelele iphephandaba eli ukuba uphethe isicwangciso sokwakha iinkonzo ezintsha, kodwa abakhonzi bokuhlalela abanengxaki ngamaxesha okulindwa. Kubalulekile ukuba amagosa ahambele iilali ngokuqhubekekayo ukuze azive izikhalazo zabantu ngokwayo, endaweni yokuxhomekeka kwiingxelo zodwa.

Ngaphezulu kwekhulu lamakhaya aseMpuma Koloni ayengenawo umsebenzi we-electricity aza kuhlomla ngexesha elizayo emva kwesigqibo esithathwe yiSebe leMicimbi yoLuntu kule veki iphelileyo. Kulandela inkqubo entsha yenkxaso-mali, iintsapho ezifanelekileyo ziza kufumana izixhobo zokukhanya ngokusetyenziswa kwamandla elanga, kwiindawo eziquka iMthatha, iCofimvaba, nakoMani. UNkosikazi Nomsa Dyantyi, ongumhlali waseDutywa, uthe le nkqubo iza kusinceda kakhulu, ngakumbi abantwana abafunda ebusuku. Amagosa karhulumente aqinisekise ukuba inkqubo iya kuqaliswa ngenyanga ezayo, yaye imisebenzi yokufakwa kwezixhobo iya kwenziwa ngabantu basekhaya ukuze kuvulwe amathuba emisebenzi. Amaqumrhu oluntu aceliwe ukuba abhalisele olu hlomelo ngokuthumela izicelo kwi-ofisi yesithili ukuze inkqubo iqhube ngendlela efanelekileyo.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti babhiyozela ukuvulwa kwesikhululo esitsha sokunxiba amanzi eNgqushwa ngoLwesihlanu. Le misebenzi yakhiwa phantsi komnatha woNgqongqoshe wezeMisebenzi yoLuntu, emva kweminyaka emide yabantu bexhomekeke kumanzi amdaka neziqulathi ezilungisiweyo. Ngaphezulu kwamakhaya ali-2 400 kuwo lo mmandla aya kuxhamla kolu lwakhiwo, kubandakanya neelali ezintlanu ezazisoloko zibandezelekile. Inkokheli yoluntu, uMnu Sipho Vokwana, uthe eli nyathelo livelisa ithemba elitsha kubahlali abaninzi. Umzi wokuphela ongekaxhamli ngokupheleleyo ngumzi waselali yaseNgxingxolo, apho imiphandla inezinto ezifuna ukucoca ngaphambili. Ulwakhiwo luza kuphela ngethuba lenyanga kaMatshi, ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe ngabakwamasipala. Iindleko zomsebenzi wonke zifikelela kwisigidi esi-R18, kwaye inkampani yasekuhlaleni uye waqeshwa ukuqinisekisa ukuba amava omsebenzi ahlala kwabahlali basekhaya.

Abahlali baseKhayelitsha baxelele ikomiti yengingqi ukuba imigaqo-nkqubo yeenkonzo zamanzi ayisasebenzi ngendlela efanelekileyo kule nyanga iphelileyo. Amanzi angcolileyo aphuma kumajelo amakhulu amathathu aphantsi komhlaba, aye agalela ezindlwini zabahlali ngaphandle kwasiphelo. Ngenxa yoku, izigulana ezininzi, ingakumbi abantwana abancinci, babhenele kwizibhedlele zekamva. Umphathiswa weenkonzo zekhaya, uNkosikazi Nomsa Dyantyi, ubongoze abahlali ukuba bangaseli amanzi angacwangciswanga ngaphambi kokuba uxilongo lwenziwe. Amaqela ezempilo awela phantsi komasipala athe aqalisa uhlolisiso olugcweleyo ngoLwesihlanu olutshileyo, lokukhangela imvelaphi yale ngxaki inkulu. Kuthiwa imali ephelele kumaziko okuhlaziya ingqalelo iyabangela ukuba ukusebenza kwezixhobo kube ngathi ngumbuzo ongaphendulwanga. Amapolisa neminyango yelokishi bamenywa ukuba babambisane kunye nabasebenzi bezempilo bokuqinisekisa ukuba inkcazelo efanelekileyo ifikelela kuzo zonke izindlu ngokukhaw

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMthatha baxelele izikhalazo zabo kwikomiti yengingqi ngokuswela amanzi acocekileyo ezikhululweni zabo zasekuhlaleni. Ngaphezu kwekhulu leemizi azifumani manzi acocekileyo, nalapho amanzi afika khona, aphuma emgqomeni onuke gqitha. Umama omnye, uNomsa Dlamini, unxibelelane nookomenzi befuna uncedo emva kweminyaka emithathu ehleli kwimeko engenyamezeleki. Ichiza lezonyango likhawuleziswa lisebenzela abantu abagula ngenxa yamanzi amdaka, nto leyo ewuchaphazela umsebenzi wezonyango. Umasipala waseMthatha ukhange uphendule imibuzo ebuziwa ngabezindaba, nangona abahlali bebalule amaxesha amaninzi befuna iimpendulo. Amagosa ezemvelo azise ukuba imithombo yamanzi esikelelekileyo kweli dolophu inokusebenzisa ngelixa, ukuba ulungiso lwenziwa ngokukhawuleza. Abahlali bazimisele ukubonana nookomishinala bephondo ukufuna isisombululo esikhawulezayo.

Abahlali baseNgqushwa bazibongele ukufumana izibonelelo zentlalo zamanzi emva kweminyaka emithathu besilindile. Umkhandlu waselokishini ushicilele ukuba izindlu ezingaphezu kwezibhozo ezineshumi ziya kuxhamlana nentlalo entsha yokulethwa kwamanzi acocekileyo ngokuthe ngqo emizini yazo. Umphathiswa wezidiliya zoluntu, uNksz Nomvula Dlamini, utshilo ukuba lo msebenzi uza kuqalisa ngenyanga kaTshazimpuzi walo nyaka, kwaye uya kuqedwa ngaphambi kokuba kugqibe unyaka wezimali. Ilali yakwaNdlambe, neyayisoloko ixhomekeke kwiimitha zamanzi ezikude, ithathwe njengelali yokuqala ukufumana ezi nkonzo. Ababusi basekhaya nababeli bezindaba baye baxelela ukuba eli nyathelo libalulekile ekuphiliseni izimo zokuhlala zabahlali, ikakhulu abantwana nabadala abahlala kufuphi neendawo ezikude nezithoba ikhaya. Umbutho wezolimo namazwe ommelwane uye wazibophelela ekuhambisaneni nalo msebenzi, ufuna ukuqinisekisa ukuba akukho mntu ushiyekayo ngasemva kumg

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti babhengeze ukuba iphulo lokucocwa kwezitrato nezindawo zoluntu liyaqhuba ngempumelelo, lifikelela kwiindawo ezingaphezu kwamashumi amathathu nambini. Ezi ndawo ziquka iilokishi ezifana naseNgxingweni, eMdantsane nakwaNdancama, apho abantu abaninzi babekhala ngokugubungela kukamquba nezinto ezibolileyo. Iphulo leli, eliqhutyelwa ngokubambisana phakathi komasipala, amaqela oluntu namavolontiya, liqale ngethuba leveki ephelileyo yaye lilindeleke ukuba liphele ekupheleni kwenyanga. Isithethi somasipala sithe imali ebekelwe bucala ukuze kufezekiswe le nto ifika kumakhulu amathathu amawaka eerandi, into ebonakalisa ukuzibophelela kukarhulumente wengingqi ekuphuculeni imeko yempilo yabahlali. Kuyacetyiswa ukuba abahlali bathabathe inxaxheba ngokuzinikezela njengeevolontiya okanye ngokukhomba iindawo ezithe tyaba ezidinga ukunakwa ngokukhawuleza. Iinkcukacha ezongeziweyo zinokufunyanwa kwi-ofisi yomasipala okanye ngekhasi lakhe kwi-inta

Abahlali baseComkhulu, kwiphondo leNtshona Koloni, bathembekile ukuba amaphupha abo owakha izindlu ezihlaziyiweyo aya kufezekiswa emva kweminyaka emide bekhala ngobunzima. Ikomiti yolawulo lwengingqi ibhenele kumasipala waseGeorge, isicela ukuba kuphindwe kuhlolwe amacebo okwakha izindlu ezingama-400 ezithenjiswe kwiminyaka engaphezulu kwesihlanu edlulileyo. Umfanekiso weqhingqwa lokwakha usanda ukutyhilwa ngumasipala, kodwa izahlulo zemali zikaphawulekile ukungalingani nentswelo yangempela yoluntu. Ngokwengxelo yenhlangano engekho phantsi kolawulo lukarhulumente, malunga nezindlu ezingama-250 zinesiqhamo sokuwohloka okothusayo, into ebekwa ingozi yempilo yabantu abadala nabantwana. Usihlalo wekomiti, uNkosazana Nomsa Tukwayo, uthe abahlali abayi kuyeka ukufuna amalungelo abo angokusemthethweni. Iingxoxo phakathi kwekomiti namagosa kamasipala zimiselwe ukuqhubeka ngenyanga ezayo, nalapho kukhangeleke khona ukuba izigqibo ezibalulekileyo ziya kuthathwa ma

Abahlali base-Eastern Cape, ngakumbi abo bahlala kumaphandle aseMpuma Koloni, baxelele iingxelo zikarhulumente ukuba bafumana iinzima ezinkulu ekufumaneni iimpepha-mvume zokuhlala nezinye iimfuno zentlalo. Ikomiti yezolawulo yaseMbhashe ibiphicotha lo mba kwintlanganiso yayo eholiwe, apho kwacaca khona ukuba iofisi yeSebe leMicimbi yaseKhaya isafuna abasebenzi abongezelelweyo ukuze ikhawuleze ngeenkonzo zayo. Ngokwenqununu yalo masipala, uMnu. Sipho Mngqithi, ingxaki enkulu ikukungabikho kweenkonzo zoqhagamshelo kwiindawo ezikude nezixeko. Olu lulibo luye lwathetha ukuba abantu bayabukeleka ixesha namali behamba befuna ezi mpapeha. ISebe leMicimbi yaseKhaya lithembise ukuba lizakuvula iofisi entsha eSikhobeni ngenyanga ezayo, esulela olu shishino lwexesha elide. Amapolisa athile nawo aqale ukuxhasa lo msebenzi ngokunika iinkcukacha zeendawo zokufaka izicelo ukuze abantu bangalahlekelwa lixesha beze emadolophini.

Abahlali baseKomani bade balinda ukufumana iinkonzo zentlalo-ntle emva kokuba izicelo zabo zahlala zingaphendulwanga ixesha elide. Kuvakala ukuba inkqubo yokufaka izicelo zenkamnkam yexesha elide ibinobudanga obukhulu, ibe uninzi lwabantu lwenqaba ulwazi olwaneleyo malunga namanqanaba afunekayo. UMasipala waseEnoch Mgijima uthe, ngenxa yezi zikhalazo, uye waqalisa inkqubo entsha yokufundisa abasebenzi ukuphendula izicelo ngokukhawuleza nangokuphandle. Kucingelwa ukuba ngaphezulu kwabantu abangamakhulu amahlanu baya kungenelela kwiziko lobonelelo-ntlalo elitsha eliya kuvulwa kule nyanga. Olu tshintsho luza emva kweengxoxo eziphakathi kweKomiti yoLawulo lweSithili nababonisi abavela kwiziko lephondo. Kucelwa ukuba bonke abafuna uncedo bafike nezibhengezo zawo onke amaxwebhu afunekayo ukuze inkqubo iqhube ngokushesha.

Abahlali basekhaya baseMonti bade balinda inkxaso-mali yezindlu zikarhulumente emva kokufaka izicelo zabo ngokusemthethweni kwiSebe lezaBasebenzi nokuHlaliswa kwabantu. Ngaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu eembalelwano zafunyanwa ziSebe elo kunyaka ophelileyo, kodwa abaninzi babo bayakuqinisekisa ukuba azikhange ziphendulwe ngexesha elifanelekileyo. Usihlalo weSebe, uMnumzana Sipho Gqwaru, uthe ukuba iinkqubo zokuhlela izicelo zihlolwa ngokutsha ukuze ziphucuke. Ngokwesibhengezo esikhutshwe nguRhulumente wePhondo leMpuma Koloni, imali eqingqiweyo yokunikezela ngezindlu entsha iza kulethwa kwimizi-mveliso ehlelelwe ulwakhiwo phakathi kukaMandulo noMqungu walo nyaka. Abantu abafake izicelo baceliwe ukuba baya kwiiaofisi zeSebe elikufutshane nabo ukuze banikezele ngamaxwebhu abo kwakhona, apho abasebenzi baza kuba khona ukwamkela abo abaziimvelaphi zabo ziyiyo. Ukusilela kwamanqanaba eenkonzo zikarhulumente kwiindawo zasem

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti bazibonele ukukhula kwemida yeenkonzo zikarhulumente ekumiselweni kwezicelo zeempesheni zabadalwa nababhinqileyo abangasebenziyo. Iofisi yeSASSA eKomani ikhuphe ingxelo ebonisa ukuba izicelo ezingaphezulu kwezinkulungwane ezintlanu zifakiwe kwithoba lezinyanga ezidlulileyo, kuquka ezo zasemaphandleni awayeqhelekile ukusinda ngokuhamba imigama emide. Ukuze kungenelelwe kwimeko yokunqongophala kweenkonzo, umaspala waloo mimandla wamemezela ukuba iiveni zeenkonzo ziyakuhamba ziphumle emalokishini amancinci ukwenzela ukusondeza inkxaso kuluntu. Amagosa asebenza kwezi veni afumene uqeqesho olukodwa lokulawula izicelo kwimeko yobunyamezo. UNkosazana Nomvula Damane, ongumhlali waseMpuma Koloni, wathi lo ngutshintsho awayesoloko elulindele, kuba ekuqaleni kwakumfanele ahambe iiyure ezimbini ukuya kwitheko lomaspala. Amanye amaphondo ayazingca ngolu hlobo lwezicwangciso, de urhulumente wephondo wathi uya kuphinda uwuvavanya ngenyanga ezayo inj

Abahlali baseNgqushwa bade balinda inkxaso-mali yamakhaya phantsi kohlelo lukaRhulumente weMpuma Koloni, emva kokusilela kwezicelo zabo ngenxa yeempazamo kwimpepha-mpahla. Ikomiti yolawulo yasekuhlaleni ithe yaqokelela abantu ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amathathu ukuze bayalele ngeendlela ezithe ngqo zokuhlaziya impepha-mpahla yabo. Umasipala wasekuhlaleni, ngenxa yokunyusa amandla ezinkonzo, wathuma izikhulu kwizithili ezahlukahlukeneyo ukuze zincedise iintsapho eziswele. Kwiindawo ezikude namaziko ombuso, abantu abaninzi babebaleka amabanga amade ukuze bafike kwiofisi zikaRhulumente, okwabangela umonakalo omkhulu kwimicimbi yabo. Ukongezela apho, iSebe loPhuhliso loLuntu likhuphe isaziso esithi zonke izicelo kufuneka zifakwe ngaphambi komhla weshumi elinesixhenxe kule nyanga. Abantu bayacelwa ukuba bazise impepha-mpahla efanelekileyo, kuquka iincwadi zokuzalwa namaziko abanesikhundla sobuhlali, ukuze uhlelo luqhube ngempumelelo

Abahlali baseNtlango-Ntshona bexelelwe ukuba izicelo zokuba namakhaya amatsha kufuneka zifakwe ngokuthe ngqo kwiOfisi yoMasipala wengingqi yabo, ukuze inkqubo iqhube ngempumelelo. Emva kweentlanganiso ezininzi ezazibanjelwe kwiindawo zoluntu, abaphathi bawachaza kakuhle amanyathelo okufaka izicelo, kuquka ukuzisa amaxwebhu afana nesatifikethi sokuzalwa, isazisi, nangcombolo zomhlaba. Kucetyiswa nabahlali ukuba baqale olu nqeleselo ngokukhawuleza ngenxa yokuba amaxesha okuqhuba le nkqubo anomda. UMasipala uqinisekisa ukuba bonke abafaki-zicelo bazakufumana impendulo ngaphakathi kweeveki ezibini. Ukungathobeli imithetho emiselwe kunokubangela ukuba isicelo singamukeleki, kwaye into efana nolo hlobo ingabeka umphathi wasemzini ecaleni. Iingxelo zivela ukuba ngaphezu kwamakhaya angama-500 asele ewufumene uncedo olunje ukusukela ekuqaleni konyaka, nto leyo ebonakalisa ukuba inkqubo iyasebenza kakuhle xa imithetho ilandelwa ngokuchanekileyo.

Abahlali baseKomani bade balindele ukuba iinkonzo zoluntu zifikele ezifama nakwimimandla yasemaphandleni. Emva kweentlanganiso ezininzi namagosa ombutho weNkamnkam yeDolophu, kwaqinisekiswa ukuba isicwangciso esitsha sokuphumeza iinkonzo zamanzi ezicocekileyo siyaqhubeka ngamandla. Olu hlengahlengiso luza ngemva kokuphanda okwenziwa nguRhulumente wePhondo, apho kwafumaniseka ukuba amakhaya angaphezulu kwawaka amathathu ayengenawo ufikelelo kwamanzi acocekileyo. Ngeli thuba, iSebe leMicimbi yoluntu liyacelwa ukuba lusheshise inkqubo yokufaka izicelo zabantu abafuna uncedo lwezindlu. Kwiintlanganiso ezibanjwe kule veki, amagosa ayebeka ingqwalasela kwindlela yokucutha ubudenga obuphakathi kwabafaki-zicelo namagosa eziko. Izikhokelo ezikhutshiweyo zithi wonke umfaki-sicelo makabe neziqinisekiso ezidingekayo ngaphambi kwexesha lomhla wesicelo. Umasipala ucela bonke abemi ukuba bahambelane neenqubo ezibhaliweyo ukuze kugwenywe ukulibaziseka kwenkqubo yokunike

Abahlali baseQonce basazibuza ukuba nini na izicelo zabo zemvume yokwakha ziya kuphunyezwa, emva kweminyaka emibini besilinda impendulo evela kwiSebe lezokuHlaliswa kwabantu. Ukusilinda ixesha elide kunjalo kufake amakhaya amaninzi engxakini enkulu, ngakumbi abo bahlala kwizindlu ezingaphepheli nempilo. Ngokwengxelo eyaziwa ngumasipala waseBuffalo City, zingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezine izicelo ezisalinde ukuphenywa ngokusesikweni. Esi sebe, esazisiweyo ngezihlandlo ezininzi ngeli cala, sithembisile ukuba siza kulungisa inkqubo yokuphendula ngequbuliso. Amacandelo abohlulwe kabusha ukuze kuncediseke ngokulungelelanisiweyo nemisebenzi ngamnye yabasebenzi. Umphathiswa weSebe, ethetha kwindibano yenkonzo yoluntu eholiweyo ngenyanga ephelileyo, uqinisekisile ukuba inkqubo entsha yobuchwepheshe iya kuqalisa ukusebenza ngasekupheleni konyaka wezimali.

Abahlali baseKhayelitsha baxelele ikomiti yolawulo lwedolophu ukuba imigca yokulanda amaxwebhu ezikhundleni zikahulumeni isalinde ixesha elide ngenxa yokungabikho kwabasebenzi abanele. Ngokutsho kwenguqulelo ekhutshwe nguMasipala waseKapa, izicelo ezingaphezu kwezintathu ezigidi ziye zafakwa kule nyaka yezimali, kodwa ingxaki yokukhawulelana nezicelo zisaziwa. INdlu yeMicimbi yaBemi ithe izakusebenzisa inkqubo entsha yedigithali ukuze kuncitshiswe ukubithelwa kwabantu kwi-ofisi ngamanye amaxesha angenasidingo. Ukuqeqeshwa kwabasebenzi abaninzi kuzaqala ngenyanga ezayo, kwaye amaxwebhu amaninzi aza kufumaneka ngewebhusayithi kamasipala. Abahlobo beengxaki zoluntu, abaquka nooNondyebo boLuntu, banxuse ukuba abemi baqiniseke ukuba baneenombolo zokuthumela iimemo ngaphambi kokubeka isicelo.

Abahlali baseQoboqobo bade balinda ukufumana iimpepha-mvume zokwakha izindlu kwiminyaka engaphezulu kwemithathu, ngenxa yeengxaki ezinzulu kwiSebe lezokuHlaliswa kwabantu. Izicelo ezininzi zabekelwa bucala ngenxa yokungabikho kwamaxwebhu afanelekileyo, into eyabangela ukunqongophala kweendlu kwelo mmandla. Ukuphendula oku, isigungu sesithili saxelela uluntu ukuba uhlengahlengiso lwezenkqubo luziswe ngenyanga ephelileyo, apho ama-ofisi ezolimo nawamanzi azakusebenzisana neSebe lezoPhuhliso loLuntu. Oku kuthetha ukuba abantu abathe bafaka izicelo bangafikelela kwiinkonzo ngendlela efikelelekayo kakhulu. Abaculi bezicelo baxelelwa ukuba basebenzise inkqubo entsha yedijithali, kodwa abaninzi basele bechalaza ukungabi naso isixhobo sokufikelela kuyo. ISebe lithe linika ingqalelo le nto kwaye lizakubeka iiveni zenkxaso kwiindawo ezikude.

Abahlali baseKomani bade balinda inkqubo yokufumana iincwadi zokuzalwa nezezimvo zehlabathi, emva kweminyaka emithathu yokukhalazelana namagosa karhulumente. Ukuze kufezekiswe ezi mfuno, iSebe lezaseKhaya lihlele iqela labachazi-mtheko nabasebenzi bokubhalisela uluntu ngokuthe ngqo kwiilali ezikude. Ngokweengxelo eziphuma kumasipala waseKomani, abantu abangaphezulu kwezinkulungwane ezimbini bangenisile izicelo ukuze bafumane amaxwebhu abalulekileyo. Kwabonakala ukuba inkqubo yakudala yayibeka imiqathango emininzi, nto leyo eyayiyingxaki kubantu abangafundi ncam. Ngokusebenzisana norhulumente wephondo, amakomiti oluntu axelele abahlali ngeemfuno ezifunekayo ngaphambi komhla wokubhalisa, ukuze ukhephe ixesha. Oosomashishini nabaxhasi bakulungiswa ukuba badlale indima enkulu ekuxhaseni iindleko zothutho lwabasebenzi kwezizithili. Iinkonzo zikarhulumente kufuneka zifikeleleke ngokulinganayo kubo bonke abahlali, kungakhathaliseki indawo abahlala kuyo.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti bexelele ikomiti yolawulo lwengingqi ukuba bayahlutshwa yinqanaba eliphantsi lenkonzo yezempilo kwizibhedlele zoluntu. Ngokutsho kwabantu abangaphezulu kwezinkulungwane ezintandathu abathe babhalisa izikhalazo kule nyanga idlulileyo, iindlela zokufikela ezizibhedlele azanelanga, kwaye ixesha lokulinda lide kakhulu. Umkhandlu weSixeko waseMonti uqinisekisile ukuba amaqela ahlolayo aza kutyelela izibhedlele ezintathu eziphambili ukuze ahlole imeko ngokwasemthethweni. Ngaphezulu koko, iSebe lezeMpilo ePhondweni leMpuma Koloni likhuphe isimemezelo sokuba isicwangciso sokuphucula iinkonzo siya kuthunywa kwipalamente ngenyanga ezayo. Ukuhlolwa kwezibedlele kuza kuquka nokuqeqeshwa kwabo bonke abasebenzi bezempilo abasebenza kula masebe antlekeleyo. Abahlali bacenga ukuba urhulumente asebenze ngokukhawuleza ukuze amaqhuzu abo afezekiswe ngaphambi kokuba isimo sinciphe nangakumbi.

Abahlali baseKomani babetha ikhwelo lokukhawuleza emva kokuphelelwa kweenyanga ezintandathu bezabalazela ukuhlaziywa kwemibhalo yobunikazi bomhlaba. Iimeko zabo zafika phambi kweKomiti yeSebe leMicimbi yoMhlaba nenyanga ephelileyo, apho kwavakala ubungqina obuveza ukuba amawaka abantu amaninzi asalinde iimpendulo ezisemthethweni. Kwathiwa nguMphathiswa owayekhona loo mini ukuba olu daba luza kuthathwa ngokukhawuleza. Iinkqubo zokufaka izicelo zobunikazi zidityaniswa namalungu omphakathi ngokusebenzisa iifom ezintsha ezisemthethweni, eziqikelelwa ukunciphisa ulibaziseko lwemisebenzi. Iyakholelwa iSebe ukuba xa amaxwebhu ecocwa kakuhle, abafaki-zicelo bangafumana izimpendulo zabo phakathi kweeveki ezintlanu ukuya kwisibhozo. Ukuze abantu bafumane usizo oluthe ngqo, iiofisi zika-rhulumende zivulelwe wonke umntu ngokungapheliyo ngoMvulo ukuya kuLwesihlanu ukususela ngo-8:00 kusasa ukuya ku-3:30 emini.

Abahlali base-Mqanduli bade balindle uncedo oluphuma kurhulumente ngokuphathelele kwimisebenzi yamanzi acocekileyo kumazwe abo asemaphandleni. Emva kweentlanganiso ezininzi ezigqithileyo namaziko karhulumente, iSebe lezeMisebenzi yoLuntu ePhondweni leMpuma Koloni lilazisile ukuba kukho iinkqubo ezintsha ezizakuphumeza ukufakwa kwamanzi kwimizi eyi-2 400 engenawo lo msebenzi wokubaluleka. Ngokwengxelo epapashwe yile Sebe, umsebenzi wokuqala wezakhiwo uza kuqaliswa ngenyanga ezayo kwimeko yokuxhasa amakhaya adinga omakho ngokuxhamla. Ababambisana nomsebenzi wolu hlahlo-lwabiwo mali baquka abaphathiswa bezobunjineli nabasemagunyeni bemimandla yenkcukacha-malunga. Abahlali bayacelwa ukuba bazise iingxaki zabo kwii-ofisi zikarhulumente ezisekuhlaleni, apho izicelo ezithe vetshe ziya kuqokelelwa zize zikhutshwe ngokukhawuleza ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba akukho namnye ohlalele emva kwezinkonzo ezibalulekileyo.

Abahlali baseKomani bade balinda ukufumana iimpepha-mvume zoqoqosho olululo emva kokuba iSebe leMicimbi yoLuntu lixelele uluntu ukuba uhlengahlengiso lweenkqubo zomba lo luqhubekeka ngokukhawuleza. Ngokwengxelo eyaziswa ngexesha lentlanganiso yekwota yesithathu, ngaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu abantu abafake izicelo zoncedo lwezindlu baxelelwa ukuba imininingo yabo ayizange ibhaliswe kakuhle kwisistem sombane sekhompyutha. Esi siganeko sikhathaza kakhulu amakhaya asemaphandleni, apho ukuhamba kwezithuthi kuye kube yingxaki enkulu yokufika kwiziko lomthetho. Izikhokelo ezintsha ziseka ukuba zonke izicelo kufuneka zifakwe nge-intanethi okanye kwiziko labanikazi bamashishini eledolophini. Umphathiswa oveleleyo, ngentetho awayinikileyo kowabafundi bezindaba, waqinisekisa ukuba abasebenzi boMasipala baqeqeshiwe ukubopha okhunyelwa oluyingxaki. Kuyakhuthazwa ukuba uluntu luzise izikhalazo zazo ngokuthe ngqo kwiOfisi yoNgqongqoshe ngaphambi komh

Abahlali base-Oliver Tambo basalelwe lilinge lokufikelela kwiinkonzo zoluntu ezifana nezakhiwo zempilo nezikolo ezakhiwe kakuhle, nangona uchwechwel' ixesha luphele besalindile impendulo kwiziseko zikarhulumente. Emva kwendibano yedistrict municipality ngenyanga ephelileyo, izigqibo zathathwa malunga nokunikezelwa kwezixhobo kwizikolo ezisixhenxe eziphantsi kwenkonzo engaphelelanga. ISebe leMfundo lePhondo leNtshona Koloni likhuphe isitatimende esiqinisekisa ukuba izicwangciso zokuphucula izakhiwo kwiindawo eziphambili ziyaqhuba ngokwezicwangciso. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe yikhomishini yophuhliso loqoqosho, ngaphezulu kwamakhaya ayi-4 500 ayakha angafumani amanzi acocekileyo nangona yayikho imali ebekiwe kwimicelo-mbono eqhutywayo. Amagosa kamasipala afanele ukuqinisekisa ukuba imali yomphakathi isetyenziswa ngokuchanekileyo kwaye amaxabiso eenkonzo ezi zibonwe ngamehlo ngabantu asekhona. Ukuxhaswa kwemizi-mveliso encinci namanye amaphulo ophu

Abahlali baseMdantsane badl' iindlebe kwiminyaka emininzi becela ukuba iinkonzo zoluntu ziphucuke kwisithili sabo, ingakumbi ngokuqhelana nokulindwa ixesha elide kumacandelo eenkonzo zempilo nezokuhlawulwa kwemali yenkxaso. Emva kweentlanganiso ezininzi ezenziwe phakathi kwamalungu oluntu namagosa asemthethweni, uMasipala waseBuffalo City ngoku uzimisele ukwandisa inani labasebenzi abancedisana nabantu kumaziko empangelo nakwiziko lezempilo. Iqumrhu lezoPhuhliso loLuntu livakalise ukuba abasebenzi abatsha baza kuqeqeshwa ngendlela efanelekileyo ukuze bakwazi ukuphendula iimfuno zabahlali ngokukhawuleza. Kwiindawo ezisemaphandleni, amakhaya amaninzi asahlangabezana neengxaki zokufumana impepha-mvume yokuzalwa nezinye iincwadi ezifunekayo ukuze afumane inkxaso karhulumente. Oogxa bequmrhu lezeMicimbi yoLuntu bakhuthaza abahlali ukuba bazise izikhalazo zabo ngesiseko soBulumko Besithili ukuze ziphenyelelwe ngokukhawuleza futhi ngobulungisa obufanelekileyo

Ngaphezulu kweentsapho ezingamawaka amathathu kummandla waseRhawutini ziye zafumana iincwadi zokwaziswa malunga nenguquko kwinkqubo yokuhlawulwa kweenkonzo zomzi. Lo msebenzi uqhutywa yiSebe lezeMicimbi yeNdlu, eliqhubekile noqeqesho lwabasebenzi ukuze inkqubo entsha isebenze ngendlela efanelekileyo. Kubemi abaninzi, lo nguquko ubangele isikhathazeko ngenxa yokungaqhelani nendlela entsha yokufaka izicelo ngekhompyutha. Ngenxa yoku, amakhansela asebenzisana namasebe karhulumente ukuze acwangcise iintlanganiso zolwazi kumaphondo akhona. Kwiintlanganiso ezo, abantu bafunda ukusebenzisa iindawo zomnatha zikarhulumente nangona ukufikelelwa kombane nawo umnatha usaliyingxaki ezilokishini. Oosomaqhuzu beSebe baqinisekise ukuba iindawo zokuxhasa abantu ezibizwa ngokuba yi-"help desk" ziya kwandiswa kuzo zonke izithili phambi komnyaka olandelayo.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti bade balindile ukufumana iinkonzo zokuhlanjululwa kwemigaqo yezinto ezibolayo, nto leyo eyayibangela iingxaki ezinzulu empilweni yoluntu. Emva kweentlanganiso ezininzi eziphathelele le ngxaki, iSebe lezeMpilo lephondo lase-Eastern Cape laxelela uluntu ukuba amacebo amatsha aza kusebenza ngokukhawuleza. Ngokwengxelo eyalandelayo, amagosa aphuma kwiSebe lezeMpilo Yendalo athe athunyelwa ukuze aqwalasele imeko yamatyotyombe neziseko zoluntu. Ingenelo yabo ibingaphezu kwekhulu lamakhaya ebebengakhuselekanga. Ukuze kufezekiswe amalungelo abahlali, iSebe lisenabo ubudlelwane obusebenzayo namanye amaSebe kahulumeni, kuquka iSebe lezeNdlu nezeNtlalo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba bagcwalise iifom zokubhalisa kwizikhululo zikahulumenti ezikufutshane, kwaye imveliso yezicelo iza kuphathwa ngamacandelo afanelekileyo ngexesha elifanelekileyo. Uluntu luxelelwe ukuba olo lwazi lunokufumaneka kwiofisi yikaMasipala ngethuba lezivu

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti bade balinda imvume yokwakhiwa kwezindlu zikarhulumente emva kweminyaka engaphezulu kweshumi benikele ngezicelo. Ngoku, uMasipala waseMnquma ubhengeze ukuba inkqubo entsha yokujonga izicelo izakuqaliswa ngomhla wokuqala wekota ezayo, nenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba bonke abafanelekileyo bayafumana inkxaso ngexesha elifanelekileyo. Izicelo ziya kufakwa nge-intanethi okanye kwiofisi zikaMasipala, apho amagosa azakunceda khona abo bangenamava obuchwepheshe. Kuvele ukuba uninzi lwabantu belungakwazi ukuzalisa iimpepha ezifunekayo ngenxa yokungabi nolwazi olwaneleyo malunga nemigaqo. Ngenxa yoku, uMnyango Wezindlu Wephondo uyilungiselele uqeqesho lwamagosa okukhokela uluntu ngendlela efanelekileyo kwaye nangokukhawuleza, ukuze inkqubo yokunikezela ngeenkonzo karhulumente ibe nesidima kwaye inganxaxhwa zizithintelo ezingeyomfuneko.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti bade belinde ukufumana iimpendulo ngezicelo zabo zeendlu zoluntu, nangona izicelo ezininzi zafakwa kwiminyaka engaphaya kweshumi. Kulandela intlanganiso yeKomiti yoLuntu eyabanjelwa ngenyanga ephelileyo, amagosa kaMasipala waseBuffalo City axelele abemi ukuba inkqubo entsha yokuphatha izicelo iza kuqaliswa ngoku kwinyanga ezayo. Le nkqubo iya kubandakanya ukusetyenziswa kwezixhobo zobuchwepheshe ukuze izicelo zilandelwe ngokuthe ngcembe, kuhlehliswe nokusetshenziswa kwamaphepha aneleyo. UMlawuli weCandelo lezeMpilo yokuHlala, uNkszn Nolufefe Maqungo, uthe inkqubo endala yayibangela ukusilela ngenxa yokungabikho kwenqubo ecacileyo yokugcina imirekhodi. Abemi bathenjiswe ukuba bonke abo banezicelo ezilindileyo baya kwaziswa ngobhalo-mfutshane ngeemeko zezicelo zabo ungadlulanga umzuzu weshumi elinesihlanu emsebenzini.

Abahlali baseKhayelitsha babhale izikhalazo ezininzi malunga nokuphucula iinkonzo zikagaqa kule mimandla ingahlwayeli.
