Amanzi acocekileyo, ukunyuselwa kwezibonelelo zentlalo, kunye nokunikwa kwamakhaya amasha zingcipheko ezibalulekileyo ezidingwa nguluntu oluncinci kwanoluphumeleleyo. ISebe lezeMicimbi yeNtlalo lihlangene namaqumrhu abaphathi bezomthetho ukuze liqinisekise ukuba izicelo zenkonzo zisenziwa ngokukhawuleza nakangcono. Ngokwengxelo esakhiwa ngamaphondo, kukho isithuba esikhulu ngexesha elithatyathelwa ukucubungula izicelo, nabona bathe bafaka izicelo kwiminyaka emibini edlulileyo basahleli belinde impendulo. Amagosa asebenzayo kwizikhululo zikarhulumente acele abahlali ukuba bazise zonke iimpepha ezifunekayo ukuze inkqubo iqhubeke ngokukhawuleza. Ikomiti yolawulo lwendawo ihlelwe ukuhlangana ngoDisemba ukuze ixoxe ngendlela yokunceda iimeko eziphuthumayo phambi kokungenwa koNyaka omtsha.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti bajongene nemicimbi eyinkimbinkimbi malunga namaziko okunikezelwa kweenkonzo zoluntu emva kokuba iingxelo zibonakalise ukuba uninzi lwabemi abafumani izatifiketi zokuzalwa ngexesha elifanelekileyo. Isebe lezasekhaya likufuphi nokusombulula lo mba ngokukhulisa inani labakhazethi abaqeqeshiweyo kwiindawo ezikude nezixekwana. Ngokwengxelo yekhomishani yokuhlola iinkonzo zoluntu, amashumi amabini ekhulu zabantu basezilalini bahlala bevela ngesandla ngenxa yokusweleka kwezinto zokubhaliswa okusemthethweni. Iintlanganiso zoluntu zibuye zabamba indima enkulu ekuboniseni abantu abasweleyo indlela yokufaka izicelo kwanokufumana uncedo olufanelekileyo. Igosa elikhulu lombutho wozinzo lweentlalo lithe, ekuthetha nabo babekhona kumsitho wokubulela abasebenzi bomphakathi, ukuba ukulungiswa kobu buqhetseba kwezolawulo kuyimfuneko engamiyo. Kufuneka zonke izicelo zibhaliswe ngokusemthethweni kumaziko afanelekileyo ukuze abantu bakwazi ukufum

Abahlali baseKomani bade balinda inkonzo yokufakwa kwamanzi acocekileyo emakhayeni abo, nawe iminyaka edlulileyo iphelile bengeva mpendulo ecacileyo kwiziseko zophuhliso zengingqi. Emva kweentlanganiso eziliqela ezibanjelwe kwiziko lekhomiti yoluntu, iMasipala yaseEnoch Mgijima ixelele uluntu ukuba umsebenzi wokwakha iminxeba yamanzi uza kuqala ngenyanga ezayo. Iindleko zephulo eli zibalelwa kumashumi amane ezigidi zeRandi, imali eza kunikwa ngumba weNdlela yoNxibelelwano namaPhondo. Ababoneleli ngeenkonzo baxelelwe ukuba baqale ukwenza uthotho lovavanyo lwamazantsi omhlaba phambi kokuba imisebenzi yokuqala iqale ngokusemthethweni. Ngokutsho kweeNkosi zomphakathi, uninzi lwezindlu zisebenzisa amanzi asemigodini, into edalayo ubungozi besimo sezempilo. Amapolisa alo mmandla akhuthaza abantu ukuba babhalisele inkqubo yophuhliso ngokusebenzisa amafom aqikelela njee kwi-ofisi yomasipala okanye nge-intanethi ukusukela ngomhla weshumi nantathu kweyo

Ukusilela kweenkonzo zikarhulumente ekufikeleleni iilali ezikude kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni kuye kwaphakamisa imbambano enkulu phakathi kwemibutho yeentlangano zoluntu nezithili ezikhethiweyo. Abahlali baseQumbu naseNgcobo baxelele amagosa ombutho weSebe lezeMpilo ukuba izibhedlela ezisondeleyo ziswele izixhobo eziluncedo, nalapho iinesi ziphantse zingafikeleleki ngenxa yeendlela ezibi. Esi sifungo sabaxhasi beluntu siphoqe amaqela ovavanyo ukuba ahlole imeko yezibhedlele kwingingqi yonke ngenyanga ephelileyo. Ukongeza, umkomishinala weSebe lezeMpilo wexwayise ukuba iinkqubo ezintsha zokunikezela ngeenkonzo zikarhulumente kufuneka ziqalise ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali. Iingxelo ezisuka koomasipala zezona zibonisa ukuba baninzi abahlali abanemingcele yokufumana izidingo zempilo nakwezothutho. Ngokutsho kwezithetheli zeenkonzo zoluntu, kufuneka kubekhona uqhagamshelwano olubonakalayo phakathi kweSebe kunye nomasipala ukuze ezi nkqubo zingenelele ngokukh

Abahlali baseDoringhoek, kummandla wasemaphandleni eMpuma Koloni, balinde iminyaka emininzi amashishini ezempilo afanelekileyo ngaphandle kwempumelelo. Ngoku, ithuba lifikile — uMasipala waseAmathole uzise ikhwelo lonyango lwasimahla olujoliswe ekuqiniseni impilo yoluntu jikelele. Kulo mkhankaso, abasebenzi bezempilo batyhutyha amakhaya ngamakhaya ukuze bahlole impilo yabazali, abantwana, kunye nabantu abadala. Iingxaki ezifana neswekile, ingcinezelo yegazi, kunye nezifo zomchamo ziqinisekiswa kwangethuba ukuze kusetyenzwe ngokukhawuleza. UNkosikazi Nomathamsanqa Maqula, ongumhlali walapha, uthi lo mkhankaso ulethe ithemba abahlali ababengelalo. Ngaphezu koko, abantwana abangapheliswanga ngetyuinjection bafumana iintyuinjection ngaphandle kwentlawulo. Isebe lezeMpilo leMpuma Koloni likhuthaza uluntu ukuba lusebenzisane nabasebenzi bezempilo ukuze nabo bafumane inzuzo yokusindiswa nokugcinwa kwempilo yabo ngendlela efanelekileyo.

Abahlali beelali zasemaphandleni eMpuma Koloni bexhenye bekhalaza ngobunzima bokufumana iinkonzo zempilo ezisondeleyo, uMasipala waseBuffalo City uziqalile iinkqubo ezintsha zokuzikhusanisa nezifo ezifana noswekile negazi eliphezulu. Kwiminyaka yamahlanu edlulileyo, ucwangciso olukhona lwelinganisa ukuba ngaphezulu kwabantu abangama-40,000 kulo mmandla basebenzisa iikliniki zikahulumeni njengendlela yabo yokuqala yokufumana uncedo lwezempilo. Ngokulandela izigqibo zentlanganiso yeMpalanga, uMasipala uqeshile abasebenzi bezempilo abatsha abazohamba emizini ngokoqoqosho lwenkonzo yomphakathi. Ezi zicwangciso zijolise ekunciphiseni amanani abantu abahamba izithuba eside ukuze bafike ezibhedlele ezinkulu. Amagqirha noonesi bazinikele ukuqeqesha abahlali ngokugcina impilo ekuseni nangokukhuliswa kwendima yemizimba kwimihla ngemihla. Umphakathi uyacelwa ukuba ubambe iqhaza ngokuzimasa amaholo empilo aya kuphinda agcinwe kuwo onke amacandelo eli dolophu kw

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseQonce bexelelwa ngeenkonzo zempilo ezintsha ezizakufikela kwiindawo ezikude nezeembalela, apho inani labantu abangabonanga ugqirha lonyaka wonke likhulile ngamanani athusayo. Icandelo lezempilo lephondo lithe lizakuthumela iinqwelomoya eziphethwe ngoogqirha nabongikazi abasebenzisanayo nabahlali kwiilali ezingenakufikelelwa lula. Ngokwengxelo yonyaka ophelileyo, ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amathathu eemizi azange afikelele nkonzo yokuhlola ugawulayo okanye intsholongwane yesifo sofuba. Ekulandela oku, umkhandlu wase-Amathole uzibophezele ekusunguleni iiklinikie eziphathwayo ezizakuhamba kubafundi nezimame ezinezinciyo ngenyanga nganye. Inkqubo entsha iyakuqala ngenyanga ezayo, ngoko ke abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba baqhagamshelane namagosa asekuhlaleni ukuze bafumane ulwazi oluthe vetshe. UMphathiswa woMnyango wezeMpilo wephondo uthe lo msebenzi awuyi kuphela kwiziphumo zezempilo kuphela, kodwa uzakuqinisa nomnxeba phakathi kukarhulumente nabantu

Abahlali baseMpuma Koloni abaninzi basahlala ngaphandle kwenkonzo yezempilo esezingeni eliphezulu, into ethe yakhathaza iinkokheli zoluntu kule mimandla. Ukusukela ekuqaleni konyaka ka-2024, umbutho wezempilo wesithili uqalise uhlelo olutsha lokuzisa iikliniki ezihambayo kwiziqingatha zamaphandle ezikude nezixeko ezinkulu. Lo rhulumento uzimisele ukulungiselela abantu bakhe ngokubagcina besempilweni nangokubaxhasa ngeenkonzo zokuhlola izifo ezifana nentlungu yeswekile, ingqaqambo, kunye nesifo sephepha. Abaveleli bezempilo bathi ngamanye amaxesha abantu badlula iiyure ezintathu behamba ukuze bafike ekliniki efuphi. Kolu hlelo, abasebenzi bezempilo bathe bakha izithuthi ezikhethekileyo ukuze bafinyelele izithili ezinqabile. Inkqubo yokufundisa uluntu malunga nokuhlamba izandla, ukupheka ukutya okunempilo, nokusetyenziswa kwenzi yamanzi acocekileyo nakho kuqukiwe kolu luyolo. Ithemba lelokuba ukufikela kwezinkonzo zezempilo kuya kuba ngcono kwiinyanga ezizayo.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti bexhentse ngezandla emva kokuba inkqubo entsha yokugcina impilo emphakathini ithe yafika kwiindawo ekusoloko kuyingxaki ukufikelela khona. Ngaphezulu kwezinye iinkonzo ezifumanekayo, eli phulo libandakanya ukuhlolwa kwegazi, ukuphiwa kweziyobisi zamahhala, kunye nemfundo ngempilo yabantwana. Umama omnye waseNgqushwa, uNkosikazi Nomvula Tshwete, uthe olu hlolo lwanceda wafumanisa isifo soswekile ngaphambi kokuba sibe nzima. Izigulane ezinazo iingxaki ezibuhlungu ziya kufumana inkxaso kwiziko lempilo elitsha elizakuvulwa ngenyanga ezayo. Umbutho wezeNtlalontle weli phondo uqinisekise ukuba abaguli abahlala kude nezibhedlela baya kufumana amakhaya emithi ngaphandle kwenkathazo yokuhamba ibanga elide. Ulwazi oluninzi malunga nezi nkonzo lunokufunyanwa kwi-ofisi yasekuhlaleni okanye ngocingo lwamahhala lwe-0800 ekuxelwe ngalo uluntu.

Abahlali baseelokishini zaseMdantsane ngoku bayavuyisana ngeenkonzo zempilo ezikhawulezileyo ezihlaziyiweyo, emva kweminyaka emide bekhala ngokungabi nanto. Isibhedlele iCecilia Makiwane siphakamise inani labasebenzi balo bempilo, kwaye amagumbi okubonwa kwabantu ahlaziyiwe ukuze ahlangabezane neemfuno zoluntu olukhulayo. Ngokwengxelo yoMnyango wezeNtlalontle yeMpuma Koloni, abantu abangaphezu kwamawaka amathathu baye baxhamla kwiinkqubo zokugcinwa kwempilo ngenyanga ephelileyo kuphela. Ukuqhuba iinkqubo zokukhuthaza impilo ngezinto ezifana nokugcinwa kwezandla nokufumana iimvakalo zentsholongwane kwe-HIV nazo ziqhubeke zihambe kakuhle. Oogqirha nabahlengikazi bathethile nje ngokubaluleka kwezivakalo zempilo ngexesha elifanelekileyo, bexwayisa uluntu ukuba lungalindi de lube semva kokuba imeko isele ixinile. UMasipala waseMdantsane uqinisekisile ukuba iimoto zezempilo ezindwendwela iilali ezikude ziya kuqhubeka zisebenze rhoqo uk

Abahlali baseZithulele bade balinda inkxaso yezempilo ebonakalayo kwimimandla yabo ekhanyayo ngentlupheko. Ngenyanga ephelileyo, abathandi-mpilo nabasebenzi bezempilo bahlanganisana nabantu bendawo ukuze baxoxe ngokubaluleka kokugcinwa kwempilo yomzimba nangokwasemphefumlweni. Umbutho wezempilo wasekuhlaleni uwazisa abantu ngezinkonzo zokukhupha amachiza, ukuhlolwa kwegazi, kunye nokukhuthazwa kokunyangwa kwezigulo ezifana nerhafu nasifo sofuba. Ngapha koko, amanye amakhosi aseNkululekweni athatha inxaxheba enkulu ekuqinisekiseni ukuba abantu abadala nabazali babekhona kulo mbutho. Iingcali ezivela kuMasipala weNdawo bexelele abahlali ukuba amacliniki asondele ngakumbi kuzo zonke izikolo. Ukusebenzisana phakathi korhulumento namavolontiya kuyabonakala njengesiseko esibalulekileyo sokufezekisa impilo eqhubekayo yabantu bonke. Aba bantu baqhube izikhululo zokufundisa izanele ngeendlela zokuhlamba izandla nokunqanda ukusulelana kwezifo.

Abahlali basePhondo leMpuma Koloni babhengeze ukuvuya kwabo emva kokwaziswa kwenkqubo entsha yezempilo ejonge ukunceda amakhaya asemaphandleni. Le nkqubo, ebizwa ngokuba yiSizwe Sempilo, izakuqinisekisa ukuba iinkonzo zezempilo ziyafikeleleka kuwo onke amaphondo angekafumani uncedo olufanelekileyo. Ngenxa yobukude beziko lezempilo elinye elizidli iimayile ezininzi, abahlali abaningi bebeswele amathuba okuba bahlolwe ngexesha elifanelekileyo. Usihlalo welokishi uNkosikazi Nomsa Dlamini uthe le nkuqwelo yenza ukuba isidima sabantu esikhulukazi sigcineke. Ngokwengxelo yoMnyango wezeNtlalontle, iinqwelo-mafutha zonyango ezintsha zizakuqhuba rhoqo ngeeveki ngeeveki ukuze kuhlolwe impilo yezakhamzi, kuquka nokuphunyezwa kwezigulo ezifana nethuba nentliziyo. Kubalulekile ukuba iimizi-mveliso nezinye iziphathimandla zincedisane nohulumeni ukuze le nkqubo iphumelele ngokupheleleyo nokuqinisekisa impilo eqinileyo yabantu bon

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti babeqokelene ngomhla weshumi elinesithathu kwinyanga ephelileyo, befumana ulwazi olubalulekileyo malunga nempilo yoluntu kunye neendlela zokukhusela iintsapho zabo ekufunyanweni kwezifo. Umkhankaso wolimo lwempilo, owaqhutywa ngamagosa onyango, wagxila kakhulu ekufundiseni abantu ngokubaluleka kokugcinwa kwamanzi acocekileyo, ukutyiwa kwetyiwa ekuhlolweni kwegazi, kunye nokunikela ngokupheleleyo kwimigca yezonyango yasekuhlaleni. Abafazi abakhulileyo baseNgqushwa babonakale benomdla omkhulu, bengena amakhaya bephethe amaphepha olwazi ababewunikwe ngabaniki-nkxaso benkqubo. UNkosikazi Nomvula Siyanda, ongumhlali wakhona, wazichaza njengomama okhathazekileyo malunga nempilo yabantwana bakhe, esithi lo mkhankaso wamnceda kwangoko ukuba aqonde ukuba makenze ntoni. ISebe lezeMpilo likhuthaze wonke umntu ukuba eze kwiindawo zohlolo ngaphandle kwesoyikiso, luqinisekisa ukuba iinkonzo zinikwa ngokulinganayo kubantu bonke.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMthatha bade bahlala bekhala ngenqaba yenkonzo zempilo ezifumaneka kufuphi nendawo zabo. Kunyaka ophelileyo, urhulumente wesifundazwe wamemezela inkqubo entsha yokuxhasa iikhliniki zasekuhlaleni, nekujoliswe ekuqinisekiseni ukuba wonke umntu unelungelo lokufumana unyango ngaphandle kwemigca emide. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe ngamaziko ezempilo, ngaphezulu kwamashumi amabini eepesenti labantu basemaphandleni babekhawuleza banikwa amayeza angundoqo amanqamlezwa. Inkqubo entsha iquka ukuqeqeshwa kwabasebenzi bezempilo abazakuhamba bemka mzi ukuya kwimizi ngamizi, besalatha uluntu ngezigulo ezinjengesifo seswekile nenkcubeko yempilo entle. Uhlelo lwezithuthi ezintsha luze luncede ekusiqhubeni eli phulo lufikelele nasezindaweni ezikude. Iziphathimandla zikhuthaza bonke abahlali ukuba babambisane neli phulo, kuba impilo yoluntu iyimfuneko eyeyona yintloko ekwakhiweni komzi onamandla.

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMthatha bade balinda ukufumana iinkonzo zempilo ezifanelekileyo kwilokishi yabo. Inyanga ephelileyo, uMasipala wesithili waqalisa umkhankaso omkhulu wokugcina impilo yabantu, uquka ukuhlahlwa kwezigulo ezisoloko zibulala abantu ngokungasheshiyo, njengesifo seswekile nentliziyo. Kwindawo yokuhlala yakwaNompumelelo, amakhulu abantu afika ngokukhawuleza ukuzifaka igama ukuze bafumane ezi nkonzo. Ngokotshintsho oluphawulekayo, uninzi lwabantwana bakho amayeza nokugcinwa ngengqalelo kwizigulo zobuntwana. Isithethi sikaMasipala sithe le migudu iyinxalenye yegoso lasezweni lokwandisa ukufikeleleka kweenkonzo zempilo kubantu abahlala kude nezixeko. Iziseko zempilo kulo mmandla ziye zahlaziywa, nabasebenzi bempilo bongezelelwe ukuze babhenele kwimfuno ekhulayo. Kuhlwa nomvisiswano phakathi kukaMasipala namaziko apho ukunyangwa kwenzeka ngokukhawuleza, ilinge elisenza ukuba uluntu luhlale luphile ngokuqinisekileyo.

Abahlali baseNtshona Koloni baxelele ikomiti yezempilo ukuba imizi emininzi ayifikeleleki ngamanzi acocekileyo, nto leyo ebonakalisa ingozi enkulu kwimpilo yoluntu. Ngenxa yale meko, amaphulo olwazi malunga nohlanza lwamanzi anyanzelekile ukuze achane izifo ezifana noburhulumente. IRed Cross yesiXhosa, kunye neenkonzo zikarhulumente, ziqalise ukuhamba kwiindawo zasemaphandleni ukuze zinikeze abantu ulwazi olufanelekileyo. Imali eninzi yabiwe ngurhulumente wephondo ukuqhuba iinkqubo zezempilo ezifaka ukuhlola abantu abaninzi ngexesha elinye, ngakumbi kubantwana nabantu abadala. Iziko lezempilo baseKomani ngambe abantu abangaphezu kwamawaka amathathu kwinyanga ephelileyo, ekunika ingqwalasela ngeNkosi yokulumkela isifo sePhepha. Izinto ezibalulekileyo ezinikwa abantu zifaka iimfundiso zokuhlamba izandla, ukutya okusempilweni, kunye nokuya kwigqirha ngaphambi kokuba isifo sibe nzima. Ukuzibandakanya koluntu kule misebenzi kusebenza ngokuba kunciphisa umthwalo wez

Abahlali bendawo yaseMdantsane bade balinda inkxaso yezempilo ngaphambi kokuba ikhliniki yendawo iphinde ivulwe ngokusesikweni kwiveki ephelileyo. Ngokwengxelo eyabekwa ngamagosa ePalamente yePhondo, abantu abangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezine babefumana iimveliso zezempilo ngendlela engahambelaniyo ngenxa yesililo sabasebenzi ebesidla ubomi kweyeSilimela. Injongo yomkhankaso omtsha wezempilo kukuqinisekisa ukuba abantu bonke, ikakhulu abadala nabo banezifo ezingaphiliyo, bafumana uxhaso ngaphandle kwemiqoyo. Kwiintlanganiso ezibanjwe ngawo wonke amasebe, kucetyiwe ukuba izithuthi zonyango zikhawuleziswe ukuze zifinyelele kwiindawo ezikude. Isisombululo esisiso asimele sibekwe nje phantsi kwamagosa – sifuna uzibandakanyo ngokupheleleyo loluntu. Umphathiswa wezempilo waseka iqela elitsha lobuchule lokuqeqesha abasebenzi basekhaya ukuze baxhase amakhaya angenawo amandla okuya kwizibhedlele. Uluntu lucenga urhulumente ukuba luzive luvakaliwe kwizigqibo ezina

Abahlali baseDoringhoek basebenza ixesha elide belinda inkxaso yezempilo esondeleyo emizini yabo. Ngale nyanga, iinkqubo zokugcina impilo yoluntu zifikile kwimimandla engafikeleleki lula, zinikeza uluntu ukuhlolwa kwegazi, iimfundo ngezakhiwo zomzimba, kunye nezicwangciso zokhefu lweengqondo. Ngaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu wabantu abadala nolutsha baye baxhamla kwezi nkonzo kwiveki enye kuphela, into ebonakalisa imfuno enkulu kule ndawo. Ukuqhuba kwezi nkqubo kuthe kratya amathuba okuba abahlali bafumane oluleko lwezonyango ngaphandle kokuhamba ibanga elide ukuya ezibhedlele. Oogqirha nabasebenzi bezempilo bezisebenzile ngokungathandabuzekiyo, belungiselela nababancinane nabadala ngokulinganayo. Izicelo zokuba le nkqubo ibuye rhoqo ziye zazwa ngabacwangcisi, ababethembisa ukuqhubeka nokwandisa ufikelelo lwezempilo nakubantu abaphila kwiindawo ezikude nezixeko.

Kwiidolophu ezincinane zaseMpuma Koloni, amashumi amane eepesenti yabantu abangenamfundo ngempilo yabantwana abancinci azange afumane imfundiso efanelekileyo malunga nokondla ngendlela efanelekileyo. Ukuphendula lo mba, iZiko lezeMpilo leMveli lihole inkqubo entsha yokukhuthaza impilo yoluntu, iqaliswe kwizithili ezingamashumi amabini anesibhozo kulo nyaka. Amavolontiya asebenzayo kulo msebenzi aye akwazi ukufikelela kumakhulu amabini eentsapho ngenyanga enye kuphela. Ngokwezibalo ezisand' ukupapashwa, isibalo sabantwana abahlupheka yindlala sehle ngesishiyagalombini eepesenti kwizifunda apho le nkqubo isebenzayo khona. Oonurse nabasebenzi bezempilo bahamba baye emakhayeni ukuqinisekisa ukuba amayeza athetha ngokwenene afikelela kwabo bakudingayo. Iindibano zoluntu zibanjwa kanye ngenyanga, apho kunikwa khona imfundiso ngamayeza okugcina ubomi, ukugcinwa kwempilo, neendlela zokukhusela izifo ezidluliswa ngamanzi. Iinkokheli zoluntu zithe, ziyaqhuba nokukhuthaza iz

Abahlali baseDolophu yaseMonti bade balinda inkqubo yezempilo esasazekileyo ngoku isondele kumakhaya abo. Ngenyanga ephelileyo, iqela lezonke iinkonzo zempilo liqalise uhambo lokusukela endlwini ukuya kwenye, lunikezela izifundo ngokubaluleka kokukhanya kwezandla, ukuxhejwa kwezinto zokulawula isifo soswekile, kunye nokuhlolwa kwegazi. Ngaphezu kwamakhulu amabini eekhaya aphinda-phindeneyo amadoda, abafazi, nabantwana banikezela oku kuqhekeza okukhulu kwezempilo ngamalanga amahlanu kuphela. UNkosazana Nomsa Dyantyi, ongumhlali waseTinarha, uthe ukufikiswa kwezinkonzo kwakhe ekhaya kubonisa ukuguquguquka okwenyani ekubambezelweni okudala. Umasipala uqinisekile ukuba aba bahlali bayaziwa ngamalungelo abo kwezempilo nakwezinkonzo zoluntu. Olu hambo lwezempilo luzakuqhubeka kwiindawo ezinesidingo nakulo nyaka, lusekelwe zinkqubo zosodolophu kunye nabasebenzi beZiko leZempilo leMpuma Koloni, kuxhaswa ziinkampani zoluntu ngothando.

Kwiidolophana ezingaphezu kweshumi elinesihlanu kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, abahlali baqale ukufumana inkonzo yokugcinwa kwempilo ngendlela engaphambanga. Emva kwentlanganiso yebhunga lomasipala ngenyanga ephelileyo, kwaxoxwa ngomba wokuqinisekisa ukuba abantu basekhaya basondele kwiinkonzo zezempilo ngaphandle kwemfuneko yokuhamba ibanga elide. Amasebe aphakamileyo okukhathalela impilo asungule inkqubo entsha yokutyelela iilali ezikude, apho abasebenzi bezempilo beya kufundisa uluntu ngokuzikhusela kwizifo ezisasazekayo. Ngokwengxelo yosodolophu wendawo, uninzi lwabantwana abangaphantsi kweminyaka emihlanu basafumana imikhuzi efanelekileyo ngobukhulu bengxaki yokusweleka kwezibhedlele zasekuhlaleni. Abantu abadala nabakhubazekileyo bathathwa njengobalulekile kuluhlu lokuqala lwabafumana le nkonzo entsha. Umnqweno walo msebenzi kukuqinisekisa ukuba impilo yoluntu iphuhla ngokulinganayo, nangona iimeko zezezimali zisekho njengomqobo omkhulu kulo mzamo ubalulekileyo.

Abahlali baseNgcobo baye bahlala ixesha elide belindele inkonzo yempilo ekufutshane nendawo yabo, bekhangeleka ngathi amalungelo abo empilo awathathwa ngokungazelelwanga. Ngenyanga ephelileyo, uMasipala waseMbhashe wazisa umkhankaso omkhulu wezempilo owuquka ukugcinwa kwabantwana, ukuhlolwa kwegazi, nokunikezwa kwemithi yabantu abaphila ne-HIV. Ukufikela kwezisebenzisi zempilo kunabantu abangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezine, bewela iilali ezahlukeneyo ukuze befumane ezi nkonzo ngokukhululekileyo. Kumaxesha amaninzi, abantu abadala nezigulana ezinobuthathaka babeswele izithuthi zokufika kwizikhululo zezonyango. Lo mkhankaso wehlula le mbandela ngokutyhutyha iilali ngokusebenzisa iiveni zokomba-ndlela. Ngokwengxelo yoMphathiswa wezeMpilo wephondo, lulwela ukwandiswa kwezi nkonzo kwazo zonke izithili ezisemaphandleni ukuze kungabikho mntu uselwa ngasemva ekugcinekeni kwakhe.

Abahlali baseDolopu laseQonce bade balindele inkonzo yezempilo efikelela kwindawo zabo ngokuthe ngqo. Ngenyanga edlulileyo, uMasipala waseMnquma wabambisana neNgxowa-mali yezeMpilo yoMmandla ukuze kutyalwe amagumbi ezonyango entlalontle kwizithili ezisixhenxe eziye zangabi nazo ingqalelo yaneleyo. Ngaphezu kwabantu abangama-4 500 abafumene unyango lokuqala kuphela kunyaka ophelileyo, izibalo zibonisa ukuba isidingo senkonzo esisondeleyo sikhulile ngokulinganayo. Kwiindawo zasemaphandleni, abafazi abakhulelweyo babephila ngengozi ngenxa yokuba izibhedlele zazikude ngamakhilomitha amaninzi. Izikhululo ezikhawulezayo zezonyango sele zivuliwe kwizithili ezintathu, ngelixa ezikhona ziyanqatshelwa ngokwemigaqo emitsha yezempilo. Oonzala bezempilo baqhubeka beqeqeshwa ukuze babenako ukusabela ezilalini ngexesha lamaxhala. Umphathi woMasipala uthe, "Asizukuyeka lukhuni de umhlali wonke afumane unyango ngendlela efanelekileyo kwaye ng

Kwiidolophana ezingaphezu kwamashumi amathathu kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, abahlali basebenzisa iindlela ezinde ukufikelela kwiinkonzo zempilo ezisisiseko. Ukuphendula eli ngxaki, uMasipala waseMbhashe uqale umkhankaso wempilo ophuma ezilalini, esinikezela ngezicwangciso zokugcinwa kwempilo, ukuhlolwa kwegazi, nokunikezelwa kwemithi yasimahla. Unobuhle Mfenyana, umhlengikazi ophambili kwiclinic yaseNgqeleni, uthethe ngelizwi elinamandla ngokubaluleka kokufikela kubantu phakathi kwabo. "Asimlinganisi umsebenzi wethu ngokwamanani kuphela — sihlangabezana nabantu apho bahlala khona," watsho. Ngokoohlobo lwenkqubo entsha, iimoto zomnqophiso ziyahamba rhoqo ngenyanga, zifika kwiilali ezikude apho enye yeziko zempilo ingabikho khona. Iipalamente zazo ezichukumisayo zibonisa ukuba inani lokuhlolwa kwabantu lineenkcazelo ngamakhulu kweli nyaka nje. Inkqubo ithathwa njengesixhobo esiphambili esibonakalisa indlela urhulumente angaxhasana nayo nabantu.

Abahlali baseNtlango yeKapa bade balindele inkonzo yezempilo efikelela izindlu zabo ngokukhawuleza. Ekuqaleni konyaka wama-2025, uMasipala waseNtshona Koloni wazisa inkqubo entsha yokuphucula ukufikelela kweenkonzo zezempilo kumaphondo asemaphandleni. Ngokwe-nkqubo le, amagqirha nabahlohli bezempilo baya kubatyelela abantu emakhayeni abo rhoqo ngeveki, bebonelela ngookusela, iimvavanyo zegazi, kunye noncedo lokulwa ne-TB nokuhlolwa kweHIV. Umphathiswa wezempilo wePhondo uphefumle ngokuqiniseka ukuba akukho mntu uza kusalwa ngasemva ngenxa yobungakanani bendlela. Abazali abangaphezulu kwamakhulu amahlanu bale ndawo baye bafumana iimvavanyo zezigulane zezinto zabantwana ngexesha elifutshane. Ukunqongophala kwezithuthi kunye neendleko zokuhamba kwakungawo amaqhinga amakhulu awayekhaba abemi baphoqa ekufumaneni uncedo. Ngoku, inkqubo yezi zithuthi zenyanga zizisa amathuba entando kubantu bonke, nokuba bahlala kude kangakanani na kwiziko lez

Kwiidolophana zasemaphandleni zeMpuma Koloni, abahlali baninzi abangenalo ulwazi olwaneleyo malunga nokubaluleka kokunqanda izifo phambi kokuba zivelise ingxaki enkulu. Inyanga ephelileyo, uMasipala waseAmathole waqala inkqubo entsha yempilo yoluntu, ebambisene neenkonzo zezempilo zePhondo, ukuze kufundiswe abantu ngemikhosi yokuhlanjwa kwezandla, ukusebenziswa kwezigcina-manzi ezicocekileyo, kunye nokubaluleka kwemithi yokugcina impilo. Izigqibo-zempilo neenesi zihambela iilokishi ezahlukeneyo, bezisa ulwazi ngqo kuzo zonke iinkalo zoluntu, kuquka nabantu abadala abahlala kude nedolophana enkulu. Abazali babantwana abancinci bayakhuthazwa ukuba balise abantwana babo kumakhaya aphilileyo ukuze bafumane izigcina-mpilo neenkqubo zokugcina impilo. UNksz. Noluntu Madikizela, onguNurse kwisixeko saseKomani, uthe le nkqubo iseza ngenye indlela yokukhumbusha uluntu ukuba impilo yabo ixhomekeke ekuziphatheni kwabo mhla ngemihla. Iinkonzo zezempilo ziy

Abahlali beelali zaseMpuma Koloni baye bathatha inxaxheba enkulu kumathuba ekhaya lempilo awabelwe ngoomasipala bommandla. Ngaphezulu kwabantu abangama-5 000 bafumene iinkonzo zezempilo simahla kwiveki ephelileyo kuphela, kuquka uhlolo lwengqondo, ukuhlolwa kwezifo ezifana nentlupheko yegazi kunye nesifo seswekile. Unyango lwezempilo luye lwaqinisa umzamo walo wokufika kwiindawo ezikude nekhaya ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba abantu abaneengxaki zokuhamba nabo abafumaneli nzima ukufikelela kwizibhedlele bafumana ukhangelo oludingekayo. Kwiinqila nezilali ezininzi, iinqwelo-mafutha zemobile clinic ziye zangena kumazibuko aqhele ukungafikeleleki. UNkosi Nomvula Dlamini, ohlala kwilali yaseNgqeleni, uthe uvakalelwa ngokuthi abantu bakhe baye babona umahluko omkhulu kwimpilo yabo ngolukhangelo. Urhulumente wephondo uyaqhuba nomsebenzi wokwandisa le nkqubo ukuqinisekisa ukuba akukho mntu usishiywa ngasemva kwimicimbi yezempilo.

Kwiilali zasemaphandleni eMpuma Koloni, amakhaya amaninzi ahlalelwe ngabantu abadala nabantwana asweleyo ukufikelela kwiinkonzo zempilo zasekuhlaleni. Iziko lezempilo eliseGcuwa libunyaziwe emva kwekhempeyini entsha yolwazi yoMnyango wezeMpilo, apho abasebenzi bezempilo bahambele imizi ngokubuqu ukufundisa abantu ngokubaluleka kokugcinwa kwempilo esempilweni. Ngaphezulu kwabantu abangama-4 500 baye bafumana iimfundo eziphathelele ekuhlambeni izandla, ekusebenziseni amanzi acocekileyo, nasekuphembelela ukutya okunempilo. Wonke umntu unelungelo lokufumana inkathalo yezempilo ngokulingana, ngoko ke ezi ngcinga mazixhaswe ngamandla ngamalungu oluntu jikelele, watsho uGqirha Nomvula Dlamini ngethuba ethetha kuhlanganwano loluntu. Ikhempeyini iqhuba ixesha leminyaka emibini, kwaye abasebenzi bezempilo bafundiswa ngamandla ukwandisa inani labantu abacelwa usizo. Imizamo enjalo iyafuneka ngokukhawuleza ukujongana nemiceli mngeni yezempilo ejongene namaph

Abahlali baseDoringhoek, apha kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, balinde ixesha elide ukuze bafumane iinkonzo zempilo ezifanelekileyo ezisondele kubo. Ngenyanga ephelileyo, iqela labezempilo baphuma besiya kulo mmandla beqhuba umkhankaso wokugcinwa kwempilo yoluntu, befundisa abantu ngokubaluleka kokugqunywa kwezilonda kunye nokugcinwa kweendlela zokulwa nezifo ezifana nethbhesi nengqele. Kwiintlanganiso ezabanjelwa phantsi kwamathunzi emithi, amagqirha nabahlengikazi bachaza ngokuphandle iziphumo ezinzima zokunganakani kwempilo. Iintsapho ezazihleli kude nezibhedlele zandiswa ngolwazi olubalulekileyo nangezinto zokuphila ezisisiseko. UMasipala wasekuhlaleni uqinisekisile ukuba ezi zinto zifundiso ziya kuqhubeka rhoqo yonke iminyaka, ukuze akukho luntu lusalahliwe kwiinkonzo zikahulumeni. Iinkokeli zeelali zibonise ukwaneliseka, zikhuthaza uluntu ukuba luqhubeke luxhasa ezi nzame zempilowethu yobuqu nokulondoloza impilo yonke imiphakathi.

Bantfwana labadvulile base tikolweni tasemaphandleni yaseSwatini bahlangabetana netingcuphe letiningi ekufundzeni, kuhlanganisa kushoda kwetincwadzi tekufundza kanye nematfupha labafanele. Likhomishini lemikhuba yetemfundvo likhiphe umbiko lowetfula kutsi emakoliji nayunivesithi base eSwatini kufanele ukutsi awandise imitsetfo yekwemukelwa kwabafundzi labavela etigodzini letisekucineni kwelive. Ngekwelumbiko leli, inani lebafundzi labayekela tifundo ngaphambi kwekuphela kwaletinyanga letishumi nambili lenyaka likhula ngekushesha ngalokwesabekako. Tiphatsimandla talive tiphendule kule nkhinga ngekumemezela inhlelo yekutfutfukiswa kwetindlu tetikolo letisha, ikakhulukwatsi letisesifundzeni saseHhohho naleseShiselweni. Ngetulu kwaloko, umnyango wemfundvo usuqale ukusebentisa liphrojekthi lekupha bantfwana labahluphekile imali yekubasite netidzingo tetifundvo, kufana nematfupha netincwadzi. Tifundzi letivela emikhayeni lemidzala tifaka litsemba ekuphileni kw

Emaskoleni lamanyenti emaphandleni, bantfwana labanyenti basabhekane nendzaba yekungabi nemabhuku lanele nekutfola imfundvo lephilile. Kulandzela loku, iNgwenyama neHulumende wetive kanye neNdzabuko bafake umkhankaso losha wekusita lemasikole laswelekako ngekuwanika tincwadzi kanye netitfomelo tekufundza. Umnyango weMfundvo ubike kutsi tigodzi letahlukene tibone kuvulwa kwetikolo letintsha letindlulela kutigodzi tesifunda ngetulu kwemashumi lasikhombisa. Bantfwana labadzingekako batawutfola luncedo ngalolikhono, kuhlanganise nekudla ekhaya kwentfutfuko yabo. Tiphatsimandla temfundvo tikhuthata batali kanye nebantfu bemiphakathi kutsi babambisane naletimiso, ngoba ekhono lakhe lelimbi lelimanti lifundzwa nguye.Ngetindlela letijulile, inhloso yeHulumende kukwakha sisekelo semfundvo lesimtsetfweni lesingatakhelela likusasa lelikhanyako labantfwana beSewula Afrika neSwatini ngekuhlanganyela.

Tingcola letingaphezu kwematfupha ngemkhakha waseNingizimu Swatini tisulelwe ngekushoda kwetitfutselo tekufundza, njengobe titfutselo letifanele tifika ezifundzweni letisemaphandleni tingakafiki ngalokwanele. Bantfwana labanyenti bahamba imayela leyingangemashumi lamabili ngosuku lulodvwa baze bafinyelele etikolweni, kube yinkathazo lenkhulu kubo neyemindeni yabo. Hulumende waseSwatini uyamemukela lenkinga futsi ukhiphe sisindziso semali yekwakha tiguma tetifundza letitfisha emaphandleni lamanyenti. Sikhulumi se-Ministry of Education neLutfwalo, Dokotela Nomcebo Dlamini, ukhulume embikwenhlangano yetincumo yetimphilo tekufundza kutsi tintfo titawuguculwa ngaphambi kwakulapho kuphela kwesikhatsi semnyaka wekufundza. Ngaphandle kwaloko, tikolo letinsha tawutsi tilungiswe ngetincubo letiphephile nemphilo yebantfwana. Loluhlelo lweHulumende lutsembisa kutsi bantfwana bawufinyelele emfundvweni lofanele ngekuphepha nangekwaneliseka, nome bebahlala kuphi eSwat

Emabanga lamatfupha emitfombi nematfana lalingene etikolweni tesifundza saseShiselweni mnyaka lowedlulile sewakhombisa intfutfuko lenkhulu ekufundeni kwabo, ngekwemibiko lekhishwe nguMnyango weTemfundo naNdzawo Yekucedzela Titfungo. Tinhlangano tekutfutfukisa imfundvo tivakalise kutsi lokhu kubonakalisa imiphumela yemizamo lebeyentiwe nguHulumende weMbuso weSwatini ekwakheni titfungo letintsha kanye nekunika batali lemicebo yekwesekela bantfwana babo etikolweni. Ematitjele lamaningi emagcekeni emakhaya asebetsite kutsi bantfwana babo sebakhombisa lusito olukhulu ekulungiseni imisebenzi yabo yasesikolweni, loku lokwenta tinhloko tetitfungo kubabuke ngeliso lelijabulisako likusasa letemfundvo eveni. Ngaphezu kwaloko, sikhundla sekufundza emazweni laseNyakatfo Afrika kulekelele kakhulu ekufundvisa titfungo letikhulile, naletinye setikhishwe imali yekutsi tifundze emazweni angaphandle. Hulumende ute nekutsi uyachubeka nekucinisa lemikhakha yemfundvo eveni lonkhe, kusuka e

Emabanga lamashumi lasitfupha nesikhombisa ema-akhawunti etimphahla tebantfwana betigele tikhombisa kutsi bantfwana labanyenti basahlangabetana nebunzima ekutfoleni imfundvo lebalulekile eveni. Etikolweni letisemaphandleni, kufundzisa kwenteka ngaphansi kwetingcuphe letifaka ekhatsi kushota kwamatitjela lachwala noma labakhulu kahle, kanye nekushota kwamatfuba ekufundza lalinganisekile. Tingcondvo temabhalane letiseveni letitsite tibuye tibeke emlandvo etinhlelweni tekufundva, lokufaka lukhuni kulabafundzi labasheshe banikwa umthwalo wetimfundziso. Hulumende webhanoyi sewukhiphe umtsetfo lomusha lohlose kugcugcutela kutfutfukiswa kwemfundvo etifundzeni letikhashane, ngekwandisa inombolo yabachwayiti kanye nekwakha tindlu tekufundzela letintja. Tiphatsimandla tema-University tase tikhulumela ngalendlela, tikhombisa kutsi kufanele kube nelushiwo lolukhulu ekusimamiseni emasistimu ekufundza, kepha neyekucinisa kutsi bonkhe bantfwana batfola lithuba lekufundza ngelulwimi lwabo lwekucala.

Emafundvo lashicilelwe nguNgwenyama kanye neHulumende waseSwatini abonisa kutsi kunalwati lolukhulu lokudingeka emaveni lasemakhaya, lapho bantfwana labanyenti bashiya sikolo ngaphambi kwekuphela kwemfundo yabo. Emagceme etikolwa etifundzeni letifana neLubombo neManzini avela kutsi bangaphezu kwa-40 lamakhulu ebantfwana labangakwati kubhala nome funda ngemuva kwekuphuma kwawo esikolo. Tinhlangano tetifundvo tikhala ngekutsi tigodzi letinyenti tishoda titichere letanele, kanye nematfuba emfundvo laphakeme lasingatsatseki ebantwini labadvana. Hulumende wancome kutsi uzakwandza inhlelo yekusita bantfwana labadvana ngetindlela temali, kuhlanganisa netinhlelo tekupha batfwana tekudla kuze basheshe bete esikolo. Tiphatsimandla tetifundvo tikhombise umvelo wekuphefumula, titsembisa kutsi imifundvo emikhulu njengeyemaNyuvesi neyemaTechinical College izakwamukelwa ngabafundzi labanengi. Umphakati ucela hulumende kutsi angagcini nje ngetitsembiso, kodvwa atsi shwi ngemisebenti lecacile lebekwe sikhomba s

Etigodzini letisemaphandleni eSwaziland, bantfwana labanyenti basabhekane nenhlupho yekungakwati kufika etikolweni ngenhlalo lenhle nangekuphepha. Imigwaco lemibi kanye nekusweleka kwetindlela tekutfutfuka kuyenta kutsi labafundzi labakhashane naletikhungo temfundvo bafike kuchukulela noma bangafiki nhlobo. Ngalokufanele, iNkhundla yeTemfundvo neNtfutfuko yaNawe iye yasungula luhlelo lolusha lokutfukutisa kwakhiwa kwemahhotela etikolweni lapho bantfwana bangahlala khona emavikini esikolo. Loluhlelo selutsite lowekucala walo lwasungulwa eSiteki nase-Manzini, kantsi kulandzela lokhu, tiNdvuna taNgwane titfuye tigele letitidzingekile netimphahla tekufundza. Bantfwana labangangekhulu nematfupha sebavele basondzele kuloluhlelo lwekuhlala, kepha tigciwane tetimali tisencelela umsebenzi lobukhulu. Ngaphandle kwalamaphrojekthi emhlabaleni, kufundza kwabantfwana baNgwane kuyawuya phambili ngekutimisela nangethemba.

Tindzawo tekufundza letiningi eveni lase-Eswatini tihlangabetana nenkhinga yekushoda kwetincwadzi kanye nekushoda kwetitfupha temfundvo lefanele. Bantfwana labanyenti bahlala emakilasini lamakhulu kakhulu, lapho umfundzi munye angacondziswa ngulotishela munye yedvwa phambi kwabafundzi labedlula emashumi lamabili. Umkhandlu wemfundvo wevusi uyabika kutsi loku kususelwa ekwehleni kwemali lenikwa tikholo kanye nasekuswelekeni kwetitfupha letifanele kute tisetjentiswe etikolweni letisemakhaya. Ngebuhle benhlitiyo, iNingizimu-Afrika ne-UNICEF tisite ngekutfumela tincwadzi kanye netinye tisetjentiswa kulamanye emakolwa. Nomakunjalo, bomasipala bayalindzelwa kutsi batfatse indlela yekulungisa inhlangano yetimphahla temfundvo ngaloku kunesicaphuno. Tifundzi letingenile etikolweni tashona ekufundeni ngendlela lephakeme ngaphambi kwemnyaka wemfundvo, noko-ke iNgwenyama nayo ikhuthase bantfwana kutsi baphikelele kufunda ngitsi imfundvo iyinhloko yekwak

Emagogo lamakhulu etifundzi letingetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisikhombisa bese ticosha letifundzvo tawo etikolweni letisemaphandleni eSwaziland, kodvwa tindlela tekufundza tisaloku inazo tinkhinga letinkhulu. Etifundzini letisetindzaweni letikude, tindzawo tekufundzela tikhona ngekwenele, kodvwa tincwadzi tetifundo kanye netimphahla tekufundzisa tiswelakala kakhulu. Labaphathi betifundvo beshaya inkhulumano yangesonto leledlulile, lapho bachaza khona kutsi uhulumende ulomisu lomusha wekusita etikolweni letisemaphandleni ngemali lecishe ibe yimiliyoni lemibili emalangeni. Loluhlelo lolusha luhlose kuhlinzeka tikolwo ngencwadzi letintja kanye naletilandzelana netifundo temnyaka longako. Ngekwengetela, tifundvo temfundvo yelapha etikhandleni lelikhulu letingane tifundziswa kahle ngabafundzisi labatfole lucondziso lolufanele. Bahloli betifundo bachaza kutsi inombolo yetifundzi letidlula etihlolweni tonyaka wenkhulungwane yemashumi lamabili nesikhombisa imele kuchubekela phambili lokuhle ekuhlolisiseni

Emfundweni yemazinga aphakeme, tingcondvo letiphuma emagalelo eSwaziland titfolakala tigcwele tinchubo letinsha tekufundza letisheshisa kukhula kwelwati. Etikolweni letisemaphandleni, bantfwana labanyenti basebhekene nendzaba yokushoda kwetincwadzi kanye netitfupi tekufundza, lokwenta kutsi kufundza kwabo kube nzima. Hulumende webhuswa sewukhombise inhloso yakhe yokulungisa lento ngekusakata tihansi letitsite temali etikolweni letisebetini, futsi kucalwa kwentwa imishini yemitfwalo yakho yekufundza. Tonkhe tifundze letikhombisa intfutfuko yetikolweni titsatswa njengesibonelo kulomkhandlu wemfundvo. Ngaphezu kwaloko, tiphatsimandla tatsi titawuqinisekisa kutsi titfutfuko letitfusiwe ekwakha tindlu teklasi letintsha tiheha bonkhe bantfwana futsi akekho losalela emuva ngenca yemisiko noma buphofela. Umfundisi lomunye lobephambi eNhlangano yeMfundvo eManzini ukhombe kutsi tindlela letintsha tekufundza, kufaka ekhatsi tekufundza nge-theknoloji, titawufaka imfundvo ikhule

Emabanga lamanyenti wetfutfo emazweni laseNingizimu Afrika acondzene netinkinga letimatima tekutfola imfundvo lencomekako. ETown yaseNhlangano, bantfwana labadvutjana nange-500 bafundza ngaphansi kwetitende letidzala nangekushoda kwetincwadzi letifanele etigodzini tabo. Inhlangano yeMfundvo yeSive ibikele uhulumende kutsi izikole letinjalo tifuna kutfola lusito lolusheshako ekwakhiweni kwetindlu temfundvo. Ngekusabela kulesi sibhengezo, uNgwenyama uhole isinqumo sekutsi imali yenhlalakahle ijikiswe ekwakheni emakhaya emfundvo lamatsha. Tinhloko tetikole tikhulume ngekutsi bantfwana abakwati kufundza kahle ngesikhatsi semakhaza, ikakhulukati ekuseni. Bafundzi labadzala ngekuphindvwa batsi imifundvo yabo ivikelwe yindzawo lencomekako yekufundza. Uhulumende wetsembisa inhlangano kutsi imphendvulo izochazeka ngephambi kwekuphela konyaka wemali, ngesifiso sekutsi bonkhe bantfwana batfole lilungelo labo lemfundvo ngekulinganiseka nekuhlonipha.

Ngetikholi letisanda kwedlula, ticolo letinyenti eNingizimu yeliwe tivule eminyango yawo kubasati lababefundza ekhaya ngenxa yesimo setulu lesingenabuhle. Bafundzi labedlulela ema-100,000 babuya etikolweni, kantsi titfuphelo tabo tikhombise kutsi sikhala sekuchumana kwabo netifundvo besinganakeka ngendlela lefanele. Sikhulumi salabafundzi, Nomsa Dlamini, ukhulume ngekushesha atsi: "Sasweleka emabuku, abafundzi labanyenti bahlala emapulazini labakhatsi, kantsi tigogo titifundzisa ngalokungakameli." Umnyango weFundvo sewutsatse linyatelo lobukhulu ngekukhipha imali lengetiwe yekumisa tikholi letintfha kanye nekunika bafundzi labayingcosana lababevele basale ngemuva. Tiphatsimandla tikhulumile nekutsi kuyo yonkhe imiphovela, tangamanye emakholishi layobe avulwa ngaSelinyanga lesitako senhlaba, imphela yekufundza yalo lonkhe liwe izobe iphakeme ngemashumi lamabili ema-oda. Inhlangano yeNations United nayo ichitiwe ebonge imizamo leyo, itsi ikhombisa kutsi live lilandzela

Ngetsi leyo yeHhovisi leliNkhulu leMfundvo, kucala kwalonyaka wemfundvo, bantfwana labengekho etikolweni ngebanga lelimandla belingaba ngelikhulu ngemakhulu lamabili emakhulwini lasikhombisa. Ngalelo livi, hulumende ubeke eceleni imali lenkhulu lekhetsiwe kuze kufike konkhe kuwo lamaphethelo. Emanyuvesi lalandzela imigomo leyashaywa nguNgwenyama kanye neKhabhinethi seyaqala emizamo yekwemukelela tifundzi letintsha ngaphansi kwalesisimo. Tifundzi latetinyenti tivuma kutsi kucedzelwa kwemakhompiyutha nawebhu etskolweni kuyente kwati kube lula. Umsebenti wemfundvo ufanele ufinyelele tonkhe tindzawo, ngisho kantsi letisemaphandleni lapho tifundzi tinya khona kufika etikolweni. Tichakami telive netinhlangano letingetenhlalakahle tikhuthale kusekelela hulumende kuze tonkhe tifundzi titfole amathuba lalinganako. Umphakati ngewonkhe uchukulutswa kukhutsata bantfwana babo etifundvweni nangentfutfuko yemphakati.

Tingcondvo letintfja letikhishwe nguMnumzane Nhlanhla Dlamini, Luphawu lweNdvuna yeMfundvo, tibonakalise kutsi kunekukhula lokuhle emkhakheni wemfundvo evutseni leli. Ngemnyaka lowengcile, ticole letingaphezu kwema-200 emifundweni yasemagcekeni nekemadolobheni tivulele emabanga lamasha, laniketele tibalo letinkhulu tebafundzi. Bafundzi labanengi sebatfola litfuba lekufinyelela kucwaningo lolunzulu kanye netincwadzi letintfsha ngekusitwa kwehlelo lesikhwama seHulumende. Letindlela letimunyetwe yiHulumende tinakekelwa njengesinyatselo lesibalulekile ekwakheni ikusasa lelihle leticole tekwe-Afrika neSwatini. Ticole nome ngabe letisemagcekeni, tiyakhushulelwa ngemakhono atentsi kanye nesimanje. Tiphatsimandla tetemfundvo tibalise njengenye yetinhloso letiphambili kutsi bonkhe bafundzi, ngisho nalabo labahlala emagcekeni lapho kuyindlulela khona, batfole imitfombo lemcoka. Loku kubonakala njengesithembiso seSive sekutsi akekho mfundzi lotash

Tingcola letingetulu kwemashumi lasitfupha tihlanganyele kuhlelo lolusha lweHulumende lekufundzisa bantfwana labangakagcini iminyaka lesikhombisa. Loluhlelo, lolubitwa ngelitsi "Imfundvo Yekucala," luhlose kuba netigaba tekufundza letifinyelela emaphandleni nakemadolobheni lamanye lasekude. Ngekusho kwaMnyango Wetemfundvo, kubonakalile kwekutsi bantfwana labavela emagchumeni laswele baphela ekushiya esikolweni ngaphambi kwekuphela kwemtfombo wetemfundvo webantfwana. Titfunywa tekuhlola tivakashe tigodvo letitsetfwa ngaphambi kwekuqalela kuhlola sikhundla setingcola ngetinyanga letembili letidlulile. Batali nabagcini babontisile luvumo lokukhulu ngaloluhlelo, nakhuluma emhlanganweni lobanjwe eNyanyini. Umnyango uphindze wamemetela kutsi tindzawo letintfwa tekufundza titawuniketwa imali yekwakhiwa kabusha ngalomnyaka wetemali lofika. Kufundza kwemtfwana kusimiswe njengencenye lebalulekile yekwakhiwa kwelive, futsi Hulumende utsembise kutsi

Emafundza lamasha etekufundza asabalele etikolweni letinyenti tekufundza eNingizimu ne-East Swatini, lapho bantfwana labedze bangakwati kufuna imibhalo yetikolwa ngenhlawulo. Ngemuva kwemhlangano lobalulekile webhodi lelivikele imfundvo, kwenqunywa kutsi izikolwa letingaphansi kahulumende titawunikwa tinsita tetincwadzi kanye netikhali tekufundza ngekhono. Bantfwana labedze njengoNomvula Dlamini weGege basho kutsi kwakhiwa themba lesisha emakhaya abo ngale sinqumo. Sitfo sekufundza sesibiliswa ngesifiso sekutsi wonkhe umntfwana utewufinyelela emfundvweni lonemphilo. Tiphatsimandla tekufundva tiphinde tememeta kutsi titawuhlola izikolwa ngeminyaka yonkhe kuze kucinisekiswe kutsi imfundvo iniketwa ngendlela lefanele. Litiko lelilandzele letemfundvo licondzise wonkhe umuntfu kutsi imfundvo yingcebo yesive leneke kushiywa ngemuva noma ngubani. Loku kufakelwa sifiso sekwakha sisekelo lesigcilwe kulitiko lemfundvo nguwo wonkhe umcebo weSive sakaSwatini.

Bantfwana labadvulile betigodzi taseSwatini sebabuyela esikolweni ngemva kwetikhukhula letadzimate tingcenye letinyenti telive ekucaleni kwemnyaka lona. INkhundla yeMfundvo ikhiphe umyaleto lobalulekile lotsi tonkhe tikolo letenteke inchupho kufanele titfole lusito lwekwakhiwa kabusha ngaphambi kwekuletfwa kwetfumo temfundvo letisha. Bafundzi labacishe bafinyelele inombolo lephindze phindze inkhulungwane letishumi basebenta ngekuzikhandza nakuba tintfo tibuhlungu, bafundziswa ngaphansi kwematende kanye nasemaweni. Tiphatsimandla takhuluma ngekutinikela kwekuphilisa kabusha indzawo yemfundvo, futsi tivumile kutsi lemali lebiyibekiwe incane kunekudingekile kwayo. Tonkhe tifundza letitsatfu letichatseka kakhulu titfola lutfo kumaSevisi eMfundvo, kodvwa bantfu basetigodzi basavame kukhalela kwekuchubeka kwekucitseleka kwetintfombi ngetinkhu letinganakiwe. Luhulumende utewucubuka busha emaphrojekthi ekwakha etikolo etigodzini letishaya indlala, ngekwenelisa kutsi akukho mntfwana losi

Tadzinele temfundvo letitsite tikhulu letingetulu kwema-200 letisetindzaweni tasemaphandleni yase-Eswatini tihlangabetana nenkhinga enkulu yekushortage yebotfombi lemifundvo kanye nematfupha lamabandlululo. Bantfwana labanyenti bayahamba imigwaco leyingaphezu kwemakilomitha lasikhombisa nsuku zonkhe kuya esikolweni, betfutsa emandla ngaphambi kwekufika emakilasini. Sikhulume neKhomishini yeMfundvo eNatini, imiphendvulo yakhombisa kutsi hulumende usubeke eceleni imali lengetulu kwemaSangeni lamabili emashilinge kuze kulungiselwe lesimo. Kukhiwa kwetindlu tetifundvo letintja kulandzela uhlelo lolubhaliwe lolucubungula timfuno tetindawo letehlukene. Lofundza eNtfonjeni High School, Sipho Dlamini, ubalise ngekujabula kutsi tifundvo letintja letitfolakala ngemasistimu langcono tasita kakhulu ekunakekeleni kwabasebenzi befundvo. Nangabe inhlelo yekulungisa tikhulu letingakapheli ifeziwe ngekucophelela, kubukeka kutsi imiphumela yemfundvo yentfutfuko iyawulandzela yonkhe imip

Emabanga lasedlulele ngemnyaka lowedlulile, iNingizimu Afrika yabika kutsi tingcweti letifundze etikolweni tetemfundvo ephakeme tiphindze tishaye emuva ngemuva kwekuqedza titfundzelo tatico. Ngetinhlanzi letikhombisa kutsi bafundi labangaphezulu kwema-60,000 eSwatini bahlangabetana nenkhinga yekushaywa kwetimali tekufundza, iNgwenyama nePhalamende likhipha umtsetfo losahluka wekusekela bafundi labampofu kulabo labafica etigodzini tekungabe naso. Tiphatsimandla temfundvo tichaze kutsi kufakwa kwematekhinoloji emaklasini kuyasita ekufundziseni bafundi ngematfuba lamasha etindlela tekufundza. Emabanga lamaningi etindlela letiphatselene nalokufundziswa aselawo lona umahumela wetintfombi tekungafundzisi; ngalokunjalo, sikhungo setemfundvo eNhlangano yemaNkhosi sikhangele kutsi ngendlela mani ingatsetselela lenkhinga. Tiphatsimandla tephinde tashiwo kutsi tilandzela ngemtsetfo kutikoleni tawo wonkhe emaholide ekutfola imibiko yentshumayelo yebafundi, baphindze batitse kutsi ti

Emalanga lamanyenti, titalente tetincwadzana letikhuluma ngemfundvo lebantfwana sebati ngemakhono labalulekile ekusebentisa luhlelo lwekufundza lolutfolakala etikolweni tekuhlala nasemalokishini. Hulumende wetive, ngekusebentana neNgungumbiso yeMfundvo, sewushicilele tinhlelo letintsha tekufundvisa letihlose kutfutfukisa imikhakha yesayensi kanye nematimati etikolweni tesibili eveni lonkhe. Bantfwana labanemagama lamahle etikolweni tesive bayakhutsatwa kutsi baphume emazweni emakhaya abo baye emanyuvesi lapho kufundvisa khona kwentekela ngesilinganiso lesiphakeme. Ngekwemibiko leyentiwe nguHulumende ekupheleni kwelizinga lemfundvo lanyakenye, inombolo yabafundzi labacinisekisa iziqu zemanyuvesi yenyuke ngemashumi lamatsatfu emasenthi kunemnyaka lowedlulile. Titfunywa temakhosi netindvuna naletikhona etigodzini leto letisedvute nalemafamu takubuka lolukhulu lwamukelekile lolukhona etikolweni tekuhlala njengekutsi kukhona kufundvisa lokufanele lokutofaka emandla etinkhundla tetemfundvo letintsha.

Emalanga lamandza, tinkhundla letiningi eveni leSwaziland titfole itigodzi tekutsi titfumele bantfwana lababodze etikolweni, njengoba umbuso ungakavali imikhawulo yekufinyelela emfundweni. Bantfwana labadvuna kanye nalabafemba kufundza ngendlela yekunyentiselana, kodvwa banyenti babikwa kutsi abakafinyeleli kahle emisebentini yesikole ngenxa yekusweleka kwetincwadzi kanye netitfomelo tesikole. Lomhlaka wekufundza lowashiywako ukhomba sigaba lesikhulu sekusweleka kwekuhlela kahle kwemfundo eveni. Ngekulandzelana naloko, iNgwenyama uMswati III uyigcizelele intfo yekutsi imfundo ngumgogodla welive, lowo omele ukuciniswa ngesenzo ngulowo nalowo kumbusweni. Tigodzi tekweseka bantfwana lababonakalako ekufundzeni tishicilelwa nguHulumende, kepha bahloli labanyenti bachaza kutsi ngemtsetfo kunetindlela letisatawucutfwa kuze imfundo ifike kubo bonkhe bantfwana. Emkhatsini wakulwa nebumphofu kanye nekufundza, ticino tekufundza ngendlela lefanele tiyindlela lebanti kakhulu, futsi kufanele zonk

Emabanga lematfupha ngetigodzi letisemaphandleni aseNgwane asivela ngekutsi bantfwana labanyenti basesabeka kuya esikolweni ngebangela bekusweleka kwetindlela letilungele kahle. Ikhomishini yeMfundvo ikhiphe umbiko lowatsi inani lebantfwana labasuka esikolweni ngaphambi kwekuphela kwemphaka wabo lenyuke ngaphezu kwamaphesenti lasikhombisa kulonyaka. Kutfunjwa kwetithisheli letinetilwimi tekufundza ekutfunjweni kwato sekwandlululwa nguHulumende njengesisombululo lesibalulekile. Ngekwemibono yemaphrinsipal labebambe inhlangano elobhosha iManzini, tindlela letimbi kanye nebusweleko bemaklasi longahlanyelwa kahle tibalulwa njengekuphazamisa lokumcoka kwekufunda. Sikhungo seMfundvo Ngetulu eMbabane naso sivumele kutsi sibhekene nema-aplikesheni lawo lafikile lanyenti kulonyaka kunesifiso sekwandisa emathuba emafundvo emabanga lasetulu. Bantfwana labaphuma emagcekeni lamahle kanye nalabaphuma emaphandleni bayahluka ngekutfola imfundvo lelinganiselekile, kube yinkinga lehlala ikhona

Tinkhundla letifaka eNorthern Region tasungula inhlelo lesha yekufundzisa bantfwana labadvutane naletindzawo letikhashane netikolo. Bantfwana labangaphezu kwenkhulungwane letimbili sebakhombisa kuthokota ngalokuchacile, njengoba tigogo netababe betivele betimangalele ngekuya kwemantfombatana nemajaha esikolo tigeza ntambama ngesandla. Hulumende waseSwatini, ngekuhlangana neMnyango Wetfutfo Tekufundzisa, usite ngekupha imihlane leyimashini letikhombisa imibhalo ngaphakati kwamagumbi ekufundzela. Tishayamtsetfo letinhle, letagcizelelwa nguNgwenyama ngenyanga leyendlulile, tenta kutsi tikolo temakhaya tihlome ngalokupheleleko. Titfutfukisi temphakathi tinconywa ngekusekela loluhlelo, nawe umnikati wesikolo lesikhulu eTenele ukhulumile wagcizelela kutsi "kufundzisa kwetfu kuvela enhlitiyweni yemphakati." Imitsetfo leyavelako iyatsintsa indlela lotifundzela ngayo ngisho netikolo temandze, lapho sigwadi sikhombisa kutsi imininingwane yetibalo nekubhala seyiphucuke ngemashumi lamabili nesi

Emabanga lamangcono emisebenti yetfuto kanye nemihlangano yemfundvo seyikhombise kutsi inani letalente letisha liya phezulu emazweni lamaningi e-Afrika, kodvwa eSwatini imfundvo isebenta ngekuciniseka. Esikolweni lesikhulu saseNhlangano, batfoli balo babika kutsi kwakhiwa tigumbi tetingisi letintfwa lapha kutsi titsite kulabafundzisa kanye nalabafundza. Uhulumende weSwaziland uchubekile ngemizamo yokwandisa imitsetfo lemisha yetemfundvo, lapho kwakhiwa khona titfunti tekutsi bonkhe bantfwana, ikakhulukati labavela emahlatsini, bakwati kufinyelela esikolweni ngekuphepha. Emanyuvesi nawo ayatsi aphakamisa imikhakha yemifundvo lemisha, ikakhulukati eteknoloji nase-agriculture, kuze kwande iminyaka yekusebenta kwabafundzi. Labafundzi lababengakakwati kufundzela imali bayabutfola manje bantfutfumelo ngelisita lehulumende, lokwandisa inani labangena emazingeni lamaphakeme emfundvo. Lendlela yekulondvolota imfundvo yenta kutsi live liphume phambili ngalokumangalisako.

Tinkhundla letingetulu kwema-40 eveni lase-Eswatini manje setinemakhono lamatsha lapho bafundzi batawukwati khona kufundza ngematfuba lalingana. Hulumende webantfu ube sesinyatselo lesibalulekile ngekusakaza tincwadzi kanye netintfo tekufundza etikolweni letisemaphandleni, lesasite ngemashini ekufundzisa longatsintfwanga. Umphatsindlela weSikhundla seTemfundvo ukhulume ekuhlangananeni kwetinkhundla nangeSontfo lelidlulile, achaze kutsi imfundvo yilelo khali leliyisisekelo sekulungetfwa kwesive. Bafundzi labangaphezu kwema-15,000 batawuphiwa ematfuba ekuya enyunivesiti ngemabhasikela ekufundza lalungiswe nguhumlende ngelitiko leMfundvo. Tifundzi letise-Upper Primary tiyachukulisweka kakhulu, njengoba kuphela kweliphepha lesikhombisa kwekufundza kulindze tifundzi letinyenti. Emtsetfweni lomusha lowashicilelwa enyangeni leyadlula, kucinisekisiwe kutsi wonkhe umntfwaana loneminyaka leshiya nhlanu kuyishumi nesikhombisa utawufundza ngaphandle kwekukhokha imali yakontil

Emagciweni laseManzini, bahlali labanyenti baphila ngaphansi kwetinhlupho letinkhulu ngenxa yekusweleka kwamanzi lacosha emagcekeni abo. Inhlangano yeMasipala weManzini ike yakhipha sitatimende ngesonto lelidlulile, iveta kutsi tigodzi letingaphansi kwayo titawuthola indzawo letintja tekuhlinzekwa ngamanzi kucala nyanga letayo. Sikhulu lesiphakeme seMasipala, uNkhosi Sipho Dlamini, ukhulume ngalendlela lokucacile, atsi kukhokhelwa kwemishado yetikhali tetindzawo yona itawusita ekufakeleni imiphayi lemisha. Balingiseli labangaphezu kwetinkhulungwane letintathu balalelile umhlangano lobe wenziwa eSikhumulweni SeManzini, lapho timphendvulo letiningana taphiwa khona emphakathini. Umbuso ngawo uphinde watigcigciza kutsi timphahla tetindzawo letinsha tawuphela nekwakhiwa ngaphambi kwekuphela kwemnyaka wemali we-2025. Indlela labenta ngayo loku yiyo leyabukwa ngemehlo lamahlaba ngabaholi bendlangano yemiphakathi, labavuma kutsi kuyintfutfuko lebalulekile kodvwa bachaza

Emagodzi lasedolobheni laseNhlangano asebematima ngekungabikho kwemanti lahlantekile emakhaya amaningi, kantsi indzaba leyi isiphindze yaphakanyiswa ngetikhathi letinyenti emahlangweni emasipala. Emasonto lamabili adlulile, iNdvuna yemasipala ibeke sicengelo kulabo labaphetse emkhakheni wemanti, ikhombisa budze besikhathi lesikhulu lokusadingeka kuze kuletfwe lusito. Ngenkhulumomphendvulwane lephiwe tindaba, ikhansela lalisho kutsi tinsita letinsha tetimbibi temanti tihlongotiwe emaphakelo etemtsetfo, kodvwa tingakafiki njengobe kwatjengisiwe. Tindzaba letikhulumwa ngabakhokheli titsi imali leyatiwa njengemabhiliyoni amabili emalangeni wetimali wakuletfwa kusuka kuhulumende wasebukhosini ikakhulukati ibekelwe lolo hlelo. Imindeni lemahlanu nakuphindvwa kabili isafuna emanti ngekuthenga ematanki lamadala ngelibhange lenkani, inhlangano yabomake bakhuluma ngendlela lokushaya ndzimandzi kuyindlalifa lenkhulu.

Emalokishi lasedvute neLavumisa asehlangene ekukhulumeni ngelicala lekuswelakala kwemanti lahlantekile, baphakamisa inkinga lebahlangabezana nayo iminyaka leminyenti. Sikhulumile neNkhosikati Thandi Dlamini, owakhuluma ngemagama aletfula lusizi lwaleso sigodzi, wachaza kutsi bantfwana basela emanti lasuka emigodini lesemanzi angahlantwa. Umkhandlu weLetjaba, ulandzelela imibiko leye yafika, sewumemezele linhlelo lelikhulu lekwakha tindlela tekuletsa emanti lahlantekile kuleyo ndzawo kanye netinye tindzawo letisedvute. Imali lecingiwe yaleli phrojekthi ifinyelela ku-R12 million, futsi kulindeleke kutsi umsebenzi uqale ekucaleni kwelinyanga letikhona. Indvuna yeMkhandlu, uMnumzane Sibusiso Nkosi, wachaza kuleli nyanga kutsi uhulumende uyabona inhlanhlelo yemphilo yebantfu balelive, futsi akakavumeli kutsi timo letisetjenziswa ngulaba bantfu tihlale njalo. Kulindeleke kutsi leli phrojekthi liphele ngekushesha kweminyaka lemibili, liphe lusito labantfu labengaphezu kwemakhulu lamabili lapha

Emalokishi lasemaphandleni eSwaziland, bantfu labedze bemhlaba babhekana nebunzima bokutfola emanti lahlantekile nome nje imigwaco lecondzile lesangena ematsini abo. Ngemuva kwaloko, iNdvuna yeSifundza saseHhohho imemetele kutsi kucalwa kwetimphahla temigwaco lemikhulu leyayinele kucedvwa ngesikhatsi esidlulile sekuphela kwalonyaka. Ngekwemibiko leboniwe emphakathini, sibalo seticoco letisebentisanako nabahlali senyukele ngemaphesenti lamashumi lamabili nesikhombisa, lokukhombisa kutsi kudlangala kwentfutfuko uyabonakala. Umkhandlu wetinkhundla ubuye watjela bahlali kutsi imali yekwakha titiko temphilo yemphakathi itsetfwe semtsetfo, ngatinkhathi letine ngonyaka lolandzela. Litiko leSimo Senhlalo selite futsi kutsi tindlela tekusita imindeni leswele tiyakhasimuliswa, ikakhulukwi laphaya emifuntwini lesekhule. Bahlali bayacelwa kutsi babambisane naleto tikhungo takahulumende futsi babike tinkhinga letibhekene nawo emiphakathini yabo ngekushesha.

Emalulwini lasedvute nemadolobha eManzini, bafana nebantfwana labedlula ema-2,000 sebakhona manje kufinyelela etikolweni ngemgwaco lowakhiwe kabusha nguMnyango Wetimphahla Naletimakiwa ngekuhlanganyela naleHhovisi leNkhosi yeSifundza. Umsebenzi lowaphela ngesonto leledlulile ushiye emphakatsini injabulo lenkhulu, njengoba imigwaco leyayifile yavuselelwa ngokuphelele. Wakhuluma nje umhlali lomdzala waseNgwane, Mnumzana Sipho Dlamini, watsi imindeni imbalwa beyingeke ikwati kutfumela bantfwana bayo etikolweni ngetikhathi tetimvula ngenca yebumatima bemigwaco. Kusukela manje, titashi tesifundza tikhuluma ngekutsi tikulungele kwamukela bantfwana labeta etikolweni ngaphandle kwetinkhinga. IMkhandlu weSifundza ukhomba phambili cutfo kutsi umsebenzi losafana nalona uzakwentiwa futsi etikhumulweni letisele ngekhatsi kweminyaka lemibili letako. Tikhomba tekubhaliswa kwemigwaco yemisha sewutfunyelwe eSigodzini seHulumende kuze kutfole kulungiswa kwemtsetfo losemtsetf

Emasango lamakhulu asekungeneni kwemanti lahlobile asebenzako asegcwele lijozi eNhlangano yeMalobolo eSwaziland, indzaba lekhomba kuchudzuka lokuchudzukile kwesimo semphilo kuletindzawo. Hulumende wase Swatini, ngekusebentisana neTIFA kanye nebosekeli labaphuma kwalamanye emave, sewumemetela luhlelo lokusakaza emajubhelo emanti lahlobile kuletindzawo tekwelusa letisemaphandleni. Ikhomishinala yaLeha naLemanti, Nyokwemunye Dlamini, ukhulume emaVeki lamabili adlulile esivunguvungu setikhulumi tesive, watsi luhlelo lusekhona kufakwa esikhundleni nguNhlaba wemnyaka losachubekako. Tafulane letintfwatintfwa tiyakwakhiwa etikhumulweni tekuhlangana kwemphakathi, lapho emakhaya atawukhona khona kukha emanti lahlobile ngekwephephela. Hulumende ubeka loluhlelo embili njengencenye yemizamo yekuhlangabetana netimfuno teHlelo Lekuphucula Lizwe, locijiswa libe ngumtamo webhantsi welive. Bantfu basemaphakathini batfutfumela wamuhla, nangekutsi basabindze batifanele

Emagodzi lasekuciniseni kwemgwaco waseNhlangano District sewukhombisile umtfombo lomkhulu wekuthuthukiswa kwemphakathi kuleso sigodzi. Ikhansela laseNhlangano likhiphe sikhulumisi lebesichaza kutsi lomgwaco, lobewuphuke kakhulu ngebaka leminyaka lemibili, sewukhiwe ngalokuphelele ngemandla alokelwe nguHulumende weSifundza. Tindlu letedlula ti-1,800 tiyawutsintfwa ngekuhanjiswa lokukhanyako kwemkhuhlu netintfo temphilo ngalomgwaco. Bashayeli labaphutfuma baphindze bakhululeke ngoba sekukhishwe ne-speed humps letintfu ngetintfu kuze kuvinjelwe tingozi. Inhloko yeSifundza, Ndvunankulu Jabulani Masuku, ukhulume inkhani yekutsi inhlakanipho yalomsebenzi ibonisa kutsi hulumende uyalilalela livi lemphakathi. Tikhala tetindvuna tetimphakathi ngekwephula kwemigwaco kufakwe esikhundleni sekucabanga sekulayicha kwemali yesifundza lesitakwenteka ngekushesha. Umphakathi ugcizelelwe ekucosha lesigodi ngesiphiwa sinikwa kusebenta ngekubambisana.

Emagciweni ekhona emphakatsini waseNhlambeni, bakhuluma ngekugcizeleleka kwentfo lebiloku ikhulunywa iminyaka: kushaywa kwemgwaco lotfungela emaphandleni langaphandle kwedolobha. Sikhuluma ngemagama alendlu yemkhandlu webantfu, lowo lowabeka inkhulumomphendvulo yakhe kulelo hlangano ngeviki leledlulile, watsi kushaywa kwemgwaco lowo kuyawucondzwa ngaphakathi kwemnyaka lolandzela. Imali lelinganiselwa ku-R14 million ibekiwe ngetulu kwalesisimangaliso, inhloso yekutsi kuhlelwe ngcono kutfutfukiswa kwengodvo yezingwane kanye nekuhanjiswa kwekuphepha emagciweni langatsi abekelekiwe. Emakhaya lalinganiselwa ku-2,500 ayawutsintfwa yiloku kuhlelwa, kubandakanya leto tendzawo letikhulu tekuculisa tizalo kanye netikolo tesekelo. Kumenyetelwa kwemkhandlu kuphindze kwagcizelela kutsi umsebenzi lowentiwako uyawulandzelwa ngesiso, ngekusebentisana naleyo nhlangano yetekwakha yelive kutsi kuze kulandzelelwe kahle kwentiwa.

Tikhiwa letingaphezu kwema-5,000 esifundeni saseShiselweni titsite tificwa yinkinga yekusweleka kwemanti lacocekile, njengemibiko lefikile eHhovisi laNgwenyama Lomkhulu weSifundza. Ngemuva kwaloku, iNgwane Water and Sanitation Company imemetele inhlelo yemsebenti lodzala lekutawusetjentiswa emagodzini lase-emuva, kufaka ekhatsi imiti lemisha yekucondzisa emanti. Sikhulumi salenkampani uNkosazana Zanele Dlamini ukhulume ngekubeka hhayike kutsi umsebenzi lowo utawuqala ngenyanga letilandzelako, nekutsi bafisa kuphelelisa wonkhe umsebenzi ngaphambi kwekuphela kwalonyaka wemali. Yonkhe indlela lekusetjentiswa ngayo imali yalomsebenzi itawuhlolwa nguNgwenyama Lomkhulu neligumbi lelibusako. Bacabanga kutsi ngekuphelela kweliphrojekthi, emakhaya langaphezu kwema-8,000 atawutfola emanti lacocekile. Bonkhe labatfola indzaba leyo eMkhiweni batsite bajabula kakhulu nekutsi sebasethemba kutsi tintfo titawushintja.

Emalulwini ehlala emaphandleni aseNorthern Hhohho, tindlu letingaphezu kwema-2,500 tihlala tingakamukeli emanti lacocekile ngeluphayipi. Loku sekuholele ekuphileni kwasemphakati lokungahetfwanga kahle, ikakhulukwi kubantfwana labaseminyakeni yekuya esikolweni. Ngekwemibiko leyandlalwa eMkhandlwini weLisiko neLulwimi ngesonto lelidzulile, Hulumende waseNingizimu Afrika sewubekile eceleni imali lenkhulu yekwakha timphomula letintja temanti kulamaphandle. Umphathi wemgwamanda wemanti, Nkhosikati Lindiwe Dlamini, ubikelile kutsi imisebenti lemikhulu itawuphela ngekuphelela kwemnyaka weli-2025. Bantfu balelive bacelwa kutsi babike tonkhe tinkinga letiphatselene nemanti kumakhinotisi ase-ekhaya noma etikhungweni tekuphila kwemiphakati. Umkhandlu wetindzawo utisholo kutsi ufuna kufaka sonkhe leso sibalo setindlu ngemuva kweminyaka lemibili. Loluhlelo lwemsebenti luzosita futsi ekwehlisa tigciwane tamanzi letifana ne-cholera lasevele ibangela ti

Ngetfule lenyenti yemindeni lephindze yadlula inkhulungwane letintsatfu nesikhombisa, lesihlala emaphandleni asifundza iLubombo, isaphila ngaphansi kwesimo lesimatima sekusweleka kwemanti lahlantekile neligesi lekugcokama. Hulumende weSifundza wamemezela kutsi umnikelo wemali lomusha, lofikela emakhulukati lamashumi lamabili esikhombisa wemiliyoni ema-Emalangeni, uyawusekelwa kulekhampenya yekuhlinzeka ngaleto tinsita letifiwa. Tiphatsimandla telokhal municipality tite bhuloho lekwenteke ngato letinkinga letikhona, kodvwa bomake nebabe bendvuna setibaphendvula nekutsi imisebenti yekwakha izokhicitwa ngekushesha. Inhlangano yemphakathi ikhiphe sitatimende lesikhombisa intfukutselo yawo, ngoba imisebenti lebibikelwa kwentekela esikhatsini sekuphela kwalomnyaka wekuphashwa kwalendaba angikasimbi. Lona mkhankaso wekwakha uligcino labalula baholi belokhal, kusho iNkhosatana Nomvula Dlamini, lowentela umbuti emisebentini yembuto eviki leyadlulile, kantsi futsi wengeta ngekut

Emalugedlela lanemazinga lacondzile kanye nekushaywa kwemanti langapheleli kute kwaba yinkinga lenkhulu kubasebentisi bemigwaqo yesigodzi saseNhlangano, lapho imiphakathi ikhonona ngetindvubu letishaywe ngumsele kanye nemigwaqo leyephukile. Kulandzelela tikhalo letatingiwe, uMkhandlu weSifundzamangwalo watimemezela kutsi uhlelo lokucondziswa kwalomgwaqo luzakucandzwa ekuqaleni kwetinkhwa letitako, njengobe semali letifinyelela emaRandi latingema-R4.2 million setibekiwe ngemlomo weHulumende. Tigciwane tetekutfutfukiswa kwemphakathi tikuvumile kutsi kusetjentiswa kwemali kuyacutjuliswa ngumtsetfo wekubuka kwemphakathi, inhloso yaloku iyakuvikela kutsi imali ingasetjentiswa ngokungafaneli. Baphatsimandla beSifundzamangwalo batsintse futsi kutsi tikhala takawabo temphakathi tihlolwe busha ngaphandle kwemathuba lalandzela tifundo letakuchaziwa lapho kusemkhandlwini, ngobe kubalulekile kutsi imibono yemiphakathi ihambisane nekwakhiwa kwemigwaqo lomisha.

Emalokishi langetulu kwema-2,500 aseSitekela naseNhlangano laselifundzeni laseShiselweni manje asatama kutfola emadlelo lacondzile ngemkhuba wekuhlinzekwa kwemanti lacoliswako. Ikhansela lelendvulo lichazile kutsi imishini yekuphakamisa emanti leyahlasimula ngemnyaka lowedlulile ingakalungiswa ngokuphelele, loku lokubangela tinhlupho letinkhulu emasingatheni lamanengi. Lamele bantfu basemalokishini, Mnumzane Absalom Dlamini, ukhulume ngekuchazeka lokukhulu ngekutsi imindeni itsemba emijelo laseyindlala iminyaka leminingi. Umkhandlu weMasipala weSitekela utfumele umbiko ushiwo ukutsi kubekwe eceleni imali yekuphindza kwakhiwa kwemishini leyo ngekucala kwemnyaka wemali wekuphuma. Imiphumela yalomkhankaso italelwa kutsi itawufinyelela tigodzi letingetulu kwetinkhulungwane tesitfupha setakhamiti. Baphathiswa beMasipala badvonsise kubona ngeliso leligxilile loku ngekwetfembisa ukutsi imisebenzi yekwakha iyawuqalwa kungakapheli tinyanga letimbili.

Emalulwini lamaningi eMhlambanyatsi, bahlali sebacale kubona imiphumela yemasu lehulumende wemadolobha asekelwe ngekucambela tingodvo letashiywe ngemicondvo. Loluhlelo, loluphethwe nguMkhandlu weMdolobha weMhlambanyatsi, lufaka ekhatsi kufakwa kwematayela emacophelo ekuhamba kanye nokufakwa kwetizingele temanti lacocekile. Inkhulumomphendvulo yemkhandlu, Nkhosikati Thandi Dlamini, ikhulume ngaloluhlelo ekuhlanganisweni kwabahlali, ibika kutsi tigaba timbili tesifundza setikhulumi seticedze. Tindzawo letisasele titawuphothulwa ngaphambi kwekuchebelana kweNyanga yeSitfupha. Ngaphandle kwekucoca emigwaco, umkhandlu futsi utsembise kuphinda uhlinzeke ngemacebo ekukhipha lindle leligcwele emalokishini lamaningi lasasenta ngemindla yabahlali. Bahlali labalinganiselwa ku-4,500 labahlala kuletigodzi labatsiwa titawutsintfwa yiloluhlelo, futsi banikitwa yinhloso yokutsi imphilo yabo iyawulungiswa ngalesikhashana. Sekwagcizelela hahulu kutsi

Emalokishi laseManzini, baphila ngekusesaba ngetindlela letidvubuke letingacondzisi timpilo talabantu. Ikhansela leManzini likhiphe sitatimende lesite kutsi selicinisekile ngalokusebenta kwekubuyiselwa kwaleto tindlela ngemuva kweminyaka lemibili yekukhatsateka kwemphakathi. Imali lengu-R45 million isabelwe lomsebenzi, lotikhona kutsi uqale ngemkhicito lokulandzela lokucala kwenyanga lezako. Lona umsebenzi utawubandakanya nekuvalwa kwamasangweni lawo aphutfulukako kanye nekufakwa kwemibhede yemgwaco lowutsha etigodzini tekhatsi. Tiphatsimandla tete sikhala nekutsi tifisa kutsi bakhokhi bentela babene kutetsemba kulentfombi lensha yekusebenta. Labafandzisi baphendvule ngekujabula, nome kube khona labati batsola kutsi sebaviwe letsembiso lelifanana naleli ngaphambili. Kungenwa kwendzawo yemsebenzi kuyalandzela njengoba tigcokama letibalulekile titawukhipha imibono yato ngaloluhlelo.

Emalunga etigodzi letisedvute neLavumisa anesikhalo lesidze ngekungavikeleki kwetigodzi tawo ngebusuku, ikakhulukazi ngemuva kwekuphela kweligagasi lekushisiwa kwemandla. Emuva kwentingxoxo letiningi letabanjwa ngemagele emapholisa nabo babusi bendvulo, iNgwenyama yetigodzi ikhiphe umyalo lokutsi kubekwe emagilamu ekukhanya emgwaqweni kubo bonkhe emaphetsi lalinganiselwa emakhulwini lamabili namatfupha. Umkhandlu wesilokishi sewumemete kutsi umsebenzi lowona uqala ngelivi lenyanga letatako, ulandzela imali lemukelwe evela eSikhwameni seHulumende Wendvulo. Basebenti labangemagcuntsa lamaphambili batawuphindzetela emaphetsi lamashumi lasitfupha kuqala, bese balandzelela lamanye lalingemuva. Lomkhandlu uphindze wakhuthata tikhungo temphakathi kutsi tibike ngekushesha noma nguliphi ligagasi ekubonakala kwekusebenta kwalamagilamu. Tiphatsimandla tikhombise kutsi lelitfuba leticelo tekuphendulwa kwemigwaqo netindlela tetamlilo tikhona kuze kufike ngeloli lweLwesithatfu ngekuphot

Ngetulu kwetigidi letimbili temalunga emisebenti yemphakathi kungenelele kuhlelo lwebuhle belizwe lokukhishwa kwemfucuza emalokishini lamatfupha etifundza teHhohho kanye neLubombo ngalesonyaka. Sikhatsi lesidlule, tindzawo letinyenti betihlushwa yinkinga yemfucuza longasuswi ngalesikhathi, lekwakuvusa tindlela tekungcoliseka kwetikhala. Ngemuva kwemihlangano leminyenti lehlanganise tigeletane temaphetfo netiphatsimandla temadolobha, kuvunyelwanwe kutsi tinsita temfucuza tiyawukhishwa kabili ngeviki esikhundleni sesikhashana. Baholi bemiphakathi bacondzise kutsi sishintfo lesi siletsa ithemba kubahlali labanyenti base betikisile ngentintfo lebesidabuka yona. Umkhandlu weMasipala udzinge labaphindze babikelwe kutsi bacobeleleke emtsetfweni webhizi, ngobe labo labatiwa ngekulahla emfucuza ngaphandle kwekutsi batiphatsa ngalokufanele bayawubhekana nemijeziso. Kufakwa kwetintfo letintja tekufaka umfucuza emtimba wetindzawo kulindzelekile kuphela ekupheleni kwekota yekucala yem

Emalulwini lasedolobheni laseNhlangano, tindlu letengca tishiywe ngemnyango wemanti kanye neligesi sekute. Labadvutane nalelicembu letihawu batsi baphila ebunyameni ngemnyanga, ngekutsi imigodzi yemanti ayisebenzi kahle, kute netigaxa temanti temadolobha. Ngemhlaka lishumi nesiphohlongo wenkhweli-yana, iMasipala waseShiselweni yavumela emhlangano lowawuphutfuma lapho kwaphakamisa khona sitibane sikahulumende kutsi lolu daba luyasicinisekisa. Tikhulumi tetinkhundla letimbili tsatse inkulumo kwashiwo ngayo kutsi imali yekwakhiwa kabusha kwemigodzi isikhishwe nguMnyango WemaNdla Nemanti. Emakhansela ayalele umphakati kutsi wonke umuntfu losewumele imphakati kufake tibongo takhe ezikhundleni letimisiwe ngaphambi kunesiphelelo senkhweli-yana. Kucondziswa kwalelicala sekubekwe emahlombe emaphoyisa emadolobha kanye netindvuna letisemkhatsini wemphakati, lokuyacinisekisa kutsi imiklamo yekwakhiwa izoqalwa ekucaleni kwenyanga letako.

Emalulwane lasedolobheni lase-Manzini asho kutsi bahlali labedlula 3,000 base-Msunduza nabakhalele indlela lemikhukhu yabo ingekahlengwa iminyaka leminingi. Emakhansela elidolobha akhiphe sitatimende lesingcondvo ngeviki lelidlulile, acondza kutsi umtsetfo lomusha wolwakhiwo wawo ukhipha tigaba letitsite temali tekuhlawulisa lemikhukhu longakahlelwa kahle. Ngaloku, kuhlosiwe kutsi kuvinjelwe kuchubeka kwekulandza libala ekuhleleni tindlu. Tiphatsimandla telindlela netetigodi letomake tikhombise kutsi ticala maphrojekthi ekufaka emajubhileni emanti lahlantekile nasezindleleni, kucala ngesifunda saseNorthern Region. Isinandvo setemfuwo bese sigcizelela kutsi bantfu labakhuluma ngebuphofu kufanele babhalise etigodzini tabo kutsi batfole lusito lwehulumende ngekukhululeka. Lomtsetfosigungu utsintsa ngemasu lamasha ekwakhiwa kabusha kwetindzawo temphakathi, kufaka ngetindlu tekugezela nemehlela emasikolo esifundzeni.

Ngetulu kwemalulwane lesikhungo setemphilo saseNhlangano yeMasipala eManzini sesivulwe kabusha emuva kwekuhlanjululwa nokuphindze kuphucuzwe ngemphumelelo, inhloso leyikhulekwile yekukhonta tiguli letingesikimi letingeke tifinyelele emagciweni lekuye kuwo. Sibhedlela lesi, lebesivaliwe iminyaka lemibili ngenxa yekushaywa kwaso ngulwandle lwemvula nasekunakiwa kwako kwaswela imali, manje sewuphindze wavulwa ngaphasi kweluhlobo lolusha lwebantfu lababekhona ngesikhathi sekuvulwa kwako. Sikhandlu setemphilo seMasipala sivumile kutsi sizokhona kukhonta ngetulu kwetikhulu letine etigulini ngelanga linye, kutsi yinhlanganisela yematisini kanye nesikhungo lesicishe sikheleke embili. Tiphatsimandla tigcizelele futsi kutsi imishini lemisha yekuhlola igazi kanye nekubukisa emitimba isikhokhelwe ngetikhwama letivela embusweni, ngenhloso yekunakekelela impilo yabantu labakhona endaweni yonkhe yeMasipala ngaphandle kwekubona linani lentengo njengesivimbelo.

Emagodzi lasemaphandleni aseNgwempisi sewashiywa ngemuva ngumsebenti wetigodzi watsi uyawukhipha umbiko lowubonakalisa kutsi imiphakathi leminyenti kayenelisi kuthola emanti lacocekile noma emcondvo welugwembu. Kulandza umbiko lowachazwa eNdvuna yeTimphahla, imiphakathi leli emibili kwemashumi lamatsatfu ngeke itfole lusito kuze kutiphele tinyanga letisitfupha, ngesizatfu sekusweleka kwetimali talokulungiswa. Imikhakha yemphakathi ikhalela kutsi imigwaco yasekhaya ifile kabi, futsi amanye emakhaya asahlala ngekushayiswa kwemanti kabili evekeni kuphela. Inkhosi yalabomdabu yetsi ikhulekile kakhulu ngendlaba le, yatikhulumela emhlangweni webantfu losuka esindzaweni sasetinkhundleni iSipho Dlamini, yabeka kahle kutsi "imiphakathi ayifanele ifele ngekulindza lusito." Hulumende weSifundza uboshele tikhiphi tetimphahla temphakathi ngelitsemba lokutsi imiphakathi leyo itawuphatseka ngalolusha ngato lusizi ngekucala kwekota lelandzelako.

Emagodzi lamaSiswati lasemaphandleni nasetikhulwini tabo kute kwenta imphilo ibe lula, uHulumende weSwatini ukhiphe umtsetfo lomusha lophatselene nekuhlinzekwa kwemanti lahlantekile emakhaya. Ngekwemibiko lekhishwe nguMnyango Wetimphilo neManti, kucalwa kwemsebensi wekwakha tindlela tetintfo temanti etifundzeni letintsatfu telive leli. Tikete tematafula letitasetjentiswa emphakathini tikhombise kutsi malunga ne-60,000 emakhaya asakhona ngaphandle kwemanti lahlantekile langagcina impilo. Loku kubheke kululamisa ngekwakhiwa kwetimpompi nema-pipeline lamasha langasita emakaya nge-2026. Bahlali labavela eSiphofaneni bakhulumile ngenjabulo ngalomhlangano, baphawula kutsi bahlale kahle ngemuva kweminyaka lemine belindile. Kumbe kubonakala kutsi i-Municipality yaseNhlangano nayo ikhanyise ngaloluhlelo, ikamukele lilungelo lekusebentisana naHulumende ekwehliseleni bulukhuni lolutsintsene nemphakathi wetimphakathi.

Emagciweni emadolobheni laseManzini, bafakhi bemapayipi nemanti sebashaye ikhanda ngenkinga yekuphelwa kwemanti lafinyelela emagciweni lamakhulu ngemvakwa kwekuphuka kwemapayipi lamakhulu. INdvuna yeSifundza ikhulume ngalendaba ehlanganisweni yebaholi bemiphakathi, ivuma kutsi inkinga leyo isimangalise inani lelikhulu labahlali labangakwati kutfola emanti lahlantekile ekhaya. Umkhandlu weSifundza uchaze litulu lekuchitha imali lengetulu kwemiliyoni ye-emalangeni lesitfupha ekucondziseni lemapayipi lafile kanye nekwakhiwa kwamathangi emanti lamasha labosekela imiphakathi lekhulukako. Kuyekelwa kwentela kwalamabhizinisi lasebenta emgodzini manje kusawunakwa njengendlela yekukhuthaza tikampani tekwakha letintsha. Bahlali bayacelwa kuba nembekezelo ngesikhatsi imisebenti yekwakhiwa iqhubeka, kepha sibonakaliso sesivele sitfungelwe etindzaweni letine lapho imisebenti ichala khona kusasa. Umkhandlu ubhekise bonkhe bahlali kutsi babike loba yikuphi kuphazamiseka kwemanti ngendlela yesim'semi kuze

Tindzawo letedlula letinkhulukati letingema-5,000 kuyetfula semanti lahlobile netidzingo letinye letiyinhloko tabo eNgwempisi nezinye tindzawo tasemaphandleni. Hulumende webhuphi ukhulumile ngalokhu, achaze kutsi umkhankhaso lomusha wekufakwa kwetimbobo temanti usecelwe kusebenta ekupheleni kwemnyaka lowetako. Tinhlangano temphakathi tibuye taphakamisa imibono yawo emihlangweni leyabitwa ngulabaphatsimandla, lapho abahlali bachaza inkateko lekhukhuliseke imiphilo yabo yonkhe. Inhlangano yeMasipala iphendule ngekutsi imitsetfo lemisha iyasetjentiswa kutfuka kutsi imali yemlomo yeHulumende iya kulona msebenzi ngempela. Ngaphandle kwaloko, lochungechunge lwetimali lwelizwe luweleke kutsi tigaba letitsite temimango titawuba yindzawo yekuqala kulelibiwe. Kusebenta kakhulu kwetitfombo temphakathi kuyindlela ebalulekile yekulungisa budlelwane phakati kweHulumende nabahlali, ngobe tidzingo tabo tivakale futsi tiphendulwe ngesikhashana.

Emalulwini lasemaphandleni eSithobela, bantfu labedze bahlala babhekene nenkhinga yekushaywa kwemgwaco lowawudzabukile nalokungatsi angeke uphindze wentiwe. Ngeleligugu, iNdvuna yeSifunda seSithobela ikhulume ngaloluhlelo lolusha lwekulungiswa kwemigwaco, itjelela bantfu kutsi imali ingatfolakala ngenyanga letako kubatsengi balemisebenti. Kulinganiselwa kutsi emakhilomitha langaphezu kwematfupha nemashumi lamabili emgwaco lawendzuliwe asemiwa emkhakheni lo kusukela ngabo-2018. Buchwepheshe bemHlaba nateSimo Setimphahla behlangane naSifunda lemine kusewula kwelive kuvumela kutsi imisebenti iqale ekuseni kwenyanga yeMphala. Bantfu labakhona emhlanganweni babutsela tinhloko temindeni kutsi bacobelele bafana nematje nentabamlilo baze bayophucula lemigwaco ngaleyonkhe indlela. Lamahhovisi emaNdvuna asemkhakheni avule ematuba etikhalo tekubitwa lamavilanisi nge-WhatsApp kanye nangefoni kwekukhala nga-9177 kulabo labafuna kutfola lwati lwengetiwa ngaloluhlelo.

Etigodzini letendlula, iNingizimu Afrika ibhekane netikhinga letinkhulu ekulawuleni kwemanti ematjeni landzaweni letinyenti temaphandle. Emagodzi lamaningi ahlala emaphandleni ale-Eswatini nawo asingatsi awaconsi ngemuva, njengoba imiphakati ikhala ngekungabi nemanti lacocekile lagelela njalo etikhulwini nasemagcugcwini. Tinkhundla letisebentako tinikite imibiko etibukela budzala betintfo tasemaphandleni, lapho bantfu labaningi basashona imigwaco lengete yonakala ngesikhatsi semvula. Bukhali bemphakathi beNkhaba, uNomsa Dlamini, ukhulume ashito kutsi bantfu basekhona ema-nyanga lamanyenti balindele letintfo tibe sihle, kodvwa kusho kwakhe, tichukunyiswa tinyanga letendlula kuphela. Hulumende weSifundza sewushele lamaprojekthi ekulungiswa kwemigwaco kutsi atawuqala ngenyanga letalandzelako, njengoba imali yemsebenti sewukhishiwe ngokusemtsetfweni. Imiphakati icelwa kutsi ihlale ibukele lokukhona kwemisebenti lekhishelwe etindzaweni tayo, iphindze ibike nganome ngusiphi sikhinga asiboni

Emalanga langu adlulile, iNdvuna yeSifundza saseShiselweni yabita umhlangano wekuphutfuma lapho kwaxoxwa khona ngekukhula kwengoti yebulwane lobukhulu emagcekeni emaphandla. Tinhlangano tekuphila emadolobheni nasetindzaweni temaphandla ticondziswe kutsi tingalugatsi kulumkisa tiguli letingasati ngemkhuba lo. Ngekwemibiko leyetfulwa yiNdzawo yeTekuphila, kuye kwabikwa tiguli letidlula ekhulwini nakushumi lesikhombisa kuphela nje emavikini lamabili. Bakhokhi bemaliya basesifundzeni labayingcili bashiwo kuhlomisa imphilo yabantu ngekuhlinzeka ngetikhali tekuhlanza umtimba kanye nemitsi lebalulekile. Abazali bacondziswe kakhulukwi kutsi baciniseke kutsi bantfwana babo bayawuhlolwa ngulabo labaneluvo lwekuphila ngaphambi kokutsi sikhungo sesikolo sivule. Inhlangano yase-eSwatini yekulawula tigulo (EWCA) iphindze yatfumela ticaphuno temitsi emagcekeni lamane lasesifundzeni, futsi leyomitsi itawuniketwa mahala kubo bonkhe labadzinga lusito.

Tindzawo letendlulela ngemakhulu lamabili tekudlala naletekufundza titfolakala emaphandleni eHhohho, kantsi inkhinga yekuswelakala kwato isalokhu ibeketelela bantfwana labanyenti. Ikhomishini yeLemfundvo ibikene naletinkhinga ekuceleni kwe-2024, itfumele umbiko lotsi kudzingeka kuphishitela tifundza letingaletwa ngalomsebenti. Ngenhloso yekubhekana nalesi simo, iNkhosi yendvundvuma lachulumantako iyente luhlangotsi lwayo, icela tinhlangano letizimele kutsi tihlanganyele ngehle ngehle neHulumende ekwakheni tigcawu tekudlala netindlu tekufundza. Inhlangano yekuchamuka yebantfu baseShiselweni ikhiphe sitatimende sicela kutsi lemisebenti iphutfumisiwe ngaphambi kwekuphela kwalomnyaka wekufundza. Bantfwana labadlula ema-4,000 emaphandleni lahlukene basahlala ngehansi kwemtimba lakulukhuni, lapho bafundza ngaphansi kwetisekelo letifundzisako letingakaneli. Batfumelwa imibiko ngalokunyenti, kantsi baholi bendlunkulu bacacise kutsi lendzaba itawubhekwana nayo n

Ngetulu kwe-2,500 wetimphilo letifana nebantfwana kanye nebomake labakhulelwe sebeyamukela lusito lwetemutsi ngetikhatsi letinzima eTown Council yaseNhlangano. Inhlangano yeSive leSindze Lihle ikhiphe umbiko lokhombisa kutsi imphilo yalabantfu iyaphila ngekushesha kakhulu emvakwa kwetfutfukiswa kwezinsitakalelo letitsite. Kute nje emaphoyisa kanye nabalondvoloti bemphilo labashiyweleko etigodzini letisemakhaya, inhlangano yashicelela hulumende kutsi anike imphendvulo yeshesha. Wetimphilo tekwelashwa latefika nge-Mandulo kuletindzawo lazikhashane nemigwaqo leyahlukile asatfoli lutfo lwemali yekutikhokha. Umphakati wasuka ngamanye lamavi, ukhiphela embhalo wekucela sikhulu semmango sitfule indzaba kulowonkhe umuntu lonemandla ekugucula lokubi lokukhona. Ngetikhatsi tonkhe letimbi, imikhakha yemphilo nemfundvo kufanele ihlangane ngekusebentisana ekuguculeni inchilo lekwehla kwentsengo yebantfu.

Emagciweni aseNhlangano, bashayeli bematekisi nebahweli sebamile ngekukhala ngekutsatsa kwesikhathi setekisi kungenela emalayini, inkhinga lebitfwa sekungeminyaka lemidze. Tigciwane letinyenti letisekhatsi saluhlu letingekakulungiswa tiholela ekucindezeleka kwabashayeli, lababike kutsi baphuluka netinzuzo temihla ngemihla ngebanga lalenkinga. INdvuna yeLihhovisi leHulumende yaseNhlangano, ekhuluma emhlanganweni nebantfu bendawo emsombuluko lophelile, yativisa kutsi silwela lesihlangabetana nebashayeli sinikwe liphayikhudi elikhulu, futsi tikhomishini letifanele setiqalile ngekuphenya.
