Bashayeli laba, lababengenasicapho, babonga kutsi bonkhe lobabebabukisisa bangabeka emuva. Umkhandlu wetindzawo ubeke lichaphelo lelikhulu lekulungiswa kwetindlela temalayini ekhasimendeni lemali leyandza, futsi lishicilelwe kutsi imisebenti iyawuqala ngenyanga letako.

Ngetikhulu temindeni letigcilatsekile etifundzeni taseHhohho, kukhulunywe ngekushesha ngendlela lokufanele kutfutfukiswe ngayo emagcolo emiphakatsi. Likomidi leMphakatsi waseShhewula likhiphe umbiko lowembula kutsi imiphakati leminyenti isaphila ngaphandle kwemanti lacocekile nekugibela tilungu takucala. Tindlela letifile kanye nemitfombo yemanti longakholeki kusho ukonakala lokunkulu emphakatsini. Nalatsi, bahlali labadvutane nendzawo yaseNdlunkhulu babika kutsi sebegula kabili ngelisontfo ngenxa yemanti langecocekile. Libito lalaba bantfu libe libikwa eMnyangweni weLipilo neteMpilo, lowaphendvula ngekutsi utitfumela tinyanga tekuhlola indzawo. Tifundvo letikhishwe nguNgwane Statistical Office timembula kutsi malelwa ngemakhulu lasikhombisa emindeni etifundzeni tasemaphandleni ingakatsintsi ngisho ngisho emabhayisikili wekuphisa kwemanti lacocekile. Hulumende ugcizelela kutsi imibango yemphakati izwakala, kepha tinyanga tekucala kumele tidlule nemibango lebalulekile yemikhakha ngaphambi kwekutsi emadl

Indzawo yetimphilo letisondzela emalokishini lasedvute neBig Bend setikhulile ngendlela lekhulu ngemuva kwekuvulwa kwesikhungo semphilo lesisha lapho khona bantfu bangaphezu kwema-5,000 sebatawunikwa lusito lwetemphilo lwemihla ngemihla. Lesikhungo, lesakhiwa ngemali yehulumende wesifundza kanye naleyo yabadla lubisi bemphakathi, sativula eminyango yaso ngesonto lelifile. Bahlali lababehambe imigodzi leyindlela lenganyeliwe baya emtfolweni lowawukude manje sebajabule ngalokuchazekako. Tigciwane letifana nesifo sekuphefumula kanye nemalaria titawuphatfwa ngendlela lehle etinklinikini letintathu letehlukene ngekhatsi kwesikhungo. Umphakathi ubongele kahle lokuphila lokutfolakele, nabanye baluleka kutsi nolunye lusito lwemphakathi lufike masinya. Titfupha tetindvuna tetimphakathi tivele tinikele tawubambisana nalabaphathi besikhungo kuze kucinisekiswe kutsi indzawo iyasebenta ngendlela lefanele emalanga onkhe.

Bahlali bendlu lebebangetulu kwema-2,500 baseNhlangano naletindzawo letisondzele kuyo sebetfola tindlela letintfwa letakhiwa nguHulumende weSive ngekusebentisana neBandla laseNhlangano. Imigwaco lebinetinhlupheko letinkhulu ngekwendlula kwemimoya lebukhali neyemvula yanyakatela emuva, kepha manje isimile ngetindlela letiphephile letekelela imiphakathi yonkhe. Letindlela letintfwa tivulele abalimi indlela lencono yokufaka imkhicito wabo eMakethe yeNdvuna, lokutewusita ekukhuliseni umnotfo wendawo. Lenhlangano yemikhicito yetemvelo nayo ikhulume ngekwemukelana kwayo nalesimo, itsi leli thuthuko leli lingasita amalungu ayo ekutfola imininingwane ngemkhicito kulula kakhulu. Mphatsiswa lolandzela Temphilo, Dr Sibusiso Dlamini, ukhulume etintseni takhe wati kutsi uhulumende uyawuqhubeka nemizamo yokuthuthukisa imiphakathi yasemaphandleni, akagcini lapho kuphela kepha ufuna nokuqinisa luhlelo lwemifundze yonkhe.

Ngetikhulu tekudla letekhulunywe emhlanganweni wemphakathi lowawubanjwa eLobamba ngesonto leledlule, batsandzi bendalo nabahlali bakhombise inkinga lekhulu ngekucondzwa kwemahlati laseManzini. Ngekunika lulwatsi, iNhlangano yeLive leliMphusha ibikhiphe umbiko lowatsi imiti lemagidigidi lamashumi lamabili nakuhlanu iyanqunywa ngunyaka ngaphandle kwemvumo yemtsetfo. Kulandzela lomusho lona, sikhulu lesinye saleNhlangano, Nkhosi Mduduzi Dlamini, simeme baholi betifundza kutsi basukumele kulwela licebo lelimelele imvelo. Bakhonkhi betemphilo nabo bavumele kutsi kucondzwa kwemahlati kuvikela imiti lenye yemitsi yesikhatsi semandvulo. INdvuna yeNdlunkulu yalaNdvunankulu, naye wakhuluma ngaleligama, watsi hulumende uyalihlola lelihlandla ngekuphutfumela. Kumiswa kwemitsetfo lemitfsha mayelana nekucutjwa kwemhlaba kulindeleke kutsi kumenyetelwe ngekuphelela kwenyanga lendlela.

Emasangweni emaphandleni ase-Lubombo, bahlali labanyenti basavuka ekuseni batfwale tindziwo tabo tikhwela imibili noma imitsatfu baye emifuleni layikhatsi kuyofuna emanti ekupheka nekugeza. Loluhlupho selungemuva kweminyaka lemaningi, futsi lubonakala lungesisi ngekushesha. Inhlangano yekuvikela ematfufu i-SWADE ibhikishe kutsi iphrojekthi yekufaka emapayipi emanti esigodzini lesikhulu icedze ekupheleni kwelinyanga lesilandzelako, lokuyakwehlisa umthwalo lowesabekako lowetfulwa ngabakabekhona emphakatsini. Nganeno kwaloko, baholi bemiphakati babeke sikhalo esiphutfumako embikwayo uNgwenyama, becela kutsi imigwaco leyake yashova emanti etfutfukelwe ngekushesha. Tinhlangano tekusita emphakatsini nako tikhombise kubambisana tekupha lusito lwetindleko tekuphila kwemindeni lentfwa. Hulumende usho kutsi utsatse loluhlupho njengehaga lokuphutfumako futsi utsembisa kutsi titfulo tetimali tiyawunikwa emasangweni lahluphekileko ekucaleni kwenhlwabula lelandzelako.

Ngetikhungo letendlulele tebantfu letingaphansi kwemkhakha wekufuya tilwane, lihhovisi lelibhekele tindzaba tekuphumelela kwelive leSwatini likhiphe umbiko lotsi kukhona kwehlela lokukhulu kwenombolo yetimphilo tetinkhomo eveni lonkhe. Letinkhomo tashaywa sifo lesabiwako lebitwa ngekutsi yifoot-and-mouth disease, lesite kuyenga nuketelo wemave langaphandle. Lendlela lesimanga lesikhungo sicheme ngayo bekukhona kwemitsetfo leyengetiwe yekutsi tonkhe tinkhomo tekubamba tingagucuki ngekungatfumbi imvume yesinye sikhungo. Emalanga lamatfupha lawedlule, tiphatsimandla tava emasimu lamane eveni laseHhohho lapho ekhona bungoti babona letimibango temitimba yetinkhomo. Yonkhe indzawo lecondzene naleyo indzawo yafakwa ekuvalweni kwentela kulawulwa kuyenga kwesifo. Labalimi labanetinkhomo letehlisekile batjengiswe lusito lwekuphila, kepha labanye basekhala ngekutsi lusito alwanele tindzingo tabo. Hulumende uyakhala kutsi bonkhe labalimi bacobelele namalungu etiphatsimandla

Emalunga etindzawo tetemaphandleni eManzini District asachubeleka ngekusheshe ngemuva kwemhlangano lowawubanjelwe eSipho Community Hall ngesonto leledlulile, lapho kwaxoxiswana khona ngemibuto yemiphetfo yemgwaco longatfolakali kahle. Tikhalo tetakhamuti letidze iminyaka letinhlanu tivele ngembili ngekuphelela, tichaza budisi lobabonakala nsuku tonkhe ekufutana nasekufika ezikolweni netemakethe. Labomakadze kanye nemindeni lenenshona basholo kutsi bangazange bawuvimbele umuntu lowagula ebusuku ngebanga lemigwaco lemibi. Ikhomishana yetemigwaco yesifundza yatsandza kutsi yavuma kwentiwa kwalolu phikelelo, futsi iphikelele kutsi tikhontilakhitha letitawukhethwa kufanele tibe nemikhuba lemihle yekusebenta ngendlela lefanele. Umholi wetakhamuti, Nkhosi Mfanafuthi Dlamini, ushilo kutsi sikhatsi sekwakha siyatawutsandzeka kumenyetelwa ngaphambi kwekuphela kwenyanga lentatfu letako, ngekusho kwakhe lokwatekwa njengethemba lelikhulu libakheli balesifundza.

Tindzawo letingetulu kwemashumi lasikhombisa emagceke tekulima letisemaphandleni eSoshanguve titfolakele tikhatsatekile ngenxa yemvula lebhubhile ngesonto leledlulile, lokushiye tilimo tetigaba letinyenti tichitheke ngekuphelela. Labalimi sebakhuluma ngesici lesesimangalisako, betsi imisebenzi yabo yeminyaka lebahlele ngakhona secondzakele. Bukhona bebantfu labebonakele endzaweni yekuhlangana kwemphakathi, lapho iNkhosi yeNdlunkulu ibita ngekhanda kutsi butsandvo kanye nekusebentisana kuyindlela yekuphuma kulokusindza. Hulumende usasho kutsi usesebenta ngemukelano wetfuso letitawusita labalimi labavivinyeke, kodvwa lokuphutfumako kusekufuneka. Emakhansela emaphandleni ate lamazwi ngesibindi, atsi luhlobo lwekusita loluphutfuma lwetfushane alwanele, futsi kufanele kube nemicebo yekumelana netimvula letimbi temangaliso. Tindvuna tasemiphakathini tikhuthaza kutsi bonkhe labanesidzingo babutisele emabito abo kute basizwe ngesikhashana lesichumile.

Ngetindzawo letinyenti telive laseSwatini, tikhatsi tetimvula tetfule inchindze lenkhulu emikhatsini yemigwaco, indzaba lebeseyinhluphekisa imiphakathi iminyaka lemidze. Emagodzi lase-Shiselweni kanye nase-Lubombo akhuluma ngeminyaka yekucindezeteka kwemigwaco labika kubhubhisa tizithelo kanye netikhwama tetekuhweba. Lulekile Nkhosi, lokhuluma egameni lemphakathi wase-Nhlangano, ukhombise kutsi loluphitsitelo luyashayisa umnotfo webhubesi ngekutsi kuletse tinchinga temalintsa ekuwohluleleni tezithelo nasetimakethe letikude. Itikheli tetingwenyama kanye netekucwangcisa kwebantfu takhombisa kutsi ngetulu kwetimphahla letishintjwa nsuku tonkhe, inani laletimphahla liyaphuleka ngenxa yemigwaco lemimbi. Hulumende webetake emkhatsini wetikhatsi tetimvula ngekuthumela tikhali tekusebenta emaphakelo lamacinkhaba, noko imiphakathi isatfula inkanga yokulindza tisombululo letitfutfukile. Ticaphuna tikhambiso tangaleli nyanga, tiphathi temindeni tifune kutsi imiklamo yekwakhiwa kwemig

Emalunga emacembu etinkhundla letisemaphandleni eSwatini asangenele emhlanganweni lobalulekile lowentiwa nguBhodi wetiNhlalakahle yaNatsi ngesonto leledlule eNhlangano yeLive, lapho kwaxoxwa khona ngetindlela tokunikeza lusito emphakatsini lowedze ngekusebenta kwemashini ekugcineni kwemnyaka. Kwachunyuka kahle kutsi emakhaya lashaya ngekusweleka kwekudla atsite atawunikwa emakhetsi ekudla kutsi aphumele kuwo ngekushesha, lokuhlanganisa lemakhaya lahlala emifudlana lebalelwa ku-2,400 emakethe. Ngalokunjalo, tiphatsimandla taNkhundla letitfintwa ngetindaba talo mkhankaso tatjelwa kukhipha emacembu etibambiso kutsi atibhalise kahle ngaphambi kwelilanga lesitfupha ngenyanga yaMabasa. Luhlelo lolu, lwakhelwa ekhaya yeSwaziland National Provident Fund neyeMasiko, lweluswe nguHulumende njengentela yekunakekela bantfu labaphila ngekuswela kakhulu emaphandleni. Tindvuna tetinkhundla netikomidi temigwamanda tatcelwa kutsi tisize ekususeleni lumbiko emphakatsini lowetsemba kakhulu emhlangano lonjalo.

Emalunga asemakhaya aseNhlangano ngalelilanga avete inhloli yekutsi tikhungo tekwelapha tesifunda asekasebenti ngendlela lefanele, njengesimo lesinye lesitsite inhlangano yesifundza. Tigulane letinyenti tikhala ngekutsi tifika emtsetfweni wekwelapha titfole kuphelelwa kwemitsi kanye natiguli letihlangana nebantfu labangafundzi ngemisebenti yabo. Likhansela lekuphatha lelivela kuleya ndzawo livete libiko lelikhombisa kutsi imali lebekelwe yonkhe indzawo yeWelapha ayikeneli kufikela esifundzeni sonkhe. Kuphutfumiselwa kwemitsi kufanele kucinisekiswe nguHulumende weSive waseSwatini ikakhulu emavikini lamashumi lamabili nakune lasemuva. Bantfu basemalokishini sebetsite batawufaka ticelo emtsetfweni wetimphahla telebantfu kanye naManyala Lehulumende kuze kutsatfwe tinyatselo letehlukile. Ikhomishana lefanele ngalokufanelekile itawuhlola imibiko yonkhe yalabo labatsi bangakwelamulela ngemuva kwesivumelwano lesentiwa nguHulumende naletindlela tekuphatha.

Ngetikhathi temvula letidzimate kudlula, imiphakathi leminyenti etigodzini teSwaziland ibhekene nebunzima lobukhulu ngenxa yekugeleta kwemifula nekugebetemuka kwemhlaba, lokushiye emakhaya lamanyenti ngaphandle kwemisebenti yangekhaya nemikhondvo yekuniketela emanti. Bakheli betigodzi taseShiselweni bakhulume ngekukhatsateka kwabo lapho bahlangana khona emhlanganweni webantfu babo emasontweni lambalwa adlule, betsi imigwaco leyakhiwe ngekucosha kwabantwana basesikolo isentele yonkhe inhlangano. Hulumende wesifundza ubesivele ukhiphe sikhombiso sokulungisa lenkinga, kodvwa inhlangano yebantfu yetfule umbono wekutsi imali lehlongotwako kayeneli kulungisa konke lokwonakele. Tinkhundla tetetemula temhlaba tatsi letimphakathi letisondzele eMkhondvo waseLusutfu tingatewela ngekugobhoka kwemikhondvo yemanti lengetiwako uma imvula iyacobelela njengaloku kuboniwa esikhatsini lesidzimate. Tigciwane tekwakhiwa kabusha kwemigwaco nemikhondvo tanikwa liba lawo kulomhlaka weLweti kuya kuMabasa wanyaka loweta

Tindzawo letingetelwe tigodzi te Shiselweni kanye neLubombo titfole lusito lolukhulu ngemuva kwekukhatsateka lokukhona kwetiminyaka leminyenti ngekushaywa yimvula lencane kanye nekulahlekelwa kwemacebo ekufuya tilwane. Ngemkhandlu waleli sifundzamgodzi, liciniso lekutsi tinhlaka temiphakati yelinywa ngelive letabela lonkhe longiwo sekucashwe emyeneni ngesikhatsi salesinye sesihlanu senhlelo yekwakhiwa kabusha. Labakhokhi bemtimba kanye netinhlangano letingekho ngaphansi kahulumende banikela ngemandla atisidvuba kanye nematsambo emashini ekusekela leligiya elitfolakele. Abakhi base Sithobelani, base Hluthi, kanye nabase Nhlangano batfole timphahla tekubhala kanye netitfunjwa tekukhonkosha tilwane ngetinkhomba temphikisano wetiphatsimandla. Hulumende usite ngebhajede leligayisa emakhulu emiliyoni ngekulandzela kwesikhatsi semalanga langema-60 lacondzile ekusekela letigodzi. Emakhosi lamabili asigodi lajoyinela labaphathi belmphakati ekuteketisa umcimbi loBukhosi LobuSiswati,

Emasangweni eManzini, bafundzi labedlula inkhulungwane letisikhombisa bafike esikolweni ngelisontfo lelidlulile kutawuhlangana nebantfwana bemakhaya labahlukene, inhloso yalomcimbi ibite kutfutfukisa kucondza kanye nekusebentisana emkhatsini webantfwana bemave ahlukene. Lomcimbi, lowentelwa ngekubambisana nelihhovisi letemfundvo nesifundza sakaManzini, wawubuka tibhalo, imidlalo, kanye netincwadzi letibhaliwe ebantfwaneni. Bafundzi labanengi bakhulume ngenjabulo yekuhlangana nabanye bantfwana, futsi batsi lomcimbi ubafundze inkhani leningi ngetindzaba letivela kulamanye emakhaya eSwaziland. Unhloko wesikole wakhuluma ngekujabula ngekuphumelela kwemcimbi, waphindza wacinisekisa kutsi umcimbi lonjengalona uyawuphindveka ngonyaka lotako, ngoba wubona inzuzo enkulu emphakatsi wetintfwana. Baholi bemphakati bakhuthata ticumbi letinye kutsi ticobelane tindzaba letinjengaleti futsi tifundze emkhatsini wawo, ngoba kubambisana kuleta inluzuluzo lenkhulu emphakatsini weS

Ngetulu kwetigodzi letingema-2,500 tekuhlala letisemaphandleni aseNhlangano District setikhona sekutsola ngekutsi tikhala tawo tendzawo letifana nemigwaco lemidala kanye nemishini yekukhipha emanti lengasasebenzi kahle. Loluphela lwesikhathi loluningi bantfu babekhala ngekutsi baphila ngekuswela emanti lahlantekile, kutsi bantfu balapha bashiyiwe emuva ekutfutfukisweni. Ngemuva kwemihlangano lemihlanu lefakwa yiNational Rural Development Committee, setsenjiswa kutsatfwa kwesinyatselo lesibonakalako sekulungisa leyo mikhuba emibi. Kufundziswa kwalawo maphiko langu lokubhekelela emanti kanye nemigwaco, etikhatsi letitako tihlanganyele ekufundzweni kwetidzingo tabo bantfu. Ikhomishini lesinelibito lekutsi Southern Development Authority ike yaniketa iripoti lakhombisa kutsi tinhlanganyelo telokutfutfukisa tidzingeka njengehlobo lekushesha. Bantfu labahlala kuleto tindawo bakhutatswa kutsi bahlangane emakhanseleni abo, batsi yonkhe imibiko layenako ifakwe ekubhalweni, ngekutsandza kwekuqinisekisa kutsi emaphrojekthi l

Ngetfuwa lenyanga, emalunga emiphakathi yaseManzini uphakamise imibono yawo ngekuphila lokunyakatela kwetengiselwano etindaweni tasemadolobheni lamancane. Batakhamiti labanyenti bakhala ngekutsi imigwako leyakhiwe eminyakeni lemidze kayisasebengi kahle, nendzaba yemanti lamasha isatsi isisombululo lesigcwele. Umbikwana lokhululekile wenta bukhona bwakhe endzaweni yaseSiteki, lapho kutsiwa bakaphi labagcina titolo temhlaba batfola tetfulo telwazi ngebizo leLand Management Programme. Lomkhankaso ugcizelela kutsi bonkhe bantfu lase-eSwatini kufanele batfole ilungelo labo ngaphandle kwetingucuko noma kwemukela iminikelo ngaphandle kwemtsetfo. Sikhulumi salombuto Nkhosi Dlamini ukhulume kahle ngekutsi hulumende uzimisele kukhutsata kulingana ekuphatseni umhlaba kute kuncishiswe buphina nakunganakwa kwemalungelo ebantu. Temfundvo nemaphephandaba asetindzaweni takhalimela bonkhe labanelwazi kwetfula etikhundleni temphakathi.

Emalunga laseManzini wesifundza wangenela ihlangano yekukhuluma ngetatimphilo letiphatsene nemiphakathi lesehlukene evikini lelidlulile, lapho kwachazwa khona kutsi imiphakathi leminyenti isehlangana nebunzima lobukhulu ekutfoleni emanti lahlobile nome emanti lacocekile. Kwachazwa nguSihlalo weSikhundla kutsi tiphrojekthi letimbili tekufakwa kwemgchanyo wemanti sete tikaphela ngesizatfu sekuntfola imali, loko lokuwete umehluko omkhulu kubantu labadzinga lusito ngalolunyenti. Kwaphindvwa kwachazwa kutsi inombolo yetindlu letigelwa yekufinyelela emantini lacocekile isukumele esigabeni lesikhulu, kodvwa umsebenzi wekwakha imikhono yemanti uyaphutsuka ngesizatfu semishini lemfishane. Tigciwane letifika ngekuphindvwa kwekungabi nemanti tichamuselana netinkhinga tekugula emakhaya, kubese imiphakathi iyakhala kutsi inhloko yayo ayingezwakali. Umkhandlu uphindze wase utfembisa kutsi imali yekutsatfwa kwemsebenti ulandzekile uyawufika ekupheleni kwenyanga kufokotela.

Emalulwini aseNhlangano, tinhlangano tetindzawo tasekhaya tikhulumile ngendaba yekushoba kwemanti lamahle ekuphilela kwemphilo. Inkhulu yendzawo, Mnumzane Themba Dlamini, ukhulumile kulomhlangano webhodi, achaza kutsi emakaya lamaningi asasebentisa imifula neticoco tekupheka nekugeza. Inhlangano yekugcina imphilo yabantu itsite kufika kwalamanzi kuyini lwangu lolubalulekile lolungakapheli. Tinhlangano tekwakha tivela tisebenta nabaphathi bendawo ukucabanga tindlela tekuletsa emapayipi emanti kulamakaya langakawatfoli. Emakaya langema-2,500 asalindile loluphutfo, futsi bantfwana nabomake labakhulu ngibo labahlupheka kakhulu ngalenkhinga. Hulumende weSive ubitiwe ngulabantu kutsi usite ngekushesha, njengoba tiguli tasetimphini nalo emikhandlu yetikole tihlukumeta ngekushoba kwalomphelo lobalulekile. Kumelelwe kutsi iSidzabu Sehulumende sikhipha tigcamu ngekushesha kuze kuvimbeleke noma yimuphi umkhuhlane leningalenganiswa namanzi langcolile.

Ngetindlu letengeta ku-4,000 eNgwempisi letitfolakale ngaphansi kwemkhokha wekulima, bantfu base-sigodlweni lesifana neSiteki naseNhlangano sebakhuluma ngenhlupho yekutfola emanti lahlobile ekutsatsa timitsi. Umphakati ube uphakamisa lesikhalo isikhashane, kepha nyalo-ke kuyabonakala kutsi tinhlangotsi letibalulekile sete tilwelana nalo mkhuba ngekushesha lokufanele. Enkhundleni ye-Indvuna Yetenhlalakahle yeNingizimu yeMndzabu, kuvele kutsi umsebenzi wekuniketela tinsita temanti lomuhle utawuphutfuma ngenyanga letako. Labomalangabi bemphakati labafana naNkhosi Simelane basho kutsi batitfola emanti lanemacimbi lalandzelako ngesinye sikhatsi, lokwenta bantfu bawe bagule. Kubikwa kantsi emalanga laticiphi lambalwa laendlulile, tiguli letinchane letikhatsateka ngenkhinga yemanti tewukhunyulwa etibhedlela tesigodi letisondzele. Hulumende ucindzetelwe kutsi ente luhambo lolubhekelela lesi sidzabu ngekushesha, nekupha imphendvulo lebhalosiwe kumiphakati lefaka tinkinga t

Emagodzi lasenhla eMhlosheni, emahhovisi lamatsha-ntando asebenta ngekushesha ekuhlinzekeni bahlali ngemalwandle lanesimiso lesite lokwakha emakhaya lacinile. Kuchuliwe kutsi imiphakati leminyenti yalendawo ihlangabetane nebunzima lobukhulu ekutfoleni emanti lahlantekile nemagesi asebentako, ngobe indzawo yekusebenta kwemgesi beyinganakiwe iminyaka leminyenti. Bahlali lababevele bazibophele ekukhetseni kwabo bakhuluma ngelutfo lwabo lolubuhlungu, batsi bate litsemba letinhlangano takahulumende tiyabasita. Ngetindlela tekuphendvula, iNdvuna yendzawo ikhiphe sibhengezo lesichazako, itsi imisebenti yekuphatsa tidzingeko tetindzawo izoqala ngekushesha, kuhlanganise nekwakha tidzindza temahhala tekusetjentiswa ngimphakati wonkhe. Ngekuvumelana naloko, ticipho tekwakha tifakwe semakite laphezulu, kuhloswa kugcwalisa umsebenzi ngaphambi kwekuphela kwemnyaka welicala. Livi lemphakati lisho kutsi babe nelitsemba ngetikhuntswane letishicilelwe tivumbululwe, batsi

Emalokishi laseManzini naselundzini lwalo, bahlali labanekhulu letinkinga tekuthola emakhadi abo emazwe ekutalwa sebevuselelekile ngemuva kwekukhishwa kwenkhomba yeMnyango Wemakhaya. Kulandzelela umhlangano lowentiwa nguHulumende ekucaleni kwenyanga lendzlule, kuvunyiwe kutsi tindlu tekusebenzela tizovulwa ngemalanga lematfubu eviki esikhundleni selamathatfu lasedlulile. Labantu labedinga emakhadi abo manje batawuba nelikhetso lekufaka ticelo nge-inthanethi nome baye matfupha ematfoho lasekhaya. Lomgcinisikhwama weNkhosatana Dlamini, lowesebenta njengesikhulumi seNhlanganiso Yebahlali baseNhlangano yeManzini, ukhulume ngekujabula ngembiko lo, etsi isikhawu lesidlule sebatophele ngemandla. Imininingwane yonkhe letafunekako, kufaka ekhatsi emaphepha emvumo, kumele ifakwe ngaphambi kwemhlaka lesikhombisa wenyanga landzlule. Hulumende ukhuthate bahlali kutsi batfole ulwati lolupheleleko etikhundzleni tekukhonzela temphakathi ngaphambi kokufika ematfoho, kuso lesic

Ngetindlu letedlula timbili netinkhulungwane, temphakathi tasemaphandleni eTinkhundla letahlukene tiyancumelana nekutfola imiphangelo yemisebenti yehulumende ngendlela lesheshako nangayiteka kahle. Ngemuva kwemihlangano yeMkhandlu weSive lowentiwa enyangeni leyengcile, kuye kwatfolakala kutsi tiphatsimandla letinyenti titsatsa sikhatsi leside kutsi tiphendvule tifiso tebantfu, ikakhulukwane letiphatselene netikhwama temphilo kanye nemaphepha ekubhalisa kwetindzawo. Hulumende sewukhiphe liso kuleliphunga, futsi Umnyango Wetesive Nasetikhungweni Temphakathi sewukhiphe umyalelo locacile wekutsi ema-ofisi wonkhe emaphandleni kumele avule emavula kusukela ngehora lesiphohlongo kuze kufike esikhombiseni ntambama ngalelinye lilanga. Bashosheli bemphakathi sebajatsulisiwe yilenchubo, kodvwa batsatsa sibalo sendzaba ngetikhwama telwazi letita kubo ngesandla. Kuyemukeleka kutsi bantfu labanyenti abakabi nemavi lekwanele, ngakoke kutsintfwa kwabo etikhungweni kuseyinselele lenkhulu lelisal

Ngetindlu letedlula ti-4,000 letikhona eSwaziland letisaletile ngemuva kwemgomo wekulahlwa kwemakha lasemtsetfweni, njengobe iNdvuna yaseNhlangano yeLwatiwa lweNtfutfo ikhombise ekubikeni kwayo kwaleli sonto. Loluhlelo lwaluhloselwe kunceda imindeni lentfola bulukhuni ekuthola imvume yekwakha emakhaya ato. Bafaki-sicelo labanyenti baveza buka ngemisangweni yemahhovisi wemtsetfweni ngemalanga lamanyenti belandzela ulwati olungapheleleki ngematfulo lamadze futsi lanetindlela letikhimbana. Ngulosewudziwe weHhovisi leTindlu eManzini lowatsi bantfu labanyenti abalwati ngekutsi bagcwalise ticelo tabo ngendlela lefanele, kube yinchazelo yekuphazamisa. Hulumende sewuphendvule ngekuvula iSikhungo Sokukhonza Inhlangano eKhanyakude, lapho bantfu bangafika khona batfole lusito oluphokophelwe kanye nemavi lafanele malungana netidzingo tabo temhlabamlomo. Lisikhungo lesinsha sitawusebenta emalanga lasitfupha ngesonto, futsi siphongulwa ngutikhongeli letifundze

Emalunga lasebafike lapho emakhaya eSwatini, kufaka ekhatsi lawo laseDvuba neLuhlanga, asalandzele imishini lendzala yekutfola ematfombo emanti lahlantekile newo kufanele. Inhlangano yeLwati neMphilo yesive ikhombise kutsi ngaphezu kwemakhaya layi-4 500 asasebentelana netinhlupho tekufinyelela emanti lahlantekile evikini linye. Ngemva kwemihlangano letinyenti leyayinyatsa endzaweni ngendzawo, iNdvuna yeSifundza seLuhlanga imemetele kutsi kukhona tinhlelo letitsite letibekwe eceleni kwekusita lemalunga latraumatised. Tikhungo tesive naso sitsi kufaka imali kule ndzaba kuyincenye yenhlelo yesive lenkhulu yekwakhiwa kwetimphahla letiyinhloko. Emakholwa nemindeni yaletindzawo asho ngekushesha kutsi bafisa kubona kuphumela kwalomsebenti ngemuva kweminyaka leminengi yekukhonkothela. Tigciwane tetimphahla letite mahali kubandakanya kwakhiwa kwemahholo emiphakati namakhaya ekuhlala kwezintfo eziyinhloko tintsetfwa letiwumgogodla waletikhungo letisebentako.

Emakaya lasemagodzini eSwaziland amaningi asalinde lusito lwemibhalo yemaNdvuna leyatiwa njengama-ID, lekufanele inikwe bonkhe bantfu lababhalisiwe eHulumende. Liphiko leLamasiko neLulondoloto lwabaHlali likhiphe sitatimende lesishito kutsi tikhungo letinkhulu letifana neTinkhundla Centre kanye neOffice yeTown Council titawusetsa njengematikhiti ekwamukela tifaki temibhalo lelibalwa ema-Birth Certificate kanye nema-National ID Card. Bantfu labadze balinda iminyaka lamibili nekuya phambili batawukwati manje kufaka tifaki tabo ngaphandle kwekudla emaguzeni emadolobheni lamakhulu. Sitatimende lesisho lesi sikhuthata kutsi bonkhe labangakakhuphuli imibhalo yabo bete bafike etikhungweni letisedvute nabo. Tikhungo letikhipha lusito lolu titawuba mvulekile ngemalanga asikhombisa ngeviki, kufaka ekhatsi netiLwetfumbi, kuze kube khona kulula kubo bonkhe bantfu balufike lusito lolu ngesikhatsi lesifanele.

Tikhaya letendlula ezikhulwini te-4,500 etigodzini taseNhlangano nelavela eSiphovini seGege setibikele kahle tigciwane temilayeto lemisha yekutsatsa emagama etintfwana etisanda kutalelwa emisebentini yasekhaya. Kusukela ngoNyenye wanga-2024, iNkhundla yebuMalungelo baka-2 itfole umyalo wetakhiwo letisha wekutsi kufanele batfumele emagciwane abo kumnyango weTicwele teLicumbi lonkhe kwaphela ngaphambi kwekuphela kwamagciwane ekugucukela. Tindvuna taletindzawo satikhipha imiyalo lebalulekile kwaNgwenyama nabasebenzi balemphakathi kutsi kufanele bazisele bonkhe bantfu baletindawo leti nabafika kumhla wekusayinela imiphumela. Labakhiciti betikhwama temimangwane lemisha kwesinye sikhashana bavele bakhutsatwa kakhulu nguMphathiswa weLeticwele kute batfumele lamaphepha abo ngesikhathi lesifanele. Liphephandaba lelokhonzile litfole umbiko wekutsi tindzawo letishoda ticwele temiphakathi tingashayela inombolo yemculo 977 kwaphela ngekukhululeka ngelitsini.

Emalokishi lasekukhulweni kwelive, ema-ofisi ebhaliso lemazwe yentiwa kube matima kufinyelelwa ngulabahlala emagcekeni lasekhatsi kwendzawo. Ngemuva kwemhlangano lowentiwa nguMkhandlu weNdvuna yeTinkhundla nyanga leyadlula, kwacalwa inkhulumomphendvulo kutsi tindlela tokuniketela tikhwama tekubhalisa titfo tasemphakathi ticokiselwa. Tichazimlomo teMnyango weTindlovukazi Tembuso tigcizelele kutsi lokucinisekiswa kwemitfo lemisha kuyawusita kutsi tonkhe tindzawo, kufaka phakathi letincane, titfole sebenzi lesilinganako. Bangcweti labangaphesheya kwema-ofisi bemayini batsintfwa ekubhekana netikhala lobukiwe kufika kulabhalisi, njengekulungisa sistimu yekulamukelana nema-appointment kuze kukwatulwe kugijima kwetindlela. Batsandzi bemphakathi sebabike kutsi leti ticinisekiso letitsite ngekutsatsa tinkhundla tishukumise tive tabakhuluki ngekwetama. Umnyango uchubekela phambili ngekucondza kwekubhokisa budloti lemingcele yemahhovisi nalokubhekene nekusebenta kwemphakathi k

Emalungelo ekuhalala ngekushesha emsebentini webhili lonkhulu wemtsetfo sewufinyelele etigodzini letimbi letatigcilekekile ngebudzè. Tikhulumi tebantfu betindzawo letifana neLobamba naNdvununa setikhombise intokoyo ngebika kutsi imisebenti lemikhulu yekwenta ticoco tekukhipha ticoco temapasi netincwadzi tekuzalwa seyite etindzaweni letibe khatsi. Inhlangano yeMnumzane Wetibhange Telive ibike kutsi tinhlamvu letingetulu ka-4,500 tebantfu sete batsatfa indzawo ekhefini yekusebenta lesikhulu lesentengiwe eNhlangano yemaBhange eMbabane ngenyanga lendzulule. Sikhulumi saHulumende, Mnumzane Sibusiso Dlamini, ukhombise kutsi iphini leHulumende lisebente ngebunyenti bokuniketa bantfu lwati ngendlela yekuphila kwabo nangekwenta imisebenti yabo ngekulandzela tigaba temtsetfo ngebunyenti. Tikhulumi tebantfu titsi basafuna kutsi imisebenti lemisha yetindzawo temaHhovisi eMbuso ifinyelele ngisho nasemaphandleni lawe khatsi.

Ngemuva kwehlangano yeNdvuna yeSifundza nayo yonkhe imikhaya yendvuna temaphandla, kuphakanyiswe kutsi kufanele kushintjwa indlela lokuniketwa ngayo tinsita tebantfu emphakathini. Bantfu labadlula ngemakhulu lamane base-Shiselweni bakhala ngekutsi imihla leminingi ichithwa belinde emagatsini emahhovisi kahulumende, kepha baphuma ngetandla letikhalalelako. Kugcizelelwe etinhlanganisweni taleyo nsuku kutsi maphiko ahulumende afanele asebentisane ngemuva kwelilanga kutsi kuniketwe lusito ngendlela lebheke phambili. Kuchumana kahle emphakathi nalamahhovisi kwenabisa lusito futsi kwephuca bantfu sihlandla sekuchitha isikhati sabo ngaphandle kwesidingo. Kulungiswa kwemitselela yaletinsita kufanele kwenziwe ngaphambi kwetinyanga letintsatfu letako, njengoba kubalwa nguBantfu Labaphila ngaphansi kweLinye Lishumi Lembili lwemnyaka lowedlule. Bashoshwa beBantfu Labatsintfwa yiyo leyo nkhinga bakhuthata kutsi titfwele emaphoyisa etinsita atawube ngakubo emalokishini nasemagcekeni abo.

Ngetindlu letedlula tikete letinkhulungwane letisikhombisa, titfunti temaphetelo eSwaziland tashiwo njengobe tindze kakhulu emkhatsini walabo labasafaka iticelo tekutfola emagceke noma tindlu ngekusebentisa inhlanganiso yeSihambiso Semango Wemhlaba. Emasipala lamanyenti, kufaka ekhatsi lawo aseKhayelihle naseNgwempisi, asabika kutsi imininingwane yalabafaki-sicelelo ayigcinwa kahle, naleyo yenta kulibala kwemaphrojekthi. Loluhlangotsi lwashiwo ngembili nguNgwenyama emhlanganweni wekucala wemnyaka, lapho atsandza khona kutsi hulumende kufanele ukhawule kukhubeka kwesevisi yemphakathi. Umnyango WeTindlu ukhiphe sitatimende lesikhombisa kutsi uhlelo lolusha lwekuphendvula tilimi talabo labasafaka iticelo luzakwetfuliwa ngenyanga letako. Labo labanetikhalo bangabika kuluhlu lwebuchwepheshe lwenhlanganiso noma baye emahhovisi abo ngekwendzawo bona. Hulumende uyacindzetela kutsi wonkhe umuntfu loneminyaka lengu-18 noma ledlula leyo ufanele atfole indzawo yekuhl

Bantfu labengaphezu kwema-5,000 basemadolobheni laseManzini sebavele batfola emasevisi ekukhokha tinkokhelo tetintfo letifana netimali tendlu kanye nemafa ngemgwaco wekhompyutha lomusha lowashicilelwa nguHulumende waseSwatini. Luhlelo lolusha lwebhange lelishintjiwe lwentelwe kutsi lubukeke lube lula kubantfu labadzala kanye nalabakhubatekile, ngoba bebangakwati kuhamba ticane tetemali letinde. Kutfola letindzawo tekukhonta manje kuyatsi kube lula, njengoba tikhontelo letintfo letilishumi nesikhombisa setfwe imindeni leminyaka lemibili. Isikhulu esikhulu seHhovisi leLawula Tetemali sitjelwe kutsi loluhlelo luzosebenta etifundzeni temakelasi yonkhe kabili nyanga letitako. Kwakhiwa kwetekhnolojiyi letilingana netitfungo tekuphepha kuyacindzetela kutsi tiphrofayili tebantfu tingabonwa ngulabangefanele. Bantfu bacekelwa phasi kutsi bafake ikhophi yencwadzi yabo yobuzalwane kanye nekheli labo lapho baya khona kulesiko lolusha.

Tikhaya letengca kweli-4,500 etifundzeni letahlukene taseMpumalanga kanye neHhohho tikhona manje kulindze kutsi tigcwalise imifomo yekufaka sicelo setikhwama tekwakha tindlu letintsha ngaphansi kwephrojekthi yehulumende yekwakha kabusha. Umkhandlu wawo wonkhe wendvulo uphakamise leligadze kutsi imindeni lefanelekile kumele itfole ekhophi yetincwadzi tekubhalisa ngekushesha, njengoba sikhathi sekufaka sicelo siyaphela ngekuphelela kwenyanga letatsi. Kuchukulutiwa kwalomcimbi kwashicilelwa nguNgwenyama wetifundza ngesonto lelidzulile, lapho abeka khona buphumelele bephelekezo emphakathini. Tonkhe titfuwo tekubhalisa – kutatimba kwetindzawo tamasevisi angu-12 nakuphindze kukhokhelwe ngelikheli lelugidzinto lwekhompyutha – akukhokhelwa lutfo nguletindzawo letivela emacansini lahlala ngalo nalo. Bantfu labanenshifo yekwenta lesicelo bangachazela tikhulu temphakathi emalofini lanetsamelo kusukela ngoMsombuluko kuze kube nguLwesihlanu. Hulumende uphindze wamukile kutsi tinxus

Emalunga laseManzini ebekalindele iminyaka leminingi manje sewatfola lusito lwemitfombo yemanti locolekile nalecoliwe. Umkhandlu weSifundza waseManzini ukutsatsa lenyanga yadlulile watjela umphakati kutsi imisebenti yekufaka imitsi lemisha yemanti isifeziwe ngemphumelelo enkulu. Kulingana netibalo letatiswa nguNgqongqoshe weteSimo Semvelo, tigodzi letingenani kwemashumi lasikhombisa nekunye eletenyakatfo tase titfola lufinyelelo lwemanti lahlantekile talo lonkhe lilanga. Lomsebenzi lowentiwe ubuyele linikelo lebelicatswe nguHulumende weteSive wesive, lesishiya tinkhulungwane tetetikhombisa temindeni yekutsi ihlale ingasondzeli lihora lelinengi ikondza emtfonjeni. Baphathi babelapho batjela labakhokha tirhakishi kutsi tiphrojekthi letifanako titawuqhubeka tisakatwe kuyo yonkhe indzawo yeSifundza, ikakhulu lapho imiphakati ihlala kude nemadolobha. Izakhamuzi ticelwa kutsi tihambisane nemahovisi ale mkhankha nemibiko yekuphula tintfo letifakwe khona.

Tikhaya letingaphezu kwetinkhulungwane letisikhombisa etidzabukweni telive taseManzini naseHhoho setilandzele indzawo yekungenisa titfombe tekutfola emazambulo emhlaba langekho encindzetelo. Umkhandlu weSiphelele wemave ukhiphe lesimemetelo emva kwekubona kutsi bantfu labanyenti babenekukhuleka lokumcoka mayelana nokulingana kwendlela yekutfola imibhalwa yephasipothe nebematikheli. Ngekulingana nalomtsetfo wekukhokha umtimba wetimvume, wonkhe umuntfu lofanele unakekelo lomcoka kumele afike nezincwadzi letifunekako, kufaka ekhatsi incwadzi yekuphumelela lenhlobonhlobo kanye nebufakazi bemndeni. Labaphati bashaye indlela lokutsite yekuphatha imigca yebantfu ngekusebentisa lamasistemu lamasha ekhompyutha lebe asebenta kahle eHhofisi Lenkhulu yaNawe. Bantfu labahlala khatsi etidzabukweni, lapho tindlela letisemhlatsi, banetsemba lokungcono ngemuva kwalokusimemba lokwatiswa nguNgwenyama kaMswati eNcwala lencindzelelwe leyachelwa nyakenye.

Emalungelo ekutfola emsebentsi wehulumende asafikeleli bantfu labanyenti labahlala emaphandleni, ikakhulukati kulabo labangakwati kubhala nome bakufundza kahle. Ikhomishana Lenkhulu Yetimphilo ibikile kutsi nje nje iticoco tekuniketwa kwemadokhumende ekuzalwa letiphatselene netingane letatiwa ngaphandle kwezibhedlela tiyawuqala etikhishini tesifundza. Kulesi sigaba sekucala, tikhatsi letitsite emalanga etinkundla tibekwe emadolobheni lamancane afana naSiteki naNhlangano, lapho bantfu bayawukhona khona kutfola lusito ngaphandle kwekushayelela eBabane. Umphakati waseNkilongo uvete ingatfutfumela yabo ngalensita, ngobe abaningi babo abakwati kutiphatsa tindleko tekuhamba emadolobheni lamakhulu. Bonkhe labazali labanetigane laticala emnyakeni wa-2015 bakhutsatwa kutsi batewuletsa tibukwane nome imibhalo lesemtsetfweni yekuzalwa kwetingane tabo kubo bonkhe bemphakati labatawuya esifundzeni sabo ngemhla inkhomba eNgci nyanga lendlulako.

Ngetindlu letedlula ti-4,000 letisemaphandleni aseHhohho letincandzelo tikhombisa kutsi tihlala ngaphandle kwemisebenti yemgwamanda wamanzi lacoliwe. Ngemuva kwemihlangano leyentelwe yinkhundla yeHhohho ngoNyalo, kuvunyiwe kutsi umkhankaso wekufakela tigodzi letishiwe emapayipi amanzi uzawuqalwa ekucaleni kwemnyaka lozako. Bantfu labaphila kuleta tigodzi bakhulume kabukhali ngekudineka kwabo, betsi iminyaka lemibili badlulise tifaneleko tihambe ngete kwetfola impendvo etemahhovisi eHhohho Town. Umnyango Wemphilo Nentekelo Yemphakati utjelwe kutsi uphatse loluhlelo njengophutfumako. Tigele tetemphakati letisebenta ngemaphiko, kanye nemaphakelo emuva kwemazinga afe, sekwengetiwe ekufakweni emkhankaseni losemtsetfweni wekwetfola emakhaya. Onkhe emahholo emakhosi lasemtseleni wekufaka emapayipi atsetseliswe kutsi awunikete titfuba telwati emphakatsini ngaphambi kokutsi umsebenzi uqale ngoNkhwenkweti.

Itikhaya letidlula tizi-4,000 etigodzini taseNorthern Emaswati tikhala ngebunzima bekutfola tincwadzi tekuzalwa kanye naletinye titfunti tekuphila ngesikhatsi seminyaka leminingi. Kuchukulisiwe yinkhinga leyo, iHhovisi Lenkhosatana Yasebukhosini laseHhohho seyilungisa luhla lwetinsuku lapho titfunti tekuphila tiyawuniketwa khona kakhulukwi emaphandleni lahlukene. Lulwimi lwemibono lweHhovisi yeMphathi WeNkhundla luchaza kutsi loluhlelo luzakwentekela njalo ngenyanga yekugcina, ngemuva kwekuhlangana kwabaphathi balo lonkhe laka-administrative regions. Labafuyi kanye nalabo labasebenta emaphandleni batfutfukiselwa kutsi balethe tifundvo letitawufuneka ngaphambi kwelilanga lelibekiwe. Lokubalulekile kutsi tincwadzi tabantu tetitfunti letatilahlekelwa ngalesikhashana seCOVID-19 tingabuye tihlengwe kulesigaba lesisha. Umphathisikolo weSikhundla uchaze kutsi kahle-hle baswele kubambisana kahle phakati kwemphakati naleHhovisi yeLicensing uk

Emalokishi laseManzini naselundzini lwato, iticaba letinyenti tikhona letisahlangabetana nenkhinga yekutfola imaphetfo atidzingekako evela eMkhandluni. Lohulumende weSwaziland ukhiphe imiyalelo lebhaliwe lokutjelela bonkhe bemi kutsi imaphetfo afana nawo umshado, wetfulo lwemhlaba, kanye nakuhlengeletwa kwebantfwana kumele akhishwe ngaphasi kwelilanga lekuphela kwaleviki. Ngenkhundla yalenkhinga, iSikhungo Sehulumende seTinkhundla netiGodi sichazele ticaba kutsi kufanele tikweletse imibuto yato emahhovisini lasendlini ngaphambi kwemhla lwemashumi lamabili nankhombisa wenyanga yesitfupha. Kubikwa kutsi emagadzi lalandzela lomyalelo awukhankhasi kutsatsa ngisho natinsuku letisikhombisa, kwehluka nemkhuba wangaphambilini lowawutsatsa tigxivizo letinyenti. Sikhulumeli sahulumende, Mnumzane Sibusiso Dlamini, ukhomba kutsi inhlanganiso yalemigomo izoniketa bemi kuhleleka lokujulile nekuphephela tikhanyaleti tetinkhundla ngetfutfuko.

Emalungelo ekutikhulumela etinhlangano tetindzawo letingekho ngaphansi kwahulumende asaphuma egcekeni, lapho bantfu labanyenti basahluleka khona kutsi batfole emasevisi ahulumende ngendlela lefanele. Emakantolo lamancane, tindzawo tekuphakelwa kweteluleko, netindzawo tekunikela tincwadzi tebuzalo — tonkhe leti tigcine imikhosi leyente bantfu balahleke inkhathi. Ngokohlelo lolusha lweHulumende weNdvwangu, sikhungo lesisha setinsita takummangwane sesivulwe edolobheni laseNhlangano, siniketa tindlela letisheshako neteluleko ekufulateleni titfunti tekutsandza. Baphathi betindzawo, bamemela lwabo bekutsi, sebatsetse nyatseko kukhona kwebahlali, baphindze batjela lulodze kutsi kufanele babhalise emafomu langaphambi kwelichapha lenyanga. Tikete tekubhalisa tititfolela esikhungweni, kwatsi bonkhe labangatilungisi batawuhlangabetana netingcuphe temtsetfo. Ngetinhloso tekwenta lendlela isebente kahle, tikhungo letilishumi nesikhombisa setindzawo tasefundzeni seHhohhо tatsetse t

Emaluvolweni laseManzini, bashelelwa labadvutane nebhange leNedbank bakhale ngekwenta kwengulamulelo yetikhungo temphilo letishoda tificwa ngulabagula. Kusukela ngesikhatsi sendlela yekuvuselela tikhungo temphilo, abakhulumeli bemphakathi basho kutsi titolo tekufaka sicelo setimphilo tiphindze tingene ngesinye sikhungo ngaphandle kwesizatfu lesicacile. Libantfu lamaningi asekunyuka kwetinombolo letingaphezu kwema-4 500 labangenanga kunikwa lusito eminyakeni lemibili lemidlulile. INgwenyama Yemphakathi, i-Manzini Town Council, iphendulile kutsi yakhiwa kwalolubo lusito ngekutfola njeke inani letikhungo temphilo letisha letingema-12 kuwo wonkhe wewadi. Kulandza imibono yekubhikisha kwelikhulu lemphakathi, laboNkhosi banikele ngenkhundla yekubonisana neBuphathisi Betemphilo kuze kuphatfwa tinkinga letishiwo ngulabaguli ngekushesha. Letinhlangano tetemphilo tibitwa kutsi tidzinge kubika imiphumela yekusingata tizindlu temphilo ngenyanga nenyanga eMphatsi Webhantfu weVumelano YeTemphilo.

Emalunga langaphezu kwa-5,000 aseMnini naseNhlangano abike tikhalo tekutsi emadokhumenti ebukhosi awo, kufaka ekhatsi emazipho temfumo kanye nemaphetfo emsebenti, awaphelelanga ngendlela lefanele. Ngemuva kwemihlangano lemibili lebeyibanjwe nguMkhandlu weSifundza ngenyanga leyendlulile, bantfu labanyenti bavuma kutsi imiphakatsi yabo ihlupheka ngekungatholi lusito lwalo lonkhe luhlobo etihovisi talokal. Lihovisi leLikhansela lesifundza lase likhipha sitatimende lesiphawula kutsi kuzosetjentwa tigcamu letikhetsekile kutsi tisize emphakatsini, ikakhulukwati labadvuna nalobafati labagugile labatfola inkathazo ekufika esikhumulweni lesikhulu. Bantfu labatikhali baphindze bachukuliswe kutsi batfole emagama alapho etifundzi tembusetfo tekhompyutha emtini wemiphakati. Sibambiseli saloMkhandlu sephinde saphawula kutsi tiphatsimandla tiyatimisela kuqinisa lusito lwetikhabo tetemphilo nalo lonkhe luhlobo lwemisebenti yebabukhosi, futsi imihlangano lemisha imiselwe kubanjelwa ngekuphindvwa emigodz

Emalunga ekuhlala emadolobheni lamancane ase-Lubombo asindze ekunakiwa kahle ngalokuphatselene netikhungo tekukhokha intela yemhlaba kanye nemibiko yemapulazi. Ikhomishini Lenkhundla ibikele umphakati kutsi kufanele wonkhe umuntfu lobhalise umhlaba wakhe avumelane netimfanelo temtsetfo longaphansi kwe-Deeds Registry, leti tiphuma ngaphansi kweNkhundla yeHulumende. Ngemuva kwemihlangano lemithathu leyadlulile, kuchuphuke lulwimi lokusebentisa tifomu kanye netincwadzi tekukhokha, lekucishe kwente titfuli tibe nosuku lolukhudlwana kuleta emaphepha ladzingekako. Emakhansela ekuhlala atfumele umbiko uya kuhulumende wephrovintsi, advokhetha kutsi kubekwe tikhungo tekusita umphakati emizini yabo, esikhundleni salokutsi bahambele emalofisini lamakhulukhulu. Umphakati ucelwa kutsi uhambisane netimiso letisha leto, futsi konkhe lokuya kufake kuhulumende kufanele kufike ngaphambi kwelihla lenyanga.

Emalokishini laseManzini, bafaki-sicelo betemfundvo basebekhala ngekunakekela kwetincwadzi takucosha emkhatsini webantfu labafuna kutfola sikhwama selwelomfundvo. Lihovisi leLikhansela letifundza seliphendvula ngekusho kutsi tinhlelo letitsite tikhona ngetindlela letibitwa ngekutsi yi-digital submission, lapho bafaki-sicelo bangase bathume imibhalo yabo nge-inthanethi ngaphandle kwekuya ehovisi ngekuphila. Loluhlelo lwamukelwa ngemigomo yeMphakathi Walamuhla emhlabeni wonkhe. Bafaki-sicelo bayalelwa kutsi balandele tigaba letifanele: kugcwalisa ifomu ye-EF22, kulotsa incwadzi yebuciniso, nekufaka imibhalo yabo ngaphambi kwelilanga lokuphela lengu-30 Mabasa. Sitfupha salapha phasi kuphela semicelo lefike ibe nekwenelisekwa ngekulandzela yonkhe imigomo leyimiswe nguhulumende. Bantfu labanetikhinga tekufinyelela ku-inthanethi bayalelwa bahlanganyele nemakhetelo labekelwe ngulabo labanikwe ligunya nguMphakathi.

Ngetfuwe kwemhlangano weligungu lesikhundla ngesinyanga ledlulile, kucalwe kusetjentiswa kwenhlelo entsha yokudvonsa imibhalo yebantfu labasebenta ngemphahla yombuso etigodzini. Bantfu labangcabangela ekutsatsa titfunti kanye netincwadzi temisebenti manje bacelwa kutsi baye eHhovisi Lenkhundla Lelikhulu, lapho kuzawusetjentiswa khona tikhungo tekhomphyutha letimuva. Tindlela letintfwa letasetjentiswako kwekucasha imibhalo tishiyiwe, ngekufaka phambili kucoca kwemisebenti nakulalelwa kahle kwetimfuno talabatewako. Tikete tekuphila kanye netincwadzi tabafundi tisacelwa njengetincwadzi letibalulekile tekungena kulentsevelo. Ngesikhatsi lesibekiwe sekusebenta, labafisa kwetama lelitfuba bafike ngangelikhulu lemini kuze bakhone kusitakala ngendlela lefanele. Sicukuthane salelihhovisi sivumile kutsi kucedzelwa kwetinhlelo letintfwa kuzawusita bantfu labaningi, ikakhulukati labo labahlala kude netindzawo letinetindlela letinhle.

Bahlali baleliningi bendlu base-Shiselweni bakhala ngekucosha kwemadokhumenti ekuceleni iminikelo yalabakhulile nalebahlukumekele emahhovisi eSipro. Kuchukuliseka kwabo kwentelwe ekubeni kwaletfwa tsela letintfo letifunekako ngaphambi kwekutsi umceli atfole lusito, njengokufakwa kwemazisi lasemtsetfweni, incwadzi yekuhlala, kanye nesinye sigwebo semphakatsi. Mphatsimandla weSipro, Ndvuna Joseph Dlamini, ukhulume emshadweni wemphakati ngesontfo leledlulile, aphatsa ngekutsi lamaHhovisi atewukhanyisa tsela ebantwini ngemafomu lacondziswa kahle. Kugcizelele nekutsi tinsuku tekusebenta tifanele tisetjentiswe ngalunako, ngobe bantfu labavela khatsi embundzini nabo banemtsetfo wekufakela tincelo tabo. Umhlatsetiki waMasipala weSipro uphinde wavuma kutsi indlela yeNkhundla itawusebenta ngekushesha ekufinyelleleni emaphandleni lahlala bantfu labasahlukumekele. Tonkhe leti tinyatselo tikhombisa inhloso yaHulumende waNgwane yekusita umuntfu lomdzawomdza

Emagodzi langetulu kwema-5,000 emnumzane lahlala emaphandleni eSwaziland sewatfola emathuba ekufinyelela tikhululo tekucondzisa ngemphilo ngemuva kwekuqaliswa kwenhlelo entsha yehulumende. Lenhlelo, leqanjwe ngekutsi "Impilo Yetfu," icinisekisa kutsi ticabango tekugwema izifo kanye nekuphiliswa kwabantu tifinyelela emagodzini labekude nasemadolobheni. Emagumbi ekwelashwa emphakatsini awentiwe kabusha, kodvwa lamanye nawakhiwa kabusha kute kunciphiswa sikhalo esibonwa esikhungweni saseNational Referral Hospital. Njengebufakazi bemphumelelo yenhlelo leyo, lidelakalo lemati emaphakathi eSipho Dlamini, umuntfu waseBhunya, usho kukhombisa injabulo yakhe ngesitolo semitsi lesisedvute nasekhaya. Emaphoyisa emphilo kanye netimelusi temphakathi batfunywe ngetulu kwetindzawo letingema-200 kuze batisize tiphatsimandla tencindzetele izifo letifana neSAD kanye netiphathelo takho konke. Ikomidi leLigodvo nalo lihambe kabili-kabili nebantfu bekucondzisa ngemphilo ngekucobelela bolw

Ngetulu kwemakhaya lalikhulu nalamashumi lamabili evela ensimini yaseNhlangano basehambe imayela lemibili noma ngaphezulu kuya emalokishini lapho kutfolakala khona tindlela tekuphilisana. Loku kubonisa indzaba lebalulekile ngekuphatselene nekufinyeleleka kwemisebenti yemphapha emphakatsini wesifundza. Ngemuva kwemihlangano leyayentiwa emakhaya, baholi bendvundvuma bangene inhlelo yekusakata tintfo tekusebentela impilo, kufaka ekhatsi imitsi yekugomela bantfwana kanye nekuhlola ingati. Baholi be-Inhlangano yeMphapha balwela kuba nalwati lokwengetiwe mayelana nemkankaso lomsha, baphimisela kutsi imisebenti iyandza ngetintfo tinhle. Bantfu labadzala naletincane bayatfola lusito ngendlela lebhekiwe, kuyisigaba sekubona kubetfa kwemphilo leyasetjentiswa ngimsebentisi wonkhe. Sikhatsi semuva salinyetiwe ngekubulala tifo letifana negerms letenta tinkhinga tendzawo nasemzimbeni wemuntfu. Tiphatsimandla tikhuthata wonkhe umuntfu kutsi atewulandza lelikhono lelisha ngekuhlolwa ngesimo sayo yonkhe imphapha

Emalangeni laseSwatini lamakhulu ngemkhakha wemphakatsi awatfunywe etikolweni nasemiphakatsini ngemkhankaso wekukhulisa impilo ngehla kwenyanga lendzulela. Inhlangano yeLikhuba leLive ikhiphe umbiko lowatsi ngabo-35% bemacembu emphakati asemalokishini labukeka kakhulu akakeneli tincudzano netindzawo tekuphilisa. Kubukeka kwatsi bukhuni bekulandza imishini yetikliniki buphumela kubantu labagcina tinhlupho temitimba yabo bangakasizakali. Ngemuva kwemhlangano weLikhwa leLive lapha eManzini, tiphatsimandla tivumelene nekusheshisa kuletswa kwetimoto tekuphilisa emikhakheni lengemuva. Tinhlangano temphakatsi nato tincome lonyatfo, tikhombisa intfukutselo phambilini ngekucotshelwa kwalemsebenti lobalulekile. Imiphakati icelwa kutsi ibike tinhlupho kuhhovisi lekuphilisa lelikulelive lakolabo ngaphandle kwekwesaba, ngobe kulungiswa kwemsebenti lona kuyindlela yekucinisa impilo yebantfu bonkhe.

Emalungelo emphakatsi waseNhlangano uye wachazeka ngemuva kwekuhlolwa kwalesifundza ngesonto lelidlulile, lapho kwatfolakala khona kutsi bangaphansi kwemashumi lamabili ema-khuluphelweni wabantu labasemphakatsini abake bahlolwa kuletinkhinga tenhlitiyo. Umkhandlu wetfutfukiso uphendvule ngekushesha, ukhiphe umkhankaso wekunakekela imphakatsi wekuhlola igazi kanye nekuhlola umfutfo wegazi emahhovisi emphakatsi kanye nasemakolwa. Tichwepheshe tentfo yemphakatsi tibeke licaphelo kutsi kuphila kwendlela yekudla kanye nekwehluleka kusetjentiswa kwemitsi kuyimbangela lenkhulu yalenkinga. Bantfu labadzala bakhutsatwa kutsi baphume batotholela lusita lwekuhlolwa kwemphakatsi ngaphandle kwekubhadalela, njengobe lenkonzo ikhishwe yenkhuleko yemitsi yemphakatsini lonkhe. Umkhandlu ube ucela bantfu kutsi batsatse indzima ekulweni nelisifo, bakhulele netikhalo tabo tikhashane netinkhinga netindlela tekuphila impilo yabo kahle.

Ngetfuwo lelikhulu lelengatsiwa ekulungiseni imphilo yabantu, ikhomishini yesifundza ikhiphe umbiko lokhombisa kutsi imiphakathi leminyenti yasemakhaya isalwisana nebulwane lobubangelwa kusweleka kwamanzi lahlantekile. Ngetinyanga letisitfupha letidzulile, tinhlangano temphakathi basebentisana nemaNkhosi ekufundza bantfu ngemiphumela yobuye lembi lemanti langcolile. Labahlali betigodzi ta KaNyamatane ne-Mkhaya baphawule kutsi titfalo tabo tetseke ngaphambi kwekutsi umsebenti lo ucale. Lomkhankaso, lotfumele titibane tigogo kanye netintfombi tekuphilisa, sewufinyelele imindeni lemagidigidi lamabili kusukela ekucaleni kwemnyaka. Kulingana netingcweti temphilo, imiphumela ikhanye ngalokumangalisako, njengoba silinganiso sebantfu labanengcukiswane sebehle ngamaphesenti lasikhombisa. Likhomishini likhuthaza kutsi emakhaya wonkhe asebentise imishanguzo lenikwa simahla emitfolampilo yasekhaya, kutsi angalinganyi noma ngabe wemuhla muni wenyanga.

Emalangeni langu ema-5 million sewamiswa nguHulumende waseSwatini kuze kuhlinzekwe ngetikhali tekuphila emphakathini, ikakhulukati kulendzawo yaseShiselweni. Imiphakatsi lemikhulu ifikelwa tikhalo temabhizimusi ekuphila nokuswela kwemitsi lasesibhedlela. Ngesikhatsi semuhlanje, emahlelo ekugijimiswa kwemitsi emakhaya asavezwa nguMnyango weTempilo ngekusebentana nemaVolontiya emphakathi. Bantfu labadzala kanye nemantfombi lakhulelwe sebanikwa tindlela tekufinyelela tinkhungu tekuhlolwa kwempilo ngekulangatelelwa. Kubikwa ngu-Dokotela Nomvula Dlamini kutsi imiphumela yalama programme isikhombisa kuncoba kwetifo letifana neSifo Sashukela kanye neSifo Senhliziyo emifundzeni lemibili. Ngaphandle kwaloku, tindvuna tebantfu tikhuthata lomphakathi kukha indzima ngekuya etikhungwini tekuphila noma umuntfu angaphili. Lama programme ayawusebenta kuze kutfutfukiswe impilo yekuphila kwebantfu bonkhe, kusuka kuswane kuya kubantfu labadzala emifundzeni yonkhe yeLive.

Ngetulu kwa tikhumba letimashumi lasikhombisa nemahlanu letivakashwe nguletabamba inhlalakahle ngenyanga leyadlula, tikhaya letisemaphandleni eSwaziland tiboné kushintshuliwa kwemaphrojekthi ekufinyelela kwekwelapha. Ticumbi tekusita emphakathini tihambe taya emigodzini lemisekelo yayo itfolakala kabi, titfwala imishini yokucwaninga igazi kanye nemitsi yekugwema lemagciwane lasetjalwa ngetindlela letenteka ngalo umlalatshe. Lelo likhona ngesizatfu sekutsi bafana nabomahe labadzala bakhona bangeke bafinyelele etibhedlela ngenkhani yetindlela lese-hhayi-kahle. Umhlangano lobuye wabanjelwa eHhohho wabonisa kutsi imiphakathi leyetfulwa lasekele etindlela tekugcina inhlalakahle yesilwane nemuntfu. Kusakatwa kwetemphilo kusimukelwe kahle etindleni letitsite, lapho bontfwana labengakafiki eminyakeni yesihlanu laba nebhalofu yekwenganyelwa izifo letinjengegciwane legcugcutela nemaphungo. Hulumende ukhuthaza bonkhe bahlali kutsi bawusekele lomkhankaso ngekubamba ticubu tekufundza le

Emakaya lasedolobheni laseNhlangano naselugwini lwalo ahlanganyele ekuphaseni kwenhlelo yekugoma lebalulekile levakashe leyo ndzawo ngesonto lelidlulile. Inhlelo leyi yabukwa nguHulumende waseSwaziland ngekubambisana netikhungo tesimphilo tesifundza, nenhloso yekuqinisekisa kutsi bantfu labadze bane iminyaka lemfica ngemfica kutsi batfola tigomo tekuvilela tifo letifana ne-measles kanye ne-polio. Baphathi betemphilo babike kutsi emakhulu lamashumi lamane nemfica alesalasela emalanga lamangaki amagcoke afikile etikhungweni letehlukahlukene, loku lokukhombisa ingatsakatisi yemphakati. Wenelisa kumuzwa umama lomkhulu achaza kutsi tingane taka komuniti manje tivikelekile kakhulu ngemuva kwekugomwa. Titfunywa tetemphilo tikhutata bonkhe abazali kutsi balethe tingane tabo tikacobo tiphindze tigomwe, nekuqinisekisa kutsi etigwamanda tekugoma tilondvolotwa kahle. Hulumende uphindze washo kutsi lemizamo yekuvikelana netifo itawuphindvwa nakanjani ekucineni kwemnyaka lolandzela.

Tigodzi letingetulu kwema-5,000 tasifundzeni saseShiselweni tifinyelele emsebentini wekugwema izifo ngetinhla letidlulile, ngemuva kwekuphumelela kwemkhankaso webhutfo lekhetsiwe wempilo yemphakathi. Labatfumeli bempilo babehambahamba emakhaya ngamakhaya, befundzisa ticabelo ngetindlela tekuvikela izifo letifana neSewula naNyawo Unukha, nekugeza tandla ngeciniso. Endaweni lashiywe yinkhundla yaseNhlangano, balapha baboswa yindzaba kutsi bachukulutswa ngekushesha ngaloluhlu lwesizo. Kuphiwa kwemitsi yamahhala kanye nekuhlolwa kwetingane kwenta kutsi bani nabani atewuphiliseka. Kuhlanganisana kwebatfolisani bemphakathi kanye netikhulu telive kwabonisa kutsi kukhona indingilizi yekusebentisana lecondzile ngemphilo yesive. Bafati bebantfu labadzala babekubabatele kakhulu loku, njengoba babengashayiwa yimali yekungenisa tinkhundla letikhatsi. Liphrojekthi liyacinisekisa kutsi imphilo yemphakathi ayisimangaliyo, kepha ilungelo lelingakuvukutelwa.

Semagodvweni lasetsintfwa yinhlangano yekuphila kwemphakathi, kulandzelana kwemkhankaso wekugedla tindlela tekunakekelwa kwempho kwetsi umphakathi ubuyele emuva empilweni. Tindvuna tetimphakathi tiphakamise sikhalo ngemindeni lenganako kulwati lwetigulo letifana nesifo semphuka kanye netinye tifo letisabekako. Nguletinhlangano tekuphepha kwemphilo letivule emahhovisi ematekisi kanye nemakhaya emigwaqeni yendzawo, lapho bantfu banikwa khona imiti yamahhala kanye nemihlahlandlela yekugcina empilo yabo. Maphisi labakhulu batikhiti ngetikhiti, bavakashela nayo yonkhe imigwaco yendzawo, bebasita labagulako bebanake ngemandla. Kubalulekile kutsi lobantfu bakhokhele inhlangano letiniketa licebo ngelwati loluphephile, ngobe kugucula imphilo yemphakathi kuyinhlangano lemkhulu lowenta liciniso lempilo liniketwa wonkhe umuntfu ngaphandle kwekucabangela. Emahhovisi alapha endzaweni aseke umbhalo wekutsi bantfu lababandzakanyeka emkhankasini lo batfola tingcindvo tephilweni yabo, bese nabo batsintf

Emasigodzi letigcwele bantfu betikhulwini tase-Hhohho, bahlali bakhombise intsandvo lenkhulu ekutsatseleni indzima ekuhlanganeni kwemphilo lenkhiwa nguHulumende nenyanga leyadlulile. Lesigcawu, lebesabiwe nguMnumzane Sipho Dlamini, saniketa emakhulukhulu emaphetjana ekuhlolwa kwegazi kanye nemitsi yekugcina umtimba ubenesimilo. Lwabiwe nasemantini, loluhlelo lube yisibonelo lesingasaluliwa kulo lonkhe lelive. Tingaka letatingenile tesuka emagungundlweni layo tikhule tifike etindzaweni letikhatse, tibetsemba nomphakati lowe wa-Hhohho. Ngaphansi kwehlelo lekucondzisa, bantfu labatigulele ngalesikhali sekushiswa kwelanga batsola kuphiliswa ngaphakathi kwemalanga lambalwa nje kuphela. Takhiwe futsi tiklinike tetindzawo letitatsi, letiniketa lusito lwetimphilo ebantwini labadzimate noma bangabi nayo imali yokubhadala. Lohlelo lwetimphilo lwendlulisiwe nakuticedze tatana temindeni letigcwele bantfu, lugcizela bukhali kwekuhlinzekwa kwetimphilo njengel

Emakaya lasedvute netigodzi letatiwa ngebudze bemaphetfo emanti lacondzako asukumele phambili ngemlandvo lomuhle ngemva kwekutsi iNingizimu ye-Swaziland yemukela umkhankaso wemphawo yetimpilo lohlelwe nguHulumende. Emakaya lakhona ekusebenta kahle kwesigodzi sangakhona, emaBhubhesi adzimate etsemba imigwaqo lemikhulu iminyaka lemingi ngekungatfolakali kwemitsi kancino. Manje, ngemva kwekulethwa kwezindlu temphilo tezintfo letiniketwa ngesitfomelo, umphakathi uyakwesekela lomkhankaso, etfula bantfwana bemutsi kulenhla yetimiso tetempilo. Umhambisi wemphakathi, Nkhosi Mavundla, ukhulume ngekubaluleka kwekuhlolwa kwetempilo njalo ngemnyaka, achitsa kutsi "Kufundza emphawo yetimpilo kwetama lilifa lelitsiwa bantfwabetfu." IMeluleki yeTempilo yeNingizimu ibikele umphakathi kutsi imigomo yetifundvo letitsha ihlela kutsetseleka kuto tonkhe tindawo letehlukene, kufaka ekhatsi letigodzi letisemaphandleni. Nomkhankaso lona ufuna kunciphisa inombolo yetingulube let

Tigogo letingetulu kwa-5,000 tikhishwe emaphandleni eSwaziland ngekhatsi kwenyanga leyadlula, njengengcenye yenhlelo yehulumende yokugomela bantfu inkhayishane. Umcimbi lowenziwa nguNgcweti weTemphilo wehulumende ubandakanya tindzawo letijulile letatishayeka kakhulu ngalesigulo. Bashirimane labavela eManzini kanye neShiselweni babike kutsi indlela yoku-access imigomo itsatse sikhatsi lesinde kwemine, kepha manje imiphumela iyabonakala. Ngekusebenta kanye nemiphakati yasemaphandleni, bagibeli beMphilo baye bazungeza emakhaya ngekugibela ematekisi nemakhokhoba. Inombolo yalabagulayo izehle ngemaphesenti layishumi nesikhombisa (17%) njengobe lwabiwa ngumphumela wemikhankaso lengetulu kwalesi. Kubambisana kwabazali nalabakhulekhi bekutfolakala kubalulekile ekulandzeleleni kutsi bantfwana batfola emagomo awo ngesikhatsi lesifanele. Tikhalo letitsite kusukela emiphakatsini tikhomba sigaba semfundvo kube ngunhloso lofanele ngekugcizelela lahlulekako nalamane.

Emalokishini lasedvute neLavumisa, bafati labangaphezu kwema-2 000 baye batfola emagciwane ekuhlaselwa yinhloko kanye nezifo tebuntfwana esikhungweni sempilo lesakhiwe kabusha nguHulumende wesifundza. Lomkhankaso wekuphilisa umphakathi uqalelwe ngenyanga yendlulo, uholwa tiphatsimandla tekempilo kanye nebantfu labatfunywe kwenta umsebenzi lona emphakathini. Kutsiwa banyenti babo babefika eklinikhi ngesikhatsi saloku kuhlolwa, inkhinga yekucedzelela kwemishanelo labeyibavimba phambilini. Tiphatsimandla temphakathi tikhutsate wonkhe umuntfu kutfola letisevisi, tikhombise kutsi tinakekelelo tenyama kanye nengcondvo tibalulekile empilweni yelive lonkhe. Imizamo lebekwe ngu-ofisi yengcondvo yempilo ibonakala ikhulisa lusita emphakathini, yetfula nemfundvo ngekuvalwa kwetinhloko-sifo letifana nesifo sakhe kanye nesifo semagciwane. Bantfu balelive bakhutsiwa kucala babone tigciwane tangemphilo ngaphambi kwekubonana nemadokotela labalungelwe.

Ngetulu kwa tigodzi letingema-3,000 taseNgwempisi District setivakatwe yitikhansela tesifundza ngaloku kwentelwe ngaphansi kweliphrojekthi lekukhulisa impilo yemiphakathi ngalomnyaka weli-2025. Tikhansela letifike kubonana nabahlali tilethe nemitsi yekulapha, tifundishe naboNkhosikati ngekusetjentiswa kahle kwamanzi lahlobile, kanye nekukhanyisa ngengoti yetifotfo letingabulala bantfwana labancane. Bahlali labanyenti bebeke bulosela kutsi kwakubudze baye esibhedlela ngesikhatsi semaphutfuma ngenxa yemigwaqo lemibi. Ngetsikhwama teSikhungo Sive Satsatfu kanye naletatfwa hulumende, kutfutfukiswa kwetindlela tekufinyelela tilwandle tekuphilisa sekuletwe kutsi kube lula kakhulu. Umkami Siphiwe Nkosi waseNgwempisi ukhulume ngekutfaba, akhuluma kantsi manje banemandla ekuphilisana naletinhlupho ngekunikeka kwekwetfiwela kwetitolo telikhambi. Hulumende weSwatini uyacosha bahlali bonkhe kutsi babambisane naletikhankaso tekuphilisa ngekuya ema

Emalokishini lasetsafeni kwaNgwane, bantfu labedlula ngemakhulu lamabili basebentle ekwelashweni ngemuva kwemkhankaso wempilonkhulu lowentiwa nguHulumende webhayibhisi nenyanga lewedlulile. Lomkhankaso wawugxile ekuhloleni izifo letifana nehayela, inkhuba, kanye netigciwane tebugula bendzawo. Labomake kanye nababali babetsatsa indzima lebalulekile ekwetfweseni bantfwababo ema-vaccine, lokwenta kutsi linani lebantfu labavikelekile likhule ngekushesha. Ngemibiko lekhishwe nguMnyango Wempilonkhulu, kwatholakala kutsi imindeni leyengeke itfole lusito yayikhululwa ngekuba khona kwemitsi leletwewa kulasekhaya. Tinkhundla temphakathi naletinkonzo tendzawo kuncenye yalelimkhankaso, letiphindze tasita ngekucaphunyiswa kolwati mayelana nekugcinwa kwempilo enhle. Tikhulu teDlamini kanye neMahlalela tivumile kutsi bantfu basabeka inhlonipho kuloluhlobo loluncedo, ngekubona letitsandvo tekusita tivezwa ngentsandvo yalabo labahola imphakathi. Lumbandze wekufanela bantfu emphilweni wachazwa njeng

Emalangeni langephuzu kwemashumi lamabili nesihlanu emabhiliyoni asetsentiselwe emsebentini wekupha umphakati imitsi nekwelapha labantu etikhungweni temphakatsi kulonyaka wemali. Ngesikhatsi semihlangano yemphakati leyo yentiwa emadolobheni nasemagcekeni, bantfu labanyenti baveze kutsi basabhekana nebuzima ekufinyelela telekhama nemasevisi ekwelapha langekahle. Inhlangano yeLive Sive Swaziland ibike kutsi imphakati lasemaphandleni isacishe ingafinyeleli kahle etikhungweni tekwelapha ngenxa yekusweleka kwetindlela letinhle. Ngalokuphatselene naloku, hulumende ubhoke ngesigcoko sekwakha tikhungo tekwelapha letintsha etifundzeni letinhlanu, kantsi nematimu ekwelapha atawutfunyelwa kufikela emagcekeni lamakhulu. Ludvokotela lwe-UNICEF emkhatsini we-Swaziland futsi lucindzetele kutsi imphakato yetemphilo lebalulekile ingavalwa ngalokusetfentiselwa kakuhle kwetimali nentfutfuko yetisebenti. Kutsi imphakati uphile kahle kuyimfuneko lengenakuphikiswa, kuncunywa ngulabo bonkhe labaholi

Ngetulu kwetigodzi letingema-200 tase-Shiselweni nendzawo letisedvute nato, kuye kwentiwa umkhankaso wekuphilisana lowashicilelwa nguHulumende weSive ngenyanga ledlulile. Lomkhankaso bewuhlose kufundzisa imiphakathi ngetindlela tekugcina impilo yemtimba nekuphepha emakhohlo lanetingela tifo. Bonkhe bantfwana labangaphansi kweminyaka lesihlanu baye bahlatjwa imitsi yetingela tifetfo, bese labo labadala batfola iseluleko sekuhlola igazi nelitselo. Labagijimi bempilo, labatiwa ngekutsi ngemaVolunteer Health Motivators, baye basita kakhulu ekukhankaseni umyalefo wetimpilo emakhaya. Tikhulu temiphakathi tivumele kutsi lomkhankaso usite bantfu labanyenti labangeke bafikele tindlu tekwelashwa letisedvuta. Lihhovisi leliphetse Temphilo e-Nhlangano liye laphawula kutsi ngetindlela letinje, imiphakathi ingahlomula kakhulu emkhakheni wekugcina impilo yabantu bonkhe, ikakhulukati labahluphekako futsi basedvute nebuphuya.

Emalulwini lasenhla kweSwaziland, imiphakathi leyehlukene seyitfole lusito lolukhulu ngemuva kwekusetiwa kwemakhliniki lamatsha lapho lapha bantfu bangaya khona batfole imishanguwo yemahhala. Liphrojekthi leli libandakanya budokotela labangcono kanye netiphatsimandla tekutfola tinkhinga tematfuba kanye nekugwema titfo letinjengalo kushona kwendlalifa nemifo leyingoti. Ngekunyentelaniswa kwaBendzabulo Bemphakatsi kanye naBelusi Bekuphepha Kwempilo, kuchukunyiswa bantfu ngawo onkhe emadolobha kutsi bete emakhlinikini njalo ngesonto. Labahlali labaningi batsatse lenkhambiso ngesineke, batsi imitsetfo lemisha yekuphepha kwempilo iyabavikela bona kanye nemindeni yabo. Naletincwadzi tekufundzisa tiklinywa nasetimphangaleni teMindeni, imiphakathi iyakhokhela emuva ngetibonelo letiphilako. Sikhatsi lesifana nalesifana siyakhumbutsana bonkhe bantfu kutsi impilo yabo iyintsaba yebuhle nekuphumelela ekuphileni.

Emalokishini lasemphumalanga welive, bakhona bantfu labebhekane nemishikashika yekutfola lusito lwemphakatsi ngetikhathi letilukhuni. Ngelisabo lekugula kwetintwana kanye nekwekhula, buchwepheshe beMnyango WeMphakatsi buye bwahlela umkhankaso lowenta kutatela ticondzo temphilo ngekusebentisana naletive. Emalungu emphakatsii ayemukela kafushane letincwadzi letikhuluma ngemitsi, kudla lokuphilisako, kanye nekucoca tandla. Ngekwengetiwa kwaloko, tikhipha tekusebentela ngemigwaqo setifike kuleticembu letidlule tikhona ngaphambili, imiphumela yalemizamo ikhombisa kutsi bantfu labangaphezu kwemakhulu lamatsatfu sebahlolisiwe kulo nyanga lodlule. Kudlulisa umbiko walomkhankaso, inkhosikati yenkhundla yesifundza yakhuluma etinkundleni tekuhlangana yatsi wonkhe umuntfu unelungelo leliqinile lokuphila ngempilo lenhle. Tichumo letinjalo tikhombisa kutsi uma buchwepheshe buhamba buye ebantwini, imphilo yalelo live iyakhula ngekushesha.

Emakaya langetulu kwema-5,000 asemifundze yasemakhaya aseNingizimu Swatini sewatfola inhlanganyelo yemitsi nekuhlolwa kwempilo ngesikhatsi semkhankaso webhubhesi lowentelwe nguHulumende waseSwatini ngenyanga ledlulile. Lomkhankaso, lowashicilelwa ngekubambisana neNhlangano Yempilo Yemhlaba, wehlelwe kufinyelela imindeni lengakwati kufika ematfolweni empilo ngebangelo lelikhulu. Emagciwane etinsikisane, inhlitiyo nebulwane betsatsi wonkhe kwaba yindzaba lehlangatjezwe ngekucophelela ngutikhulu tempilo lapho. Bafundzi labahlakaniphile basetimphini tendvundvuma bayasita ekusabalaliseni lwati emphakatsini, badlala indlela lebalulekile emsebentini wekuvikelana netigulo. Ngekwenkhulumomphendvulo weNdzawo Yempilo, inhloso inkulu ikhona: kutsi umuntu wonkhe, nome akuphi lahlala khona, atfole tigcabo kanye nekwelulekwa kwempilo ngekukhululeka. Imindeni leminyenti ibike kutsi lomkhankaso ushintje indlela labona ngayo iminakelo yempilo yeHulumende, futsi betfu ekubambisaneni kwabo manje kuy

Emakaya lasemalungwini eSwatini asewutfola lusito lolukhulu emkhakheni wempilonkhulu, ngemuva kwekuhlolwa kwemigomo yekuphila kahle lokutsatfwe nguHulumende weNgwane ngeminyaka lembalwa leyengca. Ngetinyanga letidlulile, ticembu tebantfu betimphi letivela eMnistri weMpilonkhulu tivakashele imigwaqo yasemasokeni, tifundza intfutfuko mavi lamasha ngemicebo yekugcina imvelo ihlobile kanye nekuphila kahle. Bafundzi labacishe bafike endzaweni lobuyiwe bafike sebalungele kutsatsa imiyalo yemitsi nekuyiveta emacembu ekutiwa kute bafake inhloko esikolweni ngesingenise. Tikhulu tema-ward nobe tindvuna tihambe phambili ekukhuthaza bantfu kutsi batfole lusito lwaloluhlobo, kukhomba nekutsi babomu kulekelela kugcina budlelwano phakati kwaHulumende nebantfu baso. Ngekwemibiko leyaboshwa nguMnistri weMpilonkhulu, inani lebantfu labatfole tihlolwa tayo temiphumela yebulwelwe bedlula inkhulungwane lesikhombisa, lokungumkhombandlela lomuhle kakhulu

Tinhloko letingetulu kwema-5 000 emalungu emiphakati eManzini nebetfutfutsiwe tifumene lusito lwekunanatwa kwemphapha kanye nemitsi yekugcina imphilo ngesonto leledlulile, ngesikhati lenhlangano yekhathalela impilo yemphakati yetfula lomkhankaso wayo lomkhulu wesigaba lesimine. Lomkhankaso, lowentelwe kugcizelela kubaluleka kwekuhlolwa kwesifo seculo kanye nekushayela tikhali, ufike emashumini etindzawo letisebenta lapho bajele khona inani lelikhulu lemalunga emiphakati layengakakholwi. Labonisi bempilo bemasipala batfutfutse batibika ngekujabula ngendlela labantu labatibhica ngayo, baphindze bacacise kutsi lesifundvo sesive sesifundza kubaluleka kwekuya esibhedlela ngesikhashana. Umamo lotewutfola lusito watibonisa ngekujabula wancandzeka watsi: "Sikhuluma nje ngiyabonga ngoba mine impilo yami ibuyiseleke kahle." Tiphatsimandla tetindzawo temphilo tikhuthata bonkhe bantfu labangakahloliwa bete kulawo makhwelo ekuze bafike emathubeni labanike bona emalungu emiphakati wonkhe.

Emalokishini lasemaphandleni eSwatini, imiphakati iyabonga ngekutfutfukiswa kwalemsebenti wehulumende losuka eDepartment of Health, lowenta imikhankaso yekufundzisa bantfu ngekubaluleka kwemphilo lehle. Ngesonto lelidzulile, batfunywa bempilo bahambe emiphakati leyehlukene befundzisa ngetingulube letifana ne-HIV/AIDS, i-tuberculosis, kanye netigciwane letisabalala ngamanzi lengcolile. Tikhulumi tekampani yempilo tachaza kutsi bantfu labanyenti basahluleka kufinyelela emakhliniki ngebangela lekukhatima kwemigwaco nasekukhatima kwetimali. Bantfu labadzala bakhombise kujabula ngekuta kwalamaphoyinti ekuhlolwa kwetigciwane nemitsi, lapho kubonakele khona kuphuma kwemibili yabantfu lemagidigidi. Hulumende uphindze wamemezela kutsi titfutfutwane tekusita balweli bemphilo titfola imali yekusetjentiswa kwato kahle kute tikwati kufinyelela etindzaweni letikhatima. Imiphakati ikhuthazwa kutsi ibambe sandla ngekusebentisana nalabatfunywa bempilo, kwazise impilo yemphakati ngulwatico lwabo bonkhe.

Emakaya lasemalangeni eSwaziland asebevakasha etigodlweni tekuphilisa emaphakela ngesikhatsi semkhankaso wekuphila kahle lowentiwa nguHulumende. Lowo mkhankaso, lowetsiwe ngetinhloso tekwehlisa inombolo yalabagulako futsi kukhulisa lwati ngekuphilisa kahle emphakathini, usebenzelana nemiphakathi leminyenti lesikhungo sayo sesigodi. Tinakekeli tekemphi titfwele imphilo yabo tonkhe letekelela kutsi batfole emakhono nangekuhlolwa kwetingulube kanye netikhumba. Ngekwemibiko lephuma etigodlweni letahlukene, bantfu labangaphezu kwa-5,000 sebavakashele etigodlweni leti kusukela ngoMandvulo. Labo labahamba labashaya tindlela letinzima langulani mphakathi babongwe nguSikhulu Sesigodi Lindiwe Dlamini ngomsebenzi labo wekuphilisa abo bantfu. Imiphakathi ikhuthazwe kutsi ihlale iyatijumelela etigodlweni tekuphilisa futsi ikhiphe lofuna lusito ngaphambilini kwekutsi kube segciwane. Lomkhankaso utachwala kuze kufike esikhundleni senyanga etinhla, usebente emaphandleni la

Ngaphezu kwabafundi abangamakhulu amahlanu ezikoleni zasemakhaya esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal basanda kuhlomula ngamakhompyutha aphathekayo emcimbini obuhlose ukuthuthukisa ukusetshenziswa kobuchwepheshe ekufundeni. Lolu hlelo olubalulekile luhlose ukuvala igebe elikhulu elikhona phakathi kwemfundo yasemadolobheni neyasemakhaya, okuyisimo esinesikhathi eside sikhathaza abazali kanye nothisha ababhekana nokushoda kwezinsiza. Ngenxa yalokhu kuguquka kwezinto, izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme nazo zimatasa ngokuqhamuka nezindlela ezintsha zokufundisa ukuze zihambisane nezidingo zomnotho wamanje kanye nezinguquko zezwe lanamuhla ezigxile kwi-inthanethi. Ngokomgomo omusha wezemfundo oqalisiwe kulo nyaka, kugcizelelwa kakhulu ukwesekwa kwezifundo zezibalo nesayensi ukuze abafundi bakwazi ukuthola amakhono azobasiza ekuncintisaneni namazwe omhlaba. Ukuqinisekisa ukuthi le mizamo ithela izithelo, abaholi bomphakathi banxusa yonke imikhakha ukuba ibambisane nezikole ekwesekeni abafundi, bebalula ukuthi imfundo esezingeni eliphezulu iyisisekelo esiqinile sekusasa eliqhakazile lentsha yaseNingizimu Afrika. Ukubambisana phakathi kwabafundisi, abafundi kanye nemiphakathi kubonakala kuyiyona ndlela kuphela yokuqinisekisa ukuthi akekho umfundi osala emuva kulolu hambo lwentuthuko yezemfundo.

Esigamekweni esingumlando emphakathini waseNquthu, kuvulwe isikole esisha samabanga aphakeme esihlome ngobuchwepheshe besimanje ngenhloso yokulwa nenkinga yokuminyana kwabafundi emakilasini. Lesi sikhungo esidle izigidi zamarandi kulindeleke ukuba samukele abafundi abangaphezu kwenkulungwane, okuzodambisa umthwalo ezikoleni ezingomakhelwane ebezivele zidonsa kanzima. Abazali nothisha bazwakalise ukujabula kwabo ngalolu hlelo, bebalula ukuthi ukufunda ngaphansi kwezimo ezingcono kuzokhulisa izinga lokuphasa kwabafundi, ikakhulukazi ezifundweni zesayensi nezibalo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kunezinhlelo ezikhona zokuqinisekisa ukuthi othisha bathola ukuqeqeshwa okukhethekile ukuze bakwazi ukusebenzisa amakhompyutha amasha afakiwe ukufundisa. Uhulumeni wesifundazwe usethembise ukweseka lolu hlelo ngokunikezela ngemifundaze kubafundi abazokwenza kahle, ukuze baqhubeke nezifundo zabo ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme ngaphandle kokukhathazeka ngezimali. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ikusasa eliqhakazile, abafundi banxuswe ukuba bazinikele ezifundweni zabo futhi bavikele ingqalasizinda yesikole ekucekelweni phansi, njengoba kuyifa elizozuzisa izizukulwane ezizayo ngisho nakulabo abalungiselela ukuya emanyuvesi. Lokhu kuthathwa njengesinyathelo esibalulekile ekuvaleni igebe lezemfundo phakathi kwezikole zasemadolobheni nezasemakhaya, okuqinisekisa ukuthi wonke umntwana uthola imfundo esezingeni eliphezulu.

Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha abafundi abafunda ezikoleni zasemakhaya KwaZulu-Natal bebebhekene nenselelo yokuntula izinsiza zobuchwepheshe besimanje eminyakeni edlule. Ukuze kulwiwe nalesi simo esikhathazayo, umkhankaso omusha owethulwe kuleli sonto esifundeni saseMkhanyakude usuhlinzeke izikole ezingamashumi amahlanu ngamakhompyutha aphathekayo kanye noxhumo lwe-inthanethi olunesivinini esiphezulu ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akekho umfundi osala ngemuva kwezemfundo. Amalungu omphakathi, kuhlanganisa othisha nabazali, akwamukele ngezandla zombili lokhu kuthuthukiswa kwengqalasizinda yezikole, agcizelela ukuthi kuzovala igebe elikhulu elikhona phakathi kwemfundo yasemadolobheni neyasemakhaya. Ngaphezu kwalokho, izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme zike zazwakalisa ukuthi ukuhlonyiswa kwabafundi ngamakhono ekhompyutha besebancane kuyisisekelo esibalulekile ukuze baphumelele uma sebeqala izifundo zabo emanyuvesi. Kulindeleke ukuthi lolu hlelo lugqugquzele izinga lokuphasa ebangeni leshumi nambili kulo nyaka, njengoba abafundi sebeyokwazi ukwenza ucwaningo olunzulu nokufinyelela ezincwadini zokufunda ezitholakala kwingosi yezemfundo ngaphandle kwezihibe. Leli gxathu elibhekiswe ekuthuthukiseni ezemfundo lizosiza kakhulu ekulweni nezinga eliphezulu lokungasebenzi kwentsha, njengoba abafundi bezophuma emabhentshini esikole sebehlome ngamakhono adingwa yizimboni ezahlukene.

Esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal, inani labafundi abaphothule u-matric ngamalengiso likhuphuke ngamaphesenti ayishumi kulo nyaka, okuyinkomba enhle yokuthuthuka kwezemfundo ezikoleni zasemakhaya nakumalokishi. Nakuba lesi sibalo sikhombisa ithemba elikhulu, iningi lezikole lisabhekene nenselelo enkulu yokushoda kwezinsiza-kufunda zesimanje, ikakhulukazi amakhompyutha kanye noxhumo lwe-inthanethi olusheshayo oludingekayo ukuhambisana nesikhathi samanje. Ukuze kubhekwane nalesi simo esibucayi, izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme kanye namanyuvesi ahlukene asebehlele izinhlelo zokweseka abafundi abasanda kuphothula izikole zamabanga aphakeme ukuze bakwazi ukumelana nengcindezi yezifundo zabo zonyaka wokuqala. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kunesiphakamiso esisha senqubomgomo yezemfundo esihlose ukuqinisekisa ukuthi uthisha ngamunye uthola ukuqeqeshwa okukhethekile ngezobuchwepheshe ngaphambi kokuphela kwalo nyaka, kanti abazali nabo banxuswe ukuba babambe iqhaza ekufundeni kwezingane zabo emakhaya. Lokhu kuguquka kwendlela yokufundisa kulindeleke ukuba kuvule amanye amathuba amasha, kukhuthaze nentsha ukuba ibambe iqhaza elibonakalayo ekwakheni umnotho wezwe onolwazi olujulile, nokuqinisekisa ukuthi alikho ikusasa lomfundi elisala ngemuva ngenxa yokweswela.

Ngaphezu kwabafundi abazinkulungwane ezingamashumi amahlanu ezindaweni zasemakhaya babhekene nenkinga yokushoda kwezinsiza-kufunda njengoba izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka zisondela ngamandla. Lesi simo sesidale ukukhathazeka okukhulu kubazali kanye nothisha abafundisa amabanga aphezulu, abanovalo lokuthi lokhu kungase kube nomthelela omubi ezingeni lokuphasa kwabafundi bamatikuletsheni kulo nyaka. Ngenhloso yokubhekana nalesi simo esibucayi, amanyuvesi ahlukene akuleli aseqale uhlelo oluphuthumayo lokusebenzisana nezinhlangano ezizimele zomphakathi ukuze kusatshalaliswe amakhompyutha aphathekayo, izincwadi zokufunda, kanye neminye imishini yesimanje. Ngaphezu kwalokho, ongoti kwezemfundo bagcizelela ukuthi ukuthuthukiswa kwengqalasizinda yezikole kanye nokuqeqeshwa kothisha emakhonweni edijithali kubalulekile ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukukhula komnotho wesikhathi eside kuleli. Nakuba uhulumeni wesifundazwe ethembise ukwaba isabelomali esengeziwe ngonyaka ozayo ukulungisa lawa maphutha, abaholi bomphakathi baveza ukuthi isidingo sanamuhla sisalokhu siphuthuma kakhulu. Ekugcineni, ukuqinisekisa ukuthi wonke umfundi uthola amathuba alinganayo okufunda kudinga umzamo ohlanganyelwe ovela kuyo yonke imikhakha, ukuze kuvikelwe ikusasa lentsha kanye nentuthuko yezwe lonkana.

Emzamweni wokuvala igebe kwezobuchwepheshe, izikole zasemakhaya ezingaphezu kwamashumi amahlanu KwaZulu-Natal zamukele amakhompyutha aphathekayo kanye noxhumo lwe-inthanethi lwamahhala ngesonto eledlule. Lolu hlelo luhlose ukuthuthukisa izinga lokufunda kwabafundi, ikakhulukazi ezifundweni zesayensi nezibalo ebezilokhu ziyinselelo enkulu eminyakeni edlule. Nakuba othisha nabazali bekushayele ihlombe lokhu kuthuthukiswa kwengqalasizinda, ukucishwa kukagesi okuqhubekayo kusabeka engcupheni impumelelo yalokhu kufunda kwesimanjemanje. Ongoti bezemfundo bagcizelela ukuthi ukufakwa kobuchwepheshe emfundweni eyisisekelo kuyisinyathelo esibalulekile esizolungiselela abafundi impilo yasemanyuvesi kanye nomnotho wekusasa. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lezi zisetshenziswa zihlala isikhathi eside, abaholi bemiphakathi sebethathe isinqumo sokuqoka amakomidi azogada izikole ubusuku nemini ukuze kugwenywe ukugqekezwa nokucekelwa phansi kwempahla. Ngokuhamba kwesikhathi, kulindeleke ukuthi le ndlela entsha yokufundisa inwebelelwe nakwezinye izifundazwe, okuyingxenye yomgomo obanzi wokuqinisekisa ukuthi yonke ingane ithola imfundo esezingeni eliphezulu kungakhathalekile ukuthi iqhamuka kuyiphi indawo.

Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha abafundi abafunda ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme kanye nasemakolishi amakhulu esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal babhekene nenselelo enkulu yokukhokhela izifundo zabo kulo nyaka wezifundo. Lesi simo esibucayi asigcini nje ngokubambezela inqubo yokubhalisa emanyuvesi ahlukene, kodwa siphinde sibe nomthelela omubi ekufundeni kwentsha ezama ukuzakhela ikusasa elingcono. Ososayensi bezemfundo kanye nabaholi bemiphakathi banxuse ukuba kutholwe izixazululo eziphuthumayo ukuze kugwenywe ukuphazamiseka kohlelo lwezifundo olusanda kuqala. Ngenxa yalokhu kukhathazeka okukhulu, sekwethulwe uhlelo olusha loxhasomali oluhlose ukulekelela labo abavela emindenini entulayo ukuba bathole amathuba alinganayo emfundweni, kanti kulindeleke ukuthi lolu hlelo luqale ukusebenza ngokugcwele ngaphambi kokuphela kwale nyanga. Ngaphezu kwalokho, iziphathimandla zezemfundo zithembise ukwakha amasu amasha azoqinisekisa ukuthi wonke umfundi onamakhono uyakwazi ukungena eklasini ngaphandle kokucwaswa ngenxa yesimo sakhe sezomnotho. Yize kunezingqinamba ezinjalo, iningi labafundi lisazimisele ngokuqhubeka nokufunda ngoba likholelwa ekutheni imfundo iyisikhali esibalulekile sokunqoba ububha nokuthuthukisa umnotho wezwe lonke.

Ngokwezibalo zakamuva ezikhishwe ngongoti bezemfundo, cishe amaphesenti angamashumi ayisishiyagalombili abafundi abafunda ezikoleni zasemakhaya esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal asethuthukise imiphumela yawo kakhulu ngenxa yohlelo olusha lokufunda ngobuchwepheshe besimanje. Ukushoda kwezinsiza-kufunda kanye nokuntuleka kothisha abaqeqeshiwe sekuyisikhathi eside kuyinkinga ebambezela ikusasa lentsha kulezi zindawo. Ekhuluma egameni labazali, uMnu. Sipho Ndlovu onguSihlalo wesigungu esilawula isikole eNongoma, uzwakalise ukujabula kwakhe ngokuthi lolu hlelo alugcini nje ngokuletha amakhompyutha kodwa luphinde luqeqeshe nothisha ukuze bakwazi ukudlulisa ulwazi ngendlela ephumelelayo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, amanyuvesi amakhulu akuleli nawo aseqalile ukubambisana nezinhlaka ezizimele ngenhloso yokuxhasa abafundi abaphuma emindenini entulayo ngemifundaze ukuze baqhubeke nezifundo zabo zamabanga aphakeme ngaphandle kwengcindezi yezikweletu. Nakuba isimo sezomnotho sibukeka simuncu kuleli, lesi sinyathelo sinikeza ithemba elikhulu lokuthi izinga lemfundo lizoqhubeka nokukhula, okuzosiza ekulweni nobubha kanye nokwakha isizwe esihlome ngamakhono adingekayo emakethe yemisebenzi.

Esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal, ukwethulwa kohlelo olusha lwezobuchwepheshe ezikoleni zasemakhaya sekulethe ithemba elikhulu kubafundi nothisha ngokufanayo. Bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezinhlanu abafundi asebehlomule ngamakhompyutha aphathekayo kulo nyaka, okuyisinyathelo esiqondiswe ekuqedeni igebe lezemfundo phakathi kwabafundi basemadolobheni nalabo abasemaphandleni. Ngaphambilini, ukuntuleka kwengqalasizinda yesimanje kanye nokungatholakali kahle koxhumo lwe-inthanethi kwakubeka ikusasa lentsha engcupheni, ikakhulukazi ngezikhathi zokulungiselela izivivinyo zikamatikuletsheni. Ukubhekana nale nselelo, ochwepheshe bezemfundo kanye nabaholi bomphakathi bagcizelela ukuthi lokhu kufakwa kwedijithali kumele kuphelezelwe ngokuqeqeshwa kothisha okunzulu ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lolu tshalomali luveza imiphumela emihle esikhathini eside. Yize kusekuningi okumele kwenziwe ukuvuselela isimo sezikole eziningi ezisalele emuva, ukubambisana phakathi kwezinhlaka ezimele umphakathi kanye nezikhungo zemfundo ephakeme kubonisa isiqalo esithembisayo. Leli gxathu kulindeleke ukuthi ligqugquzele abafundi ukuba baphokophelele ukufunda emanyuvesi, baphinde bakwazi ukuncintisana namanye amazwe emnothweni wembulunga yonke oncike olwazini lwamanje.

Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha abafundi ezikoleni zasemakhaya esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal basabhekene nenselelo enkulu yokushoda kwezinsiza zokufunda zesimanje nezobuchwepheshe. Lesi simo siholele ekutheni izinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni kanye nabaholi bomphakathi baqale umkhankaso omkhulu wokuhlomisa izikole ngamakhompyutha kanye ne-inthanethi yamahhala. Ukufika kwalolu hlelo kulindeleke ukuba kuguqule indlela abafundi abathola ngayo ulwazi, kuvule namathuba okuba bakwazi ukuncintisana nabanye ontanga yabo ezingeni lomhlaba.
