Ekhuluma ngalolu daba, omunye wothisha abakhulu ugcizelele ukuthi ukulungiselela abafundi kusukela emazingeni aphansi yikho okuzobenza baphumelele kalula uma sebengena emanyuvesi nasemakolishi. Nakuba lo mkhankaso uqale ngezinyawo eziqinile, kusenomsebenzi omningi odingeka ukuba wenziwe ukuqinisekisa ukuthi uthisha ngamunye uthola uqeqesho olufanele lokusebenzisa lobu buchwepheshe eklasini. Ngokubambisana phakathi kwabazali, osomabhizinisi kanye neziphathimandla zezemfundo, leli phupho lokufukulwa kwamazinga okufunda lingaphenduka iqiniso elizozuzisa izizukulwane eziningi ezizayo.

Ezikoleni zasemakhaya ezisendaweni yaseMkhanyakude, uguquko lwezemfundo luqale ngesivinini kulandela ukwethulwa kohlelo olusha lwezifundo zezobuchwepheshe besimanje. Lolu hlelo, oluhlose ukuhlomisa abafundi ngamakhono adingekayo kuleli khulu leminyaka, lulindeleke ukuba luvule amathuba amaningi kubantwana abebencishwe amathuba phambilini. Ngokocwaningo lwamuva, bangaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha abafundi kulesi sifundazwe ababhekana nenselelo yokungabi nazinsiza zokufunda ezifanele, okuyisimo esidala igebe elikhulu phakathi kwezikole zasemadolobheni nezasemakhaya. Omunye wothisha abangomakadebona kule ndawo uphawule wathi ukufika kwalobu buchwepheshe kuzosiza kakhulu ekulolongeni izingqondo zentsha ukuze ikwazi ukuncintisana emanyuvesi nasemhlabeni wemisebenzi. Ngenxa yalesi sinyathelo esinqala, imiphakathi inxuswa ukuba ibambisane neziphathimandla ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha kwalezi zinsiza-kufunda, njengoba ukuthuthukiswa kwengqalasizinda yezikole kuyisisekelo esiqinile sekusasa eliqhakazile lesizwe. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abazali bakhuthazwa ukuba babambe iqhaza elibonakalayo ekufundeni kwezingane zabo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lolu hlelo luba yimpumelelo yesikhathi eside.

Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha abafundi abafunda ezikoleni zasemakhaya esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal babhekene nenselelo enkulu yokushoda kwezinsiza zokufunda isayensi nobuchwepheshe. Ukubhekana nalesi simo esibucayi, osomabhizinisi bendawo ngokubambisana nezinhlaka zentuthuko bethule uhlelo olubiza izigidi zamarandi lokwakha amalabhorethri esimanjemanje ezikoleni ezingamashumi amabili kuleli sonto. Leli gxathu lihambisana ngqo nomgomo kahulumeni kazwelonke wokugqugquzela imfundo yamakhono edingeka kakhulu emnothweni wanamuhla, njengoba kwavunyelwana emhlanganweni wakamuva othinta inqubomgomo yezemfundo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, othisha abaqeqeshwe ngokukhethekile bazoqashwa ukuze beseke abafundi ukuthi baphumelele ngamalengiso kwizifundo zezibalo, okuyizifundo eziyisidingo esikhulu uma bebhalisela iziqu emakolishi nakumanyuvesi aphezulu. Ngenxa yalolu hlelo olubanzi, intsha eningi emphakathini isinethemba elikhulu lokuthi izokwazi ukuqhubela phambili izifundo zayo ngaphandle kokuswela ulwazi oluyisisekelo. Ekugcineni, ochwepheshe bezemfundo banxusa ukuba le mizamo emihle inwetshwe nakwezinye izifundazwe ukuze kuqedwe unomphela ukungalingani kwezemfundo phakathi kwamadolobha nezindawo zasemakhaya, okuqinisekisa ikusasa eliqhakazile kubo bonke abafundi bakuleli.

Bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezingamashumi amahlanu abafundi abaqhamuka ezindaweni zasemakhaya abatheleke ezizindalwazi befaka izicelo zoxhaso lwezimali zokufunda emanyuvesi nakumaqoqo onyakeni ozayo. Lesi sibalo esiphezulu sikhombisa ngokusobala ukoma kwentsha yakuleli ngemfundo ephakeme, yize kusekhona igebe elikhulu mayelana nengqalasizinda ezikoleni ezisweleyo. Ukuze kubhekwane nale nselelo, ochwepheshe bezemfundo kanye nababambiqhaza sebethule uhlelo olusha lokulekelela labo bafundi ngamakhompyutha aphathekayo kanye nedatha yamahhala ukuze bakwazi ukufunda ngokukhululeka noma besemakhaya. Omunye wabazali okhulumele ikomiti lesikole esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal, ugcizelele ukuthi utshalomali emfundweni yiyona kuphela indlela engasiza ukuqeda ububha obuhlasele imiphakathi eminingi. Ngenkathi izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme zilungiselela ukuvula amasango azo ngenyanga ezayo, kulindeleke ukuba lolu hlelo lwesimanje luqinisekise ukuthi akekho umfundi osala ngaphandle ngenxa yokuswela, okuyisinyathelo esizophakamisa kakhulu izinga lokuphumelela ezifundweni zabo.

Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha abafundi basezikoleni zasemakhaya esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal kulindeleke ukuba bahlomule kuhlelo olusha lwezobuchwepheshe bwesimanje olwethulwe ngesonto eledlule. Lokhu kulandela isikhalo esesithathe isikhathi eside emphakathini mayelana nokuntuleka kwezinsizakusebenza ezikoleni, okubeke ikusasa lentsha engcupheni enkulu. Ososayensi bezemfundo emanyuvesi ahlukene kuleli bagcizelela ukuthi ukufakwa kwamakhompyutha, isizindalwazi se-inthanethi esinesivinini esiphezulu, namathebulethi emakilasini kuzosiza kakhulu ekuthuthukiseni izinga lokuphasa, ikakhulukazi ezifundweni ezinzima zeSayensi neZibalo. Ukuqinisekisa ukuthi lolu hlelo luba yimpumelelo yesikhathi eside, imiphakathi yendawo kanye nabazali banxuswe ngokuqinile ukuba babambisane neziphathimandla ukuvikela lezi zisetshenziswa ezigebengwini ezicekela phansi ingqalasizinda yomphakathi. Ngaleli gugu elisha eliyingqayizivele, abafundi abaningi manje sebezokwazi ukulungiselela izivivinyo zabo zokuphela konyaka ngokuzethemba okukhulu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, lokhu kulindeleke ukuthi kuvule amathuba angcono okungena ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme ngonyaka ozayo, ukuze bafezekise amaphupho abo okuba ngabaholi bangomuso abazofukula umnotho wezwe.

Bangaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu abafundi ezikoleni zasemakhaya KwaZulu-Natal abahlomule ngohlelo olusha lwezobuchwepheshe obuthuthukisa ukufunda ngosizo lwamakhompyutha. Lesi sinyathelo siza ngesikhathi lapho izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme kanye nezikole eziningi zibhekene nenselelo yokushoda kwezisetshenziswa zesimanje, okuyisimo ebesibeka ikusasa lentsha engcupheni. Ekhuluma emcimbini wokwethulwa kwalo mkhankaso, uthishanhloko wesinye sezikole ezakhelene nendawo yaseNongoma ugcizelele ukuthi ukufakwa kwe-inthanethi yamahhala kuzoshintsha kakhulu indlela abafundi abacwaninga ngayo uma benza imisebenzi yabo yesikole. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lolu hlelo luba yimpumelelo yesikhathi eside, kunesivumelwano esisayiniwe phakathi kwemiphakathi, osomabhizinisi bendawo kanye noMnyango wezeMfundo eyisiSekelo sokugada nokunakekela lezi zikhungo zemfundo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abafundi bamatikuletsheni abazophumelela ngamalengiso kulo nyaka bazothola imifundaze ezobaxhasa emanyuvesi ahlukene kuleli, okuyimizamo eqondiswe ekulweni nobubha nokukhulisa izinga lolwazi ezweni. Ngalokhu kusebenzisana okuhle, ithemba libuyile kwabaningi abebekholelwa ukuthi imfundo esezingeni eliphezulu itholakala kuphela emadolobheni amakhulu.

Ngokwezibalo zakamuva ezikhishwe yinhlangano ebhekelele intuthuko yezemfundo, bangaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha abafundi basezikoleni zasemakhaya abangakaze bathole ithuba lokusebenzisa amakhompyutha ekufundeni kwabo. Lesi simo esikhathazayo siphoqe ukuba kube nomkhankaso omkhulu oqale ngesonto eledlule esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal, lapho kuhloswe khona ukuhlomisa izikole ezingamakhulu amabili ngezinsiza zedijithali ezimanjemanje. Ukuqinisekisa ukuthi lezi zinsiza ezintsha zisetshenziswa ngendlela efanele, kuqaliswe nezinhlelo ezikhethekile zokuqeqesha othisha ngenhloso yokuthi bakwazi ukudlulisa ulwazi lwesayensi nezobuchwepheshe ngempumelelo emakilasini. Ngaphezu kwalokho, izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme kulesi sifundazwe sezivume ukusiza ekwakheni izindlela zokufundisa ezizobhekana ngqo nezinselelo ezitholakala ezindaweni ezincishwe amathuba ukwenza ngcono izinga lokuphasa. Ongoti bezemfundo banethemba lokuthi lokhu kutshalwa kwezimali kuzonciphisa igebe elikhona phakathi kwabafundi basemadolobheni nabasemakhaya, kuphinde kuvule amathuba angcono emisebenzi kubantu abasha abazoqeda izifundo zabo eminyakeni ezayo.

Cishe amaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha ezikole zasemakhaya esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal asethole ubuchwepheshe besimanje bamakhompyutha ukulekelela abafundi ezifundweni zezibalo nesayensi ngaphansi kohlelo olusha lwezemfundo. Lolu hlelo, oluqale ngonyaka odlule ngenhloso yokuqeda igebe phakathi kwezikole zasemadolobheni nezasemakhaya, selukhombise imiphumela emihle njengoba izinga lokuphasa likhuphuke ngendlela encomekayo, ikakhulukazi kubafundi bamatikuletsheni. Ngaphezu kwalokho, othisha abangaphezu kwamakhulu amabili baqeqeshwe ngokukhethekile ngongoti bezobuchwepheshe ukuze bakwazi ukudlulisa lolu lwazi ngokuzethemba emakilasini abo. Uma bephothula izifundo zabo zikamatikuletsheni, laba bafundi bazoba semathubeni angcono okwamukelwa emanyuvesi aphambili akuleli, bafundele amakhono ezobunjiniyela kanye nezobuchwepheshe adingeka kakhulu emnothweni wanamuhla. Nakuba kunale ntuthuko ekhuthazayo, isimo sokushoda kukagesi kanye nokucekelwa phansi kwempahla yezikole ezindaweni ezithile sisalokhu siyisihibe esikhulu esiphazamisa ukufunda nsuku zonke. Lesi simo siholele ekutheni imiphakathi, abazali, kanye nabaholi bendabuko babambisane ngokuqinile ukuvikela le ngqalasizinda ebalulekile yezemfundo ukuze ikusasa lentsha liqhubeke nokuba yisibani sethemba esizweni.

Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha abafundi abafunda ezikoleni zasemakhaya KwaZulu-Natal basabhekene nenselelo enkulu yokushoda kwezinsiza zokufunda zesimanjemanje, okuholela ekutheni basale ngemuva kakhulu kwezobuchwepheshe uma beqhathaniswa nontanga yabo basemadolobheni. Ukuzama ukulwa nalesi simo esikhathazayo, izolo kuvulwe isikhungo esisha samanje esifakwe amakhompyutha axhunywe kwi-inthanethi esikoleni samabanga aphakeme oNongoma, ngenhloso yokuletha uguquko olubonakalayo ohlelweni lwezemfundo. Leli gxathu elinconyiwe lamukelwe ngezandla ezimhlophe ngabazali kanye nothisha, abaveze ukuthi intsha yakulendawo isizokwazi ukufunda kangcono iphinde ifake izicelo zokubhalisa emanyuvesi ngaphandle kokubhekana nezindleko ezinzima zokugibela amatekisi iye edolobheni. Ngaphezu kwalokho, imininingwane eqoqwe ngabacwaningi ikhombisa ukuthi ukufakwa kwezobuchwepheshe emagumbini okufundela kukhulisa izinga lokuphasa ngendlela emangalisayo ngoba abafundi bathola ulwazi olubanzi ngokushesha. Ongoti bezemfundo kanye nabaholi bomphakathi baphethe ngokunxusa izakhamuzi ukuba zivikele lezi zikhungo ezigebengwini, bagcizelela ukuthi ikusasa lezwe eliqhakazile lincike emfundweni eseqophelweni eliphezulu engaphazanyiswa yizenzo zokucekelwa phansi kwempahla yesikole.

Ngaphezu kwabafundi abayizinkulungwane eziyishumi abafunda ezikoleni zasemakhaya esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal bazoqala ukuhlomula kuhlelo olusha lwezemfundo olugxile kwezobuchwepheshe besimanje kusukela kuleli sonto. Lesi sinyathelo esibalulekile sithathwe ngemuva kokuba isimo sokungalingani kwezemfundo phakathi kwezikole zasemadolobheni nezasemakhaya sidale ukukhathazeka okukhulu kubazali kanye nakothisha isikhathi eside. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe impumelelo yalolu hlelo, izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme ezifana neNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal zibambisene noMnyango wezeMfundo eyisiSekelo ukuqeqesha othisha abangamakhulu amahlanu ngamakhono amasha okufundisa isayensi yamakhompyutha. Ngenxa yalokhu kusebenzisana, kulindeleke ukuthi izinga lokuphasa kumatikuletsheni likhuphuke kakhulu eminyakeni ezayo, kanti futhi abafundi bazobe sebekulungele ngokugcwele ukuncintisana namanye amazwe emakethe yemisebenzi yomhlaba jikelele. Okhulumela inhlangano emele othisha kulesi sifundazwe uncome lolu hlelo kakhulu, wengeza ngokuthi ukutshalwa kwezimali ekufundeni kwentsha kanye nokuthuthukiswa kwengqalasizinda yezikole kuyisisekelo esiqinile sokulwa nobubha nokwakha ikusasa eliqhakazile lesizwe.

Emzamweni wokuqeda igebe lezobuchwepheshe emiphakathini yasemakhaya, izikole ezingamashumi amabili nezinhlanu esifundeni saseZululand zihlomule ngohlelo olusha lwamakhompyutha aphathekayo kanye ne-inthanethi yamahhala kuleli sonto. Lesi sinyathelo esibalulekile kulindeleke ukuba siguqule kakhulu indlela yokufunda nokufundisa, sinikeze intsha ithuba lokufinyelela kwizinsiza-kufunda zesimanje. Ngokwemibiko yamuva, ukushoda kwengqalasizinda yezobuchwepheshe kade kuyisithiyo esikhulu esivimbela abafundi abaningi ukuba baphumelele ezifundweni zabo zeSayensi nezibalo. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lolu hlelo lusebenza ngempumelelo, othisha abangamakhulu amabili sebeqale ukuqeqeshwa okukhethekile mayelana nokusetshenziswa kwale mishini emakilasini. Abakhulumela izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme bazwakalise ukuleseka leli hlelo, begcizelela ukuthi abafundi abaqeqeshwe kahle kwezobuchwepheshe besemazingeni aphansi ababi nankinga yokumelana nengcindezi yasezinyuvesi. Nakuba kusenenselelo yokucinywa kukagesi, amalungiselelo okufaka amaphaneli kagesi welanga asezinhlelweni ukuze imfundo ingaphazamiseki, okuwuphawu lwethemba lokuthi ikusasa lezemfundo kulesi sifundazwe liqhakazile.

Ngaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezingamashumi amathathu zemindeni esifundeni saKwaZulu-Natal kulindeleke ukuba zihlomule ohlelweni olusha lwengqalasizinda yamanzi oluzoqala ukusebenza ngenyanga ezayo. Lolu hlelo lwentuthuko, oluxhaswe ngesamba esingaphezu kwezigidi zamarandi ezingamakhulu amabili, luhlose ukuqeda unomphela inkinga yesomiso kanye nokunqamuka kwamanzi njalo ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi owawubanjwe ehholo lendawo izolo, uSodolobha wakuqinisekisa ukuthi osonkontileka sebephothule isigaba sokuqala sokufaka amapayipi amakhulu adonsa amanzi emadamini awahambise ezigcemeni ezahlukene. Ngaphandle kokuhlinzeka ngamanzi ahlanzekile naphephile, lo msebenzi omkhulu uvule amathuba emisebenzi kwintsha yakule ndawo engaphezu kwamakhulu amabili, okuyisinyathelo esizoletha intuthuko kwezomnotho kulo masipala. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi le ngqalasizinda entsha iyagcinwa isesimweni esihle isikhathi eside, iziphathimandla zisungule ithimba elikhethekile lonjiniyela elizobhekelela ukulungiswa kwamapayipi aqhumayo kanye nokuphendula izikhalazo zomphakathi ngokushesha. Kusenjalo, izakhamuzi ziyanxuswa ukuba zibambisane nohulumeni wendawo ngokubika noma yikuphi ukuvuza kwamanzi kanye nokucekelwa phansi kwempahla yomphakathi emahhovisi ezigceme zazo ukuze kugwenywe ukumoshakala kwalo mthombo oyigugu.

Emiphakathini yaseMkhanyakude, ukushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile sekuphenduke insakavukela umchilo wesidwaba, okuphoqe ukuba kuthathwe izinyathelo ezinqala ngokushesha. Ngenxa yalesi simo esibucayi, ngesonto eledlule kumenyezelwe uhlelo olusha lwengqalasizinda oluzobiza izigidi ezingamakhulu amabili zamarandi ukulungisa amapayipi amadala nokwakha amadamu amancane agcina amanzi. Ukuthuthukiswa kwale phrojekthi ngeke nje kuxazulule inkinga yokoma kwamaphayiphi emizi yabantu, kodwa kulindeleke ukuthi kuvule amathuba emisebenzi angaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu entsheni yendawo. Ekhuluma ngalolu hlelo, umeya walo masipala ugcizelele ukuthi ukulethwa kwezidingongqangi akusona isihle kodwa kuyilungelo ngokomthethosisekelo wezwe, waphinda wanxusa izakhamuzi ukuba zibambisane nezinhlaka zikahulumeni ukuvikela ingqalasizinda ekucekelweni phansi. Ngaphezu kwalokho, imisebenzi yokumba kulindeleke ukuba iqale ngasekupheleni kwale nyanga, kanti abamabhizinisi asafufusa endaweni banikiwe ithuba eliyingqayizivele lokufaka izicelo zamathenda okuhlinzeka ngezinto zokwakha ukuze kuthuthukiswe umnotho wasekhaya.

Emva kweminyaka emithathu yokubhekana nenselelo yokunqamuka kwamanzi njalo, izakhamuzi zaseMlazi zizophendulelwa izikhalo zazo kulandela ukwethulwa kohlelo olusha lokulungisa ingqalasizinda. Lesi sinyathelo esibize izigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zamarandi kulindeleke ukuba siqale ngenyanga ezayo, kanti sizogxila ekushintsheni amapayipi amadala asephelelwe yisikhathi kanye nokwakha amadamu amancane okugcina amanzi. Ngokombiko okhishwe yikomidi lezentuthuko kumasipala, lokhu ngeke nje kuphela kubuyise isithunzi somphakathi kodwa kuzovula namathuba emisebenzi kwentsha yakule ndawo ngoba izinkampani ezincane zizothola amathenda okusiza kulo msebenzi. Ukuze lo mkhankaso ube yimpumelelo, abaholi bomphakathi kanye namakhansela banxuse abantu ukuba babambisane nosonkontileka abazoqashwa futhi bagweme ukulimaza impahla kahulumeni ngesikhathi seziyaluyalu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kukhuthazwe izakhamuzi ukuba ziqhubeke nokukhokhela izinsiza zikamasipala ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi kuhlala kunesikhwama esanele sokunakekela le ngqalasizinda entsha. Uma lolu hlelo luphothulwa ngempumelelo ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka, luzoba yisibonelo esihle kwezinye izigceme ezisabhekene nenkinga efanayo esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal, kukhombise ukuthi ukubambisana phakathi kukahulumeni nabantu kungaletha ushintsho olubonakalayo.

Ngemuva kwezinyanga eziyisithupha kubhekene nenkinga ebuhlungu yokunqamuka kwamanzi, izakhamizi zakwaMashu seziqale ukubona ukukhanya ekugcineni komhubhe kulandela isinyathelo esisha sikamasipala. Lokhu kuza emuva kokuba umkhandlu weTheku umemezele isabelomali esiphuthumayo sezigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zamarandi izolo, ngenhloso eqondile yokulungisa ingqalasizinda endala ebibangela ukuqhuma kwamapayipi. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi owawugcwele phama ehholo lendawo, uMeya ugcizelele ukuthi le phrojekthi ayigcini nje ngokubuyisa amanzi kodwa izodala amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amabili kwentsha yakule ndawo ngesikhathi sokwakhiwa kwayo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, usomabhizinisi wendawo uMnu. Sipho Zungu uzwakalise ukuthokoza kwakhe, eveza ukuthi ukungabikho kwale nsiza kudale ukuthi amabhizinisi amaningi avale iminyango yawo ngenxa yokulahlekelwa yinzuzo. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lolu hlelo lusebenza ngempumelelo, kukhuthazwe wonke amalungu omphakathi ukuba abike masinyane noma yikuphi ukuvuza kwamanzi emahhovisi ezigceme noma basebenzise inombolo yamahhala entsha eyethuliwe. Uhlelo lokulungisa kulindeleke ukuba luphothulwe ngaphambi kokuphela kukaZibandlela, okuzoletha isiqabu esikhulu emindenini nakubantu ababuthakathaka ebebekade bencike emalolini athutha amanzi nsuku zonke.

Ngemuva kwezinyanga eziyisithupha kubhekwe ngenhla ngenxa yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile, izakhamizi zaseMlazi seziqala ukubona ukukhanya ekugcineni komhubhe. Lesi simo esinzima siphoqe ukuthi kuthathwe izinyathelo ezinqala, okudale ukuba kwethulwe uhlelo olusha lokulungisa ingqalasizinda ngokushesha. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi izolo, uMeya wakuqinisekisa ukuthi isabelomali sezigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu samarandi sesigunyaziwe ukuze kuvuselelwe amapayipi agugile kanjalo namaphampu aphehla amanzi kuleli dolobha. Ngaphezu kwalokho, osomabhizinisi bendawo kanye nabaholi bomdabu banxuswe ukuba babambisane nohulumeni wasekhaya ekugcineni inhlanzeko nasekuvikeleni le ntuthuko ekucekelweni phansi yizigebengu. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lolu hlelo lusebenza ngempumelelo, kuzosungulwa ikomidi elikhethekile elizobheka kabanzi ukusebenza kwezimali zikamasipala kanye nokuqashwa kwabasebenzi abanamakhono afanele. Kulindeleke ukuthi lo msebenzi omkhulu uphothulwe ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka, kanti amalungu omphakathi ayacelwa ukuba aqhubeke nokonga amanzi aphinde abike ngokushesha noma yikuphi ukuvuza emahhovisi akamasipala aseduzane.

Ngemuva kwamasonto amathathu emiphakathi yakwaMashu naseNanda ibhekene nenkinga ebuhlungu yokunqamuka kwamanzi, isimo sokuphila sesiqala ukubuyela kwesijwayelekile njengoba osonkontileka beqale ukulungisa amapayipi amakhulu aqhumile. Bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezingamashumi amahlanu abantu abakhahlamezekile kulesi sigameko, okudale ukuthi amabhizinisi amancane, imitholampilo, nezikole ziphoqeleke ukuba zivale iminyango yazo okwesikhashana, okubeke impilo yomphakathi engcupheni. Ukuze kugwemeke ukuphindeka kwale nkinga esikhathini esizayo, umkhandlu wedolobha usanda kumemezela uhlelo olusha noluqinile lokuthuthukisa ingqalasizinda oluzobiza izigidi ezingamakhulu amabili zamarandi. Lolu hlelo lwesu lesikhathi eside luzogxila ekushintsheni amapayipi amadala agugile nokufaka ubuchwepheshe besimanje obuzokwazi ukukhomba ngokushesha lapho kunokuvuza khona ngaphambi kokuba isimo sibe sibi kakhulu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abaholi bomphakathi banxuse izakhamuzi ukuba zibambisane nohulumeni wendawo ngokubika ngokushesha noma yikuphi ukonakala kwengqalasizinda ezindaweni zazo. Kulindeleke ukuthi isigaba sokuqala salo msebenzi wokulungisa siphothulwe ngokuphelele ekupheleni kukaZibandlela walo nyaka, okuzoletha impumuzo enkulu kwabaningi abebekade behlupheka.

Ukushoda kwamanzi osekuthathe izinyanga eziningi kuqhubeka nokukhathaza izakhamizi zasemakhaya aseMkhanyakude enyakatho yaKwaZulu-Natal, lapho imifula eminingi isishile ngenxa yesomiso esingapheli. Ngenhloso yokulwa nale nkinga ebhebhethekayo, ngesonto eledlule umkhandlu wethule ngokusemthethweni uhlelo olusha lwengqalasizinda oluzobiza izigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zamarandi. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abaholi bomphakathi kanye namakhosi endawo banxuse abantu ukuba bawasebenzise ngokucophelela la manzi azolethwa ngamaloli masonto onke ngenkathi kusakulindwe ukuphothulwa kwamaphayiphi amakhulu azodonsa amanzi emadamini. Ngokombiko okhishwe imeya yakuleli dolobha emhlanganweni wesigungu esiphezulu, lokhu kwakhiwa kwamadamu amancane kanye nokufakwa kwamaphompo esizukulwane esisha ngeke nje kuxazulule inkinga yokoma kuphela, kodwa kuzophinde kuvule amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amathathu kwintsha yangakubo engasebenzi. Yize kunjalo, kuningi ukungabaza emphakathini njengoba izethembiso ezinjengalezi zake zenziwa phambilini ngezikhathi zokhetho kodwa zagcina zingafezekanga, okwenza izakhamizi zigade ngabomvu ukuthi ngabe lolu hlelo oluhlongozwayo luzosiletha yini isixazululo esihlala njalo kulesi sifunda esikhungethwe yububha.

Ngemuva kwezinyanga eziyisithupha izakhamuzi zaseMlazi zidonsa kanzima ngenxa yokunqamuka njalo kwamanzi, isimo kulindeleke ukuba sibe ngcono maduze njengoba sekuqale uhlelo lokulungisa amapayipi amadala. Izigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zamarandi zibekelwe eceleni ukuxhasa lo mklamo ozodonsa izinyanga ezintathu, ohloselwe ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ingqalasizinda iyahambisana nesibalo sabantu esikhulayo kuleli lokishi. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi obubanjwe esikoleni samabanga aphakeme sakulendawo izolo, iMeya inxuse abantu ukuba babekezele ngenkathi osonkontileka besenza umsebenzi wabo bemba imigwaqo. Leli gxathu liyingxenye yomkhankaso wesifundazwe obanzi wokuvuselela ukulethwa kwezidingongqangi emalokishini, okuwuhlelo oluzodala amathuba emisebenzi angaphezu kwamakhulu amabili entsheni yendawo engasebenzi. Ukuze kugwenywe ukucekelwa phansi kwempahla, amakhansela ahlukene asezibophezele ekusebenzisaneni namaphoyisa kanye namakomidi okuphepha ukuqapha izindawo zokwakha ubusuku nemini. Uma lo msebenzi uphothulwa ngempumelelo ngesikhathi esibekiwe, kulindeleke ukuba unqamule unomphela inkinga yokuvuza kwamanzi ebikade idla isabelomali sikamasipala iminyaka eminingi.

Emzamweni wokuqeda inkinga yokushoda kwamanzi esikhathaze imiphakathi yaseNyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal isikhathi eside, sekuqale uhlelo olukhulu lokulungisa ingqalasizinda kuleli sonto. Ngokwemibiko yamuva ekhishwe ngongoti bezentuthuko, cishe amaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha emindeni yakule ndawo abenezinyanga ezingaphezu kweziyisithupha engawatholi nhlobo amanzi ahlanzekile ompompi, okuyisimo esibeke impilo yabantu engozini yezifo. Kulindeleke ukuthi lesi sabelomali esiyizigidi ezingamakhulu amahlanu zamarandi, esimenyezelwe ngokusemthethweni ngesonto eledlule, silethe ushintsho olubonakalayo ngaphambi kokuphela kwalo nyaka ngokufaka amapayipi amasha amakhilomitha angamashumi amahlanu. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi izolo ekuseni, imeya yendawo igcizelele ukubaluleka kokubambisana phakathi kwezakhamuzi nosonkontileka abazoqashwa, inxusa abantu ukuba bavikele le phrojekthi ezigebengwini ezicekela phansi impahla yombuso. Ngaphezu kokuletha lezi zidingongqangi, ukulungiswa kwalawa mapayipi kuzophinde kuvule amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amabili kwentsha engasebenzi kule ndawo. Lokhu kuthathwa njengesinyathelo esibalulekile esizothuthukisa umnotho wamakhaya, sinciphise ububha, siphinde sibuyise isithunzi somphakathi obusuphelelwe yithemba ngenxa yokushoda kwezinsiza zikamasipala.

Ngemuva kweminyaka eminingi yokubhekana nenkinga yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile, izakhamuzi zaseMtubatuba ekugcineni zizothola isixazululo esidekile. Lolu shintsho luza kulandela isimemezelo esenziwe ngesonto eledlule sokuthi kuzotshalwa izigidi ezingamakhulu amabili zamarandi ukulungisa ingqalasizinda endala ebibangela ukuvuza kwamapayipi. Uhlelo olusha lwentuthuko, olwaziwa ngokuthi uHlelo Olukhulu Lwezamanzi, alugcini nje ngokufaka amapayipi amasha kodwa luhlose nokwakha amadamu amancane amathathu ukugcina amanzi emvula. Ngaphezu kokuletha usizo oluphuthumayo emakhaya abantu, lo mklamo kulindeleke ukuba uvule amathuba emisebenzi angaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu entsheni yendawo engasebenzi. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi, usodolobha wendawo ugcizelele ukuthi ukulethwa kwezidingongqangi akusona isipho kodwa kuyilungelo ngokomthethosisekelo, ngakho-ke osonkontileka bazogadwa ngeso lokhozi ukuqinisekisa ukuthi umsebenzi uphothulwa ngesikhathi esibekiwe ngaphandle kokumoshwa kwezimali zombuso. Ukuze lo mkhankaso ube yimpumelelo, abaholi bomdabu banxuse umphakathi ukuba ubike masinyane noma yikuphi ukucekelwa phansi kwempahla yakamasipala, njengoba lokhu kuyisona sithiyo esikhulu esibuyisela intuthuko emuva ezindaweni zasemakhaya.

Ngenxa yokushoda kwamanzi osekuthathe izinyanga eziyisithupha endaweni yaseMkhanyakude, izakhamizi seziphefumulela phezulu kulandela isinqumo esisha esithathwe emhlanganweni womkhandlu izolo. Lesi sinqumo sibandakanya ukutshalwa kwezigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zamarandi ukuze kulungiswe amapayipi agugile, kuvuselelwe ingqalasizinda endala, kuphinde kwakhiwe amadamu amasha amancane azosiza ngezikhathi zesomiso esiqhubekayo kulesi sifundazwe. Ngokwemibiko ethulwe phambi kwekomidi lezengqalasizinda nokuhlelwa kwamadolobha, lolu hlelo kulindeleke ukuba luqale ngokusemthethweni ekupheleni kwale nyanga, kanti luzodala amathuba emisebenzi angaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu kwintsha yendawo engasebenzi. Noma kunjalo, abaholi bomphakathi kanye nezishoshovu zamalungelo esintu banxuse abantu ukuba basebenzise amanzi akhona njengamanje ngokucophelela okukhulu, njengoba isimo sezulu singakathembisi imvula eyanele ukugcwalisa imithombo emikhulu. Ukubambisana okuhle phakathi kwezigatshana zikahulumeni wendawo, osomabhizinisi kanye nezinhlangano ezizimele kubonakala kuyiyona ndlela engcono kakhulu yokuqinisekisa ukuthi intuthuko ifinyelela ngokushesha kuwo wonke amakhaya abesalokhu entula lolu sizo olusemqoka esikhathini eside esedlule.

Ezindaweni zasemakhaya esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal, inkinga engapheli yokushoda kwamanzi igcine iholele ekutheni kube nohlelo olukhulu lokuvuselela ingqalasizinda. Ngenhloso yokubhekana nalesi simo esesinesikhathi eside sihlukumeza imiphakathi, isabelomali samarandi ayizigidi ezingamakhulu amahlanu sikhishwe ngokusemthethweni izolo ukuze kwakhiwe amadamu amasha kuphinde kulungiswe namapayipi amadala asephelelwe yisikhathi. Izakhamuzi zakulezi zindawo zizwakalise ukukhululeka okukhulu kakhulu, njengoba iningi lazo lichithe amashumi eminyaka lithembele emanzini emifula angaphephile abeka impilo yazo engcupheni yezifo. Ngesikhathi kunomcimbi wokwethula lo mklamo emphakathini, abaholi bendawo bagcizelele ukuthi lokhu kwakhiwa ngeke kugcine ngokuletha amanzi kuphela kodwa kuzophinde kuvule amathuba emisebenzi aqondile angaphezu kwamakhulu amabili entsheni yomasipala abakhelene. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kukhuthazwe osomabhizinisi basendaweni ukuba babambe iqhaza ekuhlinzekeni ngezinsiza zokwakha, okuzosimamisa umnotho wendawo. Kulindeleke ukuthi isigaba sokuqala salolu hlelo lwentuthuko siphothulwe ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga kaZibandlela, okuyisinyathelo esizoqinisekisa ukuthi yonke imizi ithola amanzi ahlanzekile nathembekile ngokugcwele ngaphambi kokuba kuqale isizini yamaholide kaKhisimusi.

Sekuphele iminyaka engaphezu kwemithathu izakhamuzi zaKwaMashu zibhekene nenkinga enkulu yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile, isimo esesiphoqe ukuba kuthathwe izinyathelo eziphuthumayo zokulungisa ingqalasizinda esigugile. Ngenxa yalesi simo esingesihle, kunesabelomali esingamarandi ayizigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu esesigunyaziwe ukwenza lolu hlelo lokuvuselela amapayipi amadala agqwalile, okuyinto ebangele ukuvuza kwamanzi amaningi. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi izolo ekuseni, iMeya yendawo iqinisekise ukuthi osomabhizinisi abancane bakuleli lokishi bazonikwa ithuba lokubamba iqhaza ekwakhiweni kwale phrojekthi enkulu ukuze kudalwe amathuba emisebenzi entsha kubantu abasha abangasebenzi. Ukulungiswa kwale nethiwekhi yamanzi kulindeleke ukuba kuphothulwe ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka ozayo, okuzoletha impumuzo emindenini engaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi ebizikhandla ngokukha amanzi emalolini kamasipala nsuku zonke. Ngakho-ke, abaholi bomphakathi kanye namakhansela banxusa wonke amalungu ukuba abambisane ngokugcwele nosonkontileka abazoqala ukusebenza kuleli sonto elizayo, bagweme noma yikuphi ukubhikisha okungase kubambezele le ntuthuko ebaluleke kangaka empilweni yomphakathi.

Emva kwezinyanga ezingaphezu kweziyisithupha kubhekwe ngenhla ngenxa yokushoda kwamanzi, izakhamizi zaKwaMashu nezindawo ezakhelene nalo zizogcina zithole usizo kulandela ukuphothulwa kwengqalasizinda entsha ebiza izigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zamarandi. Ethula lolu hlelo emphakathini ngesonto eledlule, uMeya wakuqinisekisa ukuthi lawa mapayipi amasha azokwehlisa kakhulu inkinga yokuvuza kwamanzi aphinde aqinisekise ukuthi abantu bathola amanzi ahlanzekile ngokungaphazamiseki nsuku zonke. Leli gxathu libalulekile kakhulu emizamweni kamasipala yokuthuthukisa ukulethwa kwezidingongqangi, okuyingxenye yomgomo kazwelonke wokulwa nengwadla yokuguga kwengqalasizinda emalokishini kanye nasezindaweni zasemakhaya. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kulo mklamo kuqashwe intsha engamashumi amabili endaweni ukuze isize ekwakhiweni, okuyinto enciphise izinga lokweswela imisebenzi kulesi sifunda. Noma kunjalo, abaholi bomphakathi banxuse abantu ukuba babambisane neziphathimandla ngokubika ngokushesha noma yiziphi izigameko zokucekelwa phansi kwempahla yomkhandlu, njengoba lokhu kubambezela intuthuko. Ukulondolozwa kwale ntuthuko kuzoncika ekutheni izakhamizi kanye nohulumeni wasekhaya basebenza ngokubambisana ukuvikela lokhu kutshalwa kwezimali okuzozuzisa izizukulwane ezizayo futhi kuqinisekise inhlanzeko eqhubekayo endaweni.

Emva kweminyaka emihlanu yokubhekana nokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile njalo, izakhamuzi zaseMlaza eningizimu yeTheku sezingabheka phambili kwinguquko enkulu kulandela isabelomali esisha esigunyazwe umkhandlu wedolobha. Lesi sabelomali samarandi ayizigidi ezingamakhulu amabili sizosetshenziselwa ukulungisa amapayipi amadala nokwakha amadamu amasha azosiza ekugcineni amanzi ngesikhathi sesomiso esivame ukuhlasela isifundazwe. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi owawusehholo lendawo izolo, iMeya yakuqinisekisa ukuthi osonkontileka bazoqala umsebenzi ngesonto elizayo, kanti kulindeleke ukuba kuqashwe abantu abasha abangaphezu kwamakhulu amathathu kule ndawo ukuze kuncishiswe izinga lokweswela imisebenzi. Ukulungiswa kwale ngqalasizinda akugcini nje ngokuqinisekisa ukuthi imizi ithola amanzi ngokuthembeka, kodwa kuzophinde kuthuthukise isimo sezempilo nenhlanzeko ezikoleni nasemitholampilo yasendaweni ebilokhu ithikamezeka. Ukuze lo msebenzi uqhubeke ngaphandle kweziphazamiso, abaholi bomphakathi kanye namakhansela banxuse abantu ukuba babambisane ngokugcwele nohulumeni wendawo, babike ngokushesha noma yikuphi ukucekelwa phansi kwempahla emaphoyiseni ukuze kuvikelwe le ntuthuko ebaluleke kangaka.

Emzamweni wokubhekana nengwadla yokushoda kwamanzi ekhungethe izakhamizi zaseMkhanyakude izinyanga eziyisithupha zilandelana, sekwethulwe uhlelo olusha lwengqalasizinda olubiza izigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zamarandi. Lolu hlelo, olulindeleke ukuba luqale ukusebenza ekupheleni kwale nyanga, luzobandakanya ukufakwa kwamapayipi amasha kanye nokwakhiwa kwamadamu amancane okugcina amanzi ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Ekhuluma ngesikhathi kuhlolwa isimo sale ndawo, umphathi kamasipala ugcizelele ukuthi lokhu kunakekelwa kwentuthuko kuzodala amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amathathu kwabasha bendawo abebentula imisebenzi isikhathi eside. Ngaphezu kwalokho, umphakathi uyanxuswa ukuba ubambisane neziphathimandla ngokubika ngokushesha noma yikuphi ukuvuza kwamapayipi kanye nokucekelwa phansi kwempahla yomuso eyakhelwe ukuthuthukisa impilo yabantu. Ukuzibophezela okunjena kubalulekile ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi izinsiza zikamasipala zifinyelela kuwo wonke umuntu ngendlela efanele nangokulingana, kanti futhi lokhu kuhambisana ngqo nemigomo yohlelo lwentuthuko kazwelonke oluhlose ukuqeda ubuphofu kanye nokuletha intuthuko esimeme emiphakathini entulayo.

Emzamweni wokuqeda inkinga yokushoda kwamanzi esikhathaze izakhamuzi isikhathi eside, inqwaba yamaphayiphi amasha isiqalile ukufakwa endaweni yaseNongoma. Ngokombiko okhishwe ngesonto eledlule, bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezingamashumi amabili abantu abazohlomula kulolu hlelo lwengqalasizinda olubiza izigidi ezingamashumi ayisihlanu zamarandi. Leli nyathelo liza ngemuva kokuba isimo sesomiso siphoqe ukuthi imikhandlu yendawo ibuyekeze izinqubomgomo zayo zokwabiwa kwamanzi ezindaweni zasemakhaya kanye nasemalokishini. Ekhuluma nabezindaba endaweni yesigameko, omunye wabaholi bomphakathi wakuqinisekisa ukuthi ukulethwa kwalezi zidingongqangi kuzothuthukisa kakhulu isimo sezempilo kanye nenhlanzeko, ikakhulukazi ezikoleni ezisendaweni nasemitholampilo. Ukwengeza kulokho, uhulumeni wesifundazwe uvumelene ngokuthi kuzosungulwa ithimba elikhethekile elizoqapha ukuhamba kahle kwalo msebenzi nokuqinisekisa ukuthi izimali zentela zisetshenziswa ngendlela efanele nangokuvulelekile. Ngenxa yalokhu, izakhamuzi ziyanxuswa ukuba zibambisane ngokugcwele nosonkontileka abasebenza kule ndawo ukuze umsebenzi uphothulwe ngesikhathi esibekiwe ngaphandle kweziphazamiso.

Ngemuva kweminyaka emihlanu yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile ezindaweni zasemakhaya, izakhamizi zakwaNongoma sezingabheka phambili kwinguquko enkulu ezoletha isiqabu empilweni yazo yansuku zonke. Leli themba liza kulandela isabelomali samarandi ayizigidi ezingamashumi amathathu esimenyezelwe umkhandlu wendawo ngenhloso yokulungisa ingqalasizinda endala, ukufaka amapayipi amasha, nokwakha amadamu azosimamisa isimo. Ngokwemibiko yabaholi bomphakathi kanye nosomabhizinisi abasafufusa, lolu hlelo alugcini nje ngokuqinisekisa ukuthi oompompi abomi ezikoleni nasemitholampilo, kodwa luzovula namathuba emisebenzi angaphezu kwamakhulu amabili kwintsha engasebenzi kulesi sifunda. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi konke kuhamba ngobulungiswa nangokubambisana, wonke amalungu omphakathi ayanxuswa ukuba ahambele umhlangano obalulekile ozoba ngeSonto ehholo lasedolobheni, lapho kuzochazwa khona kabanzi ngezigaba zokwakha kanye nendlela yokuqasha. Khonamanjalo, ithimba elikhethekile elivela kuhulumeni wesifundazwe lizobe ligade lolu hlelo ngelokhozi ukugwema noma yiluphi uhlobo lwenkohlakalo kanye nokubambezeleka komsebenzi, okuyizigameko ezibike zakhinyabeza intuthuko esikhathini esedlule, ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi izimali zentela yabantu zisebenza ngendlela efanele futhi ebonakalayo.

Ezigodini ezingaphezu kwamashumi amabili nezinhlanu ngaphansi kukaMasipala waseThekwini, inkinga yokunqamuka kwamanzi isiphenduke insakavukela umchilo wesidwaba evimbela ukuthuthuka komnotho wendawo kanye nokuphazamisa ukufunda ezikoleni. Ukubhekana nalesi simo esibucayi, umkhandlu wedolobha usanda kupasisa isabelomali esiphuthumayo sezigidi ezingamakhulu amathathu zamarandi esizokhishwa ngokushesha ukuze kulungiswe ingqalasizinda endala ehlulekayo ukumelana nesibalo sabantu esilokhu sikhula minyaka yonke. Kusukela ngesonto elizayo, osonkontileka abaqokiwe bazoqala umsebenzi omkhulu wokushintsha amapayipi amakhulu adabula emalokishini akwaMashu, ePinetown kanye naseNanda, njengoba lawa kuyiwo avame ukuqhuma adale umonakalo omkhulu emigwaqweni. Ekhuluma ngalokhu ngesikhathi kuhlangene umphakathi izolo, uSodolobha uthembise izakhamizi ukuthi lolu hlelo lokulungisa luzodala amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amabili kwentsha engasebenzi, kanti izinhlelo zokuhambisa amanzi ngamaloli zizoqhubeka ngenkathi kusenziwa lo msebenzi. Nokho, zonke izakhamuzi zinxuswe ukuba zisebenzise amanzi ngokukhulu ukonga kulesi sikhathi soshintsho, zibikele iziphathimandla ngokushesha uma zibona ukuvuza kwamanzi ukuze kugwenywe ukumoshakala kwalo mthombo oyigugu.

Ngaphezu kwezakhamizi eziyizinkulungwane ezingamashumi amahlanu sezihlale izinyanga ezintathu ngaphandle kwamanzi ahlanzekile ngenxa yokuguga kwengqalasizinda, okuphoqe ukuba kube nokungenelela okuphuthumayo endaweni yaseMlazi nakwezinye izigceme ezakhelene nayo. Ukulungisa lesi simo esibucayi, uMkhandlu weTheku umemezele isabelomali esiphuthumayo sezigidi ezingamakhulu amabili zamarandi esizobhekana ngqo nokushintshwa kwamapayipi amadala kanye nokuvuselelwa kwamadamu okugcina amanzi. Ngokwemibiko yamuva ekhishwe yithimba lezobunjiniyela, lesi sinyathelo asigcini nje ngokuxazulula inkinga yamanzi kuphela, kodwa silindeleke nokuba sidale amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amathathu kwintsha yendawo njengoba imisebenzi yokwakha izoqala ngenyanga ezayo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, ubuholi bomphakathi buxwayise izakhamizi ukuba zigweme ukuxhuma amapayipi ngokungemthetho, okuyinto ekhonjwe njengenye yezimbangela zokulahleka kwamanzi amaningi nsuku zonke. Nakuba lolu hlelo olubanzi luzothatha izinyanga eziyisithupha ukuthi luphothulwe ngokugcwele, iziphathimandla zithembise ukuthi amaloli athutha amanzi azoqhubeka nokuhlinzeka ngosizo lwansuku zonke ezindaweni ezikhahlamezeke kakhulu, ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi amalungelo esisekelo abantu ayavikelwa ngenkathi kusenziwa lolu shintsho lokuthuthukisa intuthuko.

Elokishini laseMlazi, inkinga yokulahlwa kukadoti ngokungemthetho ezindaweni ezingavumelekile isiphenduke ubhubhane olubeka engcupheni enkulu impilo yezinkulungwane zezakhamuzi, ikakhulukazi izingane ezincane ezigula ngenxa yomoya ongahlanzekile. Ukubhekana ngqo nalesi simo esibucayi, amalungu omphakathi ewuhlandla ahlele umkhankaso omkhulu wokuhlanza indawo ngempelasonto edlule, lapho kuqoqwe khona amathani angaphezu kwamashumi amabili emfucuza eyingozi. Omunye wabaholi bendawo abagqamile, uMnu. Sipho Ndlovu, ugcizelele ngesikhathi ekhuluma nezintatheli ukuthi lesi sinyathelo ngeke nje sigcine ngokuthuthukisa isithombe sendawo, kodwa sizobuyisa nesithunzi sabantu abahlala kuyo ngoba ukuhlanzeka kuyimpilo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, umkhandlu wedolobha usuthembise ukulekelela ngamaloli engeziwe azothutha udoti njalo ngesonto, kanye nokuqinisa imithetho ehlawulisa kanzima labo abatholakala bephula umthetho wemvelo. Kulindeleke ukuba lokhu kubambisana okuhle phakathi kwezakhamuzi nezikhulu zikamasipala kulethe ushintsho olubambekayo emphakathini, kuvikeleke nemvelo ngokuphelele ukuze izizukulwane ezizayo zizophila endaweni ephephile, enokuthula nehlanzelekile.

Emiphakathini yasemakhaya yakwaNongoma, inkinga yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile sekuphele iminyaka engaphezu kweshumi ihlupha izakhamuzi ngokunganqamuki. Ukuphendula kulokhu kukhala, kuthululwe isamba sezigidi ezingamashumi amabili zamarandi ngenhloso yokwakha ingqalasizinda entsha ezosiza imizi engaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezinhlanu kulesi sifunda. Omunye wabaholi bomdabu kule ndawo uzwakalise ukuthi le phrojekthi izoshintsha kakhulu izimpilo zabantu, ikakhulukazi abesifazane nezingane ebebejwayele ukuhamba amabanga amade beyokha emifuleni engaphephile. Ngaphezu kwalokho, osomabhizinisi bendawo kanye nentsha banikezwe amathuba emisebenzi ngesikhathi kuqhubeka ukwakhiwa kwamadamu amancane kanye nokufakwa kwamapayipi amakhulu adonsa amanzi. Kulindeleke ukuthi lesi sikhungo sokuphakela amanzi siqedwe ngokuphelele ngaphambi kokuphela kwale nyanga, kanti iziphathimandla zinxuse umphakathi ukuba uvikele le ngqalasizinda ukuze kugwenywe ukulinyazwa kwayo okungabuyisela emuva le ntuthuko. Lesi sinyathelo sikhombisa isiqalo esisha esithembisa ukubuyisa isithunzi nokuthuthukisa isimo sezempilo nenhlanzeko kulabo ebebesalele emuva ngakwezentuthuko.

Esigodini sakwaNongoma, inkinga yokushoda kwamanzi esithathe amashumi eminyaka isizofika emaphethelweni kulandela ukuqedwa kohlelo olusha lokumba imithombo yesimanje. Bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezinhlanu abahlali abazohlomula kule ngqalasizinda entsha, okuzoqeda isidingo sokuhamba amabanga amade beyokha emifuleni engaphephile. Ekhuluma egameni lomphakathi ngesikhathi kuvulwa lo msebenzi ngokusemthethweni, uMnu. Sipho Ndlovu uzwakalise ukujabula kwakhe okukhulu, echaza ukuthi lokhu kuzoletha ushintsho olubonakalayo kwezempilo kanye nenhlanzeko kule ndawo. Ngaphezu kokulethwa kwamanzi, lo msebenzi uvule amathuba emisebenzi kwentsha engamashumi amabili nanhlanu yakuleli dolobhana, eyathola ukuqeqeshwa kwamakhono okuhlanganisa amapayipi nokulungisa ompompi. Osomabhizinisi bendawo nabo banikwe ithuba lokubamba iqhaza ekunakekelweni kwale mishini ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi ihlala isebenza isikhathi eside futhi ayigugi ngokushesha. Nakuba lolu hlelo lubhekwa njengempumelelo enkulu ekuletheni intuthuko yasemakhaya, abaholi bomdabu kanye neziphathimandla zendawo banxuse umphakathi ukuba uqaphe, ubike ngokushesha emaphoyiseni noma yikuphi ukucekelwa phansi kwempahla kanye nokwebiwa kwezintambo zikagesi, njengoba ukugcinwa kwale ngqalasizinda kuyisibopho sawo wonke umuntu ohlomulayo.

Emphakathini waseNquthu, izakhamizi ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi eseziphelelwe ithemba ngenxa yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile izinyanga eziyisithupha ezilandelanayo, ekugcineni zizoluthola usizo ngomklamo omusha wengqalasizinda. Lesi simo esibuhlungu siphoqe abafundi abaningi ukuba baphuthe esikoleni njengoba bechitha isikhathi eside bekha amanzi emifuleni engaphephile. Ukubhekana nale nkinga, izolo ekuseni kumenyezelwe ukuthi kuzokwakhiwa amadamu amabili amancane kanye namapayipi amasha azohambisa amanzi ngqo emizini yabantu. Ngokusho kukaMnu. Sipho Zungu, ongumholi womphakathi, lo mklamo ngeke nje uxazulule inkinga yamanzi kodwa uzovula namathuba emisebenzi kwintsha yendawo engasebenzi. Nakuba imisebenzi yokwakha izothatha izinyanga eziyisishiyagalombili ukuba iphothulwe, amaloli athutha amanzi azoqhubeka nokuletha usizo lwesikhashana masonto onke ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi akekho osala ngaphandle. Izakhamizi zinxuswe ukuba zibambisane nosonkontileka abazoqala ukusebenza kuleli sonto elizayo, ziphinde zibike noma yikuphi ukucekelwa phansi kwempahla yokwakha ezinhlakeni zomthetho ukuze lo msebenzi uphumelele ngaphandle kwezihibe.

Ngaphezu kwemindeni engamakhulu amahlanu isale dengwane emuva kwezimvula ezinamandla ezihlasele endaweni yaseNanda nasezindaweni eziyizungezile ngempelasonto edlule. Lesi simo esibuhlungu sibangele umonakalo omkhulu kwingqalasizinda, lapho imigwaqo eminingi kanye namabhuloho adilike khona, okwenze kwaba nzima ukuthi abatakuli bafinyelele kwabakhahlamezekile. Ekhuluma egameni lomphakathi, uMnu. Sipho Ndlovu ongomunye wabahlali obekade ekhona ngesikhathi kwenzeka le nhlekelele, uveze ukuthi isimo simuncu kakhulu njengoba abantu belahlekelwe yikho konke ababenakho, kuhlanganisa nemifaniswano yesikole yezingane. Yize kunjalo, imizamo yokulekelela isiqalile ukubonakala njengoba osomabhizinisi bendawo kanye nezinhlangano ezingenzi nzuzo sebesungule izikhungo zokusiza ngezidingo eziyisisekelo ezinjengokudla, izingubo zokugqoka kanye nezindawo zokukhosela zesikhashana. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abezimo eziphuthumayo baxwayise izakhamuzi ukuba zihlale ziqaphile njengoba isimo sezulu kulindeleke ukuthi siqhubeke nokuba sibi ezinsukwini ezizayo, kanti futhi kuyanxuswa nabangakwazi ukufaka isandla ukuba balekelele labo abaswele.

Ngemuva kweminyaka emihlanu yokubhekana nenkinga ebuhlungu yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile, izakhamizi zaseNanda ziqale isonto ngentokozo enkulu njengoba sekuvulwe ngokusemthethweni ingqalasizinda entsha yokuhlinzeka ngale mfanelo eyisisekelo. Lesi sikhungo esakhiwe ngesamba sezigidi ezingamashumi amabili zamarandi kulindeleke ukuba sisize imizi engaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi, okuzoqeda ukuthembela kwamaloli athutha amanzi abebiza uhulumeni wendawo izizumbulu zemali. Ekhuluma egameni lomphakathi, uMnumzane Sipho Ndlovu ongomunye wabaholi bomdabu kule ndawo, uzwakalise ukuthi lolu hlelo aluzanga nje kuphela nesixazululo senkinga yamanzi kodwa luvule namathuba emisebenzi kwentsha engasebenzi ngesikhathi sokwakhiwa kwalo. Ukuqinisekisa ukuthi le phrojekthi iyasimama, kusekwe ikomidi elikhethekile elizobhekelela ukunakekelwa kwamapayipi kanye nokubika ngokushesha noma ikuphi ukuvuza ukuze kugwenywe ukumoshakala kwalo mthombo obalulekile. Lesi sinyathelo sikhombisa ngokusobala umphumela omuhle wokubambisana phakathi kwezakhamizi nabahleli bentuthuko ekwakheni imiphakathi esimeme nephephile.

Ukushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile osekuhluphe izakhamizi zakwaNongoma isikhathi eside sekufinyelele esiphethweni kulandela ukuvulwa kwemithombo emisha eyishumi kuleli sonto. Bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezinhlanu abantu abazohlomula kulo mklamo obize izigidi ezimbili zamarandi, okuyisinyathelo esilindeleke ukuba kunciphise ukugula okubangelwa ukuphuza amanzi angaphephile emifuleni. Ngokusho kwemibiko yezempilo yendawo, isibalo sezingane ezingeniswa ezibhedlela ngenxa yohudo kulindeleke ukuthi sehle kakhulu ngalesi sikhathi sonyaka. Ekhuluma emcimbini wokwethulwa kwalolu hlelo, uMnu. Sipho Ndlovu ongomunye wabaholi bomphakathi, uzwakalise ukujabula okukhulu ngokubambisana phakathi kosomabhizinisi bendawo kanye nezinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni. Lolu hlelo alugcinanga nje ngokuqinisekisa ukuthi kukhona amanzi, kodwa luvule namathuba emisebenzi kwentsha engamashumi amabili eqashwe ukugada nokulungisa ingqalasizinda entsha. Noma kunjalo, abaholi bomdabu bakhuthaze wonke amalungu omphakathi ukuba awonge la manzi futhi abike ngokushesha uma kukhona amapayipi aqhumayo noma avuzayo endaweni. Lesi sigameko sikhombisa ngokusobala amandla obumbano ekuxazululeni izinselelo ezibhekene nezindawo zasemakhaya, kanti kulindeleke ukuthi le ndlela yokusebenza isetshenziswe nakwezinye izifunda ezakhelene nalesi esikhathini esizayo.

Ngemva kokwanda kwezigameko zokulahlwa kukadoti ngokungemthetho kanye nobugebengu obuncane emphakathini, izakhamuzi zaseMlazi esigcemeni sakwa-V zithathe isinqumo esiqinile sokusungula uhlelo lokugada nokuhlanza imigwaqo yazo. Bangaphezu kwamakhulu amabili amalungu omphakathi asevumile ukuzinikela kulo mkhankaso oqale ngempelasonto edlule, lapho kuqoqwe khona amathani angaphezu kwamahlanu emfucuza ezindaweni ezivulekile. Lo mkhankaso awugcini nje ngokubuyisa isithunzi nobuhle bale ndawo, kodwa uphinde wakha amathuba emisebenzi yesikhashana entsheni eningi engasebenzi, njengoba abamabhizinisi asendaweni bexhase ngemali yokugqugquzela labo ababambe iqhaza. Okhulumela ikomidi elihlela lo msebenzi, uMnu. Sipho Ndlovu, ugcizelele ukuthi bazoqhubeka nokubambisana namaphoyisa endawo kanye nomasipala weTheku ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi imithetho yezemvelo iyahlonishwa futhi nezigebengu ziyabanjwa. Kanti futhi, kunethemba elikhulu lokuthi lolu hlelo luzosabalala lufinyelele nakwezinye izigceme ezakhelene nalo, okuzosiza kakhulu ekulweni nesihlava sokucekelwa phansi kwengqalasizinda yomphakathi kanye nokukhuthaza ukuzigqaja ngekhaya kubo bonke abahlali esikhathini esizayo.

Imindeni engaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu isale dengwane endaweni yaseNanda nasemakhaya aseduze kulandela izimvula ezinamandla kanye nezikhukhula ezihlasele lesi sifunda ngezintatha zangoMsombuluko. Umonakalo omkhulu udale ukuthi kudilike izindlu eziningi ezakhiwe ngodaka, kanti nengqalasizinda yemigwaqo ibhidlikile okwenze kwaba nzima kakhulu ukuthi abosizo oluphuthumayo bafinyelele kalula ezindaweni ezikhahlamezekile. Ekhuluma egameni lomphakathi okhungethwe yilo mshophi, uMnu. Sipho Zungu uzwakalise ukukhathazeka okukhulu ngalesi simo esibabhekile, wacela ukuba kuthunyelwe amatende, izingubo zokulala, kanye nokudla ngokushesha njengoba izingane ezincane nabantu abadala bebhekene nengozi yamakhaza. Ukubhekana nalesi sigameko esibuhlungu, izinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni kanye nosomabhizinisi bendawo seziqale imikhankaso emikhulu yokuqoqa iminikelo eyahlukene ngenhloso yokusiza labo abalahlekelwe yikho konke ababenakho. Khonamanjalo, ithimba elikhethekile lezinhlekelele kulindeleke ukuthi lihambele le ndawo kusasa ekuseni ukuze liyohlola isimo ngokugcwele, ngenhloso yokuthola isisombululo sesikhashana nokuqinisekisa ukuthi abafundi bayakwazi ukubuyela ezikoleni ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka okwengeziwe.

Emuva kweminyaka eminingi yokulinda, izakhamizi zaseNongoma sezigcine zithole isikhungo sesimanje sokuthuthukisa amakhono, okuyisinyathelo esilindeleke ukuba siqede inkinga yokuntuleka kwemisebenzi kubantu abasha. Ngokwemibiko yamuva, ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi amane entsha kule ndawo ihlezi emakhaya ngenxa yokungabi nazo iziqu ezifanele. Lesi sakhiwo esisha, esibize izigidi ezingamashumi amabili zamarandi, sizogxila ekuqeqesheni abafundi kwezobuchwepheshe besimanje, ezolimo kanye namakhono okuzisebenza. Ekhuluma ngesikhathi kuvulwa lesi sikhungo, uMnu. Sipho Zwane, ongomunye wabaholi bomphakathi, unxuse intsha ukuba ilisebenzise ngokugcwele leli thuba elingandile ukuze izakhele ikusasa eliqhakazile. Ngaphezu kwalokho, osomabhizinisi basendaweni bazwakalise injabulo ngalo mklamo, bethi uzoletha amathuba amasha okuthuthukisa umnotho wasekhaya nokunciphisa izinga lobugebengu elikhungethe umphakathi. Uhulumeni wesifundazwe waKwaZulu-Natal uqinisekise ukuthi uzoqhubeka nokweseka lolu hlelo ngokuhlinzeka ngothisha abaqeqeshiwe kanye nezinsiza zokufunda ezidingekayo. Kulindeleke ukuba izifundo zokuqala ziqale ngokusemthethweni ngenyanga ezayo, kanti abafisa ukubamba iqhaza sebengaqala ukubhalisa emahhovisi akhona esikhungweni.

Ngemuva kwezimvula ezinamandla ezihlasele isifunda sase-Ugu ngesonto eledlule, izakhamizi zisalokhu zibala umonakalo olinganiselwa ezigidini zamarandi njengoba imigwaqo eminingi eqhubeza ezohwebo isalokhu ingahambeki. Omunye wabaholi bomphakathi wakule ndawo, uMnumzane Sipho Ndlovu, uzwakalise ukukhathazeka okukhulu ngesimo, eveza ukuthi ukuphazamiseka kwengqalasizinda sekwenze kwaba nzima ukuthi abafundi baye ezikoleni kanti nabagulayo abakwazi ukufinyelela emitholampilo eseduze. Bangaphezu kwamakhulu amabili imindeni esele ingenamakhaya kulandela lokhu kuhlasela kwesimo sezulu esibi, okuyisibalo esikhombisa ubukhulu benhlekelele edinga ukusukunyelwa ngokushesha. Ukubhekana nalesi simo esibucayi, izinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni kanye nosomabhizinisi bendawo seziqale umkhankaso wokuqoqa ukudla, izingubo zokugqoka, kanye namathende okusiza labo abakhahlamezekile ngesikhathi basalinde usizo olugcwele. Ngaphezu kwalokho, amavolontiya avela emiphakathini eyakhelene nalesi sifunda asebenza ngokuzikhandla ukususa izihlahla eziwele emigwaqweni kanye nokuvula imisele yamanzi evaliwe. Noma kunjalo, ithemba lisekhona lokuthi ukubambisana okuboniswa phakathi kwazo zonke izinhlaka zomphakathi kuzosheshisa uhlelo lokwakha kabusha nokubuyisela impilo yesifunda kwesijwayelekile ngaphambi kokuba kuqale inkathi yamaholide.

Endaweni yasemaphandleni eNquthu, inkinga yokushoda kwamanzi esithathe isikhathi eside igcine ithathe elinye igxathu elihle kulandela ukufakwa kwemishini yokudonsa amanzi esebenza ngamandla elanga. Bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezinhlanu abantu bakuleli dolobhana asebezohlomula kulo mklamo oqale ukusebenza ngokusemthethweni ngempelasonto edlule, ngemuva kweminyaka eminingi bephoqeleka ukuba bakhe amanzi emifuleni engaphephile. Ekhuluma egameni lomphakathi, uMnumzane Sipho Zwane uzwakalise ukujabula kwakhe okukhulu ngalolu shintsho, wathi lo mthombo omusha uzosiza kakhulu ekwehliseni isibalo sezifo eziyingozi ezibangelwa ngamanzi angahlanzekile ezinganeni nakubantu abadala. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uMasipala wesiFunda saseMzinyathi uthembise ukuthi uzoqhubeka nokuhlinzeka ngezinsiza zokulungisa le ngqalasizinda ngenhloso yokuqinisekisa ukuthi ihlala isesimweni esifanele isikhathi eside. Lesi sinyathelo esinqala sikhombisa isifiso esikhulu sokuthuthukisa izimpilo zezakhamuzi zendawo, kanti futhi kulindeleke ukuthi eminye imiklamo yentuthuko efana nalona yandiswe ngokushesha nakwezinye izigceme ezakhelene nalendawo ngaphambi kokuphela kwalo nyaka wezimali.

Emva kwezimvula ezinamandla ezihlasele enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal ngempelasonto edlule, imindeni engaphezu kwamakhulu amabili isale dengwane kulandela ukucekelwa phansi kwemizi yayo kanye nengqalasizinda yomphakathi. Izibalo zokuqala zikhomba ukuthi amabhuloho amathathu abalulekile, imigwaqo, kanye nomtholampilo omkhulu wendawo kukhukhulwe ngamanzi, okushiye izakhamuzi zakule ndawo zibhekene nenkinga enkulu yokuthola usizo lwezempilo oluphuthumayo. Ekhuluma egameni lomphakathi okhahlamezekile, uMnu. Sipho Ndlovu uzwakalise ukukhathazeka okukhulu ngokunensa kohlelo lokuhlenga, ebalula ukuthi izingane zesikole zilahlekelwa yisikhathi esiningi sokufunda ngenxa yokuthi azikwazi ukuwela imifula egcwele. Ngenxa yalesi simo esibucayi esiqhubekayo, izinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni ngokubambisana nabezinhlelo zokulawulwa kwezinhlekelele sebevule izikhungo zesikhashana emahholo omphakathi nasezindlini zamasonto ukuze bahlinzeke ngokudla, amanzi ahlanzekile, nezingubo zokulala kulabo abaswele. Kulindeleke ukuthi ithimba elikhethekile lonjiniyela lifike kuleli sonto ukuze lihlaze umonakalo ngokuphelele futhi liqale ukwakha kabusha imigwaqo eyinhloko, ngenhloso yokubuyisela isimo kwesijwayelekile ngokushesha nokuvikela ukulahleka kweminye imiphefumulo.

Izimvula ezinamandla ezihlasele isifundazwe saKwaZulu-Natal esikhathini esingangesonto eledlule zishiye imindeni engaphezu kwamakhulu amabili ingenamakhaya, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni zasemakhaya nasezindaweni ezingahlelekile ezingazange zikwazi ukumelana nezikhukhula. Ngenxa yalesi simo esibuhlungu esihlasele isizwe, amalungu omphakathi nabosomabhizinisi bendawo basebenzisana ngokubambisana ukuqoqa ukudla okungonakali kalula, amanzi aphuzwayo, izingubo zokugqoka kanye nezingubo zokulala ukuze basize labo abakhahlamezekile kakhulu. Ekhuluma ngesikhathi kuhlolwa umonakalo osemphakathini, uMeya wendawo ugcizelele isidingo esiphuthumayo sokwakhiwa kabusha kwengqalasizinda ephephile neqinile, wengeza ngokuthi ukushintsha kwesimo sezulu kudinga amasu amasha okumelana nezinhlekelele ezingalindelekile esikhathini esizayo. Khonamanjalo, imigwaqo eminingi emikhulu exhumanisa amadolobha amakhulu isavaliwe ngenxa yokuwa kwamabhuloho, okubangele ukuphazamiseka okukhulu kwezokuthutha kanye nokubambezeleka kokulethwa kwezidingo eziyisisekelo ezikoleni nasemitholampilo enakekela abagula kakhulu. Ukulungiswa kwale migwaqo ebalulekile kulindeleke ukuthi kuthathe izinyanga ezimbalwa ngaphambi kokuba isimo sibuyele kwesijwayelekile, kodwa izinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni kanye nezinhlaka zosizo ziyaqhubeka nokuhlinzeka ngosizo lwesikhashana emiphakathini evalelekile ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi akekho osala ngaphandle.

Esigodini saseNquthu, isomiso esithathe izinyanga eziyisithupha sishiye imindeni eminingi ibhekene nendlala engakaze ibonwe, kodwa ithemba selibuyile kulandela ukuvulwa kwedamu elisha emphakathini. Ngokwemibiko yabaholi bomdabu, le nkinga ibikhinyabeza kakhulu abalimi abancane abaziphilisa ngokutshala imifino nokufuya izinkomo. Ukulungiswa kwale ngqalasizinda yamanzi, okuthathe unyaka wonke ukuba kuqedwe, kulindeleke ukuba kusize amakhaya angaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezinhlanu endaweni. Nakuba abahlali bebonga lolu sizo, usihlalo wekomidi lentuthuko yendawo, uMnu. Sipho Zwane, unxuse izakhamuzi ukuba ziwasebenzise ngokuqaphela amanzi njengoba imvula iseyivelakancane. Lesi simo sikhombisa isidingo esikhulu sokuba nezinhlelo zesikhathi eside zokubhekana nokuguquguquka kwesimo sezulu ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Ngaphezu kwalokho, amaphoyisa endawo axwayise ngobugebengu obuhambisana nokuntshontshwa kwamapayipi amanzi, asabisa ngokuthi noma ngubani oyobanjwa ecekela phansi impahla yomphakathi uzobhekana nengalo yomthetho. Ukuqala kokusebenza kwaleli damu kuzophinde kuvule amathuba emisebenzi yesikhashana kwentsha, njengoba kuzodingeka abaqaphi nabalungisi bamapayipi ukuqinisekisa ukuthi amanzi afinyelela kuwo wonke amakhaya ngaphandle kwezihibe.

Ngemuva kwezimvula ezinamandla ezihlasele izigceme ezehlukene enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal ngempelasonto, imindeni engaphezu kwamashumi amahlanu isale dengwane njengoba izindlu zayo zicekeleke phansi ngenxa yezikhukhula. Lesi simo esibuhlungu siphoqe izinhlaka zomphakathi kanye nezinhlangano ezingenzi nzuzo ukuba zingenelele ngokushesha, zihlinzeka ngezindawo zokukhosela zesikhashana, ukudla, kanye nezingubo zokugqoka kulabo abakhahlamezekile ngqo. Ekhuluma ngesikhathi kuhlolwa umonakalo, ukhansela wendawo unxuse izakhamuzi ezihlala ezindaweni eziphansi ukuthi ziqaphele kakhulu, waphinde wazigqugquzela ukuba zifudukele ezikhungweni zomphakathi eziphephile ngenxa yezexwayiso zabezimo zezulu ezikhomba ukuthi imvula isazogalela kulezi zinsuku ezizayo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, onjiniyela bamasipala sebeyalelwe ukuba batshalwe kuzo zonke izindawo ukuze balungise imigwaqo ebhobokile kanye namabhuloho anqamukile, okuyinto ezoqinisekisa ukuthi abafundi bayakwazi ukubuyela ezikoleni ngaphandle kwezihibe kuleli sonto. Ukubambisana okukhonjiswe yizakhamuzi kanye nosomabhizinisi bendawo ngalesi sikhathi esinzima kunikeze ithemba elikhulu lokuthi isimo sizobuyela kwesijwayelekile maduze, kanti imizamo yokwakha kabusha ingqalasizinda isaqhubeka ngamandla.

Esigcemeni saseMlazi eningizimu yeTheku, izakhamuzi zibambisene ngabomvu ukuvuselela umtholampilo wendawo owacekelwa phansi yizikhukhula ezinamandla zangenyanga edlule. Ngokwemibiko yabaholi bomphakathi, iziguli ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amane ebezincike kulesi sikhungo ziphazamisekile ekutholeni imishanguzo yazo yansuku zonke kanye nokunakekelwa kwezempilo okuyisisekelo. Ukubhekana nalesi simo esibucayi, osomabhizinisi bendawo abazimele kanjalo namavolontiya amaningi asevele anikele ngezinto zokwakha, amapende, kanye nezisebenzi ukuze kuqhutshekwe nomsebenzi wokulungisa ingqalasizinda. UMnu. Sipho Ndlovu, ongusihlalo wekomidi lezentuthuko kuleya ndawo, ugcizelele kwabezindaba ukuthi lokhu kubambisana kukhombisa ngokusobala amandla obunye, wengeza ngokuthi ukwakhiwa kabusha kwalo mtholampilo kulindeleke ukuba kuphothulwe ngesonto elizayo. Nakuba iziphathimandla zesifundazwe zithembise ukuletha usizo lwezimali esikhathini esizayo, abantu bakule ndawo banqume ukuqhubeka nokuzenzela ngoba impilo yabaguli ibaluleke kakhulu ukuba ingalindiswa izinhlelo zikahulumeni ezivamise ukuthatha isikhathi eside. Lesi senzo sinconywe kakhulu yizinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni njengesibonelo esihle sokuzisiza nokwakha isizwe.

Ngemuva kweminyaka emihlanu yokubhekana nenkinga enkulu yokushoda kwamanzi okudalwe isimo sesomiso esibi kakhulu, izakhamizi zaseNongoma ekugcineni zithole impumuzo kulandela ukuvulwa ngokusemthethweni kwesizinda esisha sokuhlanza amanzi kuleli sonto. Lesi sikhungo esibize izigidi ezingamashumi amathathu zamarandi kulindeleke ukuba sihlinzeke amakhaya angaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi ngamanzi ahlanzekile nsuku zonke. Ekhuluma ngenkathi kwethulwa lo mklamo, uMnu. Sipho Ndlovu ongomunye wabaholi bomphakathi, uzwakalise ukujabula kwakhe wathi lolu hlelo luzoqeda ukuhlupheka kwabesifazane nezingane ebebehamba amabanga amade beyokha emifuleni eyingozi. Ngaphezu kwalokho, ukwakhiwa kwalesi sakhiwo kuvule amathuba emisebenzi kwentsha engamashumi amahlanu yakule ndawo, okuyisinyathelo esibonwa njengesibalulekile ekulweni nobubha obudla lubi kulesi sifunda. Lokhu kulethe ithemba elisha lokuvuselela umnotho wendawo njengoba amabhizinisi amancane ezozuza kakhulu ekutholakaleni kwamanzi ngokuqhubekayo. Noma kunjalo, iziphathimandla zendawo zinxuse umphakathi ukuba uwonge lo mthombo wamanzi futhi ubike masinyane noma yikuphi ukuvuza noma ukucekelwa phansi kwengqalasizinda ukuze kugwenywe ukuphazamiseka kokuthunyelwa kwale ntuthuko ebikade ilindelwe.

Ngemuva kwezinyanga eziyisithupha kubhekenwe nenkinga yokunqamuka njalo kwamandla kagesi, izakhamizi zakwaMashu seziqale ukubona ushintsho olubonakalayo kulandela ukuvulwa kwesiteshi esisha esiphehla ugesi kuleli sonto. Lesi sikhungo, ebesakhiwa ngenhloso yokunciphisa ingcindezi engqalasizindeni endala, kulindeleke ukuba silethe ukukhanya emakhaya angaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi futhi sinciphise ukucinywa kukagesi okungahleliwe. Okhulumela umphakathi kule ndawo, uMnu. Sipho Ndlovu, uzwakalise ukuthokoza kwakhe ngokuthi lolu hlelo luzosiza kakhulu amabhizinisi asafufusa abethwele kanzima ngenxa yalolu daba, wengeza ngokuthi impilo isizobuyela kwesijwayelekile. Ngaphezu kwalokho, osomabhizinisi bendawo banethemba elikhulu lokuthi ukuzinza kwamandla kagesi kuzovula amathuba amasha emisebenzi entsheni engasebenzi kulesi sifunda. Nakuba le ntuthuko yamukelwe ngezandla ezimhlophe, amaphoyisa kanye nabaholi bomphakathi bagcizelele kakhulu ukubaluleka kokuvikela le ngqalasizinda entsha ebugebengwini obuhleliwe kanye nasekubeni izintambo zethusi. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuphepha okuqhubekayo njalo, sekusungulwe amakomidi aqaphayo ahlanganisa izakhamizi zendawo, azosebenzisana eduze nabomthetho ukugada lesi sakhiwo ubusuku nemini ukuze kugwemekwe ukulinyazwa kwempahla yomphakathi.

Ngemuva kwezimvula ezinamandla ezihlasele endaweni yaseMlazi ngezintatha zangoLwesibili, imindeni engaphezu kwamakhulu amabili isisele dengwane njengoba izindlu zayo zikhukhulwe ngamanzi, kanti nezikole ezinhlanu zale ndawo ziphoqelekile ukuba zivale iminyango yazo. Izakhamizi zakule ndawo zibika ukuthi umonakalo omkhulu udalwe ukuqhuma kwamapayipi amanzi kanye nokuvaleka kwemisele ehambisa amanzi angcolile, okudale ukuthi imigwaqo eminingi ingabe isasebenziseka nokuyinto ephazamise kakhulu ezokuthutha. Ekhuluma egameni labathintekile, uMnu. Sipho Ndlovu, ongomunye wabaholi bomphakathi, unxuse osomabhizinisi bendawo kanye nezinhlangano ezingenzi nzuzo ukuba zelekelele ngezidingo eziyisisekelo ezifana nokudla, amadokodo okukhosela, nezingubo zokugqoka kulabo abalahlekelwe yikho konke. Nakuba isimo sisashubile, amathimba abatakuli asaqhubeka nomsebenzi wawo wokufuna labo abangakatholakali emifudlaneni egcwele phama, kanti abalimele baphuthumiswe emitholampilo eseduze ukuze bathole usizo lwezempilo oluphuthumayo. Kulindeleke ukuthi uhlelo lokwakhiwa kabusha kwengqalasizinda luqale ngokushesha uma isimo sezulu sesidambile, kanti kumanje kuhlanganiswa isabelomali esiphuthumayo ukuze kubuyiswe ithemba nesithunzi salo mphakathi okhungethwe yile nhlekelele engalindelekile.

Emva kwesikhathi eside umphakathi waseMkhanyakude ubhekene nenkinga edabukisayo yokuntuleka kwamanzi ahlanzekile, isimo kulindeleke ukuba sibe ngcono kakhulu maduzane. Leli themba elikhulu lilethwe uhlelo olusha lwengqalasizinda olwethulwe ngokusemthethweni kuleli sonto, oluhlose ukulungisa amapayipi amadala nokwakha amadamu amancane amasha kuleyo ndawo. Ukuze baqinisekise ukuthi lolu hlelo luqhutshwa ngendlela efanele futhi engenazo izihibe, uMnyango Wezamanzi Nokuthuthukiswa Kwendle unxuse zonke izakhamuzi ukuba zisheshe zibhalise kumasipala wendawo ukuze zithole amamitha amanzi asetshenziswa ngobuchwepheshe besimanje. Labo abangeke babhalise ngaphambi kokuphela kwale nyanga bangase babhekane nokubambezeleka ekuxhunyweni kwamanzi emizini yabo. Ngokwemibiko yamuva ekhishiwe, cishe amakhaya angaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi nambili asazohlomula ngqo kulesi sigaba sokuqala sephrojekthi, okuyinto ezodala amathuba emisebenzi amaningi kwentsha yakule ndawo engasebenzi. Ngenxa yalokho, abaholi bomdabu kanye namakhansela baxwayise osomabhizinisi bendawo ngokukhulu ukuzimisela ukuthi balandele yonke imigomo yamathenda ebekiwe uma befaka izicelo zokuhlinzeka ngezinsiza, ukuze kugwenywe noma yiluphi uhlobo lwenkohlakalo nokuphazamiseka kokulethwa kwezidingo emphakathini.

Ngemuva kweminyaka eminingi yokuhlupheka ngenxa yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile, izakhamizi zaseMkhanyakude seziqale ukubona ushintsho olukhulu kulandela ukuphothulwa kwesigaba sokuqala sephrojekthi yokufaka amapayipi amasha entuthuko. Cishe amakhaya angaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezinhlanu asethola amanzi ngqo emagcekeni awo, okuyisimo esiqeda unomphela isidingo sokuhamba amabanga amade ukuya emifuleni eyingozi. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi ukuhanjiswa kwezidingo kwenziwa ngendlela efanele, uhlelo lokubhalisela amamitha amanzi luqhubeka ngesivinini esikhulu emahholo omphakathi ahlukene. Kulesi sigaba esibucayi, izikhulu zikamasipala zigcizelela ukuthi wonke umuntu obhalisayo kumele aphathe ikhophi kamazisi nobufakazi bendawo yokuhlala obugxiviziwe ukuze afakwe kwirejista esemthethweni yabakhokha intela. Ekhuluma ngalolu hlelo emhlanganweni wanamuhla, umphathi-dolobha ubalule ukuthi isabelomali sezigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu amarandi esikhishwe uMnyango Wezamanzi NezeNhlanzeko sizoqinisekisa ukuthi nengqalasizinda endala iyalungiswa ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali. Ekugcineni, amalungu omphakathi akhuthazwa ukuba abike ngokushesha noma yikuphi ukuvuza kwamapayipi kwinombolo yamahhala yesikhungo sezingcingo, ngenhloso yokugwema ukumoshakala kwalo mthombo wemvelo obaluleke kangaka empilweni yabantu.

Ngemuva kwezinyanga eziyisithupha zokubhekana nenkinga yokunqamuka kwamanzi, izakhamizi zakwaMhlabuyalingana seziqala ukubona ukukhanya njengoba sekuqalwe uhlelo olusha lokuthuthukisa ingqalasizinda. Lolu hlelo, oluzobiza izigidi ezingamashumi amabili zamarandi, luhlose ukulungisa amapayipi amadala nokwakha amadamu amancane azoqinisekisa ukuthi umphakathi uthola usizo ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka. UMnyango wezaManzi nokuThuthukiswa kokuHlanzeka kwemvelo usunxuse amalungu omphakathi ukuba abhalise ezikhungweni zawo eziseduze ukuze athole amamitha amanzi amasha azofakwa mahhala phansi kwalo mkhankaso. Kukhishwe isaziso esiqinisekisa ukuthi bonke abafaka izicelo kumele baphathe omazisi babo kanye nezincwadi eziqinisekisa amakheli abo ukuze kugwenywe ukubambezeleka kohlelo lokuphatha. Kulindeleke ukuthi lesi sigaba sokuqala sokulethwa kwezidingo siphothulwe ngaphambi kokuphela kukaMasingana ngonyaka ozayo, okuzoletha isiqabu esikhulu kule ndawo ebilokhu isalele emuva ngokwentuthuko. Noma ubani onenkinga noma ofisa ukwazi kabanzi ngale migomo emisha yokusebenza anganikela emahhovisi kamasipala wendawo ngezikhathi zokusebenza noma ashayele inombolo yamahhala ebekelwe ukusiza umphakathi.

Emva kwezinyanga eziyisithupha kubheduke inkinga ebuhlungu yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile ezindaweni zasemakhaya, izakhamizi zaKwaNongoma kanye nezindawo ezakhelene nalo seziqala ukubona ukukhanya ekugcineni kwalobu bunzima. Lo mkhankaso omkhulu wokusimamisa ingqalasizinda uza ngemuva kokuba kunezikhalazo eziningi ezifakwe emakomitini ezigceme mayelana nokonakala kwamaphayiphi amadala abesephenduke isilonda esingapholi emphakathini. Umasipala wesiFunda saseZululand, ngokubambisana nezinhlaka zezobunjiniyela kanye nosonkontileka abazimele, usuqalise uhlelo oluphuthumayo lokumba imithombo emisha engamashumi amabili nanhlanu nokulungisa amadamu amakhulu agcina amanzi. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kukhishwe umyalelo oqinile wokuqinisekisa ukuthi zonke izicelo ezintsha zokufakelwa amamitha wamanzi kumele zidingidwe zingakapheli izinsuku ezingamashumi amathathu zokusebenza ukuze kugwenywe ukubambezeleka kokulethwa kwezidingongqangi. Ngesikhathi le phrojekthi ebalulekile iqhubeka, abaholi bomphakathi banxuswe ngokukhethekile ukuba babike ngokushesha noma yikuphi ukuvuza kwamanzi ezikhungweni zikahulumeni eziseduze noma kwi-inthanethi, ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi imithombo yomphakathi iyavikelwa, igcinwa isesimweni esihle, futhi isebenza ngokugcwele ngaso sonke isikhathi.

Ngemuva kwezinyanga eziyisithupha umphakathi wasoThongathi ubhekene nenkinga yokuntuleka kwamanzi ahlanzekile, isimo sesiqala ukushintsha kulandela ukuphothulwa kwesigaba sokuqala sokulungiswa kwengqalasizinda. Lolu hlelo lokuvuselela amaphayiphi amakhulu lugqugquzelwe yisikhalo sezakhamuzi ebezilokhu zibhikisha kulezi zinsuku ezidlule ngenxa yokuphazamiseka kwempilo yazo yansuku zonke. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lo msebenzi uqhubeka ngaphandle kwezihibe, uMnyango wezaManzi nokuHlanzeka usukhiphe isabelomali esiphuthumayo sezigidi ezingamashumi amabili zamarandi. Ngaphezu kwalokho, iziphathimandla zinxusa bonke abanikazi bemizi ukuba bayobhalisa emahhovisi ezigceme bephethe amakhophi omazisi kanye nezincwadi ezikhombisa ubufakazi bendawo abahlala kuyo, ukuze bathole amamitha amasha azofakwa mahhala. Inqubo yokuqoqwa kwemininingwane kulindeleke ukuba ivalwe ekupheleni kwale nyanga, kanti labo abazoshweba bangase babhekane nezinhlawulo ezinzima uma kutholakala ukuthi baphula imithetho kamasipala. Khonamanjalo, osonkontileka abaqashwe nguhulumeni banikezwe umnqamulajuqu wezinyanga ezintathu ukuba baphothule yonke imisebenzi esele, ngenhloso yokusheshisa ukulethwa kwezidingongqangi nokubuyisela isithunzi kulo masipala.

Ngemuva kwezinyanga eziyisithupha zokubhekana nenkinga yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile, izakhamizi zakwaMhlabuyalingana ekugcineni zizothola usizo oluphuthumayo. Lokhu kulandela isimemezelo esikhishwe ngesonto eledlule lapho kuhlelwe khona ukuthi kuqalwe uhlelo lokufaka amaphayiphi amasha ukuze kuxazululwe le nkinga engamahlalakhona. Ukuze baqinisekise ukuthi lolu hlelo luhamba ngendlela efanele, abaholi bomphakathi bagqugquzela bonke abahlali ukuba babhalise amagama abo emahhovisi akamasipala wendawo ngaphambi kokuphela kwale nyanga, kanti abangenabo omazisi bazosizwa ngohlelo olukhethekile lwezinduna. UMnyango wezaManzi nokuHlanzeka usubeke isabelomali esingamarandi ayizigidi ezingamashumi amabili ukuxhasa lo msebenzi, njengoba kulindeleke ukuthi osonkontileka baqale ukusebenza maphakathi noZibandlela. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kuzosungulwa ikomidi elizimele elizobheka ukusebenza kwemali kanye nokuqashwa kwentsha yakule ndawo ukuze kugwenywe inkohlakalo nokuchema. Ngaleli guquko, iziphathimandla zinethemba lokuthi ukulethwa kwezidingongqangi kuzoba sezingeni eliphezulu, kunciphise izikhalazo ebezilokhu zibikiwe kumasipala kule minyaka emihlanu edlule, futhi kwakhiwe nesisekelo esiqinile sentuthuko esimeme kulesi sifunda.

Ngemuva kwezinyanga eziningi zokushoda kwamanzi kanye nengqalasizinda endala emiphakathini yasemakhaya aKwaZulu-Natal, sekuqalwe uhlelo olukhulu lokulungisa amapayipi amanzi ukuze kubhekwane nale nkinga. Lolu hlelo lwesimo esiphuthumayo luholwa uMnyango wezaManzi nokuThuthukiswa kokuHlanzeka, ngokubambisana nomasipala bezifunda, ngenhloso yokubuyisela isithunzi sezakhamuzi ebezilokhu zikha amanzi emifuleni. Ngokwemibiko yamuva, izigidi zamarandi ezingaphezu kwamashumi amahlanu zabelwe lo msebenzi ozodala amathuba emisebenzi kwentsha engasebenzi kulezi zindawo. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi uhlelo luhamba kahle futhi aluphazamiseki, izakhamuzi ziyacelwa ukuba zibhalise amagama azo kanye nezinombolo zikamazisi emahhovisi amakhansela endawo noma zisebenzise izikhungo zikahulumeni ezihambahambayo ezizobe zivakashela izigceme ezahlukene kusukela ngesonto elizayo ukuzosiza labo abangenazo izinto zokuhamba. Nakuba ukulungiswa kwale ngqalasizinda kuzothatha izinyanga eziyisithupha ukuthi kuphothulwe ngokugcwele, abaholi bomphakathi kanye nezinhlangano ezizimele banethemba lokuthi ukulethwa kwezidingongqangi kuzoba ngcono kakhulu, kanti futhi nezinhlelo zokunakekela lawa mapayipi seziqulunqiwe ukugwema ukuphindeka kwale nkinga esikhathini esizayo.

Ngenxa yezikhalo eziqhubekayo mayelana nokubambezeleka kokukhishwa kwezincwadi zikamazisi kanye nezitifiketi zokuzalwa, izakhamuzi zaseMlazi seziqale ukubona ushintsho olukhulu kulandela ukwethulwa kohlelo olusha lwezobuchwepheshe kuleli sonto. Leli hlelo, elixhaswe ngezimali ezifinyelela ezigidini ezingamashumi amahlanu zamarandi, lihlose ukunciphisa imigqa emide emahhovisi oMnyango Wezasekhaya nokusheshisa ukulethwa kwezidingo zomphakathi. Ekhuluma ngesikhathi kuhlolwa lesi sikhungo, uNdunankulu wesifundazwe ugcizelele ukuthi bonke abasebenzi bakahulumeni kumele bazibophezele ekuphakamiseni izinga lokusebenza ngokwethembeka, waphinde waxwayisa labo abatholakala begwazisa ukuthi bazobhekana nengalo yomthetho. Ukuze abantu bakwazi ukuhlomula kulolu hlelo olusheshayo, kulindeleke ukuba babhalise kuqala esizindalwazini se-inthanethi noma basebenzise izikhungo zokusiza umphakathi eziqokwe komasipala bendawo ngaphambi kokuvakashela amahhovisi amakhulu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, amakomidi abhekelele intuthuko ezigcemeni asezonikezwa amandla okuqapha ukuthi ngabe izinhlelo zokuphathwa kwemithombo yombuso zifezwa ngendlela efanele yini, okuyisinyathelo esibonwa njengesizobuyisa ithemba kubantu abebesephelelwe wukwethemba ukusebenza kohulumeni basemakhaya.

Ukubambezeleka okukhulu ekukhishweni kwamatayitela ezindlu kanye nomazisi kuqhubeka nokukhathaza izakhamizi zaseMlazi, okuholele ekutheni abaningi baphelelwe ngamathemba ngezethembiso zentuthuko. Ngenxa yalesi simo, kubikwa ukuthi uhlelo olusha lwezobuchwepheshe besimanje luzokwethulwa maduze ngenhloso yokusheshisa ukusebenza kwamahhovisi omphakathi nokunciphisa imigqa emide ebonakala nsuku zonke. Ngokwezibalo zangonyaka odlule, bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezingamashumi amabili abantu abasale dengwane ngenxa yokulahleka kwamafayela abo ohlelweni oludala. Ukuze kubhekwane nalesi nselelo, izikhulu zinxuse wonke amalungu omphakathi ukuba avuselele imininingwane yawo ngokusebenzisa isizindalwazi esisha noma ngokuvakashela izikhungo zokusiza umphakathi ezihamba ngamasondo ezizobe zizungeza izigceme zonke kuleli sonto. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kuxwayiswa labo abangakabhalisi ukuthi baphuthume ngaphambi kokuba kuvalwe isikhathi sokufaka izicelo maphakathi nenyanga ezayo, ukuze kugwenywe izinhlawulo ezizobekwa kulabo abazotholakala benganazo izincwadi ezifanele. Leli gxathu kulindeleke ukuba libuyise ukwethemba emkhakheni wezidingongqangi, kanti futhi lizolawulwa yikomidi elikhethekile elizoqinisekisa ukuthi akekho umuntu osalela emuva ekutholeni usizo lwakhe ngokusemthethweni.

Emphakathini waseMlazi, inkinga yokunqamuka kwamanzi osekuphele izinyanga eziyisithupha ihlukumeza izakhamuzi kulindeleke ukuba isongwe maduze kulandela ukuphothulwa kwengqalasizinda entsha yokuhlanza amanzi. Lolu hlelo lwentuthuko luhambisana nokwethulwa kwemishini yesimanje ezosiza ukusabalalisa amanzi ngendlela efanele kuzo zonke izigceme ebezithinteka kakhulu. Ekhuluma ngalolu hlelo, iziphathimandla zoMnyango Wezamanzi Nokuthuthukiswa Kwendle ziqinisekise ukuthi ukulethwa kwezidingongqangi kubekwe eqhulwini, zengeza ngokuthi uhulumeni usebenzise izigidi zamarandi ukuqinisekisa ukuthi amapayipi amadala, abesegugile, ayashintshwa ngokushesha. Ukuze bathole usizo olusheshayo uma kuvela amaphutha noma kunqamuka ukuhanjiswa kwamanzi ngokungalindelekile, abahlali banxuswa ukuba babhalise imininingwane yabo emahhovisi amakhansela endawo noma basebenzise uhlelo lwe-inthanethi lomasipala olusanda kwethulwa ngokusemthethweni. Lesi sinyathelo sokuphatha siqondiswe ekwehliseni isikhathi abantu abasilinda ngaphambi kokuba kuxazululwe izikhalo zabo zomphakathi. Ngaphezu kwalokho, amathimba onjiniyela asaqhubeka nokuqapha isimo ubusuku nemini ukuze kugwenywe ukuvuza kwamanzi okungaholela ekumoshakaleni kwemithombo yemvelo esikhathini esizayo, kanti imibiko yokuqala ikhombisa ukuthi izinga lokulethwa kwezidingo selikhuphuke ngamaphesenti angamashumi amane kusukela kuqale le phrojekthi.

Emva kweminyaka eminingi yokuntuleka kwamanzi ahlanzekile, izakhamizi zaseMasipala waseMhlathuze ekugcineni zizobona ushintsho olukhulu ngenxa yephrojekthi entsha yengqalasizinda. Ngokwemibiko yakamuva, cishe amakhaya angaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi abhekane nenselelo yokuphazamiseka kokulethwa kwezidingongqangi, okudale ukuthi kube nemibhikisho eminingi kulesi sifunda. Ukulungisa lesi simo, uMnyango wezaManzi nokuThuthukiswa kokuHlanzeka umemezele uhlelo oluphuthumayo lokwakha amadamu amasha kanye nokufaka amapayipi esimanjemanje. Noma kunjalo, ngaphambi kokuba kuqale lo msebenzi, amalungu omphakathi kumele abhalise amagama awo emahhovisi ekhansela lendawo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lolu hlelo lufinyelela kulabo abakhahlamezeke kakhulu. Ekhuluma esithangamini sabezindaba izolo, uNgqongqoshe walo mnyango ugcizelele ukuthi uhulumeni uzoqhubeka nokuqapha isimo ngokubambisana nezinhlaka zomthetho ukuze kugwenywe inkohlakalo ekukhishweni kwamathenda. Kulindeleke ukuthi isigaba sokuqala salo msebenzi siphothulwe ngasekupheleni kwalo nyaka, kanti izikhulu zinxuse abantu ukuba babike noma yikuphi ukuphazamiseka enombolweni yamahhala yomasipala.

Ngemuva kweminyaka eminingi yokubhekana nenkinga engapheli yokusweleka kwamanzi ahlanzekile, izakhamizi zasesifundeni saMkhanyakude seziqale ukuhlomula kuphrojekthi entsha yengqalasizinda. Lolu hlelo lokuphakelwa kwamanzi oludle izigidi zamarandi luphothulwe ngempumelelo kuleli sonto, okuyisinyathelo esinconywe kakhulu ngabaholi bomdabu kanye nezinhlangano zomphakathi. Nokho, ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi wonke amakhaya athola lolu sizo ngaphandle kokuchema, uMnyango Wezamanzi Nokuthuthukiswa Kwendlelo ukhiphe umyalelo wokuthi abantu kumele babhalise ngokusemthethweni emahhovisi kamasipala wendawo. Inqubo yokufaka isicelo ilula kodwa idinga ukuthi umninikhaya alethe umazisi wakhe wangempela kanye nencwadi efakazela ikheli lakhe eliqondile. Labo abangakwazi ukuzifikela mathupha ngenxa yokugula noma ukuguga bazohanjelwa ngosonhlalakahle emizini yabo ukuze basizwe ukugcwalisa amafomu adingekayo. Khonamanjalo, iziphathimandla zinxuse umphakathi wonkana ukuba ubambisane nohulumeni ukuvikela le ngqalasizinda entsha ezigebengwini ezicekela phansi impahla yomuso, ukuze isizukulwane esizayo naso sikwazi ukuzuza kule ntuthuko.

Emuva kwezinyanga eziyisithupha umphakathi waseMlazi ubhekene nenkinga ebuhlungu yokunqamuka kwamanzi, uhlelo olusha lwengqalasizinda seluqalile ukusebenza ngokusemthethweni ukuze kusizakale izakhamizi. Lesi sinyathelo esibalulekile silandela imibiko yakamuva ekhombisa ukuthi amaphesenti angamashumi amane amapayipi amadala abegugile kakhulu, okuyinto edale ukuthi abantu abaningi bagcine sebencike kuphela emalolini athutha amanzi nsuku zonke. Ngenhloso yokuxazulula lesi simo esingesihle unomphela, uMnyango wezaManzi nokuThuthukiswa kokuHlanzeka uqinisekise esithangamini sabezindaba ukuthi kuzosetshenziswa isabelomali esingamarandi ayizigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu ukulungisa amadamu amancane kanye nokufaka amamitha amasha ahlakaniphile. Ukuze lolu hlelo lwentuthuko luqhubeke ngaphandle kwezihibe noma ukubambezeleka, abahlali bonke banxuswa ngokunxusa okukhulu ukuba babhalise imininingwane yabo emahhovisi ekhansela aseduze, noma basebenzise uhlelo lwesimanje lwe-inthanethi lomasipala ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga kaNdasa. Lokhu kubhaliswa ngokusemthethweni kuzosiza uhulumeni wendawo ukuthi akwazi ukugcina isizindalwazi esiqondile nesethembekile esizolawula ukulethwa kwezidingongqangi ngendlela efanele. Ngaphezu kwalokho, lolu hlelo lolawulo luhloselwe ukuqeda nya inkohlakalo kanye nokukhwabanisa okujwayele ukubambezela imisebenzi yentuthuko ezigcemeni ezahlukene, kuqinisekiswe ukuthi intela yabantu isetshenziselwa ukuthuthukisa umphakathi wonkana ngaphandle kokukhetha.

Emzamweni wokubhekana nesibalo esikhulayo sezakhamizi ezinganazo izincwadi zokomazisi, sekuqalwe uhlelo olusha lokuhambisa izinsiza emiphakathini yasemakhaya esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal. Lokhu kulandela isikhalo eside sabantu abahlala ezindaweni ezikude abebethwala kanzima ngenxa yokushoda kwamahhovisi akahulumeni aseduze. Ngokubambisana nabaholi bomdabu, uMnyango Wezindaba Zasekhaya usuthembise ukuthi amaveni ahlinzeka ngosizo oluphuthumayo azohambela lezi zigodi okungenani kanye ngenyanga ukuzosiza abantu abadala kanye nabafundi. Ngaphambi kokuba bafake izicelo, abafakizicelo kumele baqinisekise ukuthi baphethe amakhophi aqinisekisiwe ezitifiketi zokuzalwa kanye nezincwadi ezikhombisa amakheli abo ezisayinwe amakhosi noma amakhansela. Lesi sinyathelo esinqala silindeleke ukuba sehlise kakhulu isikhathi esichithwa kolayini abade emadolobheni, siphinde sivikele imindeni empofu ezindlekweni eziphezulu zokugibela amatekisi.
