Izikhulu zikahulumeni zikugcizelele ukubaluleka kokuba umphakathi usebenzise leli thuba ngendlela efanele, kanti nabasebenzi bomnyango banxuswe ukuba basebenze ngokuzikhandla nangokwethembeka ukuze kugwenywe ukubambezeleka kwezidingo. Ekugcineni, ukusimama kwalolu hlelo nokulethwa kwezidingo eduze nabantu kuzovula amathuba angcono okuthuthukisa isizwe sonkana nokulwa nobubha.

Ngemuva kwezinyanga eziyisithupha umphakathi wasoThongathi ubhekene nenkinga yokushoda kwamanzi, sekuqale uhlelo olusha lokulungisa ingqalasizinda eseyigugile. Lesi simo besesiphoqe izakhamizi ukuba zithembele emalolini athutha amanzi avela kumasipala njalo ngesonto ukuthola lolu sizo olubalulekile. Kodwa-ke, ngaphansi kwesabelomali esingamarandi ayizigidi ezingamashumi amathathu esisanda kupasiswa, osonkontileka sebephakathi nendawo nokufaka amapayipi amasha ahambisana nesimanje ukuqeda le nkinga. Ngokombiko okhishwe ehhovisi leMeya izolo, kulindeleke ukuthi lokhu kulungiswa kuphothulwe ngaphambi kokuphela kukaMasingana ngonyaka ozayo, okuzobuyisela isimo kwesejwayelekile. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi ukulethwa kwezidingo akuphazamiseki nakakhulu ngalesi sikhathi sokulungisa, izakhamizi ziyacelwa ukuba zibhalise kumasipala wendawo uma zidinga ukufakelwa amathangi esikhashana. Lolu hlelo lokubhalisa luvulelwe wonke amalungu omphakathi akwazi ukuqinisekisa amakheli awo ngezincwadi zobufakazi bendawo yokuhlala. Amafomu okufaka izicelo atholakala emahhovisi amakhansela aseduze, kanti abahlali bayanxuswa ukuba balethe omazisi babo ukugwema ukubambezeleka kwenqubo yokuqinisekisa imininingwane eqoshiwe kohlelo lwamakhompuyutha.

Emzamweni wokuqeda inkinga yokushoda kwamanzi ekhungethe izakhamizi zasoThongathi izinyanga eziyisithupha ezedlule, sekuqalwe uhlelo olukhulu lokulungisa ingqalasizinda yamapayipi amanzi kuleli sonto. Lesi sinyathelo silandela isikhalo somphakathi obusubhikisha ungaphezi ufuna usizo oluphuthumayo kuhulumeni wendawo. Ngokwemigomo emisha yoMnyango Wezamanzi Nokuthuthukiswa Kwendle, osonkontileka abaqashiwe kumele bahambise imibiko yenqubekelaphambili njalo emasontweni amabili ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi umsebenzi uphothulwa ngesikhathi esibekiwe. Imali engangezigidi ezingamashumi amathathu zamarandi, ekhishwe uMnyango Wezezimali ukuxhasa lolu hlelo, kulindeleke ukuba idale amathuba emisebenzi kwintsha yendawo. Kanti futhi, labo abafisa ukuhlomula kulawa mathuba kumele babhalise amagama abo emahhovisi ezigceme, bephethe omazisi bakhona kanye nobufakazi bendawo abahlala kuyo njengokulawula kwemithetho yokuqasha. Ngaphezu kwalokho, izikhulu zomasipala zinxuse abahlali ukuba babike noma yikuphi ukuvuza kwamapayipi amasha ngokusebenzisa uhlelo lwe-inthanethi lwezokuxhumana olusanda kwethulwa. Ukuze lo mkhankaso uphumelele ngokuphelele, abaholi bomdabu kanye namakhansela endawo bazobamba imihlangano yokucobelelana ngolwazi nomphakathi, ngenhloso yokufundisa abantu ngezindlela ezingcono zokonga la manzi ahlanzekile azosatshalaliswa maduze.

Emuva kwezinyanga eziyisithupha umphakathi waseMkhanyakude ubhekene nenkinga yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile, sekunamathemba amasha njengoba kuqale uhlelo olukhulu lokulungisa ingqalasizinda. Lesi sinyathelo silandela isabelomali sezigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zamarandi esimenyezelwe uMnyango Wezamanzi Nokuthuthukiswa Kwendle ngenhloso yokuqeda le nkinga ngokushesha. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lo msebenzi uqhutshwa ngendlela efanele nangokulandela imigomo kahulumeni, osonkontileka abaqokiwe kumele balethe imibiko yentuthuko emahhovisi kamasipala njalo ngesonto, kanti noma yikuphi ukubambezeleka kuzoholela ekutheni bahlawuliswe. Ngaphezu kwalokho, izakhamuzi zikhuthazwa ukuba zivakashele izikhungo zokusiza umphakathi ezigunyaziwe ukuze zibhalise ezinhlelweni ezintsha zedijithali ezizosiza ekubikeni ukunqamuka kwamapayipi noma ukungasebenzi kwamamitha ngaphandle kokulinda emigqeni emide. Ekhuluma esithangamini sabezindaba izolo, imeya yendawo igcizelele ukuthi ukulethwa kwezidingongqangi akusona isicelo kodwa yilungelo lomthethosisekelo elingenakubukelwa phansi, yingakho abaphathi abaphezulu bezoqapha lolu hlelo ngeso lokhozi ukuze kugwenywe ukumoshwa kwezimali zombuso kanye nenkohlakalo.

Emuva kwezikhalo eziningi ezivela emphakathini wakwaNongoma mayelana nokubambezeleka kwezidingongqangi, uhlelo olusha lokusheshisa ukukhishwa komazisi kanye nezitifiketi zokuzalwa seluqalisiwe ngokusemthethweni. Ngokwemibiko yamuva nje, bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi abantu abebevele belinde isikhathi esingaphezu kwezinyanga eziyisithupha ukuze bathole usizo ezikhungweni zikahulumeni. Ukuze kuxazululwe le nkinga yengwadla, kuthunyelwe amakhumbi angomahamba-nendlwana azosebenza njengamahhovisi esikhashana ezindaweni zasemakhaya ezikude kakhulu namadolobha. Izikhulu eziphethe lolu hlelo zinxuse izakhamuzi ukuba ziqinisekise ukuthi ziza nezincwadi ezidingekayo eziphelele, okubandakanya ubufakazi bendawo yokuhlala kanye nezitatimende ezigxiviziwe zamaphoyisa uma zizofaka izicelo ezintsha. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abaholi bomphakathi bagcizelele ukubaluleka kokubambisana phakathi kwabahlali nabasebenzi ukuze umsebenzi uqhubeke ngaphandle kwezihibe. Leli gqugquzelo kulindeleke ukuthi linciphise kakhulu ulayini omude futhi libuyise ukwethenjwa kohlelo lokulethwa kwezidingo emphakathini ngaphambi kokuphela kwalo nyaka wezimali, okuzovula indlela yentuthuko esimeme esifundazweni sonkana.

Ngemuva kweminyaka emihlanu yokubhekana nokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile, izakhamizi zaseMlazi seziqale ukubona ushintsho olubonakalayo njengoba kuqaliswe uhlelo olusha lwengqalasizinda. Lesi sinyathelo silandela isikhalo somphakathi ebesilokhu sinanela ezinhlakeni zikahulumeni wasekhaya, okugcine kuphoqe ukuthi kuphuthunyiswe ukufakwa kwamapayipi amasha. Ukuze lolu hlelo luqhubeke ngempumelelo, uMasipala weTheku uhlanganyele noMnyango wezaManzi nokuThuthukiswa kokuHlanzeka ukulungisa amadamu amakhulu agcina amanzi. Kumanje, kunxuswa yonke imizi ukuba ibhalise ngokusemthethweni emahhovisi ezigceme zabo ukuze kufakwe amamitha wamanzi esimanje ngokushesha. Inqubo yokubhalisa idinga ukuthi umnikazi wendlu aphathe umazisi wakhe osemthethweni kanye nencwadi efakazela ikheli lakhe, kanti labo abangabhalisile bangase basale ngaphandle kulolu hlelo lwamahhala. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kudalwe amathuba emisebenzi kwentsha yakule ndawo eqashwe ukusiza ekuqondiseni abantu ngalokhu kubhalisa, okuyinto ekhombisa ukuzibophezela kombuso ekuthuthukiseni inhlalo yabantu nokuletha izidingongqangi ngendlela efanele.

Emzamweni wokubhekana nenselelo yokuntuleka kwamanzi ahlanzekile ezindaweni zasemakhaya, izakhamizi zaseMkhanyakude zigcine zithole usizo ngemuva kokulinda iminyaka emibili. Bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi abantu abazohlomula kulolu hlelo olusha lwengqalasizinda yamapayipi, oluqale ukusebenza ngokusemthethweni ngesonto eledlule ngemuva kokuphothulwa kohlolo lwezobunjiniyela. Ngesikhathi ethula lo mklamo omkhulu, uNgqongqoshe wezaManzi nokuHlanza ubalule ukuthi uhulumeni uzibophezele ngokuphelele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi zonke izifundazwe zithola izidingongqangi ngaphandle kokubambezeleka. Ukuze umphakathi uqhubeke nokuthola lolu sizo ngendlela ehlelekile, imindeni kumele ibhalise emahhovisi amakhansela endawo kusukela ngoMsombuluko, iphathe amakhophi omazisi aqinisekisiwe kanye nobufakazi bendawo yokuhlala obukhishwe yinkosi noma ngumasipala. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kuneqembu labahloli elizoqashwa ukuze liqaphe ukuthi ingqalasizinda inakekelwa ngendlela efanele yini ezinyangeni eziyisithupha ezizayo. Lesi sinyathelo silindeleke ukuba sinciphise kakhulu izikhalo ezibekwe yizinhlangano zomphakathi mayelana nokungahanjiswa kahle kwezidingo kumasipala, kanti futhi sikhombisa isiqalo esisha ekubambisaneni phakathi kwabaholi kanye nezakhamizi zendawo ukuze kuthuthukiswe impilo yabantu bonke.

Bangaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu abantu abahlolwe isifo sikashukela nomfutho ophakeme wegazi emkhankasweni omkhulu wezempilo obuseMlazi ngale mpelasonto edlule. Lolu hlelo lokusondeza izinsiza zomtholampilo ebantwini luhlose ukulwa nesihlava sezifo ezingalapheki esesidlangile emiphakathini eminingi yakuleli. Lokhu kulandela imibiko ekhathazayo ekhishwe ngenyanga edlule, ekhombisa ukwanda kweziguli ezifika ezibhedlela isimo sazo sesibucayi kakhulu ngenxa yokunganakwa kwezimpawu zokugula. Ekhuluma ngesikhathi kuthulwa lolu hlelo, omunye wabahlengikazi abaqavile ugcizelele ukubaluleka kokuba izakhamuzi zihlolwe kusenesikhathi ukuze zigweme izinkinga zezempilo ezingaholela ekufeni okungazelelwe. Ngaphezu kokuhlolwa kwamahhala, kuye kwasatshalaliswa nemishanguzo yokugomela izifo ezithathelwanayo kanye nezinsiza zokuhlela imindeni, okuyimizamo yokuqinisekisa ukuthi wonke umuntu uthola ukunakekelwa okusezingeni eliphezulu ngaphandle kokukhokha. Ngenxa yempumelelo yalo mkhankaso, kulindeleke ukuba amakhliniki angomahambanendlwana aqhubeke nokuhambela ezinye izigceme ezakhelene naleli lokishi emasontweni azayo, kanti umphakathi uyanxuswa ukuba uphume ngobuningi bawo ukuzoxhasa le mizamo eqinisekisa impilo enhle nenhlalakahle yomuntu wonke.

Ezindaweni zasemakhaya oMkhanyakude, ukwanda kwezigameko zezifo ezithathelwana ngamanzi sekudale ukuthi kube nomkhankaso ophuthumayo wezempilo oholwa ngamalungu omphakathi ngokubambisana nabahlengikazi. Ngenxa yalesi simo esibucayi, kuthunyelwe amakhliniki angomahamba nendlwana ukuyohlinzeka ngemigomo, ukuhlolwa kwesifo sohudo, kanye nokusabalalisa amaphilisi okuhlanza amanzi emizini engaphezu kwezi-5 000. Abaholi bomdabu kanye namakhansela endawo bagcizelele ngesikhathi kunomhlangano wesigodi ukuthi ukufundiswa ngenhlanzeko yomzimba kubaluleke ngendlela efanayo nokuthola ukwelashwa ukuze kugwenywe ukubheduka kwalolu bhubhane esikhathini esizayo. Ngokwezibalo zakamuva ezikhishwe ngongoti bezifo ezithathelwanayo, izindawo eziqale lezi zinhlelo zokuqwashisa zibone ukwehla okukhulu ngamaphesenti angama-40 kwabantu abalaliswa emagunjini abagula kakhulu ezibhedlela esikhaleni samasonto amabili kuphela. Ukuze kuqhutshekwe nalo mfutho omuhle wokulwa nalesi sifo, onompilo abasebenzela emphakathini banxusa zonke izakhamuzi ukuba ziqhubeke nokubilisa amanzi okuphuza nsuku zonke, ngenkathi uhulumeni wasekhaya usalungisa ingqalasizinda yamapayipi amadala ebihlinzeka ngamanzi angaphephile. Leli gxathu elithathiwe likhombisa ngokusobala amandla okubambisana phakathi kwemiphakathi nezikhungo zezempilo ekulweni nezinselelo ezibeka izimpilo engcupheni.

Ezindaweni zasemakhaya esifundeni sasoMkhanyakude, ukwanda kwezigameko zezifo ezingagwemeka kuholele ekutheni kuqalwe umkhankaso omkhulu wezempilo obhekelele ukugonywa kwabantwana nokunakekelwa komphakathi jikelele. Lo mkhankaso, ohlanganisa odokotela, abahlengikazi kanye nezisebenzi zezempilo ezigxile emiphakathini, uhlose ukuqinisekisa ukuthi yonke imizi ithola usizo olufanele ngaphandle kokubhekana nezindleko zokugibela amabanga amade. Ngokwemibiko yakamuva, bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezinhlanu abantwana asebegonyiwe kusukela kuqale leli sonto, kanti nabantu abadala bathola ithuba lokuhlolwa umfutho wegazi kanye nesifo sikashukela mahhala. Nakuba uMnyango wezeMpilo uxhase lolu hlelo ngezinsiza-kusebenza nemithi, impumelelo yalo incike kakhulu ekubambisaneni kwamakhosi endawo nezinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni ezigqugquzela inhlalakahle namagugu ezempilo. Ngenxa yalo mfutho omusha, kulindeleke ukuba izinga lokugula lehle kakhulu ezinyangeni ezizayo, okuyisinyathelo esigqamisa ukubaluleka kokuzinikela kwabantu ekulweni nezinselelo zezempilo ukuze kwakhiwe isizwe esinempilo nentuthuko esimeme.

Emtholampilo waseMlazi kanye nasezindaweni eziwuzungezile, isibalo seziguli eziphuma zingelaphekile ngenxa yokushoda kwemishanguzo sehle kakhulu kulandela ukwethulwa kohlelo olusha lokulethwa kwemithi ngqo emiphakathini. Lesi sinyathelo esinqala, esiqale ukusebenza ngenyanga edlule, sigxile kakhulu ekusizeni asebekhulile kanye nalabo abaphila nezifo ezingamahlalakhona njengoshukela, isifuba somoya, nomfutho ophezulu wegazi. Ngokwemibiko yamuva nje ekhishwe ngongoti bezempilo, bangaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyisishiyagalombili abantu asebehlomulile kulo mkhankaso oqhubekayo, okuyinto enciphise kakhulu ukuminyana nokulinda isikhathi eside ezikhungweni zezempilo zomphakathi. Ekhuluma nabezindaba esithangamini sakusasa izolo, umphathi wezempilo wesifunda ugcizelele ukubaluleka kokuzinakekela ekhaya, waphinde wakhuthaza izakhamuzi ukuba ziqhubeke nokuhlola impilo yazo njalo emitholampilo engomahamba nendlwana ukuze kugwenywe izimo eziphuthumayo ezingalindelekile. Ukwengeza kulokho, kumanje kunohlelo oluhambisanayo lokufundisa ngomsoco oqondile nokuqwashisa ngezifo ezithathelwanayo oselusabalale ngokushesha kuzo zonke izigceme, ngenhloso eqondile yokuqinisekisa ukuthi wonke umuntu, ikakhulukazi labo abahlala ezindaweni zasemakhaya eziqhelile, uthola ulwazi olufanele lwezempilo ngaphandle kokubhekana nezingqinamba zokuhamba ibanga elide.

Ngaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi zezakhamizi zaseMlazi zithole usizo lwezempilo mahhala ngesonto eledlule ngesikhathi kukhankaselwa ukuqwashisa ngezifo ezingalapheki kanye nokugonywa kwabantu. Lolu hlelo olubanzi, oluhlose ngqo ukulwa nokwanda kwesifo sikashukela, umdlavuza, nomfutho ophezulu wegazi, lufike ngesikhathi esifanele njengoba imithola-mpilo eminingi yendawo ibibhekene nengcindezi enkulu yokugcwala kweziguli ezidinga ukunakekelwa okuphuthumayo. Ekhuluma nabezindaba, uNkk. Zandile Mkhize ongomunye wabahlengikazi abaqavile, ugcizelele ukubaluleka kokuzihlola njalo emithola-mpilo ukuze kugwenywe izimo eziyingozi, wengeza ngokuthi impilo enhle iqala ekhaya ngokudla okunomsoco. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lolu sizo lufinyelela kuwo wonke umuntu, kuthunyelwe amakhumbi angomahamba-nendlwana ahlome ngemishini yesimanje emiphakathini eyakhelene naleli lokishi, ikakhulukazi kubantu abadala abangakwazi ukuhamba amabanga amade. Ngale mizamo eqhubekayo, kulindeleke ukuba izinga lempilo lithuthuke kakhulu kule ndawo, kunciphe nesibalo esikhathazayo sabantu abalahlekelwa yizimpilo zabo ngenxa yezifo ezingathathelwana kodwa eziyingozi kakhulu uma zishaywa indife isikhathi eside.

Ngaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha abantu abasha nabantu abadala ezindaweni zasemakhaya basabhekene nenselelo yokuthola usizo lwezempilo olusezingeni eliphezulu. Ukubhekana nalesi simo esikhathazayo, umkhankaso omusha wokuhlolela izifo ezingalapheki kanye nokugonya wethulwe ngokusemthethweni esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal kuleli sonto. Izikhungo zezempilo ezingomahamba nendlwana zizohambela imiphakathi eyakhelene naseMkhanyakude naseZululand ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi imindeni ithola imishanguzo ngaphandle kokuhamba amabanga amade. Ongoti bezempilo bagcizelela ukuthi ukuzivikela ngaphambi kokugula kanye nokudla okunomsoco kuyisisekelo sempilo ende, okuyinto enciphisa kakhulu ingcindezi emitholampilo nasezibhedlela zomphakathi. Lo mkhankaso awugcini nje ngokunikeza amaphilisi, kodwa uhlose nokufundisa izakhamuzi ngezindlela zokugcina inhlanzeko emakhaya. Ngakho-ke, abaholi bomdabu kanye namakhansela bakhuthaza wonke amalungu omphakathi ukuba abambisane nabasebenzi bezempilo abazobe behla benyuka ezigcemeni, ukuze kwakhiwe isizwe esinempilo, esiqinile, nesikwazi ukuzijamela ngokomnotho esikhathini esizayo.

Esifundeni saseNongoma, ukwanda okukhulu kwezifo ezingagwemeka ezinyangeni ezedlule sekuholele ekutheni kuqalwe umkhankaso omkhulu wokukhuthaza ezempilo nokunakekelwa komphakathi. Ngokwemibiko yamuva, ngaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezinhlanu zezakhamuzi seziyihlolile impilo yazo kulo mkhankaso ohlose ukulwa nesifo sikashukela, umfutho wegazi ophakeme, kanye nesifo sofuba. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi lolu hlelo lufinyelela kuwo wonke umuntu, imitholampilo ehambayo isatshalaliswe ezindaweni zasemakhaya lapho ukuthola usizo lwezempilo kuvame ukuba yinselelo enkulu. Ekhuluma ngalo mzamo, omunye wabahlengikazi abaholayo kulesi sifunda ugcizelele ukuthi ukuzivikela kungcono kakhulu kunokwelapha, wakhuthaza imindeni ukuba isebenzise lawa mathuba anikezwa mahhala. Ngaphandle kokuhlinzeka ngemishanguzo, lo mkhankaso uphinde ugxile ekufundiseni abantu ngezindlela zokuphila ezinempilo, ukudla okunomsoco, nokubaluleka kokuzivocavoca. Ngaleyo ndlela, abahleli balindele ukubona ukwehla okubonakalayo kweziguli ezigcwele ezibhedlela, okuzosiza ekwakheni isizwe esiqinile, esikwazayo ukuzinakekela futhi esingancikile kuphela ekwelashweni kodwa ekuvikeleni izifo ngaphambi kokuba zihlasele kakhulu.

Ukubhekana nesibalo esikhulayo sesifo sikashukela kanye nomfutho ophezulu wegazi, umphakathi waseMlazi usanda kubona umkhankaso omkhulu wezempilo owethulwe enkundleni yezemidlalo yendawo. Izakhamuzi ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu ziphume ngobuningi bazo ukuzohlolwa mahhala, zaphinde zathola nokwelulekwa ngezindlela ezinempilo zokudla ukuze zigweme izifo ezingamahlalakhona. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abahlengikazi kanye nongoti bezempilo basebenzise leli thuba eliyingqayizivele ukufundisa intsha ngobungozi bokungazivivinyi umzimba, kanye nemithelela emibi yokusetshenziswa kwezidakamizwa emphakathini. Nakuba uhulumeni wesifundazwe eqhubeka nokuhlinzeka ngemithi emitholampilo nezibhedlela, ukugcizelelwa kokuzinakekela nokuvikela izifo ngaphambi kokuba zihlasele kubonakala kuyisixazululo esisimeme sesikhathi eside. Lesi sinyathelo esihle silandela umbiko wakamuva wezempilo okhombisa ukuthi izifo ezingathathelwana zibanga ingcindezi enkulu kwisabelomali kanye nemithombo yezibhedlela zomphakathi ezweni lonke. Ukuqinisekisa ukuthi lolu hlelo luba yimpumelelo eqhubekayo futhi lufinyelela kubo bonke abantu, amakomiti ezempilo ezigceme asezohlela imihlangano yanyanga zonke yokuhlola isimo sempilo yabantu ezindaweni ezahlukene, ngenhloso yokwakha isizwe esiqwashile nesikwazi ukuzimela ngokwezempilo.

Ngenxa yokwanda okushaqisayo kwezifo ezingathathelwana ezifana noshukela nomfutho wegazi ophakeme, isimo sempilo yomphakathi ezindaweni zasemakhaya sidale ukukhathazeka okukhulu ezinyangeni ezedlule. Ukubhekana ngqo nalolu daba olubucayi, sekuqalwe umkhankaso omkhulu wokuqwashisa nokuletha imitholampilo engomahamba nendlwana ukuze ihlole abantu mahhala ngaphandle kokuthi baphoqeleke ukuhamba amabanga amade. Lolu hlelo olusha alugcini nje ngokunikeza imishanguzo ebalulekile, kodwa luhlanganisa nezinhlelo ezibanzi zokufundisa imiphakathi ngezindlela eziphilile zokudla kanye nokubaluleka kokuzivocavoca umzimba nsuku zonke. Omunye wabahlengikazi abaholayo kulo mkhankaso ugcizelele ukuthi ukutholakala kokugula kusenesikhathi kungasindisa izimpilo eziningi kakhulu, kuphinde kunciphise nengcindezi emangalisayo ebhekene nezibhedlela ezinkulu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abaholi bomdabu sebekhombise ukusekela ngokugcwele lesi sinyathelo, benxusa imindeni ukuba ibambisane nethimba lezempilo. Ngakho-ke, zonke izakhamizi zikhuthazwa ngokukhethekile ukuba zisebenzise la mathuba ezempilo alethwa emnyango wazo, njengoba ukubambisana okuqinile phakathi kwabasebenzi bezempilo nomphakathi kuyilona khambi eliqinisekisa ikusasa elinempilo nenhlalakahle esimeme kulesi sifundazwe.

Esifundeni saseZululand, isibalo sabantu abasha abahaqwe yisifo sofuba sehle ngamaphesenti angamashumi amabili kulandela ukuqaliswa kohlelo olusha lwezempilo emiphakathini yasemakhaya. Lo mkhankaso oyingqayizivele ugxile kakhulu ekufundiseni izakhamuzi ngezindlela eziphephile zokudla okunomsoco kanye nokuvivinya umzimba ukuze kugwenywe izifo ezingamahlalakhona. Ngokubambisana nabahlengikazi abajikelezayo, imitholampilo ehamba ngamasondo isihanjiswe ezindaweni ezikude kakhulu lapho ukutholakala kosizo lwezokwelapha bekuyinselelo enkulu phambilini. Ekhuluma ngalokhu kuqhubekela phambili, omunye wabaholi bomphakathi ugcizelele ukuthi ukuhlolwa kwegazi mahhala ezikoleni nasemahholo omphakathi kuzodlala indima enkulu ekusindiseni izimpilo zentsha kanye nabantu abadala. Izakhamuzi ezingakabhalisi kulolu hlelo zikhuthazwa ukuba zihambele izikhungo zezempilo eziseduze nazo ngokushesha, njengoba ukutholakala kokwelashwa kusenesikhathi kuyisona sikhali esinqala sokunqoba izifo ezithathelanayo. Ngenxa yale mizamo, ithemba selibuyile kubantu abaningi abebengasenalo ulwazi olwanele ngokunakekelwa kwempilo yabo yansuku zonke, okukhombisa ngokusobala ukuthi impilo engcono iqala ngokuzinikela komphakathi uwonke ekulweni nezifo.

Ngenxa yokwanda kwezigameko zesifo sikashukela nomfutho ophakeme wegazi emiphakathini, izakhamizi zaseMlazi zibonakale ngobuningi bazo emkhankasweni wezempilo obuqhutshwa enkundleni yezemidlalo kuleli sonto. Lolu hlelo, olugxile ekuhlolweni kwamahhala, ekunikezweni kwamaphilisi, nasekufundiseni ngendlela efanele yokudla, luhlose ukunciphisa ingcindezi emitholampilo yomphakathi esivele igcwele phama. Ekhuluma ngesikhathi kuvulwa lo mcimbi ngokusemthethweni, uNesi oMkhulu wendawo ugcizelele ukuthi ukuzivikela kungcono kakhulu kunokwelapha, ekhuthaza abantu abadala nentsha ukuba bazihlole njalo ukuze bathole usizo kusenesikhathi. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kuye kwasatshalaliswa imishanguzo yokugomela izifo ezithathelanayo kubantwana abangaphansi kweminyaka emihlanu ubudala, okuyisinyathelo esamukelwe ngezandla ezimhlophe ngabazali abebekhathazekile ngokubheduka kwesimungumungwane. Kulindeleke ukuthi le mizamo yokuqinisekisa inhlalakahle iqhubekele nakwezinye izifunda zakwaZulu-Natal ezinyangeni ezizayo, ukuze kufezwe isethembiso sokuletha usizo lwezempilo olusezingeni eliphezulu, nolufinyeleleka kalula kubo bonke abantu ababencishwe amathuba phambilini, ngaleyo ndlela kwakhiwe isizwe esinempilo nesikwazi ukuzimela.

Emzamweni wokulwa nezifo ezingalapheki ezifana noshukela nomfutho ophezulu wegazi, izakhamizi ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu elokishini laseMlazi zibuthene emtholampilo wendawo kule mpelasonto ukuze zihlolwe mahhala. Ochwepheshe bezempilo balumkisa ngokuthi ukusheshe kutholakale lezi zifo kusindisa izimpilo futhi kunciphisa umthwalo ezibhedlela zikahulumeni ezigcwele phama. Lolu hlelo lokuhlola olubizwa ngokuthi 'Impilo Yethu' luyingxenye yomkhankaso wesifundazwe oqhubekayo, ohloselwe ukusondeza izinsiza zezempilo kubantu abantulayo abavame ukubhekana nezingqinamba zokuthola usizo. Ngaphezu kokuhlolwa kwezifo zendlela yokuphila, amalungu omphakathi aphinde athola ithuba lokugonyela izingane zawo kanye nokuhlolelwa igciwane lengculazi ngaphandle kokukhokha ngisho indibilishi. Ekhuluma ngesikhathi somcimbi, omunye wabahlengikazi abaqavile ugcizelele ukubaluleka kokudla ngendlela enempilo nokuzivocavoca njalo, wengeza ngokuthi impilo yomphakathi iqala emakhaya ngaphambi kokuba ifike emitholampilo. Kulesi sikhathi esizayo, kulindeleke ukuba amathimba ezempilo ahambele ezinye izifunda ezakhelene naleli lokishi, okuhlanganisa nezindawo zasemakhaya ezikude, ukuqinisekisa ukuthi wonke umuntu uthola ukunakekelwa okufanele ngaphandle kokubhekana nezindleko eziphezulu zokugibela.

Ngokusho kwemibiko yakamuva, izakhamizi ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezinhlanu esifundeni saseMkhanyakude zihlolelwe isifo sikashukela nomfutho wegazi ophezulu mahhala ngempelasonto edlule njengengxenye yomkhankaso omusha wezempilo. Lo mkhankaso, obuholwa ngongoti bezempilo kanye nabaholi bomphakathi, uhlose ukuqwashisa abantu ngokubaluleka kokuvikela izifo ezingalapheki ngaphambi kokuba zibe yingozi empilweni futhi zidale ukukhubazeka. Ukuthutheleka kwabantu emitholampilo engomahamba nendluzula kukhombise ngokusobala ukuthi isizwe siyakubambisisa ukunakekelwa kwemizimba yaso uma silethwelwe izinsiza eduze nasemakhaya. Yize uMnyango Wezempilo uqhubeka nokuhlinzeka ngemishanguzo ezikhungweni zikahulumeni, inselelo enkulu isalokhu kuwukushoda kolwazi mayelana nokudla okunomsoco, ukugwema utshwala, kanye nokuzivocavoca njalo. Ukuze kubhekwane nale nkinga, odokotela nabahlengikazi basebenzise leli thuba ukufundisa imindeni ngezindlela eziphephile zokupheka nokugcina inhlanzeko emakhaya. Ngenxa yempumelelo yalolu hlelo, abahleli bomkhankaso bamemezele ukuthi bazoqhubeka nokuvakashela ezinye izindawo zasemakhaya ezinyangeni ezizayo ukuze baqinisekise ukuthi alikho ilungu lomphakathi elishiyeka ngaphandle ekutholeni usizo lwezempilo oluseqophelweni eliphezulu.

Cishe amaphesenti angamashumi amathathu abantu abadala esifundazweni saKwaZulu-Natal baphila nezifo ezingathathelwana ezifana noshukela kanye nomfutho ophezulu wegazi, okuyisimo esibucayi esidale ukuba kuqaliswe umkhankaso omkhulu wezempilo endaweni yaseMsinga kuleli sonto. Lo mkhankaso obizwa ngokuthi 'Impilo Inqolobane', uhlose ukuhlinzeka ngokuhlolwa kwamahhala kwalezi zifo ezibulalayo, kanye nokulethwa kwemithi ebantwini abakhubazekile ngokusebenzisa imitholampilo engomahamba nendlwana. Izakhamuzi zakule ndawo zizwakalise ukujabula okukhulu ngalolu hlelo olulethwe emnyango, njengoba abaningi bekhala ngokuthi kade behamba amabanga amade futhi bechitha imali eningi ukuyofuna usizo lwezokwelapha ezibhedlela. Ngesikhathi kuthulwa lolu hlelo ngokusemthethweni enkundleni yezemidlalo yendawo, abasebenzi bezempilo bagcizelele kakhulu ukubaluleka kokuzivocavoca njalo nokudla ukudla okunomsoco ukuze kugwenywe lezi zifo. Kulindeleke ukuba le mizamo yokunakekelwa kwempilo yomphakathi inabele nakwezinye izifunda ezisemaphandleni ezinyangeni ezizayo, ngenhloso yokunciphisa isiminyaminya emitholampilo yasemadolobheni, ukufundisa umphakathi ngezempilo, kanye nokusindisa izimpilo zabantu abantulayo.

Emzamweni wokuqinisekisa ukuthi impilo enhle ifinyelela kuwo wonke umuntu, izakhamuzi ezingaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu esifundeni saseZululand zihlanganyele ohlelweni olukhulu lokuhlola izifo ezingalapheki kuleli sonto. Lesi sinyathelo esiqhutshwa ngongoti bezempilo kanye nabahlengikazi bomphakathi sihlose ukulwa nesibalo esikhulayo sabantu abahaqwe isifo sikashukela, umdlavuza, nomfutho ophakeme wegazi ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Ngesikhathi ethula inkulumo yakhe emcimbini wokuvula, uMphathiswa wezeMpilo esifundazweni ugcizelele ukubaluleka kokuzivocavoca nokudla okunomsoco nsuku zonke, waphinde wanxusa imiphakathi ukuba isebenzise imitholampilo ehamba ngamasondo ehlinzekwe wuhulumeni mahhala. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, abaholi bomdabu kanye nezinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni baphakamise lolu hlelo ngezandla zombili, bethi luzosiza kakhulu ekwehliseni izinga lokufa kwabantu ngenxa yezifo ebezingavikeleka uma zitholwa kusenesikhathi. Kulindeleke ukuthi le mikhankaso yokugonya kanye nokufundisa ngempilo inabele nakwezinye izifunda ezakhelene nalesi ngenyanga ezayo, ukuze kuthuthukiswe inhlalakahle yomphakathi wonkana futhi kuncishiswe ukugcwala ngokweqile kweziguli ezibhedlela zikahulumeni.

Ngenxa yokwanda kwezigameko zesifo sesimungumungwane ezinganeni ezincane kulezi zinyanga ezimbili ezedlule, umphakathi waseMkhanyakude usuthathe izinyathelo ezinqala zokubambisana nezikhungo zezempilo ukuze kunqandwe lokhu kubhebhetheka. Lo mkhankaso wokugoma, oqale ngesonto eledlule emitholampilo nasemahholo omphakathi, uhlose ukufinyelela ezinganeni ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane eziyishumi ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga. Ekhuluma ngalolu hlelo, uNkk. Zandile Mthembu ongumgqugquzeli wezempilo kule ndawo, ugcizelele ukuthi ukugoma akugcini nje ngokuvikela ingane eyodwa, kodwa kwakha isivikelo esiqinile esizweni sonke. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abahlengikazi abangomahambanendlwana sebeqalile ukuhambela imizi eqhelile ukuyohlola isimo sezempilo sabantu abadala, nokunikeza imishanguzo yalabo abaphethwe yizifo ezingamahlalakhona njengoshukela nomfutho ophezulu wegazi. Ukuze le mizamo ibe yimpumelelo ephelele, kunxuswa bonke abazali nababheki bezingane ukuba beze namakhadi omgomo ezikhungweni eziseduze ngokushesha. Lokhu kukhombisa ngokusobala ukuthi uma kuhlanganiswa amandla phakathi kwezakhamuzi nabezempilo, izinga lezifo eziyingozi lingehliseka kakhulu, kuqinisekiswe inhlalakahle nenqubekelaphambili yesifunda sonke.

Emzamweni wokulwa nokubhebhetheka kwezifo eziwumshayabhuqe, amalungu omphakathi waseMlazi aphume ngobuningi bawo izolo ukuyokweseka uhlelo olusha lwezempilo nokunakekelwa kwemizimba. Bangaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu izakhamuzi ezithole uxhaso lokuhlolwa kwamahhala kwesifo sikashukela, isifo sofuba, kanye nomfutho ophezulu wegazi ezikhungweni zesikhashana ezazimiswe enkundleni yezemidlalo yendawo. Lesi sinyathelo sifika ngesikhathi esibucayi lapho izifo ezingalapheki ziqhubeka nokudlondlobala ezindaweni zasemakhaya nasemalokishini, okuyisimo esibeka engcupheni impilo yeningi. Ongoti bezempilo bagcizelele kakhulu ukubaluleka kokusheshe kutholakale izifo ukuze zelashwe ngokushesha, okungaba yikhambi lokusindisa izimpilo ezingenakubalwa. Kanti ngakolunye uhlangothi, abaholi bomdabu kanye namakhansela banxuse abantu ukuba bazijwayeze ukudla okunomsoco nokuzivocavoca nsuku zonke ukugwema ukukhuluphala ngokweqile okudala ezinye izifo. Uma kubhekwa ikusasa, kulindeleke ukuthi kuthunyelwe imitholampilo engomahamba nendlwana ezifundeni ezingomakhelwane ezinjengaKwaMakhutha nasezindaweni ezakhelene nawo, ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi akekho osalela emuva ekutholeni usizo lwezokwelapha olusezingeni eliphezulu.

Ezinyangeni ezintathu ezedlule, izakhamizi ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezinhlanu elokishini laseMlazi zihlomule kakhulu ohlelweni olusha lwemitholampilo engomahamba nendlwana olwethulwe ukulwa nezifo ezingalapheki. Lokhu kuza ngemuva kokukhula okukhulu kwezinga labantu abahaqwe isifo sikashukela, isifuba somoya nomfutho ophezulu wegazi kulesi sifundazwe, okuyisimo esikhathaze kakhulu ongoti bezempilo. Ukubhekana ngqo nale nkinga, osomabhizinisi bendawo nabaholi bomphakathi babambisane nabasebenzi bezempilo ukugqugquzela imikhankaso yokuqwashisa egxile ekudleni okunomsoco nokuzivocavoca umzimba amasonto onke ezinkundleni zemidlalo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kukhuthazwa intsha ngokukhethekile ukuba ihlole igazi njalo ezikhungweni zikahulumeni ukuze igweme ukugula kungazelelwe futhi ithole ukwelashwa kusenesikhathi. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni wokwazisa umphakathi izolo, umxhumanisi wezempilo kulesi sifunda ugcizelele ukuthi impilo enhle iqala ekhaya nasendleleni esiphila ngayo nsuku zonke. Uphinde wacela yonke imindeni ukuba isebenzise ngokugcwele lezi zinsiza zokunakekelwa kwemizimba ezilethwe eduze kwabo mahhala, ngenhloso yokwakha isizwe esinempilo, esiqinile, nesikwazi ukubamba iqhaza ekuthuthukisweni komnotho wendawo.

Ngemuva kokubikwa kokwenyuka ngamaphesenti angamashumi amabili kwezibalo zabantwana abahaqwe yisifo sesimungumungwane enyakatho yaKwaZulu-Natal, abaholi bomphakathi baseNongoma sebesukumele phezulu baqala umkhankaso oqinile wokukhuthaza ezempilo. Lolu hlelo, olwesekwa ngosonhlalakahle kanye nabahlengikazi basemitholampilo yendawo, luhlose ukuqinisekisa ukuthi yonke imizi ithola ulwazi olufanele mayelana nokugoma kanye nenhlanzeko yomzimba. Phakathi nezinsuku eziyisikhombisa ezidlule, amathimba ezempilo aseyenze umsebenzi oncomekayo ngokuhambela isigceme nesigceme, lapho ehlole khona izakhamuzi ezingaphezu kwenkulungwane, anikeza nemithi kulabo abamasosha omzimba abuthakathaka. Ekhuluma ngalo mkhankaso, omunye wabahlengikazi abaqavile ugcizelele ukuthi ukusebenzisana phakathi kukahulumeni nezakhamuzi kuyisikhali esinamandla kakhulu ekulweni nezifo ezithelelwanayo. Ngenxa yale mizamo enjalo, kulindeleke ukuba isimo sibe ngcono kakhulu emasontweni azayo, kanti nezikhungo zezempilo ziqhubeka nokugqugquzela abantu ukuba basheshe bafune usizo lwezokwelapha uma bezizwa bengaphilile kahle ukuze kugwenywe ukubhebhetheka kwalesi sifo emiphakathini.

Emakhaya aseMphophomeni, isibalo sabantu abaphila nezifo ezingathathelwana, ikakhulukazi isifo sikashukela kanye nomfutho ophezulu wegazi, sikhuphuke ngendlela ethusayo kule minyaka emihlanu edlule. Ukubhekana nalesi simo esibucayi, kuleli sonto kwethulwe umkhankaso omkhulu wezempilo ohlanganisa ukuhlolwa kwegazi mahhala kanye nokwelulekwa ngokwengqondo. Kusukela entathakusa, izinkumbi zezakhamuzi ziphume ngobuningi bazo zibangisana emitholampilo engomahamba nendlwana ebisigxishwe ezindaweni ezehlukene ezingaphakathi kumasipala ukuyothola lolu sizo. Ekhuluma ngesikhathi kuxilongwa abantu abakhulile emkhishwaneni wakwa-A, omunye wabahlengikazi abaphezulu ugcizelele ukuthi ukutholakala kwalezi zifo kusenesikhathi yikho okungasindisa izimpilo eziningi, wanxusa abantu ukuba badle ngendlela enempilo futhi bazivocavoce njalo. Ngaphezu kokuxilonga, lolu hlelo luhlose ukusabalalisa ulwazi olubanzi ngoba abasebenzi bezempilo abagxile emiphakathini bazobe behambela imizi ngemizi ngenhloso yokufundisa imindeni ngemikhuba emihle yokunakekela imizimba yabo. Lokhu kuhlanganyela phakathi kwabaholi bomphakathi nabezempilo kulindeleke ukuba kunciphise ingcindezi ebhekene nezibhedlela zesifunda, kanti futhi kuzosiza kakhulu ekwakheni isizwe esiqaphelayo nesinempilo.

Ngaphezulu kwama-60 ekhulwini abafundi abakwimizi yemfundo ephakamileyo ezilalini bajamelana nengxaki yokuswela izixhobo zeteknoloji, imeko ebangela ukuba abaninzi basalele ngasemva kwizifundo zabo okanye bayeke isikolo ngokupheleleyo. Ukulwa lo mngeni omandla, kunikezelwe ngethaphuthepha leekhompyutha eziphathwayo neetafilethi kwizikolo ezingamashumi amahlanu ezikuqelelwano eMpuma Koloni kule veki iphelileyo, ngenjongo yokuphucula izinga lokufunda nokunqanda ukwehla kwamanani abaphumelelayo. Lo mzamo uyingxenye yomgaqo-nkqubo omtsha wezemfundo ojolise ekuxhobiseni ulutsha ngezakhono zedijithali phambi kokuba lungene kwiiyunivesithi nakumaziko oqeqesho aphezulu, apho ubuchwepheshe buyimfuneko yemihla ngemihla. Ootitshala nabazali balwamkele ngovuyo olu tshintsho, bechaza ukuba luza kunciphisa umsantsa okhoyo phakathi kwabafundi basezixekweni nabo basemaphandleni ngokwemigangatho yempumelelo. Nangona kunjalo, iingcali kwezemfundo zilumkisa ngelithi ukuhanjiswa kwezixhobo kuphela akwanelanga ukusombulula iingxaki ezijongene nenkqubo yemfundo. Zithi kufuneka kuqinisekiswe ukuba kukho uqeqesho oluthe gqolo lootitshala kunye nonikezelo lwe-intanethi oluthembekileyo ukuze kufezekiswe amaphupha abafundi, kwaye kuxhaswe uphuhliso lwabantwana kweli lizwe ukuze bakwazi ukukhuphisana kumazwe ngamazwe.

Ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amahlanu ezikolo zasemaphandleni kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni zixhotyiswe ngezixhobo zeteknoloji eziquka iikhompyutha eziphathwayo kunye noqhagamshelo lwe-intanethi olukhawulezayo kule veki iphelileyo. Olu tshintsho lukhulu lulindeleke ukuba luguqule ngokupheleleyo indlela abafundi abafunda ngayo, ngenjongo yokuphucula izinga lemfundo nokuxhobisa ulutsha ngezakhono zale mihla eziyimfuneko kumaziko emfundo ephakamileyo. Nangona uninzi lwabazali kunye nootitshala luluqhwabele izandla olu phuhliso, kukho iinkxalabo ezinzulu ezivakalisiweyo malunga nokucinywa kombane okuthe gqolo kunye nokunqongophala koqeqesho olululo kwabo badlulisela ulwazi. Ngenxa yale mingeni, iingcali kwezemfundo zikhuthaza amashishini abucala ukuba angenelele ngokubonelela ngezinye iindlela zokuvelisa amandla asetyenziswayo, afana nombane wemitha yelanga. Kwangaxeshanye, iiyunivesithi ezikufutshane zithembise ukuthumela abafundi bazo abenza unyaka wokugqibela kwizifundo zobuchwepheshe ukuze bancedise ekuqeqesheni abafundisi-ntsapho nasekulungiseni izixhobo ezonakeleyo. Oku kungqina ngokucacileyo ukuba impumelelo yomfundi ayixhomekekanga kuphela kwimigaqo-nkqubo yesebe lezemfundo, kodwa ifuna intsebenziswano engazenzisiyo phakathi kwabahlali, amacandelo abucala, kunye namaziko emfundo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ikamva eliqaqambileyo lesizwe.

Ngaphezulu kwama-60 ekhulwini ezikolo zasemaphandleni kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni zijongene nengxaki emandla yokunqongophala kwezixhobo zenzululwazi kunye nethekhnoloji, nto leyo echaphazela kakhulu izinga lokuphumelela kwabafundi. Ukujongana nalo mngeni, oosomashishini basekuhlaleni ngokubambisana neenkokeli zoluntu basungule iphulo elitsha kule veki iphelileyo elijolise ekuxhobiseni amagumbi okufundela ngamakhompyutha kunye noqhagamshelo lwe-intanethi. Ngaphezu koko, iiyunivesithi ezikufutshane zithembise ukufaka isandla ngokubonelela ngoqeqesho olukhethekileyo kootitshala ukuze bakwazi ukudlulisela ulwazi lwale mihla ngendlela eyiyo. Eli nyathelo lihambelana ngqo nombono omtsha karhulumente wokuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntwana, ngaphandle kokujonga imvelaphi yakhe, ufumana imfundo ekumgangatho ophezulu nehambelana neemfuno zoqoqosho lwanamhlanje. Abazali nabahlali bavakalise imivuyo yabo ngolu tshintsho, bebalaselisa elokuba liza kuvula amathuba amaninzi emisebenzi kubantwana babo kwixesha elizayo, kwaye linciphise umsantsa okhoyo phakathi kwezikolo zasezidolophini nezasemaphandleni.

Kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, inkqubo entsha yokuxhobisa abafundi ngezakhono zeteknoloji iqaliswe ngokusesikweni kule veki iphelileyo. Eli phulo lijolise ekunciphiseni umsantsa wedijithali phakathi kwezikolo zasezidolophini kunye nezo zasemaphandleni, emva kokuba uphando luveze ukuba ngaphantsi kwepesenti ezingamashumi amabini abafundi abafikelela kwi-intanethi kule mimandla. Ethetha egameni labazali, uMnu. Sipho Ndlovu uvakalise inkxaso yakhe, esithi olu tshintsho luza kuvula amathuba amatsha okufunda lize lilungiselele ulutsha kwihlabathi lanamhlanje elilawulwa yikhompyutha. Ukongeza koku, iidyunivesithi zengingqi nazo zithembise ukusebenzisana namaziko emfundo asisiseko ngokubonelela ngoqeqesho olongezelelekileyo kootitshala ukuze bakwazi ukufundisa ezi zifundo ngokuzithemba kwaye baphakamise umgangatho wemfundo. Nangona kukho imingeni yokunqongophala kombane kwezinye iindawo ezikude, abasemagunyeni baqinisekisa uluntu ukuba kuxhotyiswe amagumbi okufundela ngeepaneli zokufunxa amandla elanga ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba inkqubo yokufunda nokufundisa ayiphazamiseki konke konke kulo nyaka.

Kwinzame zokulwa ingxaki yokunqongophala kwezixhobo zobuchwepheshe, izikolo zasemaphandleni ezikwiphondo leMpuma Koloni ziqalise inkqubo entsha yokufundisa ngekhompyutha kulo nyaka. Ngaphezulu kwamawaka amahlanu abafundi bakulindeleke ukuba baxhamle kweli phulo, elijolise ekuxhobiseni ulutsha ngezakhono ezingundoqo zexesha leNguqu yeSine yezoShishino. Ngokutsho kweenkokheli zasekuhlaleni kunye nootitshala abaphambili, eli nyathelo liza kuvula amathuba amaninzi emisebenzi kubantwana abebesoloko beshiyeka emva ngenxa yokungalingani kwinkqubo yezemfundo. Ukongeza koku, iidyunivesithi zengingqi ezifana neDyunivesithi yaseFort Hare zithembise ngokuqeqesha ootitshala ukuze babe nolwazi oluphangaleleyo lokudlulisa ezi zifundo ngokutsha nangempumelelo kumagumbi okufundela. Nangona ucelomngeni lweziseko zophuhliso olufana nokucima kombane kunye nokunqongophala kwe-intanethi lusekho, abachaphazelekayo banethemba elikhulu lokuba ukuzinikela kwabafundi kuya kukhuthaza utyalo-mali oluthe chatha kwicandelo lezemfundo. Loo nto iyakuthi iqinisekise ukuba isizwe sivelisa iingqondi ezikwaziyo ukukhuphisana kumazwe ngamazwe, ngeli lixa izinga lokuphumelela kwimviwo zikamatriki liphucuka ngokubonakalayo kwiminyaka ezayo.

Kwisithuba seminyaka emihlanu edlulileyo, inani labafundi abavela kwiindawo zasemaphandleni ababhalisela izifundo zaseyunivesithi linyuke ngeepesenti ezingamashumi amabini, ngokwengxelo entsha ekhutshwe ngabaphandi bezemfundo. Nangona oku kuluphuhliso olukhuthazayo nolunika ithemba kwikamva lesizwe, uninzi lwaba lutsha lusajongana nemingeni emandla equka ukunqongophala kwezixhobo zokufunda zale mihla kunye nobunzima bokuhlawula imirhumo yokufunda ekhula urhoqo. Ukulwa nale meko, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni kunye noosomashishini baqale amaphulo axhasayo ajolise kwizikolo zamabanga aphakamileyo, ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba abafundi bafumana iziseko eziluqilima kwizifundo zezibalo nezenzululwazi ngaphambi kokuba baye kumaziko emfundo ephakamileyo. Kwangaxeshanye, kuye kwabhengezwa inkqubo entsha yobambiswano eza kubonelela ngonxibelelwano lwe-intanethi lwasimahla kunye neekhompyutha kumaziko oqeqesho nakwizikolo ezingathathi ntweni, ukuze kuncitshiswe umsantsa wezobuchwepheshe okhoyo phakathi kweedolophu namaphandle. Oku kutyalo-mali kulindeleke ukuba kuphucule izinga lokuphumelela kwabafundi ngokubanzi, kubavulele amathuba angcono engqesho, kwaye kuqinisekise ukuba nabo bathabatha inxaxheba ebonakalayo kuqoqosho lwelizwe olusakhulayo.

Kwisiganeko esivuse imincili kuluntu lwaseMpuma Koloni, izikolo zasemaphandleni zibonise inkqubela encomekayo kwiziphumo zebanga leshumi kulo nyaka, nangona zikhe zajongana nocelomngeni lokunqongophala kwezixhobo zokufunda. Abafundi abaninzi baphumelele ngamanqaku aphezulu avula iingcango zokuya kwiiyunivesithi ezaziwayo kweli lizwe, nto leyo engqina ukuba ukuzimisela kunamandla kunemiqobo yentlalo. Ngenxa yale mpumelelo, iingcali zezemfundo zikhuthaze ukuba kubekho utyalo-mali olongezelelekileyo kwiziseko zophuhliso, ukwenzela ukuba ootitshala bakwazi ukufundisa kwindawo ekhuselekileyo nexhotyiswe ngokupheleleyo ngeteknoloji yale mihla. Ukongeza koko, abazali namalungu ebhodi elawula izikolo bavakalise inkxalabo malunga nokulibaziseka kokuhanjiswa kweencwadi zokufunda, belumkisa ngokuba lo mkhuba unokubuyisela umva imigudu esele yenziwe. Nangona kusekho umsebenzi omkhulu ekufuneka wenziwe ukuqinisekisa ukulingana kwicandelo lezemfundo, eli nyathelo libonisa ithemba elikhulu lokuba ikamva lolutsha lukhanya bha, kwaye imfundo isalelona krele libukhali lokulwa intlupheko kweli loMzantsi Afrika.

Kwisithuba seenyanga ezintandathu ezidlulileyo, izinga lokuphumelela kwabafundi kwizikolo zamabanga aphakamileyo kunye neeyunivesithi zaseMpuma Koloni linyuke ngeepesenti ezilishumi elinesihlanu, nto leyo ebonakalisa isiqhamo senkxaso-mali entsha yokufunda. Nangona uqhankqalazo lwamva nje beluphazamise iinkqubo zokufunda kwimizi yemfundiso ephakamileyo nakwiiyunivesithi ezininzi, iinzame ezibambeneyo zabazali, iinkokheli zasekuhlaleni, nootitshala ziqinisekise ukuba akukho mfundi usalayo ngasemva ngeli xesha lovavanyo. Ukulungiswa kweziseko zophuhliso ngokubanzi, ezifana namathala eencwadi amatsha kunye namagumbi okufundela axhotyiswe ngobuchwepheshe bekhompyutha bemihla ngemihla, kudlale indima ebalulekileyo kakhulu ekukhuthazeni abantwana ukuba bazinikele ngokupheleleyo kwizifundo zabo zenzululwazi nemathematika. Ngokutsho kweengcali zophuhliso lwemfundo, ukuxhaswa kwabafundi abasuka kumakhaya asokolayo ngemali yokufunda nangokutya ezikolweni kufuneka kube yeyona njongo iphambili yomgaqo-nkqubo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ikamva eliqaqambileyo nelinobulungisa lesizwe siphela. Eli phulo libanzi aligcini nje ngokuphucula iziphumo zeemviwo zokuphela konyaka, kodwa likwaxhobisa ulutsha ngezakhono ezifanelekileyo ukuze lukwazi ukumelana nemingeni enzima yezemisebenzi kwihlabathi lanamhlanje eliguquka ngokukhawuleza.

Ngaphezulu kwamashumi asixhenxe eepesenti zabafundi abasuka kwimizi engathathi ntweni kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni bajongene nocelomngeni olukhulu lokunqongophala kwezixhobo zokufunda kulo nyaka. Ukulwa nale ngxaki, abahlali kunye neenkokeli zemveli babambe intlanganiso engxamisekileyo kule veki iphelileyo, ngenjongo yokuqulunqa isicwangciso sokunceda izikolo ezisemaphandleni ezihlelelekileyo. Nangona inkqubo entsha yezemfundo ijolise ekuphuculeni izinga lokuphumelela kwamatriki, iingcali zilumkisa ngelithi ngaphandle koxhaso oluphathekayo, olu tshintsho aluzukuba nasiphumo esibonakalayo kumagumbi okufundela. Kwiiyunivesithi ezikufutshane nazo, ulutsha oluninzi lulinde iimpendulo malunga nenkxaso-mali ukuze lukwazi ukuqhubeka nezifundo zalo zemfundo ephakamileyo ngaphandle kweziphazamiso. Ngenxa yoko, utyalo-mali kwiziseko zophuhliso lwezikolo luye lwangumba oqwalaselwa kakhulu ziingqondi zoluntu nabachaphazelekayo. Lilonke, kubalulekile ukuba onke amacandelo entlalo asebenzisane ngamandla ukuqinisekisa ukuba isizukulwana esilandelayo sifumana imfundo esemgangathweni, ukwenzela ukuba kudalwe ikamva eliqaqambileyo noqoqosho oluzinzileyo lweli lizwe.

Kwiveki ephelileyo, abafundi abangaphaya kwamakhulu amahlanu kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni bafumene izixhobo zethekhnoloji ezintsha ngenjongo yokuphucula inkqubo yokufunda nokufundisa ngobuxhakaxhaka be-intanethi. Oku kuza emva kwengxelo ebonise ukuba izikolo ezininzi ezisezilalini bezisalela emva kakhulu ngenxa yokunqongophala kwezixhobo zale mihla. Ukulungiselela abafundi ukuba bakulungele ukungena kwamaziko emfundo ephakamileyo neeyunivesithi, iingcali kwezemfundo zigxininisa ukubaluleka kokuxhobisa ulutsha ngezakhono zekhompyutha kwasekuqaleni. Enkulumweni yakhe, uMlawuli wesiKolo saseDalindyebo ubalule ukuba le nkqubo iza kunciphisa umsantsa okhoyo phakathi kwabafundi basezidolophini nabasezilalini ngokumnika wonke umntu ithuba elilinganayo lokufikelela kulwazi. Nangona ucelomngeni lweziseko ezingundoqo, olufana nokucima kombane nokunqongophala kwee-enjini eziphehla umbane, luseyimiqobo emikhulu, amalinge anje abonisa inyathelo elihle elisingise kwikamva eliqaqambileyo lemfundo. Eli phulo kulindeleke ukuba linatyiselwe nakwezinye izithili kulo nyaka uzayo ukuqinisekisa ukuba akukho mfundi usalela emva kwinguqu yezedijithali.

Ngaphezulu kwama-60 ekhulwini abafundi abafunda kwizikolo zasemaphandleni basajongene nomceli-mngeni omkhulu wokunqongophala kwezixhobo zeteknoloji, imeko ebangela ukuba basalele ngasemva kwimfundo yale mihla. Ukulungisa le ngxaki ixhaphakileyo, kuye kwaphehlelelwa iphulo elitsha lokuxhobisa ulutsha ngezakhono zekhompyutha kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni izolo, elijolise ekunikezeleni iikhompyutha eziphathwayo ezikumgangatho ophezulu kumawaka abafundi. Ngethuba ethetha noluntu kulo msitho, uMphathiswa weMfundo eSiseko ugxininise ukuba kubalulekile ukuba urhulumente asebenzisane namashishini abucala ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba akukho mfundi ushiyekayo ekufumaneni imfundo efanelekileyo nesemgangathweni. Ngaphezu koko, iidyunivesithi namaziko oqeqesho eli lizwe kulindeleke ukuba zihlaziye iinkqubo zazo zokufundisa, zilungelelanise izifundo zazo nolu tshintsho lwedijithali olukhawulezayo. Abazali kunye nootitshala balwamkele ngovuyo olukhulu olu tshintsho, benethemba lokuba liza kuphucula iziphumo zeemviwo zebanga leshumi kulo nyaka ulandelayo, lize livule namathuba amatsha engqesho kubafundi abaphumelelayo bakulungele ukungena kwihlabathi lezobuchwepheshe.

Kumsitho obuzinyaswe luluntu lwaseQonce kwiveki ephelileyo, kuye kwatyhilwa inkqubo entsha yokuxhobisa izikolo zamabanga aphantsi ngezixhobo zeteknoloji ezikumgangatho ophezulu. Eli nyathelo lilandela emva kwengxelo ebonise ukuba uninzi lwabafundi basemaphandleni basilela kakhulu kwizifundo zeMathematika neNzululwazi ngenxa yokunqongophala kwezixhobo zokufunda. Ukulungisa lo mngeni, iinzame zokubambisana phakathi koosomashishini basekuhlaleni kunye nabaphathi bezemfundo zikhokelele ekubeni kunikezelwe iitafileti ezikrelekrele ezingamakhulu amahlanu kubafundi abasweleyo. Iingcali kwezemfundo kwiiyunivesithi zeli zikholelwa ekubeni ukufakwa kwale nkqubo yedijithali kuya kuphucula izinga lokuphumelela, kwaye kuvule namathuba angcono okuba aba bafundi bamkelwe kumaziko emfundo ephakamileyo. Nangona abazali bekuqhwabela izandla oku kuphuhliswa, ootitshala balumkise ukuba uqeqesho olululo ngokusetyenziswa kwale teknoloji luyimfuneko ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba ixabiso layo liyabonakala eklasini. Ngokubanzi, olu tshintsho lulindeleke ukuba lube ngumzekelo oza kulandelwa nakwezinye izithili, njengoko ilizwe lizama ukuvala umsantsa wezemfundo phakathi kwezikolo zasezidolophini nezasemaphandleni.

Ngaphezulu kwamashumi asixhenxe eepesenti zabafundi abavela kwiindawo zasemaphandleni kweli phondo bafunda phantsi kweemeko ezinzima ngenxa yokunqongophala kwezixhobo zale mihla zethekhinoloji. Ukuzama ukulwa lo mngeni, kule veki iphelileyo kuye kwanikezelwa ngeekhompyutha eziphathwayo namacwecwe e-elektroniki kwizikolo ezingamashumi amabini, ngenjongo yokuphucula umgangatho wemfundo nokuxhobisa ulutsha ngezakhono zedijithali. Ootitshala nabazali bavakalise imincili ngeli phulo, bechaza ukuba ezi zixhobo ziza kwenza ukuba abantwana babo bakwazi ukukhangela ulwazi oluphangaleleyo kumnatha we-intanethi, nto leyo eza kubanceda kakhulu xa besenza uphando lwabo lwesikolo. Nangona kusekho umsebenzi omkhulu ekufuneka wenziwe ukuqinisekisa ukuba onke amaziko emfundo, ukuqala kwizikolo zamabanga aphantsi ukuya kwiiyunivesithi, anombane othembekileyo neziseko eziqinileyo zophuhliso, eli nyathelo libonwa njengesiqalo esihle sokulungiselela abafundi kwihlabathi lanamhlanje. Abahlalutyi bezemfundo balumkise ngelithi utyalo-mali oluloluhlobo kufuneka lukhatshwe luqeqesho olululo lootitshala kunye nenkxaso eqhubekayo yezobuchwepheshe, ukuze lo mzamo ube nempumelelo ebonakalayo kwiziphumo zeemviwo zokuphela konyaka kwaye unciphise umsantsa okhoyo phakathi kwabafundi basezidolophini nabasezilalini.

Ngaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu abafundi kwiiLali zaseMpuma Koloni bajongene nemicelimngeni eqatha yokunqongophala kwezixhobo zokufunda kwakunye namagumbi okufundela akhuselekileyo. Ukulwa le ngxaki, kukho iphulo elitsha elisungulwe kule veki iphelileyo elijolise ekwakheni iilabhoratri zenzululwazi nokuxhobisa ootitshala ngezakhono zeteknoloji yale mihla. Oku kulandela izikhalo ezimandla zabazali nabahlali abavakalise inkxalabo yabo malunga neziphumo ezingagculisiyo zeemviwo zematriki kwiindawo abahlala kuzo. Ukongeza koku, amaziko emfundo ephakamileyo akule ngingqi angenelele ngokunikezela ngeenkqubo ezizodwa zokuxhasa abafundi bamabanga aphezulu, ukuze bakwazi ukumelana nobunzima bezifundo zaseyunivesithi xa bethe baphumelela. Le ntsebenziswano ihlangeneyo phakathi koluntu, abalawuli bezikolo, kwakunye namaziko emfundo ibonakalisa inyathelo elibalulekileyo elisingise ekuqinisekiseni ukuba wonke umfundi ufumana imfundo esemgangathweni. Ngokutsho kweengcali zophuhliso lwezemfundo, olu tshintsho lulindeleke ukuba lunyuse izinga lokuphumelela ngokubonakalayo, kwaye lunciphise umsantsa omkhulu okhoyo phakathi kwezikolo zasezidolophini ezinezixhobo ezaneleyo nezasemaphandleni ezihlelelekileyo kwiminyaka emihlanu ezayo.

Nangona izinga lokuphumelela kwabafundi bebanga leshumi elinesibini linyukile kulo nyaka uphelileyo, ukunqongophala kwezixhobo zokufunda kwizikolo zasemaphandleni kusaqhubeka nokuba ngumqobo omkhulu kwinkqubo yemfundo. Ukulungisa le meko ebuhlungu, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni kunye noosomashishini baphakamise imikhono baqala iphulo lokuxhasa amaziko emfundo ngokunikela ngeekhompyutha kwanofikelelo kwi-intanethi yasimahla. Leli phulo lilindeleke ukuba liphucule kakhulu indlela abafundi abenza ngayo uphando lwabo lwemihla ngemihla, ngakumbi kwizifundo zenzululwazi nezibalo eziyintsika yophuhliso loqoqosho lwelizwe. Ngaphaya koko, imigaqo-nkqubo emitsha yezemfundo ngoku igxininisa kwisidingo sokuba abantwana bafumane uqeqesho olukumgangatho ophezulu kwasekuqaleni, khon'ukuze bakulungele ngokupheleleyo ukungena kwiidyunivesithi. Iingcali kwezemfundo zilumkisa ngelithi, ukuba utyalo-mali kwiziseko zophuhliso lwezikolo alwenziwa ngendlela ekhawulezileyo nangokulinganayo, isizukulwana esizayo siza kusala ngasemva kweli hlabathi lilawulwa bubuchwepheshe besimanjemanje. Ngoko ke, intsebenziswano eqinileyo phakathi kwabazali, ootitshala, kunye namasebe achaphazelekayo ibonwa njengekuphela kwesisombululo esinokuzisa inguqu ebonakalayo nehlala ihleli kwikamva labafundi.

Kwisithili saseChris Hani, inani labafundi abaphumelele ibanga leshumi linyuke ngomyinge oncomekayo kulo nyaka, nto leyo ebonisa iziqhamo ezihle zenkqubo entsha yokufunda ekuhlaleni. Nangona zikho iingxaki zokunqongophala kwezixhobo zokufunda kumaphandle, ootitshala nabazali babambisene ngokuzimisela ukuqinisekisa ukuba imfundo yabantwana ayiphazamiseki konke-konke. Uninzi lwaba bafundi lulindeleke ukuba luqhubeke nezifundo zalo kumaziko emfundo ephakamileyo nakwiiyunivesithi, apho kucwangciswe ukuba kwandiswe inkxaso-mali ngenjongo yokunceda abo bavela kwiintsapho ezihlelelekileyo. Ngokutsho kweengcaphephe kwezemfundo, utyalo-mali kwiziseko zophuhliso lwezikolo, ngakumbi kwicandelo lezobuchwepheshe, luyimfuneko engxamisekileyo ukuze abafundi bafumane ulwazi oluhambelana neemfuno zemisebenzi yale mihla. Ukongeza kuloo nto, imigaqo-nkqubo emitsha yezemfundo ijolise ekuqeqesheni ootitshala ngezakhono ezikumgangatho ophezulu ukuze baphucule indlela yokufundisa ngaphakathi emagumbini okufundela. Oku kusebenza njengesiseko esiqinileyo sokudala isizukulwana esixhotyiswe ngokupheleleyo ngezakhono eziya kuphakamisa uqoqosho nophuhliso lwelizwe kwikamva elingaphambili.

Ngaphezu kwamakhulu asibhozo abafundi abavela kwizikolo ezisemaphandleni eMpuma Koloni baxhamle kwinkqubo entsha yokufunda ngobuchwepheshe kule veki iphelileyo. Oku kuza emva kokuba uphando olunzulu lubonise ukuba ulutsha oluninzi kule mimandla lusilela kakhulu kwizakhono zekhompyutha ngenxa yokunqongophala kwezixhobo zokufunda. Ukulwa le ngxaki, iiyunivesithi zasekuhlaleni zibambisene namashishini abucala ukuxhobisa la maziko emfundo ngezixhobo zeteknoloji ezikumgangatho ophezulu kunye noqhagamshelo lwe-intanethi lwasimahla. Ngokutsho kweenkokeli zoluntu, eli nyathelo alipheleli nje ekuphuculeni izinga lokuphumelela ezikolweni, kodwa livula namathuba angcono okuba abafundi bangene kumaziko emfundo ephakamileyo kwixesha elizayo. Nangona kusekho imingeni emininzi ejongene nenkqubo yezemfundo, abazali nootitshala banethemba lokuba ukwandiswa kwale nkqubo kwezinye izithili kuya kunciphisa umsantsa okhoyo phakathi kwezikolo zasezidolophini nezasemaphandleni. Ukongeza koko, kulindeleke ukuba kulo nyaka uzayo, imigaqo-nkqubo emitsha yezemfundo igxininise kuqeqesho oluthe chatha lootitshala ukuze bakwazi ukumelana neenguqu zale mihla kwindlela yokufundisa.

Kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, izikolo zasemaphandleni ezingaphaya kwamakhulu amabini zifumene izixhobo zeteknoloji zamvanje ngenjongo yokuphucula umgangatho wokufunda nokufundisa ngeli xesha lale mihla. Aba bafundi, abebesoloko beshiyeka ngasemva kwizifundo zenzululwazi, iteknoloji nezibalo ngenxa yokunqongophala kwezixhobo ezifanelekileyo, ngoku baza kukwazi ukusebenzisa iikhompyutha kunye ne-intanethi ukuze bandise ulwazi lwabo ngokubanzi. Ngokutsho kwengxelo ekhutshwe ziinkokeli zasekuhlaleni nakubazali babantwana, eli nyathelo liza kunciphisa kakhulu umsantsa okhoyo phakathi kwabantwana abafunda basesixekweni kunye nabo bafunda kwizikolo ezisemaphandleni. Ukongeza koko, iiyunivesithi zengingqi zithembise ukuxhasa le nkqubo ngokuqeqesha ootitshala ngendlela efanelekileyo yokusebenzisa ezi zixhobo ukuze kufikelelwe kwiziphumo ezincomekayo zeemviwo zematriki ekupheleni konyaka. Nangona kusekho imingeni emininzi equka ukunqongophala kombane kwezinye iilali, le nkqubo entsha yezemfundo igxininisa kakhulu ekubeni wonke umntwana unelungelo lokufumana imfundo ekumgangatho ophezulu, kungakhathaliseki ukuba uhlala kowuphi na ummandla weli lizwe.

Ngaphezulu kwamawaka amahlanu abafundi abavela kwizikolo ezisemaphandleni kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni bafumene izixhobo zeteknoloji eziquka iitafilet neekhompyutha ukukhuthaza ukufunda ngendlela yale mihla. Eli phulo liza ngexesha apho ukunqongophala kwezixhobo zokufunda kube ngumqobo omkhulu kwimpumelelo yabantwana, ngakumbi kwizifundo zeMathematika nezeNzululwazi eziyintsika yophuhliso loqoqosho. Ngokutsho kweenqununu zezikolo ezixhamleyo, olu tshintsho aluzukukhulisa kuphela izinga lokuphumelela kwiimviwo zikamatriki, kodwa luza kuvula namathuba okuba abafundi bakwazi ukufikelela kulwazi oluphangaleleyo kwi-intanethi ngaphandle kwemiqobo. Nangona iinzame zokuxhasa imfundo ziqhubeka ngokubambisana namashishini abucala, iingcali kwezemfundo zilumkisa ngelithi utyalo-mali olongezelelekileyo kuqeqesho lootitshala luseyeyona nto ibalulekileyo ukuze ezi zixhobo zisetyenziswe ngokufanelekileyo emagumbini okufundela. Ukongeza kuloo nto, imigaqo-nkqubo emitsha ijolise ekunciphiseni umsantsa okhoyo phakathi kwezikolo zasezidolophini nezasemaphandleni. Ekugqibeleni, injongo ephambili kukuqinisekisa ukuba aba bafundi baxhotyiswe ngokupheleleyo ukuze bakwazi ukumelana nobunzima bezifundo ezikwamaziko emfundo ephakamileyo kunye neemfuno zemarike yezemisebenzi kwixesha elizayo.

Kwilali yaseQumbu, ukunyuka okungaqhelekanga kwezinga lokuphumelela kwabafundi bebanga leshumi elinesibini kuvuse ithemba lokuphuculwa kweziseko zophuhliso lwezemfundo. Ngaphezu kwama-85 ekhulwini kubafundi abangamakhulu amahlanu ababebhala iimviwo zokuphela konyaka bafumene iziqinisekiso zokuya kwidyunivesithi, nangona bejongene nengxaki enzulu yokunqongophala kweencwadi zokufunda kunye neelebhu zenzululwazi. Inqununu yesikolo sasekuhlaleni ichaze le mpumelelo njengesiqhamo esihle seenkqubo zokufunda zasemva kwexesha lesikolo, eziqhutywa ngamavolontiya asekuhlaleni abazinikeleyo ekuncedeni ulutsha. Ukongeza koku, abameli bamaziko emfundo ephakamileyo sele beqalile ukunika aba bafundi bagqwesileyo ithuba lokwamkelwa kwangoko kwiiyunivesithi zelizwe, inyathelo elo elivala umsantsa omkhulu okhoyo phakathi kwemfundo esisiseko kunye neyamabanga aphakamileyo. Ukuze kugcinwe lo mfutho uncomekayo, uluntu lusebenzisana namashishini abucala ukuqalisa imigaqo-nkqubo emitsha egxile ekufundeni ngobuchwepheshe bekhompyutha kwiindawo zasemaphandleni. Le nzame ijonge ukuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umfundi ufumana amathuba alinganayo okusebenzisa izixhobo zemfundo zale mihla, nto leyo eza kunceda kakhulu ekulweni nentswela-ngqesho kwixesha elizayo.

Kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, ukunqongophala kwamanzi acocekileyo kushiye amakhulu abahlali exhomekeke kumatanki amanzi kangangeminyaka emihlanu, nto leyo ekhubaze uqoqosho lwalapho yaphazamisa neenkonzo zezempilo. Ngenjongo yokuphendula kule ngxaki iqhubekayo, kule veki iphelileyo kubhengezwe inkqubo entsha yezigidi zeerandi ejolise ekwakhiweni kwamadama amancinci kunye nophuculo lweminatha yamanzi kwingingqi yaseChris Hani. Ethetha kwingqungquthela yophuhliso lweziseko ezingundoqo izolo, uSodolophu wengingqi ugxininise ukuba le projekthi ayizukusombulula kuphela ukunqaba kwamanzi unomphelo, kodwa izakudala namathuba emisebenzi angaphezulu kwamakhulu amathathu kulutsha lwasekuhlaleni oluhleli emakhaya luphelelwe lithemba. Ngaphezulu, uluntu luyakhuthazwa ukuba luthathe inxaxheba kwiintlanganiso zewadi ezicwangciselwe iveki ezayo ukuze luvakalise izimvo zalo malunga nokwabiwa ngokulinganayo kwezixhobo zokusebenza kuwo onke amagunya asekuhlaleni. Kulindeleke ukuba ukombiwa kwemijelo yokuqala kuqale ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga ezayo, ukanti oosonkontraka bayalelwe ukuba bathenge izixhobo zabo kumashishini asakhulayo asekuhlaleni. Ukuqinisekisa ukuba yonke inkqubo ihamba ngaphandle korhwaphilizo nasekuhleni, kuzakusekwa ikomiti ezimeleyo ebandakanya iinkokeli zabahlali eza kubeka iliso elibukhali kwinkcitho-mali nakwinkqubela-phambili yalo msebenzi ubaluleke kangaka kuphuhliso loluntu.

Ngaphezu kwamashumi amathathu eepesenti zabahlali basemaphandleni kuMasipala waseMnquma basasokola ukufumana amanzi acocekileyo yonke imihla, ibe le meko ibuhlungu inyanzelise abasemagunyeni ukuba bathathe amanyathelo angxamisekileyo. Ukuze kusonjululwe le ngxaki ikhathaza uluntu, iBhunga loMasipala liphumeze uhlahlo-lwabiwo-mali olungangezigidi ezingamakhulu amabini zeerandi oluza kujoliswa ekwakhiweni kwamadama amatsha nokulungiswa kwemibhobho evuzayo kwiilali ezichaphazelekayo. Ngokutsho kukaSodolophu walo masipala, le projekthi yophuhliso kulindeleke ukuba iqale kwinyanga ezayo, kwaye iza kudala amathuba emisebenzi angaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu kulutsha lwalapho ekuhlaleni. Nangona inkqubo yotshintsho isenokuthatha ixesha ukubonakala ngokupheleleyo, abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzisane neekomiti zewadi kwaye baxele ngokukhawuleza nakuphi na ukonakaliswa kwezakhiwo zikamasipala ezenzelwe ukubanceda. Ekugqibeleni, eli phulo libonakalisa ukuzibophelela ngokupheleleyo kukarhulumente wengingqi ekuphuculeni umgangatho wobomi babantu, ngelixa kuqinisekiswa ukuba iinkonzo ezisisiseko zifikelela kuwo wonke ummi ngokulinganayo nangaphandle kocalucalulo.

Ngaphaya kwamawaka amahlanu amakhaya kwingingqi yaseMdantsane aza kufumana amanzi acocekileyo emva kweminyaka emithathu yembalela, kulandela ukugqitywa kweprojekthi entsha yemibhobho yamanzi. Ezi ndaba zivuyisayo zibhengezwe kwimbizo yoluntu ebibanjwe izolo, apho kuxoxwe nzulu khona ngezicwangciso zokuphucula ukuhanjiswa kweenkonzo ezisisiseko kweli phondo ngokubanzi. Ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa uzinzo kwesi siseko sophuhliso, ibhunga likamasipala lityale isixa-mali esizizigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu eerandi esiza kusetyenziselwa ukulungisa umonakalo, ukwandisa imithombo yamanzi, nokugcina isimo semibhobho sikumgangatho ophezulu kunyaka-mali ozayo. Nangona abahlali belwamkele ngovuyo olu tshintsho kwaye benethemba lekamva eliqaqambileyo, banxuse abasemagunyeni ukuba baqwalasele nengxaki yemingxuma ezindleleni ethe yabeka ubomi babakhweli emngciphekweni ixesha elide. Ukuze kuphunyezwe ezi njongo ngempumelelo, kucelwe intsebenziswano phakathi kwamasebe ohlukeneyo kunye neenkokeli zasekuhlaleni ukunqanda uqhankqalazo olubangela ukonakaliswa kwezakhiwo zikarhulumente, kwaye kukhuthazwe uluntu ukuba luxele nabaphi na abantu abenza izenzo zokonakalisa ezi nkonzo zibalulekileyo.

Emva kweenyanga eziliqela zokunqongophala kwamanzi kwiindawo zasemaphandleni aseMpuma Koloni, kuye kwasungulwa iphulo elitsha lokuhlaziya iziseko zophuhliso ukuze kusonjululwe le ngxaki. Le nkqubo, exabisa izigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu eerandi, ijolise ekwakheni amadama amatsha nokulungisa imibhobho esele igugile kumasipala waseChris Hani. Abahlali balapha bavakalise uvuyo lwabo ngeli nyathelo, bebalula ukuba ukufumaneka kwamanzi acocekileyo kuza kuphucula impilo yabo yemihla ngemihla kwaye kunciphise nezifo ezibangelwa ngamanzi amdaka. Ngaphandle kokuphucula isimo samanzi, lo msebenzi uvule amathuba engqesho kwabaselula abangaphangeliyo kule ngingqi, nto leyo ekhuthaza uphuhliso lwezoqoqosho ekuhlaleni. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe ngabasemagunyeni kwiveki ephelileyo, oosonkontraka sele beqalile ngomsebenzi, kwaye kulindeleke ukuba le projekthi iphothulwe phambi kokuphela kwalo nyaka. Ukongeza koko, kucelwe uluntu ukuba lusebenzisane neenkokeli zasekuhlaleni ukukhusela ezi zixhobo zintsha kubantu abonakalisa impahla yoluntu, ukuqinisekisa ukuba isizukulwana sangomso naso siyakwazi ukuxhamla kwezi nkonzo zibalulekileyo zikamasipala.

Kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, ingxaki yokunqongophala kwamanzi icinezele kakhulu uphuhliso loqoqosho nentlalo yabantu kule minyaka imbalwa idlulileyo. Ngenxa yale meko iqhubekayo, abahlali baseMakhanda banyanzeleke ukuba bakhe imigca emide kwiimpompo zikawonke-wonke imihla ngemihla, ngelixa amashishini amaninzi evale iingcango zawo. Ukulungisa lo mbandela unzima, iBhunga loMaspala wengingqi libhengeze ngokusesikweni isabelo-mali esizigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zeerandi ngenjongo yokulungisa imibhobho egugileyo nokwakha amadama amatsha okugcina amanzi. Ethetha kwindibano yasekuhlaleni ebibanjwe izolo, uSodolophu uqinisekise uluntu ukuba le projekthi yophuhliso iza kuqala ngokukhawuleza kwinyanga ezayo. Ngaphezu koko, lo msebenzi kulindeleke ukuba udale amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amabini kulutsha lwengingqi oluhleli emakhaya lungaphangeli. Nangona kusekho imingeni emininzi ejongene nalo maspala, oosomashishini kunye nabahlali banethemba elikhulu lokuba olu phuhliso lwenzekayo luza kukhuthaza uzinzo kwezoqoqosho luphinde luphucule nomgangatho wempilo kulo mmandla uphela.

Kwingingqi ekhungethwe yimbalela yaseMakhanda, abahlali bakhathazwe kukunqongophala kwamanzi isithuba esingaphezulu kweminyaka emithathu, nto leyo ekhokelele ekuweni kwezoqoqosho lwengingqi. Ukulandela uqhankqalazo lwakutsha nje olubize ukuba kubekho inguqu, kuye kwaphehlelelwa ngokusesikweni isikhululo esitsha sokucoca amanzi izolo ngenjongo yokuthomalalisa le ngxaki. Le projekthi exhabisa izigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu eerandi kulindeleke ukuba idale amathuba emisebenzi asisigxina kwaye inikezele ngamanzi acocekileyo kumakhaya angaphezu kwamawaka alishumi. Ethetha kule ndawo yokwakha, usodolophu ugxininise ukuba umasipala uzibophelele ekuphuculeni iziseko zophuhliso ezigugileyo, waza wabongoza uluntu ukuba luxele ukuvuza kwemibhobho kwangethuba ukuze kuthintelwe inkcitho. Ngaphaya koko, izicwangciso zokuqinisekisa ukuba le nkqubo ihamba ngokukhawuleza ziquka ukuqeshwa kweekontraka zasekuhlaleni eziza kuxhasa lo msebenzi omkhulu. Ulwakhiwo luza kuqalisa kwinyanga ezayo, nto leyo ephawula inyathelo elibalulekileyo elisingise kunikezelo lweenkonzo oluzinzileyo kwesi sithili kwaye libuyisela ithemba kubemi abebelahlekelwe yithemba kwiinkonzo zikamasipala jikelele.

Ngaphezulu kwamawaka amahlanu amakhaya asengozini yokuphulukana namanzi acocekileyo ngenxa yokuguga kwemibhobho kunye nokunqongophala konyamekelo lweziseko zophuhliso kwisixeko saseGqeberha. Ukulwa le ngxaki ixhaphakileyo, iBhunga loMasipala libhengeze isabelo-mali esingxamisekileyo sezigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zeerandi ngenjongo yokuphucula uthungelwano lwamanzi phambi kokuba kufike ixesha lasehlotyeni elidla ngokuba nembalela. Ngexesha lentlanganiso evulelekileyo ebibanjelwe kwiholo loluntu kule veki iphelileyo, uSodolophu uye wacela abahlali ukuba basebenzise amanzi ngenkathalo ngeli xesha kusenziwa olu lungelelwaniso. Lo msebenzi mtsha kulindeleke ukuba udale amathuba emisebenzi axabisekileyo kwabaselula abangaphangeliyo abahlala kule ngingqi, njengoko imigaqo-nkqubo emitsha inyanzelisa iikontraka ukuba ziqeshe abantu balapha kuqala. Nangona eli linyathelo elihle, abasemagunyeni balumkise ngokungqongqo ukuba kuza kubakho ukuphazamiseka kobonelelo ngeenkonzo kwiindawo ezithile de kube kugqitywe olu lwakhiwo ngempumelelo ekupheleni kukaNovemba. Ukanti, uluntu luyacetyiswa ukuba lugcine amanzi kwizikhongozeli ezikhuselekileyo kwaye luxele nakuphi na ukuvuza kwemibhobho kwiziko loncedo likamasipala ukuze kuthintelwe inkcitho yalo mthombo unqabileyo.

Emva kweemvula ezinamandla ezitshabalalise iziseko zophuhliso kwiiveki ezimbalwa ezidlulileyo, iindawo ezininzi kuMasipala waseBuffalo City ziqalise ukubona imisebenzi yokulungisa iindlela namabhuloho. Ngaphezulu kwezigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu eerandi zabelwe le projekthi ngokukhawuleza, ngenjongo yokubuyisela isidima neenkonzo eluntwini. Ukuqhawuka kombane kunye nokunqongophala kwamanzi acocekileyo ibiyingxaki enkulu ekhathaza amashishini asakhasayo kwakunye nabahlali bemihla ngemihla. Ethetha kwingqungquthela yabahlali izolo, uSodolophu uqinisekisile ukuba oosomashishini basekuhlaleni baza kunikwa ithuba lokuqala ekufumaneni iikontraki zokwakha ukuze kuvuselelwe uqoqosho lwaselokishini. Eli phulo kulindeleke ukuba lidale amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amane kulutsha oluhleli emakhaya, ngeli lixa abasemagunyeni bebongoza abahlali ukuba basebenzisane neekomiti zewadi ukukhusela ezi zixhobo zingaphinde zonakaliswe okanye zibiwe. Ukongeza, kusekwe inkqubo entsha yokubeka esweni inkqubela-phambili yale misebenzi, apho iingxelo ziya kupapashwa qho ngenyanga ukuqinisekisa ukuba imali yerhafu isetyenziswa ngokufanelekileyo nangokungafihlisiyo.

Kwisigqibo esilindeleke ukuba sizise isiqabu esikhulu kubahlali baseBuffalo City, inkqubo entsha yokulungisa imibhobho yamanzi iqaliswe ngokusemthethweni emva kweenyanga zokukhalaza koluntu malunga nokunqongophala kweenkonzo. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe yikomiti ejongene nezibonelelo zoluntu kwiveki ephelileyo, le projekthi ixabisa izigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zeerandi kwaye ijolise ekupheliseni ukuvuza kwamanzi okudle isixeko ngaphezulu kweshumi ekhulwini kuvimba waso wamanzi kulo nyaka uphelileyo. Ukulungiselela lo msebenzi omkhulu, abaphathi bakamasipala bayalele ukuba kumiswe okwethutyana ukuhanjiswa kwamanzi kwezinye iilokishi ngezimpelaveki ukuze oosonkontraka bafumane ithuba lokufakela izixhobo ezitsha ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka. Nangona abanye abahlali bevakalise inkxalabo malunga nokuvalwa kwamanzi gqo, imibutho yasekuhlaleni ibongoze uluntu ukuba lusebenzisane nabasemagunyeni kuba olu tshintsho luza kuqinisekisa unikezelo lweenkonzo oluzinzileyo kwixesha elizayo. Kulindeleke ukuba isigaba sokuqala solu hlaziyo lweziseko ezingundoqo sigqitywe phambi kokuphela kukaDisemba, nto leyo eza kuvula amathuba emisebenzi asisigxina nexeshana kwabo basakhulayo kule ngingqi.

Phantse amakhaya angamawaka amathathu kwilali zaseMonti aza kufumana amanzi acocekileyo okokuqala ngqa kulandela ukusungulwa kweprojekthi entsha yeziseko zophuhliso lwangaphakathi. Kumsitho obubanjwe kule veki iphelileyo, uMphathiswa wezaManzi noGutyulo uye wacacisa ukuba le nkqubo ixabisa izigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zeerandi kwaye iza kugqitywa phambi kokuphela kwalo nyaka mali. Ukongeza koku, urhulumente wengingqi ubongoze uluntu ukuba lusebenzisane ngokupheleleyo neekontraka eziza kube zisenza lo msebenzi ukuze kuthintelwe nakuphi na ukulibaziseka okunokubangela ukuba iindleko zinyuke. Ngaphandle kokuphucula isimo sempilo kunye nococeko kwesi sithili, eli phulo elikhulu kulindeleke ukuba lidale amathuba emisebenzi asisigxina nexeshana angaphezu kwamakhulu amabini kulutsha lwendawo olungaphangeliyo. Ukulwa nentswela-ngqesho kuhlala kuyeyona njongo iphambili kurhulumente, yiyo loo nto kuqinisekiswe ukuba abahlali bendawo baza kuqashwa kuqala. Iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zikwamkele ngovuyo oku kungenelela, zigxininisa ukuba ukufikelela kwinkonzo zamanzi asiyonto yobunewunewu kodwa lilungelo loluntu elisisiseko ekufuneka lihlonitshiwe ngamaxesha onke ngokomgaqo-siseko welizwe.

Ngaphezulu kwama-40 ekhulwini abahlali bakwingingqi yaseMpuma baphile ngaphandle kwamanzi acocekileyo nathembekileyo iminyaka emithathu iyonke, okuyimeko ebangele ukuba kubekho uqhanqalazo oluqhubekayo kwiinyanga ezimbalwa ezigqithileyo. Ukuphendula kolu qhankqalazo kunye nokujongana nale mbandezelo ixakileyo, kuye kwabhengezwa isicwangciso esitsha sophuhliso lweziseko ezingundoqo esixabisa izigidi ezingamakhulu amahlanu zeerandi ngenjongo yokulungisa imibhobho evuzayo nokwakha amadama amatsha. Lo msebenzi awuphelelanga nje ekubuyiseleni isidima soluntu, kodwa uvula amathuba engqesho angaphezu kwamawaka amabini kulutsha lwalapho ekuhlaleni oluhleli phantsi ngenxa yokunqongophala kwemisebenzi. Ngokutsho kweenkokheli zasekuhlaleni, eli nyathelo liza kuzisa isiqabu esikhulu, nangona bebanxusa abasemagunyeni ukuba baqinisekise ukuba iimali ezabelwe le projekthi zisetyenziswa ngobunono nangokungafihlisiyo ukuqabela urhwaphilizo. Kulindeleke ukuba isigaba sokuqala solu lwakhiwo siqale kwinyanga ezayo, kwaye abahlali bayacelwa ukuba basebenzisane neekomiti zewadi ukuze kubekho unxibelelwano olululo kulo lonke eli xesha lotshintsho kwinkqubo yezolawulo lweenkonzo zikamasipala.

Emva kweminyaka emithathu yokunqongophala kwamanzi okumandundu okuchaphazele abahlali abangaphezu kwamashumi amahlanu amawaka kwisithili sasempuma, isimo siza kutshintsha nanjengoko kuqaliswe iprojekthi entsha yeziseko zophuhliso. Le nkqubo ixabisa izigidi ezingamashumi asibhozo eerandi ijolise ekwakheni amadama amatsha kunye nokufakela imibhobho yale mihla ukuze kusonjululwe ingxaki yogutyulo namanzi acocekileyo. Ekuthetheni kwakhe ngethuba kusungulwa lo msebenzi izolo, usodolophu wengingqi uqinisekise uluntu ukuba oosonkontraka sele beqalile ukusebenza kwaye kulindeleke ukuba bagqibe kwiinyanga ezilishumi elinesibhozo ezizayo. Ngaphezu kokuphucula unikezelo lweenkonzo ezisisiseko, eli phulo liza kudala amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amabini kulutsha lwasekuhlaleni, nto leyo eza kunciphisa izinga lentswela-ngqesho elixhalabisayo kule ngingqi. Ukongeza koko, amashishini amancinci aza kuxhamla ngokunikezela ngezixhobo zokwakha kule projekthi ixhaswa ngemali yirhafu. Ekugqibeleni, abahlali bayacelwa ukuba basebenzisane nabasemagunyeni, babe nomonde, kwaye banikezele ingxelo ngayo nayiphi na imingeni okanye ukuphazamiseka kweendlela abajongana nako ngelixa kusenziwa olu lwakhiwo lubaluleke kangaka kuluntu ngokubanzi.

Kwingxelo ekhutshwe kule veki, phantse isiqingatha sabahlali baseGqeberha basokola ukufumana amanzi acocekileyo ngenxa yembalela ekudala iqhubeka. Ukulungisa le meko imandundu, uMasipala weSithili saseNelson Mandela ubhengeze isicwangciso esitsha sokwakha amadama amancinci kunye nokulungisa imibhobho evuzayo kwiindawo ezichaphazeleke kakhulu. Abahlali, abakade bekhalaza ngenkonzo ebuthathaka, balwamkele olu tshintsho kodwa bacela ukuba kubekho ukungafihli kwindlela eza kusetyenziswa ngayo imali yoluntu kule projekthi. Ngokutsho kwesithethi sedolophu, ukwakhiwa kwezi zakhiwo kulindeleke ukuba kuqale kwinyanga ezayo, kwaye eli phulo liya kudala amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amabini kulutsha lwengingqi. Nangona oku kuyinkqubela phambili ebonakalayo, amagosa asekuhlaleni abongoza uluntu ukuba luqhubeke longa amanzi njengoko imithetho yokuthintela inkcitho inyanzelisiwe kwaye isamile de kube kubekho isisombululo esisisigxina. Iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zithembise ukubamba iintlanganiso rhoqo ngenjongo yokwazisa uluntu ngenkqubela yalo msebenzi.

Ngaphezulu kwamawaka amahlanu amakhaya kwimimandla yasemaphandleni eMpuma Koloni kudala ephila ngaphandle kwamanzi acocekileyo, kodwa le meko isemngciphekweni wokutshintsha ngokukhawuleza. Ukusombulula le ngxaki ixakileyo ibikade isithunzi kwisidima soluntu, kutyalwe izigidi ezingamashumi amathathu eerandi kwiprojekthi entsha yophuhliso lweziseko ezingundoqo zikamasipala eza kuqala kule nyanga izayo. Abahlali bale ngingqi, abebesoloko besenza imingcelele kwimpompo enye ekude iminyaka emininzi, bavakalise imivuyo yabo emva kokuva ezi ndaba zimnandi kwiintlanganiso zewadi ebezibanjwe kule veki iphelileyo. Ekuthetheni kwakhe nentatheli emva kwendibano yasekuhlaleni, uSodolophu walo masipala uthembise ukuba oosonkontraka sele beqeshiwe kwaye baza kuqinisekisa ukuba imibhobho emitsha ifakelwa phambi kokuphela konyaka, nto leyo eza kudala namathuba emisebenzi alikhulu kwabaselula. Eli phulo liyingxenye yenkqubo ebanzi karhulumente wephondo ejolise ekulweni nentswela-ngqesho kwakunye nokuphucula unikezelo lweenkonzo ezisisiseko kuluntu lonke, ngakumbi kwiindawo ebezikade zihlelelekile nezishiywe ngasemva kuphuhliso loqoqosho.

Emva kweminyaka emininzi yokulwa nengxaki yemigwaqo engahambekiyo, abahlali baseMdantsane bafumene isiqabu kulandela isibhengezo esiyingqophamlando sokulungiswa kweziseko zophuhliso. Uqikelelo luhamba kwimali engangezigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zeerandi etyalwe ngokusesikweni kule projekthi inkulu eza kuqala kwinyanga ezayo. Ethetha kwindibano yoluntu izolo, uSodolophu weMasipala oMbaxa waseBuffalo City ubongoze abahlali ukuba basebenzisane neekontraka eziqeshiweyo ukuze umsebenzi uhambe ngaphandle kwemikrwelo okanye ulibaziseko. Lo mnyhadala wolwakhiwo awuzukuphelela nje ekuphuculeni ukuhamba kwezithuthi zikawonke-wonke, kodwa kulindeleke ukuba uvule amathuba engqesho angaphezulu kwamakhulu amabini kulutsha lwalapho ekuhlaleni. Ngaphezu koko, isicwangciso-qhinga sikamasipala sigxininisa ekuqinisekiseni ukuba iinkampani ezincinci zendawo zifumana isabelo kwiithenda zokubonelela ngezixhobo zokwakha, njengenxalenye yomgaqo-nkqubo wokuxhobisa uqoqosho lwabamnyama. Ngenxa yeli nyathelo, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zinethemba lokuba ukuhanjiswa kweenkonzo zikamasipala ezingundoqo kuya kukhawuleziswa ngokubonakalayo. Loo nto iyakuthi iphakamise umgangatho wokuphila kulo mmandla uphela kwaye ivuselele uqoqosho lwaselokishini oludodobele ngenxa yokunqongophala kweziseko zophuhliso ezikumgangatho okhuselekileyo.

Kwilinge lokulwa nengxaki yokunqongophala kwezindlu kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, abahlali baseGqeberha bamkele ngezandla zozibini isibhengezo sokwakhiwa kwezindlu ezingamawaka amahlanu ezixhaswa ngurhulumente. Esi siseko sophuhliso silindeleke ukuba siqale kwinyanga ezayo, kwaye siza kudala amathuba emisebenzi asisigxina nethutyana kubantu abatsha balapha. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe ngusonodolophu walo masipala, inkqubo yokwaba ezi zindlu iza kulandela umgaqo ongqongqo oqinisekisa ukuba abantu abakhubazekileyo kunye nabantu abadala bafumana ingqwalasela yokuqala. Nangona kunjalo, iinkokheli zasekuhlaleni zihlabe ikhwelo lokuba kubekho ukungafihli mikhondo kwindlela ekusetyenziswa ngayo inkunzi mali ebekelwe le projekthi, ngenjongo yokuthintela urhwaphilizo. Ngaphezu koko, amagosa kamasipala abhengeze ukuba kuza kubanjwa iintlanganiso zoluntu kwiiwadi ezahlukeneyo kule veki izayo, ukuze kunikwe abahlali ithuba lokuvakalisa izimvo zabo nokubuza imibuzo malunga nalo msebenzi. Oku kulindeleke ukuba kuphelise uqhanqalazo obelugquba kule ngingqi kwiinyanga ezimbalwa ezigqithileyo, kwaye kubuyise ithemba kuluntu ebelilinde le nkqubo iminyaka emininzi.

Emva kweenyanga ezininzi zokunqongophala kwamanzi okumandundu okuye kwakhubaza amashishini amaninzi, abahlali baseGqeberha banikwe ithemba elitsha malunga nokufumana izisombululo ezizinzileyo. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe kule veki ngusodolophu walo masipala, isixa-mali esizibhiliyoni ezimbini zeerandi sizakusetyenziselwa ukulungisa imibhobho egugileyo kunye nokwakha amadama amatsha okugcina amanzi kwiindawo ezisemaphandleni. Le nkqubo yophuhliso ikwabandakanya ukufakelwa kweetanki zamanzi ezinkulu kwizikolo ezingamashumi asixhenxe anesihlanu nakwiikliniki ezikwingingqi leyo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba iinkonzo zoluntu aziphazamiseki. Nangona uninzi loluntu luyamkela ngovuyo le nkqubela kwaye lulindele utshintsho, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni kunye nemibutho elwela amalungelo abantu ibongoze amagosa akwaRhulumente ukuba enze lo msebenzi ngokungafihlisiyo nangokukhawuleza okukhulu. Ukongeza kuloo nto, urhulumente wephondo uthembise ukuba uzakudala amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amahlanu kulutsha lwendawo ngexesha kusakhiwa ezi zakhiwo. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba yonke le projekthi ihamba ngendlela eyiyo, kuzakusekwa iintlanganiso zovavanyo rhoqo ngenyanga apho abemi bazakufumana ithuba lokunika izimvo zabo ngentsebenzo yomasipala.

Ngaphezu kwamakhaya angama-5 000 kwiilali zaseMqanduli abesokola kukungabikho kwamanzi acocekileyo okusela kwishumi leminyaka edlulileyo. Ukuphendula kule ngxaki ixhomise amehlo, usodolophu walo masipala ubhengeze isabelo-mali sezigidi ezingama-R45 esiza kusetyenziswa ekwakhiweni kwamadama amatsha nokulungiswa kwemibhobho egugileyo. Lo msebenzi mkhulu, kulindeleke ukuba uqale kwinyanga ezayo, uza kudala amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu amabini kulutsha lwengingqi, ngaxeshanye uphucula isimo sempilo yoluntu. Ekuthetheni kwakhe namalungu oluntu kwiholo yedolophu izolo, uceba wewadi ubalaselise ukubaluleka kwentsebenziswano phakathi kwabahlali neenkokeli zengingqi ukuqinisekisa ukuba inkqubo ihamba ngaphandle kweziphazamiso. Nangona abahlali bebonise uchulumanco ngeli phulo, kukho isibongozo esingqongqo sokuba oosonkontraka abaqeshwe ngurhulumente bawugqibe lo msebenzi ngexesha elimiselweyo ukunqanda inkcitho-mali engeyomfuneko. Eli nyathelo liyinxalenye yesicwangciso esibanzi sophuhliso lwamaphandle esijolise ekupheliseni ukungalingani kunikezelo lweenkonzo ezisisiseko kulo lonke elo phondo.

Emva kweminyaka emihlanu yokunqongophala kwamanzi okushiya amakhaya angamawaka esengxakini enzima, abahlali baseGqeberha kunye neendawo eziyingqongileyo baza kufumana isiqabu esikhulu kule nyanga izayo. Lo mbono uza kufezekiswa ngenxa yeprojekthi entsha ebhengezwe namhlanje yokulungisa imibhobho edala, exhaswe ngemali engangezigidi ezingamakhulu amabini eerandi evela kwingxowa-mali yophuhliso lweziseko ezingundoqo. Ngokutsho kwesithethi sikamasipala, le nkqubo ayijolisanga kuphela ekuqinisekiseni ukuba amanzi acocekileyo afikelela kubo bonke abantu ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka, kodwa izakudala namathuba emisebenzi asisigxina nethutyana angamakhulu amathathu kulutsha lwengingqi oluhleli emakhaya. Nangona imisebenzi yokwakha inokubangela ukuphazamiseka okwethutyana kuhambo lwezithuthi kwizitalato ezithile ezixakekileyo, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zibongoze uluntu ukuba lube nomonde njengoko ezi nkonzo zisisiseko esibalulekileyo kuphuhliso lwezoqoqosho lwedolophu. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe uwonke-wonke ngokuqhubekayo ngale nkqubo, iintlanganiso zokwazisa uluntu ziza kubanjwa kwiiholo zoluntu kwiveki ezayo, apho kuza kuxoxwa ngemigaqo-nkqubo emitsha yokonga amanzi kunye nendlela abahlali abanokuthatha ngayo inxaxheba ebonakalayo kolu tshintsho lwembali ukukhusela ikamva lezizukulwana ezizayo.

Emva kweminyaka emithathu yembalela enzima echaphazele amakhaya angaphezu kwamashumi amahlanu amawaka kwingingqi yaseGqeberha, imeko yonikezelo lwamanzi iza kutshintsha ngokupheleleyo. Umasipala weMbaxa uqalise ngokusesikweni iphulo elikhulu lokuphucula iziseko zophuhliso, eliza kugxila ekutshintshweni kwemibhobho emidala esele igugile.
