Le nkqubo ixabisa izigidi ezingamakhulu amabini eerandi ayiphelelanga nje ekulungiseni ingxaki yamanzi, kodwa ilindeleke ukuba ivule amathuba emisebenzi angamakhulu asibhozo kulutsha lwasekuhlaleni oluhleli ngaphandle kwengqesho. Ethetha kumsitho wokusungulwa kwale projekthi ngale ntsasa, usodolophu uye wacela abahlali ukuba babe nomonde ngelixa kusenziwa olu lwakhiwo, eqaqambisa ukuba uphazamiseko lwethutyana luza kuzisa isisombululo esisigxina nesizinzileyo. Ngaphezu koko, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zikhuthaza uluntu ukuba lusebenzisane neekontraka kwaye lubike nakuphi na ukuvuza kwamanzi kumagosa afanelekileyo, ukuze kuthintelwe inkcitho ngeli xesha lovuselelo. Ukugqitywa kwalo msebenzi ekupheleni konyaka ozayo kuza kuqinisekisa ukuba onke amashishini nezindlu zifumana iinkonzo ezisemgangathweni ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka.

Ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amathathu abahlali baseMdantsane baphume ngobuninzi babo kule mpelaveki idlulileyo ngenjongo yokucoca umlambo obugcwele inkunkuma obubeka impilo yoluntu esichengeni. Eli phulo, elikhokelwa lulutsha lwalapha ekuhlaleni, liza ngethuba apho izifo ezibangelwa ngamanzi amdaka zixhaphakile kule ngingqi, nto leyo enyanzelise ukuba kuthathwe amanyathelo angxamisekileyo ukusindisa imeko. Ukulandela lo msebenzi mkhulu kangaka, onosomashishini balapha baye banikela ngezixhobo zokusebenza kwakunye neengxowa zokufaka inkunkuma ukuqinisekisa ukuba le nkqubo iqhubeka ngempumelelo ngaphandle kwemiqobo. Ethetha egameni labaququzeleli, uMnu. Sipho Dlamini uvakalise uvuyo lwakhe ngale ntsebenziswano inika ithemba, waze wacela ukuba abantu bayeke ukulahla inkunkuma emlanjeni nakwiindawo ezingagunyaziswanga kuba oko konakalisa indalo. Ukongeza kuloo mbono, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zihlabe ikhwelo kuMasipala waseBuffalo City ukuba aqinise inkqubo yakhe yokuqokelela inkunkuma veki nganye, ukuze kuthintelwe ukuphinda kuvele le ngxaki kwixesha elizayo kwaye kugcinwe okusingqongileyo kukhuselekile kwizizukulwana ezizayo.

Emva kweemvula ezinamandla ezihlasele ummandla waseGqeberha kule mpelaveki idlulileyo, amakhulu eentsapho ashiywe engenamakhaya kwaye iziseko zophuhliso zonakele kakhulu. Amalungu oluntu kunye nosomashishini balapha ekuhlaleni bakhawuleze badibanisa imikhosi ukuze banikezele ngoncedo olungxamisekileyo olufana nokutya, iingubo kunye neendawo zokufihla intloko. Ngokwengxelo yokuqala ekhutshwe ziinkokeli zasekuhlaleni, kuqikelelwa ukuba angaphezulu kwamakhulu amathathu amakhaya atshabalele ngokupheleleyo, nto leyo edale unxunguphalo olukhulu kubahlali. Ethetha egameni labahlali abachaphazelekayo, uMnu. Sipho Dlamini uvakalise inkxalabo enzulu ngemeko yezempilo, ecela ukuba kuthunyelwe oochwepheshe bezonyango ngokukhawuleza ngelixa kulindwe ukuba amanzi athothe. Nangona imizamo yokuhlangula iqhubeka, imeko yeendlela ezininzi ezingenakuhambeka yenza kube nzima ukufikelela kwiindawo ezisemagqagaleni ukuhambisa izixhobo zokunceda. Le ntlekele yenzeka ngexesha apho lo masipala sele ejongene nemingeni emininzi yokuhanjiswa kweenkonzo, kwaye ibeka uxinzelelo olongezelelekileyo kwinkqubo yokuvuselela uqoqosho lwengingqi olusanda kuqalisa.

Emva kweemvula ezinamandla ezihlasele ummandla waseMpuma Koloni kwiveki ephelileyo, abahlali baseZwelitsha bathathe amanyathelo angxamisekileyo okucoca umlambo iBuffalo ozele yinkunkuma namaphepha. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe ziinkokeli zasekuhlaleni, ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amabini amavolontiya athathe inxaxheba kweli phulo elikhulu ngenjongo yokulwa ukwanda kwezifo eziyingozi ezibangelwa ngamanzi amdaka, ezifana nekholera norhudo. Le meko ibingagcini nje ngokubeka emngciphekweni impilo yabantwana abasoloko bedlala kufuphi nalo mlambo, kodwa ibichaphazela kakhulu nemfuyo exhomekeke kula manzi ukuze iphile. Ukusabela kulo mbono mhle uboniswe ngabahlali ngenkuthalo, oosomashishini balapha ekuhlaleni nabameli bemibutho engekho phantsi korhulumente bathembise ngoxhaso oluqhubekayo lwezixhobo zokucoca, ukwenzela ukuba lo msebenzi wokuphucula indalo uqhubeke rhoqo ngenyanga. Ukongeza koko, isithethi sekomiti yelali sikhuthaze kwaye sacela uluntu ngokubanzi ukuba luyeke umkhwa oyingozi wokulahla inkunkuma ngokungekho mthethweni ezindleleni nasemilanjeni. Eli phulo kulindeleke ukuba livuse umdla nakwezinye iilali ezingabamelwane ukuba nazo zithabathe inxaxheba ekukhuseleni imeko-bume yazo, ukuze kugcinwe indalo icocekile kwaye kukhuselwe ikamva eliqaqambileyo lezizukulwana ezizayo.

Kwilali yaseQunu, abahlali abangaphaya kwamawaka amabini bafumene isiqabu esikhulu emva kweminyaka emihlanu bekha amanzi amdaka emilanjeni. Oku kulandela ukugqitywa kweprojekthi entsha yempompo yamanzi ekhokelwe yinkokeli yasekuhlaleni, uMnu. Sipho Dlamini, ngokubambisana noMasipala weSithili sase-OR Tambo. Ngenxa yembalela eqhubekayo kule ngingqi, imfuyo ibitshabalala kwaye abantwana besikolo bebesoloko bephethwe zizifo ezibangelwa ngamanzi angakhuselekanga. Ethetha kumsitho wokuvula ngokusesikweni le mibhobho mitsha izolo, uMnu. Dlamini ubalaselise ukubaluleka kokugcinwa kwezi zakhiwo zikwimeko entle, ebabongoza abemi ukuba balumkele izenzo zokonakalisa nokubiwa kwezixhobo zombane. Ukongeza koko, iikomiti zasekuhlaleni ziza kuqeqeshwa ukulungisa iingxaki ezincinci ezinokuvela kwezi mpompo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba ukuhanjiswa kwamanzi akusayi kuphinde kunqamke. Ukufumaneka kwala manzi acocekileyo kulindeleke ukuba kuphucule impilo yoluntu ngokubanzi, kukhuthaze nezolimo olusafunukuhla ukuze kuliwe nendlala kula maphandle.

Imvula enamandla eqhubeke iintsuku ezininzi kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni ishiye intshabalalo enkulu kwiziseko zophuhliso nakumakhaya abantu abaninzi. Ngaphezulu kweentsapho ezingamakhulu amahlanu ziswele indawo yokuhlala emva kokuba amatyotyombe nezindlu zazo zikhukuliswe ngamanzi, ngakumbi kwingingqi yaseGqeberha naseMonti. Abahlali balapha bavakalise ukukhathazeka okukhulu ngomonakalo weendlela ezininzi, nto leyo ephazamise kakhulu ukuhamba kwabantwana besiya ezikolweni kwanokufikelela kwiikliniki zempilo. Ukuze kusonjululwe le ngxaki, amaqela olawulo lweentlekele asebenza ubusuku nemini esiza amaxhoba ngokunika ukutya, iingubo, kunye neendawo zokufihla intloko zethutyana kwiiholo zoluntu. Ngaphezu koko, inkqubo yokubhalisa abo balahlekelwe ngamaxwebhu abo isiya phambili ukuqinisekisa ukuba bafumana uncedo ngokukhawuleza. Ngenxa yale meko ibuhlungu, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zihlabe ikhwelo zicela oosomashishini nabantu abanemfesane ukuba bafake isandla ekwakhiweni ngokutsha kwezi ndawo zichaphazelekileyo. Iingcali zemozulu zilumkise uluntu ukuba luhlale luqaphile, njengoko kuqikelelwa ukuba kuza kuna ezinye iimvula ezinkulu kule mpelaveki izayo.

Kwisithuba seeveki ezimbini ezidlulileyo, ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amathathu abahlali baseKhayelitsha bathe baphuma ngobuninzi babo ukuya kucoca imilambo kunye nemijelo ehamba amanzi amdaka, emva kwezikhalo ezininzi ngongcoliseko lwendalo. Eli phulo lokulwa nokulahlwa kwenkunkuma ngokungekho mthethweni liza ngexesha apho izifo ezibangelwa ngamanzi angacocekanga zixhaphakile kule ngingqi. Ethetha egameni lekomiti yengingqi, uMnu. Sipho Dlamini ubalule ukuba intsebenziswano phakathi koluntu namashishini asekuhlaleni ibe yintsika yempumelelo yalo msebenzi. Ukongeza kulo mbono, abasemagunyeni basekuhlaleni bathembise ukubonelela ngeetoti zenkunkuma ezongezelelweyo kwakunye neenqwelo eziza kuthutha inkunkuma kabini ngeveki ukuze kugcinwe lo mgangatho wococeko. Nangona kusekho imingeni emininzi ejongene nophuhliso lweziseko ezingundoqo, eli nyathelo libonisa ngokucacileyo amandla omanyano ekuziseni iinguqu ezibonakalayo kwiimeko zentlalo. Kulindeleke ukuba ezinye iilali ezikufutshane zithathe lo mzekelo, njengoko iinkokeli zemveli zikhuthaza wonke ummi ukuba athathe uxanduva lokukhathalela indawo ahlala kuyo ukuqinisekisa ikamva eliqaqambileyo lezizukulwana ezizayo.

Kwiveki ephelileyo, abahlali baseZwide, eGqeberha, baphume ngobuninzi babo ukuya kuzibonela ukuvulwa ngokusesikweni kwedama elitsha lamanzi elilindeleke ukuba liphelise ingxaki yokunqongophala kwamanzi kule ngingqi. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe yinkampani yezamanzi, bangaphezulu kwamawaka amathathu amakhaya abesokola iminyaka emihlanu ngenxa yombhobho omkhulu owawugqabhukile. Esi siganeko sizise isiqabu esikhulu kuluntu, njengoko abashishinayo nabafundi bezikolo zasekuhlaleni bebesoloko bephazamiseka kwimisebenzi yabo yemihla ngemihla ngenxa yokunqamka kwale nkonzo. Ethetha kulo msitho, uSodolophu walo masipala uye wacela uluntu ukuba lusebenzisane nabezokhuseleko ukugada ezi zakhiwo zingatshatyalaliswa zizigebenga eziba iintsimbi. Ukongeza kuloo nto, kulindeleke ukuba kule nyanga izayo kuqalise iphulo lokuqesha ulutsha lwalapha ekuhlaleni ukuze lulungise eminye imibhobho evuzayo ezitratweni. Ngenxa yeli nyathelo, ithemba libuyile kubahlali lokuba iinkonzo ezisisiseko ziya kuqhubeka zinikezelwa ngendlela eyiyo nangexesha elifanelekileyo.

Ngaphezulu kwamakhaya angamakhulu asibhozo kwingingqi yaseDutywa afumene isiqabu esikhulu emva kokuba kugqityiwe ukulungiswa kwemibhobho yamanzi ebidala ingxaki kule minyaka mibini idlulileyo. Ethetha egameni labahlali balapho, uNkosikazi Nomsa Mthembu uvakalise uvuyo lwakhe olukhulu, esithi eli nyathelo liza kuphelisa uhambo lweekhilomitha ezininzi abebeluqamba yonke imihla phantsi kwelanga elishushu besiya kukha amanzi emilanjeni nasemadanyini. Esi simo sokunqongophala kwamanzi nokonakala kweziseko zophuhliso besibeke ubomi babantu emngciphekweni omkhulu wezifo ezosulelayo ezinje ngekholera, kwaye siphazamise kakhulu namashishini asakhulayo asekuhlaleni abexhomekeke kulo mthombo. Ngokuphathelele kulo mbandela wokhuseleko, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zibambisene noosomashishini abazimeleyo ziqalise iphulo elibanzi lokufundisa uluntu ngendlela yokonga la manzi amatsha nokugcina izixhobo zococeko zikwimeko entle ukuze zihlale ixesha elide. Nangona kusekho imingeni emininzi ejongene nezinye iilali kwimimandla engqonge le dolophu, eli linge libonisa iziqhamo ezihle zentsebenziswano phakathi kwabahlali, iinkokeli zemveli, nabathabathi-nxaxheba abohlukeneyo ekusombululeni iingxaki zoluntu ngaphandle kokulindela uncedo oluvela ngaphandle kuphela.

Kwilali yaseQumbu, ingxaki yokunqongophala kwamanzi ishiye abahlali abangaphezu kwamawaka amathathu bexhomekeke kwimpompo enye kwiinyanga ezintandathu ezigqithileyo. Emva kwezikhalazo ezininzi, iinkokeli zalapha ekuhlaleni ziye zabamba intlanganiso izolo ngenjongo yokujongana nalo mba wokonakala kweziseko zophuhliso. Malunga namashumi asibhozo ekhulwini emibhobho eyakhiwa ekuqaleni kweminyaka yoo-1990 ngoku iyavuza, nto leyo ebangela ilahleko enkulu yamanzi yonke imihla. Enye intshatsheli yasekuhlaleni igxininise kwelokuba le meko ibeka impilo yoluntu emngciphekweni, ingakumbi kubantwana abancinci kunye nabantu abadala. Ukuzama ukuthomalalisa le ngxaki, oosonkontraka balindeleke ukuba bafike kwiveki ezayo ukuze baqalise ulungiso olungxamisekileyo kwaye bafakele namatanki amanzi ethutyana. Ngeli xesha kulindelwe ezo nguqu, abahlali bayacelwa ukuba bawasebenzise ngononophelo la manzi akhoyo de uMasipala akwazi ukubuyisela unikezelo lwamanzi ngokupheleleyo.

Kwiiveki ezimbalwa ezidlulileyo, imvula enamandla ethe yaqhwithela kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni ishiye amakhulu abahlali bengenamakhaya emva kokuba izikhukhula zitshabalalise izindlu zabo nezolimo. Ngaphezulu kwamashumi amahlanu eentsapho kwilali yaseCentane zinyanzeleke ukuba zifune indawo yokhuseleko kumaholo oluntu nasezikolweni ezikufutshane, apho zilala khona phantsi kweemeko ezinzima kakhulu. Ethetha nentatheli emva kwesi sehlo, inkosi yalapho ivakalise inkxalabo enzulu ngomonakalo owenzekileyo kwaye yacela uncedo olungxamisekileyo olufana nokutya, iingubo kunye nempahla yokunxiba. Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukhuseleko lwabo bathwaxwe yile ntlekele imandla, imibutho engekho phantsi korhulumente kunye namavolontiya asekuhlaleni basebenzisana ngokuzimisela ukuhambisa amanzi acocekileyo kunye namayeza kubantu abachaphazelekileyo. Ukongeza koku, iingcali zemozulu zilumkise uluntu ukuba luhlale luqaphile njengoko kulindeleke ezinye iimvula kwiintsuku ezizayo. Nangona imeko isemaxongo kwaye uloyiko lusaqhubeka, kukho ithemba lokuba ukwakhiwa ngokutsha kweziseko zophuhliso, ezifana neendlela kunye neebhulorho ezidilikileyo, kuza kuqala kamsinya nje ukuba imozulu ibuyele kwisimo sayo esiqhelekileyo ukunceda abantu babuyele kubomi babo bemihla ngemihla.

Ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amabini olutsha lwaseMthatha luxhamle kwinkqubo entsha yezolimo eqale kule veki iphelileyo, ngenjongo yokulwa indlala nokunqongophala kwemisebenzi. Le mbalasane yenzeka ngexesha apho uluntu lwakuloo mmandla lujongene nemingeni enzima yokunqongophala kokutya ngenxa yembalela ethe gqolo ukuhlasela eli phondo. Ethetha kumsitho wokunikezelwa kwezixhobo zokulima, uSodolophu walo masipala ubongoze abahlali ukuba basebenzisane ukuze baqinisekise ukuba le projekthi iba yimpumelelo eya kuhlala ixesha elide. Ukongeza kuloo mbono, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni ziqinisekisile ukuba kuza kubakho uqeqesho olulodwa oluya kuxhobisa aba baqalayo ngezakhono zale mihla zokuvelisa isivuno esikumgangatho ophezulu. Eli phulo kulindeleke ukuba lingagcini nje ngokuphucula imeko yezoqoqosho kwiintsapho ezihlelelekileyo, kodwa likwazalisekise iphupha lokudala amathuba emisebenzi asisigxina kwixesha elizayo, nto leyo eza kunciphisa izinga lolwaphulo-mthetho elibangelwa kukungasebenzi.

Ngaphezu kwama-60 ekhulwini lolutsha lulindeleke ukuba luxhamle kwiprojekthi entsha yezolimo esungulwe kule veki kwilali yaseCofimvaba. Esi siganeko silandela emva kweminyaka emininzi abahlali bekhalazela ukunqongophala kwamathuba emisebenzi kwakunye nendlala ebetha ngenqindi eliqinileyo kule ngingqi. Ethetha ngethuba kusikwa iribhoni, omnye wamakhosikazi ahlonitshwayo ekuhlaleni uvakalise uvuyo lwakhe, esithi eli linyathelo elibalulekileyo eliza kuguqula ubomi babantu abaninzi, ngakumbi ulutsha namakhosikazi. Eli ziko litsha lixhotyiswe ngoomatshini banamhlanje bokunkcenkceshela kwaye liza kubonelela ngoqeqesho olunzulu kwizakhono zokulima, ukufuya, kunye nendlela yokushishina ngeemveliso zasezifama. Ukongeza koko, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zihlabe ikhwelo kubo bonke abemi balapho ukuba balikhusele eli qumrhu kumasela nakwizenzo zokonakalisa iziseko zophuhliso. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe yikomiti elawulayo, eli phulo kulindeleke ukuba livule imisebenzi esisigxina engaphaya kwekhulu kwiinyanga ezintandathu ezizayo, nto leyo eza kunciphisa izinga lolwaphulo-mthetho elaziwa ngokuxhaphaka kakhulu xa abantu abaselula bengaphangeli.

Kwingingqi yaseMdantsane, ingxaki yokulahlwa kwenkunkuma ngokungekho mthethweni ifikelele kwelinye inqanaba kwiiveki ezimbalwa ezidlulileyo, nto leyo inyanzelise abahlali ukuba bazithathele kubo amanyathelo okusombulula lo mbandela. Ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amahlanu amalungu oluntu athe aphuma ngobuninzi bawo ngale mpelaveki iphelileyo, exhobe ngemihlakulo, iingxowa kunye neekiriva ukucoca imimandla echaphazeleke kakhulu. Lo mkhankaso awugcinanga nje ngokubuyisela isidima sale ngingqi, kodwa ukwabonise umanyano olumangalisayo phakathi kwabantu abatsha nabadala. Ethetha phambi kwesihlwele ebesisebenza ngokuzikhandla, usihlalo wekomiti yasekuhlaleni, uMnu. Sipho Dlamini, uchaze eli phulo njengomzekelo oqaqambileyo wokuzimela nokungathembi urhulumente kuphela kwizinto ezinokwenziwa luluntu. Ukongeza koko, amashishini asekuhlaleni abambe iqhaza elikhulu ngokunikela ngezixhobo zokusebenza kunye nokutya kwabo bebesebenza. Ngenxa yeli phulo, uMasipala weMetro yaseBuffalo City uthembise ukuthumela iilori zokuthutha yonke inkunkuma eqokelelweyo kwakunye nokubeka imigqomo emitsha kwiindawo ebezisetyenziswa njengamathala enkunkuma, ngenjongo yokuthintela ukuphinda kwenzeke le ngxaki kwixesha elizayo.

Kwilali yaseZwelitsha, ingxaki yokunqongophala kwamanzi iqede tu umonde wabahlali emva kweenyanga ezintandathu iimpompo zoluntu zomile. Ngenxa yale meko iqobayo, amakhulu abantu asekuhlaleni abambe intlanganiso engxamisekileyo kwiholo leelali ngale njikalanga yangoLwesithathu, befuna iimpendulo ezibambekayo kwiinkokeli zabo. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe yikomiti ejongene nophuhliso, phantse amashumi asixhenxe ekhulwini emizi kule ngingqi axhomekeke kumatanki athutha amanzi afika kanye ngeveki, nto leyo edala uqhanqalazo oluqhubekayo ekuvukeni kwayo yonke imihla. Ethetha egameni labahlali, uMnu. Sipho Radebe uvakalise inkxalabo enzulu ngempilo yabantwana nabantu abadala abasesichengeni sezifo ezibangelwa kukungabikho kococeko olufanelekileyo. Ukulungisa lo mbandela udala iingxabano, abasemagunyeni basekuhlaleni bathembise ukuba baza kuthumela iqela leenjineli phambi kokuphela kwale veki ukuze liyokuhlola imibhobho eyaphukileyo. Eli phulo kulindeleke ukuba liqalise umsebenzi wokulungisa iziseko ezingundoqo ngokukhawuleza, nanjengoko uluntu lulumkise ngelithi luza kuvala iindlela eziphambili ngamatayara avuthayo ukuba ngaba ezi zithembiso azifezekiswa ngokukhawuleza.

Ngaphezu kweentsapho ezingamakhulu mabini ziswele amakhaya kulandela isiphepho esinamandla esihlasele iilali ezikwingingqi yase-O.R. Tambo kwimpela-veki egqithileyo. Esi sehlo sibangele umonakalo omkhulu kwiziseko zophuhliso, kuquka ukuqhawuka kombane nokuwa kweebhulorho ezidibanisa uluntu. Ngenxa yale meko imaxongo, oosomashishini basekuhlaleni kunye nemibutho engajonganga kwenza nzuzo bakhawuleze bafaka isandla ngokunikezela ngamanzi acocekileyo, iingubo, kwakunye nokutya kwabo bachaphazelekayo. Ethetha egameni labahlali, uSodolophu walo masipala uvakalise uvelwano olunzulu, waze waqinisekisa uluntu ukuba amathimba ezolawulo lweentlekele axakekile ngokuqokelela iinkcukacha ukuze kuhanjiswe uncedo olungxamisekileyo ngokukhawuleza. Nangona inkxaso iqalile ukufika, abahlali balumkiswe ukuba baqhubeke behlale beqaphile njengoko iNkonzo yeMozulu ibike ukuba kusenokubakho enye imvula enamandla kwiintsuku ezizayo. Kukhuthazwa nabani na onako ukuncedisa ukuba asebenzisane neekomiti zewadi ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba izibonelelo zifikelela kwabo basengozini kakhulu ngexesha elifanelekileyo.

Kwiiyure zokuqala zangoLwesibini, ngaphezulu kwamashumi amahlanu amakhaya kwilokishi yaseMdantsane atshatyalaliswe yimvula enamandla ekhatshwa zizikhukhula ezishiye umkhondo wentshabalalo. Ngenxa yale ntlekele ingalindelekanga, iintsapho ezininzi ziphulukene nako konke ebezinalo, kwaye ngoku zifumene ukhuseleko lwethutyana kwiiholo zoluntu ezikufutshane. Nangona imeko isemaxongo kakhulu, oosomashishini bengingqi kunye namavolontiya bakhawuleze basondelela ukuze banikezele ngesisa sokutya, amanzi acocekileyo, kunye neengubo kwabo bachaphazelekileyo. Kwelinye icala, amaqela ajongene nolawulo lweentlekele sele ethe gqi endaweni yexhwayelo ngenjongo yokuhlola ubungakanani bomonakalo owenzekileyo nokuvula iindlela ezivalelekileyo. Ethetha nabamajelo eendaba ngale ntsasa, omnye wamalungu ekomiti yasekuhlaleni uqinisekisile ukuba iinzame zokuhlangula ziza kuqhubeka ngokuzimisela de kube kufumaneke isisombululo esisigxina kuluntu. Ukwengeza koko, abahlali bayacetyiswa ukuba bahlale bethe qwa kwaye baphephe ukuwela imilambo ezele kakhulu, njengoko inkonzo yezemozulu ilumkisa ngokuqhubeka kweemvula kwiintsuku ezimbini ezizayo.

Kwilali yaseQunu, ingxaki enganyamezelekiyo yokunqongophala kwamanzi ethe yaxhwalekisa abahlali isithuba seminyaka engaphezu kwemihlanu ifikelela esiphelweni emva kokugqitywa kolwakhiwo lwesikhululo esitsha sokucoca amanzi. Esi sikhululo, esixabise izigidi ezingamashumi amabini eerandi, kulindeleke ukuba siqale ukusebenza ngokupheleleyo ekupheleni kwale nyanga. Abahlali bavakalise uvuyo lwabo olukhulu ngesi siganeko, bechaza ukuba ukukha amanzi emilanjeni ibiyingozi kwaye kubeka impilo yabo esichengeni sezifo ezosulelayo. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe ngabaphathi bomasipala, le projekthi ayizukusombulula ingxaki yamanzi kuphela, kodwa idale amathuba emisebenzi angamashumi amahlanu kulutsha lwengingqi ngexesha lokwakhiwa kwayo. Umcebisi wewadi yendawo ukhuthaze uluntu ukuba lukhusele ezi zixhobo zikarhulumente kwaye lubike emapoliseni nabani na obonwa esenza umonakalo okanye eba iintsimbi. Ukongeza, kucwangciswe inkqubo ekhethekileyo yokufundisa abantu ngendlela yokonga la manzi ukuze esi siseko sophuhliso sihlale ixesha elide. Le nkqubela ibonisa ngokucacileyo amandla entsebenziswano phakathi kwabahlali kunye neenkokheli zabo ekuphuculeni umgangatho wempilo ezilalini.

Ngaphezulu kwamawaka amahlanu abahlali baseKwaZakhele baye baphila ngaphandle kwamanzi acocekileyo isithuba seminyaka emithathu ngenxa yokonakala kwemibhobho engaphantsi komhlaba. Le meko ebikhathaza isonjululwe ngokusesikweni izolo emva kokuba kuvulwe idama elitsha lokugcina amanzi elixabisa izigidi ezibini zeerandi kule ngingqi. Evakalisa uvuyo lwakhe kulo msitho, usihlalo wekomiti yasekuhlaleni, uMnu. Sipho Mthembu, uchaze le nkqubela njengempumelelo enkulu eza kubuyisela isidima sabantu, ngakumbi abantu abadala ebebesokola ukuhamba imigama emide besiya kukha amanzi ezimpompweni zoluntu. Nangona abantu bevuya, iinkokeli zengingqi zikhabe izenzo zokonakalisa iziseko zophuhliso, zicela uluntu ukuba lusebenzisane namapolisa ekubambeni abo babhaqwe besiba iimpompo okanye beqhekeza iingcingo ezibiyele eli dama. Ukongeza koku, kucwangciswe iinkqubo zokufundisa abahlali ngendlela yokonga la manzi ukuze angamoshakali, kwaye amagcisa azimeleyo aza kuhlola le mibhobho qho ngenyanga ukuqinisekisa ukuba iqhubeka isebenza ngokuzinzileyo ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka.

Phantse isiqingatha samanzi acocekileyo alahleka ngenxa yemibhobho evuzayo kunye nobusela beziseko zophuhliso kwisithili saseQonce, ngokwengxelo yamva nje ekhutshwe ziingcali zemoqongqothwane. Ngenxa yale ngxaki ixhomisa amehlo, abahlali balapho bavuke bazithathela emanyathelweni ngokuseka iikomiti zamavolontiya ezigada iimpompo kunye namadama ommandla. Ethetha egameni labahlali, uMnumzana Sipho Mthembu ugxininise ngelithi uluntu alunakuhlala lusonge izandla lulindele uncedo ngelixa imithombo yobomi itshabalalayo. Ukongeza kule migudu, oosomashishini bengingqi bafake isandla ngokunikela ngezixhobo zokusebenza kwakunye nezibane ezikhanyisa ngamandla elanga ukuze kuqiniswe ukhuseleko lwezi ndawo ebusuku. Kwelinye icala, amapolisa asekuhlaleni athembise ukusebenzisana ngokusondeleyo nala maqela ukuqinisekisa ukuba abaphuli-mthetho bajongana nengalo yomthetho. Eli phulo liyancomeka sele libonise iziphumo ezincumisayo, njengoko kunciphe kakhulu ukunqamka kwamanzi kwiiveki ezintathu ezidlulileyo, nto leyo ebuyise ithemba nentsebenziswano kuluntu luphela.

Ngaphezulu kwamakhulu amathathu abahlali baseGqeberha baphulukene namakhaya abo kulandela izikhukhula ezinamandla ezihlasele le ngingqi kwiveki ephelileyo. Esi sehlo sothusayo sishiye iintsapho ezininzi zingenandawo yakufihla intloko, kwaye sitshabalalise neziseko zophuhliso eziquka iindlela eziphambili kunye neebhulorho, nto leyo ephazamise ukuhamba kwezithuthi ngokumandla. Ethetha egameni loluntu, uMnu. Sipho Mthembu uvakalise inkxalabo yakhe enkulu ngothotho lweziganeko ezifanayo ezenzeka minyaka le, ebalaselisa imfuneko engxamisekileyo yoncedo oluvela kwimibutho yoluntu kunye namashishini abucala. Ngenxa yale meko imaxongo, amagosa ezolawulo lweentlekele asele eqalise iphulo elibanzi lokuhambisa ukutya, iingubo zokulala, kunye namatende okwethutyana kumaxhoba ahlelelekileyo agcinwe kwiiholo zoluntu. Nangona imizamo yokuhlangula isaqhubeka ngokuzimisela, iingcali zemozulu zilumkise ngemvula engakumbi elindeleke ukuba ine kwiintsuku ezizayo. Loo mbono yongqonge le meko inyanzelise ukuba kukhutshwe isilumkiso esingqongqo sokuba bonke abemi bahlale beqaphile, bamamele izaziso zikanomathotholo, kwaye baphephe ukuwela imilambo ezele ngamanzi ukuze kukhuselwe ubomi.

Kwisithili saseChris Hani, ukunqongophala kwamanzi acocekileyo kuye kwanyanzela abahlali ukuba bayokukha amanzi kwimilambo engakhuselekanga kangangeminyaka eliqela. Ukulungisa le ngxaki ixhomisa amehlo, kule veki iphelileyo kuye kwasungulwa iphulo elitsha lokwakha imibhobho yamanzi kunye namadama ogcino exabisa izigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zeerandi. Eli phulo liza kulawulwa ngokubambisana phakathi kooceba basekuhlaleni, iinkokeli zemveli, kunye neSebe lezaManzi noGutyulo, ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba iinkonzo ezisisiseko zihanjiswa ngokukhawuleza nangokungafihlisiyo eluntwini. Ngokwengxelo esemthethweni ekhutshwe yiofisi kasodolophu ngentsasa yangoLwesithathu, ngaphezulu kwamakhaya angamawaka asibhozo aza kuxhamla kulo msebenzi uphuculweyo phambi kokuphela kwalo nyaka-mali. Ukuze uluntu lukwazi ukufaka izikhalazo okanye libike iingxaki zokuvuza kwemibhobho ngokulula, kuye kwavulwa iziko leminxeba elisebenza iiyure ezingamashumi amabini anesine yonke imihla. Ukongeza koko, abemi bayakhuthazwa ukuba babhalise kwiiofisi zikamasipala ezikufuphi nabo ukuze bafumane izibonelelo zamanzi asimahla, kwaye kule nkqubo kufuneka beze namakhadi abo esazisi oqobo kunye nesiqinisekiso sedilesi ukuze inkqubo yolawulo ihambe ngokutyibilikayo ngaphandle kolibaziseko.

Emva kwembalela eqatha ebikho kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, abahlali baseMakhanda bafumene isiqabu njengoko kuqaliswe iphulo elitsha lokulungisa imibhobho yamanzi. Esi siganeko silandela isigqibo sebhunga likamasipala sokubekela bucala izigidi zeerandi ukulungiselela olu hlelo lophuhliso. Ukuqinisekisa ukuba inkqubo ihamba ngobala, iSebe lezaManzi noGutyulo linyanzelise ukuba iinkampani eziqeshiweyo zingenise iingxelo zenkqubela phambili qho ngeveki kubalawuli beprojekthi. Ngaphezu koko, abemi bayacelwa ngokusesikweni ukuba babhalise kwiiofisi zewadi zabo ngokuzisa amakhadi esazisi kunye nobungqina bendawo abahlala kuyo ukuze bafumane imiyalezo efonini malunga nokucinywa kwamanzi okucwangcisiweyo. Ukulungiswa kwale mibhobho kulindeleke ukuba kuthabathe iinyanga ezintandathu, kwaye abo bafuna ukufaka izikhalazo okanye ukubika ukuvuza kwamanzi banokusebenzisa inombolo yomnxeba engahlawulelwayo. Kwakhona, amagosa karhulumente aza kube ehambela iilali needolophu ukuze afundise uluntu ngendlela echanekileyo yokonga ubutyebi bendalo. Ngokutsho kosodolophu wengingqi, eli phulo alizukubuyisela isidima sabantu ngokubabonelela ngamanzi acocekileyo kuphela, koko liza kudala amathuba emisebenzi yethutyana kulutsha lwalapho oluhleli ngaphandle kwengqesho.

Emva kweenyanga ezintandathu zokulinda nzima, abahlali baseKhayelitsha ekugqibeleni baqalisile ukufumana amaxwebhu abo esazisi kwiziko elitsha elisanda kuvulwa. Bangaphezulu kwamawaka amahlanu abantu ababehlelwe yile ngxaki, nto leyo ebibathintela ekufumaneni izibonelelo zikarhulumente kwakunye namathuba engqesho. Ukuze kusonjululwe lo mngeni, iSebe leZemicimbi yeKhaya liye lasungula inkqubo ekhethekileyo yokuhambisa iinkonzo ezilalini nakwiilokishi kusetyenziswa iiofisi ezingomahamba-nandlwana. Ngokwale nkqubo intsha yolawulo, abafaki-zicelo kulindeleke ukuba bazise ubungqina bendawo abahlala kuyo kunye neziqinisekiso zokuzalwa ukuze kukhawuleziswe ukushicilelwa kwamakhadi abo. Ethetha namajelo eendaba izolo, omnye wabasebenzi abaphezulu uqinisekisile ukuba eli phulo liza kwandiselwa nakwamanye amaphondo kwiveki ezayo ngenjongo yokuphelisa ukuxinana kwiiofisi zikamasipala. Nangona zisekhona iingxaki zokunqongophala kombane ezichaphazela oomatshini, abalawuli bathembise ukuba kuza kufakelwa iijenereyitha ukunqanda nakuphi na ukuphazamiseka. Lilonke, eli nyathelo libonisa iinzame eziqhubekayo zokuphucula ukuhanjiswa kweenkonzo eluntwini nokuqinisekisa ukuba wonke ummi uyafikelela kumalungelo akhe asiseko ngaphandle kwemiqobo engeyomfuneko.

Emva kweenyanga eziliqela zikhalazo malunga nokunqongophala kwamanzi kwiindawo zasemaphandleni, urhulumente uqalise iphulo elikhulu lophuhliso lweziseko ezingundoqo ngenjongo yokuphucula unikezelo lweenkonzo. Ukuze baqinisekise ukuba bayaxhamla kule nkqubo, abahlali bayacelwa ukuba baye kubhalisa kumabhunga omasipala asekuhlaleni phambi kokuphela kwale nyanga, bephethe amaxwebhu angqina ubuzwe kunye neendawo abahlala kuzo. ISebe lezaManzi noGutyulo libekele bucala isixa-mali esizigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zeerandi ukuxhasa le projekthi, ngelixa amagosa karhulumente eza kuqhuba uphando olunzulu kwiilali ezichaphazeleke kakhulu. Ethetha kwingxelo ekhutshwe izolo, isithethi sikamasipala sigxininise ukuba onke amaxwebhu afunekayo kufuneka angeniswe ngexesha ukunqanda ulibaziseko olungeyomfuneko. Ngaphezu koko, abemi bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzisane neenkokeli zasekuhlaleni kwaye bazimase iintlanganiso zewadi ukuze bafumane iinkcukacha ezizeleyo malunga nenkqubo entsha yokulawulwa kwezicelo zabo. Iiofisi zesebe ziya kuvulwa ukusukela ngentsimbi yesibhozo kusasa ukuya kweyesine malanga kuyo yonke le veki ukulungiselela abo bafuna uncedo olukhawulezileyo. Oku kulindeleke ukuba kukhawulezise lo msebenzi obalulekileyo wokuhambisa iinkonzo ezikumgangatho ophezulu kubo bonke abahlali ngokulinganayo.

Emva kweenyanga eziliqela zokunqongophala kwamanzi kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, abahlali baseMakhanda bafumene isiqabu kulandela ukusungulwa kweprojekthi entsha yeziseko zophuhliso lwamanzi ekuxabise izigidi zeerandi. Kule veki iphelileyo, abasebenzi bakamasipala baqale inkqubo yokufakela iimitha ezintsha kwiindawo ezichaphazelekileyo ukuze kuqinisekiswe unikezelo lweenkonzo olululo kwaye kuthintelwe ukumoshakala kwamanzi. Ngokutsho kwesithethi seSebe lezaManzi noGutyulo, le nkqubo iza kuhamba kunye nokubhaliswa ngokutsha kwabantu abafumana isibonelelo samanzi asimahla phantsi kwenkqubo karhulumente yokunceda abasweleyo. Ukuze baqukwe kolu luhlu olubalulekileyo, abemi bayacelwa ukuba bandwendwele iiofisi zikamasipala ezikufuphi nabo baphathe omazisi babo, iziqinisekiso zokuhlala, kunye namaxwebhu abonisa ingeniso yabo yenyanga. Nangona kusekho imingeni embalwa yokulungisa imibhobho emidala eyaphukileyo, iziphathamandla zithembise ngelithi yonke imisebenzi yolawulo iza kugqitywa phambi kokuphela kwale nyanga, nto leyo eza kuphucula uqoqosho nempilo yoluntu ngokubanzi.

Kwingingqi yaseNgqamakhwe, ukunqongophala kweenkonzo zikamasipala ezisisiseko kuye kwanyanzela abahlali ukuba bathabathe amanyathelo aqatha. Ukuphendula kwesi simo, iSebe lezoLimo noPhuhliso lwaMaphandle libhengeze inkqubo entsha ejolise ekulungiseni iziseko zophuhliso phambi kokuphela kwalo nyaka-mali. Eli phulo libandakanya ukufakwa kwemibhobho yamanzi entsha kunye nokulungiswa kweendlela ezingasetyenzisekiyo, nto leyo eza kwenziwa ngokubambisana neenkokheli zemveli. Ngokutsho kwengxelo ekhutshwe yiofisi kasodolophu ngentsasa yangoLwesithathu, isabelo-mali sezigidi ezingamashumi amabini zeerandi sele sibekelwe bucala ukuqinisekisa ukuba lo msebenzi awuphazamiseki. Nangona kunjalo, ukuze uluntu luxhamle ngokupheleleyo, abemi bayacelwa ukuba babhalise amagama abo kwii-ofisi zewadi ezikufutshane ukuze bafumane iziqinisekiso zokuhlala ezisemthethweni. Ngenxa yoko, kulindeleke ukuba oku kunciphise amaxesha amade okulinda kudederhu lwemigca kwaye kuphuculwe izinga lonikezelo lweenkonzo kuluntu jikelele, ngelixa kudalwa amathuba emisebenzi kwabo baswele umvuzo.

Emva kweminyaka emihlanu yokunqongophala kwamanzi acocekileyo kwilali yaseQumbu, abahlali sele beza kufumana isiqabu kulandela ukuqaliswa kweprojekthi entsha yophuhliso lweziseko ezingundoqo. Le nkqubo ixabisa izigidi ezingamashumi amabini eerandi ilindeleke ukuba ifakele imibhobho emitsha ze ilungise namadama akudala asele onakele. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe lisebe lezaManzi noGutyulo, iikontraka esele ziqeshiwe ziza kuqala umsebenzi wazo ekuqaleni kwenyanga ezayo, kwaye kulindeleke ukuba zikudalele amathuba emisebenzi ulutsha lwalapho. Ukuze baqinisekise ukuba wonke umzi uyafikelela kule nkonzo yasimahla, abemi bayacelwa ukuba baye kubhalisa amagama abo kwi-ofisi kamasipala wengingqi phambi komhla weshumi elinesihlanu kule nyanga. Ngenxa yale nkqubo intsha yolawulo, abantu mabaphathe oomazisi babo kunye neziqinisekiso zendawo abahlala kuyo ukuze kugcwaliswe iifomu ngokusesikweni. Ukongeza koko, la maxwebhu ayafumaneka nakwi-intanethi, nto leyo eza kunciphisa imigca emide kwii-ofisi zikarhulumente. Amagosa aphezulu athembise ukuba aya kubamba iintlanganiso zokwazisa uluntu rhoqo ngeveki ukuze kunikwe ingxelo ecacileyo ngenkqubela phambili yalo msebenzi ubalulekileyo.

Nangona izikhalazo ngobuthathaka bonikezelo lweenkonzo bezisanda kwiinyanga ezimbalwa ezidlulileyo kummandla waseGqeberha, kukho ithemba elitsha njengoko kuqaliswe iphulo elikhulu lokulungisa imigangatho yeendlela kunye nemibhobho yamanzi evuzayo. Eli phulo, elixhaswa ngesabelo-mali sezigidi zeerandi, likhokelwa yikomiti ekhethekileyo ehlanganisa iinjineli zikamasipala, abahloli zincwadi, kunye neenkokheli zasekuhlaleni ukuqinisekisa ukuba inkqubo yolawulo ihamba ngokukhawuleza nangokungafihlisiyo. Ngokwemigaqo emitsha ebekiweyo kulo nyaka-mali, zonke iikontraka ezichongiweyo kunyanzelekile ukuba zingenise iingxelo zenkqubela phambili qho ngeveki ukuze kuthintelwe urhwaphilizo, kwaye abahlali banelungelo lokuvakalisa izimvo zabo kwiindibano ezicwangciselwe iiholo zoluntu. Ukongeza kuloo nto, kuza kuvulwa amaziko amatsha okubhalisela iinkonzo ezisisiseko kunye namaxwebhu okuzazisa ukuze kuncitshiswe imigca emide ebisoloko isiba ngumqobo omkhulu kubantu abadala nakwabo bakhubazekileyo. Ngokubanzi, olu tshintsho olumandla lubonwa njengesiqalo esihle sokubuyisela isidima sabahlali, ukomeleza uphuhliso lwezoqoqosho lwasemakhaya, kunye nokwakha ukuthembana okuluqilima phakathi kwabaphathi bamanqanaba ahlukeneyo namalungu oluntu.

Emva kweenyanga zikhalazo malunga nokunqongophala kwamanzi kwiindawo zasemaphandleni eMpuma Koloni, abahlali ekugqibeleni bafumene isiqabu njengoko kuqaliswe inkqubo entsha yokuhanjiswa kwenkonzo. Lo mkhankaso, oxhaswa ngemali engangezigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu eerandi, uququzelelwa liSebe lezaManzi noGutyulo ngenjongo yokulungisa imibhobho eyaphukileyo nokwakha amadama amatsha kwimimandla eyomileyo. Ukwenzela ukuqinisekisa ukuba le nkqubo ihamba ngokuzeleyo nangokungafihlisiyo, oosodolophu basekuhlaleni bayalelwe ukuba bangenise iingxelo zenkqubela phambili qho ngenyanga kwiiofisi zikamasipala ezikufuphi. Onke amaxwebhu afakiweyo aza kuphononongwa ngocoselelo ngabahloli abazimeleyo ukuze kuthintelwe urhwaphilizo nokuqinisekisa ukuba uncedo lufikelela kwabo baludinga ngokwenene. Ngaphezu koko, abemi abachaphazelekayo bayacelwa ukuba babhalise amagama abo kwiinkqubo zoncedo lwaseburhulumenteni ngokuzisa oomazisi babo kunye neziqinisekiso zendawo yokuhlala kumaziko asekuhlaleni, ukuze bafumane amatanki amanzi asimahla ngelixa kusenziwa olu lungiso lweziseko ezingundoqo. Ekuphenduleni kule meko, isithethi sikarhulumente sivakalise ukuba olu lwakhiwo aluzukusombulula kuphela ingxaki yamanzi, kodwa luza kudala amathuba emisebenzi kulutsha oluhlelelekileyo kule ngingqi, kwaye luphucule nentlalo yoluntu ngokubanzi phambi kokuphela kwalo nyaka-mali.

Ngaphezulu kwamawaka asixhenxe amakhaya kwingingqi yaseKhayelitsha asajongene nengxaki yokunqongophala kweenkonzo zococeko ngenxa yokulibaziseka kweeprojekthi zophuhliso. Ukuphendula kule meko, isithethi sikamasipala sivakalise ukuba kuye kwamiswa inkqubo entsha yezolawulo ukukhawulezisa ukuhanjiswa kwezixhobo zokwakha nakwiziseko ezingundoqo. Le nkqubo iza kuquka ukusekwa kwekomiti ekhethekileyo eza kujongana nokuhlolwa kweenkqubo zokuthenga kunye nokuqinisekisa ukuba iinkampani zokwakha zenza umsebenzi wazo ngexesha elifanelekileyo nangokwemiqathango ebekiweyo. Nangona abahlali bebonakalise ukungathembeki malunga nezi zithembiso, iSebe lezokuHlaliswa koLuntu lithembise ukuba liza kubamba iintlanganiso zokucebisana noluntu rhoqo ngenyanga ukunika ingxelo ngenkqubela phambili kulo mmandla. Ngaphezu koko, kucelwe onke amalungu oluntu ukuba abhalise kwi-ofisi yewadi ukuze bafumane iinkcukacha ezichanekileyo malunga namalungelo abo kwiinkonzo zikamasipala. Eli nyathelo lilindeleke ukuba linciphise uqhankqalazo kwaye livule indlela yokuphuculwa kwemigaqo-nkqubo yolawulo lwezimali zikarhulumente kulo nyaka-mali uzayo, ukuqinisekisa ukuba uluntu lufumana inkonzo esemgangathweni ngaphandle kokulibaziseka.

Kwingingqi yaseMthatha, ukunqongophala kwamanzi acocekileyo kunyanzelise abahlali ukuba bafake izikhalazo eziqatha kwiiveki ezisandul' ukudlula. Ngenjongo yokuphendula kule ntlekele, amagosa akamasipala asungule inkqubo entsha yongxamiseko yokuhambisa iinkonzo eziyintloko ukuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umzi ufumana isabelo sawo semihla ngemihla. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe ngabameli basekuhlaleni, bangaphezu kwamawaka amathathu abantu abachaphazelekayo ngokungathanga ngqo ngenxa yokonakala kwemibhobho emikhulu. Ukulungisa le meko isematheni, iSebe lezaManzi noGutyulo libhengeze isicwangciso sokulungisa ezi ziseko zophuhliso phambi kokuphela kwale nyanga. Ukongeza koko, abemi bakhuthazwe ukuba babhalise kwiiofisi zewadi ezikufutshane ukuze bafumane uncedo lwamatanki amanzi athunyelwa ngurhulumente. Inkqubo yobhaliso olusesikweni ifuna ukuba ummi ngamnye aphathe incwadi yesazisi neleta yobungqina bendawo ahlala kuyo xa esiya kwiindawo zolawulo. Eli phulo lokuqinisa ukuhanjiswa kweenkonzo kulindeleke ukuba liphucule unxibelelwano phakathi kwabaphathi noluntu, ngelixa kusonjululwa lo mceli-mingeni uqhubekayo ngokukhawuleza nangempumelelo.

Bangaphaya kwamawaka amathathu abahlali kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni abathe bafumana iziqinisekiso zabo zobunini-mhlaba kule veki iphelileyo, emva kokulinda ixesha elingaphezu kwamashumi amabini eminyaka. Le nkqubo yobhaliso ngokutsha, eyaqala ngenyanga yoKwindla, iquka ukuqinisekiswa kwamaxwebhu obunikazi kwanokulungiswa kweerekhodi zikamasipala ukuze kuthintelwe urhwaphilizo nokuqulunqwa kobuxoki kwiiofisi zikarhulumente. Ethetha kumsitho wokunikezelwa kwala maxwebhu obalulekileyo, umthunywa ophezulu wase-ofisini yoMphathiswa weZindlu noKuhlaliswa koLuntu ugxininise ukuba isebe lizibophelele ekukhawuleziseni unikezelo lweenkonzo phantsi komgaqo-nkqubo walo omtsha ojolise kuphuhliso lwamaphandle. Ukulungiselela abantu abangekancedwa, ingakumbi abantu abadala kunye nabo baphila nokukhubazeka, kuvulwe amaziko exeshana kwiiholo zasekuhlaleni kulo lonke ilizwe. Kula maziko, uluntu lunokufaka khona izicelo zalo ngokusesikweni phakathi kwentsimbi yesibhozo kusasa neyesine malanga, kwaye kufuneka baphathe omazisi babo kunye neleta yobungqina bendawo yokuhlala. Ngenxa yeli nyathelo lamvanje, kulindeleke ukuba kucuthwe kakhulu ukulibaziseka kweenkqubo zolawulo, nto leyo eza kuqinisekisa ukuba wonke ummi ofanelekileyo ufumana uncedo olumfaneleyo ngaphandle kwemiqobo okanye inkohliso.

Kwisithuba seenyanga ezintandathu ezidlulileyo, abahlali baseGqeberha bebesokola ngenxa yokunqongophala kwamanzi acocekileyo, nto leyo inyanzelise ukuba kuthathwe amanyathelo angxamisekileyo ukusombulula le ngxaki. Ukuphendula kulo mceli-mngeni ojongene noluntu, iSebe lezaManzi noGutyulo liphehlelele inkqubo entsha nebanzi yokuhlaziya imibhobho egugileyo kwingingqi leyo. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe sisithethi sikamasipala kule veki iphelileyo, le projekthi yophuhliso kulindeleke ukuba idle isixa-mali esizigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zeerandi, yaye iza kudala amathuba emisebenzi asisigxina nethutyana kwabaselula abangaphangeliyo. Abantu abanomdla wokufaka izicelo zale ngqesho bayacetyiswa ukuba bandwendwele iiofisi zikamasipala ezikufuphi kubo okanye basebenzise iinkqubo zikawonke-wonke zikhompyutha phambi komhla weshumi elinesihlanu kule nyanga ukuze babhalise. Ukongeza koko, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zibongoze uluntu ukuba lusebenzisane neekontraka ezonyuliweyo ukwenzela ukuqinisekisa ukuba umsebenzi uqhubeka ngaphandle kweziphazamiso okanye uqhankqalazo. Ngenjongo yokukhuthaza uwonke-wonke ukuba athathe inxaxheba, amaphepha eenkcukacha zale nkqubo afumaneka simahla kuwo onke amathala eencwadi oluntu nakumaziko olutsha. Ekugqibeleni, eli nyathelo likarhulumente kulindeleke ukuba liphucule unikezelo lweenkonzo ezisisiseko, lilongeze nokuphakanyiswa komgangatho wempilo kubo bonke abemi beli phondo ngokubanzi.

Ngenxa yokunqongophala kwamanzi acocekileyo kwiilali zaseNgcobo nakwimimandla eyingqongileyo, abahlali banqakramza iminyaka emininzi befuna uncedo olukhawulezileyo kurhulumente wengingqi. Ukuphendula kwesi sikhalo sinzima, iSebe lezaManzi noGutyulo liphehlelele inkqubo entsha yeziseko zophuhliso kweli phondo, ejolise ekwakheni amadama ommandla kunye nokufakela iimpompo zale mihla ezisebenza ngombane welanga. Lo msebenzi uza kuqala ngokusesikweni kwiveki ezayo emva kokuba iinkokheli zemveli, iingcali zobunjineli, kunye nooceba basayine isivumelwano sokuvula iprojekthi. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe yiofisi kasodolophu izolo, ngaphezulu kwamawaka asibhozo amakhaya aza kuxhamla kule nkqubo, nto leyo eza kuphucula kakhulu umgangatho wezempilo nentlalo yoluntu. Ukanti, ukuze abantu baqinisekise ukuba amagama abo akuluhlu lwabaxhamli abasemthethweni, bayacelwa ukuba bandwendwele iiofisi zikamasipala ezikufutshane nabo okanye bazalise iifomu zokubhalisa ezifumaneka kwiindawo zoluntu phambi kokuphela kwale nyanga. Amagosa olawulo aza kube ekho kwezi ndawo ukuncedisa uluntu ngokugcwalisa amaxwebhu afunekayo, ukwenzela ukuba urhulumente alawule ngobuchule ukuhanjiswa kweenkonzo kwaye aqinisekise ukuba inkqubo ihamba ngaphandle korhwaphilizo okanye umkhethe.

Ngaphezulu kwamawaka asixhenxe abahlali abakwimimandla esemaphandleni eMpuma Koloni basajongene nengxaki yokunqongophala kwamanzi acocekileyo, nangona kukho imizamo eqhubekayo yokuphucula iziseko zophuhliso. Ukulungisa le meko ngokukhawuleza, abasemagunyeni baqalise inkqubo entsha yokubhalisa uluntu ngokusesikweni ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba iinkonzo zihanjiswa ngokufanelekileyo nakubantu abafanelekileyo. Leli phulo likhokelwa liSebe lezaManzi noGutyulo ngokubambisana noNondyebo weSizwe, kwaye kulindeleke ukuba ligqitywe phambi kokuphela kwalo nyaka-mali ukuze kuthintelwe ukubuyiselwa kwemali engasetyenziswanga. Ethetha kwingqungquthela ebibanjwe kwiveki ephelileyo, uSodolophu walo masipala uhlabe ikhwelo kubo bonke abemi ukuba basebenzisane neekomiti zewadi nanjengoko oku kuza kukhawulezisa uphunyezo lwalo msebenzi ubaluleke kangaka. Ngaphezu koko, amaxwebhu afunekayo ngexesha lokubhalisa aquka omazisi abasemthethweni kunye nobungqina bendawo yokuhlala. Amagosa karhulumente aza kube emi kwiiholo zasekuhlaleni imihla ngemihla ukunceda abo bangakwaziyo ukusebenzisa iinkqubo zekhompyutha okanye i-intanethi. Oku kulindeleke ukuba kunciphise uthotho lwezikhalazo ebezisoloko zingeniswa kwiiofisi zikamasipala, ngaloo ndlela kuphuculwe intembeko phakathi korhulumente kunye noluntu jikelele.

Ngaphezulu kwamawaka amahlanu abahlali baseZwide naseZwelitsha basalinde iminyaka engaphezu kweshumi ukufumana izindlu zangasese ezigungxulwayo kunye namanzi acocekileyo, meko leyo ebangela unxunguphalo olukhulu kuluntu. Ukuphendula kwesi sikhalo esingapheliyo, kule veki iphelileyo kuye kwasungulwa inkqubo entsha yobhaliso lwezindlu nophuhliso lweziseko ezingundoqo ukuze kukhawuleziswe unikezelo lweenkonzo eluntwini. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe ngamagosa aseMasepala abhekelele uphuhliso lwezoluntu, abantu abafuna ukuxhamla kule nkqubo kufuneka bafake izicelo zabo ngokutsha kwiiofisi zengingqi phambi kokuphela kwenyanga ezayo ukuze bangashiyeki ngaphandle. Olu xwebhu lwesicelo, olufumaneka nakwi-intanethi nakumaziko oluntu, luqulathe imiqathango engqongqo efuna ukuba abafaki-zicelo bangqine ubume babo bentlalo ngokungenisa omazisi, iziqinisekiso zemivuzo, kunye neziqinisekiso zendawo yokuhlala. Nangona eli phulo libonakala linika ithemba elikhulu kwabaninzi abahlelelekileyo, iingcali zolawulo loluntu zilumkise ngelithi ukulibaziseka kwakhona kwale nkqubo kungakhokelela kuqhanqalazo olukhulu. Ngenxa yoko, kucelwa abasemagunyeni ukuba baqinisekise ukuba iinkqubo zolawulo zihamba ngokukhawuleza nangokungafihlisiyo ukuze kunqandwe naluphi na urhwaphilizo olusenokuvela ngexesha lokwabiwa kwezibonelelo.

Ngaphezu kwamawaka amathathu abahlali baseNgqushwa ngoku baza kufumana iinkonzo zezazisi nezatifiketi zokuzalwa kufutshane namakhaya abo, isiganeko eso esizise uvuyo olukhulu kuluntu. Oku kulandela izikhalazo ezininzi ezithe zafika kwiiofisi zikamasipala malunga nokunqongophala kwezixhobo zokusebenza kwakunye nomgama omde ohanjwa ngabantu abadala ukuya edolophini. Ukuze uluntu luxhamle ngokupheleleyo kolu hlelo, abafaki-zicelo bayacelwa ukuba baze namaxwebhu angqina iindawo abahlala kuzo, iileta zeenkosi, kunye neekopi eziqinisekisiweyo xa besiya kwiinqwelo ezingomahamba-nandlwana. Ngaphezulu, abalawuli balumkise ukuba abo bangenazo iimpepha ezipheleleyo baya kunikwa iintsuku ezilishumi elinesine kuphela ukuba bazilungise phambi kokuba izicelo zabo zirhoxiswe. Nangona inkqubo yokubhalisa idla ngokuthatha ixesha ngenxa yobunzima bokuxhuma kwi-intanethi, isithethi sephondo siqinisekisile ukuba onke amagosa aza kusebenza ngokuzimisela ukuqinisekisa ukuba uqulunqo lweencwadi zokundwendwela kunye nezazisi luqukunjelwa ngaphandle kolibaziseko. Ukongeza, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zibongoze ulutsha ukuba lusebenzise eli thuba ukuze lube semthethweni, nto leyo eza kulunceda kakhulu xa lufaka izicelo zemisebenzi, iibhasari, okanye zeenkxaso-mali zikarhulumente kwixesha elizayo.

Kwilali yaseQamata, ukunqongophala kwamanzi acocekileyo kube ngumqobo omkhulu kwimpilo yoluntu iminyaka eliqela, kodwa le meko ebuhlungu kulindeleke ukuba iguquke kungekudala. Ukuphendula kwesi sikhalo esingapheliyo, kuye kwasungulwa iphulo elitsha nelibanzi lokuphucula iziseko zophuhliso lwendalo, elibandakanya ukufakwa kwemibhobho emitsha ehamba phantsi komhlaba kunye nokwakhiwa kwamadama amakhulu okugcina amanzi. Ngokwengxelo esemthethweni ekhutshwe kule veki iphelileyo, iSebe lezaManzi noGutyulo lizibophelele ngokupheleleyo ekugqibeni lo msebenzi obalulekileyo phambi kokuphela konyaka mali, lisebenzisana ngokusondeleyo noMasipala wesiThili saseChris Hani ukuqinisekisa unikezelo lweenkonzo olululo. Ukuze le nkqubo ihambe ngokutyibilikayo, abahlali baloo ngingqi bayacelwa ngokuzithoba ukuba bathathe inxaxheba ebonakalayo kwiintlanganiso zewodi ezicwangcisiweyo, ukuze bafumane iinkcukacha ezithe vetshe kwaye bavakalise izimvo zabo ngaphandle koloyiko. Ngaphezu koko, amagosa ajongene nalo msebenzi aza kuqinisekisa ukuba inkqubo yokunikezelwa kweethenda kuluntu yenziwa ngokungafihlisiyo nangobulungisa, ngenjongo emsulwa yokukhuthaza uphuhliso lwezoqoqosho lwengingqi nokudala amathuba emisebenzi azinzileyo kulutsha lwasekhaya oluhleli emakhaya.

Kwiilali zasemaphandleni aseMpuma Koloni, ukunqongophala kwamanzi acocekileyo ibiyingxaki engapheliyo kangamashumi eminyaka ekhathaza uluntu jikelele. Ukulandela izikhalazo ezininzi ezivela kubahlali abakhathazekileyo abebeququzelela uqhanqalazo loxolo, kuphehlelelwe iphulo elitsha leziseko zophuhliso izolo ngenjongo yokulungisa le ngxaki ngokukhawuleza. ISebe laManzi noGutyulo, lisebenzisana noMasipala weSithili, liphumeze isixa-mali esizigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu zeerandi ukuze kugrunjwe imingxuma yamanzi entsha kuze kufakelwe nemibhobho ehambisa amanzi ngokuthe ngqo ezindlwini. Ngaphezu koko, oosonkontraka basekuhlaleni baza kuqeshwa kulo msebenzi unzima, nto leyo eza kuvula amathuba emisebenzi kulutsha lwengingqi oluhleli phantsi ngenxa yokunqaba kwemisebenzi. Ukuqinisekisa ukuba le nkqubo yezolawulo ihamba ngendlela efanelekileyo nangokungafihlisiyo, abahlali bayacetyiswa ukuba baphathe iziqinisekiso zabo zezazisi kwaye bayokubhalisa kwiiofisi zikamasipala ezikufuphi nabo phambi kokuphela kwale nyanga. Oku kuza kubanceda ukuba bafakwe kuvimba weenkcukacha zikarhulumente, bafumane iingxelo eziqhubekayo zenkqubela phambili, kwaye bakwazi ukuxela nakuphi na ukuvuza kwamanzi okanye ukonakala kwezixhobo kwixesha elizayo.

Kwiveki ephelileyo, abahlali abangaphezulu kwamakhulu amahlanu kwilali yakuQumbu bafumene iziqinisekiso zabo zokuzalwa kunye namakhadi esazisi akwinqanaba eliphezulu emva kweminyaka emininzi yokulinda. Eli phulo linqabileyo lilandela isikhalo esibukhali soluntu malunga nokunqongophala kweenkonzo zolawulo kwiindawo zasemaphandleni, nto leyo ebisenza kube nzima ukufikelela kwizibonelelo zikarhulumente. Ngenxa yale meko, iSebe lezeKhaya, lisebenzisana namagosa kamasipala wengingqi, lithumele iiofisi ezingomahamba-nandlwana ukulungisa le miba ngokukhawuleza. Ukongeza kwizazisi, la magosa ancede uluntu kwinkqubo yokubhalisa abantwana abasandul' ukuzalwa, nanjengoko oku kulinyathelo elibalulekileyo ekuqinisekiseni ukuba abemi bayakwazi ukufumana inkxaso-mali yesondlo sabantwana. Ethetha nentatheli, omnye wabaququzeleli boluntu uvakalise uvuyo lwakhe, waza wacela ukuba ezi nkonzo zisondezwe ebantwini rhoqo ngenyanga ukuze kupheliswe intsokolo yokuhamba imigama emide ukuya ezidolophini. Kungoku nje, abasemagunyeni baqinisekise ukuba inkqubo efanayo iza kwandiselwa nakwezinye izithili ezikufutshane phambi kokuba kuphele le kota yonyaka.

Kwisithuba seenyanga ezintandathu ezigqithileyo, inani labantu abafunyaniswe benesifo seswekile kwisithili saseChris Hani linyuke ngezinga elothusayo, imeko ekhuthaze ukuba kuqaliswe iphulo elikhulu lokuhlola impilo yoluntu. Ngokuzama ukulwa le ngxaki, amakhulu abahlali athe aphuma ngobuninzi bawo ukuya kwiikliniki ezingomahambahlala ukuze baxilongwe simahla kwaye bafumane iingcebiso malunga nokutya okunesondlo. Eli phulo aligxilanga kuphela ekunikezeni amayeza, kodwa likwajolise ekufundiseni uluntu ngobungozi bokungazilolongi kunye nokutya okungenamsoco. Ethetha ngethuba kuvulwa le nkqubo ngokusemthethweni, umhlali wengingqi uMnu. Sipho Zondi uvakalise uvuyo lwakhe, esithi olu ncedo lufike ngexesha elihle kuba abaninzi bebengakwazi ukuhlawulela iindleko zokuya ezibhedlele ezisezidolophini. Ngenxa yale mpumelelo, abaqeqeshi bezempilo baceba ukwandisa le nkonzo iye nakwezinye iindawo ezisemaphandleni, ukuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntu ufumana ukhathalelo lwezempilo olumfaneleyo ngaphandle komkhethe, nto leyo eza kuphucula umgangatho wempilo ngokubanzi kulo mmandla.

Ngokweengxelo zakutshanje, phantse isiqingatha sabantu abadala kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni baphila nezifo ezingasuleliyo ezifana neswekile kunye noxinzelelo lwegazi. Ukulwa nale ngxaki ihlasele uluntu, kuye kwasungulwa iphulo lezempilo elikhulu kwingingqi yaseNgcobo kule veki iphelileyo, apho abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba baye kuxilongwa simahla. Amakhulu abantu athe abuthana kwiiholo zasekuhlaleni ukuya kufumana uncedo koomongikazi nakoogqirha ababehambele le ndawo. Ethetha ngethuba kuqhubeka le nkqubo, omnye wabalawuli bezempilo ugxininise ukubaluleka kokutya ukutya okunesondlo nokwenza imithambo rhoqo ukuze kuthintelwe ezi zigulo ziyingozi. Eli phulo kulindeleke ukuba linatyiselwe nakwezinye iilali ezikufutshane kwiinyanga ezizayo, ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba wonke ummi ufumana ukhathalelo lwezempilo olumgangatho ophezulu kwaye uhlala kwindawo ekhuthaza impilo entle. Ukongeza koko, iikliniki ezingumahambayo ziza kuqhubeka zityelela abantu abadala emakhayeni abo ukuze bangasali ngasemva kolu hlelo lukhulu lokuphucula impilo yoluntu.

Kwiveki ephelileyo, inani labantu abafunyaniswe benesifo seswekile kunye noxinzelelo lwegazi linyuke ngama-30 ekhulwini kwingingqi yaseMdantsane, nto leyo ekhuthaze amaphulo amatsha ezempilo. Ukulwa le ngxaki ihlasela uluntu, iikliniki ezingumahambayo ziqalisile ukutyhutyha iilali neelokishi, zihlinzeka ngoxilongo lwasimahla kunye namayeza kubahlali abangenakho ukufikelela kumaziko ezempilo asezidolophini. Ngaphandle kokuxilongwa, abasebenzi bezempilo banika iingcebiso malunga nendlela efanelekileyo yokuthatha unyango ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba izigulane ziyakwazi ukulawula impilo yazo. Ethetha ngethuba kuphehlelelwa eli phulo, umongikazi oyintloko uNkskz. Nomsa Zitha ugxininise ukubaluleka kokutya okunempilo nokuzolula umzimba rhoqo ukuze kuthintelwe izifo ezingosuleliyo. Abahlali bakwamkele ngezandla ezi shushu oku kungenelela, njengoko abaninzi babo bebejongene nemingeni yokunqongophala kwezithuthi zokuya ezibhedlele. Ngaphezu koko, iindibano zokufundisa uluntu ngezempilo ziza kuqhubeka kwiiholo zasekuhlaleni kude kube sekupheleni kwalo nyaka, ngenjongo yokuphucula impilo-ntle yesizwe ngokubanzi yaye kuncitshiswe nomthwalo kumaziko karhulumente.

Kwiinyanga ezimbalwa ezigqithileyo, ukwanda kwezifo ezosulelayo ezifana nesifo sephepha kunye neswekile kuye kwadala ixhala elikhulu kwiindawo zasemaphandleni kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni. Ukuze kuliwe lo mceli-mngeni ojongene noluntu, kuye kwathunyelwa iikliniki ezingomahambahlala kunye nabasebenzi bezempilo abaqeqeshiweyo kwiilali ezahlukeneyo ngenjongo yokunikezela ngoxilongo lwasimahla, unyango, kunye nogonyo kubo bonke abemi. Ekuphenduleni kweli phulo, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zikhuthaza abahlali ukuba baphume ngobuninzi babo bathathe inxaxheba kwezi nkqubo zempilo, zigxininisa kwelokuba ukufunyaniswa kwesifo kwangethuba kudlala indima ebalulekileyo ekusindiseni ubomi. Ngaphaya koko, le nkqubo yezempilo yandisiwe yaza yaquka iindibano zocweyo ezifundisa uluntu ngococeko olululo kunye nesondlo esifanelekileyo, ukuqinisekisa ukuba iintsapho zixhotyiswe ngokupheleleyo ngolwazi oluyimfuneko lokuthintela ukuqhambuka kwezifo kwixesha elizayo. Oku kubonisa amanyathelo ancumisayo ngakumbi kubantu abadala nabantwana abaselula abasengozini kakhulu. Ngokusebenza ngokubambisana ngamandla, uluntu, imibutho engekho phantsi kukarhulumente, kunye neengcali zezempilo banethemba elikhulu lokwakha inkqubo yokukhathalelwa kwezempilo eqinileyo, ezinzileyo, nefikelela nakolona luntu luhlelelekileyo nolukude kakhulu needolophu.

Ukuphendula kumanani anyukayo esifo seswekile kunye noxinzelelo lwegazi, kuphehlelelwe iphulo elitsha leekliniki ezingomahambahamba kwiilali zasemaphandleni eMpuma Koloni kwiveki ephelileyo. Eli nyathelo lijolise ekuziseni iinkonzo zempilo ezikumgangatho ophezulu ebantwini, ngakumbi abo bahlala kude namaziko ezempilo karhulumente kwaye bejongene nemingeni yokunqongophala kwezithuthi. Ngokutsho kukaGqirha Nomandla Zondi, oyingcali yezempilo yoluntu, bangaphezulu kwamawaka amabini abahlali esele bexhamlile kolu hlelo ngokufumana unyango lwamahala, ugonyo lwabantwana, kunye novavanyo lwentsholongwane kaGawulayo. Ukongeza koku, abasebenzi bezempilo baqhuba iinkqubo zokufundisa uluntu ngokubaluleka kokutya ukutya okunesondlo nokwenza imithambo rhoqo ukuze kuthintelwe izifo ezingosuleliyo eziqhubeka zibulala abantu abaninzi ehlabathini. Abahlali bavakalise uvuyo olukhulu ngale nkqubo, bechaza ukuba izabasindisa kwiindleko ezinkulu zokuya ezidolophini ngenjongo yokufuna amayeza. Kulindeleke ukuba le nkqubo inatyiselwe nakwezinye iiphondo kwixesha elizayo, nanjengoko uphuhliso lwentlalo-ntle yabemi luxhomekeke kuluntu olusempilweni noluxhaswa ngamandla kwiimfuno zalo zonyango.

Ngaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu abahlali bakwingingqi yaseLusikisiki bathathe inxaxheba kwiphulo lokuhlola impilo jikelele eliqhutywe ngale mpelaveki idlulileyo. Eli nyathelo lijolise ekulweni ukwanda kwezifo ezingasuleliyo ezifana neswekile kunye noxinzelelo lwegazi, kunye nokuthintela ukusasazeka kwesifo sephepha nentsholongwane kaGawulayo, eziye zaba ngundaba-mlonyeni kwiindawo zasemaphandleni mva nje. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshwe ziingcali zempilo zengingqi, ukufunyanwa kwangoko kwezi zigulo kunceda kakhulu ekunciphiseni amathuba okugula ngokumandundu okanye ukusweleka ngesiquphe. Ukuxhasa le nkqubo, abongikazi kunye noonontlalontle basebenze ngokubambisana neenkokheli zemveli ukukhuthaza uluntu, ngakumbi ulutsha, ukuba lusebenzise iikliniki ezihamba ngamavili ebezimiswe kwiindawo ezifikelelekayo ezilalini. Nangona bekukho imingeni yokunqongophala kwezixhobo ezithile ekuqaleni kosuku, inkqubo iqhubeke ngempumelelo ngenxa yentsebenziswano egqwesileyo phakathi kwabahlali nabasebenzi bakarhulumente. Kukwacwangciswe ukuba la maphulo anatyiselwe nakwezinye izithili kwiphondo liphela kwiinyanga ezizayo, ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba wonke ummi ufumana unonophelo lwezempilo olumgangatho ophezulu ngaphandle kokunyanzeleka ukuba ahambe imigama emide ukuya ezibhedlele.

Kwiphulo elitsha lokulwa nesifo sephepha kunye neswekile, ngaphezulu kwamawaka amathathu abahlali baseNgcobo baye bafumana uncedo lwezempilo simahla kule veki iphelileyo. Iikliniki ezingomahambahamba zithe zatyhubela iilali ezikude, zisenza uvavanyo lwegazi nokuhambisa amayeza kwabo bangakwaziyo ukufikelela kumaziko ezempilo asezidolophini ngenxa yokunqongophala kwezithuthi. Omnye wamakhosikazi ohlala kuloo ngingqi uvakalise uvuyo lwakhe, esithi le nkqubo isindise ubomi babantu abadala abaninzi ababengenamandla okuhamba imigama emide ukuya kufuna unyango. Nangona isebe lezempilo liphambili kulo msebenzi, intsebenziswano namashishini abucala idlale indima enkulu ekuxhaseni ngezixhobo zonyango kunye nokutya okunesondlo kubantwana abangathathi ntweni. Ukusukela kwinyanga ezayo, la maphulo okukhuthaza impilo entle aza kwandiselwa nakwezinye iidolophu zaseMpuma Koloni, ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba wonke ummi unelungelo lokufumana ukhathalelo olukumgangatho ophezulu kufuphi namakhaya abo. Impilo entle yoluntu isisiseko sophuhliso loqoqosho, ngoko ke iinkokeli zemveli zikhuthaza abantu ukuba baqhubeke besebenzisa la mathuba ukuze kuthintelwe ukunwenwa kwezifo ezosulelayo nezinganyangekiyo.

Kwiphondo laseMpuma Koloni, amanani amakhulu abantu abahlala ezilalini ngoku bafumana uncedo lwezempilo olukhawulezileyo emva kokusungulwa kweenkliniki ezihamba ngamavili. Ukulwa nesifo sephepha kunye neswekile ibiyingxaki engathethekiyo kule minyaka idlulileyo, kodwa amaphulo amatsha azisa ithemba elikhulu kuluntu. Ngokweengxelo zakutshanje, bangaphezulu kwamawaka amahlanu abahlali esele bexilongiwe yaye bafumana amayeza kwiveki enye kuphela, nto leyo ebonisa impumelelo ebonakalayo yeli phulo. Ngaphezu koko, abasebenzi bezempilo basekuhlaleni basebenza ngokuzimisela okumangalisayo, behamba kwindlu ngendlu ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba abantu abadala, abakhulelweyo kunye nabantwana bayalufumana unyango olufanelekileyo ngaphandle kokuhlawula. Lo mkhankaso awugxilanga kuphela ekunikezeni amayeza, koko uquka nokufundisa uluntu ngokubaluleka kokutya okunempilo nococeko lwasekhaya. Ngenxa yale migudu iqhubekayo, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zivakalise umbulelo ongazenzisiyo, zigxininisa ukuba ukukhuthaza impilo entle nokuthintela izifo ezosulelayo kuhlala kuyeyona njongo iphambili yokwakha isizwe esomeleleyo, esinempilo nesikwaziyo ukuzimela kwixesha elizayo.

Ngaphezulu kwama-60 ekhulwini abahlali basemaphandleni kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni basokola ukufumana amayeza ezifo ezinganyangekiyo rhoqo ngenyanga. Ukulwa nale ngxaki, kuye kwasungulwa iikliniki ezingomahambahlala ngenjongo yokufikelela kwiindawo ezikude, apho uncedo lwezempilo lulunqabileyo kakhulu. Abasebenzi bezempilo abaphelelanga nje ekuhambiseni amachiza, kodwa bakwaqhuba namaphulo okufundisa uluntu ngokubaluleka kokulawula isifo seswekile kunye noxinzelelo lwegazi. Omnye wabongikazi balapha ekuhlaleni ugxininise ukuba ukufunyaniswa kwesigulo kwangethuba kusindisa ubomi, waza wakhuthaza abantu ukuba baye kuxilongwa kumaziko ezempilo akufuphi nabo ngaphandle kokulibazisa. Ngaphaya koko, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zibambisene namatsha-ntliziyo ukukhuthaza ukutya okunesondlo nokuzolula umzimba njengenxalenye yendlela yokuphila esempilweni ezilalini. Eli phulo libanzi kulindeleke ukuba linciphise kakhulu inani labaguli abangeniswa ezibhedlele ngongxamiseko kulo nyaka uzayo, ngaloo ndlela kuphuculwe intlalo-ntle nomgangatho wobomi ebantwini. Ukongeza koku, abazali bayacelwa ukuba baqinisekise ukuba abantwana babo bayawafumana onke amayeza okugonya afanelekileyo ukuze kuthintelwe ukunwenwa kwezifo ezosulelayo eluntwini.

Ngaphezulu kwama-60 ekhulwini abahlali baseMdantsane bafunyaniswe benesifo seswekile kunye noxinzelelo lwegazi kulo nyaka uphelileyo, imeko ebangela inkxalabo enkulu kwicandelo lezempilo. Ukulwa nale ngxaki, kuye kwasungulwa iphulo elikhulu lokuhlola impilo elibizwa ngokuba yi-"Mpilo Ntle" kwiiholo zasekuhlaleni ukusukela ekuqaleni kwale veki. Eli phulo linikezela ngoxilongo lwasimahla lwesifo sephepha, isifo seswekile, kwakunye novavanyo lwentsholongwane kaGawulayo kubo bonke abantu abakwiminyaka elishumi elinesibhozo nangaphezulu. Ethetha egameni lasekuhlaleni, uNkosikazi Nomsa Dlamini uvakalise imihlali ngeli phulo, esithi linceda kakhulu abo bangenamali yokuya koogqirha babucala okanye abahlala kude neekliniki. Nangona iinkonzo zikarhulumente zikho kwizibhedlele zengingqi, ukusondezwa kwaba basebenzi bezempilo eluntwini kulindeleke ukuba kunciphise amathuba okwanda kwezifo ezinganyangekiyo ngenxa yokufunyaniswa msinya. Ngoko ke, uluntu luyakhuthazwa ukuba luphume ngobuninzi balo luthabathe inxaxheba kolu hlelo luza kuqhubeka de kube sekupheleni kwale nyanga, ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa isizwe esizinzileyo nesinempilo entle.

Kwiveki ephelileyo, iilali ezikufutshane naseMthatha zithe zaxhamla kwiphulo elitsha lokugonya abantwana ukunqanda ukunwenwa kwesifo semasisi esesihlasele kakhulu kule minyaka idlulileyo. Ngokweengxelo zakutsha nje eziqokelelwe ngabaphandi, bangaphezulu kwamawaka amabini abantwana abathe bafumana olu ncedo kwizikolo nakwiikliniki eziyintloko kule ngingqi. Abasebenzi bezempilo bahambe indlu ngendlu, bexhobe ngamayeza nezixhobo zokuxilonga, beqinisekisa ukuba alikho ikhaya elishiyekayo kule nkqubo ibalulekileyo yothintelo-zifo. Ethetha egameni labahlali, umthunywa wengingqi uvakalise umbulelo omkhulu ngokuziswa kweenkonzo zonyango ngqo ebantwini, esithi oko kuza kunciphisa iindleko ezigqolozayo nohambo olude lokuya ezibhedlele zikawonke-wonke ezisezidolophini. Ngaphandle kokugonya kuphela, kuye kwanikezelwa neengcebiso ezinzulu ngendlela yokutya okunempilo nokugcina ucoceko emakhayeni ukuze kuthintelwe msinya izifo ezosulelayo ngexesha lasebusika. Eli phulo liyinxalenye yelinge elikhulu, kwaye kulindeleke ukuba linatyiselwe nakwezinye izithili zeli phondo kwiinyanga ezizayo, ngenjongo yokuphucula impilo yoluntu jikelele nokomeleza amajoni omzimba kulutsha.

Ukonyuka kwenani labantu abosulelwa sisifo sephepha kwiinyanga ezintandathu ezigqithileyo kunyanzelise iinkokheli zasekuhlaleni nabezempilo ukuba bathathe amanyathelo angqongqo. Kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, amaphulo okufundisa uluntu aqaliswe ngokusesikweni ukuze ancede ekunqandeni ukunwenwa kwesi sifo, kwakunye nokukhuthaza uphilo olungcono kubantu bonke. Ngaphezu koko, iikliniki ezingomahambahlala zithunyelwe nakwiindawo eziselalini ezikude apho abahlali bakufumanisa kunzima kakhulu ukufumana unyango olukhawulezileyo nolukumgangatho ophezulu. Enye yeenkokheli zoluntu, esebenza ngokuzinikela njengevolontiya lezempilo kule ngingqi, ivakalise inkxalabo yayo isithi ukhathalelo lwempilo kufuneka luqale ngaphakathi emakhayeni ngaphambi kokuba izigulane zinyanzeleke ukuba ziye ezibhedlele ezikhulu. Ngenxa yale nzame ihlangeneyo, abahlali ngoku banokufikelela lula kwiinkonzo zokuxilongwa simahla, ukucetyiswa ngezondlo ezifanelekileyo, kunye nokunikwa amayeza ngaphandle kokuhlawula nesenti. Ekugqibeleni, eli phulo aligcini nje ngokulwa izifo ezosulelayo, kodwa lakha isiseko esiluqilima sempilo-ntle yoluntu luphela, liqinisekisa ukuba akukho mntu usalela ngasemva ekufumaneni ukhathalelo lwezempilo olusindisa ubomi.

Ngaphezu kwesiqingatha sabantu abadala kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni baphila nezifo ezingasuleliyo ezifana neswekile kunye noxinzelelo lwegazi, imeko ekhuthaze ukuba kuqaliswe iphulo elikhulu lokuhlola impilo kwingingqi yaseQamata nakwiilali eziyingqongileyo. Eli phulo, eliqhutywa ngokubambisana phakathi kweengcali zempilo zasekuhlaleni kunye nemibutho engekho phantsi kukarhulumente, lijolise ekufikeleleni kumakhaya asemaphandleni apho uncedo lwezonyango lufumaneka nzima ngenxa yokunqongophala kwezithuthi. Ethetha egameni labahlali abaxhamleyo, uMnu. Sipho Radebe uvakalise imincili ngeli nyathelo lincomekayo, esithi liza kusindisa ubomi babantu abaninzi abebengakwazi ukuya kwiikliniki ezikude ngenxa yokugula nangokwaluphala. Ukuqinisekisa ukuba olu ncedo luzisa iinguqu ezibonakalayo nezomeleleyo, abongikazi abahambahambayo baxhobise uluntu ngolwazi olungundoqo malunga nokutya okunesondlo, ukulima iigadi zemifuno, kunye nokubaluleka kokuzilolonga imizimba yonke imihla. Nanjengoko le nkqubo yezempilo iza kuqhubeka kude kube sekupheleni kwale nyanga, kukhuthazwa wonke umntu, ingakumbi ulutsha, ukuba athabathe inxaxheba ebonakalayo ukuze kuncitshiswe umthwalo onzima obangelwa zezi zifo kumaziko ezempilo oluntu.

Kwilali yaseZithulele, inani labantu abachaphazeleka sisifo seswekile noxinzelelo lwegazi linyuke ngomyinge ongaphezulu kweshumi ekhulwini kulo nyaka uphelileyo, nto leyo edale ixhala elikhulu kubahlali. Ngenxa yale meko ixhwalekisayo, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zibambisene nabasebenzi bezempilo ukuqalisa iphulo elitsha elibizwa ngokuba yiMpilo Yethu, elijolise ekukhuthazeni ukutya okunesondlo nokuzolula umzimba mihla le. Oku kuquka ukusekwa kweekliniki ezingumahambayo ezijikeleza iilali ngeelali, zisenza uvavanyo lwasimahla kwaye zinika iingcebiso ngokhathalelo lwempilo oluluqilima. Ngaphezu koko, kuye kwaqulunqwa iinkqubo zokufundisa ezikolweni nakwiiholo zoluntu ukuqinisekisa ukuba ulwazi malunga nezifo ezingosuleliyo lufikelela nakubantu abatsha. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ngamandla ukuba basebenzise la mathuba axabisekileyo ukunqanda ezi zigulo ngaphambi kokuba zibe mandundu okanye zikhokelele ekufeni. Ukuphumelela kweli phulo kuxhomekeke kakhulu kwintsebenziswano ezinzileyo phakathi koluntu nababoneleli beenkonzo zempilo, ngoko ke kucelwa wonke ubani ukuba athathe inxaxheba ebonakalayo ekuqinisekiseni ikamva elinempilo kwisizwe siphela.

Kwisithili saseChris Hani, inani labantu abafumana unyango lwesifo sephepha linyuke ngokumangalisayo emva kwephulo lokuqwashisa ngezempilo eliqhutywe kule veki iphelileyo. Ngokweengxelo zakutshanje, bangaphezu kwamawaka amabini abahlali abathe bathabatha inxaxheba kwiinkqubo zovavanyo lwasimahla kwiikliniki ezihambahambayo. UMakhulu uNokhaya Dlamini, ongomnye wabahlali baseCofimvaba, uvakalise uvuyo lwakhe ngeli nyathelo, esithi ukusondezwa kweenkonzo ebantwini kuzisa ithemba kwaye kusindisa ubomi babantu abangenamandla okuhlawulela unyango olubizayo. Ukuxhasa le nkqubo, abezempilo bephondo ngokubambisana nemibutho engekho phantsi kukarhulumente banikezele ngezitofu zokugonya kunye neengcebiso ngezokutya okunesondlo. Nangona ucelomngeni lokunqongophala kwamayeza kwezinye iindawo zasemaphandleni lusekho, amagosa athembise ukuba aza kusebenza ngokuzimisela ukuqinisekisa ukuba onke amaziko anezixhobo ezifanelekileyo zokunceda izigulane. Ukongeza koko, iinkokeli zasekuhlaleni zikhuthaza uluntu ukuba luqhubeke nokutyelela amaziko ezempilo kwaye luthobele imiyalelo yoogqirha ukuze kuthintelwe ukunwenwa kwezifo kwingingqi yonkana.

Kwimizana esemaphandleni yaseMpuma Koloni, ukwanda okothusayo kwamanani abantu abaphethwe sisifo seswekile kunye noxinzelelo lwegazi kukhokelele kwiphulo elitsha lezempilo elikhokelwa luluntu. Kutshanje, kuthunyelwe iikliniki ezingomahambahamba ezixhotyiswe ngobuchwepheshe bale mihla ngenjongo yokufikelela kubantu abadala abafumana ubunzima ekuhambeni imigama emide ukuya kwizibhedlele ezikude. Ngokweengxelo zabasebenzi bezempilo, abahlali abangaphezulu kwamakhulu amahlanu esele befumene uxilongo lwamahhala, iingcebiso ngendlela yokutya, kunye namayeza kwisithuba seeveki ezimbini kuphela eziqale ngaso esi sikhokelo. Ngaphezu koko, eli phulo lixhaswa ngoomasipala basekuhlaleni ababonelela ngemfundo ngezondlo ezikolweni nakwiiholo zoluntu ukuze kukhuthazwe iindlela zokuphila ezisempilweni kwisizukulwana esitsha. Ngenxa yokunqongophala kwezixhobo zonyango kumaziko amaninzi karhulumente akule ngingqi, amaphulo afana neli adlala indima ebalulekileyo ekuthinteleni iingxaki ezinzulu zempilo phambi kokuba zifikelele kwinqanaba eliyingozi. Ukuba olu gqatselo luyaqhubeka ngale ndlela luhamba ngayo ngoku, iingcali zikholelwa ukuba umthwalo kwinkqubo yezempilo yoluntu uza kuncipha kakhulu phambi kokuba kuphele lo nyaka, kwaye izinga lokusweleka ngenxa yezifo ezingosuleliyo liya kuthotywa ngokubonakalayo.

Kwiphulo elitsha lokulwa nokwanda kwezifo ezingosuleliyo, amakhulu abahlali baseGqeberha athe abamba iindibano zokuxoxa ngezempilo kwiiholo zasekuhlaleni kule veki iphelileyo. Ngokwengxelo yamva nje ekhutshwe ziingcali zonyango, malunga namashumi amathathu ekhulwini abantu abadala kule ngingqi bajongene nengxaki yoxinzelelo lwegazi kunye nesifo seswekile, nto leyo ebeka ubomi babo emngciphekweni omkhulu. Ngenxa yale meko ixhwalekisayo ihlasela uluntu, abasebenzi bezempilo abahambahambayo baqalise iphulo elibanzi lokuhambela amakhaya ngamakhaya bexhobisa iintsapho ngolwazi oluphangaleleyo malunga nokutya okunesondlo nokubaluleka kokuzilolonga imihla ngemihla. Ukongeza kulo gqugula lokufundisa uluntu, amaziko ezempilo karhulumente andise iiyure zawo zokusebenza ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba wonke umntu ufumana unyango ngexesha elifanelekileyo, kwaye oku kunceda ekupheliseni ukulinda iiyure ezinde emikrweni eziklinikhi. Abahlali bavakalise uvuyo lwabo ngolu tshintsho, bechaza ukuba iinkonzo ezisondezwa ebantwini zenza umahluko obonakalayo ekukhuseleni impilo yabo. Eli nyathelo libonisa ukuzibophelela okumandla ekukhuthazeni intlalo-ntle yabantu bonke, kwaye kulindeleke ukuba linciphise kakhulu inani labaguli abalaliswa ezibhedlele kwiinyanga ezizayo.

Kwiveki ephelileyo, abahlali baseGqeberha nabakwingingqi yaseZwide baphume ngobuninzi babo ukuya kuthatha inxaxheba kwiphulo lezempilo elijolise ekulweni izifo ezingosuleliyo ezifana neswekile kunye noxinzelelo lwegazi. Eli phulo likhulu, ebeliquka ukuxilongwa simahla kwakunye nokuhanjiswa kweepilisi, linike ithemba elikhulu kuluntu olusoloko lujamelana nengxaki enzima yokunqongophala kwamayeza kwiikliniki zasekuhlaleni. Ethetha nentatheli ngeli phulo, omnye wabahlali osele ekwiminyaka engamashumi asixhenxe ubudala ubalule ukuba la manyathelo abaluleke kakhulu ekukhuseleni ubomi babantu abadala, abasetyhini nabantwana abaselula. Nangona amagosa ezempilo esenza imigudu engapheziyo yokuqinisekisa ukuba uncedo lonyango lufikelela kubantu bonke ngokulinganayo, iingcali kwezempilo zilumkisa ngelithi ukutya okunesondlo nokuzilolonga rhogo yeyona ndlela ingcono yokukhusela imizimba yethu kwizifo eziyingozi. Ukongeza kuloo nto, kulindeleke ukuba iinkonzo zonyango ezilolu hlobo zinwenwele nakwezinye iilali ezingqonge iMpuma Koloni kwiinyanga ezizayo ukuze kuphuculwe intlalo-ntle yoluntu ngokubanzi, ngakumbi kwabo bahlala kwiindawo ezingathathi ntweni apho izibonelelo zonyango zinqongopheleyo khona.

Emva kokunyuka ngequbuliso kwamanani abantu abaphethwe zizifo ezinganyangekiyo kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, kukho iphulo elitsha eliqalisiweyo lokukhuthaza impilo entle eluntwini. Eli phulo, elixhaswa ngabezempilo kunye neenkokheli zemveli, lijolise ekufundiseni abahlali ngokubaluleka kokutya okunesondlo nokwenza umthambo rhoqo ukuze kuthintelwe izigulo. Kwiikliniki ezininzi zasekuhlaleni, abongikazi ngoku banikela ngeenkonzo zokuxilonga iswekile kunye noxinzelelo lwegazi ngaphandle kwentlawulo, ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba iingxaki zempilo zifunyaniswa kwangoko. Ngokutsho kwengxelo ekhutshwe ziingcali zonyango kule veki iphelileyo, ukuthatha inxaxheba kweli hlelo kuya kunciphisa kakhulu umthwalo kwizibhedlele zikarhulumente ezixakeke ngokugqithisileyo. Ukuze le nkqubo iphumelele, iikomiti zempilo zasekuhlaleni zihamba indlu ngendlu zisasaza ulwazi oluphathelele kugonyo lwabantwana kunye nokhathalelo lwabantu abadala. Ngaphezu koko, abemi bayakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise la mathuba anqabileyo ukuze bakhusele amakhaya abo, bakhulise isizwe esomeleleyo, esikhutheleyo nesinempilo egqibeleleyo.

Ngenxa yokwanda okothusayo kwezifo ezingosuleliyo ezinjengeswekile noxinzelelo lwegazi, abahlali baseGugulethu bakhuthazwa ngamandla ukuba bathathe inxaxheba kwiphulo lokuhlola impilo lasimahla eliqale kule veki. Eli nyathelo libalulekileyo lijolise ekukhuthazeni impilo entle nokunqanda iingxaki zempilo phambi kokuba zibe mandundu, ngakumbi kubantu abadala nakwabo basengozini yokufumana izifo ezinganyangekiyo. Ethetha egameni loluntu, uNkosikazi Nomonde Faku uvakalise uvuyo lwakhe olukhulu ngale nkqubo, esithi inceda kakhulu abo bangenamali yokuya koogqirha babucala ababiza amaxabiso aphezulu. Ukongeza kuloo nto, oonobuhle bezempilo nabongikazi baphume ngobuninzi babo, behamba kwizitrato ngezitrato ukuze baqinisekise ukuba akukho mntu usalela ngasemva kule nkqubo yokhathalelo. Abantu abafunyaniswe beneengxaki zempilo baye badluliselwa kwiikliniki ezikufutshane ukuze bafumane unyango oluthe chatha kunye namayeza afanelekileyo. Ngaphezu koko, iingcali zonyango zilumkisa ngelithi ukutya ukutya okunesondlo nokuzilolonga rhoqo kubaluleke ngokulinganayo ukuxhasa la maphulo oncedo ukuze kuliwe nezifo. Kulindeleke ukuba le nkonzo inwenwele nakwezinye iilokishi ezikufutshane kwiveki ezayo, ngenjongo ephambili yokwakha isizwe esomeleleyo nesinempilo entle ngokwasemzimbeni nangokwasengqondweni.

Emaviki lamabili lendlulile, bafundzi labangetulu kwemakhulu lasihlanu esifundzeni saseShiselweni batfole emakhompyutha laphathwako lamasha kute kutfutfukiswe luhlelo lwekufundza ngebetheknoloji. Lesinyatselo sita ngesikhatsi tikolwa tasemaphandleni tibhekene nensayeya lenkhulu yekuswelakala kwetinsita tesimanjemanje, lokubangele kutsi lizinga lekuphumelela etifundvweni tesayensi nekhompyutha libe phansi kakhulu. Babukeli betemfundvo kanye nebatali bakwemukele ngetandla totimbili loku, baze baveta litsemba lekutsi kutawuvala sikhala lesikhona emkhatsini wetikolwa tasemadolobheni naleto tasemaphandleni. Ngetulu kwaloko, kulindzeleke kutsi linani lebafundzi labangenela tifundvo temazinga laphakeme emanyuvesi litekhula kakhulu eminyakeni letako ngenca yalokufinyelela elwatini lwedijithali. Kulesi simo, luhlelo lwekucecesha bothishela nalo selucalile kute bakhone kusebentisa letinsita ngalokuphelele, futsi loku kuhambisana nemgomo wavelonkhe wekugcizelela imfundvo yelizinga lelisetulu kuto tonkhe tigaba tekufundza.

Emizameni yekutfutfukisa lizinga lemfundvo etindzaweni tasemaphandleni, tikolwa letingetulu kwemashumi lasihlanu esifundzeni saseShiselweni titfole tinsita tetheknoloji letinsha kuleliviki leliphelile. Loluhlelo lolusha lulindzeleke kutsi lulungise tinkinga tekusilela emuva kwebafundzi etifundvweni tesayensi netibalo, letikhatsatse batali nabothishela sikhatsi lesidze kakhulu kuleli laseSwatini. Ngesikhatsi kwetfulwa letinsita etindvuneni tetiGodzi, balingisi betemfundvo bagcizelele sidzingo sekubambisana lokucinile emkhatsini wahulumende nemiphakatsi kuze kucinisekiswe kutsi lomtsetfomgomo wekufaka theknoloji emakilasini uyaphumelela futsi ufinyelela kubo bonkhe bantfwana. Ngaphezu kwaloko, emanyuvesi asendzaweni kanye netikhungo temfundvo lephakeme titawunika lucecesho loluchubekako kubothishela kute bakhone kusebentisa lamakhompyutha ngendlela lefanele emagumbini ekufundzela onkhe malanga. Loku kutawusita kakhulu ekulungiseleleni labafundzi kutsi bakhone kuncintisana emfundvweni lephakeme nasemakethe yemisebenti emhlabeni jikelele, ngesikhatsi kuncishiswa lugebe lwelwati emkhatsini walabo labahlala emadolobheni nalabo labasemaphandleni. Inhloso lenkhulu ngulokuvala buphuya ngekusebentisa imfundvo lesezingeni lelisetulu njengesikhali lesinemandla sekushintja timphilo tebantfu labasha.

Ngembi kwesikhatsi lesimatima sekufundza emaphandleni, bafundzi labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu esifundzeni saseManzini batfole litfuba lelisha lekutfutfukisa timphilo tabo ngemuva kwekuvulwa kwesikhungo lesisha semfundvo lephakeme kanye netikolwa tetemisebenti. Esikhatsini lesendlulile, laba bafundzi bebabhekana netinkinga tekuhamba emabanga lamadze kuya etikolweni letincono, lokwenta kutsi banyenti baphelelwe ngemandla ekuchubeka netifundvo tabo. Lomklamo lomkhulu uyingcenye yemtamo wekucedza kushoda kwetinsita tekufundza letifana netikhungo tekucwaninga ngesayensi kanye nemitapho yetincwadzi, futsi kulindzeleke kutsi unciphise kakhulu lizinga lebantfwana labashiya phansi tifundvo tabo bangakacedzi. Kantsi nasetikhungweni temfundvo lephakeme njemaNyuvesi, kucalisiwe kuhlelwa kabusha kwetinhlelo tekufundzisa kute tihambisane netidzingo temnotfo walamuhla kanye nethekinoloji. Batali kanye nemalunga emiphakatsi babalulekile kulesigaba selushintjo, ngako-ke bakhutsatwe kutsi babambisane nebothishela ekuvikeleni likusasa lebantfwana babo kuletikolwa letakhiwe. Ngekwentiwa kwaloluhlelo lolubanti, kubukeka shengatsi imfundvo yelive itawutfola lugcogco lolucinile lolutawusita ekwakheni titukulwane letifundzisekile, letinelwati, futsi letilungele kuncintisana emhlabeni jikelele etinhlelweni tetemisebenti kanye nakutemabhizinisi.

Tinkhulungwane letisihlanu tebafundzi betikolwa tasemaphandleni esifundzeni saseLubombo titawucala kusebentisa emakhompyutha ekufundzeni kwabo kusukela ngenyanga letako, kulandzela umkhankhaso lomusha wekutfutfukisa lwati lwetheknoloji etigodzini letisilele emuva. Lolu hlelo luhlose kucedza bukhashane lobukhona emkhatsini wetikolwa tasemadolobheni naleto letisemaphandleni, kute onkhe mabutfo elive atfole ematfuba lafanako emfundvo lesezingeni lelisetulu. Ngetulu kwekufakwa kwalamakhompyutha, bothishela labangemakhulu lamatsatfu sebacedze kuceceshwa ngalokuphelele kute bakhone kufundzisa kahle ngaloluhlelo lolusha futsi babhekane netinkinga tetheknoloji letingavela esikhatsini sekufundza. Nangabe loku kuphumelela njengobe kulindzelekile, litiko letemfundvo litawunabisa lomkhankhaso utsatse kulo lonkhe live eminyakeni lemibili letako, ufinyelele nakubafundzi basemanyuvesi labadinga lusito lwetinsita tekufundza tesimanjemanje. Lusha lwetikhungo letiphakeme tendawo nalo lubambe lichaza lelikhulu kulesinyatselo ngekunikela ngesikhatsi salo kute lusite ekulungiseni letinsita letishintja timphilo tabantfwana. Kukhula kwelizinga lemfundvo akusiti kuphela labafundzi labasakhula, kodvwa kuvula tindlela letinsha tekutfutfukisa umnotfo welive lonkhe esikhatsini lesitako, kunciphise nelizinga lekuphelelwa yimisebenti kubantfu labasha labaphuma etikolweni bengenalo lwati lolufanele lwemisebenti.

Etikolweni letinyenti tesigodzi saseLubombo, litsemba lelikhulu livukile kubafundzi nebatali kulandzela kwetfulwa kweluhlelo lolusha lwetheknoloji lwekutfutfukisa kufundza etindzaweni tasemaphandleni. Kwendlula emaphesenti langemashumi lasitfupha ebantfwana bakulesi sifundza bebachubeka nekubhekana netinsita letishotako, lokwenta kutsi kube matima kungenela emanyuvesi netikhungo temfundvo lephakeme. Kute kubhekwane nalenkinga, kukhishwe tishayamtsetfo letinika tikolwa emandla ekusebentisa tindlela tesimanje tekufundzisa letihlanganisa kusetjentiswa kwema-computer kanye ne-inthanethi yamahhala. Ngetulu kwaloko, bothishela labangetulu kwemakhulu lamabili sebacalile kutfola kuceceshwa lokukhetsekile kute bakhone kuhambisana nalolushintjo lolusheshako kutemfundvo yalelive. Loku kutawusita bafundzi kutsi bakhone kwenta lucwaningo lwabo ngalokujulile, baphindze balungele tindlela tekufundza letisetjentiswa emhlabeni wonkhe. Baphatsi betemfundvo bavakalise kutsi lomkhankhaso awugcini nje ngekunika bantfwana lwati lwetincwadzi, kodvwa wakha sisekelo lesicinile lesitawucinisekisa kutsi tiqu tabo tibaluleka emakethe yemisebenti yalamuhla, futsi kunciphise nelizinga lekungasebenti kwebantfu labasha.

Ngemuva kweminyaka leminyenti yekusilela emuva kutekufundza, bafundzi labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu etikolweni tasemaphandleni sebatawutfola tinsita tethekhinoloji yesimanje kulesigaba sekucala semnyaka. Loku kuta kulandzela kucedvwa kweluhlelo lolusha lwekusakata emakhompyutha netibhebhe emakilasini, lokuyimemetelo lehlose kuvala sikhala lesijulile lesikhona emkhatsini wetikolo tasemadolobheni naleto tasemaphandleni. Bothishela labanyenti kanye nebatali bavakalise kujabula lokukhulu ngalelinyatselo, babalula kutsi kufakwa kwe-inthanethi mahhala kutawutfutfukisa lizinga lemiphumela yetivivinyo tekuphela kwemnyaka. Ngetulu kwaloko, emanyuvesi akulelive nawo atawuzuza kakhulu ngobe laba bafundzi labaphumelelako batabe sebanelwati lolufanele lwekubhekana netifundvo temabanga laphakeme. Nangabe lomkhankhaso uchubeka ngemandla, tati tetemfundvo tibiketela kutsi lizinga lekufundza litawukhuphuka ngemaphesenti langemashumi lamabili eminyakeni lemitsatfu letako.
