Noma kunetinsita letinengi letisadzingeka kute kucatululwe letinye tinkinga letifana nekuswelakala kwemakilasi lenele, letingucuko tikhombisa litsemba lelikhulu lekutsi luhlelo lwetemfundvo luyatfutfuka, futsi lulungiselela intsha likusasa lelichakatseko emnotsweni welive lonkhe jikelele.

Ngesikhatsi tindlela tekufundza tichubeka nekugucuka emhlabeni wonkhe, emaphesenti langetulu kwemashumi lasitfupha etikolwa tasemaphandleni asabhekene nensayeya lenkhulu yekuswelakala kwetinsita tebuchwephesha tesimanje. Loku kubangela kutsi bafundzi labaphuma kuletindzawo, nabafika emanyuvesi nakulamanye emakolishi lamakhulu, batfole kumatima kakhulu kuhambisana netinhlelo tetifundvo letidzinga lwati lolujulile lwemakhompyutha. Kute kubhekwane nalesimo lesikhatsatako, babambisani betemfundvo kanye nebaholi bemiphakatsi sebacale imikhankhaso lecinile yekufaka i-inthanethi emagumbini ekufundzela, kantsi baphindze banikela nangemishini yekufundza lefana netibhebhe. Ngaphezu kwaloko, baphenyi nabacwaningi betemfundvo baveta kutsi lizinga lemphumelelo yebafundzi litawukhuphuka ngemandla nangabe kucinisekiswa kutsi luhlelo lahulumende lwekwaba timali lufinyelela ngalokufanele nakuleto tikolwa letikhashane. Kuloluhlelo lolusha, akusito kuphela tinsita letidzingekako, kodvwa kubalulekile futsi kutsi bothishela batfole kuceceshwa lokuphelele kuze bakhone kusebentisa letinsita ngalokufanele ngetikhatsi tetifundvo tabo tamalanga onkhe. Imphumelelo yalesinyatselo lesikhulu itawusita kakhulu ekwakheni sisekelo lesicinile setemfundvo, lokutawulungiselela intsha yakusasa kutsi ikhone kuncintisana emisebentini yelizinga lelisetulu emnotsfweni wemhlaba jikelele.

Etindzaweni letinyenti tasemaphandleni, bafundzi labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu sebacale kutfola tinsita tetheknoloji kute kutfutfukiswe lizinga lemfundvo etikolweni tabo. Lesinyatselo lesihle sita ngemuva kwekhatsateka lokukhulu kwebatali ngekushiyeka emuva kwebantfwana babo etifundvweni letidzinga emakhono esayensi, ikakhulukati uma kucatsaniswa nalabo labafundza emadolobheni. Kute kubhekwane nalenselelo, tikhungo temfundvo lephakeme kanye nemanyuvesi akuleli asungule tinhlelo letinsha tekufukula nekucecesha bothishela kuze bakhone kumelana netingucuko tesimanje tekufundzisa. Nakubhekwa kahle, letinhlelo tiyincenye yenchubomgomo lensha yavelonkhe lehlose kucinisekisa kutsi onkhe emakilasi, ngisho nalawa lakhashane kakhulu, afakelwa emakhompyutha kanye neluchumano lwe-inthanethi phambi kwekuphela kwemnyaka lotako. Ngaloku, litsemba livuselelwe emiphakatsini leminyenti kutsi imiphumela yetivivinyo tekuphela kwemnyaka itawukhombisa lizinga lelisetulu lekuphumelela kwabafundzi. Lokukhula kwelizinga lekufundza kutawuvula ematfuba lamasha kubantfwana labalungiselela kuchubeka netifundzo tabo, kukhutsate nesive sonkhe kutsi sibambisane ekwakheni likusasa lelichakatseke ngetemfundvo.

Kulinganiselwa kutsi bafundzi labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu emaphandleni batfole emakhompyutha laphathwako kuleliviki leliphelile, ngenjongo yekutfutfukisa lizinga lemfundvo kanye nekufaka theknoloji ekufundzeni kwamalanga onkhe. Lomkhankhaso lomusha uletse litsemba lelikhulu kubatali kanye nebothishela bakaNgwane, njengoba uvala sikhala sekushoda kwetinsita tekufundza etikolweni letinyenti lebetisele emuva kakhulu. Noma kunjalo, inkinga yekungatfolakali kwemoya we-inthanethi losebenta kahle isachubeka nekuba ngumtsentse lohlaba emaphikweni ekuchubekeleni embili kwaloluhlelo etindzaweni letikhashane nemadolobha. Kute kucatjululwe lesimo lesimatima, tinhlangano letitimele seticale kubambisana nebalawuli betemfundvo ephakeme kanye nemanyuvesi lamakhulu kute kwakhiwe tikhungo tetheknoloji letitawusita bafundzi nabenta emaphrojekthi abo elucwaningo. Lokufundza ngekusebentisa tindlela tesimanje akusiti nje kuphela ekuphumeleleni kweluhlolo lwekuphela kwemnyaka, kodvwa kuhlomisa labasha ngemakhono ladzingekako emakethe yemisebenti emhlabeni wonkhe jikelele. Ngenca yalelinyatselo lelihle, bantfwana labanyenti nyalo sebakhona kutfola lwati lolubanti lolutabavulela ematfuba lamahle esikhatsini lesitako, futsi loko kutawuphakamisa umnotfo welive lonkhe ngelizinga lelisetulu.

Emakhulwini ebafundzi labacedze timviwo tabo tamatikuleti kulomnyaka, linyenti libhekane nenselelo lenkhulu yekutfola tikhala etikhungweni temfundvo lephakeme. Kulinganiselwa kutsi emaphesenti langetulu kwemashumi lasitfupha entsha yakulelive isahleti emakhaya ngenca yekuswelakala kwetimali tekubhadalela inyuvesi kanye nemakolishi langemavulandlela. Ngesikhatsi inyuvesi yakaNgwane kanye naletinye tikolwa tetingcweti tetama kwandzisa ematfuba ekufundza, kunesidzingo lesiphutfumako sekusekela bafundzi netinsita tekufundza kute bangasali emuva. Kute kucatululwe lesimo lesitsintsa likusasa lentsha, kucalwe tinhlelo letinsha tekufundzisa letisebentisa thekinoloji yamanje kuze kufinyelelwe nakulabo labahlala emaphandleni. Ngaphezu kwaloko, babambisani betemfundvo bagcizelela kutsi kubalulekile kubuketa tinchubomgomo letikhona kute tihambisane netidzingo temnotfo walamuhla. Lomkhankhaso wekutfutfukisa temfundvo awugcini nje ngekwenta ncono lizinga letikolwa kuphela, kodvwa uphindze ucinisekise kutsi onkhe mntfwana welive utfola litfuba lelingakhetsi lekucija emakhono akhe. Loku kutawusita kakhulu ekulungiseleleni batfwana emisebenti yakusasa, kunciphise lizinga lekungasebenti, siphindze sakhe sive lesifundzisekile nalesinelwati lolujulile ekuletseni intfutfuko.

Emaphesenti langemashumi lasitfupha ebafundzi labafundza etikolweni tasemaphandleni asabhekene nensayeya lenkhulu yekuswelakala kwetinsita tebuchwepheshe besimanje, lokuyintfo lebambesela lizinga lemfundvo yabo. Ngesikhatsi kuphetfwa umhlangano wavelonkhe wekucocisana ngetemfundvo kuleliviki leliphelile, babambisani labehlukene bavumelene ngekudzimate bafake sandla kulesimo lesikhatsatako. Emanyuvesi ambalwa lakatiko, asebentisana netinhlangano letingekho ngaphansi kwahulumende, asetfule luhlelo lolusha lwekuniketa bothishela kuceceshwa lokukhetsekile kute bakhone kufundzisa ngekusebentisa emakhompyutha. Loku kulindzeleke kutsi kugucule indlela bafundzi labamunya ngayo lwati, kuvule nethuba lekutsi bakhone kuncintisana nalamanye emave emfundvweni lephakeme nangetulu. Batali kanye nebandlancane betikolo bavakalise injabulo yabo ngalelinyatselo, babalula kutsi kufakwa kwetinhlelo tetidijithali kutawunciphisa lizinga lekufeyila nekuyekela sikolo kubantfwana. Noma kunjalo, kusetidzingo letimcoka kutsi kwakhiwe tikhungo letenele letitawesekela loluhlelo kuto tonkhe tifundza, kuqinisekiswa kutsi kute umfundzi losala emuva kuloluhambo lwekutfutfukisa emakhono elikusasa.

Emaviki lambalwa landlulile, babalelwa etinkhulungwaneni letisihlanu bafundzi bakaMatikuletjeni labatfole litfuba lekubhalisela kufundza emanyuvesi kanye nemakolishi ngaphansi kweluhlelo lolusha lwekwesekela temfundvo etindzaweni tasemaphandleni. Lesinyatselo lesibalulekile siletsa litsemba lelikhulu kubatali kanye nebaholi bemiphakatsi, njengobe kunesikhatsi lesidze tikolwa letinyenti tibhekana nenkinga yekuswelakala kwetinsita tekufundzisa tesimanjemanje, ikakhulukati etifundvweni tetesayensi. Ngesikhatsi kwetfulwa lomkhankhaso embikwesive esifundzeni saseShiselweni, bameleli betinhlangano letingekho ngaphansi kwahulumende bagcizelele sidzingo sekubambisana emkhatsini wabothishela, bafundzi, kanye netiphatshimandla kute kucinisekiswe kutsi lizinga lekufundza liyaphakanyiswa ngemandla onkhe. Kute kusekelwe lombono, kubekwe sabelo setimali letinyenti lesitawusetjentiselwa kuvuselela takhiwo tetikolwa letigugile nekwakha emalabhorethri ethekinoloji, kuze labasakhula bakhone kuncintisana netingucuko tetemnotfo wemhlaba wonkhe. Inkinga yekuyekela sikolwa kwebafundzi basebancane nayo ilindzeleke kutsi inciphe kakhulu ngenca yalesikhwama sekusita labaswele. Kute kuphunyeleliswe lomgomo lomusha, tonkhe takhamuti tiyanxuswa kutsi tibambisane netiphatsimandla ngesikhatsi sekulungiswa kwaletakhiwo letinkhulu kute kuncishiswe kuphatamiseka kwetinsita tamalanga onkhe, siphindze sicinisekise kutsi kutfutfuka kwelidolobha akusali emuva.

Kweswelakala kwemanti lahlobile sekuphendvuke insayeya lenkhulu kubahlali baseShiselweni, lokusundvute tiphatsimandla kutsi titsatse tinyatselo letisheshako kute kuphephe imiphakatsi. Kulandzela tikhalo letinyenti letivela kubakhamuti, umasipala wendzawo nyalo uvete luhlelo lolusha lwetigidzi letingemashumi lamabili emarandi ngenhloso yekwakha emadamu lamasha nekufaka emaphayiphi esimanjemanje latakwendlulisela emanti emakhaya. Lesinyatselo silindzeleke kutsi siletse lushintjo lolubonakalako etimphilweni tebantfu labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu, labebasolo baphuza emanti langakaphephi emifuleni nasemifudlaneni. Ngetulu kwaloko, baholi bendzawo bagcizelele kutsi kutfola lemisebenti kutawunciphisa kakhulu tifo letitsatselwanako letibangelwa kungahambi kahle kwendle kulesigodzi. Ngeliviki leliphelile, litiko letemisebenti yahulumende licacisile kutsi lomsebenti lomkhulu utawucala ekupheleni kwenyanga letako. Inkhontileka inikwe tinkampani takuleli kute kudalwe ematfuba emisebenti kubantfu labasha bendzawo labebaphelelwe litsemba. Kantsi futsi, kwelulekwa tonkhe takhamuti kutsi tibambisane nebakhi, tiphindze tibike emaphoyiseni noma ngabe ngukuphi kuphazamiseka lokungavela ngesikhatsi kusetjentwa kulesakhiwo lesibaluleke kangaka ekutfutfukisweni kwemnotfo wasemakhaya.

Emkhatsini wekushoda kwemanti lokuchubeke tinyanga letisita letendlulile, takhamuti taseShiselweni setitawutfola lusito lolubalulekile ngemuva kwekucedvwa kweluhlelo lolusha lwekuhambisa emanti etindzaweni tasemakhaya. Lomklamo lomkhulu, lobita tigidzi letingemashumi lasihlanu emalangeni, uvulwe ngalokusemtsetfweni kuleliviki leliphelile ngenhloso yekucatulula tinkinga tetinsita tamasipala letikhatsate bantfu sikhatsi lesidze. Ngaphandle kwekwakha emadamu lamasha ekugcina emanti, kutawufakwa emaphayiphi lamakhulu latsengwe kulamanye emave, latawenta sisekelo sekutsi onkhe emakhaya atfole emanti lahlobile futsi laphephile ngaphandle kwekuphatamiseka. Sekuphele iminyaka leminyenti ummango wakuleli dolobha ubhekana netikhalo letifanako tekoma, lokwenta lombikombiko wekutfutfukiswa kwengcondvomsiti uletse litsemba lelisha netingucuko letibonakalako emphakatsini. Ngesikhatsi kwentiwa lomsebenti, tikhulu tamasipala ticele tonkhe takhamuti kutsi tibambisane netisebenti teticashwa letitawube tisebenta kuleyondzawo, futsi kucelwa nemmango kutsi ugadze tintfo tahulumende kute tingacekelwa phansi nobe tebiwe tigebengu. Ngekusho kwemibiko yelikhansela laleNdzawo, kulindzeleke kutsi lomsebenti wekumba nekuvuselela uphothulwe ngaphambi kwekuphela kwenyanga yeNhlaba kulomnyaka, lokutawuletela imindeni lengengetulu kwetinkhulungwane letintsatfu imphilo lencono kakhulu nekuvula ematfuba emisebenti labalulekile kubantfu labasha labangasebenti.

Ngemuva kwekushoda kwemanti lokutsatse isikhatsi lesidze kwakhungetsa sifundza saseManzini, sekuvele litsemba lelisha njengoba kucalwe luhlelo lolukhulu lwekutfutfukisa tingidvomsika tekuhambisa manti lahlobile. Loku kuta emva kwekuba takhamuti tivakalise tikhalo tato etikhatsini letinyenti emihlanganweni yendzawo mayelana nebungetima lobukhulu bekutfola tinsita letisisekelo ekuphileni kwamalanga onkhe. Ngaleyo ndlela, tikhulu tamasipala, ngokubambisana netinhlangano letitimele, tibeke eceleni tigidzi letingemashumi lamabili temalangeni kute kwakhiwe emadamu lamasha futsi kulungiswe emaphayiphi lagugile emiphakatsini leyehlukene. Kulindzeleke kutsi lephrojekthi iphotfulwe ngemnyaka lotako, kanti itawusita emakhaya langetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu kutsi atfole manti ngaphandle kwekuphatamiseka. Ngesikhatsi umsebenti uchubeka etindzaweni letitsintsekako, baholi bemiphakatsi bakhutsate tonkhe takhamuti kutsi tibambisane netisebenti tahulumende futsi tivikele letakhiwo kute tigweme koniwa kanye nekwebiwa kwaletingidvomsika letibalulekile. Ngetulu kwaloko, kwetfulwe umtsetfomgomo lomusha wekonga manti lotawucinisekisa kutsi lomtfombo wemvelo usetjentiswa ngendlela lefanele, kuncishiswe kumoshwa kwawo kute kutewusitakala netitukulwane letitako.

Ngemuva kwetinyanga letinyenti tekushoda lokukhulu kwemanti etindzaweni tasemaphandleni, simo setinsita temmango sesitawushintja ngemandla kuleliviki. Emkhandlwini wendzawo yaseMbabane, tikhulu timemetele luhlelo lolusha lwekulungisa emaphayiphi lagugile kanye nekwakha emadamu lamasha ekugcina emanti lahlantekile. Tigidzi letingetulu kwemashumi lasihlanu emarandi tabekelwe lephrojekthi lebalulekile ledzinga kucedvwa ngaphambi kwekuphela kwalomnyaka wetimali. Ekukhulumeni kwakhe netakhamuti emhlanganweni wemango itolo, Sodolobha ugcizelele kakhulu sidzingo sekubeketela ngesikhatsi kusetjentwa kulemiklamo. Waphindze wacela emalunga emmango kutsi abambisane netiphatshimandla kute kuvikelwe lengcondvomshini lemisha, kuvinjelwe nekucekelwa phansi kwetimphahla tahulumende. Linyatselo lelinjengaleli aligcini nje ngekutfutfukisa kutfunyelwa kwemanti emakhaya, kodvwa liphindze lidlale indzima lenkhulu ekuvuleni ematfuba emisebenti kubantfu labasha labahlala kulendzawo. Nawuphumelela kahle lomkhankhaso, utawusita imindeni letinkhulungwane letilishumi letibhekane nebumatima, siphindze sicinisekise kutsi yonkhe imigomo yentfutfuko lesimeme iyafinyelelwa ngalokuphelele kulo lonkhe lidolobha.

Emkhatsini wekukhula kwenkinga yekushoda kwemanti etindzaweni tasemakhaya, takhamuti taseShiselweni temukele ngenjabulo umklamo lomusha wekutfutfukisa tingidzi tekuhlunga manti lotabita tigidzi letingemashumi lamabili temalangeni. Loku kuta ngemuva kweminyaka leminyenti yekukhala kwebantfu ngetinsita tamasipala letingakenele, lokwente kutsi baphatsi babukisise kabusha tinchubomgomo tekuniketwa kwetinsita letisisekelo kulelidolobha. Ngembi kwekucala kwalomsebenti lobalulekile ngenyanga letako, umphakatsi utiswe ngalokusemtsetfweni kutsi kutawuba nekuphatamiseka kwesikhashana ekuhanjisweni kwemanti kute kuvunyelwe basonkontileka bafake emaphayiphi lamasha endzaweni yonkhe. Ngetulu kwaloko, sekusungulwe likomidi lelikhetsekile lelitawusebenta njengeliso lemphakatsi kute licinisekise kutsi tonkhe tikhalo tabo tiyavakala ngesikhatsi sekwakhiwa. Ngaleyo ndlela, litiko letemisebenti yahulumende litsembise kutsi litawugadza luhlelo lonkhe kucinisekisa kutsi timali tembuso tisetjentiswa ngendlela lefanele lengenayo inkhohlakalo, futsi lomklamo uphotfulwa ngesikhatsi lesibekiwe. Kukhutsatwe yonkhe imiphakatsi lezuzako kutsi ibambisane nebaholi bendzawo kanye nemakhansela ekuvikeleni letakhiwo letinsha etigebengwini letonako, njengobe letinsita tibaluleke kakhulu ekutfutfukiseni temphilo nenhlalakahle yelive lonkhe.

Ngemuva kwetimvula letinkulu letibangele umonakalo lomkhulu kwingqalasizinda yemigwaco esifundzeni saseManzini, masipala wakhona sewumemetele isabelomali lesisha setigidzi letisihlanu temaLangeni kute kulungiswe imigodi futsi kutfutfukiswe netinhlelo tekuhambisa emanti. Kulemaviki lamabili landlulile, takhamuti betisolo tikutfola kumatima kufinyelela edolobheni ngenca yesimo lesibi semigwaco leholele ekutseni kume kancane kwekuhamba kwemabhizinisi. Nakakhuluma emhlanganweni wemmango lobewubanjwe itolo, makeya walelidolobha ucinisekise sive kutsi bosontrakta sebatfunyelwe etindzaweni letitsintsekile futsi batacala kusebenta ngemsombuluko lotako kute kulungiswe lomotfo ngekushesha. Ngetulu kwaloko, takhamuti tikhutsatwa ngemandla kutsi tibambisane netiphatsimandla ngekutsi tibike noma ngukuphi kuvuta kwemanti kanye nemigodi lemisha enombolweni yamahhala kute kuvinjelwe lomunye umonakalo etindzaweni tato. Lesinyatselo sisincenye yeluhlelo lolubanti lwahulumende loluhlose kucinisekisa kutsi kuniketwa tinsita tamasipala letiphephile, letisezingeni lelisetulu naletitsembekile kubo bonkhe bantfu, kantsi kulindzeleke kutsi lephrojekthi iphotfulwe ngaphambi kwekuphela kwenyanga letako.

Ngemuva kweminyaka leminyenti yekuhlupheka ngemigwaco lemibi kanye nekuswelakala kwemanti lahlobile, takhamuti taseMbabane nyalo setitawubona lizinga lelincono letinsita tamasipala. Tigidzi letingemashumi lasihlanu temarandi setibekelwe eceleni kute kucale luhlelo lolusha lwekulungisa tintfo letisisekelo kulelidolobha kusukela ngenyanga letako. Loku kudalulwe nguMphatsi weDolobha ngesikhatsi etfula isabelomali semnyaka lotako emhlanganweni wemkhandlu, lapho agcizelele khona kutsi kutfutfukiswa kwemimango kute kutewuba yintfo lehamba embili. Kukhutsatwa onkhe emalunga emmango kutsi abambe lichaza etinhlelweni tekubonisana letitawubanjwa emavikini latako etindzaweni letehlukene, kuze bakhone kuveta timvo tabo ngaloluhlelo lwentsandvo yelinyenti. Kulindzeleke kutsi lomsebenti uvule ematfuba emisebenti langetulu kwemakhulu lamabili kubantfu labasha labahlala kulesigodzi. Ngaletincomo letinsha, kuhloswe kutsi kuncishiswe kukhonona kwebantfu futsi kucinisekiswe kutsi intfutfuko ifinyelela kuto tonkhe tigodzi ngalokulinganako ngaphandle kwelubandlululo, kute wonkhe umuntfu atitfolele tinsita letifanele ngesikhatsi lesifanele.

Ngemuva kwetinyanga letisitfupha tekuswelakala kwemanti lanatsekako etikolweni nasemimangweni, takhamuti taseMbabane tivuke ngetindzaba letimnandzi njengoba umklamo lomusha wemaphayiphi sewuphothuliwe. Lomsebenti lomkhulu, lobite tigidzi letingemashumi lasihlanu emarandi, kulindzeleke kutsi uletse lushintjo lolubonakalako etimphilweni tebantfu labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letingemashumi lamabili. Bantfu bakuleyondzawo bavakalise kujabula kwabo ngalentfutfuko, baveta kutsi loku kutawucedza tifo letitsatselwanako lebetibangelwa kunatsa emanti langakahlanteki emifuleni. Ngesikhatsi avula loku ngalokusemtsetfweni, Ndvunankhulu wasekhaya ugcizelele sidzingo sekubambisana emkhatsini webaholi bendzabuko kanye namasipala kuze kuvikelwe lengcondvomshini kute ingacekelwa phansi. Kantsi ngakulolunye luhlangotsi, lelikhansela litsembise kutsi luhlelo lolulandzelako lutawugxila ekufakweni kwemagesi etindzaweni tasemakhaya letisalele emuva. Ngetulu kwaloko, kutawucashwa intsha yalendzawo emsebentini wekunakekela lamaphayiphi, lokuyintfo letawunciphisa lizinga lekungasebenti. Noma kunjalo, tikhulu tikhutsate tonkhe takhamuti kutsi tichubeke nekonga lamanti njengoba litulu lisengakani ngalokwenele. Kuphumelela kwalesinyatselo kukhombisa kutibophafela ekutfutfukiseni tinsita tesive kanye nekuphakamisa lizinga letenhlalo netemnotfo kulesigodzi.

Ngemuva kweminyaka lemine yekushoda kwemanti lacwebile, takhamuti letingetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu esifundzeni saseShiselweni titawutfola lusito njengoba kucale luhlelo lolusha lwekuletfwa kwetinsita letisisekelo. Loku kuta ngesikhatsi umkhandlu wamasipala wendzawo umemetela sabelomali setigidzi letingemashumi lamabili emalangeni, lesihloselwe ngco kuvuselela emaphayiphi lagugile kanye nekwakha emadamu emanti lamasha etindzaweni tasemakhaya. Ngekusho kwemeleli wemkhandlu labekhuluma emhlanganweni wemmango itolo ekuseni, lomsebenti awugcini nje ngekuletfa emanti, kodvwa utawudala ematfuba emsebenti langemakhulu lamabili kubantfu labasha bakulendzawo labebaphelelwe litsemba. Kulindzeleke kutsi lesigaba sekucala salomklamo siphothulwe ngaphambi kwenyanga yaMhlaba, futsi tinhlelo leticinile tekugadza titawufakwa kute kucinisekiswe kutsi timali tembuso tisetjentiswa ngendlela lefanele lengenayo inkhohlakalo. Ngesikhatsi lesifanayo, baholi bemiphakatsi bakhutsate tonkhe takhamuti kutsi tibambisane nabosonkontileka, tiphindze tibike emaphoyiseni noma ngabe ngukuphi kucekelwa phansi kwetinsitancanti kute kugwemeke kubambetseka kwalomsebenti lomkhulu kangaka. Sinyatselo lesinjengalesi sikhombisa kutibophafunga lokutsite ekutfutfukiseni timphilo tebantfu kanye nekufezekisa imigomo yentfutfuko lesimeme.

Ngenyanga lephelile, emakhulu etisakhamuti takaManzini avakalise kukhatsateka lokukhulu ngesimiso lesibutsakatsaka sekutfutfwa kwetibi emalokishini asedolobheni. Kuphendvula lesikhalo, masipala wendzawo umemetele luhlelo lolusha lwekuhlobisa simo sendzawo lolutawucala kusebenta ekupheleni kwaleliviki. Loku kufaka ekhatsi kutsengwa kwemaloli lamasha lasiphohlongo kanye nekwandziswa kwetisebenti teticashwa kute kucinisekiswe kutsi yonkhe imigwaco ihlobile futsi iphephile. Ngetulu kwaloko, baphatsi belidolobha bakhutsate ummango kutsi ubambisane nekhansela ngekubika bantfu labalahla tikhwama tetibi etindzaweni letingakagunywatwa. Ngekusho kwemtsetfo lomusha wamasipala, labo labatfolakala bephula lomgomo batakwiswa inhlawulo lengaba yinkhulungwane yemalangeni. Lesinyatselo lesicinile sitsatfwe ngemuva kwekucaphela kutsi kungcola kwendzawo kubanga tifo letitsatselwanako letifana nesifo semkhuhlane wesisu. Ekugcineni, kuhloswe kuvikela imphilo yemphakatsi kanye nekulondvolota buhle belidolobha kuto tonkhe titukulwane letitako, ngako-ke kusebentisana kwabobonkhe bantfu kubaluleke kakhulu kulesikhatsi samanje kute sibe nedolobha lelihlantekile.

Sekuphele iminyaka lengetulu kwesihlanu takhamuti taseNkomazi tibhekene nenkinga yekuswelakala kwemanti, lokuyisimo lesibukeka sitawutfola sisombululo madvutane. Tikhungo tetempilo kanye netikolwa letikulesifundza betivame kuvala eminyango yato ngaphambi kwesikhatsi ngenca yekusweleka kwalamanti, kantsi loku bekubeka likusasa lebantfwana engotini. Loku kulandzela simemetelo lesentiwe ngumkhandlu wamasipala wendzawo wekutsi kutawucalwa luhlelo lolusha lwekulungisa emaphayiphi lamadzala kanye nemadamu latakhamatisa letindzawo letakhelene. Tigidzi letingemashumi lasihlanu temarandi setibekelwe eceleni kute tisekele lomklamo wekutfutfukisa tinsitamphakatsi, lotawuphindze uvule ematfuba emisebenti kubantfu labasha kulesigodzi. Ngekusho kwabongusondvoko labengamele tekutfutfukiswa kwemiphakatsi, loku akusutawugcina nje ngekuletsa emanti lahlobile, kodvwa kutawutfutfukisa netempilo kanye nenhlanteko. Ngetulu kwaloko, kwakhiwa kwaletinsita kutawunciphisa tindleko letinkhulu lebetisetjentiswa makhaya ekutsengeni emanti emalolini langasemtsetfweni. Kwanyalo, umphakatsi uyakhutsatwa kutsi ubambisane netiphatsimandla ngekuvikela letinsita letakhiwako kute tigcineke sikhatsi lesidze, njengoba tinhlelo tekufaka emamitha lamasha tisetawuchubeka ngemandla etinyangeni letisitako.

Ngemuva kwetinyanga letisita tekuswelakala kwemanti lahlobile endzaweni yaseMatsapha kanye nasemaphetselweni ayo, sekucalwe luhlelo lolusha lwekulungisa emaphayiphi lagugile lolucondziswe ekucedzeni lenkinga. Lesabelo setimali lesingange-E15 wetigidzi, lesikhishwe makhansela elidolobha, sitawusetjentiswa ekwakheni emadamu lamancane, kuvuselela imitfombo, kanye nekufaka bompompi emiphakatsini letsintsekile kakhulu. Kute lomsebenti uphothulwe ngemphumelelo nangaphansi kwesikhatsi lesibekiwe, bahlali balendzawo bayakhutsatwa kutsi babambisane netisebenti takamasipala letitawube tisebenta emkhatsini wabo onkhe malanga. Ngaphezu kwaloko, umtsetfomgomo lomusha welidolobha udzinga kutsi kusungulwe emakomiti ezigatjana atawugadza letakhiwo kute kuvinjelwe kwebiwa kwetintfo tekusebenta kanye nekulinyatwa kwemaphayiphi yitigebengu. Emazwini aso ngesikhatsi kwetfulwa kwalomklamo emhlanganweni wemmango, sikhulumi salomphakatsi sivete kutsi kucinisa kuphepha kwetisebenti kanye netinsita temphakatsi kubalulekile kakhulu kulesikhatsi samanje kuze kugwemeke kumoshakala kwetimali tahulumende. Lomkhankhaso ukhombisa kutibophezela lokujulile ekutfutfukiseni timphilo tebantfu, kukhulisa umnotfo wendzawo, kanye nekuletsa tinsita letisisekelo ngendlela lefanele, kute kuncitshiswe tinkinga tetempilo letibangwa kusetjentiswa kwemanti langakahlanteki etindzaweni letinyenti.

Ngesikhatsi bantfu labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu kumasipala waseManzini babhekene nenkinga yekuswelakala kwemanti lahlobile, luhlelo lolusha lwekuletfwa kwetinsita selucalisiwe kute kucedvwe lokuhlupheka. Loku kuta emva kwekutsi umkhandlu welidolobha uvumelane ngekwabiwa kwetigidzi letingemashumi lamabili temalangeni ekulungiseni emaphayiphi lagugile kanye nekwakha emadamu lamasha kulamaviki lambalwa letako. Bahlali bakulendzawo, labebasolo bakhala ngekunganakwa kwetidzingo tabo letisisekelo sikhatsi lesidze, batjelwe kutsi lomsebenti utakwentiwa ngekushesha futsi utawudala ematfuba emisebenti kubantfu labasha. Kute kuqinisekiswe kutsi lemali isetjentiswa ngendlela lefanele, litiko letekubusa netindzaba tabomasipala litawubeka likomidi lelitimele lelitawugadza kucitfwa kwetimali kanye nenchubekelembili yalomsebenti. Ngetulu kwaloko, imitsetfo lelawula kusetjentiswa kwemanti itawuciniswa kute kuvikelwe lomtfo lomcoka esimeni sekushintja kwesimo selitulu, kantsi wonkhe umuntfu welulekwa kutsi abambisane nahulumende kulomkhankhaso lomkhulu.

Ngetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu takhamuti takulomango waseSiteki etigodzini taseLubombo setitawutfola emanti lahlobile ngemuva kwesomiso lesesitsatse iminyaka leminyenti. Loku kulandzela kuphothulwa ngemphumelelo kwemklamo lomkhulu wemanti lowacala ngemnyaka lophelile ngenhloso yekusita imiphakatsi lebeyikhatsatwa kuswelakala kwalamanti kanye nekoma kwemifula. Ngesikhatsi kukhulunywa emcimbini losemtsetfweni wekunikela ngalomklamo itolo, baholi bemango bavakalise kubonga kwabo lokukhulu, baphindze baveta kutsi tifo letibangelwa kunatsa emanti langakahlanteki setitawuncipha kakhulu kulendzawo. Ngaphezu kwaloko, Litiko Letemithombo Yemvelo Nemandla lifake sandla lesikhulu kulesinyatselo, lisebentisana edvute nebanikeli bamazwe ngemazwe kuze kucinisekiswe kutsi lengcondvomshini ihlangabeta tizinga tesimanje temhlaba wonkhe. Takhamuti setincengwa kutsi tivikele lamaphayiphi lamasha futsi tibikele emaphoyisa noma ngabe ngukuphi konakalisa ngemabomu kuze letinsita titewuhlala sikhatsi lesidze, tisite netitukulwane letitako. Ekugcineni, tinhlelo tekucecesha emakomiti endzawo titawucala ngeliviki lelitako ngenhloso yekubafundzisa tindlela letifanele tekunakekela lemishini yekumpompa emanti kute ingasheshe yonakale.

Imindeni lengetulu kwemashumi lasihlanu esifundzeni saseManzini isale ite emakhaya ngemuva kwekutsi siphepho lesikhulu sicekele phansi tindlu emalanga lambalwa lendlulile. Baholi bemiphakatsi kuleyo ndzawo bavakalise kukhatsateka lokukhulu ngalesimo lesibuhlungu, njengoba bantfu labanyenti balahlekelwe yimphahla yabo yonkhe, matilasi, kanye nekudla lokutfolakala emakhaya. Ngesikhatsi lesi, labo labatsintsekile batfole siphephelo etikolweni nasemasontfweni asedvute, kantsi bafisa kutfola lusito lwekuphutfumisa lolufana nemitsi yekwelapha, emanti lahlobile ekunatsa, netidlwana tebantfwana. Kuze kube ngunyalo, tinhlangano letingekho ngaphansi kwahulumeni ngekubambisana neTiko leTekulawulwa kweTinhlekelele sebacale luhlelo lwekuletsa ematende, tingubo tekulala, netimphahla kute kudambiswe lobumatima lobubhekene nalabantfu. Ngetulu kwaloko, balimi bakulesigodzi nabo bakhala ngomonakalo lomkhulu lotsintse emasimi abo, lokungahle kubangele kuswelakala kwekudla kulesigaba semnyaka lotako. Emavele kulesigameko, tonkhe takhamuti tikhutsatwe kutsi tihlale ticophelele kakhulu futsi tilandzele ticwayiso tesimo selitulu letikhishwa ngubohulumeni wemakhaya, njengoba tati tibika kutsi imvula itawuchubeka nekuna ngemandla lamakhulu kuleliviki lelitako.

Ngemuva kwesomiso lesitsatse iminyaka lemibili, emaphesenti langetulu kwemashumi lasikhombisa ebantfu basendzaweni yaseSiteki nyalo sebatfola emanti lahlobile ngenca yeprojekthi lensha yekumba emanti ngaphansi kwemhlaba. Loku kuta ngemuva kwekukhala lokukhulu kwemmango mayelana nekushoda kwemanti ekunatsa kanye nekunakekela imfuyo yabo lebeyisengotini yekufa. Emhlanganweni wemmango lobewubanjwe kuleliviki, tikhulu tendzawo tivete kutsi lomsebenti ubite tigidzi letintsatfu temalangeni futsi kulindzeleke kutsi uchubekele nakuletinye tigodzi letakhelene nalena ngekushesha. Kantsi bantfu labasha bakuleyondzawo batfole ematfuba emsebenti ngesikhatsi kwakhiwa letingungutela temanti kanye nemaphayiphi, lokuligadzi lelibalulekile ekulweni nebubha lobuhlasela ummango. Ngetulu kwaloko, baholi bendzabuko bakhutsate takhamuti kutsi tiwanakekele lamaphayiphi kute agcineke isikhatsi lesidze, bagcizelela kutsi wonkhe muntfu unendzima labalulekile layidlalako ekuvikeleni ingcebo yelive. Kubukeka shengatsi lesinyatselo sitawuletsa litsemba lelisha kubalimi labancane labebalahle litsemba ngenca yekushintja kwesimo selitulu kuleli, njengobe nyalo sebatawukhona kuchubeka nekulima tibhidvo tabo unyaka wonkhe ngaphandle kwekwesaba.

Ngemuva kwetimvula letinkulu letibangele umonakalo lomkhulu etifundzeni letinyenti talelive, balimi baseShiselweni sebacale luhlelo lolusha lwekuvuselela imikhakha yetekulima kanye nekwakha kabusha ingqalasizinda. Bangetulu kwemakhulu lamabili emindeni labatsintsekile kulenhlekelele, lokudzinge kutsi kulungiswe imigwaco ngekushesha kute kuhanjiswe titselo netibhidvo etimakethe tasemadolobheni. Indvuna yalommango igcizelele ngemandla kutsi kubambisana emkhatsini webakhamuti netinhlangano letitimele kutawusita kakhulu ekucedzeni indlala nekuletsa intfutfuko lesimeme kuleyondzawo. Kulomzamo wekunciphisa umtselela walomonakalo, kuhlanyelwe tihlahla letinsha futsi kwakhiwa nemadamu ekugcina emanti kute asite ngetikhatsi tesomiso. Loluhlelo alugcini nje ngekusita labo labalahlekelwe tivuno tabo, kodvwa luphindze luvule ematfuba emisebenti lamanyenti kubantfu labasha labangasebenti emaphandleni. Ngaletinye tindlela, lesinyatselo sikhombisa kutimisela kwebantfu ekulweni netingucuko tesimo selitulu letichubeka nekuhlukubeta umnotfo. Kantsi kulindzeleke kutsi lizinga lemphilo yebakhamuti litfutfuke kakhulu kulesikhatsi lesitako nangabe lomkhankhaso wekulima uchubeka ngemphumelelo lenkhulu, uphindze wesekwe ngalokugcwele ngibo bonkhe labatsintsekako.

Emuva kweminyaka leminyenti yekuhlushwa ngusomiso lomkhulu, takhamuti tasemangweni waseLubombo tigcine titfole sisisembetfo ngemuva kwekuphetfwa ngemphumelelo kwemklamo lomusha wekuhambisa emanti. Loku kulindzeleke kutsi kuzuze imindeni lengetulu kwetinkhulungwane letintsatfu, lebeyivele itfwele matima ekutfoleni emanti lahlobile ekunatsa kanye nekanisela tivandze tabo temifino letiyinsika yekutiphilisa. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni wemmango lobewubanjwe kuleliviki, lobekamele tinhlangano letisita ummango ugcizelele kutsi lesinyatselo sitawutfutfukisa kakhulu temphilo netekulima kuleyondzawo, futsi kuvule ematfuba emisebenti kubantfu labasha. Lomunye webahlali futsi longumlimi, make Zodwa Dlamini, uvete injabulo yakhe watsi lomklamo utawusita kakhulu ekukhuliseni sibalo setilimo tabo letitsengiswako etimakethe takulelive. Ngetulu kwaloko, baholi bendzabuko bakhutsate bantfu kutsi bawagadze ngekucophelela lamaphayiphi lamasha kanye nemishini yekumpompa kute kugwemeke konakala, ngobe lentfutfuko ilitsemba lesitukulwane lesitako ekulweni nebuphuya lobudzinge emakhaya lamanyenti. Kusukela nyalo, likomiti lelibukene netemanti litawucala luhlelo lwekucecesha lulusha lwakulomango kute lube nemakhono ekulungisa nakucondzisa lomsebenti nangabe kuba netinkinga esikhatsini lesitako, lokutawucinisekisa kutsi emanti achubeka atfolakala ngaphandle kwetihibe.

Esifundzeni saseShiselweni, siphepho lesikhulu lesihlasele ngemphelasontfo sishiye imindeni lengaphezu kwemashumi lasihlanu itetayela ngaphandle kwetindlu kanye nekudla. Lesimo lesibuhlungu sibangele kutsi balimi balahlekelwe tivuno tabo letisetulu, lokubeka engotini kuvikeleka kwekudla kulomango. Ngaphandle kwekulimala kwetindlu, imigwaco leminyenti seyiphenduke imifula, lokwente kwaba matima kutsi betemaphilo nebatsengisi bafike ngesikhatsi kulabo labalimele. Emkhatsini walomonakalo, batali bakhwete tikhalo ngekuvalwa kwetikolwa, batsi loku kutawuphatamisa kakhulu luhlelo lwemfundvo lwalomnyaka. Kantsi, ngekushesha lokukhulu, emalunga emmango asukumile abambisana nabanikati bemabhizinisi endzawo kute banikele ngetingubo, emanti lahlobile, netidzingo letisisekelo kulabo labakhungetfwe ngulehlekelele. Loku kukhombisa umoya webumbano emkhatsini webantfu ngesikhatsi sekuhlupheka. Ngaleso sikhatsi, baphatsi bendzawo sebacale luhlelo lolubanti lwekuhlola umonakalo kute batfole luhlobo lwelusito loludzingekako esikhatsini lesitako. Baphindze bancenga takhamuti tonkhe kutsi tichubeke ngekucaphela kakhulu njengobe litulu lisengatsatsa lenye indlela, futsi bagcugcutela labo labahlala etindzaweni letiphasi kutsi batfutfukele etindzaweni letiphephile kuze kugwemeke leminye imonakalo.

Esifundzeni saseLubombo lesatiwa ngekoma, kweswelakala kwemanti sekube yinkinga lenkhulu lekhubata temphilo netekulima emiphakatsini leyehlukene. Emakhulukhulu etinkhomo netifuyo letinyenti atfolakele efile ngenxa yekuswela emadlelo, lokushiye imindeni leminyenti isebumnyameni futsi ibhekene nendlala. Ngesizatfu salesimo lesibucayi, inhlanganiso yetekutfutfukiswa kwemiphakatsi ibambisene nebaholi bendzawo isungule luhlelo lwekumba emadamu lamasha lasiphohlongo kuleliviki leliphelile. Lomsebenti lomkhulu wesekelwe ngetimali letingetulu kwetigidzi letisihlanu temalangeni letivela kubasizi bamazwe ngamazwe, ngenhloso yekulwisana nemitselela yekugucugucuka kwesimo selitulu. Bahlali bakulendzawo bavakalise kujabula lokukhulu ngalelinyatselo, babalula kutsi litawuletsa litsemba liphindze linciphise kuhlupheka emakhaya abo nasebafuyeni. Kulindzeleke kutsi bantfu labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu batfole lusito ngalokugcwele kuletakhiwo letisha, kantsi futsi loko kutawusita kakhulu ekutfutfukiseni umnotfo wendzawo ngekwenyusa kukhicitwa kwekudla. Nanobe umsebenti usachubeka, tikhulu tendzawo ticele ummango kutsi uvikele letinsita kute tihlale isikhatsi lesidze futsi tichubeke tisita titukulwane letitako.

Esigodzini saseSithobela, imvula lenkhulu lepheleketelwa ngumoya lomkhulu ishiye bantfu labangetulu kwemakhulu lamabili bete emakhaya kulamalanga lamabili lendlulile. Emigwaco lemikhulu kanye nemabhuloho kubhidlikile, lokwente kutsi kuhamba kwetimoto kanye nekutfunyelwa kwelusito kube matima kakhulu kuleyo ndzawo. Sebaphendvula kulesimo lesibuhlungu, baholi bemdabu kanye netinhlangano letisita ummango bacale imikhankhaso yekuphuthumisa kudla, emanti lahlobile, netingubo tekulala kulabo labakhungetfwe ngulenhlekelele. Ngetulu kwaloko, kulinganiselwa kutsi tikolwa letisihlanu tivalwe okwesikhashana ngobe tifulela tato titekulwe ngumoya, kantsi bafundzi baphocelekile kutsi bahlale etindzaweni letiphephile kuze kube simo sibuyela esimeni lesetayelekile. Noma nje umonakalo umkhulu futsi litsemba libonakala lifiphele, takhamuti tikhombise kubambisana lokumangalisako ngekucala kuvusa takhiwo tato letiwile ngesikhatsi tilindzele luhlelo loluphelele lwekwakha kabusha. Loku kukhombisa emandla ekubeketela esiveni, njengoba wonkhe muntfu abambe lishica kuze kuletfwe intfutfuko nekusimama emindenini lekhungetfwe ngulomonakalo lomkhulu kangaka.

Entsatseni yangoLwesibili, timvula letinkhulu nemoya lomkhulu kushiye imindeni lengetulu kwemashumi lasihlanu ite emakhaya emphakatsini waseNdzingeni. Lesimo lesibuhlungu sibangele umonakalo lomkhulu etakhiweni temmango, kantsi tikolwa letintsatfu tendzawo tiphocelelekile kutsi timise kufundza ngemuva kwekutsi tiphepho tiphule eluphahla lwemagumbi ekufundzela, lokushiye bafundzi labangaba ngemakhulu lamane bete indzawo lephephile yekufundzela. Indvuna yalomphakatsi, Mnu. Sipho Dlamini, ivakalise kukhatsateka lokujulile ngalenhlekelele leyenteke kungakatelelwa, yancenga tinhlangano letisita ummango kutsi tiletsule lusito loluphutfumako njengemathende, tingubo tekulala, kanye nekudla. Ngesikhatsi lesifanako, litimba lebelitfunywe nguhulumende selifikile kuleyondzawo kute lihlolisise bukhulu balomonakalo futsi licalise luhlelo lwekusita labo labatsintsekile, ikakhulukati bantfwana labasebancane kanye nebekhulile lababhekene nebumatima lobukhulu. Bahlali bakulendzawo kanye netigodzi letakhelene bayacelwa kutsi bachubeke bacaphele njengobe betesimo selitulu babiketele kutsi kusatawuba naletinye timvula letindze kuleliviki lelitako, lokusho kutsi ingoti yesikhukhula isengenteka noma ngasiphi sikhatsi.

Emvula lenkhulu letsatse emalanga lamabili iwele esifundzeni saseLubombo iphocelele imindeni lengemashumi lasihlanu kutsi ishiye emakhaya ayo ngekushesha ngemuva kwekugcwala kwemifula. Ngekusho kwemibiko yekucala levela kubaphatsi bendzawo, lendzevele ibangele umonakalo lomkhulu etakhiweni kanye nakutekulima, kantsi emasimu lamanyenti emmbila agcwele emanti. Lesimo lesibucayi sente kutsi tinkapani letitimele kanye netinhlangano letisita ummango tihlanganise emandla ekutfumela lusito lwekudla netingubo tekugcoka kulabo labakhungetfwe ngulenhlekelele. Nakakhuluma netintsatjeli, lomunye webahlali bakulendzawo uvete kutsi loku kwekucala eminyakeni lelishumi kutsi babone timvula letinemandla kangaka leticekela phansi imphilo yabo yamalanga onkhe. Noma nje imitimba yahulumende seyitsembise kulungisa emabhuloho laphukile, kusekhona sidzingo lesiphutfumako sekutfola tindzawo tekuphephela tesikhashana ngaphambi kwekutsi simo selitulu sibe ncono. Kwamanje, bakaTimo teLitulu bacwayisa onkhe emalunga emmango kutsi achubeke ahlale acaphele ngobe kusetawuba naletinye tiphepho letilindzeleke ekupheleni kwaleliviki.

Esifundzeni saseShiselweni, siphepho lesikhulu lesiphekeletelwa yimvula leshaya ngesangwejana sishiye imindeni lengemashumi lasihlanu ite emakhaya ngemphelasontfo lephelile. Tindlu letinyenti tiphetjuliwe tifuphu, kantsi nemasimi labesetsembisa sivuno lesihle abhubhe onkhe ngemuva kwalesimo selitulu lesingakavami. Ngesikhatsi ahlola lomonakalo, Indvuna yesigodzi, uMnu. Mandla Dlamini, uvakalise kudzabuka lokukhulu futsi wancenga tinhlangano letisita ummango kanye nebatsembisi belusito kutsi balekelele ngekushesha. Okwamanje, labo labatsintsekile baphephele etikolweni tasekhaya kanye nasemasontfweni, lapho batfola khona lusito lwekucala lolufaka ekhatsi kudla, emanti lahlobile, netingubo tekulala. Ngetulu kwaloko, batsengisi bendzawo nabo sebaqalile kufaka sandla ngekunikela ngetimphahla letidzingeka kakhulu kulesikhatsi lesimatima. Bebetulu basolo bachubeka nekukhipha ticwayiso leticinile kubahlali balendzawo kutsi bahlale bacaphele njengoba kubikelelwa letinye timvula letinkhulu kuleliviki lelitako, lokusho kutsi ingoti ayikapheli. Loku kukhombisa sidzingo lesiphutfumako sekwakha takhiwo leticinile letitawumelana netingucuko tesimo selitulu kuze kuphephe timphilo tebantfu.

Emvuleni lenkhulu lepheleketelwa ngumoya lomkhulu leshaye sifundza saseManzini ngemphelasontfo, kubhidlike tikolwa letintsatfu kanye netindlu letingetulu kwemashumi lamabili. Ngesizatfu salomonakalo lomkhulu kangaka, imindeni leminyenti isale ingenamakhaya kantsi nebafundzi baphocelekile kutsi baphazamiseke etifundvweni tabo njengoba emagumbi ekufundzela lapho bebatsatsa khona tivivinyo apheshulwe luphahla. Ekutameni kudambisa lesimo lesibuhlungu, emalunga emmango ngekubambisana nebandlancane lwetinhlekelele asungule umkhankhaso lophutfumako wekusita labatsintsekile ngekubapha kudla, emathende ekukhosela, kanye netimphahla tekugcoka. Indvuna yalommango, ngenkhatsi ikhuluma nebetindzaba, ivakalise kudzabuka lokukhulu ngalomonakalo kodvwa yancoma luvelo nekubambisana kwebantfu bakuleyondzawo ekubhekaneni nalesikhatsi lesimatima. Ngaphezu kwaloko, tinhlangano letingekho ngaphansi kwahulumende kanye nabosomabhizinisi sebacelwe kutsi bafake sandla ngetimali nangetimphahla tekwakha kuze kwakhiwe kabusha letakhiwo leticekeleke phansi ngaphambi kwekutsi liyishaye kakhulu imvula. Loku kulindzeleke kutsi kutawusita kakhulu ekutseni imfundvo yetingane ingaphazamiseki isikhatsi lesidze, futsi kubuyise litsemba nekuphepha kuleyo mindeni lelahlekelwe yikokonke ebusuku bunye.

Esifundzeni saseLubombo, kunesomiso lesesitsatse iminyaka lemibili lesishiye imifula lemikhulu ishile, kodvwa nyalo litsemba selibuyile kubahlali bendzawo ngemuva kwekucedvwa kwemklamo lomusha wekuhambisa emanti lahlobile. Emaphesenti langemashumi lasiphohlongo emindeni kuleyo ndzawo beseyiphuza emanti langakaphephi emadanyini ladakile, loku lokubangele kubhedvuka kwetifo letitsatselwanako letifana nesihudo etinyangeni letendlulile. Kute kucatululwe lenkinga lebuhlungu, takhamuti tibambisane nebaholi bendzawo kanye netinhlangano letingekho ngaphansi kwahulumende ekwakheni emadamu lamatsatfu lamakhulu latagcina emanti emvula aphindze awahlanze. Emazwini akhe ngesikhatsi kuvulwa lomklamo ngalokusemtsetfweni, lomunye webaholi bemdabu kulomphakatsi ugcizelele kutsi kubalulekile kunakekela letinsita letinsha kuze titosita netitukulwane letitako ngaphandle kwekucekelwa phansi. Ngesizatfu saletinhlelo letinsha tekunisa, balimi labancane sebatocala kuhlwanyela tihlwayi tabo tembila nemacabhisi ngaphandle kwekwesaba kulahlekelwa tivuno tabo ngenxa yelilanga. Kantsi ngale kwaloko, nesimo setemnotfo emphakatsini wonkhana kulindzeleke kutsi sitfutfuke kakhulu kulesigaba lesilandzelako semnyaka njengobe imisebenti yekulima itawuvula ematfuba emisebenti kubantfu labasha labebete imisebenti.

Endzaweni yaseLubombo, balimi labangetulu kwemakhulu lamabili batfole lusito lwetinhlavu tekulima letibita tigidzi letingemashumi lamabili kulomnyaka, ngemuva kwesomiso lesimatima lesishaye lesigodzi ngemnyaka lophelile. Lesimo besesibangele kutsi imindeni leminyenti ibhekane nendlala ledvumata kakhulu kanye nekulahlekelwa yimfuyo yabo. Kantsi luhlelo lolusha lwekusita temalima lwetfulwe ngenhloso yekuvuselela umnotfo wemakhaya nekuvikela kuphepha kwekudla. Ngekusho kwababe Sipho Dlamini, longusihlalo wekomiti yebalimi bakuleyo ndzawo, loku kutawuletela bantfu litsemba lelisha nekuqinisekisa kutsi kudla kuyatfolakala etindlini letinyenti letatiwako ngekuswelakala kwemisebenti. Nanobe letinhlavu letifaka ekhatsi ummbila nabhontjisi tifike ngesikhatsi lesikahle sekucala kwetimvula telihlobo, letinye tinkinga letifana nekuswelakala kwemanti ekunisela kanye netibhadlane tetilwanyana letilimata titjalo tisachubeka nekubatsintsa kakhulu balimi. Kubonakala shengatsi kusebentisana emkhatsini webaholi bemiphakatsi, balimi ngekwabo, netinhlangano letingekho ngaphansi kwahulumende kutawudlala indzima lenkhulu ekucatululeni letinselele esikhatsini lesitako, khona kutewusimama temalima kulesigodzi sonkhe.

Esigodzini saseMhlosheni, inkinga yekuswelakala kwemanti lantsantfo isondzela ekupheleni ngemuva kwekucalwa kwemklamo lomusha wekumba imitfombo yesimanje ledvonsa emanti ngemandla elilanga. Bangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu takhamuti talendzawo letitawuzuza ngalokucondzile kulesinyatselo, lesihlose kucedza kuhlupheka lokutsatse iminyaka lelishumi kulesigodzi. Ngesikhatsi semhlangano wemmango lobewubanjwe endvuneni kuleliviki leliphelile, baholi bendzabuko bavakalise kujabula kwabo lokukhulu ngekusebentisana lokuhle lokukhona emkhatsini webakhamuti netinhlangano letitimele letisita ngetimali talomsebenti. Lomsebenti lomkhulu awugcini nje ngekuletsa emanti lahlobile emakhaya, kodvwa uphindze uvule ematfuba emsebenti lamasha kubantfu labasha labangasebenti kulomango. Kulindzeleke kutsi letakhiwo tonkhe tiphothulwe ngaphambi kwekuphela kwenyanga yetikhomba kulo mnyaka, lokutawucinisekisa kutsi temalimo etingadze tasekhaya kanye netemphilo titfutfuka kakhulu. Ngetulu kwaloko, lelikomidi lelikhetfwe kutsi liphatse lemanti selibeke imitsetfo lecinile yekugadza lemishini, kuze kucinisekiswe kutsi itawusebenta sikhatsi lesidze ngaphandle kwekuphuka futsi yonga nemanti ngalokufanele.

Imvula lenkhulu lepheleketelwa ngumoya lomkhulu ishiye imindeni lengetulu kwemashumi lasihlanu itetayela ngaphandle kwetindzawo tekufihla inhloko esifundzeni saseSiteki ngalemphelaviki lesandza kwengca. Ngesikhatsi lesimo selitulu sichubeka nekubanga umonakalo, tikolwa letimbili kanye nemitfolampilo yendzawo kucekelwe phansi, lokusongela litsemba lemphakatsi mayelana nekutfola lusito lwetempilo kanye nemfundvo yebantfwana. Babikeli bendzawo kanye nabosomabhizinisi bavakalise kukhatsateka lokukhulu ngalesimo, bakhala ngekutsi imigwaco leminyenti ayihambeki kantsi netintsambo tagesi tikemuke nemanti, lokwenta kube matima kutsi betabosikhatsi bafike ngelikushesha kuletindzawo letikhungetfwe kakhulu. Noma kunjalo, imitimba yetekusita etimeni letibucayi ibambisene nebaholi bendzawo sebacale luhlelo lwekuphakela kudla, emanti lahlobile, netingubo tekulala kulabo labakhungetfwe ngulesimo lesimatima. Kantsi kulindzeleke kutsi kucalwe luhlelo lwekwakha kabusha ngekushesha kute kubuyiswe simo setintfo esikweni. Kubalwa kutsi umonakalo wonkhe walenhlekelele ungabita tigidzi letingemashumi lamabili temalangeni, futsi ticebiso tikhishiwe tekutsi takhamuti tihlale ticaphele njengoba batati betesimo selitulu babika kutsi litulu lisengaphindze libuye ngemandla lamakhulu emalangeni lalandzelako.

Emkhatsini wesomiso lesesitsatse tinyanga letisiphohlongo, takhamuti letingetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu esigodzini saseMankayane tiphocelelwe kutsi tikhe emanti etimfuleni letingakaphephi. Lesimo lesibuhlungu siholele ekutseni kubekhona umhlangano waphutfuphutfu emkhatsini webaholi bendzavo, emabhizinisi, kanye netinhlangano letingekho ngaphansi kwahulumende ngenjongo yekutfola tisombululo tesikhashana natesikhatsi lesidze. Ngokusho kwendvuna yalemango, umnumzane Sipho Dlamini, kutehlika kwemanti emadamwini akusabeketeleleki futsi loko kubeka imphilo yebantfwana engotini lenkhulu yetifo letitsatselwanako letifana nesihudo kanye nesifo semsheko. Kute kubhekwane nalendzaba ngalokuphelele, kucalwe luhlelo lolusha lwemali lenganga tigidzi letimbili temalangeni lwekwakha emadamu lamancane lamatsatfu etigodzini letehlukene, kantsi letakhiwo kulindzeleke kutsi tiphele ngaphambi kwekuphela kwenyanga yetikhomba. Ngetulu kwaloko, bakhankasi betemvelo bakhutsate tonkhe takhamuti kutsi tisebentise emanti ngendlela leyongako ngesikhatsi kuselindvwe letinsita letinsha. Loku kuhlanganyela kwemmango kutawusita kakhulu ekunciphiseni kuhlupheka kwalabomake nebagogo labebasolo bahamba emakhilomitha lamadze onkhe malanga baphetse emabhakede kute batfole emanti ekunatsa nekupheka.

Imvula lenkhulu letsatse emalanga lamatsatfu ishiye umonakalo lomkhulu esigodzini saseSithobela, lapho khona imindeni lengemashumi lamabili isale isebala ngaphandle kwetindzawo tekuhlala. Letikhukhula tibhidlite emabhuloho lamabili labalulekile, lokwente kutsi kuhamba kwetimoto kanye nekufinyelela etikhungweni tetemphilo kube matima kakhulu kubahlali bakulendzawo. Ngesikhatsi ahlangana nebatintsatseli, umgcinisihlalo wendzawo uvete kutsi lesimo sidzinga lusito lwakuphutfuma kute kuvikelwe timphilo tebantfu kanye nemfuyo yabo. Ngetulu kwaloko, tinhlangano letitimele seticale mkhankhaso wekuhambisa kudla, emanti lahlobile, netingubo tekugcoka kulabo labakhungetfwe ngulenhlekelele. Ngakulolunye luhlangotshi, balimi bendzawo bakhala kakhulu ngekulahlekelwa titjalo tabo lebesetilungele kuvunwa, lokungahle kubangele indlala lenkhulu kulesigodzi etinyangeni letitako. Lesigameko lesibuhlungu sikhombisa ngalokucacile sidzingo sekucinisa takhiwo temmango kanye nekutfutfukisa tindlela tekulawula tinhlekelele kute timelane netingucuko tesimo selitulu letichubeka nekuhlasela tindzawo tasemaphandleni.

Imindeni lengengetulu kwemashumi lasihlanu isale ite emakhaya ngemuva kwekushaya kwesiphepho lesikhulu lesipheletselwe ngemoya lomkhulu esifundzeni saseShiselweni ekupheleni kwaleliviki leliphelile. Lesimo selitulu lesibi asigcinanga nje ngekubhidlita tindlu tebantfu labaphila ngekuhlupheka, kodvwa siphindze sacekela phansi emasimu labalulekile emmbila kanye netinhlelo letimbalwa tekutfutsa emanti kulesigodzi. Ekhuluma egameni lebakhamuti letitsintsekile, babe Sipho Dlamini longulomunye webaholi bemdabu kuleyondawo, uvete kutsi lomonakalo mkhulu kakhulu kunaloku lebebakulindzele, futsi badzinga lusito lwangekushesha kuze bakhone kuvusa timphilo tabo. Njengamanje, emakomiti asebenta ngetinhlekelele emiphakatsini asacala luhlelo lwekuhlola bukhulu balomonakalo ngalokuphelele kute kutfunyelwe emathende ekukhosela kanye netimphahla tekudla kulabo labasale bengenalutfo. Ngesikhatsi umphakatsi usalindzele lolusito lolutawuvela etinhlanganweni letehlukene, betemisebenti yetesimo selitulu bakhutsata bantfu kutsi bachubeke bacaphele futsi bagweme kuwela imifula legcwele, njengoba kubikwa kutsi letimvula letinkhulu titawuchubeka nekuna emalangeni lambalwa latako.

Emvula lenkhulu letsite ncembu esifundzeni saseShiselweni kuleliviki leliphelile ishiye imindeni lengemashumi lasihlanu ite emakhaya, kwatsi netikolwa letintsatfu tapheshulwa tikhutsali. Ngesizatfu salomonakalo lomkhulu, bahlali bakulendzawo sebabambisane ngekwakha ematende esikhashana kuze kuphephe labo labakhungetfwe ngulesimo lesibuhlungu, kantsi labanye batfole siphephelo emasontfweni nasetindzaweni temphakatsi. Emahhovisi etekulawulwa kwetinhlekelele avakalise kutsi atfumela lusito lwekudla netingubo tekulala kulomphakatsi, ngesikhatsi kusetjentwa luhlelo lwekwenta kutsi bafundzi bachubeke netifundvo tabo emasontfweni lalandzelako basebentisa emahholwa emphakatsi. Nanobe simo selitulu sichubeka nekuba sibi esiveni sonkhe, baholi bemdabu banxuse tonkhe takhamuti kutsi tihlale ticaphele futsi tibike masinyane nangabe kukhona tingoti letivelako etindzaweni tabo. Lomonakalo uphindze watsintsa netebulimi njengoba emasimu lamanyenti agcwele emanti, lokufaka engotini kuvunwa kwemmbila kulesizini letako. Ngaleyo ndlela, balimi bakhutsatwe kutsi batsintse belulimi etikolweni tetebulimi kute batfole ticebiso letifanele mayelana nekutakula tilimo tabo ngaphambi kwekutsi isimo sibe sibi kakhulu.

Kulemaviki lamabili landlulile, bantfu labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu esifundzeni saseShiselweni batfole bomazisi babo labasha kanye netitifiketi tekutalwa, kulandzela tikhalo letinyenti temmango mayelana nekubambetela kwetinsita tahulumende. Loku kubambetela bekudale tinkinga letinkhulu kakhulu, ikakhulukati kubantfu labadzala labebangakhoni kutfola timpesheni tabo ngenca yekuswelakala kwalamaphepha labalulekile. Kute kucatululwe lenkinga ngalokuphelele, Litiko Letetindzaba Tangaphakatsi selitfumele timoto letihambako letiletsa tinsita etindzaweni tasemaphandleni, ngenhloso yekusondzeta lusito kubantfu. Ngetulu kwaloko, baphatsi balelitiko bakhutsate tonkhe takhamuti kutsi tisebentise lamatfuba lamasha kute tigweme kuma emalayini lamadze emahhovisi lamakhulu emadolobheni. Imibiko yakamuva iveta kutsi loluhlelo lwekusebentisana nemiphakatsi lusebenta ngemphumelelo lemangalisako, futsi lunciphise sikhatsi sekulindza ngelizinga lelisetulu kakhulu kulesifundza. Nanobe lesinyatselo semukelwe ngetandla letimhlophe, inselele isengiyona yekutsi hulumende kufanele acinisekise kutsi nato tonkhe letinye tifundza kulelive tifinyelela kuletinsita letisheshako ngalokufanako, ngaphandle kwekucwaswa nobe kubambeteleka lokungakafaneli emisebentini yelubala.

Ngemuva kwetinkinga letinyenti letibikiwe mayelana nekubambetseka kwetinsita temmango emalungeni lamanyenti akuleli, sekwethulwe luhlelo lolusha lwethekinoloji ngenhloso yekusheshisa kukhishwa kwabomatisi netitifiketi tekutalwa. Letinguquko letinkulu tite ngesikhatsi takhamuti letingetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu betisolo tikhalela kuphela kwesikhatsi lesidze timile emigceni emahhovisi ahulumende. Kuze kucatululwe lenkinga, Litiko Letindzaba Tasekhaya limemetele kutsi kusukela ngenyanga letako, bonkhe bantfu labafaka ticelo batawufaka imininingwane yabo etinhlelweni tetidijithali letitawutfolakala kumasipala ngamunye. Loku kutawusita ekutseni kuncishiswe emaphepha ladzingekako kanye nekugwema emaphutsa lavame kwentiwa nababhalisa ngesandla. Ngetulu kwaloko, tikhulu tahulumende tikhutsate imiphakatsi kutsi itilungiselele ngekutfola emakhophi lacinisekisiwe emibhalo yabo yakudzala ngaphambi kwekuvakashela lamahhovisi lamasha. Bantfu labadzala kanye nalabakhubatekile batawutfola lusito lolukhetsekile emakhaya abo, njengoba kubekwe emacembu etisebenti latawuhamba ababhalisa kute bangesali ngaphandle kulesigaba lesisha sekutfutfukiswa kwetinsita.

Ngemuva kweminyaka lelishumi kute emanti lahlobile netinsita letisisekelo, takhamuti taseMkhuzweni ekugcineni titawutfola lusito lolufanele njengoba kucale luhlelo lolusha lwekuletsa intfutfuko kulelendzawo. Loku kuta ngemuva kwekutsi kusetjentiswe tigidzi letingemashumi lamabili temalangeni kute kwakhiwe emadamu lamasha kanye nekufakwa kwemapayipi lamakhulu. Litiko Letemanti Netemvelo libike kutsi lomsebenti utawuphothulwa ngaphambi kwekuphela kwalonyaka, futsi batimisele kucatulula konkhe kubambetseka lobekubangwe kushoda kwetimali esikhatsini lesendlulile. Leluhlelo lwekutfola emanti lutawuhambisana nekufakwa kwemamitha lamasha kuyo yonkhe imiti, kantsi takhamuti titawulindeleka kutsi tikhokhe imali lencane yekunakekela lengcondvomshini. Kute bachubeke batfole letinsita ngaphandle kwetinkinga, yonkhe imindeni iyacelwa kutsi ibhalise ematsikweni abandla lasekhaya kute ifakwe kuhlu lwabohulumeni lwembuso lolusemtsetfweni. Ngesikhatsi sekubhalisa, bantfu badzinga kuphatsa bomatisi babo kanye netincwadzi letivela etindvuneni tetigodzi kute kugwenywe kukhwabanisa kanye nekwati kutsi lusito luya kubantfu labaludzinga mbamba. Ngekusho kwabongcondvongcondvo betetinsita temmango, lomkhankhaso utawusita kakhulu ekunciphiseni buphofu nekwenta ncono lizinga lemphilo etindzaweni tasemaphandleni.

Emva kweminyaka leminyenti yekuswelakala kwemanti lahlobile esifundzeni saseShiselweni, kwakhiwa kwemaphayiphi lamasha sekucalile kuleliviki. Lesinyatselo silandzela simemetelo lesentiwe ngenyanga lephelile kutsi tonkhe takhamuti kufanele tibhalise kumatiko wendzawo kuze titfole lusito lwahulumende lolufanele. Emaphovinsi amane akulelive atawuzuza kulesabelomali lesisandza kupasiswa saphalamende, lesihlose kutfutfukisa tingcondvomsiti etindzaweni tasemaphandleni. Ngekusho kwemigomo lebekiwe yemisebenti yemphakatsi, labo labafaka ticelo batawudzinga kuletsa tincwadzi tabomatisi kanye nebufakazi bekuhlala endzaweni ngaphambi kwekutsi bafakwe kuloluhlelo lwekuletsa tinsita. Tikhungo tekubhalisa titawuvulwa njalo ngemalanga emsebenti kusukela ngensimbi yesiphohlongo ekuseni kuya kuleyesine ntsambama, kute kuniketwe litfuba lelene kulabo labamatasatasa emini. Ngetulu kwaloko, balawuli betinhlelo basungule indlela yebuchwepheshe be-inthanethi letawusita bantfu kutsi bafake ticelo tabo ngaphandle kwekuya emigceni lemidze ematikweni ahulumende. Loku kutawusita kakhulu ekucinisekiseni kutsi tinsita letibalulekile tifika kubantfu ngesikhatsi lesifanele, futsi kunciphise nenkhohlakalo ekwabiweni kwetinsita temmango. Ngako-ke, imiphakatsi iyakhutsatwa kutsi isebentisane nebaholi bendzawo kanye netikhulu kute lomsebenti uphumelele ngaphandle kwetihibe, kantsi luhlelo lwekubhalisa lutawuvalwa ekupheleni kwenyanga letako.

Emhlanganweni wakamuva lobewubanjelwe ehholo lemphakatsi eMbabane, tinkinga tekushoda kwemanti lahlobile tiphindze tavela njengesikhalo lesikhulu setakhamuti letinyenti letiphatseke kabi ngaloku. Kute kuphendvulwe lesidzingo lesiphutfumako, kusetjentiswe luhlelo lolusha lwekuletfwa kwetinsita lapho khona emalunga emphakatsi kufanele abhalise emaphepha awo kumatiko lamancane etigodzi tawo ngetikhatsi temsebenti. Ngemuva kwaloko, basebenti bahulumende batawucinisekisa lamarekhodi ngekucophelela ngaphambi kwekutsi kucale umsebenti lomkhulu wekulungiswa kwemaphayiphi lamadzala nekufakwa kwalamasha. Ngetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu temakhaya kulindzeleke kutsi titfole lusito lolugcwele ngaphasi kwalomkhankhaso lomusha longakakapheli lomnyaka wetimali. Nomakunjalo, balawuli betinhlelo bakhutsate bonkhe bantfu kutsi baletse matisi wabo wavelonkhe kanye nebufakazi bekuhlala kute kugwemeke kubambetseka kwenchubo yekubhalisa. Ngekusho kwetikhulu letengamele lomsebenti, kubambisana emkhatsini webaholi bendzabuko netiphatsimandla kutawuba yinsika lecinile yekuphumelelisa letinhlelo tentutfuko, futsi loku kutawusita kakhulu ekucedzeni inkhohlakalo ekwabiweni kwetinsitancanti kuto tonkhe tifundza talelive jikelele.

Kushoda kwemanti lokukhulu esifundzeni saseShiselweni sekupocelele kutsi kutfatfwe tinyatselo letisheshako kute kusitwe takhamuti. Ngekusho kwemibiko yakamuva lekhishwe ngulabo labaphetse, luhlelo lolusha lwekuletfwa kwetinsita selucalile kusebenta kulesi sifundza ngenjongo yekuphendvula tikhalo lebetichubeka eminyakeni lembalwa leyengcile. Litiko Letemisebenti Yemphakatsi limemetele kutsi litawufaka emaphayiphi lamasha kanye nemishini yekuhlunga manti, kantsi letinhlelo titawuhambisana nekulungiswa kwemigwaco leholela emadamini lamakhulu. Kute batfole lolusito, bantfu bakulendzawo bayatiswa kutsi babhalise emagama abo etikhungweni tahulumende letisedvute letifana nematiko etekubhalisa nekwatisa, noma basebentise luhlelo lwabucwephesha lobusha lobutfolakala kuma-inthanethi kute bagweme kuma emugeni lomudze. Ngetulu kwaloko, baphatsi betigodzi kanye nemakhansela batawubamba imihlangano yekufundzisa umphakatsi ngenchubo lefanele yekufaka ticelo tetinsita letibalulekile kanye nekuvuselela emaphepha abo ekuba takhamuti. Loku kulindzeleke kutsi kunciphise kubambetseka kwekutfola lusito embusweni, futsi kucinisekise kutsi kusetjentiswa kwetimali tavelonkhe kwentiwa ngendlela lesebentako, lephephile, nalesebala kuto tonkhe tigaba tekubusa netekuphatsa kuleli.

Ngemuva kwetikhalo letinyenti letivela kubahlali basemakhaya mayelana nekuswelakala kwemanti lahlobile, luhlelo lolusha lwekuletsa tinsita selucalisiwe esifundzeni saseLubombo. Litiko Letemanti Netekutfutfukiswa Kwemiphakatsi limemetele kutsi litawufaka emaphayiphi lamasha kanye nematangi emanti kuleto tindzawo letitsintsekile emalangeni langemashumi lasitfupha latako. Lomsebenti lomkhulu utawubita tigidzi letingemashumi lamabili temalangeni, futsi kulindzeleke kutsi utfutfukise timphilo tebantfu labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu. Kwetulu kwaloko, kuze kwentiwe ncono kusebenta kwahulumende, takhamuti setingakhona kubika tinkinga tekuguga kwetinsita nobe kubhoboza kwemaphayiphi tisebentisa luhlelo lwethekhinoloji lolutfolakala komakhalekhukhwini. Ngesikhatsi avula loluhlelo kamtsetfo, Ndvunankhulu ugcizelele kutsi kuhlinzekwa kwetinsita tahulumende akusiyo inhlahla kodvwa kulilungelo lasisekelo lalomphakatsi. Ngaloko-ke, bonkhe baholi bendzabuko kanye netinhloko temindeni bayacelwa kutsi bayobhalisa emagama abo emahhovisini etinkhundla lamadvute nabo kuze batotfola lolusito ngaphandle kwekubambeleka, kantsi labo labangakhoni kufika emagatjeni bahlelelwe tisebenti letitawuhamba emakhaya ngemakhaya.

Ekupheleni kwaleliviki lelendlulile, takhamuti taseMbabane kanye netindzawo letakhelene nayo tivakalise kukhatsateka lokukhulu ngenca yekubambetseka kwekukhishwa kwetitifiketi tekutalwa kanye namatisi. Kuphendvula kulesikhalo lesiphutfumako, Litiko Letasekhaya limemetele kutsi litawucala luhlelo lolusha lwebuchwepheshe ngeMsombuluko kute kucatululwe lenkinga yekuletfwa kwetinsita emphakatsini. Ngaphansi kwaloluhlelo lwakamuva, bantfu labafaka ticelo batawudzinga kubhalisa ku-inthanethi ngaphambi kwekuya emaphikweni elidzingo, linyatselo lelilindzeleke kutsi linciphise kolayini labadze emagcekeni ahulumende. Sikhulumi salelitiko sigcizelele kutsi konkhe kulungiselelwa kwetisebenti sekuphothuliwe ngalokuphelele, kwatsi letikhungo titawuvulwa ngetikhatsi letingetiwe kute kusitwe bonkhe labo labatsintsekile ngalokubambetseka. Nobe kunjalo, kute kucinisekiswe kutsi kute losalela emuva, labadzala kanye nalabakhubatekile batawuchubeka nekutfola lusito lolukhetsekile ngaphandle kwekusebentisa loluhlelo lolusha lwemishini. Ngaphezu kwaloko, baphatsi betifundza bakhutsatwe kutsi babambe imihlangano nebandlancane kute bachazele sive ngaletingucuko letinsha. Loku kukhombisa kutibophezela kwahulumende ekutfutfukiseni tindlela tekuphatsa kanye nekuletsa tinsita letisezingeni lelisetulu esiveni sonkhe ngaphandle kwekukhetsa.

Emkhatsini wetinkinga tekushoda kwemanti letesabalele kulesigodzi, inkhundla yaseHhohho itfole sisekelo lesisha ngemuva kwekucedvwa kwemklamo lomkhulu wekuhambisa emanti lahlobile. Loku kulandzela imetamo letsatse tinyanga letisitfupha lapho khona takhamuti betibhalisa emaphepha ato kute titfole emamitha emanti emakhaya. Ngekusebentisana neLitiko Letemanti Netemvelo, tiphatsimandla tendzawo tibeke imitsetfo lemisha lelawula kusetjentiswa kwalomtfombo wemanti kute kuvikelwe kumoshakala kwawo etindzaweni tasemaphandleni. Eceleni kwaloko, tindvuna temiphakatsi tivakalise kubonga kwato ngaloluhlelo, titsi lutawuphucula kakhulu timphilo tebantfu futsi lunciphise netifo letibangwa kungahambi kahle kwetinsita tahulumende. Nanobe kunjalo, kute lomsebenti uchubekele embili ngemphumelelo, bonkhe labafisa kufakwa kuloluhlelo bayacelwa kutsi baletse omatisi babo kanye nebufakazi bekuhlala emahhovisi endzawo kusukela ekucaleni kwenyanga letako. Lokubhaliswa kwesive kutawusita ekuhleleni luhlahlo lwetimali lwemnyaka lotako, kuqinisekise kutsi kute umuntfu losalela emuva ekutfoleni tinsita letisisekelo.

Ngekulandzela tikhalo letinyenti letivela etakhamutini mayelana nekubambeleleka kwetinsita, kucedvwa kwemigca lemidze sekuphendvuke intfo lehamba embili ekutfutfukiseni kuletfwa kwetinsita emphakatsini. Loku kuholele ekutseni kucalwe luhlelo lolusha lwebuchwepheshe lobusetjentiswa ekubhaliseni kute kusheshe kukhishwa kwetitifiketi tekutalwa, tincwadzi tekuhamba, kanye namakhadi abomatisi. Noma kunjalo, labo labadzinga lusito kutawudzingeka kutsi bente emadingidingi ekubhukha etindzaweni letisemtsetfweni ngaphambi kwekutsi baye emahhovisi, kute kugwemeke kuminyana kwebantfu emagcekeni ahulumende. Ngekusho kwemibiko yakamuva lekhishwe baphatsi, loluhlelo lolusha lulindzeleke kutsi lunciphise sikhatsi sekulindza ngemaphesenti langemashumi lasihlanu, futsi lwenteke ngendlela lephephile nalesebentela wonkhe muntfu, ikakhulukati labo labahlala etindzaweni tasemaphandleni. Emalunga emmango ayakhutsatwa kutsi afake ticelo tawo kusenesikhatsi aphindze aletse onkhe maphepha ladzingekako ngetikhatsi tekusebenta kuze luhlelo lwekucondzisa luhambe ngaphandle kwetinkinga. Ngetulu kwaloko, letinhlelo letinsha titawusita ekucinisekiseni kutsi onkhe marekhodi agcinwa ngendlela lefanele, kunciphise emaphutsa lavame kwenteka uma kusetjentiswa emaphepha lamanyenti.

Emalangeni langetulu kwetigidzi letisihlanu abekelwe eceleni kute kutfutfukiswe kulethwa kwemanti lahlobile esifundzeni saseLubombo kulenyanga lephelile. Ngekwekusho kwemibiko lesemtsetfweni lekhishiwe, takhamuti letidzinga lolusito kufanele tifake emagama ato kumatiko akahulumende labukene netemanti kanye netekulima ngaphambi kwekuphela kwemnyaka. Inqubo yekufaka ticelo yentiwe yaba melula kakhulu ngenca yekusetjentiswa kwetinhlelo tebucwephesha betikhompyutha letinsha, lokusite ngemandla ekwehliseni tinkinga tekubambeleleka kwemisebenti emakomiti ekuphatsa. Ngaphandle kwaloko, baholi bemiphakatsi bevakalise kukhatsateka ngekutsi labanye bantfu labadzala bangahle basale ngaphandle nangabe bangatfoli kucetjiswa ngalendlela lensha yekusebenta. Kute kucatululwe lenkinga, labo labangakhoni kusebentisa letinhlelo tabongcondvomshini bakhutsatwa kutsi bavakashele emahhovisi etindvuna tetiGodzi kute batfole lusito lwekucondzisa mayelana nekugcwalisa emafomu ladzingekako. Kwetfulwa kwalendlela lensha yekusebenta kubukeka kutawuletsa lushintjo lolukhulu endleleni tisebenti tembuso letisita ngayo sive malanga onkhe. Ekugcineni, loku kubonisa kutinikela lokucacile ekutfutfukiseni timphilo tebantfu bakulelive ngekusheshisa kulethwa kwetinsita letisisekelo emphakatsini ngaphandle kwenkhohlakalo.

Ngemuva kwesikhatsi lesidze sekweswelakala kwemanti kanye netinkinga tetekutfutsa esigodzini saseShiselweni, kwakhiwa kwemigwaco lemikhulu nemaphayiphi lamasha sekufake litsemba lelikhulu emiphakatsini letsintsekako. Loku kuta ngesikhatsi lapho khona takhamuti tichubeka nekubhalisela luhlelo lolusha lwekuletfwa kwetinsita tesive, lokulindzeleke kutsi luphothulwe ngaphambi kwekuphela kwenyanga letako kute wonkhe umuntfu atfole lusito. Ngekusho kwemibiko lesemtsetfweni levela kubaphatsi betigodzi, letinhlelo tentelwe ngemabomu kunciphisa tinkinga tekubambeleleka kwetincwadzi tesive, kutfutfukisa tesakhiwo, kanye nekucecesha tisebenti tahulumende kute tisebente ngemandla nemasiko lamahle ekuphatsa ummango. Kute lomsebenti lomkhulu uhambe kahle futsi ngaphandle kwetihibe, onkhe emalunga emmango layawutsatsa incesu ayacelwa kutsi aletse bofakazi babo bekuhlala labafakazelwe yimiphakatsi kanye namakhadi abomatisi emahhovisi etikwele kulesi sikhatsi lesibekiwe. Ngaleyo ndlela, kubambisana emkhatsini webaholi bendzabuko, emakhansela, kanye neMnyango weTindzaba taseKhaya kutawucinisekisa kutsi kute umuntfu losalela emuva kuloluhlelo lwentfutfuko, futsi netinsita tahulumende tiphuma ngesikhatsi lesifanele ngaphandle kwenkhohlakalo.

Ngekusilela kwemanti lokuhlasele tigodzi letingetulu kwalishumi esifundzeni saseShiselweni kuleliviki leliphelile, takhamuti letinyenti tiphoceleke kutsi tekamele emanti emifula langakaphephi, lokubeke imphilo yato engotini yetifo letitsatselwanako. Kuphendvula kulesimo lesibucayi lesikhalise ummango, litiko letemisebenti yemphakatsi selicale luhlelo lwaphutfuthu lwekuphakela emanti ngematangi lamakhulu etindzaweni letihlukene kute kudanjiswe lenkinga lesematseni. Ngekwemigomo yalomsebenti wekusita sive, bonkhe bahlali bayalulekwa kutsi babhalise emagama abo kanye netinombolo tabomatisi kubaphutfumi betinsita tematiko etigodzini tabo kuze batfole lelusito ngalokuphelele futsi ngendlela lehlelekile. Emahhovisi akahulumende abikile emhlanganweni wemakhansela kutsi loluhlelo lutawuchubeka kuze kube sekupheleni kwenyanga letako, lapho khona kulindzeleke kutsi kulungiswe emaphayiphi lamakhulu latfwala emanti lamotjekile. Ngetulu kwaloko, kukhishwa kwetimali tekutfutfukisa letakhiwo tasemakhaya sekugunyatiwe yikomidi yesabelomali yavelonkhe ngemuva kwekucocisana lokumatima. Lesinyatselo sitawucinisekisa kutsi tinsita letibalulekile tifika kubantfu ngesikhatsi lesifanele, kantsi baphatsi betifundza batfunyelwe kutsi bagadze kucaliswa kwalomsebenti kuze kugwemeke inkhohlakalo kanye nekumoshwa kwetinsita tambuso.

Ngemuva kweminyaka leminyenti yekuswelakala kwemanti lahlobile emiphakatsini lesesifundzeni saseShiselweni, kucalwa kweluhlelo lolusha lwekuletfwa kwetinsita sekulishintjile lizinga lemphilo kubahlali bakulendzawo. Loku kulandzela umbiko wakamuva loveta kutsi emaphesenti langetulu kwemashumi lasitfupha ebantfu abekadze ekhatsatwa kakhulu kubambetseka kwetinhlelo tentfutfuko. Kute kucatululwe lenkinga, Litiko Letemisebenti Yemphakatsi selibeke imitsetfo lecinile ledzinga kutsi tonkhe tikhalo tebantfu tiphendvulwe kungakapheli emalanga lasikhombisa ekusebenta. Ngetulu kwaloko, takhamuti letidzinga kufaka ticelo tetimvume tekusebentisa lomtfombo lomusha wemanti kumele tigcwalise emafomu latfolakala emahhovisi etinkhundla, futsi tiphatse namatisi wato waseSwatini. Baphatsi baloluhlelo bagcizelele kutsi kubambisana emkhatsini webaholi bendzabuko kanye netikhulu tahulumende kutawucinisekisa kutsi lomsebenti uphothulwa ngesikhatsi lesibekiwe ngaphandle kwenkhohlakalo. Ngaleyo ndlela, ummango uyakhutsatwa kutsi usebentise letinsita letiniketwe ngalokugcwele kute kutfutfukiswe umnotfo wendzawo kanye nenhlalakahle yesive sonkhe.

Ngemuva kweminyaka leminyenti yekuswelakala kwemanti etindzaweni letikhungetfwe yisomiso esifundzeni saseLubombo, imiti lengelenga etinkhulungwaneni letisihlanu seyitawutfola emanti lahlobile empompini. Loluhlelo lolusha lwekufaka tiphayiphi temanti luhambisana nesidzingo sekutsi tonkhe takhamuti tibhalise ngalokusemtsetfweni ematsikini lamisiwe kute tibe nesiqiniseko sekufakwa kwemamitha emanti emagcekeni ato. Kute lomsebenti wekuhanjiswa kwetinsita uhambe kahle ngaphandle kwetihibe, emalunga emiphakatsi kulindzeleke kutsi aphetse bomazisi bawo belive kanye netitifiketi tekuhlala letisayinwe babusi bendzawo nabaya etikhungweni tetinkhundla letisedvute nabo. Ngekusho kwemagunya aHulumende etendzabeni tetinsita temphakatsi, letinhlelo tekubhalisa titawutsatsa emaviki lamane kuphela, kantsi letikhalo letiphatselene nekubambetseka kwetinsita titawulalelwa tiphindze tisombululwe ngemakomidi emanti esigodzi ngesikhatsi lesifanele. Loku kulindzeleke kutsi kunciphise kakhulu tinkinga tetemphilo letibangelwa kunatsa emanti langakaphephi emifuleni, futsi kutfutfukise lizinga lemphilo kubantfu basemaphandleni labebasolo basalele emuva etinhlelweni tentfutfuko yelive kuleminyaka leyengcile. Tikhulu tigcizelele kutsi labo labangeke baphumelele kubhalisa ngalesikhatsi lesibekiwe batawubekelwa lelinye lilanga lelikhetsekile kute kungabikho mndeni losalela ngaphandle kuloluhlelo lwahulumende.

Ngemuva kwetinkinga letinyenti letibikiwe mayelana nekubambeleka kwetinsita tetekubhaliswa kwebantfu emaphandleni, kunesinyatselo lesisha lesitsetfwe kute kucatululwe lenkinga lesikhatse takhamuti sikhatsi lesidze. Litiko Letasekhaya limemetele ngalokusemtsetfweni kutsi litawucala luhlelo lolubanti lwekuhambela imiphakatsi leyehlukene kute likhiphe titifiketi tekutalwa, emaphasipoti, kanye nabomatisi. Loluhlelo, lolutawucala ekupheleni kwalenyanga etifundzeni letine talelive, luhlose kusita labo lababhekene nebumatima bekutfola timali tekugibela kuya emadolobheni lamakhulu. Ngekusho kwemkhulumeli wahulumende, lesinyatselo sitawenta kutsi kusheshe kutfunyelwe lusito kulabo labeswele, futsi kunciphise kolayini labadze lababonakala onkhe emalanga emahhovisi ahulumende. Kute loku kuphumelele, takhamuti tiyakhutsatwa kutsi tiphatse onkhe emaphepha ladzingekako, lafaka ekhatsi tincwadzi letivela kubabusi bendzawo kanye netitifiketi temshado kulabo labashadile, kute luhlelo lube lula futsi lungabambeleki. Lesikhatsi sekusebenta kwalamahhovisi langumahambanendlwana sitawuba semkhatsini wensimbi yesiphohlongo ekuseni kuya kuleyesine ntsambama. Loku kulindzeleke kutsi kutfutfukise kakhulu lizinga lekutfunyelwa kwetinsita tahulumende, kucinisekise kutsi wonkhe umuntfu utfola emalungelo akhe lamisiwe ngalokuphelele ngaphandle kwelubandlululo.

Ngesikhatsi bantfu labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu etindzaweni letisemaphandleni babhekene nenkinga yekweswelakala kwemanti lahlobile, kunesidzingo lesiphutfumako sekulungisa lesimo ngalokuphelele. Kulandzela lesikhalo lesibuhlungu, kukhishwe umbiko losemtsetfweni wekugunyatwa kwemsebenti wekufaka emaphayiphi lamasha kanye nekulungiswa kwemadamu lamancane kuleto tigodzi taseNingizimu. Kute loku kufezeke, letinhlelo titawucala ekupheleni kwalenyanga, futsi takhamuti tiyacelwa kutsi tingenise emaphepha ato ekutibhalisa etindvuneni tetigodzi kuze titfole lusito ngalokusemtsetfweni ngaphandle kwekubambeleleka lokungadzingeki. Ngemuva kwekwemukelwa kwalamaphepha, emakomidi endzawo atawuhlola onkhe emagama ngembi kwekutsi adluliselwe emahhovisini lamakhulu mbamba. Litiko Letemanti Netekutfutfukiswa Kwemiphakatsi litsembise kutsi litawugadza lomsebenti ngeliso lelibukhali, kute kucinisekiswe kutsi timali tembuso tisentjetiswa ngendlela lefanele, lengenayo inkhohlakalo. Ngetulu kwaloko, kusetjentiswa kwetinhlelo tebuchwepheshe besimanje ekwabiweni kwaletinsita kutawusita kakhulu ekwehliseni emaphutsa etemisebenti yebubhalane kanye nekusheshisa kutfunyelwa kwelusito kubantfu labadvonsa kamatima imihla nemalanga, lokutawenta kutsi letinsita tifike ngesikhatsi lesifanele kubo bonkhe labatsintsekako.

Emva kweminyaka leminyenti yekulindza, takhamuti tesigodzi saseShiselweni setitawutfola emanti lahlobile ngemuva kwekucedvwa kwemklamo lomkhulu wengcondvomsika. Lomklamo, lobite tigidzi letingemashumi lamabili temalangeni, ukhombisa kutibopha kwembuso ekutfutfukiseni tinhlelo tekulethwa kwetinsita tesive etindzaweni tasemaphandleni. Kute kucisekiswe kutsi lomsebenti uchubeka ngalokufanele, bonkhe labatsintsekako bayacelwa kutsi bayobhalisa emagameni abo emahhovisi etindvuna teticelo ngaphambi kwekuphela kwenyanga letako. Labo lababhalisako kufanele baphatse bofakazi babo bekuba takhamuti kanye netitifiketi tekuhlala letitfolakala etindvuneni tetigodzi letahlukahlukene kute bagweme kubambeleleka kwaloluhlelo. Ngekusho kwebaphatsi betemanti, luhlelo lwekuhambisa lamanti lutawucala ngeviki letako, kantsi kulindzeleke kutsi lusite imiti lengengetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu kuleso sifundza. Ngetulu kwaloko, Litiko Letemisebenti Yemphakatsi litawutfumela batisebenti tekugadza letakhiwo kute kuvinjelwe kumoshakala kwetipompi kanye nekulahleka kwemanti esikhatsini lesitako, lokulinyatselo lelibalulekile ekulondvoloteni umnotfo wavelonkhe nekuqinisekisa kutsi intsandvo yentfutfuko ifinyelela kubo bonkhe bantfu ngaphandle kwelubandlululo.

Ngemuva kwetimvula letinkhulu letibangele umonakalo lomkhulu kwingqalasizinda yetikolwa nemitfolamphilo etindzaweni tasemaphandleni, simo sekuletfwa kwetinsita sesibe sibucayi kakhulu eveni lonkhe. Loku kuphohelele litiko letemisebenti yemphakatsi kutsi libambisane netiphatfimandla tendzawo kute lisheshise luhlelo lwekulungisa nekunika lusito lolusheshako kubantfu labakhahlamekile. Ngaleyondlela, tonkhe takhamuti letilahlekelwe yimphahla tiyacelwa kutsi tibhalise umonakalo wato emehhovisi eTinkhundla letisedvute nato ngaphambi kwekuphela kwaleliviki, kute titfole lusito lwahulumende lolufanele. Uma sebabhalisile, lamahhovisi atawutfumela luhlu lwaletincelo kubaphatsi labakhulu kuze kukhishwe timali tesimo lesibucayi ngaphandle kwekubambelela etinhlelweni letindze tekuphatsa. Noma kunebumatima lobukhulu bekufinyelela kuletinye tindzawo ngenca yemigwaco lemibi leyoniwe ngemanti, baphathiswa bacinisekisile kutsi luhlelo lwekwaba tinsitancanti lutawuchubeka ngekushesha kute kungabikho umuntfu losalela emuva. Kantsi futsi, kubekwe emakomiti lamasha atawugadza emalanga onkhe kutsi letimali letabiwe tisetjentiswa ngendlela lefanele nangokwebalwa, kute kugwemeke inkhohlakalo nebudlabha ekuletfweni kwetinsita emphakatsini.

Kusukela ekucaleni kwaleliviki, takhamuti letingetulu kwemakhulu lasihlanu esifundzeni saseShiselweni titfole lusito lolusheshako mayelana nekukhishwa kwetifiketi tekutalwa kanye namatisi. Loku kulandzela kucaliswa kweluhlelo lolusha lwekutfutsela tinsita tahulumende emiphakatsini leyehlukene, kuze kuncitshiswe tindleko tekugibela kubantfu basemaphandleni. Emahhovisi etekubhalisa asabalele kuto tonkhe tinkhundla, kantsi tikhulu letijutjiwe tisebenta ngekukhulu kutikhandla kucinisekisa kutsi emafomu agcwaliswa ngendlela lefanele nangaphandle kwemaphutsa. Bantfu labanyenti bavakalise kujabula kwabo ngalelisu ngobe phambilini bekubatsatsa tinyanga letinyenti kutsi batfole letincwadzi, kantsi nyalo luhlelo selutsatsa emalanga lambalwa kuphela. Ukuze lomsebenti uhambe kahle, labo labafaka ticelo bayacelwa kutsi baletse tincwadzi tebufakazi bekuhlala letivela kubabusi bendzawo kanye nemakhophi ematisi ebatali babo. Ngetulu kwaloko, kukhutsatwa tonkhe takhamuti kutsi tibike noma ngabe ngukuphi kungagculiseki etikhungweni letifanele kuze kutfutfukiswe lizinga lekusebenta. Ngaletinyatselo letitsatfwako, kubonakala shengatsi inkinga yekubambeleka kwetincwadzi letibalulekile itawuba yintfo yesikhatsi lesengcile, njengoba nekusetjentiswa kwetheknoloji yesimanjemanje kusheshisa kucutshungulwa kwemininingwane yetakhamuti ngemphumelelo lemangalisako.

Ngekwenyuka lokushaqisako kwesibalo sebantfu labaphatfwa tifo letingatsatselwani, tinkhulungwane tetakhamuti takuleli tibhekene nengoti lenkhulu yesifo sashukela kanye nemfutfo lophakeme wengati. Kwentela kubhekana nalenkinga ebantfwini, emalanga lambalwa lendlulile kubanjwe umkhankhaso lomkhulu wetemphilo esifundzeni saseShiselweni, lapho khona bantfu labanyenti batfole litfuba lokuhlolwa mahhala, kuhlanganisa nekutfola kwelulekwa ngetendlela letifanele tekuphila. Lomunye wabahlali labatsite lusito kuloluhlelo, make Zanele Dlamini, uvakalise kubonga lokukhulu ngekutfola kwelashwa ngesikhatsi, waphindze wakhutsata labanye kutsi bangawesabi umtfolamphilo ngobe imphilo iyigugu kakhulu. Noma nje litiko letemphilo lichubeka nekuhlinzeka ngemitsi emitholamphilo yemphakatsi, tikhulu tetekwelapha tigcizelela ngemandla kutsi kuvikela kuncono kakhulu kunokwelapha, ngako-ke kudla lokunempilo nekuvivinya umtimba kufanele kube yimphilo yamalanga onkhe. Lemitamo lebalulekile yekufundzisa sive kulindzeleke kutsi isabalale nasemadolobheni lamakhulu nakulalamanye emaphandla kuleli viki lelitako, kute kucinisekiswe kutsi yonkhe imiphakatsi iyayicondza kabanzi imigomo yetenhlalakahle nenhlantseko lenempilo letasindzisa titukulwane letitako.

Emkhatsini weliviki leliphelile, bantfu labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu esifundzeni saseShiselweni batfole lusito lwetekwelashwa mahhala ngesikhatsi semkhankhaso lomkhulu wetempilo lowendlalwe kulo lonkhe leli. Loku kuta ngemuva kwekukhula kwekhatsateko ngetifo letingatsatselwani letifaka ekhatsi isifo sashukela kanye nemandla engati, letibonakale tihlasela kakhulu imiphakatsi yasemaphandleni ngetindlela letetfusako. Kutsiwa labosebenti betempilo basebente ngekutimisela ematilasini etekwelashwa langemakhambi lahambahambako, baniketa luhlolo lolubanti lwemtimba, imitsi yekudambisa tifo, kanye nekwelulekwa ngetindlela letinempilo tekuphila ekhaya. Ngesikhatsi ahambele lomcimbi wemphakatsi, lomunye webaholi bemdabu ubonge kakhulu ngalelilungelo lelingavamile, wagcizelela kutsi imphilo lenhle isisekelo sentfutfuko yesive ngobe sive lesigulako singeke sikhone kusebenta nekuphakamisa umnotfo wendzawo. Noma nje Litiko Letempilo belingumgqugquseli lomkhulu waloluhlelo, kubambisana netinhlangano letingekho ngaphansi kwahulumende kudlale indzima lenkhulu ekuletseni letinsita dvute nebantfu labeswele nasebekhulile. Esikhatsini lesitako, letinhlelo tetempilo kulindzeleke kutsi tinwetjelwe nakweletinye tifundza letifana neLubombo kute kucinisekiswe kutsi wonkhe umuntfu utfola kunakekelwa lokufanele ngaphandle kwekukhokha timali letinyenti emitholampilo.

Esigodzini saseMankayane, emakhulu etakhamuti avuke ngesikhathi seluvivi kute atohlanganyela emkhankasweni lomkhulu wetempilo lowentiwe kuleliviki. Tibalo letisandza kushicilelwa tikhombisa kutsi ngetulu kwemakhulu lasihlanu ebantfu batfole lusito lwekwelashwa ngelilanga lekucala nje kuphela. Loku kuhlangana bekuhlose kulwisana ngemandla netifo letingatsatselwani, letifaka ekhatsi isifo sashukela kanye nemfutfo lophakeme wengati, letibonakala tidlangile kakhulu emiphakatsini yasemaphandleni kuleminyaka lembalwa leyengcile. Ngekusita kwabongoti betempilo labebasebenta ngematende lamhlophe labekwe ebaleni lasesikolweni, bantfu labadzala nalabasha batfole litfuba lekuhlolwa mahhala, futsi baniketwa nemitsi ledzingekako ngaphandle kwekukhokha ngisho nasenti. Emuva kwekutfola lolusito, lomunye webaholi bemdabu ubonge kakhulu ngaleluhlelo lolubaluleke kangaka, waphindze wakhutsata wonkhe ummango kutsi unganaki kuphela nasekugulwa kakhulu, kodvwa ukhutsalele kuvikela tifo kusenesikhatsi ngekudla kahle nekuvocavoca umtimba. Kantsi kulindzeleke kutsi letinsita letinika litsemba tichubekele nakulamanye emadolobha lamancane esiveni kuleyinyanga letako, kute kucinisekiswe kutsi imphilo lenhle ifinyelela kubo bonkhe bantfu baseSwatini ngaphandle kwelubandlululo lwetigaba temnotfo.

Bantfu labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu esifundzeni saseShiselweni batfole lusito lwetekwelashwa kwamahhala kulamalanga lamashumi lamabili lendlulile ngesikhatsi semkhankhaso lomusha wetemphilo loyisipesheli. Loluhlelo belugcile kakhulu ekuhloleni tifo letingatsatselwani, letifaka ekhatsi isifo sashukela, umfutfo lophakeme wengati, kanye nekunika bantfwana imigomo lebalulekile yekubavikela kutifo letibangela kukhubateka. Ngesikhatsi achaza ngalomsebenti lomuhle labawentile, lomunye webahlengikati labakhulu emtholampilo wendzawo ubike kutsi kubambisana kwemiphakatsi nebaholi bendzabuko kube yinsika yekuphumelela kwalomkhankhaso, njengoba loko kwente bantfu labadala nalabasha baphuma ngobunyingi babo kute batfole lusito. Nangaphandle kwaloko, litiko letemphilo libambisene netinhlangano tetive letingekho ngaphansi kwahulumende kuze kucinisekiswe kutsi imitsi, imishini yesimanje, nebasebenti betemphilo bandzisiwe kakhulu kuletindzawo tasemaphandleni letikhashane. Kute kuchubekisela embili lenhlalakahle yemphakatsi, kuhlelwe letinye tinhlelo letinabile tekufundzisa sive ngetindlela letifanele tekutinakekela emakhaya, kudla lokunempilo, kanye nekubaluleka kwekuvocavoca umtimba, ngenjongo yekwehlisa lizinga lekugula kulo lonkhe live esikhatsini lesitako.
