Bantfu labangetulu kwemakhulu lasihlanu esifundzeni saseShiselweni batfole lusito lwetekwelashwa mahhala kulomkhankhaso wetemphilo lowenteke kuleliphelaviki lelendlulile. Luhlelo lolubalulekile belugcile ekuhlolweni kwetifo letingatsatselwani letifaka ekhatsi isifo sashukela kanye nemfutfo lophakeme wengati, ngobe letifo tichubeka nekutsatsa imiphefumulo leminyenti emiphakatsini yetfu. Ngesikhatsi achaza ngalesimo, lomunye webahlengikati labebahola lomsebenti ugcizelele kutsi kubonwa kwalesifo kusenesikhatsi ngiko lokungasindzisa timphilo tebantfu, waphindze waniketa labagulako imitsi ledzingekako. Kute kucinisekiswe kutsi wonkhe muntfu utfola kunakekelwa lokufanele nalokuphelele, imitfola-mphilo lehambahambako itawuchubeka nekuhambela tindzawo tasemaphandleni letikhashane kuyo yonkhe lenyanga. Ngetulu kwaloko, bagqugquseli betemphilo bafundzise ummango ngebuhlantongi nangetindlela tekuvikela kubhebhetseka kwemikhuhlane yetikhatsi temnyaka. Kukhutsatwa kwenhlalakahle yemmango akusito nje kuphela tibopho tabohulumende, kodvwa kudzinga kutsi takhamuti nato tingenelele ngekudla kudla lokwakhako, kunatsa emanti lahlobile, kanye nekuvivinya umtimba onkhe malanga kuze kugcinwe imitimba iphilile.

Ngemuva kwekukhula kwesibalo sebantfu labaphatfwa tifo letingavikeleka esigodzini saseShiselweni, kucaliswe umkhankhaso lomkhulu wekutfutfukisa inhlalakahle yemphakatsi kuleyondzawo. Bahlengikati nebasebenti betemphilo labaceceshiwe batfunyelwe kuto tonkhe tigodzi kute banikete lusito lwekuhlola mahhala, kwelapha emagciwane, kanye nekugoma bantfwana labancane nebekhulile. Kulamaviki lamabili landlulile, tibalelwa emakhulwini lasihlanu takhamuti lesetitfole kwelashwa lokufanele, lokuyintfo lenciphise kakhulu umtfwalo wekugcwala kwebantfu emitholampilo yakulendzawo. Baholi bendzabuko kanye nababehlali bakhutsate bonkhe bantfu kutsi bagcine buhlantfoti emakhaya abo futsi basebentise lamathuba emitholampilo lengumahamba-nendlwana ngalokugcwele. Ngetulu kwaloko, kucelwe imindeni kutsi ibike masinyane etikhungweni tetemphilo nangabe kukhona lophelelwa ngemandla nobe lokhombisa tishwayo tekugula lokuphutfumako. Lohlelo loluhle kangaka kulindzeleke kutsi luchubekele nakuleletinye tifundza talelive etinyangeni letitako, ngenhloso yekuqinisekisa kutsi imisebenti yetemphilo isontekela ncono kubantfu labasemakhaya, kute kwakhiwe sive lesiphilile, lesicinile, nalesiphephile etifeni letitsatselanako.

Etindzaweni tasemaphandleni esifundzeni saseLubombo, kwandza lokusheshako kwezigameko tesifo samalaleveva sekubangele kutsi kucale umkhankaso lomkhulu wekutfutfukisa imphilo yemmango. Tisebenti tetemphilo kanye nebaholi bendzawo basebenta ngekubambisana kute bafundzise takhamuti ngetindlela tekutivikela, letifaka ekhatsi kusebentisa emaneti ekutivikela emiyane kanye nekugcina inhlantseko emakhaya. Ngembi kwekuphela kwaleliviki, bantfu labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letimbili bebesele batfolile lusito lwekwelashwa mahhala emitholampilo lehhambahhambako leyakhiwe dvutane netikolwa. Ngetulu kwaloko, emavolontiya aphume ngelikhulu lizinga kute ahambise emaphilisi ekuhlunga emanti etindlini ngetindlu, ngenhloso yekuvikela kubheduka kwesifo semshudo ngemuva kwetimvula letinkhulu letisandza kuna. Ngesikhatsi aphendvula ngalesimo, lobekhuluma egameni letetemphilo wagcizelela kutsi kubalulekile kutsi wonkhe muntfu atsatse linyatselo masinyane nangabe atibona anetimphawu tekugula, futsi wakhutsata batali kutsi bagome bantfwana babo. Lolutshalo-mali lwetinsita tetemphilo telive alugcini nje ngekulwa naletifo letiyingoti kuphela, kodvwa luphindze lwakhe sisekelo lesicinile senhlalakahle yesive yonkhe esikhatsini lesitako.

Esifundzeni saseLubombo, umkhankaso lomusha wekugoma nekwelapha tifo letingatsatselwani sewuletse litsemba lelikhulu etakhamutini letinyenti letatihlala etikhashane netikhungo tetemphilo. Ngesikhatsi lesengcile, lizinga lebantfu labaphatfwa sifo sashukela nemfutfo lomkhulu wengati belikhuphuke ngemandla, lokube yimbangela yekutsi baholi bemiphakatsi bahlabe umkhosi. Ngekuphendvula lesikhalo, kutfunyelwe tikhungo tetemphilo letingomahambanendlwana kuto tonkhe tigodzi kuze kucinisekiswe kutsi bantfu labadzala kanye nebantfwana batfola lusito lwekwelashwa ngesikhatsi lesifanele. Loko kwente kutsi simo semphilo sibe ncono kakhulu endzaweni, njengobe lababetigulane nyalo sebakhona kuchubeka nemisebenti yabo yamalanga onkhe ngaphandle kwekuphazamiseka. Ngetulu kwaloko, bachwepheshe betemphilo basemkhatsini wekugcugcutela ummango kutsi kudla lokunemphilo nekuvivinya umtimba kuyincenye lebalulekile yekuvikela letifo. Baphindze bagcizelela sidzingo sekutsi lomsebentsi lomuhle uchubeke futsi wandziswe nakweletinye tifundza kute kuncishiswe tindleko tekunakekela tigulane etibhedlela, kantsi futsi kukhutsatwa wonkhe umuntfu kutsi ahlolele timphilo takhe njalo emitholampilo lesedvute.

Emkhatsini wekukhula lokunyantisako kwesibalo sebantfu labaphatfwa tifo letingatsatselwani njengashukela kanye nesifo senhlitiyo, inkinga yetemphilo isiphendvuke indzaba letsintsa wonkhe umuntfu emphakatsini. Kute kubhekwane nalesimo lesibucayi, kucalwe umkhankhaso lomkhulu wekuhlola mahhala esifundzeni saseManzini kuleliviki leliphelile, lapho khona emakhulu ebantfu atfole lusito lwekwelashwa ngaphandle kwekubhadala ngisho nendibilishi. Loluhlelo lolubalulekile luhlose kutfola letifo tisesemancane kute tivikeleke ngemandla, futsi lufaka ekhatsi kuhlolwa kwemfutfo wengati, sikali samashukela, kanye nekwelulekwa ngetendlela letifanele tekudla lokwakhako. Bahlali bakulendzawo bavakalise kujabula kwabo ngalelinyatselo lelitsatfwe ngubosondzondvo betemphilo, babalula kutsi litawusita kakhulu emalunga emindeni labete emandla ekubhadalela tindleko tasemitholampilo letimele letivame kubita kakhulu. Ngetulu kwaloko, bahlengikati kanye nebasebenti betemphilo batawuchubeka nekuhambela tigodzi letehlukene ngenyanga letako kute bafundzise ngelubaluleko lwekugcina inhlantseko emakhaya. Ngalomzamo, kucinisekiswa kutsi imfundvo ngetekuphepha emtimbeni ifinyelela nasetindzaweni tasemaphandleni letikhashane, inhloso lenkhulu kukhulisa tizinga tetemphilo kuze kwakhiwe sive lesinemphilo nalesicinile.

Ngetulu kwetitakhamuti letingeti-5 000 esifundzeni saseShiselweni tisandza kuhlanganyela emkhankasweni lomkhulu wekuhlolwa kwetemphilo lohlose kulwa netifo letingatsatselwani letifana neshukela kanye nemandla engati. Lokugula lokungatsatselwani kubangele kukhuliseka kwekushona kwebantfu eminyakeni lembalwa leyengcile, ngaloko kwenta lesinyatselo sibe yimphumelelo lenkhulu ekulondvoloteni imiphakatsi. Baholi bemiphakatsi yakuleyo ndzawo bawuncomile lomkhankaso, baphawula kutsi kusheshe kutfonwe letifo futsi kucalwe kwelashwa sekusindzise timphilo letinyenti kakhulu ebantfweni labadzala nalabasha. Ngenhloso yekuqinisekisa kutsi wonkhe muntfu utfola lusito lolufanele ngisho nasetindzaweni letikhashane, kutfunyelwe emakliniki langumahambahlatjana lahlome ngemishini yesimanje yekuhlola. Ngetulu kwaloko, bakhutsati betemphilo emiphakatsini bahamba imiti ngemiti bafundzisa imindeni ngetindlela tekugcina inhlantsi yetemphilo, ikakhulukati kugeza tandla nekudla tintfo letinomsoco. Ngesikhatsi lesifanako, bachwephesha betekwelapha banxusa bantfu kutsi bangalindzeli kugula kakhulu ngaphambi kwekuya etikhungweni tetemphilo. Lokusebentisana lokuhle emkhatsini webasebenti betemphilo netakhiwo tesintfu kukhombisa kutinikela lokucinile ekutfutfukiseni inhlalakahle kanye nekwakha likusasa leliphephile kuto tonkhe takhamuti.

Emphakatsini waseMankayane, emakhulu ebantfu babutsene ngenhloso yekutfola lusito lwetempilo lwamahhala ngaphansi kwemkhankhaso lomusha wekucecesha ngetifo letingatsatselwani letifana neshukela kanye nengati lehambela etulu. Lesi simo silandzela kubikwa kwelizinga lelisetulu laletetifo letibulala butfule kulesi sifundza kuleminyaka lemibili leyengcile, lokuyintfo lebangele kukhwetshwa kwetikhungo tetempilo. Kute kubhekwane ngco naletinkinga, babukeli betempilo emiphakatsini nyalo bahamba imiti ngemiti benta kuhlola lokusheshako, bahambisa imitiyane, futsi baniketa teluleko letijulile ngetekudla lokwakha umtimba. Ngekusho kwabongoti betekwelapha labebakhona kulomcimbi, kubalulekile kakhulu kutsi takhamuti tisheshe tiyotihlola ngaphambi kwekutsi tifo tibe matima, kantsi loku kungasita kakhulu ekwehliseni umtfwalo lomkhulu etibhedlela tahulumende. Ngetulu kwaloko, luhlelo lwekugoma bantfwana labancane kanye nekuvikela bomake labatitfwele luyachubeka kuto tonkhe tikhungo tetempilo tasemakhaya. Imphumelelo yalomkhankhaso ikhombisa ngalokucacile kutsi kubambisana emkhatsini webaholi bemiphakatsi kanye nebetempilo kungaliletsa lushintjo lolubonakalako enhlalakahleni yetakhamuti tonkhe. Loku kuniketa litsemba lekutsi litikusasa lesive litawuba lelivikelekile etifeni letinyenti letingavikeleka nangabe kutsatfwa tinyatselo letifanele kusenesikhatsi.

Emkhatsini wetinyanga letisitfupha letengcile, lizinga letifo letitsatselwanako kubantfwana labancane linciphe ngemaphesenti langemashumi lamabili nakuhlanu endzaweni yaseMbabane nakuletinye tigodzi letakhelene nayo. Loku kuletfwe mkhankhaso lomkhulu wetempilo lowentiwe babukeli betempilo emiphakatsini, labahambele imiti ngemiti bafundzisa imindeni ngekubaluleka kwekugoma kanye nekuhlanta emanti ekunatsa. Ngetulu kwaloko, imitholampilo isungule luhlelo lwekwelapha mahhala bantfu labadzala labanephefumulo neshukela, kute kuvikelwe tigameko tekugula lokungazelelwe. Ngekusho kwabongoti betekwelapha, kubambisana kwetinhlangano letingekho ngaphansi kwahulumende kanye nebaholi bendzabuko kudlale indzima lenkhulu ekugcugcuteleni takhamuti kutsi tisebentise letinsita letitfolakalako ngaphandle kwekwesaba. Kusukela ngeliviki letako, litimba lebelaphi litawube libhace etindzaweni tasemaphandleni letikhashane, lapho khona kutawuniketwa tihlatiyo temtimba letiphelele letifaka ekhatsi kuhlolwa kwemehlo, kuhlola sandvulelangculazi, kanye nekwelulekwa ngetekudla lokunemsoco. Lomzamo ukhombisa ngalokucacile kutsi kutinikela ekutfutfukiseni inhlalakahle yemmango kungalondvolota timphilo letinyenti futsi kwakhe sive lesicinile, lesinemandla ekumelana netinselele tetempilo tangomuso.

Ngetulu kwetitakhamuti letingeti-5 000 esifundzeni saseLubombo titfole luhlolo lwetemphilo lwamahhala kulemphelasontfo leyengcile ngesikhatsi semkhankhaso lomkhulu wekutfutfukisa inhlalakahle yemmango. Lomkhankhaso, lohlose kulwisana netifo letingatsatselwani letifana neshukela kanye nemfutfo lophakeme wengati, wente kutsi ematliniki endzawo elule tikhatsi tawo tekusebenta kuze asite bantfu labanyenti. Bosebenti betemphilo bagcizelela kakhulu kutsi kusheshe kutfonwe sifo kusindzisa timphilo, ngako-ke bakhutsata tonkhe takhamuti kutsi tisebentise letinsita. Ngetulu kwaloko, kutfunyelwe ematliniki langumahambahambayo etindzaweni tasemakhaya letikhashane kute kucinisekiswe kutsi kute umuntfu losalela emuva ekutfoleni lusito lwetekwelashwa. Baphatsi bemimango nabo bavakalise kubonga lokukhulu ngalelinyatselo, babalula kutsi imfundvo yetemphilo idlala indzima lebalulekile ekuguculeni tindlela tekuphila. Ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi, loluhlelo lutawunwetjelwa kuto tonkhe tifundza letine takulelive ngaphambi kwekuphela kwemnyaka, ngenhloso yekwehlisa umtfwalo etibhedlela letinkhulu kanye nekuvikela kubhebhetseka kwetifo letingelapheka nangabe titfolakala kusenesikhatsi.

Emkhatsini wekubikwa kwekukhula kwesibalo sebantfu labaphatfwa sifo sashukela kanye nengati lehambela etulu, inkhankhaso lensha yekuhlola imphilo yemmango isite tinkhulungwane tetakhamuti takaSiphofaneni kuleliviki leliphelile. Lolu hlelo, loluholwa babukeli betemphilo bendzawo, luhlose kufinyelela etindzaweni tasemaphandleni lapho khona lusito lwetekwelapha luvame kusheshe lungatfolakali. Ngekusho kwabongoti betemphilo, kubalulekile kutfola tifo tisacala kuze kugwemeke tinkinga letinkhulu esikhatsini lesitako. Ngesikhatsi salomcimbi, bantfwana labangaphansi kweminyaka lesihlanu batfole imigomo lebalulekile, kantsi labadzala baniketwe teluleko ngetindlela letinempilo tekudla kanye nekuvocavoca umtimba. Ngetulu kwaloko, bomake labakhulelwe bahlolwe mahhala futsi baphiwa nemaphilisi lacinisa umtimba. Imizamo lefana nalena kulindzeleke kutsi ichubekele nakulamanye emadolobha esifundzeni saseLubombo etinyangeni letitako, kute kucinisekiswe kutsi wonkhe muntfu utfola litfuba lekuphila imphilo lencono futsi lephephile. Loku kukhombisa kutibophezela lokukhulu ekutfutfukiseni inhlalakahle yesive jikelele.

Kwandza lokumatima kwesifo samalaleveva esifundzeni saseLubombo kupocelele kutsi kutsatfwe tinyatselo letisheshako tekusita imiphakatsi kulesimo lesibucayi. Kute kuphendvulwe kulesidzingo, imitholampilo lehambahambako itfunyelwe kuto tonkhe tigodzi letikhashane kuze ihlole bantfu, inikete imitsi, futsi iphe imindeni emaneti lavikela timiyane. Ngekusho kwemibiko yakamuva yabetemphilo, bantfu labangetulu kwemakhulu lasihlanu baphatsekile kule nyanga lephelile kuphela, lokugcizelela sidzingo lesikhulu setinhlelo tetemphilo letichubekako netimfundziso letijulile emiphakatsini. Emtameni wekucedza lelidlambi, bobabe tikhulu, emabandla, kanye nabomhloloti basebentisana ngekutimisela kucinisekisa kutsi wonkhe umuntfu uthola lusito kusenesikhatsi ngaphandle kwekukhokha timali letinyenti. Ngetulu kwaloko, takhamuti tikhutsatwa kakhulu kutsi tigcine tindzawo tati tihlanta, tisuse emanti lamile lapho kutalela khona timiyane, tiphindze tifune lusito lwetekwelashwa ngekushesha nangabe titiva tingaphili kahle. Lemikhankhaso yekuvikela tifo ibaluleke kakhulu ngobe imphilo lenhle yemphakatsi isisekelo sesive lesicinile nalesitfutfukako, kantsi kubambisana kwabo bonkhe bantfu kutawulethela live imphumelelo ekucedzeni tonkhe tifo letitsatselwanako.

Emkhatsini wekukhula kwesibalo sebantfu labaphatfwa tifo letingatsatselwani, letifaka ekhatsi ishungwe kanye nengati lehambela etulu, takhamuti taseShiselweni titfole lusito lolukhulu ngesikhatsi kucalwa luhlelo lwekuletsa tinsita tetempilo emiphakatsini yabo. Loku kuta emva kwekuba kubikwe kutsi emaphesenti langemashumi lamatsatfu ebantfu labadzala kulesigodzi abakaze bahlolwe letifo eminyakeni lemibili leyengcile. Ngesikhatsi achaza ngaleluhlelo, lomunye webahlengikati labaholako kulemikhankhaso ugcizelele kutsi kubalulekile kutsi bantfu batfole kwelashwa kusesekuseni kuze kugwemeke tinkinga letimatima letifana nekushaywa luveva. Ngetulu kwekuhlolwa kwetifo, lomkhankhaso uphindze wakhutsata kudzla kudla lokunemphilo kanye nekutivocavoca emalanga onkhe, futsi linani lelikhulu lebantfu labasha liphendvule ngekuhlanganyela kuleto tinhlelo ngenkhuthalo lenkhulu. Emaviki latako atawubona letinsita letibalulekile tenetiswa kuletinye tigodzi takulelive letingakafikelelwa, kute kucinisekiswe kutsi wonkhe umuntfu utfola litfuba lekuphila imphilo lencono. Ngenca yalokwesekelwa ngemitsi kanye netinsita tekwelulekwa kwengcondvo letiniketwe mahhala, litsemba lekunciphisa tifo letingalapheki selibuyile kubantfu labanyenti labebete emandla ekuya etibhedlela letikhulu.

Esifundzeni saseShiselweni etindzaweni tasemaphandleni, takhamuti letingetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu titfole lusito lolukhulu kutetemphilo ngeluhlelo lolusha lwekunakekela imitimba lolusandza kwetfulwa. Lomkhankhaso lomkhulu, logcile ekuvikeleni tifo letingalapheki letifana neshukela, umdlavuza, kanye nengati lehambela etulu, uletsa kuhlola kwemahhala kwebantfu emiphakatsini yabo ngaphandle kwekubabhadalisa ngisho nesenti. Bosebenti betemphilo basebente ngekutikhandla lokumangalisako, bahamba imiti ngemiti kute bafundzise imindeni ngetinhlanzeko emakhaya kanye nekubaluleka kwekudla lokunemsoco. Ngekusho kwabaholi bendzawo lababuke luhlelo, kuba khona kwemitholampilo lengumahambanendlwana kunciphise umtstwalo etibhedlela letinkhulu tahulumende futsi kwasindzisa timphilo letinyenti letibucayi. Ngetulu kwaloko, kukhishwa kwemitsi yekugoma kukhuliswe kakhulu kute kuvikelwe bantfwana labancane etifeni letitsatselanako letiyingoti. Loku kuhlanganisa nekuniketwa kwemaphilisi ekuhlunga emanti kute kugwenywe sifo semahemuhemu kanye nesihudo lesibangelwa kunatsa emanti langakahlanteki kahle. Kuya embili, tonkhe tzakhamuti tikhutsatwa ngalokujulile kutsi tichubeke nekubamba iqhaza lelibonakalako kuletinhlelo tetemphilo temmango kute kwakhiwe sive lesicinile, lesiphilile futsi lesite tifo.

Emakhulwini lamatsatfu ebatfu labahlala esifundzeni saseShiselweni batfole lusito lwetekwelapha mahhala ngesikhatsi semkhankhaso lomusha wekugadza tifo letingatsatselwani esiveni. Loku kuta ngemuva kwekukhula lokwethusako kwelizinga lebantfu labaphatfwa sifo sashukela kanye nengati lehambela etulu etindzaweni tasemaphandleni kuleminyaka lemibili leyengcile. Kulesi simo, badokotela nabahlengikati basebente ngekutimisela lokukhulu emalanga lamatsatfu kulandzelana, bahlola tinkinga tetemphilo baphindze baphe neteluleko letibalulekile letimayelana nekudla lokwakhako. Kubonakala kwalomkhankhaso kuletse litsemba lelikhulu kubahlali bakulendzawo, njengoba labanyenti babo bebete imali yekuvela etibhedlela letinkhulu kute batfole imitsi yemalanga onkhe. Kwentela kugcina lemphilo lenhle, baholi bemiphakatsi labehlukene bakhutsate bantfu kutsi bachubeke nekuvivinya umtimba emakhaya futsi banatse emanti lahlantekile ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi. Ngesikhatsi lesitako, letinhlelo tekusita ummango titawuchubeka tifinyelele nakweletinye tifundza talelive kute kuqinisekiswe kutsi wonkhe umuntfu utfola kunakekelwa lokufanele ngaphandle kwekukhokha timali letinyenti letingamlimata emaphaketheni.

Bantfwana labangetulu kwetinkhulungwane letisihlanu esifundzeni saseShiselweni sebawutfole ngemphumelelo umjovo wekugoma kulandzela kwandza kwetifo letitsatselwanako letifaka ekhatsi simungumungwane netifo tesifuba etinyangeni letimbalwa letengcile. Kule mpelasontfo, imitsfolampilo yendzawo beyigcwele phama batali lababeke imphilo yemindeni yabo embili, lokukhombisa kutinikela lokukhulu enhlalakahleni yemmango kanye nekuvikela tifo ngaphambi kwekutsi tihlasele. Basebenti betemphilo bahambele etindzaweni tasemaphandleni letikhashane kuqinisekisa kutsi kute umuntfu losalela emuva kuloluhlelo, lapho banganiketi nje kuphela imijovo kodvwa baphindze bafundzisa ngekuhlanta kwemtimba kanye nekudla lokunemsoco lokwakha emasotja emtimba. Nanobe lokubhedvuka kwaletifo kucale kwabanga kwetfuka lokukhulu emimangweni leyehlukene, kubambisana ngekushesha emkhatsini webaholi bendzawo, imikhandlu yetigodzi, kanye nabodokotela sekusimamise lesimo ngalokubonakalako. Ngetulu kwaloko, kusetjentiswa kwemisakato yendzawo ekusakateleni imiyalezo yetemphilo kudlale indzima lenkhulu ekufundziseni bantfu ngetibonakaliso taletifo. Takhamuti tikhutsatwa kutsi tichubeke nalomfutfo lomuhle ngekutsi tivakashele tikhungo tetemphilo njalo kute tihlolwe ngisho nobe tingakaguli, ngobe loko kucinisa luhlelo lwetemphilo lwelive lonkhe futsi kuvikela titukulwane letitako etingotini letingagwemeka.

Ngesikhatsi sibalo sebantfu labaphatfwa tifo letingatsatselwani sichubeka nekwenyuka kuleli, umkhankhaso lomusha wekutfutfukisa inhlalakahle yemmango wethulwe etindzaweni tasemaphandleni esifundzeni saseShiselweni ngalemphelaviki lengcile. Emakhulu etakhamuti aphume ngelishumi atewutfola lusito lwekuhlola mahhala umfutfo wengati, isifo sashukela, kanye negciwane lesandvulelangculazi, lokuyintfo lekhombisa sidzingo lesikhulu setinsita tetemphilo letitfolakala kalula. Kute kucinisekiswe kuchubeka kwelusito lolufanele, emakliniki langumahambahamba atawuvakashela letindzawo njalo ngemaviki lamabili, kusondzetwa imitsi kanye nekwelulekwa kubantfu labete emandla ekuya etibhedlela letikhashane. Ngetulu kwaloko, bosebenti betemphilo bachitse sikhatsi lesidze bafundzisa ummango ngekubaluleka kwekudla lokunempilo nekuvocavoca umtimba onkhe malanga. Kulomcimbi, labadzala belive bavakalise kubonga lokukhulu ngaleluhlelo, bagcizelela kutsi imiphakatsi lenempilo isisekelo sentfutfuko yesive. Bongcweti betemphilo baphetse ngekukhutsata tonkhe takhamuti kutsi tibeke embili kuhlola imitimba yato njalo ngaphambi kwekutsi tifo tifike ezingeni leliyingoti, babalula kutsi kuvikela kuncono kakhulu kunekwelapha.
